zh.prompt: 一张写实的明治浪漫主义时尚肖像，主角为 {argument name="age" default="18 岁"} 的 {argument name="subject" default="日本女性"}，身材娇小，春季限定，晴朗的白昼，明亮的蓝天，清澈的日光，精致的侧盘发造型，神秘而温柔的微笑，注视着镜头，身着 {argument name="clothing" default="复古服饰，和服"}，1920 年代时尚，迷你裙，靴子，明亮的浅色系服饰，柔和的粉彩色调，轻盈愉悦的造型，背景：城市，9:16 竖构图，肖像方向，以航拍视角捕捉带有网格图案的场景，背景与主体保持协调且自然可辨，仅限站姿，全身或四分之三身站立肖像，无坐姿，优雅端庄的复古造型，姿态优雅，主体居中，自然视角，真实的阴影，自然的织物纹理，明治时代氛围，高质量写实摄影，摄影级真实感，无插画风格天空效果

en.title: Oriental Minimalist Silhouette Poster
en.description: An elegant oriental minimalist poster prompt featuring a feminine silhouette behind a translucent gauze curtain, using a high-contrast luxury aesthetic.
en.prompt:
Theme Direction: Oriental Zen Minimalist Poster
Style Branch: High-Contrast Light Luxury Type
Subject Content: {argument name="subject" default="A silhouette of an ancient-style graceful figure with prominent body curves standing behind a gauze curtain"}
Emotional Motif: Hazy, elegant, dramatic within stillness
Scenes and Imagery: {argument name="curtain color" default="Red-orange"} window screen, water-blue tree shadows outside the window, warm white walls, character silhouette
Composition and Space: Centered composition, with the gauze curtain forming the semi-transparent main visual, the character behind the center of the curtain, and the walls and window shadows providing negative space
Color Control: {argument name="wall color" default="Warm white"} as the base for the wall and negative space, water-blue for the tree shadows outside and a sense of airiness, red-orange only for the main curtain body and local warm light, and dark gray for the character silhouette; avoid an overall orange tint
Light and Texture: Soft translucent light, light texture on the gauze curtain, light paper feel, softened edges
Aspect Ratio: 9:16
Additional Requirements: The image should have a feminine aesthetic cover feel but remain minimalist, avoiding complex indoor furnishings

zh.title: 东方禅意极简剪影海报
zh.description: 一个专业且精致的提示词，用于创作具有东方美学的高对比度极简海报，展现丝绸帘幕后优雅的剪影。
zh.prompt: 主题：{argument name="theme" default="东方禅意极简海报"} 风格：高对比度轻奢风 主体：{argument name="subject" default="一位身姿曼妙的古风优雅人物剪影，伫立在丝绸帘幕后"} 情感：朦胧、优雅、戏剧性的静谧 场景：朱砂橙色窗纱，窗外水蓝色树影，暖白色墙面，人物剪影 构图：居中构图，帘幕带来的通透视觉感，人物位于帘幕后方中心，墙面与阴影留白 色调：{argument name="color scheme" default="暖白底色，水蓝色用于阴影与氛围，朱砂橙色用于帘幕及局部暖光"} 光影/质感：柔和的透射光，轻薄的帘幕质感，纸张触感，边缘柔和 比例：9:16 注意：女性美学封面感，极简主义，无复杂的室内家具

en.title: Sunlit Tatami Room Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for creating a realistic Japanese portrait of a woman in a sunlit tatami room. It focuses on the play of light, delicate skin textures, and the specific aesthetics of a traditional interior with soft natural lighting.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="light through tatami mats"}

Main Subject:
A vertical composition, realistic photography-style portrait. A {argument name="age" default="20-something"} Japanese woman is seated on tatami mats in a bright Japanese-style room, positioned prominently slightly to the right of the center. High-angle bird's-eye view including the upper body, waist, and thighs, with the person occupying about 70% of the frame. On the left, light filters through shoji screens and onto the tatami; in the back right, a wooden shelf and a small houseplant are visible.

Person and Expression:
Fair skin with an ivory-beige tone and a smooth texture with a hint of pink. Soft highlights on the cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, and collarbone, preserving natural skin texture. Precise and elegant doll-like Japanese-style makeup. Light rose-pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eye shadow, long slender eyelashes, natural tear bags, light brown eyebrows, and a sheer pink-beige gloss lip. Clear, small catchlights in the eyes. The expression is calm, looking up at the camera with a slight smile.

Clothing and Pose:
Milk tea ash brown hair with thin see-through bangs, a layered cut framing the face, and medium-long length reaching below the shoulders. Ends are loosely curled inward with natural texture and soft shine. Wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="cream-colored wrap-design long-sleeved knit top"}. A delicate lace inner garment is slightly visible at the neckline, with careful rendering of the overlapping fabric and knit texture. A light blue pleated skirt of short length, reaching mid-thigh. The right hand softly adjusts the hair by the ear, while the left hand rests naturally on the tatami to support the body.

Background and Lighting:
The background is a serene Japanese-style room. Shoji screens, wooden frames, tatami, wooden shelves, small ceramics, and houseplants are placed subtly. The main light source is soft afternoon natural light coming through the shoji in the upper left. Faint highlights fall on the face, hair, collarbone, shoulders, knees, and skirt pleats, while thin lattice shadows from the shoji fall on the tatami. The color palette consists of ivory, beige, light blue, and warm wooden browns.

Composition and Camera:
Vertical composition, a high-angle portrait from above. The face is toward the top of the frame, naturally leading down through the chest, waist, short skirt, and thighs. Close-up camera distance, focusing sharply on the face and eyes. The background is slightly blurred while maintaining the texture of the tatami and the light from the shoji. The subject's body is slightly twisted diagonally, creating a sense of three-dimensionality by looking upward.

Texture and Style:
High-definition realistic photographic expression. Carefully depicts natural skin texture, fine hair strands, knit patterns, delicate lace, the light sheerness of the thin pleated skirt, and the weave of the tatami. Bright and clean, finished as an elegant Japanese portrait photograph rather than a magazine gravure style.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, broken hand anatomy, poor hand-to-floor contact, joint failure, inconsistent arm length, unnatural breast shape, excessively twisted clothes, broken skirt, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with the light source, text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 阳光榻榻米房间人像
zh.description: 这是一个高度详细的提示词，用于创作一张在阳光明媚的榻榻米房间中拍摄的写实风格日本女性肖像。它侧重于光影效果、细腻的皮肤纹理，以及柔和自然光下传统室内装饰的独特美感。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="透过榻榻米的阳光"}

主要主体：
竖构图，写实摄影风格人像。一位 {argument name="age" default="20 多岁"} 的日本女性坐在明亮的日式房间榻榻米上，位置略微偏向画面右侧。高角度俯视视角，包含上半身、腰部和大腿，人物占据画面约 70%。左侧光线透过障子门洒在榻榻米上；右后方可见木质架子和一盆小绿植。

人物与表情：
象牙米色调的白皙皮肤，质感细腻，透着淡淡的粉色。脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和锁骨处有柔和的高光，保留了自然的皮肤纹理。精致优雅的日式人偶妆容。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼影，细长睫毛，自然的卧蚕，浅棕色眉毛，以及通透的粉米色唇釉。眼睛里有清晰的小光点。表情平静，微微抬头看向镜头，带着浅浅的微笑。

服装与姿势：
奶茶灰棕色头发，留着轻薄的空气刘海，修饰脸型的层次剪裁，中长发及肩。发尾自然内扣，质感柔顺且带有柔和光泽。身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="奶油色裹身式长袖针织上衣"}。领口隐约可见精致的蕾丝内搭，仔细刻画了重叠的布料和针织纹理。浅蓝色短款百褶裙，长度及大腿中部。右手轻轻撩起耳边的头发，左手自然地撑在榻榻米上支撑身体。

背景与光影：
背景是宁静的日式房间。障子门、木框、榻榻米、木架、小陶瓷和绿植巧妙地摆放其中。主光源是左上方透过障子门射入的柔和午后自然光。淡淡的高光落在脸部、头发、锁骨、肩膀、膝盖和裙褶上，障子门的细格栅阴影投射在榻榻米上。色调由象牙色、米色、浅蓝色和温暖的木棕色组成。

构图与摄影：
竖构图，从上方拍摄的高角度人像。脸部位于画面上方，视线自然向下延伸至胸部、腰部、短裙和大腿。近景拍摄距离，焦点清晰地对准脸部和眼睛。背景略微虚化，同时保留了榻榻米的纹理和障子门透出的光感。主体身体略微斜向扭转，通过抬头仰望的姿态营造出立体感。

纹理与风格：
高清写实摄影表现。细致描绘了自然的皮肤纹理、细微的发丝、针织图案、精致的蕾丝、轻薄百褶裙的质感以及榻榻米的编织纹理。画面明亮干净，呈现出优雅的日式肖像摄影风格，而非杂志写真风格。

负面提示词：
不自然的脸部，不自然的眼神，多余的手指，缺失的手指，手部结构错误，手与地面接触不良，关节畸形，手臂长度不一致，胸部形状不自然，衣服过度扭曲，裙子破损，透视错误，阴影与光源不一致，文字，Logo，水印，过度磨皮，塑料感皮肤。

en.title: 3D Latte Art Magazine Tutorial Layout
en.description: A sophisticated prompt that generates a magazine-style tutorial page for 3D latte art based on a reference character. It includes specific layout instructions for step-by-step process images and a large final 'hero' shot with an editorial design.
en.prompt:
Based on the attached character, generate a feature page in the style of a high-quality Japanese cafe/culinary magazine titled "How to Make 3D Latte Art."
[Format]
- 3:4 vertical orientation, single page.
- No double-page spreads or center binding seams.
- Minimal margins.
- Ivory, milk white, and light brown color palette.
- Elegant and readable editorial design.
- Low text volume, making images the main focus.
[Image Composition - Crucial]
Compose the page using ONLY the following four images:
1. A small reference image of the attached character.
2. A small image showing the white foam during the shaping process.
3. A small image showing the rough coloring process.
4. A single large final completion image.
There must be only one image depicting the finished 3D latte art on the page.
[Character]
Prioritize the attached image. Maintain the face, eyes, hairstyle, hair color, expression, decorations, and signature colors so the character is instantly recognizable. Represent them as cute deformed 3D latte art made of milk foam, not as a person, figure, or doll.
[Title]
Generate a short headline similar to: "{argument name="title" default="3D Latte Art with Fluffy Foam"}"
[Sub-labels]
Use short phrases like: "{argument name="tip" default="Scoop it fluffily"}", "Rough is OK", "Add color little by little."
[Latte Art Style]
Fine white milk foam sculpted into a cute chibi character. Soft rounded foam with slight handmade imperfections. Eyes and mouth drawn with cocoa or chocolate syrup. Realistic latte texture, refined high-quality illustration, warm natural light.

zh.title: 3D 拉花杂志教程排版
zh.description: 一个精妙的提示词，用于根据参考角色生成杂志风格的 3D 拉花教程页面。包含针对分步过程图和大型最终“主视觉”图的详细排版说明，呈现编辑设计感。
zh.prompt:
基于所附角色，生成一个以“如何制作 3D 拉花”为题、具有高品质日本咖啡/烹饪杂志风格的专题页面。
[格式]
- 3:4 垂直方向，单页。
- 无跨页或中缝。
- 极简页边距。
- 象牙白、奶白和浅棕色调。
- 优雅且易读的编辑设计。
- 文字量少，以图像为核心。
[图像构成 - 关键]
仅使用以下四张图来排版页面：
1. 所附角色的小尺寸参考图。
2. 展示塑形过程中白色奶泡的小图。
3. 展示粗略上色过程的小图。
4. 一张大型最终成品图。
页面上只能有一张展示 3D 拉花成品的图片。
[角色]
优先考虑所附图片。保持面部、眼睛、发型、发色、表情、装饰和标志性颜色，确保角色具有极高的辨识度。将其表现为由奶泡制成的可爱 Q 版 3D 拉花，而非真人、手办或玩偶。
[标题]
生成简短的标题，例如：“{argument name="title" default="蓬松奶泡 3D 拉花"}”
[副标题]
使用简短的短语，例如：“{argument name="tip" default="蓬松地舀起"}”、“粗糙也没关系”、“一点点添加颜色”。
[拉花风格]
细腻的白色奶泡塑造成可爱的 Q 版角色。柔软圆润的奶泡，带有轻微的手工痕迹。眼睛和嘴巴用可可粉或巧克力酱绘制。逼真的拿铁质感，精致的高品质插画，温暖的自然光。

en.title: Night Pool Cinematic Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed photographic prompt for a woman in her 20s in a night-time resort pool, focusing on realistic skin texture, water droplets, and high-contrast lighting.
en.prompt: Subject: Gaze across the water surface. Depict a {argument name="age and gender" default="woman in her 20s"} who has entered an outdoor night pool up to her waist, looking back while facing away, positioned slightly to the left of the center. The figure occupies about 70% of the screen, captured vertically from the crown to the upper thighs. Blue water and warm lighting surround the figure, creating the air of a quiet resort night. Person/Expression: Bright ivory-beige porcelain skin. Natural highlights on the cheeks, nose, shoulders, and back, leaving a fine skin texture and tiny water droplets. Pale rose-pink blush, champagne-beige and pink-brown eye makeup, long thin eyelashes, natural eye bags, soft brown eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige lip gloss. Catchlights in the clear eyes, lips slightly parted, looking at the camera with a calm expression. Hair is bright {argument name="hair color" default="milky tea ash brown"}. Thin see-through bangs, medium-long reaching the shoulders with a natural clumped texture. Clothing/Pose: A {argument name="outfit" default="greige rib-material bikini"} with thin straps and a back knot. The body is twisted to look back at the camera. Right hand is lightly under the chin. Background/Light: Outdoor pool at a night resort. Blue underwater lighting illuminates from below, and warm lights from the rear left edge the silhouette. Composition/Camera: Vertical 3:4, 85mm medium telephoto lens, shallow depth of field. Texture/Style: Realistic portrait with high-definition skin texture, wet hair, and transparent water surface. Negative: Underage-looking persons, unnatural faces, extra fingers, or broken joints.

zh.title: 夜间泳池电影感人像
zh.description: 一个高度详细的摄影提示词，描绘了一位 20 多岁的女性在夜间度假泳池中的场景，重点展现真实的皮肤纹理、水珠以及高对比度光影。
zh.prompt: 主体：凝视水面。描绘一位 {argument name="age and gender" default="20 多岁的女性"}，她腰部以下浸在户外夜间泳池中，背对镜头回眸，位置略偏向中心左侧。人物占据画面约 70%，采用从头顶到大腿上部的竖构图。蓝色水面与暖色灯光环绕人物，营造出宁静的度假之夜氛围。人物/表情：明亮的象牙米色瓷肌。脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和背部带有自然高光，呈现出细腻的皮肤纹理和细小的水珠。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼妆，长而纤细的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的棕色眉毛，以及清透的粉米色唇彩。清澈的双眸中带有眼神光，双唇微启，以平静的表情注视着镜头。发色为明亮的 {argument name="hair color" default="奶茶灰棕色"}。轻薄的空气刘海，中长发及肩，呈现自然的湿发束感。服装/姿势：身着一件 {argument name="outfit" default="灰米色罗纹比基尼"}，带有细肩带和背部系带设计。身体扭转回眸看向镜头。右手轻托下巴。背景/光影：夜间度假村的户外泳池。水下的蓝色灯光从下方照亮，左后方的暖色灯光勾勒出轮廓。构图/相机：竖构图 3:4，85mm 中焦镜头，浅景深。纹理/风格：逼真的人像，具有高清晰度的皮肤纹理、湿发效果和透明的水面质感。负面提示：未成年外观、不自然的面部、多余的手指或关节畸形。

en.title: Elegant Night Portrait in Japanese Modern Room
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating a mature, atmospheric portrait of a woman in her 20s sitting on a wooden armchair within a Japanese modern interior, featuring soft warm lighting and a dusty rose dress.
en.prompt:
Subject: {argument name="subject" default="A night unraveling in the light"}

Main Figure:
A woman in her {argument name="age" default="20s"} is sitting deep in a wooden armchair, slightly to the right of the center of the screen. The figure occupies about 70% of the screen in a vertical portrait that captures her from the upper body down to her bare feet. One leg is tucked high on the seat, while the other flows to the side, balancing a calm adult allure with quiet tension.

Character/Expression:
Fair skin leaning towards light ivory-beige with a faint pink flush. Subtle highlights on the cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, and collarbone, preserving natural skin texture. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink brown eyeshadow, long slender eyelashes, natural under-eye bags, soft light-brown eyebrows, and a sheer pink-beige glossy lip. Small, clear catchlights in the eyes. The face is tilted slightly to the left of the screen, with a gaze directed quietly toward the camera. The expression is not too sweet, but rather a calm, mature atmosphere.

Clothing/Pose:
A mini dress with thin shoulder straps made of layered sheer material in {argument name="dress color" default="pale dusty rose"}. It features a deep but elegant V-neckline and a high-waisted cinched fit, with soft drapes falling naturally from the hips to the thighs. The skirt length is short, but maintains dignity through the layering of fabric. Her right hand is lightly placed over her collarbone with fingers naturally spread. Her left hand rests near the shin of the raised leg, with shoulders and wrists relaxed. One knee is pulled close to the chest, while the other leg is extended sideways along the seat, conveying a natural sense of gravity down to the toes.

Background/Lighting:
A quiet Japanese modern interior. Featuring taupe-colored plastered walls, dark wooden pillars, a shoji-style window in the back right with a small black vase and a modest branch arrangement. The background is dark and organized, without text or decorations. The main light is a soft, warm indoor lamp coming from the upper right of the screen. Thin beams of light hit the right side of the face, shoulder, collarbone, knee, and shin, while the other side falls into smooth shadows. Weak amber reflections are seen on the wooden furniture, leaving a large dark area on the left wall.

Composition/Camera:
4:5 aspect ratio. The camera is positioned slightly lower than the seated figure's chest, shot almost from the front. The face is placed at approximately 25% from the top of the screen, leaving wide negative space in the upper left. The back of the chair, both armrests, and the seat are visible, framing the body in a triangular silhouette. Focus is on the eyes and eyelashes, with the hair tips, dress hem, and background gently blurred. A natural compression feel equivalent to an 85mm lens with a shallow depth of field.

Texture/Style:
An elegant and mature photographic expression captured in a quiet Japanese modern interior. Hair is light milk tea ash brown with thin see-through bangs, a layered cut framing the face, and medium-long length reaching below the shoulders. Hair tips are loosely curled inward, carefully depicting each strand, fine highlights, soft sheen, and a small amount of natural flyaway hairs. Based on low-saturation browns and dusty pinks, with faint film grain, smooth gradations, and modest contrast. Avoids excessive skin smoothing, naturally depicting the textures of skin, wood, and thin fabric.

Negative:
Underage-looking person, unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, twisted legs, poor contact with props, unnatural gravity, shadows inconsistent with light source, overexposure, overly transparent fabric, plastic-like skin, text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 日式现代风格房间中的优雅夜间肖像
zh.description: 一份详细的提示词，用于生成一张成熟、氛围感十足的肖像：一名 20 多岁的女性坐在日式现代室内空间的木质扶手椅上，采用柔和的暖光，身着灰粉色连衣裙。
zh.prompt:
主体：{argument name="subject" default="在灯光下舒展的夜晚"}

主要人物：
一位 {argument name="age" default="20 多岁"} 的女性深陷在木质扶手椅中，位置略偏向画面中心右侧。人物占据了画面约 70% 的比例，这是一张从上半身延伸至赤足的竖构图肖像。一条腿高高蜷缩在座椅上，另一条腿自然垂向一侧，在平静的成熟魅力与静谧的张力之间取得平衡。

人物/表情：
白皙的皮肤略带浅象牙米色，透着淡淡的粉红红晕。脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和锁骨处有微妙的高光，保留了自然的皮肤纹理。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼影，细长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的浅棕色眉毛，以及透亮的粉米色唇釉。眼睛里有小而清晰的眼神光。脸部向画面左侧微倾，目光静静地注视着镜头。表情并不甜腻，而是一种沉稳、成熟的氛围。

服装/姿势：
一件由 {argument name="dress color" default="浅灰粉色"} 多层薄纱制成的细肩带迷你裙。它具有优雅的深 V 领口和高腰收腰设计，柔软的褶皱从臀部自然垂落至大腿。裙长较短，但通过面料的层叠保持了端庄感。她的右手轻放在锁骨上，手指自然张开。左手放在蜷起的腿部胫骨附近，肩膀和手腕放松。一只膝盖靠近胸部，另一条腿沿座椅向侧面伸展，传达出一种直至脚尖的自然重力感。

背景/光影：
安静的日式现代室内空间。背景为灰褐色抹灰墙面、深色木柱，右后方有一扇障子风格的窗户，摆放着一个小黑花瓶和简约的枝叶插花。背景深邃且整洁，没有文字或装饰。主光源是来自画面右上方的柔和暖色室内灯光。微弱的光束照亮了脸部右侧、肩膀、锁骨、膝盖和胫骨，另一侧则隐入平滑的阴影中。木质家具上可见微弱的琥珀色反光，左侧墙面留有大面积的暗部。

构图/摄影：
4:5 纵横比。相机位置略低于坐姿人物的胸部，几乎从正面拍摄。脸部位于画面顶部约 25% 处，在左上方留出大面积的负空间。椅背、两个扶手和座椅清晰可见，将身体框定在三角形轮廓中。焦点位于眼睛和睫毛上，发梢、裙摆和背景轻微虚化。具有相当于 85mm 镜头、浅景深的自然压缩感。

质感/风格：
在静谧的日式现代室内空间中捕捉到的优雅成熟的摄影表现。发色为浅奶茶灰棕色，带有轻薄的空气刘海，修饰脸型的层次剪裁，中长发长度及肩以下。发梢微微内扣，细致地描绘了每一根发丝、精细的高光、柔和的光泽以及少量自然的碎发。基于低饱和度的棕色和灰粉色调，带有淡淡的胶片颗粒感、平滑的渐变和适度的对比度。避免过度磨皮，自然地呈现皮肤、木材和轻薄面料的纹理。

负面提示词：
未成年长相、不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、腿部扭曲、与道具接触不良、不自然的重力、与光源不一致的阴影、过度曝光、面料过度透明、塑料质感的皮肤、文字、Logo、水印。

en.title: Japanese Fantasy Kekkai-shi Character Sheet
en.description: A comprehensive custom prompt for creating a 2D anime-style character sheet of a Japanese fantasy barrier master (Kekkai-shi) runner girl, designed for reference in video generation tools.
en.prompt:
Create a 1:1 square anime-style character sheet. The theme is {argument name="theme" default="a Japanese fantasy barrier master (Kekkai-shi) runner girl"}. Finish as a shared reference sheet for Seedance 2.0, with no background, an organized layout, and a numbered section configuration.
If there is a reference image, it can be a live-action photo, anime, or illustration. Refer only to the facial features, facial impression, age, and hairstyle impression. Do not refer to clothing, background, pose, lighting, or art style. Naturally convert the reference face into a high-quality anime character.
The background is a plain bright off-white or light gray. Do not include landscapes such as torii gates, shrines, forests, festivals, cityscapes, or magic circle backgrounds. Long descriptions, decorative text, logos, and watermarks are not needed. Include the following numbered sections with small, clear black labels.

01 FRONT
02 SIDE
03 BACK
04 FACE
05 DETAILS
06 COLORS
07 SILHOUETTE

[Layout]
01 FRONT: A large front full-body view on the left. A standing posture visible down to the tips of the feet. The costume structure should be easy to read and give the impression of being able to run.
02 SIDE: A side full-body view in the center. Show sleeves, obi, back ribbon, legs, and feet.
03 BACK: A back full-body view in the center. Show the back of the haori, back ribbon, amulet holder, and back hair.
04 FACE: A large face close-up in the top right. A calm, concentrated expression. Eyes with kindness and inner strength.
05 DETAILS: Small panels on the right side showing hair ornaments, sleeve patterns, obi and back ribbons, amulets, barrier crests, accessories, and feet in an organized manner.
06 COLORS: A small color sample at the bottom. {argument name="colors" default="White, crimson, dark navy or black, dull gold, and pale bluish-white barrier light"}.
07 SILHOUETTE: A group of small running silhouettes or a full-body running silhouette at the bottom. Make it agile and elegant, like a barrier master runner.

[Character Design]
A Japanese fantasy girl barrier master. Short haori, form-fitting black or dark navy inner wear, short hakama-style or layered lower garment, waist belt, red back ribbon, modest gold decorations, waist amulet holder, paper amulets, runnable tabi boot style or Japanese fantasy shoes. Sleeves are wide but not too long, so they don't interfere when running. The character should not be too static, but rather have a light sense of dynamism and an atmosphere of being able to run.

[Hair]
Reflect the {argument name="hair reference" default="impression of the hairstyle from the reference image"} as much as possible and adjust it for a Japanese fantasy style. Add small red or gold hair ornaments if necessary. Do not make it too complex.

[Magic Motif]
A character who uses Japanese barrier magic. Put small barrier crest motifs on sleeves, amulets, and accessories. Do not include large magic circles or flashy background effects.

[Art Style]
High-quality 2D anime style. Clean line art, clear and elegant coloring, and an organized character sheet composition. Maintain a documentary feel while leaving character charm and glamor.

[Negative]
No background scenery, no torii background, no shrine background, no festival background, no magic circle background, no action scenes, no multiple characters, no live-action style, no 3D, no chibi style, no layout collapse, no long text, no large decorative characters, no logos, no watermarks, no broken limbs, no facial collapse, no costume inconsistency. Do not copy the clothing, background, or pose of the reference image.

zh.title: 日式奇幻结界师角色设定集
zh.description: 一份全面的自定义提示词，用于创建日式奇幻结界师（Kekkai-shi）跑者少女的 2D 动漫风格角色设定集，专为视频生成工具的参考而设计。
zh.prompt:
创建一个 1:1 正方形的动漫风格角色设定集。主题为 {argument name="theme" default="一位日式奇幻结界师（Kekkai-shi）跑者少女"}。最终呈现为 Seedance 2.0 的共享参考表，要求无背景、布局整洁，并采用带编号的区域配置。
如有参考图像，可以是真人照片、动漫或插画。仅参考面部特征、面部印象、年龄和发型印象。请勿参考服装、背景、姿势、光影或艺术风格。将参考脸自然地转换为高质量的动漫角色。
背景为纯净的亮灰白色或浅灰色。请勿包含鸟居、神社、森林、祭典、城市景观或魔法阵等背景。无需长篇描述、装饰性文字、徽标和水印。请包含以下带有清晰黑色小标签的编号区域：

01 FRONT（正面）
02 SIDE（侧面）
03 BACK（背面）
04 FACE（面部）
05 DETAILS（细节）
06 COLORS（配色）
07 SILHOUETTE（剪影）

[布局]
01 FRONT：左侧为大型全身正面视图。站立姿势，可见至脚尖。服装结构应易于辨识，并给人以能够奔跑的印象。
02 SIDE：中央为全身侧面视图。展示袖子、腰带、后背丝带、腿部和足部。
03 BACK：中央为全身背面视图。展示羽织背面、后背丝带、护身符挂件及后发。
04 FACE：右上角为大型面部特写。表情冷静且专注。眼神中流露出温柔与内在力量。
05 DETAILS：右侧的小面板，以整齐的方式展示发饰、袖口图案、腰带与后背丝带、护身符、结界纹章、配饰及足部。
06 COLORS：底部为小型色样。{argument name="colors" default="白色、深红色、深海军蓝或黑色、暗金色，以及淡蓝白色的结界光效"}。
07 SILHOUETTE：底部为一组小型奔跑剪影或全身奔跑剪影。使其看起来敏捷而优雅，如同结界师跑者。

[角色设计]
一位日式奇幻结界师少女。短羽织，修身的黑色或深海军蓝内搭，短袴风格或层次感下装，腰带，红色后背丝带，适度的金色装饰，腰间护身符挂件，纸质护身符，便于奔跑的足袋靴风格或日式奇幻鞋履。袖子宽大但不宜过长，以免影响奔跑。角色不应过于静态，而应具有轻盈的动感，营造出能够奔跑的氛围。

[发型]
尽可能反映 {argument name="hair reference" default="参考图像中的发型印象"}，并针对日式奇幻风格进行调整。如有必要，可添加红色或金色的小发饰。不要过于复杂。

[魔法主题]
使用日式结界魔法的角色。在袖子、护身符和配饰上加入小型结界纹章图案。请勿包含大型魔法阵或华丽的背景特效。

[艺术风格]
高质量 2D 动漫风格。线条干净，配色清晰优雅，角色设定集构图整齐。在保持资料感的同时，保留角色的魅力与风采。

[负面提示词]
无背景景观，无鸟居背景，无神社背景，无祭典背景，无魔法阵背景，无动作场景，无多角色，无真人风格，无 3D，无 Q 版风格，无布局崩坏，无长文本，无大型装饰文字，无徽标，无水印，无肢体残缺，无面部崩坏，无服装不一致。请勿复制参考图像的服装、背景或姿势。

en.title: Summer Beach Side Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for a high-quality summer portrait of a woman sitting in a beach cabana, with precise instructions for lighting, textures, and composition.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Afternoon at the beach

Main Subject:
A vertical 3:4 photograph. Under a small thatched beach cabana at a tropical seaside, {argument name="age group" default="a young adult woman in her early 20s"} is sitting on a black woven hammock bench. The subject is positioned slightly to the right of the center, captured from the knees to above the head, with her upper body and legs occupying about 70% of the frame. The background features a bright blue sea, white waves, and a distant horizon.

Person/Expression:
Smooth skin with a bright ivory-beige tone. Natural highlights on the cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, and collarbone, with a delicate texture that retains skin grain rather than excessive smoothing. A natural and realistic Japanese-style portrait facial features. Pale rose pink blush, pinkish-brown eyeshadow, long fine eyelashes, natural undereye areas, soft brown eyebrows, and sheer pinkish-beige lips.
Her hair is in a loose dark brown updo. Thin bangs and wisps around her face are slightly ruffled by the sea breeze, with fine strands falling over her forehead and cheeks. Her head is slightly lowered, her gaze directed diagonally downward. Her mouth is quietly closed, with a calm and slightly pensive expression.

Clothing/Pose:
The upper body is an {argument name="top" default="ivory ruffled halter-neck style beach top"}. Soft ruffles at the chest and hem, thin ribbon ties in the center, and the shadows of light cotton texture and waving fabric. The bottom is {argument name="bottom" default="dark indigo denim shorts"} with natural fraying at the hem and white side ribbons hanging at the waist.
The body is facing forward but the center of gravity is slightly toward the right of the frame. Her right hand lightly touches her bangs on her forehead, with her fingertips naturally curved. Her left hand rests on the black woven bench on the right side of the frame, supporting her weight. Her legs extend straight down toward the center, with knees and thighs close together. Accurate depiction of the bench surface sinking, the wrist's contact, and the overlap of clothing ties and ruffles.

Background/Lighting:
The foreground includes the shadow of the thatched roof, thick wooden pillars, the black woven bench, and rope-like patterns on the sand. The middle ground has light beige cushions and white sand. The background has a pale turquoise blue sea, shimmering white waves, a distant boat silhouette to the right, and a soft, blurred horizon. The thatched roof fills the top width of the frame, with small hanging lamps visible on both sides.
The lighting is strong, natural afternoon light coming from the sea side on the left. Water reflections sparkle on the left, creating warm highlights on her shoulders, collarbone, cheeks, and arms. Deep shadows fall under the cabana roof and bench, and diagonal shadows of the wooden pillars and weaving stretch across the sand. Blue reflected light from the sea subtly enters the skin and white clothes.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical composition, approximately 85mm portrait lens, natural shot from a position slightly higher than eye level. The subject is slightly right of center, with space above her head under the thatched roof, and her feet reaching down to the sand. The wooden pillars on the left and right frame the scene, creating a three-layer structure of the roof, subject, and sea. Shallow depth of field blurs the background slightly, focusing on her face, upper body, and hands. The horizon is in the upper half of the screen, creating contrast between the brightness of the sea and the shadows inside the cabana.

Texture/Style:
Realistic professional camera style. Detailed rendering of natural skin texture, fabric weave, denim thickness, the hard fibers of the black woven bench, and the dry texture of the thatched roof. Color tones are warm beige, ivory, deep denim blue, and clear sea blue. Highlights are soft, and shadows are somewhat deep. An elegant and calm finish like a summer portrait in a magazine.

Negative:
Looking underage, excessive sexual emphasis, unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, broken clothing, collapsed ribbons or ruffles, poor contact with the seat, floating, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, gibberish text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏日海滩侧影
zh.description: 一份关于女性坐在海滩凉亭内的高质量夏日肖像摄影的详细提示词，包含对光影、纹理和构图的精确说明。
zh.prompt:
主题：
海滩午后

主体：
一张 3:4 的竖构图照片。在热带海滨的一个小型茅草凉亭下，{argument name="age group" default="一位 20 出头的年轻女性"} 坐在黑色的编织吊床长椅上。主体位于画面中心偏右位置，取景范围从膝盖到头部上方，上半身和腿部占据画面约 70% 的空间。背景是湛蓝的大海、白色的浪花和远方的地平线。

人物/表情：
肤质细腻，呈现明亮的象牙米色调。脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和锁骨处有自然的高光，质感细腻，保留了皮肤纹理而非过度磨皮。具有自然且写实的日系肖像面部特征。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，粉棕色眼影，细长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的棕色眉毛，以及清透的粉米色嘴唇。
头发盘成松散的深棕色发髻。刘海和脸颊旁的碎发被海风吹得微微凌乱，细碎的发丝垂落在额头和脸颊上。她微微低头，视线斜向下投射。嘴唇轻闭，表情平静且略带沉思。

服装/姿势：
上半身穿着 {argument name="top" default="象牙色荷叶边挂脖式海滩上衣"}。胸前和下摆有柔软的荷叶边，中间有细丝带系带，呈现出轻薄棉质面料的褶皱感和光影效果。下半身穿着 {argument name="bottom" default="深靛蓝色牛仔短裤"}，下摆有自然的磨损边，腰间垂挂着白色侧边丝带。
身体朝向前方，但重心略微偏向画面右侧。右手轻轻触碰额前的刘海，指尖自然弯曲。左手支撑在画面右侧的黑色编织长椅上，支撑着身体重量。双腿垂直向下伸展，膝盖和大腿并拢。准确描绘了长椅表面的下陷感、手腕的接触点以及衣服系带与荷叶边的重叠效果。

背景/光影：
前景包括茅草屋顶的阴影、粗壮的木柱、黑色编织长椅以及沙滩上的绳索纹理。中景有浅米色坐垫和白沙。背景是淡青蓝色的大海、闪烁的白色浪花、右侧远处的船只剪影以及柔和模糊的地平线。茅草屋顶填满了画面顶部，两侧可见悬挂的小灯。
光线是来自左侧海面强烈的午后自然光。水面反射在左侧闪烁，在她的肩膀、锁骨、脸颊和手臂上投下温暖的高光。凉亭屋顶和长椅下方投下深邃的阴影，木柱和编织物的对角线阴影延伸至沙滩上。来自大海的蓝色反射光微妙地融入皮肤和白色衣物中。

构图/相机：
竖构图，约 85mm 肖像镜头，从略高于视平线的位置进行自然拍摄。主体位于中心偏右，茅草屋顶下方留有空间，双脚延伸至沙滩。左右两侧的木柱构成了场景框架，形成了屋顶、主体和大海的三层结构。浅景深使背景略微模糊，焦点集中在她的脸部、上半身和手上。地平线位于画面上半部分，形成了大海的明亮感与凉亭内部阴影的对比。

纹理/风格：
写实的专业摄影风格。细腻呈现自然的皮肤纹理、织物纹理、牛仔布厚度、黑色编织长椅的坚硬纤维以及茅草屋顶的干燥质感。色调为暖米色、象牙色、深牛仔蓝和清澈的海蓝色。高光柔和，阴影略深。呈现出如杂志夏日肖像般优雅而平静的质感。

负面提示词：
未成年感、过度性暗示、面部不自然、眼神不自然、多指、断指、肢体融合、关节断裂、衣服破损、丝带或荷叶边坍塌、与座位接触不良、悬浮、重力不自然、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、乱码文字、Logo、水印、过度皮肤修正、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Summer Walk with Blue Pavement
en.description: A magazine-style prompt for an outdoor portrait of a woman walking on a vibrant blue pavement, featuring artistic dappled leaf shadows and a refreshing summer aesthetic.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="theme" default="leaf shadows falling on blue"}

Main Subject:
A 4:5 vertical photo. Large view of a bright blue pavement with a natural and cute-looking adult woman walking in the lower center. Full body shown, occupying about 35% of the screen. Dark green tree branches and leaves enter from the top right, and large dappled sunlight shadows spread across the pavement. A single thin leaf floats in the wind slightly above and to the right of the person.

Person/Expression:
Black medium-length hair tied low, with thin bangs and stray hairs around the face blowing lightly in the wind. Skin has natural brightness with a hint of flush on the cheeks. Gentle eyes with natural Japanese-style makeup. Face turned upward, smiling slightly as if looking up at the camera. Expression is not overdone, capturing a natural cuteness as if noticing something during a summer walk.

Clothing/Pose:
{argument name="clothing" default="white short-sleeved puff-sleeve blouse and a light blue floral long skirt"}. The skirt is made of light material, with the hem fluttering as she walks. White high-top sneakers on feet. An off-white canvas tote bag on the left shoulder, holding a {argument name="item" default="blue book"} to the chest with both hands. Captured at the moment the right foot steps forward, with the shadow falling to the lower left of the feet.

Background/Light:
Midsummer outdoors, vivid blue paved road. Shiny green leaves and branches with small white flowers overlap on the right, with most of the background consisting of the blue ground and leaf shadows. The sun shines strongly from a high position at the top left, creating bright highlights on shoulders, hair, blouse, and the top of the skirt. Tree shadows have varying depth and bleed slightly along the unevenness of the ground.

Composition/Camera:
High-angle overhead shot. Figure in the lower center, with a wide blue margin and shadows of branches in the upper half. A white line enters diagonally at the bottom left, adding depth and rhythm. Focus on the face and upper body, background is lightly and naturally blurred. Natural 85mm compression feel, professional magazine quality.

Texture/Style:
Realistic photographic expression. Carefully depicts translucent summer sunlight, natural skin texture, fabric thinness, skirt movement, and the fine grain of the pavement. Colors are primarily blue and white, with green leaves as accents. Bright and clean, avoiding excessive skin smoothing or artificial textures.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor contact with the book, floating bag, unnatural gravity, wrong perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏日斑驳光影街拍人像
zh.description: 一个高质量的摄影提示词，用于创作夏季场景，展现一位女性走在蓝色路面上，伴有精致的树叶阴影，呈现出干净的日系美学风格。
zh.prompt:
主体：投射在蓝色路面上的树叶阴影。

主体对象：4:5 竖构图照片。大景别拍摄，画面中是一条 {argument name="pavement color" default="亮蓝色"} 的路面，一位气质自然可爱的 {argument name="person" default="成年女性"} 走在画面下方中央。人物全身可见，约占画面 35%。深绿色的树枝和叶片从右上角伸入，大面积斑驳的阳光阴影铺洒在路面上。一片细长的叶子在人物右上方随风轻盈飘动。

人物/表情：黑色中长发低扎，留有薄刘海，脸颊两侧的碎发随风轻拂。肤色自然明亮，脸颊透着淡淡的红晕。眼神温柔，化着自然的日系妆容。面部朝上，微微含笑，仿佛在抬头看向镜头。表情自然可爱，如同夏日散步时偶然发现美好瞬间的神态。

服装/姿势：{argument name="clothing" default="白色短袖泡泡袖衬衫，搭配浅蓝色小碎花长裙"}。裙子采用轻薄材质，裙摆随着行走的动作轻轻飘动。脚穿白色高帮运动鞋。左肩背着一个自然的帆布托特包，双手抱住一本蓝色书籍贴在胸前。捕捉迈出右脚向前行进的瞬间，阴影落在脚部的左下方。

背景/光影：盛夏户外，鲜艳的蓝色铺装路面。右侧有带有光泽的绿叶和小白花枝条交叠；背景大部分仅由蓝色地面和树叶阴影组成。阳光从左上方高处强烈照射，在人物的肩膀、头发、衬衫和裙子上形成明亮的高光。树影色调丰富，并随着地面的凹凸略有晕染。

构图/相机：高角度俯拍。人物置于画面下方中央，上方留出大面积的蓝色负空间和树枝阴影。左下角有一条白色线条斜向切入，营造出深度感和节奏感。焦点对准面部和上半身，背景自然轻微虚化。等效 85mm 镜头带来的自然压缩感，呈现杂志摄影质感。

质感/风格：写实摄影表现。细腻刻画透明的夏日阳光、自然的皮肤纹理、布料的轻薄感、裙摆的飘动以及路面的细微颗粒感。色彩以蓝色和白色为主调，绿叶作为点缀。明亮且干净，避免过度的皮肤修饰或人工质感。

en.title: Japanese Atelier Indoor Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for creating a nostalgic, vintage-style indoor portrait of a woman in a Japanese atelier filled with books and vinyl records, bathed in soft afternoon sunlight.
en.prompt:
Subject: {argument name="theme" default="room with dappled sunlight"}

Main Subject:
A horizontal 4:3 indoor portrait. A woman in her 20s sits on the right side of the screen, in a near full-body composition from upper body to toes. The figure occupies about half the overall screen, extending legs toward the front left to create a diagonal line. On the left are bookshelves and a record rack; on the right, a fish tank and a wooden table, creating a space like a small Japanese-style atelier by a window.

Person/Expression:
Fair skin leaning towards bright ivory beige, smooth texture with a hint of pink flush. Soft highlights on cheeks, nose tip, shoulders, collarbone, and knees, leaving natural texture. Precise and elegant doll-like Japanese makeup. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long thin eyelashes, natural tear bags, soft light brown eyebrows, sheer pink-beige gloss lip. Small clear catchlights in the eyes. Face turned slightly to the upper left, {argument name="expression" default="a quiet expression as if looking up at the light from the window"}.

Clothing/Pose:
Hair is bright milk tea ash brown. Thin see-through bangs, layered cut along the face, medium-long to below the shoulders. Ends are loosely curled inward, with thin highlights and natural stray hairs carefully depicted. Clothing is {argument name="clothing" default="an off-white ivory ribbed camisole"}. Thin shoulder straps, modest lace at the chest, a mature silhouette that follows the body naturally. Soft matching shorts below. Bare feet, no loose socks. Right hand resting on a cushion behind the body to support the upper half, left arm placed naturally by the waist. Both knees slightly bent, toes lightly touching the record rack at the front left.

Background/Light:
A warm Japanese vintage room with moderate afternoon sunlight streaming through an old wooden window frame. On the left, a wooden bookshelf, paperbacks, records, old instruments, and a round disco ball. In the back, wooden boxes and plants with illegible blue labels. On the right, a transparent fish tank, goldfish, water plants, glass reflections, antique-style camera, and dried flowers. Green bokeh outside the window. Main light enters from the window in the background, rimming the hair, cheeks, shoulders, and knees. Inside, soft reflected light lifts shadows, casting fine dappled sunlight shadows on blankets and wood grain.

Composition/Camera:
Natural camera position looking down diagonally from a slightly high viewpoint. 35mm to 50mm lens feel. Focus on the face and upper body, with the records in the foreground and greenery in the back lightly blurred. Depth created by diagonal leg lines, vertical window frames, and left/right frames of the bookshelf and fish tank. Shallow depth of field like a pro camera.

Texture/Style:
Realistic photographic expression. Carefully depicts warm film tones, soft highlights, natural skin texture, thin hair strands, texture of wood and cloth, and transparency of the glass fish tank. A calm finish like a magazine photo, rather than excessive skin smoothing.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, deformed toes, poor contact with tools, floating, unnatural gravity, wrong perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, garbled text, readable brand logos, watermarks, existing characters, excessive exposure, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 阳光洒满的复古工作室室内肖像
zh.description: 这是一份详细的专业摄影提示词，用于创作日式复古工作室场景，画面中一位女性被书籍和黑胶唱片所环绕。
zh.prompt:
主体：洒满斑驳阳光的房间。

主要主体：4:3 横构图室内肖像。一位 {argument name="person" default="20 多岁的女性"} 坐在画面右侧，呈现从上半身到脚部的近全身构图。人物占据了整个画面的约一半，双腿向左前方延伸，形成一条对角线。左侧是 {argument name="background items" default="书架和唱片架"}，右侧是鱼缸和木桌，营造出一个类似窗边日式小型工作室的空间。

人物/表情：明亮的象牙米色调白皙皮肤，质感细腻，透着淡淡的粉色红晕。柔和的高光落在脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀、锁骨和膝盖上，保留了自然的皮肤纹理。精致优雅的日系玩偶妆容。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色和粉棕色眼影，细长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，浅棕色柔和眉毛，以及半透明的粉米色唇彩。眼睛里有清晰的小光点。微微朝左上方看，表情宁静，仿佛在仰望窗外的光线。

服装/姿势：头发是明亮的奶茶灰棕色。薄薄的空气刘海，脸颊两侧有层次感的剪裁，中长发垂至肩下。发尾微微内扣，细致地刻画了挑染和自然的碎发。服装为 {argument name="clothing" default="米白色象牙色罗纹吊带衫"}。细肩带，胸前有精致的蕾丝，剪裁自然贴合身体，展现成熟的轮廓。下身搭配同色系的柔软短裤。赤脚，不穿堆堆袜。右手撑在身后的靠垫上，左臂自然地放在腰侧。膝盖微屈，双脚轻轻触碰左前方的唱片架。

背景/光影：午后的阳光并不强烈，透过旧木窗框照进温暖的日式复古房间。左侧是木质书架、平装书、唱片、旧乐器和一个圆形的镜面球。后方是木箱、植物和一张模糊的蓝色标签。右侧是一个透明鱼缸，里面有金鱼、水生植物、玻璃倒影、复古相机和干花。窗外是绿色的虚化背景。主光源从背景的窗户射入，勾勒出头发、脸颊、肩膀和膝盖的轮廓。室内柔和的反射光提亮了阴影，在毯子和木纹上投下细碎的斑驳阳光。

构图/相机：从略高的视角斜向下俯拍的自然机位。等效 35mm 至 50mm 镜头感。焦点对准面部和上半身，前景的唱片和背景的绿植轻微虚化。通过腿部的对角线、窗框的垂直线以及书架和鱼缸的左右构图营造出空间深度。浅景深效果，如同专业相机拍摄。

质感/风格：写实的摄影表现。细致地描绘了温暖的胶片色调、柔和的高光、自然的皮肤纹理、细微的发丝、木材和织物的纹理，以及玻璃鱼缸的透明感。呈现出如同杂志照片般沉稳的质感，而非过度磨皮的修图效果。

en.title: Miami Nightlife Scene Stylization
en.description: A creative prompt for gpt-image-2 that transforms a basic 3D primitive scene into a detailed, high-quality Miami nightlife environment.
en.prompt: make this primitive 3d scene into a polished "{argument name="scene style" default="Miami nightlife"}" scene

zh.title: 迈阿密夜生活场景风格化
zh.description: 这是一个为 gpt-image-2 设计的创意提示词，可将基础的 3D 原始场景转换为细节丰富、高质量的迈阿密夜生活环境。
zh.prompt: 将此 3D 原始场景转换为精致的 "{argument name="scene style" default="迈阿密夜生活"}" 场景

en.title: Sunlit Poolside Relaxation Portrait
en.description: A very detailed prompt for a high-key, realistic resort portrait featuring a woman on a pool floatie, focusing on lighting, water reflections, and natural textures.
en.prompt:
Theme: {argument name="theme" default="Dissolving on the water surface"}

Subject: A vertical {argument name="aspect ratio" default="2:3"} photograph. An adult woman in a {argument name="outfit" default="white bikini"} is relaxing on a large, transparent, glittery floatie. The person is positioned slightly to the left of the center, occupying about half of the frame, with a cool composition utilizing the turquoise blue water surface and wide upper margin.

Person/Expression: Natural and realistic refined facial features. Dark brown hair tied in a high, rough bun, with thin bangs and loose strands around the face. Transparent natural makeup, pale coral pink cheeks and lips. Face turned slightly to the right of the screen, looking at the camera with a gentle smile. Shoulders and expression relaxed, creating a calm holiday atmosphere.

Clothing/Pose: An ivory white string bikini with thin straps and subtle gathers. The upper body is tilted diagonally towards the back of the floatie, with the back and waist softly supported. The person's right elbow is on the edge of the floatie, with the right hand lightly touching near the temple. The left arm is naturally lowered along the front floatie, with fingertips relaxed. Both legs are lightly bent, with one leg in front and the other layered behind, extending so that from the knees down they are naturally cropped at the right edge of the screen. Accurately express the sinking of the floatie, contact with the body, and water droplets on wet skin.

Background/Light: Bright, minimal outdoor pool. Foreground features a transparent floatie reflecting light and fine water ripples, middle ground is clear blue water, and background consists of cream-beige plastered walls and a white poolside. A white large planter and slender palm are placed in the upper right, with leaf shadows cast on the wall. Warm sunlight enters from the top left of the screen, brightly illuminating the hair, shoulders, arms, and top of the thighs. Pale blue reflected light from the water surface wraps around to the shaded side of the skin, with shadows flowing softly to the bottom right.

Composition/Camera: Vertical position, medium-long shot from a slightly high eye level. The person's face is toward the top left of the screen, and the floatie crosses the bottom half of the screen significantly. Leave wide margins for the wall and water at the top, creating stability with the diagonal body lines and the circle of the floatie. Natural compression feel of around 85mm, focusing on the face and upper body, with the background slightly and softly blurred.

Texture/Style: A clean, realistic resort portrait. Bright high-key tone, low contrast, refreshing color scheme centered on ivory and aqua blue. Maintain natural skin texture, delicately depicting fine water droplets on wet skin, reflections on transparent vinyl, blue glitter, and water ripples. Avoid excessive skin correction, aiming for an elegant and light finish like a magazine photo.

Negative: Underage-looking persons, unnatural faces, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, twisted legs, poor contact with the floatie, floating body, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, overexposure, transparent swimwear, text, logo, watermark, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 阳光泳池畔休闲肖像
zh.description: 一份关于高调、写实度假风肖像的详细提示词，以泳池浮排上的女性为主角，重点刻画光影、水面反射及自然质感。
zh.prompt:
主题：{argument name="theme" default="消融于水面"}

主体：一张垂直 {argument name="aspect ratio" default="2:3"} 的照片。一位成年女性身着 {argument name="outfit" default="白色比基尼"}，正惬意地躺在一个大型透明闪光浮排上。人物位于画面中心偏左位置，占据约一半画幅，构图清爽，利用绿松石色的水面和上方宽阔的留白。

人物/表情：自然写实的精致五官。深棕色头发扎成高高的凌乱丸子头，留着薄刘海，脸颊两侧有碎发。透明感自然妆容，珊瑚粉色的脸颊和嘴唇。脸部略微转向屏幕右侧，面带温柔微笑注视镜头。肩膀和表情放松，营造出宁静的度假氛围。

服装/姿势：象牙白细带比基尼，带有细微的褶皱设计。上半身向浮排后方倾斜，背部和腰部得到柔和支撑。人物右肘靠在浮排边缘，右手轻触太阳穴附近。左臂自然垂在浮排前侧，指尖放松。双腿微屈，一前一后交叠，膝盖以下自然延伸至屏幕右边缘。准确表现浮排的下沉感、与身体的接触点以及湿润皮肤上的水珠。

背景/光影：明亮、简约的户外泳池。前景为反射着光线和细微水波纹的透明浮排，中景为清澈的蓝色水面，背景为奶油米色的抹灰墙面和白色池畔。右上角摆放着一个白色大花盆和一株细长的棕榈树，墙上投射出叶影。温暖的阳光从屏幕左上方射入，明亮地照亮头发、肩膀、手臂和大腿上方。水面反射的淡蓝色光线包裹着皮肤的阴影侧，阴影柔和地流向右下方。

构图/相机：垂直构图，略微俯视的中远景。人物面部朝向屏幕左上方，浮排显著横跨屏幕下半部分。顶部为墙面和水面留出宽阔空间，通过身体的对角线和浮排的圆形构图营造稳定性。采用约 85mm 镜头的自然压缩感，聚焦于面部和上半身，背景呈现柔和的虚化效果。

质感/风格：干净、写实的度假肖像。明亮的高调色调，低对比度，以象牙白和水蓝色为中心的清新配色。保持自然的皮肤质感，细腻刻画湿润皮肤上的细小水珠、透明塑料材质的反射、蓝色闪粉和水波纹。避免过度磨皮，追求如杂志照片般优雅轻盈的质感。

负面提示词：未成年外貌、不自然的面部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、腿部扭曲、与浮排接触不良、身体悬浮、不符合重力、透视错误、阴影与光源不符、过度曝光、透明泳装、文字、Logo、水印、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Melancholic Cinematic Car Portrait
en.description: A photography-inspired prompt for creating realistic, moody portraits of a woman inside a car during a rainy day, using specific lens and filter effects.
en.prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="beautiful young woman"} sitting inside a car, long {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair partially covering one eye, soft porcelain skin, oversized {argument name="clothing" default="cream sweater"}, resting her cheek on her hand, dreamy melancholic expression, soft focus, dreamy blur, diffusion filter effect, Black Pro Mist filter, subtle glow, cinematic haze, bloom lighting, ethereal atmosphere, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, warm muted color grading, rainy day outside the window, natural window light, low contrast, film photography, 85mm lens, f/1.2, photorealistic, editorial fashion portrait, masterpiece, ultra detailed, 9:16.

Dreamy soft blur, gauzy atmosphere, misty lens, delicate glow, cinematic diffusion, velvety focus, soft cinematic haze, romantic film look, gentle bloom, dreamy aesthetic. 

Negative Prompt: sharp focus, overly detailed pores, harsh contrast, HDR, oversaturated, crisp edges, strong sharpening, digital look, cartoon, anime, CGI

zh.title: 忧郁电影感汽车人像
zh.description: 一个摄影灵感提示词，用于创作雨天车内女性的写实、情绪化人像，并应用特定的镜头和滤镜效果。
zh.prompt:
超写实电影感人像，{argument name="subject" default="美丽的年轻女性"} 坐在车内，长长的 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"} 头发半遮住一只眼睛，柔嫩的瓷肌，超大号的 {argument name="clothing" default="米色毛衣"}，手托着脸颊，梦幻忧郁的表情，柔焦，梦幻模糊，扩散滤镜效果，Black Pro Mist 滤镜，微妙的光晕，电影感雾气，光晕照明，空灵氛围，浅景深，奶油般虚化，温暖柔和的调色，窗外雨天，自然窗光，低对比度，胶片摄影，85mm 镜头，f/1.2，照片级真实，时尚杂志人像，杰作，超精细，9:16。

梦幻柔焦，轻纱般的氛围，朦胧镜头，精致光晕，电影感扩散，丝绒质感对焦，柔和电影感雾气，浪漫胶片感，柔和光晕，梦幻美学。

负面提示词：锐利对焦，过度精细的毛孔，强烈对比，HDR，过度饱和，清晰边缘，强锐化，数码感，卡通，动漫，CGI

en.title: Oriental Zen Minimalist Goldfish Lantern Poster
en.description: A structured prompt for an oriental Zen-style minimalist poster featuring a figure watching a goldfish lantern by a pond, designed for GPT Image 2.
en.prompt:
Theme direction: Oriental Zen minimalist poster
Style branch: High-contrast communicative type
Subject content: {argument name="subject" default="A figure in ancient style standing by a pond watching a goldfish lantern"}
Emotional motif: Dynamic, festive, relaxed, appreciative
Scene and imagery: {argument name="core element" default="Bright orange-red goldfish lantern"}, blue-green water surface, warm white blank space, small amount of reflection, character silhouette
Composition and space: Off-center bottom composition, the goldfish lantern as the main visual in the center, character at the bottom side, with large areas of bright blank space around
Color control: Warm white as the base, blue-green for water and air layers, bright orange-red for the goldfish lantern and partial reflections, ink blue for character outlines; avoid orange-blue contamination
Light and texture: Clear soft light, light paper feel, subtle water reflection, sharp edges
Aspect ratio: {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"}
Additional requirements: The goldfish lantern must be bright and eye-catching, small character proportion, overall bright and not dark

zh.title: 东方禅意金鱼海报
zh.description: 一个用于创作极简禅意海报的精妙提示词，特色包含金鱼灯笼与简洁的构图。
zh.prompt:
主题：东方禅意极简海报
风格：高对比度传播型
主体：{argument name="subject" default="一位古风人物站在池塘边观赏金鱼灯笼"}
氛围：{argument name="mood" default="生动、喜庆、放松、欣赏"}
场景与意象：明亮的橙红色金鱼灯笼、绿松石蓝水面、暖白色留白、极简倒影、人物剪影
构图：底部居中构图，金鱼灯笼作为中心视觉主体，人物位于底部侧方，周围环绕大面积明亮留白
色彩控制：{argument name="colors" default="以暖白为底色，水面与空气层采用绿松石蓝，金鱼灯笼及局部倒影采用明亮的橙红色，人物轮廓采用墨蓝色"}；避免橙色与蓝色混色
光影与质感：清晰柔光、轻薄纸张质感、微弱水面反光、边缘锐利
长宽比：9:16
附加要求：金鱼灯笼必须生动醒目，人物比例较小，整体画面明亮清晰，避免暗沉。

en.title:
提示词：

以上传人像作为唯一人物参考，生成一组5张独立的美式西部牛仔风时尚大片，不拼图。保持人物五
en.prompt: 以上传人像作为唯一人物参考，生成一组5张独立的美式西部牛仔风时尚大片，不拼图。保持人物五官、脸型和气质一致，长卷黑发，自然真实，不僵硬、不变脸。

zh.title:
提示词：

以上传人像作为唯一人物参考，生成一组 5 张独立的美式西部牛仔风时尚大片，不拼图。保持人物五
zh.prompt: 以上传人像作为唯一人物参考，生成一组 5 张独立的美式西部牛仔风时尚大片，不拼图。保持人物五官、脸型和气质一致，长卷黑发，自然真实，不僵硬、不变脸。

en.title: Kaeldrax Anime Fashion Character Concept Sheet
en.description: A structured character concept art sheet prompt for creating high-contrast digital anime characters in a modern high-fashion style, specifically for GPT Image 2.
en.prompt: Create a premium, modern high-fashion {argument name="subject" default="CHARACTER CONCEPT ART SHEET"} in a 16:9 widescreen layout on a pure white background, following this exact structured composition and visual aesthetic:\n\n[STYLE]: {argument name="art style" default="high-contrast digital anime"}

zh.title: Kaeldrax 动漫时尚角色概念图
zh.description: 一个结构化的角色概念艺术图提示词，专为 GPT Image 2 设计，用于创作现代高定时尚风格的高对比度数字动漫角色。
zh.prompt: 创建一个高级、现代的高定时尚 {argument name="subject" default="角色概念艺术图"}，采用 16:9 宽屏布局，背景为纯白色，并遵循以下精确的结构化构图和视觉美学：\n\n[风格]：{argument name="art style" default="高对比度数字动漫"}

en.title: Highlighted App Promo Cover
en.description: A premium square product-style cover image featuring a phone-based reading highlights app with floating glassmorphism productivity widgets.
en.prompt: Create a polished square promotional cover image for {argument name="app name" default="Highlighted"}, showing a modern iPhone standing upright at a slight angle on a bright white desk, with a clean productivity-and-reading aesthetic. On the phone screen, display a minimalist gallery grid of exactly 12 saved highlight cards arranged in 3 columns by 4 rows, each with a small gray label line beneath it; the cards show varied bookish visuals such as a classical portrait, yellow notebook, framed photo, white note with cord, red-and-yellow abstract cover, pencil illustration, dark statue face, blue night cover, beige dotted page, pale sails, ocean water, and a balloon landscape. At the bottom of the phone UI, include a large rounded blue add button with a white plus sign. Surround the phone with translucent floating feature widgets: on the left, one pill-shaped toolbar with exactly 5 elements—a paper-plane/filter icon and 4 circular color swatches in white, light gray, black, and navy; on the upper right, one glassmorphism audio card with a play button and 5 horizontal transcript lines including 2 yellow highlight lines; in the middle right, one frosted audio waveform card with a glowing circular orb and blue waveform; on the lower right, one frosted action toolbar with exactly 5 icons—a document, chevron arrow, share, cloud upload, and envelope. Desk props include a white tray of folders with a green spreadsheet document icon on the left, a small stack of pastel sticky notes in the foreground, an open book with yellow highlighted text at bottom right, loose papers with highlighted passages, and a stack of hardcover books on the right. Use soft natural window light, shallow depth of field, realistic high-end product photography, creamy whites and warm neutrals, subtle shadows, glassy translucent UI overlays, crisp phone details, no visible brand logos except the app-like interface, no watermark, no extra text beyond simple UI marks. Use a premium launch-promo composition suitable for an in-app event cover, {argument name="image aspect ratio" default="1:1 square"}.

zh.title: 精选 App 推广封面
zh.description: 一张优质的方形产品风格封面图，展示了一款基于手机的阅读高亮 App，并配有悬浮的毛玻璃质感生产力小组件。
zh.prompt: 为 {argument name="app name" default="Highlighted"} 创建一张精致的方形推广封面图，展示一部现代 iPhone 以微倾角度直立在明亮的白色桌面上，呈现出简洁的生产力与阅读美学。在手机屏幕上，显示一个极简的画廊网格，包含 12 张保存的高亮卡片，排列为 3 列 4 行，每张卡片下方均有一行小的灰色标签；卡片展示了丰富的书籍类视觉元素，如古典肖像、黄色笔记本、相框照片、带绳的白纸条、红黄抽象封面、铅笔插画、深色雕像面孔、蓝色夜景封面、米色点阵页面、淡色帆船、海水以及气球景观。在手机 UI 底部，包含一个大的圆形蓝色添加按钮，中间带有白色加号。在手机周围环绕半透明的悬浮功能小组件：左侧为一个药丸状工具栏，包含 5 个元素——一个纸飞机/过滤器图标和 4 个白色、浅灰色、黑色及深蓝色的圆形色块；右上角为一个毛玻璃质感的音频卡片，带有播放按钮和 5 行水平转录文本，其中包含 2 行黄色高亮文本；右侧中间为一个磨砂质感的音频波形卡片，带有发光的圆形球体和蓝色波形；右下角为一个磨砂质感的动作工具栏，包含 5 个图标——文档、V 型箭头、分享、云端上传和信封。桌面道具包括左侧一个装有文件夹的白色托盘（带有一个绿色电子表格文档图标）、前景中一叠淡色便签、右下角一本带有黄色高亮文本的打开的书籍、带有高亮段落的散页纸张，以及右侧一叠精装书。采用柔和的自然窗光、浅景深、逼真的高端产品摄影风格，色调以奶油白和暖中性色为主，配以细腻的阴影、玻璃质感的半透明 UI 叠加层，手机细节清晰，除类 App 界面外无可见品牌 Logo，无水印，除简单的 UI 标记外无额外文字。采用适合应用内活动封面的高级发布推广构图，{argument name="image aspect ratio" default="1:1 正方形"}。

en.title: Pink-Haired Nymph in Bouguereau Style
en.description: A romantic classical oil-painting prompt for generating a pink-haired bespectacled forest nymph seated beside a stream.
en.prompt: Create a vertical 3:4 romantic academic oil painting in the style of William-Adolphe Bouguereau: one young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="long pastel pink hair"} sits sideways on a mossy rock at the edge of a shallow forest stream, looking back over her shoulder toward the viewer with a calm, wistful expression. She wears {argument name="eyewear" default="black rectangular glasses"}, one delicate flower crown of pale blossoms and green leaves, one small pink flower tattoo or sticker on her upper back/shoulder, and one translucent ivory-and-blush Grecian draped gown with gold braided trim, the fabric gathered around her hips and trailing behind her. Her two bare feet rest near and in the water; her left hand touches the wet rock while her posture is elegant and slightly twisted. The setting contains one dark massive tree trunk on the left, one quiet reflective stream in the foreground, one moss-covered stone ledge beneath her, and dense woodland foliage with small pale flowers on the right. Use warm golden dappled sunlight filtering through leaves, soft sfumato edges, luminous skin, realistic anatomy, painterly brush texture, muted greens and browns, pearly cream fabric, and a dreamy mythological nymph atmosphere. Keep the composition intimate and centered, with no text, no watermark, and no modern objects besides the glasses.

zh.title: 布格罗风格的粉发林中仙女
zh.description: 一个浪漫主义古典油画提示词，用于生成一位坐在溪边、戴着眼镜的粉发林中仙女。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅 3:4 竖构图的浪漫主义学院派油画，风格参考威廉·阿道夫·布格罗（William-Adolphe Bouguereau）：一位年轻女子，留着 {argument name="hair color" default="长长的淡粉色头发"}，侧身坐在森林浅溪边长满青苔的岩石上，回眸看向观者，神情宁静而忧郁。她戴着 {argument name="eyewear" default="黑色长方形眼镜"}，头戴一顶由淡色花朵和绿叶编织而成的精致花环，上背部/肩部有一个粉色小花纹身或贴纸，身穿一件半透明的象牙白与淡粉色交织的希腊式垂褶长裙，裙边带有金色编织装饰，布料在臀部周围褶皱并向后拖曳。她赤着双脚，靠近并浸在水中；左手轻触湿润的岩石，姿态优雅且略带扭曲。画面左侧有一棵巨大的深色树干，前景是一条静谧的倒影溪流，她下方是长满青苔的石台，右侧是茂密的林木和点缀其间的小白花。运用透过叶片洒下的温暖金色斑驳阳光，柔和的晕涂法（sfumato）边缘，通透的肤色，写实的解剖结构，油画笔触，柔和的绿色与棕色调，珍珠奶油色的布料，营造出梦幻般的神话仙女氛围。保持构图亲密且居中，画面中不含文字、水印，除眼镜外不出现任何现代物品。

en.title: Luxury Family Reunion Poster
en.description: Creates a premium gold-toned family reunion event poster with a six-person formal portrait montage and complete RSVP details.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create an ultra-premium vertical Family Reunion poster with a regal African family portrait montage, elegant gold typography, and a warm luxury event-poster finish.

Canvas: 4:5 portrait poster, print-ready, high resolution, centered composition. Background is a glowing champagne-gold and dark brown gradient with soft bokeh, subtle dust sparkles, diagonal sunbeams from the upper right, and dark vignette edges.

Main subjects: Show exactly 6 family members arranged in a formal studio-composite hierarchy. Back row has 2 people: at upper left, a serious adult man in a navy suit, white shirt, dark tie, round glasses, hands clasped; at upper right, an elderly man in a white traditional embroidered outfit and black cap, looking slightly to the side. Middle row has 3 people: left, a young man in a navy double-breasted suit with glasses, arms crossed; center, a mature woman in a large metallic gold headwrap and patterned brown-gold dress, smiling gently; right, an adult man in a beige suit with white shirt and beige tie, arms crossed. Front center has 1 person: a young woman wearing a beige hijab and black outfit, one hand posed near her face, looking directly forward. Use realistic photographic lighting, polished skin tones, crisp facial detail, and dramatic editorial retouching.

Decorative elements: Add exactly 4 visible clusters of golden leaves: one in the upper left corner, one in the upper right corner, one small branch beside the lower-left title, and one blurred cluster in the lower right foreground. Add a sweeping gold light arc across the lower poster and a small glowing heart outline at the right end of the title flourish.

Text content: At the top, set the small spaced uppercase quote: {argument name="top quote" default="TOGETHER IS OUR FAVORITE PLACE TO BE"}. Main title across the lower middle: enormous metallic serif word {argument name="main title" default="FAMILY"}, with elegant white-gold script word {argument name="script subtitle" default="Reunion"} overlapping beneath it. Under the title, include the tagline: "Celebrating Our Roots. Cherishing Our Bond. Building Our Legacy." Event information row at the bottom must contain exactly 3 info blocks separated by thin vertical gold lines: left block with calendar icon and text "SATURDAY", "20TH", "SEPTEMBER, 2025"; center block with location pin icon and text "HAPPY HOME", "EVENT CENTER", "123 Family Lane,", "Unity Town, ST 12345"; right block with clock icon and text "TIME", "12:00PM", "PROMPT". Below that, add spaced text: "ONE FAMILY. ONE HEART. ENDLESS MEMORIES." At the very bottom, place a rounded gold RSVP pill containing {argument name="RSVP phone numbers" default="RSVP: 0800 123 4567 | 0700 987 6543"}.

Visual style: Luxurious Afrocentric family reunion poster, cinematic composite photography, metallic gold serif typography, elegant calligraphy, soft rim lighting, warm highlights, black-and-gold premium palette, glossy magazine-ad finish.

Constraints: Keep the composition symmetrical and poster-like, do not add extra people, keep exactly 6 family members and exactly 3 event info blocks, make all text legible, avoid logos, watermarks, or unrelated decorations.

zh.title: 奢华家庭聚会海报
zh.description: 制作一张高级金色调的家庭聚会活动海报，包含六人正式肖像蒙太奇及完整的 RSVP 详情。
zh.prompt:
目标：制作一张超高端竖版家庭聚会海报，采用庄重的非洲裔家庭肖像蒙太奇、优雅的金色排版，并呈现温暖的奢华活动海报质感。

画布：4:5 竖版海报，适合打印，高分辨率，居中构图。背景为发光的香槟金与深棕色渐变，带有柔和的散景效果、细微的尘埃闪光、从右上角射入的斜向阳光，以及深色的暗角边缘。

主体：展示 6 位家庭成员，以正式的影棚合成层级排列。后排 2 人：左上角为一名神情严肃的成年男性，身穿海军蓝西装、白衬衫、深色领带，戴圆框眼镜，双手交叠；右上角为一名长者，身穿白色传统刺绣服装，头戴黑帽，视线微侧。中排 3 人：左侧为一名年轻男性，身穿海军蓝双排扣西装，戴眼镜，双臂交叉；中间为一名成熟女性，佩戴大型金属质感金色头巾，身穿棕金色花纹连衣裙，面带温和微笑；右侧为一名成年男性，身穿米色西装，内搭白衬衫，系米色领带，双臂交叉。前排中心 1 人：一名年轻女性，佩戴米色头巾，身穿黑色服装，单手置于脸颊旁，直视前方。使用写实的摄影布光、细腻的肤色、清晰的面部细节以及戏剧性的编辑级修图。

装饰元素：添加 4 簇清晰可见的金色叶片：左上角一簇，右上角一簇，左下角标题旁一小枝，右下角前景处一簇模糊的叶片。在海报下方添加一道扫过的金色光弧，并在标题花体字右端添加一个微小的发光心形轮廓。

文本内容：顶部设置小号间距的大写引语：{argument name="top quote" default="TOGETHER IS OUR FAVORITE PLACE TO BE"}。中下部主标题：巨大的金属质感衬线字体 {argument name="main title" default="FAMILY"}，下方叠加优雅的白金色手写体 {argument name="script subtitle" default="Reunion"}。标题下方包含标语：“Celebrating Our Roots. Cherishing Our Bond. Building Our Legacy.”（庆祝我们的根源。珍视我们的纽带。建立我们的传承。）底部的活动信息行必须包含由细金色竖线分隔的 3 个信息块：左侧块包含日历图标及文本“SATURDAY”、“20TH”、“SEPTEMBER, 2025”；中间块包含位置定位图标及文本“HAPPY HOME”、“EVENT CENTER”、“123 Family Lane,”、“Unity Town, ST 12345”；右侧块包含时钟图标及文本“TIME”、“12:00PM”、“PROMPT”。下方添加间距文本：“ONE FAMILY. ONE HEART. ENDLESS MEMORIES.”（一个家庭。一颗心。无尽的回忆。）最底部放置一个圆角金色 RSVP 药丸形按钮，包含 {argument name="RSVP phone numbers" default="RSVP: 0800 123 4567 | 0700 987 6543"}。

视觉风格：奢华的非洲中心主义家庭聚会海报，电影级合成摄影，金属金色衬线排版，优雅书法，柔和的轮廓光，温暖的高光，黑金高级配色，杂志广告级光泽质感。

约束条件：保持构图对称且具有海报感，不得增加额外人物，严格保持 6 位家庭成员和 3 个活动信息块，确保所有文字清晰可读，避免使用徽标、水印或无关装饰。

en.title: Miniature Man Inside Luxury Refrigerator
en.description: A surreal photorealistic refrigerator scene with one stylish man duplicated in playful miniature poses among oversized fresh foods and desserts.
en.prompt:
Create an ultra-detailed surreal photorealistic vertical image of a premium transparent luxury refrigerator interior filled edge-to-edge with colorful fresh fruits, vegetables, desserts, cakes, ice cream, soft drinks, milk bottles, chocolate bars, and refreshing summer treats. The main subject is {argument name="character description" default="a handsome young Asian man with stylish black hair"}, wearing {argument name="outfit" default="a loose light gray T-shirt, dark charcoal shorts, white sneakers, and black sunglasses"}, sitting casually in the center of the refrigerator on a glass shelf, smiling while eating a vanilla chocolate-chip ice cream cone. Use glossy blue refrigerator lighting, cold mist, condensation, transparent glass shelves, bright overhead fridge lamps, cinematic reflections, hyperreal texture, crisp product-photography detail, and a playful miniature-world fantasy scale.

Show exactly 12 instances of the same man at different scales and poses: 1 large central man sitting and eating an ice cream cone; 2 tiny man surfing on a yellow surfboard through icy splashing mist at the upper left; 3 tiny man standing on the top shelf holding a red fruit beside ice cream tubs and cake at the upper right; 4 tiny man standing among green grapes on the left middle shelf; 5 tiny man climbing beside a large strawberry and lettuce on the right middle shelf; 6 tiny man peeking from behind a milk bottle on the left center; 7 tiny man sitting on giant strawberries at the lower left; 8 tiny man sitting on a curved bunch of bananas beside juice bottles on the right; 9 tiny man pushing a small shopping cart full of fruit near the lower center-left; 10 tiny man reclining on lettuce leaves on the lower right shelf; 11 tiny man climbing stacked dark chocolate bars near the lower right; 12 tiny man carrying or interacting with large fruit pieces near the bottom foreground.

Food and product contents should include exactly these major visible groups: two ice cream tubs on the top shelf, one frosted cupcake, one rectangular layered chocolate cake with cherries, clusters of green grapes, a large strawberry, leafy green lettuce, milk bottles, orange juice bottles, soda cans on the refrigerator door, bananas, giant strawberries, a miniature shopping cart with mixed fruit, stacked dark chocolate bars with premium labels, cucumbers, bell peppers, apples, oranges, grapefruit, watermelon slices, red grapes, and a large green apple or pear. Include readable product-style labels such as {argument name="milk label" default="Fresh Milk"}, {argument name="ice cream label" default="Premium ICE CREAM"}, and {argument name="chocolate label" default="70% COCOA"}, but keep them natural as packaging text rather than graphic typography.

Composition: vertical 2:3 canvas, front-facing view from inside the refrigerator, the large central figure dominates the middle, surrounded by miniature duplicate versions and oversized food items. Make the scale whimsical but photorealistic, with consistent likeness across all duplicate figures, realistic shadows and contact points, no collage seams, no extra people, no warped limbs, no unreadable clutter, no watermark.

zh.title: 豪华冰箱里的微型人像
zh.description: 一个超现实的写实风格冰箱场景，一位时尚男士以多种俏皮的微型姿态，出现在超大号新鲜食材与甜点之间。
zh.prompt:
创作一张超精细、超现实且写实风格的竖版图片，展示一台高端透明豪华冰箱的内部，冰箱内塞满了色彩鲜艳的新鲜水果、蔬菜、甜点、蛋糕、冰淇淋、软饮、牛奶瓶、巧克力棒和清爽的夏季零食。主体是 {argument name="character description" default="一位留着时尚黑发的帅气亚洲年轻男子"}，身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="一件宽松的浅灰色 T 恤、深炭灰色短裤、白色运动鞋，并戴着黑色太阳镜"}，正悠闲地坐在冰箱中央的玻璃搁板上，微笑着吃着香草巧克力碎冰淇淋甜筒。采用冷色调的蓝色冰箱灯光、冷雾、凝结的水珠、透明玻璃搁板、明亮的顶部冰箱灯、电影质感的反射、超写实的纹理、清晰的产品摄影细节，以及俏皮的微型世界奇幻比例。

展示该男子的 12 个不同比例和姿态的实例：1 个大型中心人物坐在中间吃冰淇淋甜筒；2 个微型人像在左上方的冰雾中踩着黄色冲浪板冲浪；3 个微型人像站在顶层搁板上，在右上方的冰淇淋桶和蛋糕旁手持红色水果；4 个微型人像站在左侧中间搁板的青葡萄丛中；5 个微型人像在右侧中间搁板的一颗大草莓和生菜旁攀爬；6 个微型人像从左侧中心的一个牛奶瓶后探出头来；7 个微型人像坐在左下方的巨大草莓上；8 个微型人像坐在右侧果汁瓶旁弯曲的香蕉串上；9 个微型人像在左下方的中心附近推着装满水果的小购物车；10 个微型人像斜靠在右下方的生菜叶上；11 个微型人像在右下方攀爬堆叠的黑巧克力块；12 个微型人像在底部前景处搬运或与大型水果互动。

食物和产品内容应包含以下主要可见组别：顶层搁板上的两个冰淇淋桶、一个糖霜纸杯蛋糕、一个带有樱桃的长方形分层巧克力蛋糕、成串的青葡萄、一颗大草莓、绿叶生菜、牛奶瓶、橙汁瓶、冰箱门上的汽水罐、香蕉、巨大的草莓、装有混合水果的微型购物车、带有高级标签的堆叠黑巧克力块、黄瓜、甜椒、苹果、橙子、葡萄柚、西瓜片、红葡萄，以及一个巨大的青苹果或梨。包含可辨识的产品风格标签，例如 {argument name="milk label" default="Fresh Milk"}、{argument name="ice cream label" default="Premium ICE CREAM"} 和 {argument name="chocolate label" default="70% COCOA"}，但要使其呈现为自然的包装文字，而非图形排版。

构图：2:3 竖版画布，从冰箱内部向外看的正面视角，大型中心人物占据中间位置，周围环绕着微型复制版本和超大号食物。比例要充满奇趣但保持写实，所有复制人物的相貌需保持一致，具备逼真的阴影和接触点，无拼贴痕迹，无额外人物，无扭曲的肢体，无难以辨认的杂乱，无水印。

en.title: Bouguereau Nymph With Pink Hair
en.description: A classical romantic oil-painting style portrait of a pink-haired modern nymph with glasses seated by a forest stream.
en.prompt: Create a romantic academic oil-painting portrait in the style of William-Adolphe Bouguereau with a subtle modern twist: a young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="long wavy pastel pink hair"} sits sideways on a mossy rock beside a shallow woodland stream, her bare feet touching the water. She wears {argument name="dress" default="a translucent cream and blush-pink Greco-Roman chiffon dress with a rope belt"}, delicate and softly draped over one shoulder, with classical folds and luminous fabric. Add {argument name="accessory" default="black rectangular eyeglasses and a crown of small pink wildflowers and green leaves"} to contrast contemporary intellect with mythic nymph beauty. Her pose is three-quarter back view, seated with one knee raised, one hand resting on the rock behind her, the other hand relaxed near her leg, turning her head over her shoulder to look toward the viewer with a calm, slightly wistful expression. Place her in an enchanted forest clearing with exactly one stream, one moss-covered boulder seat, dense dark green foliage on both sides, small pink wildflowers near the water, and warm golden sunlight filtering through trees in the background. Use soft realism, idealized skin, fine painterly brushwork, glowing rim light on hair and shoulders, atmospheric haze, muted earth tones, dusky greens, rose pink accents, and an old-master varnished texture. Vertical portrait composition, intimate full-body framing, elegant anatomy, serene classical mood, no text, no watermark, no extra people.

zh.title: 布格罗风格粉色头发宁芙
zh.description: 一幅古典浪漫主义油画风格的肖像，描绘了一位戴着眼镜、拥有粉色头发的现代宁芙，坐在森林溪流旁。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅威廉·阿道夫·布格罗 (William-Adolphe Bouguereau) 风格的浪漫主义学院派油画肖像，并融入微妙的现代元素：一位年轻女性，留着 {argument name="hair color" default="长款波浪形淡粉色头发"}，侧身坐在林间浅溪旁长满青苔的岩石上，赤脚触碰着溪水。她穿着 {argument name="dress" default="一件半透明的奶油色与淡粉色希腊罗马式雪纺连衣裙，配有绳索腰带"}，面料轻盈，垂坠感极佳，单肩设计展现出古典的褶皱与光泽感。添加 {argument name="accessory" default="黑色长方形眼镜以及由粉色小野花和绿叶编织而成的花冠"}，将现代知识分子的气质与神话中宁芙的唯美形成对比。她呈四分之三背影姿态，单膝抬起，一只手撑在身后的岩石上，另一只手自然垂放在腿边，转头回眸看向观者，表情宁静而略带忧郁。将她置于一片迷人的森林空地中，画面包含一条溪流、一块长满青苔的巨石作为座椅、两侧茂密的深绿色植被、水边的粉色小野花，以及背景中透过树木洒下的温暖金色阳光。采用柔和写实主义，理想化的皮肤质感，细腻的笔触，头发和肩部带有发光的轮廓光，营造大气朦胧感，色调以柔和的大地色、暗绿色为主，点缀玫瑰粉色，并呈现出古典大师油画的清漆质感。竖构图肖像，亲密的全身取景，优雅的人体结构，宁静的古典氛围，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。

en.title: Bouguereau Nymph With Glasses
en.description: A classical academic oil-painting style portrait of a pink-haired woodland nymph wearing modern black glasses beside a forest stream.
en.prompt: Create a vertical 3:4 painterly academic oil portrait in the style of William-Adolphe Bouguereau, but with a subtle modern internet-culture twist. Depict a beautiful young woman as a classical woodland nymph seated on mossy rocks beside a dark reflective stream in an enchanted forest. She has long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"} hair, soft fair skin, a delicate oval face, and a dreamy thoughtful expression as she looks off to the left rather than at the viewer. She wears oversized black rectangular eyeglasses, intentionally anachronistic against the classical setting. Her outfit is a translucent Greco-Roman draped gown in ivory cream with pale blush-pink sheer fabric, gathered at one shoulder, cinched with a thin gold rope belt, slipping softly from one shoulder, with layered gauzy folds over her lap and legs. Add a floral laurel crown of small wildflowers and leaves around her head, a delicate floral armband on her upper arm, and a long pink ribbon trailing behind her in the breeze. Pose her sitting three-quarter view on a rock: one hand braced on the stone at her side, the other resting near her knee, one bare leg extended down toward the water with a bare foot touching the shallow stream. Surround her with exactly three main visible flower clusters: one in the crown, one small cluster at her upper arm, and one cluster of daisies and wildflowers growing to the right of the rock. The environment should include moss-covered boulders, calm dark water with golden reflections, dense leafy trees, filtered warm sunlight, atmospheric haze, and a romantic mythological mood. Use highly refined realistic anatomy, porcelain skin, luminous chiaroscuro, soft glazing, delicate brush texture, muted earth tones, golden backlight, and museum-quality 19th-century academic painting detail. No text, no watermark, no modern objects except the glasses.

zh.title: 布格罗风格戴眼镜的仙女
zh.description: 一幅古典学院派油画风格的肖像，描绘了一位留着粉色头发、佩戴现代黑框眼镜的森林仙女，背景是森林溪流。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅 3:4 竖构图的学院派油画风格肖像，致敬威廉·阿道夫·布格罗（William-Adolphe Bouguereau），并融入微妙的现代互联网文化元素。画面描绘一位美丽的年轻女子，化身为古典森林仙女，坐在魔法森林中深色反光溪流旁的苔藓岩石上。她拥有长而飘逸的 {argument name="hair color" default="柔粉色"} 秀发、白皙柔嫩的肌肤、精致的鹅蛋脸，神情梦幻而沉思，目光望向左侧而非注视观众。她佩戴着超大号黑色长方形眼镜，与古典背景形成刻意的时代错位感。她身穿一件象牙奶油色与淡腮红粉色薄纱材质的半透明希腊罗马式垂褶长裙，单肩处褶皱收拢，系着细金绳腰带，长裙从一侧肩膀轻轻滑落，层叠的轻纱覆盖在膝盖和腿部。她的头上戴着由小野花和叶子编织而成的花冠，上臂佩戴精致的花卉臂环，一条粉色长丝带在微风中飘动。她以四分之三侧面姿势坐在岩石上：一只手撑在身侧的石头上，另一只手放在膝盖附近，一条赤裸的腿向下伸向水面，赤足轻触浅浅的溪水。画面中应包含恰好三簇主要花卉：一簇在花冠上，一簇在上臂，另一簇雏菊和野花生长在岩石右侧。环境应包括覆盖苔藓的巨石、平静的深色水面与金色倒影、茂密的树木、过滤后的暖阳、大气薄雾以及浪漫的神话氛围。运用高度精炼的写实解剖结构、瓷器般的肌肤、明暗对照法、柔和的罩染技法、细腻的笔触质感、柔和的大地色调、金色背光以及博物馆级的 19 世纪学院派绘画细节。画面中不含文字、水印，除眼镜外不含任何现代物品。

en.title: Pink-Haired Bouguereau Forest Nymph
en.description: Generates a classical academic oil-painting style portrait of a modern pink-haired nymph with glasses seated by a forest stream.
en.prompt: Create a romantic 19th-century French academic oil painting in the style of William-Adolphe Bouguereau, depicting a graceful young nymph seated on a mossy rock beside a shallow forest stream. The subject is {argument name="character description" default="a delicate young woman with long flowing pastel pink hair"}, turned three-quarters away but looking back over her shoulder toward the viewer with a calm, wistful expression. She wears modern black rectangular eyeglasses, a floral wreath of tiny pale blossoms and greenery in her hair, and a translucent ivory-white classical draped gown with soft blush-pink gauze wrapping around her arms and trailing across the rock. Her bare feet dip into the water, one hand resting on the rock behind her and the other relaxed near her knee. Add three small decorative flower-like tattoos or ornaments on her upper shoulder. The setting is an enchanted woodland with tall dark trees, dense foliage, wildflowers, soft moss, and a narrow reflective stream with lily pads; warm golden sunlight filters through leaves from the upper left, creating hazy atmospheric depth. Use {argument name="painting style" default="highly polished classical realism with soft sfumato, luminous skin, delicate brushwork, and old-master varnish texture"}. Color palette: muted greens, warm browns, cream, rose pink, and golden light. Composition is vertical 3:4, full-body seated figure centered slightly right, serene mythological mood, no visible text, no watermark, no extra figures.

zh.title: 粉发布格罗风格森林仙女
zh.description: 生成一幅古典学院派油画风格的肖像，描绘了一位坐在森林溪流旁的现代粉发戴眼镜仙女。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅 19 世纪法国浪漫主义学院派油画，风格致敬威廉·阿道夫·布格罗（William-Adolphe Bouguereau），描绘一位优雅的年轻仙女坐在森林浅溪旁的苔藓岩石上。主体为 {argument name="character description" default="一位留着飘逸淡粉色长发的精致年轻女性"}，身体侧转四分之三，回眸看向观众，表情宁静而忧郁。她戴着现代黑色长方形眼镜，发间戴着由细小浅色花朵和绿叶编织的花环，身穿半透明象牙白古典垂褶长裙，手臂和岩石上缠绕着柔和的淡粉色薄纱。她赤脚浸在水中，一只手撑在身后的岩石上，另一只手自然地放在膝盖附近。在她的上肩部添加三个小型装饰性花朵纹身或饰品。背景为一片充满魔力的林地，有高大的深色树木、茂密的叶片、野花、柔软的苔藓以及一条倒映着睡莲的狭窄溪流；温暖的金色阳光从左上方透过叶片洒下，营造出朦胧的大气深度。使用 {argument name="painting style" default="高度抛光的古典写实主义，带有柔和的晕涂法（sfumato）、明亮的肤色、细腻的笔触以及古典大师的油画光泽质感"}。调色板：柔和的绿色、暖棕色、奶油色、玫瑰粉色和金色光影。构图为 3:4 竖构图，全身坐姿人物略微偏右，营造宁静的神话氛围，无可见文字，无水印，无多余人物。

en.title: After Light Moody Fashion Poster
en.description: Generates a grainy avant-garde fashion poster portrait with smoky blur, red eye makeup, glass-like face refraction, and elegant editorial typography.
en.prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fashion poster portrait of {argument name="character description" default="an androgynous East Asian woman with a short black bob haircut"} in a dark, moody, high-fashion editorial style. The subject is shown from the chest up, turned slightly to the viewer's right, with only the right side of the face sharply visible while the rest dissolves into smoky blur and shadow. Use pale skin, a severe neutral expression, dark lips, and intense red eyeshadow around one visible eye. Add a thin translucent curved oval/leaf-shaped glass outline over the face, like a refracted lens slice cutting from the forehead down past the cheek, subtly distorting the portrait inside it. The outfit is a black high-collared coat or blazer with a hint of deep red fabric near the lower right. Lighting is soft and directional, creating a ghostly halo on a gray-white background, with heavy film grain, mist, motion blur, vignette, and analog print texture. Compose like an avant-garde magazine cover: subject centered slightly high, negative space around the head, dark lower third for typography. Include exactly 5 visible text elements: small top-right text “FRAME 05:56”; large bottom-left title split over two lines with “{argument name="main title first line" default="AFTER"}” in cream serif capitals and “{argument name="main title second line" default="LIGHT"}” in dark red serif capitals; tiny spaced text under the title reading “VISIBLE FOR A SECOND      MEMORY HOLDS THE EDGE”; tiny lower-left mark “1.9”; and a bottom caption reading “{argument name="bottom caption" default="WHAT THE SHADOW COULD NOT KEEP"}”. Use elegant Didot/Bodoni-like serif typography for the title and small monospaced tracking for captions. Keep the palette limited to black, charcoal, fog gray, ivory, muted skin tones, and blood red. Avoid extra text, logos, smiles, bright colors, or clean digital sharpness.

zh.title: After Light 情绪化时尚海报
zh.description: 生成一张带有颗粒感的前卫时尚海报肖像，融合烟雾模糊效果、红色眼妆、玻璃般的面部折射以及优雅的编辑排版。
zh.prompt: 创作一张垂直电影质感的时尚海报肖像，主体为 {argument name="character description" default="一位留着黑色短波波头的雌雄同体东亚女性"}，采用暗黑、情绪化的高级时尚编辑风格。主体呈现胸部以上视角，略微转向观众右侧，仅右侧脸部清晰可见，其余部分融入烟雾模糊和阴影中。使用苍白的皮肤、严肃的中性表情、深色嘴唇，并在可见的一只眼睛周围涂抹浓郁的红色眼影。在脸部上方添加一个细长的半透明椭圆形/叶片状玻璃轮廓，如同从额头延伸至脸颊的折射镜片切片，微妙地扭曲其中的肖像。服装为黑色高领外套或西装，右下角隐约露出深红色面料。光线柔和且具有方向性，在灰白色背景上营造出幽灵般的光晕，并带有浓重的胶片颗粒、薄雾、动态模糊、暗角和模拟印刷纹理。构图参考前卫杂志封面：主体略微偏上居中，头部周围留有负空间，底部三分之一处留给排版。包含 5 个可见的文字元素：右上角小字“FRAME 05:56”；左下角分两行的大标题，第一行为奶油色衬线大写字母“{argument name="main title first line" default="AFTER"}”，第二行为深红色衬线大写字母“{argument name="main title second line" default="LIGHT"}”；标题下方极小的间距文字“VISIBLE FOR A SECOND      MEMORY HOLDS THE EDGE”；左下角极小的标记“1.9”；以及底部标题“{argument name="bottom caption" default="WHAT THE SHADOW COULD NOT KEEP"}”。标题使用优雅的 Didot/Bodoni 风格衬线字体，说明文字使用小号等宽字体。色调限制在黑色、炭灰色、雾灰色、象牙白、柔和肤色和血红色。避免添加多余文字、Logo、笑容、鲜艳色彩或过于干净的数字锐度。

en.title: Monochrome Woman and Black Horse
en.description: A cinematic black-and-white fine-art portrait of a woman in a flowing dark gown tenderly touching a black horse in a stormy field.
en.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical black-and-white fine-art photograph of a {argument name="woman description" default="young woman with long windblown dark hair"} standing in a grassy field under a stormy cloudy sky, wearing a {argument name="dress description" default="flowing off-the-shoulder black sheer gown"}. She is shown in left profile, waist-up to full-length, gently reaching her right hand up to touch the muzzle of a {argument name="horse description" default="large black horse"} entering from the upper right side of the frame. The horse’s head and neck dominate the top-right composition, mane blowing in the wind, ears visible, eye partially in shadow, lowering its face toward the woman in an intimate quiet moment. The woman gazes upward at the horse with a calm, tender expression; her bare shoulders and soft posture create an elegant silhouette. Use a moody low-key monochrome palette with deep blacks, soft gray midtones, strong atmospheric contrast, and subtle film grain. Background should be out-of-focus open field and layered clouds, with no buildings, fences, text, or extra animals. Composition: vertical portrait orientation, subject placed slightly left of center, horse cropped by the right and top edges, lots of negative space in the cloudy sky, cinematic natural light, wind-swept romantic gothic mood, realistic photography, shallow depth of field, high detail in hair, fabric, and horse mane.

zh.title: 黑白影像：女子与黑马
zh.description: 一幅极具电影感的黑白艺术肖像，描绘了一位身着飘逸深色礼服的女子，在风暴笼罩的旷野中温柔地抚摸着一匹黑马。
zh.prompt: 创作一张极具戏剧张力的竖构图黑白艺术摄影作品，画面中一位 {argument name="woman description" default="留着长发、发丝在风中飘动的年轻女子"} 站在暴风雨云层下的草地上，身穿一件 {argument name="dress description" default="飘逸的露肩黑色透视礼服"}。画面采用左侧侧面视角，从腰部到全身构图，她轻轻抬起右手，触碰一匹从画面右上角进入的 {argument name="horse description" default="高大的黑马"} 的口鼻部。马的头部和颈部占据了构图的右上角，鬃毛在风中飞扬，耳朵清晰可见，眼睛部分处于阴影中，它低下头朝向女子，营造出一种亲密而静谧的瞬间。女子抬头凝视着马，表情平静而温柔；她裸露的肩膀和柔和的姿态勾勒出优雅的轮廓。采用忧郁的低调黑白影调，强调深邃的黑色、柔和的灰色中间调、强烈的氛围对比以及细腻的胶片颗粒感。背景应为失焦的开阔原野和层叠的云层，画面中不应包含任何建筑物、围栏、文字或其他动物。构图：竖向肖像构图，主体略微偏左，马匹在右侧和顶部边缘进行裁剪，多云的天空留出大量负空间，采用电影般的自然光，营造出风中摇曳的浪漫哥特氛围，写实摄影风格，浅景深，头发、织物和马鬃细节丰富。

en.title: Patterned Light Beauty Portrait
en.description: A photorealistic editorial portrait prompt featuring a woman illuminated by decorative geometric light projections.
en.prompt: Create a photorealistic close-up beauty portrait of {argument name="subject" default="a young East Asian woman with natural skin and short wet black hair tucked behind one ear"} against a matching patterned backdrop. She is bare-shouldered, framed from the upper chest upward, turned slightly three-quarters toward the camera, with her chin gently resting on her right hand and a calm, soft, direct gaze. Project a crisp ornamental light pattern across her face, neck, shoulder, hand, and the background: {argument name="projected pattern" default="repeating soft-edged pentagon and hexagon tile motifs with coral-red and muted blue circular centers, like sunlight passing through a decorative screen"}. The pattern should align naturally over facial contours and skin, creating realistic shadows and highlights rather than painted-on makeup. Use {argument name="lighting" default="warm late-afternoon sunlight with high contrast but soft skin detail"}, shallow depth of field, glossy eyes, subtle peach lips, minimal makeup, and fine realistic hair strands. The mood is serene, intimate, editorial, and cinematic, with a color palette of warm beige skin tones, coral red accents, dusty blue shadows, and cream highlights. Vertical portrait composition, 4:5 aspect ratio, ultra-detailed skin texture, natural imperfections, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no jewelry, no clothing distractions.

zh.title: 光影纹理美妆肖像
zh.description: 一个照片级写实风格的编辑类肖像提示词，展现了被装饰性几何光影投射所照亮的女性形象。
zh.prompt: 创作一张照片级写实风格的近景美妆肖像，主体为 {argument name="subject" default="一位皮肤自然、留着黑色湿发短发并别在耳后的一位年轻东亚女性"}，背景与光影纹理相呼应。她双肩裸露，取景范围从胸部以上，身体略微向镜头侧转四分之三，下巴轻轻靠在右手背上，目光平静、柔和且直视镜头。将清晰的装饰性光影图案投射在她的脸部、颈部、肩膀、手部以及背景上：{argument name="projected pattern" default="重复的柔边五边形和六边形瓷砖图案，中心带有珊瑚红和柔和的蓝色圆点，如同阳光穿过装饰屏风的效果"}。图案应自然地贴合面部轮廓和皮肤，营造出真实的阴影和高光，而非画上去的妆容。使用 {argument name="lighting" default="高对比度但皮肤细节柔和的午后暖阳"}，浅景深，明亮的双眼，淡淡的桃色嘴唇，极简妆容，以及细腻逼真的发丝。整体氛围宁静、亲密、具有编辑感和电影质感，色调采用暖米色肤色、珊瑚红点缀、灰蓝色阴影和奶油色高光。竖构图肖像，4:5 比例，超精细皮肤纹理，保留自然瑕疵，无文字，无水印，无多余人物，无珠宝，无干扰衣物。

en.title: Realistic Office Elevator Candid
en.description: A natural smartphone-style candid photo prompt for depicting an ordinary professional woman inside a public-building elevator.
en.prompt: Create a highly realistic candid smartphone photo taken from just outside an open elevator in an ordinary office or public institution building. The scene shows {argument name="subject" default="a middle-aged Chinese female department manager"} standing inside the stainless-steel elevator in side/back profile, looking slightly upward at the elevator floor indicator and control panel. She has an everyday, non-model appearance with natural facial features, realistic skin texture, subtle under-eye tiredness, faint lines, and no cosmetic-surgery or overly polished makeup look. Her dark hair is tied into a practical low bun. She wears {argument name="outfit" default="a white textured long-sleeve blouse tucked into dark gray flared office trousers"}, beige low-heeled shoes, and carries {argument name="bag" default="a large dark brown patterned tote bag over one shoulder"}. In one hand she holds a folded black umbrella and a small phone or card. The elevator interior is brushed metal with reflective panels, a vertical button array containing many round buttons, a small black digital display above it, and exactly two visible wall notices: one large blue-bordered Chinese safety notice and one narrower poster to the right. The floor is speckled gray elevator flooring, and the open elevator door frame is visible in the foreground, creating a slightly voyeuristic everyday snapshot composition. Use dim fluorescent indoor lighting, mild motion softness, imperfect framing, realistic reflections, slight grain, and a natural phone-camera perspective. Avoid glamour lighting, studio composition, fashion-model posing, perfect symmetry, AI-smooth skin, or overly beautiful facial features.
