On the desk, include exactly 3 prominent accessories: a black mug with a white X logo on the right, a spiral notebook reading “ENDLESS CREATIVITY” with an orange heart below it, and two black pens with orange accents. Add a leafy green plant at the far left edge and another plant visible inside the recursive screen room. Use a slightly wide 4:3 composition, dynamic perspective looking over the raccoon’s shoulder, playful creator-community mood, crisp readable text, no photorealism, no watermark. Use {argument name="app name" default="GPT Image 2"}, {argument name="speech bubble text" default="IMAGE GENERATION INCEPTION"}, {argument name="button label" default="Generate"}, {argument name="notebook text" default="ENDLESS CREATIVITY"}, and {argument name="main character" default="anthropomorphic raccoon creator"}.

zh.title: GPT Image 2 递归图像嵌套
zh.description: 一幅温馨的手绘创作者场景，描绘了一只拟人化的浣熊正在笔记本电脑上生成无限嵌套的 GPT Image 2 图像。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅温暖的手绘风格数字插画，展现递归图像生成的嵌套效果，画面中一只可爱的拟人化浣熊创作者正坐在木质书桌前，通过笔记本电脑使用 GPT Image 2。场景设定在一个舒适的工作室中，背景为米色纸张纹理，采用墨线勾勒、柔和阴影、柔和的大地色调以及橙色点缀。在前景中，放置 1 只穿着黑色连帽衫的浣熊角色，连帽衫背面印有橙色的山峰与旗帜标志，它正坐在笔记本电脑前，张着嘴微笑着兴奋地指向屏幕。在浣熊上方添加一个对话气泡，其中黑色文字写着“IMAGE GENERATION”，橙色文字写着“INCEPTION”，下方带有一个小橙色闪光点。在笔记本电脑屏幕上，展示 GPT Image 2 的界面，标题为“GPT Image 2”，并呈现出同一场景的无限嵌套递归：准确显示 6 层向内延伸的屏幕/笔记本电脑框架，每一层都更小且透视对齐，营造出隧道效果。在主显示屏幕内，包含 6 个并排坐在书桌前的动物角色：1 只穿黑色连帽衫的浣熊、1 只穿绿色连帽衫的熊猫、1 只穿蓝色连帽衫的橙色狐狸、1 只穿黄色连帽衫的刺猬、1 只紫色小动物，以及最深处屏幕内的一只微型嵌套动物。在递归房间的背景中添加激励海报，文字简短，如“FOCUS BUILD SHIP”、“KEEP IT SIMPLE”、“MAKE COOL THINGS”和“CREATE EVERY DAY”。在笔记本电脑界面底部，包含一个提示词输入框，写着“What do you want to create?”，以及一个标有“Generate”的橙色按钮，外加两个小的轮廓操作图标。在书桌上，放置 3 个显眼的配件：右侧有一个印有白色 X 标志的黑色马克杯、一本写着“ENDLESS CREATIVITY”并带有橙色爱心的螺旋笔记本，以及两支带有橙色装饰的黑色钢笔。在最左侧边缘添加一株绿叶植物，并在递归屏幕内的房间里也放置一株植物。采用略宽的 4:3 构图，从浣熊肩后观察的动态视角，营造俏皮的创作者社区氛围，文字清晰易读，非写实风格，无水印。请使用 {argument name="app name" default="GPT Image 2"}、{argument name="speech bubble text" default="IMAGE GENERATION INCEPTION"}、{argument name="button label" default="Generate"}、{argument name="notebook text" default="ENDLESS CREATIVITY"} 和 {argument name="main character" default="拟人化浣熊创作者"}。

en.title: Chaotic Japanese Guest Announcement Poster
en.description: A structured prompt for generating a loud Japanese variety-show style guest announcement poster with photo cutouts, brush typography, comic bursts, and dense promotional layout.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a loud, deliberately over-the-top Japanese entertainment announcement poster with a cheap generated-AI feeling, like a promotional banner for a stage, food, and travel themed live event presented by {argument name="presenter name" default="佐久間宣行"}.

Canvas: Square 1:1 poster, saturated blue background, dense comic-book texture, halftone dots, paint splatters, star confetti, rough brush strokes, torn-paper cream center panel, high-contrast black banners, hot pink and yellow accents.

Layout: Top third is a chaotic headline area. Place a white jagged speech bubble on the upper left containing vertical colorful text from {argument name="left speech bubble text" default="舞台？ 食？ 旅？"}. Near the top center add a small cutout portrait of a serious middle-aged Japanese man in a suit tipping his hat. Across the top black brush banner, show the announcement line {argument name="announcement text" default="第二弾ゲスト発表　佐久間宣行 PRESENTS"}. The main headline dominates the center in huge hand-painted brush lettering, blue then magenta, reading {argument name="main headline" default="五感爆発！"}. Under it, add a smaller slogan in mixed black, orange, and blue text reading {argument name="subheadline" default="食もライブ！舞台もライブ！"}. On the upper right, place a black ink-burst speech bubble with bold yellow and white lettering saying that Ishikawa is the best, with exclamation marks.

Middle band: Add two black brush category ribbons. Left ribbon has two theater masks, one pink and one blue, and the label for theater. Right ribbon has a white fork-and-spoon circle icon and the label for gourmet food. Include two small cutout full-body/half-body photos: one casual man standing near the lower left edge holding a suitcase, and one smiling man at upper right eating while holding a clear drink cup.

Guest grid: Use exactly 5 guest slots in the lower half. Four are vertical rectangular portrait cards aligned left-to-right on a blue field, plus one larger portrait card on the far right. The 5 visible guests are: 1) young Japanese man in a black suit holding an orange crab, with a magenta nameplate; 2) young Japanese woman with straight black bob hair in a white outfit, with a magenta nameplate; 3) anonymous black silhouette head with a large white question mark and a magenta nameplate saying it will be announced soon; 4) young Japanese man in a suit and tie, with a yellow nameplate; 5) larger middle-aged Japanese man with black hair, red round glasses, black jacket, white shirt, and black scarf with red dots, with a yellow nameplate. Add a bright jagged pink-and-yellow “NEW!” burst overlapping between the fourth and fifth guest cards.

Bottom section: Add a wide black brush-stroke banner across the bottom with large white Japanese-style copy, emphasizing a few words in yellow. Put a small suited man holding a hat at the lower left of this banner. On the bottom right, add a hot-pink comic burst with yellow Japanese-style text calling out the gourmet segment.

Visual style: Maximalist Japanese variety-show poster design, intentionally gaudy and cluttered, inconsistent font weights, exaggerated brush typography, strong drop shadows, rough cutout photo collage, comic halftones, ink splashes, neon accents, and uneven spacing. Make it look like a first-pass AI-generated promo graphic rather than polished professional design.

Constraints: Use exactly 5 guest portrait cards, exactly 2 category ribbons, exactly 2 food/theater icons on the category ribbons, exactly 1 left speech bubble, exactly 1 right ink-burst bubble, exactly 1 NEW burst, and exactly 1 large main headline. Avoid minimalist design, avoid clean empty space, avoid English-only typography, and do not add a watermark.

zh.title: 混乱的日式嘉宾官宣海报
zh.description: 一个结构化提示词，用于生成充满日式综艺风格、喧闹且夸张的嘉宾官宣海报，包含照片抠图、毛笔字体、漫画爆炸效果及密集的宣传布局。
zh.prompt:
目标：创作一张喧闹、刻意夸张的日式综艺风格官宣海报，带有廉价的 AI 生成感，类似于由 {argument name="presenter name" default="佐久间宣行"} 呈现的舞台、美食与旅行主题现场活动的宣传横幅。

画布：1:1 正方形海报，饱和的蓝色背景，密集的漫画书质感，半调网点，油漆飞溅，星星纸屑，粗犷的笔触，撕纸风格的奶油色中心面板，高对比度的黑色横幅，以及亮粉色和黄色的点缀。

布局：顶部三分之一为混乱的标题区。在左上方放置一个白色锯齿状对话气泡，包含来自 {argument name="left speech bubble text" default="舞台？ 食？ 旅？"} 的竖排彩色文字。在顶部中心附近添加一张严肃的中年日本西装男士摘帽致意的小型抠图肖像。在顶部的黑色毛笔横幅上，展示官宣文案 {argument name="announcement text" default="第二弾ゲスト発表　佐久间宣行 PRESENTS"}。主标题以巨大的手绘毛笔字占据中心位置，先蓝后洋红色，文字为 {argument name="main headline" default="五感爆発！"}。在其下方，添加一行较小的口号，使用黑色、橙色和蓝色混合文字，内容为 {argument name="subheadline" default="食もライブ！舞台もライブ！"}。在右上角，放置一个黑色墨迹爆炸气泡，配以醒目的黄色和白色文字，宣称石川县是最棒的，并带有感叹号。

中间带：添加两条黑色毛笔分类丝带。左侧丝带上有两个戏剧面具（一个粉色，一个蓝色）以及戏剧标签。右侧丝带上有一个白色叉勺圆形图标以及美食标签。包含两张小型全身/半身抠图照片：一张是左下角边缘站立的休闲男士手提行李箱，另一张是右上角正在进食并手持透明饮料杯的微笑男士。

嘉宾网格：在下半部分使用 5 个嘉宾位。四个垂直矩形肖像卡片在蓝色区域从左到右排列，最右侧还有一个较大的肖像卡片。5 位可见嘉宾为：1) 身穿黑色西装手持橙色螃蟹的年轻日本男性，配有洋红色名牌；2) 留着黑色直发波波头的年轻日本女性，身穿白色服装，配有洋红色名牌；3) 匿名的黑色剪影头像，带有巨大的白色问号，洋红色名牌上写着“敬请期待”；4) 身穿西装领带的年轻日本男性，配有黄色名牌；5) 较大的中年日本男性，黑发，戴红色圆框眼镜，身穿黑色夹克、白衬衫和带红点的黑色围巾，配有黄色名牌。在第四和第五张嘉宾卡片之间添加一个明亮的锯齿状粉黄相间“NEW!”爆炸贴纸。

底部区域：在底部添加一个宽大的黑色毛笔横幅，配有醒目的白色日式文案，并用黄色强调部分词汇。在此横幅的左下角放置一个小型的西装男士持帽形象。在右下角，添加一个亮粉色的漫画爆炸效果，配以黄色日式文字，呼吁关注美食环节。

视觉风格：极繁主义日式综艺海报设计，刻意俗气且杂乱，字体粗细不一，夸张的毛笔字体，强烈的投影，粗糙的抠图拼贴，漫画半调，墨迹飞溅，霓虹色调，以及不均匀的间距。使其看起来像是初次生成的 AI 宣传图，而非精致的专业设计。

约束条件：必须使用 5 张嘉宾肖像卡片，2 条分类丝带，分类丝带上必须有 2 个美食/戏剧图标，1 个左侧对话气泡，1 个右侧墨迹爆炸气泡，1 个 NEW 爆炸贴纸，以及 1 个大型主标题。避免极简主义设计，避免干净的留白，避免仅使用英文字体，且不要添加水印。

en.title: Cute Travel Vlog Thumbnail
en.description: Generates a cheerful vertical travel vlog cover with a smiling backpacker, pastel sticker typography, and kawaii travel doodles for social posts or video thumbnails.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a bright vertical travel vlog thumbnail/collage featuring a smiling young woman traveler in a sunny outdoor alley, surrounded by cute scrapbook stickers and hand-drawn doodles.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 social media image, high-resolution, warm daylight, shallow depth of field. Background is a charming pedestrian street or café alley with plants, terracotta umbrellas, soft bokeh, and a small chalkboard sign in the distance.

Main subject: A cheerful {argument name="character description" default="young East Asian woman with shoulder-length black hair and bangs"} stands slightly right of center, turned three-quarters toward the camera, smiling warmly. She wears a loose white T-shirt with a small nature print on the chest, light blue jeans, and a large beige backpack over one shoulder. Add a cute plush keychain hanging from the backpack. Put a thick white cutout outline around the subject, like a sticker.

Layout and text stickers: Use exactly 6 main text stickers: 1) large top-left title reading {argument name="main title" default="Travel Vlog"} in oversized rounded pastel bubble letters with a thick white border; 2) top-right stacked sticker reading {argument name="top right phrase" default="Good Vibes Only"} with a yellow heart and yellow smiley face; 3) small pink ribbon banner on the left reading {argument name="banner text" default="let's go!"}; 4) dark cloud speech bubble on the right reading "explore more" with a small pink heart; 5) bottom-left sticker reading "on the way" in playful blue and pink bubble letters with a small white flower; 6) bottom-right sticky note reading {argument name="note text" default="Collect moments not things"} with a pink tape strip and a small heart.

Decorative elements: Include exactly 3 illustrated travel icons: a cute line-art camera with a heart on the lens on the left, a folded map with a pink location pin on the lower right, and the backpack plush charm. Add multiple small white hand-drawn sparkles, arrows, hearts, squiggles, and doodle marks scattered around the subject, keeping them light and airy.

Visual style: Photorealistic lifestyle portrait blended with kawaii sticker graphics, pastel colors, glossy scrapbook aesthetic, soft white outlines, playful vlog thumbnail design, warm golden sunlight, cheerful vacation mood.

Constraints: Keep all text legible and in English, preserve the exact 6 main text stickers and 3 illustrated travel icons, avoid extra large words, avoid watermarks or logos, and make the subject the clear focal point.

zh.title: 可爱的旅行 Vlog 缩略图
zh.description: 生成一张充满活力的竖版旅行 Vlog 封面，包含微笑的背包客、柔和的贴纸字体以及可爱的旅行涂鸦，适用于社交媒体帖子或视频缩略图。
zh.prompt:
目标：创作一张明亮的竖版旅行 Vlog 缩略图/拼贴画，画面主体为一名在阳光明媚的户外小巷中微笑的年轻女性旅行者，周围环绕着可爱的剪贴簿贴纸和手绘涂鸦。

画布：竖版 3:4 社交媒体图片，高分辨率，温暖的日光，浅景深。背景为迷人的步行街或咖啡馆小巷，带有植物、赤陶色遮阳伞、柔和的焦外成像以及远处的一个小黑板招牌。

主体：一位开朗的 {argument name="character description" default="留着齐肩黑发和刘海的年轻东亚女性"} 站在画面中心偏右侧，身体四分之三转向镜头，笑容温暖。她身穿一件宽松的白色 T 恤，胸前印有小型自然图案，搭配浅蓝色牛仔裤，单肩背着一个米色大背包。在背包上挂一个可爱的毛绒钥匙扣。为人物添加一圈厚实的白色剪纸轮廓，使其看起来像一张贴纸。

布局与文字贴纸：使用 6 个主要的文字贴纸：1) 左上角的大标题，文字为 {argument name="main title" default="Travel Vlog"}，采用超大圆润的柔和泡泡字体，并带有厚实的白色边框；2) 右上角的堆叠贴纸，文字为 {argument name="top right phrase" default="Good Vibes Only"}，配有一个黄色爱心和一个黄色笑脸；3) 左侧的小粉色丝带横幅，文字为 {argument name="banner text" default="let's go!"}；4) 右侧的深色云朵对话框，文字为 "explore more"，配有一个小粉色爱心；5) 左下角的贴纸，文字为 "on the way"，采用俏皮的蓝粉色泡泡字体，并配有一朵小白花；6) 右下角的便签贴纸，文字为 {argument name="note text" default="Collect moments not things"}，配有一条粉色胶带和一个小爱心。

装饰元素：包含 3 个旅行插画图标：左侧是一个镜头上有爱心的可爱线条画相机，右下角是一张带有粉色定位针的折叠地图，以及背包上的毛绒挂件。在主体周围散布多个白色手绘小火花、箭头、爱心、波浪线和涂鸦标记，保持画面轻盈通透。

视觉风格：写实生活风肖像与可爱贴纸图形的融合，柔和的色彩，光泽感的剪贴簿美学，柔和的白色轮廓，俏皮的 Vlog 缩略图设计，温暖的金色阳光，愉悦的度假氛围。

约束条件：保持所有文字清晰可辨且为英文，保留 6 个主要的文字贴纸和 3 个旅行插画图标，避免使用过大的文字，避免出现水印或 Logo，并确保人物是清晰的视觉焦点。

en.title: Ultra-Premium Executive Portrait
en.description: Generates a luxurious studio executive portrait of a sharply dressed subject seated confidently in a black leather armchair.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-premium executive studio portrait of {argument name="subject" default="a young Black man"} seated in a black leather armchair, centered and facing the camera with a calm, confident, serious expression. He wears a perfectly tailored all-black double-breasted suit, black dress shirt, textured black tie, black socks, polished black Oxford shoes, a slim white pocket square, and a luxury dark wristwatch on his left wrist. Pose him with legs crossed, both arms relaxed on the chair arms, upright posture, shoulders squared, direct eye contact. Use a vertical 2:3 composition, full seated body visible from head to shoes, symmetrical framing, slight low-to-eye-level perspective. Background is a seamless dark charcoal studio backdrop with subtle vignette and no props besides the chair. Lighting should be dramatic high-end editorial portrait lighting: large soft key light from front-left, gentle fill from front-right, subtle rim separation on shoulders, controlled highlights on the leather chair and shoes, deep rich blacks with visible fabric texture. Photorealistic, sharp focus on face, natural skin texture, premium magazine cover quality, refined contrast, cinematic grading, no text, no watermark, no distorted hands, no extra fingers, no facial stylization.

zh.title: 超高端行政肖像
zh.description: 生成一张奢华的摄影棚行政肖像，展现一位穿着考究的主体自信地坐在黑色皮质扶手椅上。
zh.prompt: 创作一张超高端行政摄影棚肖像，主体为 {argument name="subject" default="一位年轻的黑人男性"}，他坐在黑色皮质扶手椅上，居中面向镜头，表情冷静、自信且严肃。他身着剪裁完美的纯黑色双排扣西装、黑色衬衫、质感黑色领带、黑色袜子、抛光黑色牛津鞋，佩戴白色窄边口袋巾，左手腕戴着奢华深色腕表。姿势要求双腿交叉，双臂自然放在扶手上，坐姿挺拔，双肩平直，直视镜头。采用 2:3 纵向构图，全身坐姿可见（从头部到鞋子），对称式取景，视角略低于视平线。背景为无缝深炭灰色摄影棚背景，带有微妙的暗角效果，除椅子外无其他道具。灯光采用戏剧性的高端杂志肖像布光：左前方大面积柔光主光，右前方柔和补光，肩部有微妙的轮廓光，皮椅和鞋子上有受控的高光，深邃的黑色中保留可见的织物纹理。照片级真实感，面部对焦清晰，自然的皮肤纹理，杂志封面级品质，精致的对比度，电影级调色，无文字，无水印，无扭曲的手部，无多余手指，无面部风格化处理。

en.title: Colorized Shonen Manga Battle Spread
en.description: Generates a dramatic French-translated shonen manga battle page with 14 colorized panels, intense action, speech bubbles, and cinematic red-blue contrast.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a full-color manga double-page spread in the style of a dramatic shonen battle scene, resembling a French-translated One Piece chapter page, with heavy black panel borders, dynamic action, expressive hand-lettered sound effects, and saturated blue-red cinematic coloring.

Canvas: Landscape 4:3 comic page collage, approximately 1024×768, with a white gutter grid separating panels. The image should look like a restored and colorized manga scan: inked line art, painterly digital color, high contrast shadows, and slightly gritty paper texture.

Layout: Use exactly 14 visible comic panels arranged as a dense two-page spread. Left side contains 8 panels: 3 small panels across the top, 4 narrow action panels beneath them, and 1 large dramatic panel at the bottom. Right side contains 6 panels: 1 huge blue forest panel at the top right and 5 smaller panels along the bottom right, including two thin stacked panels on the left, one vertical center panel, one large right panel, and small speech-bubble areas integrated into the right panel.

Subject details: Show {argument name="hero character" default="a white-haired rubbery warrior with flame-like hair, round eyes, a huge grin, and cartoonish Gear Five energy"} fighting {argument name="villain character" default="a massive horned dragon-like emperor with long white hair, black shadowed armor, and an enormous spiked club"}. The scene alternates between close-ups of the hero’s manic smiling face, explosive attacks, and a vast blue forest battlefield. The hero appears glowing and elastic, with pale skin, swirling white hair, and exaggerated anime expressions. The villain is towering, menacing, mostly dark purple and black, with horns, flowing hair, and a brutal silhouette.

Panel-by-panel content count: Panel 1, top-left small: close-up of the grinning flame-haired hero saying “HEIN ?!” with orange fire lighting. Panel 2, top row middle: white speech bubble reading “…QUE TU N’ES PAS JOY BOY !” against pale blue motion energy. Panel 3, top row right: glowing blue-white impact sphere with speed lines and a speech bubble reading “MU SAIT PARFAI-TEMENT…”. Panel 4, second row far left: red-brown motion panel with distorted ground or body and large vertical sound effects. Panel 5, second row narrow: red beam-like action panel with a tiny speech bubble reading “ALLONS-Y !”. Panel 6, second row center: close-up of the hero’s wild grin framed by huge black Japanese sound effect lettering. Panel 7, second row right: dark close-up of a single intense eye in purple shadow. Panel 8, bottom-left large: the hero hangs injured or limp in front of the towering horned villain holding a club, red smoky sky behind them, with two large speech bubbles reading “…N’ÉTAIT PAS AUSSI FAIBLE…!” and “JOY BOY, LUI…”, plus a small black caption box reading “LE ROI DU MONDE DANS TOUTE SA SPLENDEUR…!!”. Panel 9, top-right huge: immense blue enchanted forest vortex, twisted trees, swirling leaves and wind, a black silhouetted warrior at the right edge holding a weapon, and bold black Japanese sound effects; add the watermark {argument name="watermark text" default="@stein_lr"} near the lower-left of this large panel. Panel 10, bottom-right upper-left small: close-up of the hero spinning or rushing downward, speech bubble “PAREIL POUR MOI !”. Panel 11, bottom-right lower-left small: narrow vertical impact panel with a falling figure, blue explosion, and a small empty or dotted speech bubble. Panel 12, bottom-right center vertical: blue sky and dead trees with a flaming projectile streaking diagonally, speech bubble reading “MU Y VOIT PLUS CLAIR DÉSORMAIS !”. Panel 13, bottom-right large: the hero spinning like a pale tornado above a dried forest, blue spiral energy and falling debris, speech bubbles reading “LA FORÊT S’EST DES-SÉCHÉE !”, “HEIN ??”, and “!!?”. Panel 14, embedded small speech region near the right edge: preserve the sharp white bubble with “!!?” as part of the large action panel composition.

Text style: Use French uppercase manga lettering in thick irregular black font inside white speech bubbles with black outlines. Use multiple oversized black Japanese-style sound effects, especially around impacts and motion. Keep all visible text legible but hand-drawn.

Color and mood: Left page should be dominated by fiery oranges, reds, smoky browns, and black shadows. Right page should be dominated by icy blues, navy, cyan highlights, pale moonlit whites, and black silhouettes. Strong contrast between warm villain confrontation and cold supernatural forest vortex.

Constraints: Preserve the exact 14-panel count and the described panel arrangement. Do not add extra characters beyond the hero, villain, silhouettes, and tiny action figures implied by the panels. Keep thick manga panel gutters, dramatic perspective, dense speed lines, painterly colorization, and no modern UI elements.

zh.title: 彩色少年漫画战斗跨页
zh.description: 生成一页戏剧性的法语版少年漫画战斗页面，包含 14 个彩色分镜、激烈的动作、对话气泡以及电影般的红蓝对比效果。
zh.prompt:
目标：创作一幅全彩漫画双页跨页，风格为戏剧性的少年漫画战斗场景，类似于法语版 One Piece 章节页面，具有厚重的黑色分镜边框、动态动作、富有表现力的手写音效，以及饱和的蓝红电影色彩。

画布：横向 4:3 漫画页面拼贴，约 1024×768，带有分隔分镜的白色间隙网格。图像应看起来像修复并上色的漫画扫描件：墨线稿、绘画感数字色彩、高对比度阴影以及略带粗糙的纸张纹理。

布局：使用精确的 14 个可见漫画分镜，排列成紧凑的双页跨页。左侧包含 8 个分镜：顶部 3 个小分镜，下方 4 个狭窄动作分镜，底部 1 个大型戏剧性分镜。右侧包含 6 个分镜：右上角 1 个巨大的蓝色森林分镜，右下角 5 个较小的分镜，包括左侧两个堆叠的细长分镜、一个垂直中心分镜、一个大型右侧分镜，以及集成在右侧分镜中的小型对话气泡区域。

主体细节：展示 {argument name="hero character" default="一位白发橡胶战士，拥有火焰般的头发、圆眼睛、巨大的露齿笑和卡通化的 Gear Five 能量"} 与 {argument name="villain character" default="一位巨大的长角龙形皇帝，留着长白发，身穿黑色阴影铠甲，手持巨大的带刺木棒"} 战斗。场景在英雄狂笑的特写、爆炸性攻击和广阔的蓝色森林战场之间切换。英雄看起来发光且富有弹性，皮肤苍白，头发呈漩涡状，表情夸张。反派身材高大，充满威胁感，以深紫色和黑色为主，长角，头发飘逸，轮廓粗犷。

分镜内容计数：分镜 1（左上小）：咧嘴笑的火焰发英雄特写，说着“HEIN ?!”，配有橙色火焰光效。分镜 2（顶行中间）：白色对话气泡，写着“…QUE TU N’ES PAS JOY BOY !”，背景为淡蓝色运动能量。分镜 3（顶行右侧）：发光的蓝白色冲击球，带有速度线和对话气泡，写着“MU SAIT PARFAI-TEMENT…”。分镜 4（第二行最左）：红棕色运动分镜，带有扭曲的地面或身体以及巨大的垂直音效。分镜 5（第二行狭窄）：红色光束状动作分镜，带有一个写着“ALLONS-Y !”的小对话气泡。分镜 6（第二行中心）：英雄狂野笑容的特写，周围环绕着巨大的黑色日式音效文字。分镜 7（第二行右侧）：紫色阴影中单只锐利眼睛的深色特写。分镜 8（左下大型）：英雄在手持木棒的高大长角反派面前显得受伤或无力，背景是红色烟雾缭绕的天空，带有两个巨大的对话气泡，写着“…N’ÉTAIT PAS AUSSI FAIBLE…!” 和 “JOY BOY, LUI…”，以及一个写着“LE ROI DU MONDE DANS TOUTE SA SPLENDEUR…!!”的小型黑色标题框。分镜 9（右上巨大）：巨大的蓝色魔法森林漩涡、扭曲的树木、旋转的叶子和风，右边缘有一个黑色剪影战士手持武器，并带有粗体黑色日式音效；在此大型分镜左下角附近添加水印 {argument name="watermark text" default="@stein_lr"}。分镜 10（右下左上小）：英雄向下旋转或冲刺的特写，对话气泡“PAREIL POUR MOI !”。分镜 11（右下左下小）：狭窄的垂直冲击分镜，带有坠落的人物、蓝色爆炸和一个小的空白或点状对话气泡。分镜 12（右下中心垂直）：蓝天和枯树，带有斜向划过的火焰弹，对话气泡写着“MU Y VOIT PLUS CLAIR DÉSORMAIS !”。分镜 13（右下大型）：英雄像苍白的龙卷风一样在干枯的森林上方旋转，蓝色螺旋能量和坠落的碎片，对话气泡写着“LA FORÊT S’EST DES-SÉCHÉE !”、“HEIN ??” 和 “!!?”。分镜 14（右边缘附近嵌入的小型对话区域）：保留作为大型动作分镜组成部分的带有“!!?”的清晰白色气泡。

文字风格：在带有黑色轮廓的白色对话气泡内使用法语大写漫画字体，字体粗且不规则。使用多个超大的黑色日式音效，特别是在冲击和运动周围。保持所有可见文字清晰但具有手绘感。

色彩与氛围：左页以炽热的橙色、红色、烟熏棕色和黑色阴影为主。右页以冰蓝色、海军蓝、青色高光、苍白的月光白和黑色剪影为主。温暖的反派对峙与寒冷的超自然森林漩涡之间形成强烈对比。

约束：保留精确的 14 个分镜计数和描述的分镜排列。除英雄、反派、剪影和分镜中暗示的小型动作人物外，不要添加额外角色。保持厚实的漫画分镜间隙、戏剧性的透视、密集的速度线、绘画感上色，且不要包含任何现代 UI 元素。

en.title: Luminous Fauré Requiem Poster
en.description: A square editorial social post design for presenting Fauré’s Requiem as a serene, light-filled musical discovery.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a refined square social-media editorial poster about {argument name="musical work" default="Requiem in D minor, Op. 48"} by {argument name="composer" default="Gabriel Fauré"}, presenting a calm, luminous interpretation of a requiem rather than a dark one.

Canvas: 1:1 square format, 768 x 768 px. Divide the composition vertically into 2 panels: a dark navy text panel on the left occupying about 59% of the width, and an atmospheric abstract painting panel on the right occupying about 41%.

Layout: Left panel uses generous margins and elegant editorial spacing. Top-left has 1 small gold square bullet followed by a small uppercase section label. The main headline sits in the upper-middle, large and dominant, broken into 4 stacked lines. Below it is 1 short horizontal gold divider line. Under the divider is a 2-line subtitle. Near the lower-left is a small gold work/composer credit in 2 lines. At the very bottom-left is a tiny footer label. Bottom-right of the whole poster has a tiny page number.

Text content: Include exactly 7 text elements: 1) top label: “UNA ESCUCHA INESPERADA”; 2) main headline in Spanish, all caps with inverted question mark: “¿UNA MISA / DE DIFUNTOS / QUE SUENA / A LUZ?”; 3) subtitle: “40 minutos para descubrir / una feliz liberación.”; 4) credit line: “Réquiem en re menor, Op. 48”; 5) composer line: “Gabriel Fauré”; 6) footer: “FAURÉ · RÉQUIEM OP. 48”; 7) page number: “01”. Allow the headline to be customized as {argument name="headline text" default="¿UNA MISA DE DIFUNTOS QUE SUENA A LUZ?"} and the subtitle as {argument name="subtitle text" default="40 minutos para descubrir una feliz liberación."} while preserving the same line-break rhythm.

Typography: Main headline in a bold high-contrast classical serif, white, all caps, with dramatic thick-thin strokes. Supporting text in a clean modern sans serif, mostly white; the work/composer credit is muted gold. Use strong typographic hierarchy and precise alignment.

Visual style: Minimal, museum-quality, literary and sacred-music themed. Left background is deep midnight navy, almost black. Accent color is warm antique gold. Right panel is a soft abstract luminous landscape or chapel-like passage: creamy beige, pale gold, mist, subtle brush texture, a glowing curved path of light near the bottom leading into a bright hazy vertical space. No figures, no instruments, no literal church interior; keep it ethereal and serene.

Constraints: Keep exactly the 2-panel composition and exactly the 7 text elements listed. No extra logos, watermarks, icons, or decorative ornaments beyond the single gold square bullet and one gold divider line. Ensure the Spanish headline is crisp and legible.

zh.title: Fauré 安魂曲光影海报
zh.description: 一款方形编辑风格社交媒体海报设计，旨在将 Fauré 的《安魂曲》呈现为一场宁静且充满光感的音乐探索。
zh.prompt:
目标：为 {argument name="musical work" default="D 小调安魂曲，作品 48 号"}（作者：{argument name="composer" default="Gabriel Fauré"}）创作一张精致的方形社交媒体编辑海报，展现安魂曲平静、明亮的一面，而非沉重阴郁的风格。

画布：1:1 方形比例，768 x 768 px。将构图垂直分为两个板块：左侧为深海军蓝文字板块，占据约 59% 的宽度；右侧为氛围感抽象画板块，占据约 41% 的宽度。

布局：左侧板块采用宽裕的页边距和优雅的编辑排版。左上角有一个金色小方块，后跟一个小型大写字母版块标签。主标题位于中上方，醒目且占据主导地位，分为 4 行堆叠。下方是一条简短的水平金色分割线。分割线下方是 2 行副标题。左下角附近是 2 行金色的作品/作曲家署名。最底部是极小的页脚标签。整个海报的右下角有一个极小的页码。

文字内容：包含 7 个文字元素：1) 顶部标签：“UNA ESCUCHA INESPERADA”；2) 西班牙语主标题，全大写，带有倒问号：“¿UNA MISA / DE DIFUNTOS / QUE SUENA / A LUZ?”；3) 副标题：“40 minutos para descubrir / una feliz liberación.”；4) 作品署名：“Réquiem en re menor, Op. 48”；5) 作曲家署名：“Gabriel Fauré”；6) 页脚：“FAURÉ · RÉQUIEM OP. 48”；7) 页码：“01”。允许将标题自定义为 {argument name="headline text" default="¿UNA MISA DE DIFUNTOS QUE SUENA A LUZ?"}，将副标题自定义为 {argument name="subtitle text" default="40 minutos para descubrir una feliz liberación."}，同时保持相同的换行节奏。

排版：主标题采用粗体高对比度古典衬线字体，白色，全大写，具有戏剧性的粗细笔画对比。辅助文字采用简洁的现代无衬线字体，主要为白色；作品/作曲家署名使用柔和的金色。运用强烈的排版层级和精确的对齐方式。

视觉风格：极简、博物馆级质感，以文学和圣乐为主题。左侧背景为深午夜蓝，近乎黑色。强调色为温暖的古董金。右侧板块为柔和的抽象光影景观或教堂般的通道：奶油米色、淡金色、薄雾、细腻的笔触，底部有一条发光的弯曲光路，通向明亮朦胧的垂直空间。不包含人物、乐器或写实的教堂内部；保持空灵与宁静。

约束条件：严格保持 2 板块构图和列出的 7 个文字元素。除单个金色小方块和一条金色分割线外，不得添加额外的 Logo、水印、图标或装饰性元素。确保西班牙语标题清晰易读。

en.title: Woman in White Dress on Park Path
en.description: A realistic outdoor portrait prompt for generating a serene fashion-style image of a woman in a white dress beneath yellow flowering trees.
en.prompt: Create a realistic outdoor fashion portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman with very long wavy black hair"} standing centered on a quiet park path, facing the camera with a soft confident smile. She is wearing a {argument name="dress" default="loose white sleeveless halter mini dress with small black heart prints and a keyhole neckline"}, lightly holding a section of her hair with one hand while the other arm rests naturally by her side. The setting is a lush green garden avenue with a softly curving paved walkway receding into the background, dense trees on both sides, and abundant hanging clusters of bright yellow flowers overhead and scattered yellow petals on the ground. Include exactly one black wooden park bench on the right side in the midground, partially blurred. Use natural daylight, warm spring atmosphere, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, realistic skin tones, high-detail DSLR photography look, 50mm portrait lens feel, full-body framing from slightly above knee to head with extra environment around her, centered composition, soft background blur, no text, no watermark, no extra people.

zh.title: 公园小径上的白裙女子
zh.description: 一个写实的户外肖像提示词，用于生成一张宁静的时尚风格图像：一位身着白裙的女子站在黄色花树下。
zh.prompt: 创作一张写实的户外时尚肖像，主体为 {argument name="subject" default="一位留着超长黑色波浪卷发的年轻女性"}，她正站在安静的公园小径中央，面对镜头，带着自信而柔和的微笑。她身穿 {argument name="dress" default="一件宽松的白色无袖挂脖迷你裙，带有黑色小爱心印花和钥匙孔领口"}，一只手轻轻撩起一缕头发，另一只手臂自然垂在身侧。背景是一条郁郁葱葱的林荫大道，铺设好的小径呈柔和的弧度向远处延伸，两侧树木茂密，头顶悬挂着成簇的明黄色花朵，地面散落着黄色花瓣。在右侧中景处加入一张黑色木质公园长椅，部分虚化。使用自然日光，营造温暖的春日氛围，采用浅景深、奶油般虚化的背景，呈现写实的肤色，具备高细节的单反摄影质感，50mm 人像镜头感，全身构图（从膝盖上方到头部，保留周围环境），居中构图，柔和的背景虚化，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。

en.title: Night Corner Bodega
en.description: A cinematic prompt for generating a moody late-night urban corner store with glowing vintage signage and a lone silhouetted customer.
en.prompt: Create a cinematic nighttime street photograph of a small corner bodega in an old urban neighborhood, viewed from across the sidewalk at a slight low angle. The store sits on a dark brick corner with two large illuminated vintage red-and-white signs reading {argument name="store sign text" default="Coca-Cola"} in classic script, one sign facing left and one facing right above the awning. Use a moody, realistic film-noir look with deep shadows, warm fluorescent shop lighting spilling onto cracked concrete, high contrast, subtle grain, and a slightly desaturated color palette. The storefront has two glass display windows and one glass door, all packed with visible goods: count exactly 8 main visible product groups inside and outside the shop: canned goods on shelves, bottled drinks, snack bags, cereal or boxed groceries, hanging bananas, oranges and apples in crates, large bottled water jugs, and cardboard boxes of produce. Add a striped yellow-and-brown awning wrapping around the corner beneath the signs. Place {argument name="main subject" default="a lone man in a dark coat"} standing in silhouette just outside the open glass door, facing into the bright shop interior as if deciding what to buy. Include a bicycle leaning against the left shuttered wall, graffiti and small stickers on the dark corner column, scattered dry leaves on the sidewalk, and crates of drinks and produce stacked outside the right window. The scene should feel quiet, late-night, nostalgic, and documentary-realistic, with sharp architectural detail and soft glow from the signage; no extra people, no modern luxury elements, no clean corporate storefront.

zh.title: 深夜街角杂货店
zh.description: 一个用于生成电影质感深夜城市街角商店的提示词，包含发光的复古招牌和一位剪影顾客。
zh.prompt: 创作一张电影质感的深夜街头摄影作品，拍摄对象为老旧城区的一家小型街角杂货店，视角从人行道对面略微仰拍。商店位于深色砖墙的街角，上方悬挂着两个巨大的复古红白发光招牌，上面用经典字体写着 {argument name="store sign text" default="Coca-Cola"}，两个招牌分别朝向左右两侧，位于遮阳棚上方。采用充满情绪的写实黑色电影风格，强调深邃的阴影、洒在开裂水泥地上的温暖荧光灯光、高对比度、细腻的颗粒感以及略微去饱和的色调。店面有两个玻璃橱窗和一扇玻璃门，里面陈列着琳琅满目的商品：请精确呈现店内外 8 组主要可见商品：货架上的罐头、瓶装饮料、零食袋、麦片或盒装杂货、悬挂的香蕉、板条箱里的橙子和苹果、大桶瓶装水以及纸板箱装的农产品。在招牌下方的街角处添加一个黄棕色条纹遮阳棚。在敞开的玻璃门外放置 {argument name="main subject" default="一个穿着深色大衣的孤独男人"}，以剪影形式呈现，正面向明亮的店内，仿佛在犹豫买什么。在左侧关闭的墙边靠着一辆自行车，深色的转角立柱上有涂鸦和小贴纸，人行道上散落着干枯的落叶，右侧窗外堆放着饮料和农产品的板条箱。整个场景应营造出安静、深夜、怀旧且具有纪录片般的写实感，建筑细节清晰，招牌散发着柔和的光芒；不要包含其他人物，不要有现代奢华元素，也不要出现整洁的商业化店面。

en.title: Chrome Robot Wondering in Meadow
en.description: A cinematic prompt for generating a peaceful sci-fi meadow scene with a reflective humanoid robot contemplating a tiny insect beside an overgrown mech wreck.
en.prompt: Create a cinematic sci-fi pastoral scene titled by mood, “Where the Robots Came to Wonder”: a highly reflective chrome humanoid robot sits cross-legged in a wildflower meadow at golden hour, positioned left of center in the foreground. The robot has a smooth mirror-sphere head with no face, polished silver anatomical plating, exposed mechanical neck details, and a calm meditative posture. One hand rests on its lap while the other is raised delicately, index finger extended, holding or greeting a tiny {argument name="insect" default="ladybug"} perched on the fingertip. Its mirror surfaces reflect the meadow, sky, and distant hills. In the right midground, show exactly 1 large abandoned rugged robot or mech wreck, partially reclined and overgrown with grass and wildflowers, suggesting nature reclaiming machinery. The setting is a lush rolling countryside with exactly 1 seated chrome humanoid robot, exactly 1 tiny insect on its finger, exactly 1 derelict mech in the background, and abundant daisies and purple wildflowers in the foreground. Use {argument name="lighting" default="warm golden-hour sunlight"}, soft clouds, distant blue-green mountains, shallow depth of field with blurred flowers near the camera, realistic high-detail 3D rendering, cinematic composition, peaceful wonder, no text, no logos, no humans, no city skyline, no weapons firing.

zh.title: 草地上的铬合金机器人
zh.description: 一个电影级的提示词，用于生成宁静的科幻草地场景，画面中一个具有反射效果的人形机器人正对着废弃机甲残骸旁的一只小昆虫沉思。
zh.prompt: 创作一个以“机器人沉思之地”为主题的电影级科幻田园场景：在黄金时刻的野花草地上，一个具有高度反射效果的铬合金人形机器人盘腿坐着，位于前景偏左的位置。机器人拥有光滑的镜面球形头部，没有面部，身体覆盖着抛光的银色解剖装甲，颈部露出机械细节，姿态平静且沉思。一只手放在膝盖上，另一只手轻轻抬起，食指伸出，指尖停着一只 {argument name="insect" default="瓢虫"}。其镜面表面反射着草地、天空和远处的山丘。在右侧中景处，展示 1 个大型废弃且粗犷的机器人或机甲残骸，部分向后倾斜，长满了草和野花，暗示自然正在重塑机械。场景为郁郁葱葱的起伏乡村，画面中包含 1 个坐着的铬合金人形机器人，指尖上有 1 只小昆虫，背景中有 1 个废弃机甲，前景布满了雏菊和紫色野花。使用 {argument name="lighting" default="温暖的黄金时刻阳光"}，柔和的云层，远处的蓝绿色山脉，浅景深效果（靠近相机的花朵模糊），逼真的高细节 3D 渲染，电影级构图，宁静的奇观，无文字，无 Logo，无人类，无城市天际线，无武器开火。

en.title: Creepy Cute Mascot at Dessert Café
en.description: A vertical cinematic 3D prompt for generating a horror-cute designer toy mascot holding ice cream outside a café with a looming ghost backdrop.
en.prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic 3D toy-character street scene in bright afternoon sunlight. Center a cute but creepy designer vinyl mascot standing on a brick sidewalk outside a dessert café, with a shallow-depth-of-field storefront behind it. The character has an oversized glossy sphere head split into black and pale gray panels, one circular red mechanical eye with small white lights, a jagged monster mouth full of sharp triangular teeth, dangling dice charms, and a small black cap-like top with white doodles. Perched on top is a tiny red spiky monster figure with many bulging eyes and teeth, sitting beside a black paddle/sign that reads {argument name="sign text" default="Fate"} in white graffiti-style lettering. The mascot wears a black streetwear tracksuit covered with repeating gold Bitcoin coin patches, white diamond icons, abstract symbols, chain accessories, and chunky black-and-white sneakers. It holds exactly 1 mint chocolate chip ice cream cone in its left hand. Add exactly 2 bright green mechanical spider-like appendages extending from its back on the right side, each with circular joint details. In the background, show a warm brick café façade with purple-and-white striped awnings and a raised sign reading {argument name="café name" default="Châterraise"}; keep the interior softly glowing through glass doors. Far in the background on the left, include exactly 1 enormous blurred black ghost/monster silhouette looming behind the buildings, with X-shaped eyes and a wide white zigzag grin. Use realistic toy materials, glossy plastic reflections, detailed fabric texture, dramatic low-angle composition, bokeh, soft lens blur, warm highlights, crisp focus on the character, whimsical horror-cute atmosphere, ultra-detailed 3D render style. Do not add extra characters, extra ice creams, or readable text beyond the café sign and the paddle sign.

zh.title: 甜品店里的诡异可爱吉祥物
zh.description: 一个垂直电影感 3D 提示词，用于生成一个恐怖可爱风格的设计师玩具吉祥物，它手持冰淇淋站在甜品店外，背景中隐现着巨大的幽灵剪影。
zh.prompt: 创建一个 9:16 垂直电影感 3D 玩具角色街景，背景为明亮的午后阳光。画面中心是一个可爱又诡异的设计师乙烯基吉祥物，站在甜品店外的砖砌人行道上，身后是浅景深的店面。该角色拥有一个巨大的光泽球形头部，分为黑色和浅灰色区域，有一只带有白色小灯的圆形红色机械眼，以及一张布满锋利三角形牙齿的锯齿状怪物嘴，挂着骰子饰品，头顶有一个带有白色涂鸦的小黑帽。头顶上坐着一个微小的红色尖刺怪物，长着许多凸出的眼睛和牙齿，旁边立着一块黑色牌子，上面用白色涂鸦风格字体写着 {argument name="sign text" default="Fate"}。吉祥物身穿黑色街头风运动服，上面覆盖着重复的金色比特币补丁、白色钻石图标、抽象符号、链条配饰和厚重的黑白运动鞋。它的左手拿着 1 个薄荷巧克力碎冰淇淋甜筒。在它背部右侧添加 2 个明亮的绿色机械蜘蛛状附属肢体，每个肢体都有圆形的关节细节。背景中展示一个温暖的砖砌咖啡馆外墙，带有紫白相间的遮阳篷，上方悬挂着写有 {argument name="café name" default="Châterraise"} 的招牌；透过玻璃门可以看到室内柔和的灯光。在左侧远处的背景中，包含 1 个巨大的模糊黑色幽灵/怪物剪影，隐约出现在建筑物后方，长着 X 形眼睛和宽大的白色锯齿状笑容。使用逼真的玩具材质、光泽塑料反射、细腻的织物纹理、戏剧性的低角度构图、焦外成像、柔和的镜头模糊、温暖的高光，角色焦点清晰，营造出异想天开的恐怖可爱氛围，采用超精细的 3D 渲染风格。除咖啡馆招牌和手持牌子外，请勿添加额外的角色、额外的冰淇淋或可读文本。

en.title: Psychedelic Mascot Streetwear Portrait
en.description: A cinematic full-body portrait prompt for creating a colorful cyberpunk mascot character outside a dessert shop.
en.prompt: Create a vertical cinematic street-fashion portrait of {argument name="character name" default="VLNS mascot"}, a full-body humanoid character standing on a sunny sidewalk outside a cute dessert shop. The character has one oversized glossy spherical helmet head covered in bright psychedelic graffiti colors, with one jagged purple triangular visor/mouth shape, two circular side headphone-like ear modules, and one glowing teal light spot on the face. The body wears a black cyberpunk streetwear outfit: one shiny black leather jacket with gray spiky faux-fur shoulders, one black hoodie, one pair of baggy black cargo pants, two black gloves, and two iridescent high-top sneakers with purple laces and a visible “C” emblem on each tongue. Add neon paint splatters in pink, yellow, green, and purple across the jacket and pants, multiple small alien/skull patches, a visible “VLNS” text patch on the sleeve and another on the cargo pocket, and one dangling chain with one white skull charm on the right side. The character holds exactly one transparent purple dessert pouch containing soft-serve ice cream with both hands at chest height. Background: charming storefront with large glass windows, warm bakery lights and pastries inside, purple-and-white striped awning, pastel balloons and lanterns, potted flowers, leafy trees, blue sky, and soft afternoon sunlight. Use a low-angle 35mm fashion editorial look, shallow depth of field, realistic materials, vibrant color grading, crisp subject focus, natural candid pose, and a magical everyday cinematic atmosphere. Prioritize consistent character identity and full-body visibility; no extra characters, no cropped feet, no watermark.

zh.title: 迷幻吉祥物街头风肖像
zh.description: 一个电影感全身肖像提示词，用于创作一个在甜品店外色彩斑斓的赛博朋克吉祥物角色。
zh.prompt: 创作一张垂直电影感的街头时尚肖像，主角是 {argument name="character name" default="VLNS 吉祥物"}，一个全身人形角色，站在一家可爱甜品店外阳光明媚的人行道上。该角色拥有一个超大的光面球形头盔，表面覆盖着明亮的迷幻涂鸦色彩，配有一个锯齿状的紫色三角形面罩/嘴部形状、两个圆形的侧边耳机式耳部模块，以及面部的一个发光青色光点。身体穿着黑色赛博朋克街头服饰：一件带有灰色尖刺仿皮草肩部的亮面黑色皮夹克、一件黑色连帽衫、一条黑色宽松工装裤、一副黑色手套，以及一双带有紫色鞋带且鞋舌上可见“C”标志的虹彩高帮运动鞋。在夹克和裤子上添加粉色、黄色、绿色和紫色的霓虹油漆溅射效果，缝制多个小型外星人/骷髅补丁，袖子和工装口袋上可见“VLNS”文字补丁，右侧悬挂一条带有白色骷髅吊坠的链子。角色双手在胸前捧着一个透明的紫色甜品袋，里面装着软冰淇淋。背景：迷人的店面，有巨大的玻璃窗，室内透出温暖的烘焙灯光和糕点，紫白相间的遮阳棚，柔和色调的气球和灯笼，盆栽花卉，绿树，蓝天，以及柔和的午后阳光。采用低角度 35mm 时尚编辑风格，浅景深，真实材质，鲜艳的色彩分级，清晰的主体对焦，自然的抓拍姿势，以及充满魔力的日常电影氛围。确保角色特征一致且全身可见；禁止出现额外角色、禁止裁剪脚部、禁止添加水印。

en.title: Rainbow Night Lakeside Street
en.description: A photorealistic cinematic prompt for creating a silent rain-wet European lakeside promenade under the Milky Way with rainbow reflections on the stone pavement.
en.prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic night scene of a quiet old European lakeside street after rain, evoking the phrase {argument name="mood phrase" default="In the silence of the night city where a rainbow echo is beneath my feet"}. Use a wide 16:9 composition from a low eye-level perspective looking down a long wet cobblestone promenade paved with large irregular hexagonal stones. The pavement should act like a mirror, reflecting glowing rainbow colors beneath the viewer’s feet: turquoise, cyan, violet, magenta, deep blue, gold, and amber, blended naturally into puddles and glossy stone surfaces. On the right side, show a row of aged stone and stucco buildings with arched doorways, balconies, wrought-iron benches, hanging flower baskets, potted plants, and warm antique wall lanterns casting golden light. On the left, include a low stone wall bordering a calm lake, with distant town lights shimmering across the water and dark mountain silhouettes beyond. Place tall narrow cypress trees along the promenade, their black silhouettes leading into the distance. Above, fill the sky with countless sharp stars and a dramatic visible Milky Way band glowing blue, pink, and cream across the upper left and center. Make the street empty and silent, with no people or vehicles. Style: ultra-detailed photorealism, cinematic HDR lighting, rich contrast between cool starry blues and warm lantern gold, wet reflective textures, romantic Mediterranean old-town atmosphere, crisp depth, high realism, no text, no watermark.

zh.title: 彩虹之夜湖畔街道
zh.description: 一个用于创作雨后静谧欧洲湖畔长廊的写实电影感提示词，展现银河映照下石板路上彩虹般的倒影。
zh.prompt: 创作一个电影级写实风格的夜景，描绘雨后静谧的欧洲古老湖畔街道，营造出 {argument name="mood phrase" default="In the silence of the night city where a rainbow echo is beneath my feet"} 的意境。采用 16:9 宽画幅构图，以低机位视角俯瞰一条铺满大型不规则六边形石块的湿润鹅卵石长廊。路面应如同镜面一般，反射出脚下绚丽的彩虹色彩：青绿色、蓝绿色、紫罗兰色、洋红色、深蓝色、金色和琥珀色，自然地融合在水洼和光亮的石面中。右侧展示一排古老的石砌和灰泥建筑，配有拱形门廊、阳台、锻铁长椅、悬挂花篮、盆栽植物，以及投射出暖黄色光芒的复古壁灯。左侧包含一道临湖的低矮石墙，远处的城镇灯火在水面上闪烁，背景是深色的山峦剪影。长廊沿线点缀着高耸狭长的柏树，黑色的剪影延伸至远方。上方天空布满无数清晰的繁星，壮观的银河带在左上方和中心区域闪烁着蓝色、粉色和奶油色的光芒。街道空旷寂静，没有行人和车辆。风格：超细节写实主义、电影级 HDR 灯光、冷色星空蓝与暖色灯光金的丰富对比、湿润的反射质感、浪漫的地中海古镇氛围、清晰的景深、高度真实感，无文字，无水印。

en.title: Backless Evening Dress Hotel Portrait
en.description: A realistic cinematic fashion portrait of a woman fastening an ivory backless dress in a high-rise hotel room at night.
en.prompt: Create a realistic editorial fashion photograph of an adult East Asian woman in a high-rise hotel room at night, standing with her back to the camera in front of a large floor-to-ceiling window overlooking a dark city skyline full of small building lights. She wears an elegant ivory satin backless evening dress with a deep low-cut back and a visible rear zipper; the dress fabric is glossy and softly wrinkled around the waist and hips. Her pose is natural and candid: torso turned away, head turned over her left shoulder toward the camera with a slightly worried, intimate expression, lips slightly parted, eyebrows subtly raised, and direct eye contact. Both hands are behind her lower back, carefully pulling up or fastening the zipper, with believable hand anatomy and fingers gripping the zipper area. Her dark brown hair is styled in a loose updo with soft stray strands framing her face, small earrings visible, natural makeup, warm skin tones, and detailed shoulder blades and back contours. The room is dim and upscale, with beige walls, carpeted floor, a window frame, a small round table partially visible on the left, a sofa edge on the lower right, and a warm wall light or lamp glow on the right side. Use warm indoor lighting mixed with cool night city light, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, natural shadows, cinematic composition, vertical 4:5 framing, photographed at eye level from slightly behind and above the waist. Ensure the image feels candid rather than staged, with consistent gaze, anatomically correct shoulders, arms, hands, fingers, zipper placement, and dress seams. No extra people, no text, no watermark, no distorted limbs, no overly airbrushed skin.

zh.title: 露背晚礼服酒店人像
zh.description: 一张极具电影质感的时尚人像摄影作品，展现了一位女性在夜晚的高层酒店客房内，系上象牙色露背礼服的瞬间。
zh.prompt: 创作一张写实的时尚杂志风格照片。画面中，一位成年东亚女性站在夜晚高层酒店的房间内，背对镜头，面对着一扇巨大的落地窗，窗外是点缀着零星灯火的暗色城市天际线。她身穿一件优雅的象牙白缎面露背晚礼服，背部深 V 剪裁，清晰可见后背拉链；礼服面料带有光泽，腰部和臀部有自然的褶皱。她的姿态自然且随性：躯干背对镜头，头部向左肩转回，看向镜头，神情流露出一丝忧虑与亲昵，双唇微张，眉毛轻挑，与镜头有直接的眼神交流。她的双手置于后腰处，正小心翼翼地拉起或扣上拉链，手指紧扣拉链区域，手部解剖结构真实可信。她深棕色的头发盘成松散的发髻，几缕发丝垂在脸颊旁，佩戴着小巧的耳环，妆容自然，肤色温暖，背部肩胛骨和轮廓细节清晰。房间光线昏暗且高级，墙壁呈米色，铺着地毯，窗框可见，左侧隐约可见一张小圆桌，右下角是沙发边缘，右侧有温暖的壁灯或灯光映照。采用室内暖光与室外冷色调城市夜景交织的布光，浅景深，皮肤纹理真实，阴影自然，电影感构图，4:5 竖构图，拍摄视角为平视，位于腰部略后上方。确保画面呈现出抓拍感而非摆拍，眼神聚焦一致，肩膀、手臂、手部、手指、拉链位置及礼服接缝处解剖结构准确。画面中无其他人物，无文字，无水印，无肢体畸变，皮肤质感不过度磨皮。

en.title: Graphite Portrait with Amber Glasses
en.description: A realistic pencil-sketch portrait prompt for creating an elegant young woman adjusting amber-tinted eyeglasses.
en.prompt: Create a vertical graphite pencil portrait on warm off-white textured paper of {argument name="character name" default="a young woman"} shown from the chest up, centered and facing forward. She has long, softly wavy {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown hair"} parted near the middle, smooth youthful facial features, large expressive eyes, full natural eyebrows, a small straight nose, and a subtle closed-mouth smile. She wears oversized black rectangular eyeglasses with translucent {argument name="lens tint" default="amber-yellow tinted lenses"}; one hand is raised to the left side of the glasses as if adjusting the frame, showing slim fingers and a small ring. Add delicate jewelry: exactly 3 visible pieces, a ring on the raised hand, a thin bracelet on the wrist, and layered fine necklaces with one small round pendant. Dress her in a slightly shiny collared button-up blouse with soft folds and open neckline. Render the image as a highly detailed realistic charcoal-and-graphite sketch with fine crosshatching, visible pencil construction lines, softly shaded skin, detailed hair strands, and subtle smudging; keep the background minimal with faint rectangular guide lines and sketch marks. Use mostly monochrome gray pencil tones, with the eyeglass lenses the only warm colored accent. Maintain a calm, elegant studio portrait mood, symmetrical composition, no text, no watermark, no photorealistic color background.

zh.title: 琥珀色眼镜石墨肖像
zh.description: 一个写实的铅笔素描肖像提示词，用于创作一位优雅的年轻女性正在调整琥珀色眼镜的画面。
zh.prompt: 在暖色调的灰白色纹理纸上创作一幅垂直的石墨铅笔肖像，展示 {argument name="character name" default="一位年轻女性"} 的胸部以上特写，居中且面向前方。她留着长而柔和的波浪形 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色头发"}，中分，面部轮廓光滑年轻，眼睛大而有神，眉毛浓密自然，鼻子小巧挺直，嘴角带着微妙的闭合微笑。她戴着超大号黑色长方形眼镜，镜片为半透明的 {argument name="lens tint" default="琥珀黄色"}；一只手抬起至眼镜左侧，仿佛正在调整镜框，露出纤细的手指和一枚小戒指。添加精致的首饰：共 3 件可见饰品，包括抬起的手上的戒指、手腕上的细手链，以及带有小圆吊坠的叠戴细项链。让她穿着一件略带光泽的翻领衬衫，衣褶柔和，领口微开。将图像渲染为高度细腻的写实炭笔和石墨素描，具有精细的交叉排线、可见的铅笔构图线条、柔和的皮肤阴影、细致的发丝和微妙的涂抹效果；背景保持极简，带有淡淡的长方形辅助线和素描痕迹。主要使用单色灰色铅笔色调，仅眼镜镜片为唯一的暖色调点缀。保持冷静、优雅的摄影棚肖像氛围，构图对称，无文字，无水印，无写实彩色背景。

en.title: Graphite Portrait Woman With Rose
en.description: A detailed text prompt for generating a museum-quality graphite pencil portrait of a young South Asian woman smelling a rose.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic museum-quality graphite pencil sketch portrait on warm off-white textured drawing paper. The subject is a beautiful young {argument name="ethnicity" default="South Asian"} woman shown from the chest up in a three-quarter view, looking downward with a soft closed-mouth smile while holding a single fully bloomed rose close to her nose. She has long dark hair gathered into a loose messy bun with wispy strands around her face, delicate facial features, and small stud earrings. She wears black rectangular-round eyeglasses with warm amber-tinted lenses as the only subtle color accent, plus a formal dark blazer, white collared shirt, and black tie. Her left hand gently holds the rose stem near her chest; the flower is large and detailed, with exactly 1 fully bloomed rose head, 1 long stem, and 6 visible leaves. Render the rose petals, leaves, fingers, hair strands, glasses, blazer, shirt collar, and tie with highly detailed pencil shading, crosshatching, smudged graphite gradients, fine linework, and realistic paper grain. Use a soft natural composition with the rose on the left side of the face, the woman centered slightly right, and faint loose sketch construction strokes fading into the background. Keep the image monochrome graphite except for the amber glasses lenses, avoid text, avoid watermark, and maintain an elegant romantic fine-art portrait mood.

zh.title: 石墨铅笔女性肖像（手持玫瑰）
zh.description: 一个详细的文本提示词，用于生成博物馆级石墨铅笔肖像画，描绘一位正在闻玫瑰花的南亚年轻女性。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅超写实的博物馆级石墨铅笔素描肖像，背景为温暖的灰白色纹理绘图纸。主体是一位美丽的年轻 {argument name="ethnicity" default="南亚"} 女性，半身像，四分之三侧面视角，低头带着柔和的闭口微笑，手持一朵盛开的玫瑰靠近鼻尖。她留着深色长发，扎成松散凌乱的发髻，脸颊周围有几缕碎发，五官精致，戴着小巧的耳钉。她佩戴黑色矩形圆角眼镜，镜片呈温暖的琥珀色，这是画面中唯一的微妙色彩点缀；身穿正式的深色西装外套、白色衬衫领和黑色领带。她的左手轻轻握住胸前的玫瑰花茎；花朵硕大且细节丰富，包含 1 朵盛开的玫瑰花头、1 根长茎和 6 片可见的叶子。通过高细节的铅笔阴影、交叉排线、石墨晕染渐变、精细线条和逼真的纸张纹理，渲染玫瑰花瓣、叶片、手指、发丝、眼镜、西装外套、衬衫领和领带。采用柔和自然的构图，玫瑰位于脸部左侧，女性主体略微偏右，背景中隐约可见淡淡的松散素描构图笔触。除琥珀色镜片外，画面保持单色石墨质感，避免出现文字和水印，营造优雅浪漫的艺术肖像氛围。

en.title: Stippled Ink Business Portrait
en.description: Generates a detailed stippling ink portrait of a young professional woman in glasses and formal attire on textured drafting paper.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic black-and-white stippling ink portrait of {argument name="character description" default="a beautiful young South Asian woman"}, shown from the chest up in a centered, formal ID-style composition. She faces directly forward with a calm, confident neutral expression, symmetrical features, large expressive eyes, full softly shaded lips, and smooth youthful skin rendered entirely through millions of tiny black ink dots with exceptional tonal depth. She wears {argument name="eyewear" default="large black rounded cat-eye glasses with warm translucent amber lenses"}, with subtle highlights and visible tiny hinge details. Her {argument name="hair style" default="dark hair in a loose high messy bun with a center part, voluminous strands, wispy flyaway hairs, and loose tendrils framing the face"} is drawn with dense fine ink hatching and stippled shadows. Dress her in {argument name="outfit" default="a dark tailored business suit jacket, crisp white collared shirt, and black necktie"}. Use a vintage technical drawing aesthetic on an off-white textured paper background with faint construction grid lines and delicate drafting marks. The portrait should be highly detailed, monochrome ink with realistic facial anatomy, soft stipple gradients, sharp focus on the face and glasses, shoulders fading into loose unfinished dotted sketch edges at the bottom and sides. No text, no watermark, no color except the subtle warm tint in the lenses.

zh.title: 点画风格商务肖像
zh.description: 在带有纹理的绘图纸上，生成一张佩戴眼镜、身着正装的年轻职场女性的精细点画风格肖像。
zh.prompt: 创作一张超写实的黑白点画风格肖像，主角为 {argument name="character description" default="一位美丽的南亚裔年轻女性"}，采用胸部以上居中、正式证件照式的构图。她正对镜头，表情冷静自信且自然，五官对称，双眸明亮传神，双唇饱满且带有柔和阴影，年轻细腻的皮肤完全由数百万个细小的黑色墨点呈现，具有极佳的色调深度。她佩戴着 {argument name="eyewear" default="一副黑色大号圆框猫眼眼镜，配有温暖的半透明琥珀色镜片"}，镜片带有微妙的高光和清晰可见的微小铰链细节。她的 {argument name="hair style" default="深色头发梳成松散的高丸子头，中分发型，发量丰盈，带有几缕凌乱的发丝和修饰脸型的碎发"} 通过密集的细墨线排线和点画阴影绘制而成。为她穿上 {argument name="outfit" default="深色剪裁利落的商务西装外套、挺括的白色衬衫和黑色领带"}。采用复古工程制图美学，背景为带有淡淡网格线和精致绘图标记的米白色纹理纸。肖像应高度精细，采用单色墨水绘制，具备写实的脸部解剖结构，柔和的点画渐变，焦点清晰地聚焦在脸部和眼镜上，肩部向底部和两侧逐渐过渡为松散、未完成的点状素描边缘。画面无文字、无水印，除镜片中微妙的暖色调外，不含任何其他颜色。

en.title: Vintage Train Graphite Portrait
en.description: An ultra-realistic graphite pencil portrait of a young South Asian woman seated by a luxury train window with mountains outside.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic graphite pencil sketch of {argument name="character description" default="a beautiful young South Asian woman"} sitting beside a large window inside a luxurious vintage train carriage, shown from the waist up in a vertical portrait composition. She has a calm, soft expression, slightly smiling, looking out through the window toward the left side of the image rather than at the viewer. Her long, flowing hair is parted near the center and blown gently to the right by wind from the open window, with many fine individual strands rendered in pencil. She wears an elegant embroidered traditional South Asian outfit, a flowing dupatta draped over one shoulder and across her lap, small jhumka earrings, bangles, and delicate floral patterns throughout the fabric. Her hands rest in her lap holding {argument name="held object" default="a small closed book or diary with an oval ornament on the cover"}. The setting is an ornate vintage luxury train interior with polished dark wood paneling, carved trim, a cushioned seat back bearing a decorative monogram emblem, framed wall details, and a small classic wall lamp in the background. Through the window, show a detailed {argument name="outside landscape" default="mountain valley with snow-capped peaks, pine-covered slopes, a winding river, trees, and distant fields"}. Use only monochrome graphite pencil tones on textured off-white paper, with highly realistic facial shading, soft highlights, fine crosshatching, layered pencil gradients, intricate textile embroidery, and atmospheric depth outside the window. The mood should feel romantic, nostalgic, serene, and cinematic. No color, no modern objects, no text, no watermark, no extra people.

zh.title: 复古火车石墨肖像
zh.description: 一幅超写实的石墨铅笔肖像，描绘了一位坐在豪华火车窗边的南亚年轻女性，窗外是山峦美景。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅超写实的石墨铅笔素描，描绘 {argument name="character description" default="一位美丽的南亚年轻女性"} 坐在豪华复古火车车厢内的大窗户旁，采用竖构图，展示腰部以上的部分。她表情平静柔和，面带微笑，望向画面左侧的窗外，而非注视观众。她留着一头长发，中分的发丝被开着的窗户吹进的风轻轻向右拂动，铅笔勾勒出许多细腻的发丝。她身着优雅的南亚传统刺绣服饰，肩上和膝上披着飘逸的纱巾（dupatta），佩戴着小巧的耳环（jhumka）、手镯，织物上布满了精致的花卉图案。她的双手放在膝上，拿着 {argument name="held object" default="一本封面带有椭圆形装饰的小型闭合书籍或日记本"}。背景是装饰华丽的复古豪华火车内饰，配有抛光的深色木镶板、雕花装饰、带有装饰性字母组合标志的软垫座椅靠背、框架墙壁细节以及背景中的小型古典壁灯。透过窗户，展示出细致的 {argument name="outside landscape" default="带有雪山顶、松树覆盖的山坡、蜿蜒河流、树木和远方田野的山谷"}。仅使用单色石墨铅笔色调，绘制在有纹理的米白色纸张上，强调高度逼真的面部阴影、柔和的高光、细腻的交叉排线、分层的铅笔渐变、复杂的纺织品刺绣以及窗外的大气深度。整体氛围应充满浪漫、怀旧、宁静和电影感。无色彩，无现代物品，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。

en.title: Cyberpunk Financial District Portrait
en.description: A cinematic prompt for generating a cyberpunk-themed portrait featuring a subject against a glowing stock market display with vibrant neon lighting and digital data streams.
en.prompt:
Using the uploaded image and without changing face, create a cinematic cyberpunk portrait of the {argument name="pose" default="subject leaning against a massive glowing LED stock market display"} in a futuristic financial district at night, wearing {argument name="outfit" default="clear round glasses and a casual graphic tee"}, illuminated by {argument name="lighting colors" default="vibrant neon cyan, magenta, emerald and orange lights"} with colorful reflections on the lenses, holographic data streams and digital bokeh surrounding the scene,
shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic skin texture, soft platinum-blonde hair, high contrast lighting, glossy futuristic atmosphere, premium editorial fashion photography, razor-sharp focus, volumetric lighting, rich color grading, 8K hyper-realistic masterpiece, --ar 2:3 --style raw --v 7 --stylize 100.

zh.title: 赛博朋克金融区肖像
zh.description: 一个高对比度的赛博朋克肖像提示词，描绘了人物倚靠在未来城市发光的数字股票市场显示屏前的场景。
zh.prompt: 使用上传的图像且保持面部特征不变，创建一个 {argument name="style" default="电影级赛博朋克肖像"}，描绘主体倚靠在 {argument name="location" default="未来派金融区"} 夜晚巨大的发光 LED 股票市场显示屏前，佩戴透明圆框眼镜并身着休闲印花 T 恤，被充满活力的霓虹青色、洋红色、祖母绿和橙色灯光照亮，镜片上带有绚丽的反射，全息数据流和数字散景环绕四周，浅景深，超逼真的皮肤纹理，{argument name="hair" default="柔软的铂金色头发"}，高对比度照明，光泽感的未来主义氛围，高级编辑时尚摄影，极其锐利的对焦，体积光，丰富的色彩分级，8K 超写实杰作，--ar 2:3 --style raw --v 7 --stylize 100。

en.title: Photorealistic Middle Eastern Male Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for a photorealistic portrait of a young Middle Eastern man, focusing on lighting, facial features, and traditional attire.
en.prompt: Using uploaded face 100 percent same & realistic. A high-quality, photorealistic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="handsome young Middle Eastern man"} with striking {argument name="eye color" default="light-colored eyes"} and a {argument name="beard style" default="sharply groomed beard"}. He is wearing a casual brown and beige striped thobe with gold trim at the neckline, and a traditional patterned shemagh wrapped tightly as a turban with a black band. He is looking directly at the camera with a confident expression, holding sunglasses in his hand. Clean, modern architectural background with soft natural lighting, cinematic depth of field, sharp focus. keep original face and hairstyle 100% reference Ratio 9:16

zh.title: 中东男性奢华肖像
zh.description: 一张中东男性身着传统服饰的写实肖像提示词，背景为现代建筑，采用电影级布光。
zh.prompt: 使用上传的人脸，实现 100% 还原且真实。这是一张高质量、写实风格的肖像，主角是一位英俊的年轻 {argument name="subject description" default="中东男性"}，拥有迷人的浅色双眸和修剪整齐的胡须。他身穿 {argument name="clothing" default="棕米色条纹休闲长袍，领口带有金色镶边"}，头上缠绕着紧致的传统图案头巾（shemagh），并配有黑色头箍。他正视镜头，表情自信，手中拿着一副太阳镜。背景为整洁的 {argument name="background style" default="现代建筑背景"}，辅以柔和的自然光、电影级景深和清晰的对焦。保持原始面部特征和发型 100% 参考，比例 9:16

en.title: Overhead Documentary Portrait of a Young Girl
en.description: A detailed prompt for creating a realistic documentary-style overhead portrait of a young girl with natural braids and expressive eyes, using a high-angle perspective and cinematic color grading.
en.prompt:
Create a highly realistic documentary style overhead portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young girl"} with deep brown skin, standing outdoors and looking directly up into the camera with large, expressive dark eyes and a calm, slightly vulnerable expression. Her hair is styled in short natural braids decorated with {argument name="braid decorations" default="small red and white beads"} at the ends. She wears a {argument name="outfit" default="simple dark brown sleeveless dress"} with a subtle colorful design on the chest and small pink sandals.

Use an extreme high angle perspective, with the camera positioned directly above her face. Her eyes and face should be in sharp focus while her body, feet, and the rough ground beneath her gradually fall into a soft blur. Natural diffused daylight, gentle shadows, earthy muted tones, realistic skin texture, subtle facial details, shallow depth of field, intimate emotional storytelling, authentic humanitarian photography, 35mm lens look, soft cinematic color grading, slight film grain, centered composition, vertical portrait format.

Keep the scene natural and respectful. No exaggerated expression, no glamour styling, no artificial makeup, no extra people, no text, no watermark, no distorted hands, no duplicated beads, and no overly smooth or plastic looking skin.

zh.title: 俯拍纪实风格少女肖像
zh.description: 一份详细的提示词，用于创作一张写实的纪实风格少女俯拍肖像，包含自然编发和富有表现力的双眼，采用高角度视角和电影级调色。
zh.prompt:
创作一张高度写实的纪实风格俯拍肖像，主体为一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻女孩"}，她拥有深棕色的皮肤，站在户外，双眼直视镜头，眼神深邃且富有表现力，表情平静而略带脆弱感。她的头发梳成短款自然编发，发梢装饰着 {argument name="braid decorations" default="红色和白色的小珠子"}。她穿着一件 {argument name="outfit" default="简单的深棕色无袖连衣裙"}，胸前有精致的彩色图案，脚穿粉色凉鞋。

采用极高角度视角，相机直接位于她脸部正上方。她的眼睛和面部应保持清晰对焦，而身体、双脚以及脚下粗糙的地面则逐渐过渡为柔和的模糊效果。自然漫射光，柔和的阴影，大地色调，真实的皮肤纹理，细腻的面部细节，浅景深，富有感染力的情感叙事，真实的人文摄影风格，35mm 镜头质感，柔和的电影级调色，轻微的胶片颗粒感，居中构图，竖向肖像画幅。

保持场景自然且尊重主体。拒绝夸张的表情，拒绝时尚造型，拒绝人工化妆，画面中无其他人物，无文字，无水印，无扭曲的手部，无重复的珠子，且皮肤质感不应过度平滑或呈现塑料感。

en.title: Dramatic Low-Key Portrait with Window Light
en.description: A cinematic portrait prompt focusing on dramatic low-key lighting and sharp shadows against a dark wall, using a reference image for facial accuracy.
en.prompt: A dramatic, low-key portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young man"} use image for face reference with closed eyes, head tilted back, standing against a dark wall. A rectangular window light casts a sharp shadow and bright highlight on the wall behind him. The man is wearing a simple {argument name="outfit" default="black V-neck shirt"}. Cinematic, moody lighting, deep shadows.

zh.title: 戏剧性低调窗光人像
zh.description: 一个电影感人像提示词，聚焦于戏剧性的低调照明和深色墙面上的锐利阴影，并使用参考图以确保面部准确性。
zh.prompt: 一张戏剧性的低调人像，{argument name="subject" default="年轻男子"} 闭着眼睛，头部向后倾斜，背靠深色墙壁，并使用图片作为面部参考。矩形窗光在身后的墙上投射出锐利的阴影和明亮的高光。男子穿着简单的 {argument name="outfit" default="黑色 V 领衬衫"}。电影感、情绪化照明、深邃阴影。

en.title: Premium Studio Product Shot
en.description: A professional-grade prompt for high-end e-commerce product photography featuring seamless backgrounds, commercial lighting, and photorealistic detail.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic, premium studio product photograph of {argument name="product name" default="[product_name]"}, perfectly centered on a flawless seamless white infinity background, captured with exceptional precision and commercial-quality lighting. The product is clean, pristine, and free of dust, fingerprints, scratches, or imperfections, showcasing highly detailed textures, realistic materials, and accurate colors. Soft, diffused key lighting combined with balanced fill lighting creates smooth gradients and subtle reflections, while a perfectly natural soft shadow sits directly beneath the product for depth without distraction. Crisp edge definition, true-to-life proportions, and outstanding micro-detail throughout. Shot using a {argument name="camera" default="[camera_type]"} paired with a {argument name="lens" default="[lens_type]"}, professional product photography settings, ultra-sharp focus from edge to edge, minimal noise, HDR imaging, realistic reflections, natural contrast, color-calibrated workflow, premium luxury commercial advertising aesthetic, high-end e-commerce catalog quality, magazine-level product presentation, photorealistic rendering, 8K ultra-high resolution, flawless studio perfection.

zh.title: 高端摄影棚产品拍摄
zh.description: 一款专业级提示词，适用于高端电商产品摄影，包含无缝背景、商业照明及照片级真实细节。
zh.prompt: 超写实、高端摄影棚产品照片，主体为 {argument name="product name" default="[product_name]"}，完美居中于无瑕的无缝白色无限背景之上，以卓越的精度和商业级照明拍摄。产品洁净、崭新，无灰尘、指纹、划痕或瑕疵，展现出高度细腻的纹理、逼真的材质和准确的色彩。柔和的漫射主光结合平衡的补光，营造出平滑的渐变和微妙的反射，产品下方带有极其自然的柔和阴影，在不干扰视觉的情况下增加深度。边缘清晰，比例真实，整体呈现出色的微观细节。使用 {argument name="camera" default="[camera_type]"} 搭配 {argument name="lens" default="[lens_type]"} 拍摄，采用专业产品摄影设置，全画面超锐利对焦，极低噪点，HDR 成像，逼真反射，自然对比度，色彩校准工作流，高端奢华商业广告美学，高端电商目录品质，杂志级产品展示，照片级真实渲染，8K 超高分辨率，完美的摄影棚级效果。

en.title: Shoreline Fashion Portrait Photography
en.description: Creates a professional fashion portrait of a stylish subject walking along a serene lake shoreline during the daytime with realistic textures.
en.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic full-body fashion portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="stylish young man"} walking confidently along the peaceful shoreline of a {argument name="location" default="calm lake"} during bright daytime. He is wearing black sunglasses, a {argument name="shirt" default="loose sky-blue linen button-down shirt"} with the sleeves rolled up, off-white straight-fit trousers, and clean white sneakers. He is looking confidently to his left while walking forward with a relaxed, natural posture. The background features crystal-clear rippling lake water, a lush green tree line, and soft rolling hills in the distance beneath a slightly hazy blue sky. Warm natural daylight creates soft shadows and enhances the tranquil atmosphere. Capture realistic skin texture, subtle fabric movement, cinematic composition, ultra-sharp focus, vibrant natural colors, high dynamic range, professional fashion photography, shallow depth of field, editorial magazine style, 85mm lens, f/2.8, 8K ultra-HD quality, photorealistic, highly detailed. Aspect ratio 9:16.

zh.title: 海岸时尚人像摄影
zh.description: 创作一张专业时尚人像，展现一位时尚人士在白天宁静的湖畔漫步，并呈现逼真的质感。
zh.prompt: 创作一张超写实的全身时尚人像，展现一位 {argument name="subject" default="时尚年轻男子"} 在明亮的白天，自信地走在 {argument name="location" default="平静湖泊"} 的宁静岸边。他戴着黑色太阳镜，穿着一件 {argument name="shirt" default="宽松天蓝色亚麻衬衫"}，袖子卷起，搭配米白色直筒裤和干净的白色运动鞋。他一边向前走，一边自信地看向左侧，姿态自然放松。背景是清澈见底的涟漪湖水、郁郁葱葱的树林，以及远处在微朦蓝天下的连绵起伏的丘陵。温暖的自然光营造出柔和的阴影，增强了宁静的氛围。捕捉逼真的皮肤质感、细微的织物褶皱、电影级构图、超清晰对焦、鲜艳的自然色彩、高动态范围、专业时尚摄影、浅景深、杂志编辑风格、85mm 镜头、f/2.8、8K 超高清画质、照片级真实感、高度细节。长宽比 9:16。

en.title: Candid Vintage Scooter Smartphone Photo
en.description: A prompt for generating an authentic-looking smartphone photo of a woman on a vintage scooter, featuring natural lighting and an Instagram-style aesthetic.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic smartphone photo, looks genuinely captured with a mobile phone, not a DSLR or AI render. A cheerful {argument name="subject" default="young East Asian woman"} sitting sideways on a {argument name="vehicle" default="pastel yellow vintage-style scooter"} parked on a quiet sunlit road. She is smiling brightly at the phone camera while making a peace sign with one hand and resting the other on the handlebar. Wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="pale yellow fitted crop T-shirt"}, a white pleated tennis skirt, white ankle socks, white sneakers, a cream-yellow retro open-face helmet with a clear visor, a silver necklace, and a smartwatch. Bright summer daylight, soft natural shadows, clean empty street with trees and sidewalks in the background. Slight handheld framing, natural phone HDR, realistic skin texture, subtle motion blur, authentic smartphone camera perspective, casual candid vibe, Instagram-style snapshot, high detail, photorealistic, looks like an unedited iPhone/mobile camera photo, no studio lighting, no watermark, no text, no logos.

zh.title: 复古踏板摩托车手机抓拍照片
zh.description: 一个用于生成真实感手机摄影风格的提示词，描绘一位女性骑在复古踏板摩托车上的场景，具备自然光影和 Instagram 风格的美感。
zh.prompt: 超写实手机摄影照片，看起来像是用手机真实拍摄的，而非单反相机或 AI 渲染。一位开朗的 {argument name="subject" default="年轻东亚女性"} 侧坐在停在阳光明媚的安静道路上的 {argument name="vehicle" default="淡黄色复古风格踏板摩托车"} 上。她对着手机镜头灿烂微笑，一只手比出剪刀手，另一只手放在车把上。身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="淡黄色修身短款 T 恤"}、白色百褶网球裙、白色短袜、白色运动鞋，佩戴奶油黄色复古半盔（带透明面罩）、银色项链和智能手表。明亮的夏日日光，柔和的自然阴影，背景是干净空旷的街道，带有树木和人行道。轻微的手持构图，自然的手机 HDR，逼真的皮肤纹理，细微的运动模糊，真实的手机摄像头视角，随意的抓拍氛围，Instagram 风格快照，高细节，照片级真实感，看起来像未经编辑的 iPhone/手机拍摄照片，无影棚灯光，无水印，无文字，无 Logo。

en.title: Futuristic Monochrome Projection Portrait
en.description: A cinematic, high-contrast black and white portrait featuring futuristic projected numerals on a textured wall, ideal for moody editorial photography.
en.prompt: A cinematic, high-contrast black and white portrait of a young woman standing centered in frame, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="simple sleeveless black dress"}. Behind her, the large white numerals “{argument name="projected numbers" default="2026"}” are projected onto a {argument name="background style" default="textured dark gray wall"}. The projection casts sharp shadows and bright highlights across her face and body, splitting her face with light and shadow. She looks directly into the camera with a calm, serious expression. The lighting is dramatic and directional, creating a moody, futuristic atmosphere. Ultra-realistic, shallow depth of field, studio photography, 4k resolution, fine film grain, soft background texture, high contrast monochrome, editorial style, cinematic lighting.

zh.title: 黑白电影感数字投影肖像
zh.description: 一张电影质感的黑白肖像，背景投影着巨大的数字，营造出戏剧性的光影效果。
zh.prompt: 一张电影质感、高对比度的黑白肖像，一位年轻女性站在画面中央，身穿简约的黑色无袖连衣裙。在她身后，巨大的白色数字“{argument name="year" default="2026"}”被投影在纹理丰富的深灰色墙面上。投影在她的面部和身体上投射出锐利的阴影和明亮的高光，将她的脸庞分割在光影之中。她神情平静而严肃，直视镜头。灯光具有戏剧性和方向感，营造出一种忧郁且充满未来感的氛围。超写实，浅景深，影棚摄影，4k 分辨率，细腻的胶片颗粒感，柔和的背景纹理，高对比度单色，编辑风格，电影级布光。

en.title: Late-Night City Walk Smartphone Selfie
en.description: A prompt to create a realistic night-time smartphone selfie of a woman on a city sidewalk, featuring authentic lighting and digital noise.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie taken with a mobile phone at night, looks genuinely captured on an iPhone/mobile camera, not a DSLR. A beautiful {argument name="subject" default="young East Asian woman"} with long, slightly messy dark brown hair flowing naturally in the breeze, fair porcelain skin, large expressive brown eyes, soft natural makeup, subtle blush, and glossy pink lips making a cute duck-face expression. Wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="fitted gray spaghetti-strap camisole"}, holding a smartphone casually in one hand while walking along a {argument name="location" default="quiet tree-lined city sidewalk"} at night. Warm streetlights illuminate her face with soft shadows, parked cars, green trees, and an empty road in the background. Slight handheld motion blur, natural phone HDR, realistic skin texture, authentic hair strands, mild digital noise, front-camera perspective, candid lifestyle aesthetic, casual late-night walk, Instagram-style selfie, high detail, photorealistic, clearly looks like an unedited mobile phone photo, not AI or studio photography.

zh.title: 深夜城市漫步手机自拍
zh.description: 一个用于生成逼真的深夜手机自拍提示词，描绘女性在城市人行道上的场景，呈现真实的灯光效果和数码噪点。
zh.prompt: 由手机在夜间拍摄的超逼真手机自拍，看起来就像是用 iPhone 或手机摄像头真实捕捉的，而非单反相机。一位美丽的 {argument name="subject" default="年轻东亚女性"}，留着深棕色长发，在微风中自然飘动，有着白皙如瓷的肌肤、明亮动人的棕色大眼睛、清透自然的妆容、淡淡的腮红和水润的粉色嘴唇，正对着镜头嘟嘴卖萌。身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="修身灰色吊带背心"}，一手随意拿着手机，走在夜间的 {argument name="location" default="安静的林荫城市人行道"} 上。温暖的街灯照亮了她的脸庞，投下柔和的阴影，背景是停放的车辆、绿树和空旷的街道。带有轻微的手持运动模糊，自然的手机 HDR 效果，真实的皮肤纹理，逼真的发丝细节，轻微的数码噪点，前置摄像头视角，随性的生活方式美学，休闲的深夜漫步，Instagram 风格自拍，高细节，照片级真实感，看起来就像未经修饰的手机照片，而非 AI 或摄影棚作品。

en.title: Luxury Beach Macrame Swing Portrait
en.description: A beautiful summer vacation scene featuring a woman relaxing in a hanging rope chair above turquoise sea water with a mountain backdrop.
en.prompt:
A striking young woman in profile, left side facing the viewer, with tanned skin, relaxing in a hanging macrame chair made of white rope, hanging directly above the blue sea surface.
She is wearing a light white beach blouse that flows and drapes off her shoulders.
The girl is sitting in a relaxed pose, one leg extended, the other bent at the knee, her hand holding onto the rope of the swing. A slight half-smile, enjoying the moment, wearing stylish round sunglasses in a silver frame.
In the background, a panoramic view of the calm sea and a large mountain that resembles Bear Mountain (Ayudag).
Clear summer day, natural sunlight, realistic textures of water and fabric, atmosphere of luxurious summer vacation, high resolution hyperrealism. 9:16

zh.title: 奢华海滩编织吊椅人像
zh.description: 一幅美丽的暑期度假场景，一位女性在碧绿的海水上方，以山峦为背景，在悬挂的绳编吊椅中放松休憩。
zh.prompt:
一位迷人的年轻女性侧影，左侧面向观众，皮肤呈现健康的小麦色，正惬意地躺在悬挂于湛蓝海面之上的白色绳编吊椅中。
她身穿一件轻盈的白色沙滩衬衫，衣摆随风飘动，自然地垂落在肩头。
女孩姿态放松，一条腿伸展，另一条腿膝盖弯曲，手扶着吊椅的绳索。她带着淡淡的微笑，享受着当下的美好，佩戴着时尚的银框圆形太阳镜。
背景是平静的大海与一座酷似熊山（Ayudag）的宏伟山峦全景。
晴朗的夏日，自然光照，水面与织物纹理真实细腻，营造出奢华的度假氛围，超高清写实风格。9:16

en.title: Premium Skincare Ad with Giant Product Jar
en.description: A high-end skincare advertisement prompt featuring a model and a massive frosted glass jar with customizable branding and tagline.
en.prompt: A soft premium skincare advertisement poster. A radiant young woman with dewy glowing skin in a white silk slip dress gently touches her cheek beside a giant frosted glass moisturizer jar 3x her height with a gold lid, "{argument name="brand name" default="DEWDROP"}" written in minimal rose gold script on the jar front. Soft blush pink and ivory gradient background with floating water droplets and soft bokeh light orbs. Delicate minimal typography "{argument name="background text" default="DEWDROP"}" in rose gold filling the background softly. Tagline bottom: "{argument name="tagline" default="Drink in the glow."}" Small text top-right corner reads "Designed with GPT Image 2" in grey. Photorealistic, premium skincare lifestyle editorial, soft dewy natural rose lighting.

zh.title: 高端护肤品广告，配巨型产品罐
zh.description: 一个高端护肤品广告提示词，包含模特和巨大的磨砂玻璃罐，支持自定义品牌名称和标语。
zh.prompt: 一张柔和的高端护肤品广告海报。一位皮肤水润透亮、年轻动人的女性身穿白色丝绸吊带裙，轻抚脸颊，身旁是一个比她高 3 倍的磨砂玻璃保湿霜罐，罐身正面以简约的玫瑰金字体书写着 "{argument name="brand name" default="DEWDROP"}"。背景为柔和的淡粉色与象牙白渐变，伴有漂浮的水滴和柔和的焦外光斑。背景中以玫瑰金色的精致简约字体填充着 "{argument name="background text" default="DEWDROP"}"，效果柔和。底部标语："{argument name="tagline" default="Drink in the glow."}"。右上角小字显示 "Designed with GPT Image 2"（灰色）。照片级真实感，高端护肤生活方式社论风格，柔和水润的自然玫瑰色光影。
