zh.title: 梦幻春日公路旅行人像
zh.description: 一张浪漫的春日旅行摄影提示词，描绘了一位坐在复古汽车里的女性，周围环绕着盛开的樱花和飘落的花瓣。
zh.prompt: 梦幻般的春日旅行人像，一位年轻女性从白色复古汽车的天窗探出身子，手中拿着相机。留着飘逸的长黑发，妆容清透自然，皮肤光泽感十足，表情沉静而深思。身穿一件质感舒适的米色大码针织毛衣。周围是令人惊叹的盛开白樱花树，娇嫩的花瓣在空中飘舞，头顶是湛蓝的天空。温暖的自然光，柔和的粉彩色调，浪漫的春日氛围，公路旅行美学，纪实生活摄影，复古旅行感，浅景深，电影级构图，超写实细节，照片级真实感，大师级品质，8K，85mm 镜头，HDR。迷人的春日公路旅行场景，美丽的年轻女性留着深色长发，从白色经典复古车的车顶探出，手持专业相机，周围环绕着盛开的白樱花。成千上万的花瓣在微风中飘荡，明亮的蓝天，金色的晨光，舒适的米色大码毛衣，宁静的表情，旅行摄影师美学，梦幻的叙事构图，浪漫的春日冒险，电影级景深，奢华生活方式摄影，柔和的粉彩调色板，高度精细的眼睛和皮肤，杂志封面品质，超写实，HDR，8K。负面提示词：低质量，模糊，解剖结构错误，多余的手指，手部变形，脸部不对称，高光过曝，生硬的阴影，色彩过饱和，水印，文字，Logo，运动模糊，卡通，动漫，CGI，比例不协调，肢体重复，低分辨率，伪影，噪点，颗粒感。风格关键词：春日花卉美学，樱花，复古汽车，旅行摄影，舒适针织衫，飘落花瓣，梦幻氛围，电影叙事，粉彩色调，浪漫公路旅行，生活方式编辑，自然灵感人像，照片级写实。

en.title: Boho-Chic Summer Ferris Wheel Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for creating a realistic, sun-faded summer photo of a woman in boho-chic clothing posing in front of a giant colorful Ferris wheel.
en.prompt:
The person from the provided photo, with no changes to their face, facial features, appearance, age, identity, or individuality.

Low-angle shot. {argument name="subject" default="The woman"}, dressed in a {argument name="outfit style" default="boho-chic outfit"}, stands in front of a giant Ferris wheel with colorful gondolas against a clear blue sky.

She is wearing a light-colored top and pom-pom shorts, layered with a fringed denim jacket and a wide leather belt, along with a {argument name="hat style" default="white wide-brim hat"} and round dark sunglasses. Her long wavy hair is loose.

Her pose is dynamic: one hand is holding her hat while the other is extended to the side.

The surroundings feature the Ferris wheel’s metal spokes and framework, with the colorful gondolas filling the background.

A realistic smartphone photo on a hot summer day, with bright direct sunlight, warm color grading, slightly overexposed highlights, natural shadows, a sense of intense heat, natural-looking skin, subtle film grain, slightly sun-faded colors, and the feeling of a candid, spontaneous moment.

The face, identity, appearance, age, and all unique characteristics of the person from the original photo must be preserved exactly. The person is not looking at the camera.

zh.title: 波西米亚风夏季摩天轮人像
zh.description: 一个详细的提示词，用于创作一张写实的、带有夏日阳光褪色感的照片，展示一位身着波西米亚风服饰的女性在巨大的彩色摩天轮前摆拍。
zh.prompt:
保持原照片中人物的面部、五官、外貌、年龄、身份和个性不变，不做任何改动。

低角度拍摄。{argument name="subject" default="这位女性"}身着{argument name="outfit style" default="波西米亚风服饰"}，站在巨大的彩色摩天轮前，背景是晴朗的蓝天。

她穿着浅色上衣和绒球短裤，叠穿一件流苏牛仔夹克，系着宽皮带，戴着{argument name="hat style" default="白色宽檐帽"}和圆形深色墨镜。她留着一头披肩长卷发。

姿势动感：一只手扶着帽子，另一只手向侧面伸展。

周围环境包括摩天轮的金属辐条和框架，背景中充满了彩色的座舱。

一张炎炎夏日的写实手机摄影作品，明亮的直射阳光，暖色调处理，高光略微过曝，自然的阴影，强烈的热浪感，自然的皮肤质感，细腻的胶片颗粒，略带阳光褪色的色彩，营造出一种抓拍的、随性的瞬间感。

必须完整保留原照片中人物的面部、身份、外貌、年龄及所有独特特征。人物未看向镜头。

en.title: Avant-Garde High-Fashion Editorial Portrait
en.description: A high-fashion, cinematic portrait prompt featuring futuristic accessories, geometric technical apparel, and a minimalist studio setting.
en.prompt:
A high-fashion, cinematic portrait of a young woman with a sharp, modern aesthetic. She is positioned in a low-angle shot, looking down toward the camera with a confident, serene expression. The setting is a minimalist, high-key environment featuring abstract white architectural structures with a single, bold vertical pink stripe.
Model: A young woman with an elegant, defined jawline and dark hair styled in a textured, slightly "messy" high bun with loose, wispy strands.
Makeup: Soft, futuristic glam featuring {argument name="eyeshadow" default="shimmering lilac eyeshadow"}, a subtle pink blush, and {argument name="lip style" default="glossy mauve-toned lips"}.
Eyewear: {argument name="glasses style" default="Oversized, avant-garde sunglasses"}. The lenses feature a striking blue-to-purple iridescent gradient and are semi-transparent. The frames are thin and red, accented by vibrant cyan-blue side shields.
Jewelry: Large, spherical drop earrings with a swirling, liquid-like iridescent finish in teal and gold.
Apparel: A high-collar technical windbreaker/anorak. The garment is covered in a complex geometric pattern consisting of teal, white, soft pink, and mustard yellow blocks, interspersed with fine grey halftone textures.
Lighting: Bright, clinical studio lighting. High-key exposure creates a clean, "blown-out" effect on the background while maintaining soft, flattering highlights on the model's skin and sharp specular reflections on her accessories.
Color Palette: A vibrant mix of Teal (#4EBABA), Soft Pink (#F2A2B5), Mustard Yellow (#E8C547), and Electric Blue (#3B82F6) against a sterile white backdrop.
Framing: A tight medium-up shot with a shallow depth of field, making the model pop against the slightly softened geometric background.
Style: Hyper-realistic digital photography, 8k resolution, sharp focus on the eyes and sunglasses, clean lines, and a "Vogue-style" editorial finish.

zh.title: 前卫高定时尚编辑人像
zh.description: 一款包含未来感配饰、几何科技感服装以及极简主义摄影棚背景的高定电影感人像提示词。
zh.prompt:
一张具有锐利现代美学的高定电影感年轻女性人像。采用低角度拍摄，她俯视镜头，表情自信而宁静。背景为极简主义的高调环境，包含抽象的白色建筑结构，并点缀有一条醒目的垂直粉色条纹。
模特：一位拥有优雅轮廓分明的下颌线、深色头发梳成质感略显“凌乱”的高发髻，并带有几缕散落发丝的年轻女性。
妆容：柔和的未来感妆容，包含 {argument name="eyeshadow" default="闪烁的丁香紫色眼影"}、淡淡的粉色腮红以及 {argument name="lip style" default="光泽感的藕粉色嘴唇"}。
眼镜：{argument name="glasses style" default="超大款前卫太阳镜"}。镜片呈现出醒目的蓝紫色虹彩渐变，且具有半透明质感。镜框纤细呈红色，并配有鲜艳的青蓝色侧翼护罩。
珠宝：大型球形吊坠耳环，表面带有青色与金色的流体状虹彩光泽。
服装：高领科技感防风衣/冲锋衣。服装覆盖着复杂的几何图案，由青色、白色、柔粉色和芥末黄色块组成，并穿插着细腻的灰色半调纹理。
光影：明亮的临床级摄影棚灯光。高调曝光在背景上营造出干净的“过曝”效果，同时在模特皮肤上保留了柔和、修饰性的高光，并在配饰上呈现出锐利的镜面反射。
配色方案：青色 (#4EBABA)、柔粉色 (#F2A2B5)、芥末黄 (#E8C547) 和电光蓝 (#3B82F6) 在纯净白色背景下的鲜明组合。
构图：紧凑的中景镜头，浅景深效果使模特在略微柔化的几何背景中脱颖而出。
风格：超写实数字摄影，8k 分辨率，焦点清晰聚焦于眼睛和太阳镜，线条利落，具有“Vogue 风格”的编辑级质感。

en.title: Minimalist Japanese Architectural Fashion Shoot
en.description: A high-fashion editorial prompt for a Japanese model in a contemporary architectural studio with curved concrete walls and dramatic lighting.
en.prompt:
A stunning {argument name="subject" default="young Japanese woman"} in a high-end fashion studio photoshoot, standing gracefully in a {argument name="studio style" default="contemporary architectural studio"} designed with large curved concrete walls, textured charcoal surfaces, and soft geometric shadows. She wears an elegant luxury designer outfit in {argument name="outfit colors" default="deep ivory and black tones"}, combining modern Japanese minimalism with high-fashion sophistication. Tailored silhouette, refined accessories, subtle jewelry, and impeccable styling create a timeless editorial look.The studio features a dramatic sculptural environment with layered curved walls, smooth polished concrete flooring, and subtle atmospheric haze. No distracting props. The entire composition is focused on her presence, beauty, posture, and expression.
Cinematic lighting setup with a large overhead softbox creating soft directional illumination, complemented by subtle side rim lights that sculpt her silhouette.Deep shadows, rich contrast, and controlled highlights create a luxurious fashion-magazine atmosphere. Natural skin texture, flawless yet realistic complexion, elegant hairstyle with soft movement, confident gaze, and graceful posture.
Ultra-realistic DSLR photography, luxury women's fashion editorial, Vogue-level campaign aesthetic, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, f/1.8, tack-sharp focus on the model, exceptional fabric detail,realistic lighting falloff, premium cinematic color grading, rich tonal depth, architectural fashion photography, luxury advertising campaign quality, masterpiece composition, photorealistic, RAW photo quality, 8K resolution, highly detailed, professional fashion studio campaign, focused entirely on the model.Pose Variation: Standing with one hand lightly touching the curved concrete wall, body angled slightly away from the camera, chin raised subtly, eyes looking directly into the lens with calm confidence, creating a powerful yet elegant luxury-fashion presence.

zh.title: 极简主义日式建筑时尚摄影
zh.description: 一个为当代建筑工作室中的日本模特量身打造的高级时尚大片提示词，背景包含弧形混凝土墙和戏剧性的光影效果。
zh.prompt:
一位令人惊艳的 {argument name="subject" default="年轻日本女性"} 在高端时尚工作室拍摄大片，优雅地伫立在由 {argument name="studio style" default="当代建筑工作室"} 设计的空间中，背景为大型弧形混凝土墙、富有质感的炭灰色表面以及柔和的几何阴影。她身着 {argument name="outfit colors" default="深象牙白与黑色调"} 的奢华设计师服装，将现代日式极简主义与高级时尚的精致感完美融合。修身的剪裁、考究的配饰、精致的珠宝以及无可挑剔的造型，营造出永恒的杂志大片质感。

工作室呈现出极具雕塑感的环境，层叠的弧形墙面、光滑的抛光混凝土底板以及微妙的氛围感薄雾。没有多余的杂乱道具。整个构图聚焦于她的人物存在感、美感、姿态与神情。

电影级布光设置，顶部大型柔光箱营造出柔和的定向照明，辅以微妙的侧面轮廓光勾勒出她的身形。深邃的阴影、丰富的对比度与受控的高光，营造出奢华的时尚杂志氛围。自然的皮肤纹理、无瑕但真实的肤色、带有柔和动感的优雅发型、自信的眼神以及优雅的姿态。

超写实 DSLR 摄影，女性奢华时尚大片，Vogue 级广告审美，浅景深，85mm 镜头，f/1.8，焦点精准锁定在模特身上，卓越的织物细节，真实的灯光衰减，高级电影级调色，丰富的色调深度，建筑时尚摄影，奢华广告大片品质，大师级构图，照片级真实感，RAW 照片质量，8K 分辨率，高度细节，专业时尚工作室大片，完全聚焦于模特本身。

姿势变化：站立，一只手轻轻触碰弧形混凝土墙，身体略微背向镜头，下巴微微抬起，双眼平静而自信地直视镜头，展现出强大且优雅的奢华时尚气场。

en.title: Colored Pencil Football Player Illustration
en.description: An elegant portrait prompt that blends realistic pencil painting and soft pastel illustration styles for a detailed national team football portrait.
en.prompt:
Masterpiece, best quality, ultra-detailed, highly detailed digital illustration, realistic pencil painting, soft pastel illustration, elegant semi-realistic portrait, fine graphite and colored pencil texture, delicate cross-hatching, smooth blended shading, premium artstation quality, 8K resolution.
A handsome {argument name="subject" default="young Caucasian male football player"} wearing the {argument name="team jersey" default="England national team home jersey"}, chest-up portrait, looking slightly upward with a calm, thoughtful, and confident expression. His head is slightly tilted to the right, blue eyes reflecting soft natural light, neatly styled short light brown hair with subtle volume, well-groomed short beard and mustache, masculine jawline, symmetrical facial proportions, realistic skin pores with flawless yet natural complexion.
The portrait features warm ivory skin tone with subtle peach undertones, smooth skin gradients, soft glowing highlights on the forehead, nose bridge, cheeks and lips, realistic eyelashes and eyebrows, detailed iris with crystal-clear reflections, natural glossy lips, elegant facial anatomy.
The artwork uses a soft beige, cream, warm gray, and muted brown color palette, creating a luxurious, timeless atmosphere. Gentle golden sunlight enters diagonally from the upper right, producing cinematic highlights and soft shadows across the face and neck.
The jersey is rendered with painterly realism, visible fabric texture, {argument name="crest details" default="embroidered England crest"}, subtle folds, realistic stitching, soft white fabric with navy and red trim, preserving the authentic appearance while harmonizing with the warm illustration style.
Background is intentionally minimalistic with creamy bokeh, warm neutral tones, shallow depth of field, soft blurred lighting, subtle grain texture, elegant studio atmosphere, no distractions.
Art style combines:
Premium colored pencil illustration
Soft graphite rendering
Fine cross-hatching
Smooth painterly blending
Hyper-detailed facial rendering
Luxury editorial portrait
Warm cinematic lighting
Elegant digital realism
Soft-focus premium illustration
Museum-quality portrait artwork
Composition centered, vertical portrait, head and shoulders framing, eye-level perspective, natural proportions, sophisticated lighting, highly refined textures, balanced contrast, premium illustration aesthetic.
Aspect Ratio: 4:6

zh.title: 彩色铅笔足球运动员插画
zh.description: 一款优雅的肖像提示词，融合了写实铅笔画与柔和粉彩插画风格，用于创作精致的国家队足球运动员肖像。
zh.prompt:
杰作，最高画质，超精细，高度细节的数字插画，写实铅笔画，柔和粉彩插画，优雅的半写实肖像，细腻的石墨与彩色铅笔质感，精致的交叉排线，平滑的混合阴影，ArtStation 顶级艺术品质，8K 分辨率。
一位英俊的 {argument name="subject" default="年轻白人男性足球运动员"} 身穿 {argument name="team jersey" default="英格兰国家队主场球衣"}，胸部以上肖像，表情平静、深思且自信，微微抬头。头部略微向右倾斜，蓝色双眼反射着柔和的自然光，发型整洁的浅棕色短发，略带蓬松感，修剪整齐的短胡须，男性化的下颌线，对称的面部比例，写实皮肤毛孔，肤色无瑕且自然。
肖像采用暖象牙色肤色，带有微妙的桃色底色，平滑的皮肤渐变，额头、鼻梁、脸颊和嘴唇上有柔和的发光高光，写实的睫毛和眉毛，细节丰富的虹膜，晶莹剔透的反射，自然光泽的嘴唇，优雅的面部解剖结构。
艺术作品使用柔和的米色、奶油色、暖灰色和柔和的棕色调色板，营造出奢华、永恒的氛围。柔和的金色阳光从右上角斜射入，在脸部和颈部产生电影般的高光和柔和的阴影。
球衣呈现出绘画般的写实感，可见的织物纹理，{argument name="crest details" default="刺绣英格兰队徽"}，微妙的褶皱，写实的缝线，带有海军蓝和红色饰边的柔和白色面料，在保持真实外观的同时与温暖的插画风格相协调。
背景刻意极简化，带有奶油色虚化效果，暖中性色调，浅景深，柔和的模糊光效，微妙的颗粒感，优雅的摄影棚氛围，无干扰元素。
艺术风格结合了：
顶级彩色铅笔插画
柔和石墨渲染
精细交叉排线
平滑绘画式混合
超精细面部渲染
奢华编辑肖像
温暖电影光效
优雅数字写实
柔焦顶级插画
博物馆级肖像艺术作品
构图居中，竖向肖像，头部和肩部取景，平视视角，自然比例，精致光效，高度精炼的纹理，平衡的对比度，顶级插画美学。
长宽比：4:6

en.title: Vintage Photo Restoration and Colorization
en.description: A functional prompt for enhancing old photographs, converting black and white to natural colors while maintaining original facial authenticity.
en.prompt: Enhance overall clarity, sharpness, and {argument name="resolution" default="resolution to high-quality photo standards"} without losing authenticity. If the image is black and white, convert it to {argument name="skin tone" default="realistic natural color based on typical Indian skin tones"}, natural hair and eye colors, and {argument name="clothing style" default="traditional clothing"}. Ensure the background and lighting are smooth and neutral, matching the original studio look. The final result should look like a perfectly preserved real photograph, not AI-generated or stylized, and must reflect the original image with: No facial change No softening of expressions No cosmetic enhancement.

zh.title: 老照片修复与上色
zh.description: 一个用于增强旧照片的功能性提示词，在保持原始面部真实性的同时，将黑白照片转换为自然色彩。
zh.prompt: 在不失真前提下，提升整体清晰度、锐度以及 {argument name="resolution" default="达到高质量照片标准的解析度"}。如果图像是黑白照片，请将其转换为 {argument name="skin tone" default="基于典型印度肤色的逼真自然色彩"}，并还原自然的头发和眼睛颜色，以及 {argument name="clothing style" default="传统服饰"}。确保背景和光影平滑且自然，与原始摄影棚风格保持一致。最终效果应呈现为完美保存的真实照片，而非 AI 生成或风格化图像，且必须忠实于原始图像，做到：不改变面部特征、不柔化表情、不进行美颜修饰。

en.title: Golden Hour Luxury Car Selfie
en.description: A glamour-focused prompt for generating high-end beauty portraits of a woman in a luxury car interior during the golden hour.
en.prompt: Luxury golden-hour selfie portrait of a beautiful young woman sitting inside a modern car, long silky dark brown hair cascading over her shoulders, luminous fair skin, soft glam makeup, glossy pink lips, defined lashes, and expressive hazel-green eyes. Wearing an elegant white asymmetrical one-shoulder dress with a stylish cutout detail, accessorized with a sparkling heart-shaped pendant necklace, silver rings, stud earrings, and a delicate bracelet. Resting her hand gracefully beneath her chin while smiling softly at the camera. Warm sunset sunlight streams through the car window, creating flattering highlights and natural shadows across her face. Premium lifestyle aesthetic, luxury fashion influencer vibe, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic skin texture, cinematic lighting, professional beauty photography, photorealistic, masterpiece quality, 8K, HDR, 85mm lens. High-end beauty portrait, elegant young woman in a luxury car during golden hour, flawless glowing skin, long glossy brunette hair, radiant hazel eyes, soft romantic smile, chic white designer dress, sparkling jewelry details, natural sunlight illuminating her face, luxury lifestyle influencer aesthetic, modern elegance, premium fashion campaign, rich textures, highly detailed eyes and skin, warm cinematic color grading, shallow depth of field, Instagram luxury photography, editorial beauty shoot, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, award-winning portrait, HDR, 8K. low quality, blurry, bad anatomy, extra fingers, deformed hands, distorted face, asymmetrical eyes, plastic skin, excessive makeup, overexposed highlights, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, noise, grain, watermark, text, logo, motion blur, cartoon, anime, CGI, unrealistic proportions, low resolution, artifacts, duplicate features. luxury beauty portrait, golden-hour selfie, influencer aesthetic, elegant fashion, glowing skin, luxury car interior, soft glam makeup, cinematic sunlight, high-end editorial photography, feminine elegance, premium lifestyle, photorealistic realism

zh.title: 黄金时刻豪华汽车自拍
zh.description: 一个专注于魅力的提示词，用于生成女性在黄金时刻于豪华汽车内的高端美妆肖像。
zh.prompt: 豪华黄金时刻自拍肖像，一位美丽的年轻女性坐在现代汽车内，丝滑的深棕色长发垂落在肩上，白皙透亮的皮肤，柔和的魅力妆容，光泽感粉色嘴唇，清晰的睫毛，以及富有表现力的榛绿色眼睛。身穿优雅的白色不对称单肩连衣裙，带有时尚的镂空细节，佩戴闪亮的心形吊坠项链、银戒指、耳钉和精致的手链。她优雅地将手托在下巴下方，对着镜头温柔微笑。温暖的日落阳光透过车窗射入，在她的脸上形成迷人的高光和自然的阴影。高级生活方式美学，豪华时尚博主氛围，浅景深，超逼真皮肤纹理，电影级布光，专业美妆摄影，照片级真实感，杰作质量，8K，HDR，85mm 镜头。高端美妆肖像，黄金时刻豪华汽车里的优雅年轻女性，无瑕发光的皮肤，长款光泽棕发，光芒四射的榛色眼睛，柔和浪漫的微笑，别致的白色设计师连衣裙，闪亮的珠宝细节，自然阳光照亮她的脸庞，豪华生活方式博主美学，现代优雅，高级时尚大片，丰富的质感，高度细节化的眼睛和皮肤，温暖的电影级调色，浅景深，Instagram 豪华摄影，编辑美妆拍摄，照片级真实感，超细节，获奖肖像，HDR，8K。低质量，模糊，解剖结构错误，多余的手指，畸形的手，扭曲的脸，不对称的眼睛，塑料感皮肤，妆容过重，高光过曝，阴影过硬，色彩过饱和，噪点，颗粒感，水印，文字，Logo，运动模糊，卡通，动漫，CGI，比例不真实，低分辨率，伪影，特征重复。豪华美妆肖像，黄金时刻自拍，博主美学，优雅时尚，发光皮肤，豪华汽车内饰，柔和魅力妆容，电影级阳光，高端编辑摄影，女性优雅，高级生活方式，照片级真实感

en.title: Futuristic Smartphone Product Advertisement
en.description: A technical and high-end product photography prompt for a futuristic smartphone advertisement, featuring UI overlays and premium fashion elements.
en.prompt:
Ultra-realistic premium smartphone advertisement, featuring a confident young woman in her early 20s with fair skin and sharp facial features, wearing sleek black cat-eye sunglasses. She has long, thick braided hair styled into an extended oversized braid, colored in {argument name="color theme" default="soft lavender/purple"} tones matching the product theme.
She is captured in a dynamic low-angle cinematic pose, slightly twisting her torso while holding a {argument name="smartphone model" default="Xiaomi 17 Pro"} smartphone toward the camera in a bold hero shot with strong forced perspective, the phone dominating the foreground.
The smartphone features a matte metallic lavender/purple finish, minimalistic body with rounded corners, and a large rectangular camera module. The module includes two large camera lenses on the left, a circular secondary display on the right showing a minimal purple gradient clock UI, Leica branding near the camera, a clean flash strip, and subtle Xiaomi branding at the bottom.
Outfit: {argument name="outfit" default="fitted long-sleeve crop top in soft lavender/purple"}, paired with high-waisted muted grey/olive cargo pants, modern tech-fashion aesthetic.
Background: clean minimal gradient transitioning from light grey to soft lavender/purple tones, with subtle blurred large-scale typography for depth.
Lighting: soft studio lighting with neutral-to-cool tones, smooth skin illumination, controlled highlights on the phone edges, glossy reflections on camera lenses and display, minimal shadows, premium product photography style.
Composition: low-angle shot for a powerful look, subject positioned slightly left, phone dominating the right foreground, clean negative space for branding.
Futuristic UI overlays: thin minimal white/purple lines and nodes pointing to features with floating labels: “Leica Camera System” “Secondary Display Integration” “Ultra-Slim Premium Design”
Glassmorphism panel (bottom-left, soft purple tint) listing: “Flagship Performance” “Advanced AI Imaging” “Fast Charging” “Next-Gen Xiaomi AI”
Top corner text: “Xiaomi 17 Pro" in clean modern sans-serif typography.
Style: high-end flagship smartphone advertisement, futuristic, minimal, elegant.
Quality: 8K, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, HDR, cinematic commercial photography, realistic textures.

zh.title: 未来感智能手机产品广告
zh.description: 一份用于未来感智能手机广告的技术型高端产品摄影提示词，包含 UI 叠加层和高级时尚元素。
zh.prompt:
超写实高端智能手机广告，主角是一位 20 出头、肤色白皙、五官立体的自信年轻女性，佩戴着时髦的黑色猫眼太阳镜。她留着长而浓密的编发，造型为夸张的超长麻花辫，发色采用与产品主题相呼应的 {argument name="color theme" default="柔和薰衣草紫/紫色"} 色调。
她以动态的低角度电影感姿态出镜，身体微微扭转，将一部 {argument name="smartphone model" default="Xiaomi 17 Pro"} 智能手机朝向镜头，呈现出强烈的透视感，手机占据画面前景的视觉中心。
该智能手机采用哑光金属薰衣草紫配色，机身极简，边角圆润，配有大型矩形摄像头模组。模组左侧包含两个大尺寸摄像头镜头，右侧为一个圆形副屏，显示着极简的紫色渐变时钟 UI，摄像头旁印有 Leica 品牌标识，配有简洁的闪光灯条，底部带有精致的 Xiaomi 品牌标识。
服装：{argument name="outfit" default="柔和薰衣草紫/紫色修身长袖露脐上衣"}，搭配高腰哑光灰/橄榄绿工装裤，展现现代科技时尚美学。
背景：从浅灰色过渡到柔和薰衣草紫/紫色的纯净极简渐变背景，带有模糊的大型字体以增加深度感。
光影：柔和的影棚布光，色调中性偏冷，皮肤光泽细腻，手机边缘有受控的高光，镜头和显示屏上有光泽反射，阴影极少，呈现高端产品摄影风格。
构图：低角度拍摄以展现强大气场，主体位于画面左侧，手机占据右侧前景，留有干净的负空间用于品牌展示。
未来感 UI 叠加层：纤细的极简白色/紫色线条和节点指向产品功能，并带有浮动标签：“Leica Camera System”（徕卡影像系统）、“Secondary Display Integration”（副屏集成）、“Ultra-Slim Premium Design”（超薄高端设计）。
毛玻璃效果面板（左下角，柔和紫色调）列出：“Flagship Performance”（旗舰性能）、“Advanced AI Imaging”（先进 AI 影像）、“Fast Charging”（快速充电）、“Next-Gen Xiaomi AI”（下一代 Xiaomi AI）。
顶部角落文字：“Xiaomi 17 Pro”，采用简洁现代的无衬线字体。
风格：高端旗舰智能手机广告，未来感，极简，优雅。
质量：8K，超精细，焦点清晰，HDR，电影级商业摄影，逼真质感。

en.title: Cinematic Countryside Road Stop Film Still Grid
en.description: A cinematic 3x3 grid prompt capturing various angles of a couple at a countryside road stop during dusk, featuring a vintage convertible.
en.prompt: A cinematic 3×3 grid of film-still frames featuring the same {argument name="couple" default="young woman with short dark hair and her partner"} during a quiet countryside road stop at dusk. A young woman with short dark hair wearing a light patterned blouse stands beside a {argument name="car" default="cream vintage convertible"} on a {argument name="location" default="rural dirt road"}, open fields and rolling hills stretching into the distance. Each frame here shows a distinct cinematic angle: extreme close-up of her face with natural skin texture, intimate medium shot of the couple leaning on the car, back view of the woman facing the landscape, wide establishing shot with the car in tall grass, high-angle top-down shot of the couple beside the convertible, dramatic low-angle portrait against the sky, clean side profile close-up, three-quarter rear view of the couple near the car, and a full back view of them walking away hand in hand down the road. Soft natural dusk lighting, muted earthy tones, realistic colors, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, consistent facial features across all frames, emotional cinematic mood, professional cinematography reference sheet style, ultra-realistic photography.

zh.title: 电影感乡村公路停靠站剧照网格
zh.description: 一个电影感 3x3 网格提示词，捕捉了一对情侣在黄昏时分乡村公路停靠站的各种角度，画面中包含一辆复古敞篷车。
zh.prompt: 一组电影感 3×3 剧照网格，展示了同一对 {argument name="couple" default="留着深色短发的年轻女性及其伴侣"} 在黄昏时分宁静乡村公路停靠站的场景。一位留着深色短发、身穿浅色印花衬衫的年轻女性站在一辆 {argument name="car" default="奶油色复古敞篷车"} 旁，背景是 {argument name="location" default="乡村土路"}，开阔的田野和连绵起伏的丘陵延伸至远方。每一帧都呈现出独特的电影视角：面部特写展现自然皮肤纹理、两人倚靠在车旁的亲密中景、女性面向风景的背影、汽车置于高草丛中的广角定场镜头、两人在敞篷车旁的俯视镜头、以天空为背景的戏剧性低角度肖像、干净的侧面轮廓特写、两人在车旁的三分之四后视图，以及两人手牵手沿路走远的完整背影。柔和的黄昏自然光，柔和的大地色调，真实的色彩，浅景深，细腻的胶片颗粒感，所有帧中面部特征保持一致，富有情感的电影氛围，专业电影摄影参考表风格，超写实摄影。

en.title: Luxury Fragrance Flat-Lay Poster
en.description: A top-down premium poster design for a high-end fragrance focusing on material contrast, glass realism, and a woody amber mood.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-premium fragrance poster for {argument name="brand" default="Hermès Terre d’Hermès"}, designed in a perfectly top-down flat-lay composition with extreme realism, material contrast, and a {argument name="background" default="dark black-amber-cedar"} authority mood. The image must feel deep, smoky, woody, noble, and intensely luxurious, like a world-class perfume campaign built around mineral glass, blackened woods, soft aromatic botanicals, and glowing amber depth. The product must remain the absolute hero, with every surrounding element serving its scent identity. Use a strict overhead top-view camera angle. Place one authentic Terre d’Hermès bottle exactly at the center of the frame as the main visual anchor. The bottle must be unmistakably real: accurate Terre d’Hermès silhouette, {argument name="fragrance tint" default="authentic amber-orange"} fragrance tint, crisp Hermès branding, precise cap structure, clean metallic accents, and flawless glass realism. Emphasize the bottle’s hard material identity: dense transparent glass, sharp edges, solid weight, clean reflective planes, mineral-like hardness, precise specular highlights,…

zh.title: 奢华香水俯拍海报
zh.description: 一款针对高端香水的顶级俯拍海报设计，侧重于材质对比、玻璃质感以及木质琥珀的氛围感。
zh.prompt: 创作一张超高端香水海报，品牌为 {argument name="brand" default="Hermès Terre d’Hermès"}，采用完美的俯拍平铺构图，具备极致的写实感、材质对比以及 {argument name="background" default="深色黑琥珀雪松"} 的权威氛围。画面必须呈现出深邃、烟熏、木质、高贵且极度奢华的质感，如同围绕矿物玻璃、黑化木材、柔和芳香植物及发光琥珀深度构建的世界级香水广告。产品必须是绝对的主角，周围的所有元素都要服务于其香氛特质。使用严格的垂直俯拍视角。将一瓶正品 Terre d’Hermès 香水放置在画面正中心作为视觉锚点。瓶身必须真实可辨：准确的 Terre d’Hermès 轮廓、{argument name="fragrance tint" default="正宗琥珀橙色"} 的香水色调、清晰的 Hermès 品牌标识、精确的瓶盖结构、干净的金属质感以及无瑕的玻璃真实感。强调瓶身的硬质材料属性：致密的透明玻璃、锐利的边缘、扎实的重量感、干净的反射平面、矿物般的硬度、精确的镜面高光……

en.title: Traditional Hanbok Portrait in Wildflower Meadow
en.description: An ultra-realistic portrait of a woman in traditional Korean hanbok standing in a misty wildflower meadow with atmospheric mountain views.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young East Asian woman"} standing alone in a {argument name="location" default="vast wildflower meadow"}. She is centered in the frame, facing the camera directly with a calm, introspective expression. She wears a {argument name="clothing" default="traditional Korean hanbok"} in muted charcoal gray and soft blue tones, with natural fabric texture and subtle folds. Her dark hair is loosely tied back with a few strands gently blown across her face by the wind. She holds a small hand-picked bouquet of wildflowers—white daisies, blue cornflowers, and dry grass stems—clasped softly in both hands at waist level. The meadow is filled with colorful wildflowers (reds, whites, blues, purples) stretching into the distance. In the background, a large mist-covered mountain rises softly out of focus, partially obscured by low clouds and fog, creating a moody, atmospheric depth. Overcast sky with soft diffused natural light, cool color palette, muted contrast, cinematic realism. Shallow depth of field, sharp focus on subject, creamy background bokeh. Natural skin texture, realistic facial details, no makeup look. Fine art photography style, emotional, poetic, timeless. Shot on a full-frame camera, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ultra-high resolution, photorealistic, no text, no watermark.

zh.title: 野花草甸中的传统韩服肖像
zh.description: 一张超写实的肖像，描绘了一位身着传统韩国韩服的女性，站在雾气缭绕的野花草甸中，背景是充满氛围感的山景。
zh.prompt: 超写实的电影感肖像，主角为一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻东亚女性"}，独自站在 {argument name="location" default="广阔的野花草甸"} 中。她位于画面中心，直视镜头，表情平静而内省。她身着 {argument name="clothing" default="传统韩国韩服"}，色调为柔和的炭灰色与淡蓝色，呈现出自然的织物纹理与细微褶皱。深色长发随意束在脑后，几缕发丝被风轻轻吹过脸庞。她双手轻握着一束亲手采摘的野花——包括白雏菊、蓝矢车菊和干草茎——置于腰间。草甸上开满了色彩斑斓的野花（红色、白色、蓝色、紫色），一直延伸至远方。背景中，一座巨大的山峰在薄雾笼罩下若隐若现，部分被低云和雾气遮蔽，营造出忧郁且富有氛围的深度感。阴天，柔和的漫射自然光，冷色调，低对比度，电影级写实感。浅景深，主体对焦清晰，背景呈现奶油般的虚化效果。自然的皮肤纹理，写实的脸部细节，裸妆感。艺术摄影风格，富有情感、诗意且永恒。使用全画幅相机拍摄，85mm 镜头，f/1.8 光圈，超高分辨率，照片级真实感，无文字，无水印。

en.title: Luxury Apartment Mirror Selfie Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating a realistic mirror selfie of a woman in a modern luxury apartment, focusing on lighting and high-end fashion details.
en.prompt: A full-length mirror selfie of a {argument name="subject" default="beautiful young East Asian woman in her early 20s"} standing in a modern luxury apartment. She has {argument name="hair style" default="very long, straight glossy black hair with soft side bangs falling past her waist"}. Fair porcelain skin, delicate features with soft makeup — large eyes, glossy lips in a soft neutral expression, a faint blush on her cheeks. She holds a black smartphone up in her right hand to take the mirror selfie, partially covering the upper part of her face, her left hand resting on her hip. She has an attractive hourglass figure — full bust, slim waist, curvy hips. She wears a {argument name="clothing" default="cream-colored sequined spaghetti-strap camisole top with a low V-neckline that shimmers softly"}, paired with fitted white high-waisted shorts, and black strappy ankle-strap high-heeled sandals. She stands with her weight on one leg, hip cocked slightly, posing confidently in front of a large full-length mirror with a slim dark wood frame. Reflected behind her is a bright, elegant modern apartment interior — clean minimalist design, floor-to-ceiling windows with sheer curtains letting in warm natural daylight, pale marble or polished concrete floors, sleek contemporary furniture, soft neutral tones, tasteful decor. Warm natural light streams in from the windows, casting soft highlights across her figure and the floor. Shot on a phone in the mirror, full-body vertical framing, natural skin texture, slightly warm tones, the authentic look of a real mirror selfie in a stylish upscale apartment.

zh.title: 豪华公寓镜面自拍肖像
zh.description: 一份用于生成现代豪华公寓中女性真实镜面自拍的详细提示词，重点关注光影效果和高端时尚细节。
zh.prompt: 一张全身镜面自拍，画面中是一位 {argument name="subject" default="20 出头、容貌姣好的东亚年轻女性"} 站在现代豪华公寓内。她留着 {argument name="hair style" default="及腰的长直发，乌黑亮泽，配有柔和的侧分刘海"}。皮肤白皙如瓷，五官精致，妆容柔和——大眼睛，嘴唇水润，表情自然平和，双颊带有淡淡的腮红。她右手举着一部黑色智能手机进行镜面自拍，手机遮住了她脸部的上半部分，左手叉腰。她拥有迷人的沙漏型身材——丰满的胸部、纤细的腰肢和圆润的臀部。她身穿 {argument name="clothing" default="一件奶油色亮片吊带背心，低 V 领设计，散发着柔和的光泽"}，搭配修身的白色高腰短裤，以及黑色绑带高跟凉鞋。她重心放在一条腿上，臀部微微侧倾，自信地站在一面细深色木框的全身镜前。镜中映出她身后明亮优雅的现代公寓内饰——极简主义设计，落地窗挂着轻薄的窗帘，温暖的自然光洒入室内，浅色大理石或抛光混凝土地面，线条流畅的现代家具，柔和的中性色调，品味高雅的装饰。温暖的自然光从窗户射入，在她的身形和地面上投下柔和的高光。手机镜面拍摄，全身垂直构图，自然的皮肤纹理，略带暖色调，呈现出时尚高档公寓中真实镜面自拍的质感。

en.title: Morning Coffee Brewing Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for a realistic morning scene in a Japanese-style kitchen, capturing a woman brewing coffee with natural backlight and soft textures.
en.prompt: A vertical realistic photo. In a Japanese apartment-style dining kitchen with warm morning sunlight, a {argument name="age group" default="woman in her 20s"} stands slightly left of the center, brewing hand-drip coffee while facing away from the camera. The full body is included, occupying about 70% of the screen. A kitchen counter is on the left, and a wooden dining table and chairs are on the right. She has {argument name="skin tone" default="fair skin leaning towards ivory beige"} with a smooth texture and a hint of pink. Soft highlights fall on her cheeks, nose, shoulders, collarbone, and back, retaining natural texture without excessive skin correction. The makeup is precise and elegant, doll-like Japanese style. She wears simple, sophisticated swimwear-style loungewear based on {argument name="color theme" default="coffee colors"}. The main light is soft, warm morning sun coming from the large window on the right. Shot with an 85mm lens at waist to chest height from a diagonal rear angle, focusing on the person and hands brewing coffee with a shallow depth of field. A magazine-style quiet and elegant finish.

zh.title: 清晨手冲咖啡肖像
zh.description: 一个高度详细的提示词，用于生成日式厨房中逼真的清晨场景，捕捉女性在自然逆光和柔和质感下冲泡咖啡的画面。
zh.prompt: 一张竖构图的写实照片。在充满温暖晨光的日式公寓风格餐厨空间中，一位 {argument name="age group" default="20 多岁的女性"} 站在画面中心偏左的位置，背对镜头正在进行手冲咖啡。全身入镜，人物占据画面约 70%。左侧为厨房操作台，右侧为木质餐桌椅。她拥有 {argument name="skin tone" default="偏象牙米色的白皙皮肤"}，肤质细腻且透着淡淡的粉色。柔和的高光落在她的脸颊、鼻梁、肩膀、锁骨和背部，保留了自然的纹理，没有过度磨皮。妆容精致优雅，呈现日系娃娃风格。她穿着基于 {argument name="color theme" default="咖啡色系"} 的简约高级泳装风格家居服。主光源为来自右侧大窗户的柔和暖晨光。使用 85mm 镜头，从斜后方腰部至胸部高度拍摄，焦点对准人物及冲泡咖啡的手部，具有浅景深效果。呈现出杂志般安静优雅的质感。

en.title: Retro Shoujo Anime Girl with Cat
en.description: A prompt designed to recreate the authentic aesthetic of late 80s and early 90s shoujo cel animation, featuring a girl and her cat with vintage textures and lighting.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-detailed retro Japanese anime illustration inspired by authentic late-1980s and early-1990s shoujo cel animation. Depict a {argument name="subject" default="beautiful young woman"} with porcelain skin, striking crystal-blue eyes, long flowing raven-black hair with soft curtain bangs, and calm confident expression. She wears an {argument name="clothing" default="oversized ivory vintage blouse"} accessorized with layered oxidized silver necklaces, a black leather choker, hoop earrings, and delicate bracelets. She gently cradles a {argument name="animal" default="fluffy long-haired brown tabby cat"} with cream and white markings, both looking toward the viewer. Place them against a simple soft grey background with subtle paper texture to emphasize the characters. Illuminate the portrait using soft diffused studio lighting that produces elegant cel-shaded highlights and gentle shadows. Render with authentic hand-painted cel animation, clean vintage ink linework, delicate film grain, nostalgic color grading, painterly textures, and ultra-high-resolution remastered anime quality.

zh.title: 复古少女动漫风格女孩与猫
zh.description: 此提示词旨在重现 80 年代末至 90 年代初少女赛璐珞动画的真实美学，呈现女孩与猫的复古质感与光影效果。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅超精细的复古日本动漫插画，灵感源自 20 世纪 80 年代末至 90 年代初真实的少女赛璐珞动画。描绘一位 {argument name="subject" default="美丽的年轻女性"}，她拥有瓷器般的肌肤、迷人的水晶蓝双眸、柔顺的黑色长发与轻盈的八字刘海，神情从容自信。她身着一件 {argument name="clothing" default="象牙色复古大码衬衫"}，搭配叠戴的氧化银项链、黑色皮质颈圈、圆环耳环及精致手链。她温柔地怀抱着一只 {argument name="animal" default="毛茸茸的长毛棕色虎斑猫"}，猫咪带有奶油色与白色的斑纹，两人均看向镜头。背景设为简约的柔灰色，带有细腻的纸张纹理，以突出人物主体。使用柔和的漫射摄影棚灯光进行照明，营造出优雅的赛璐珞阴影效果与柔和的明暗对比。采用真实的手绘赛璐珞动画风格渲染，呈现干净的复古墨线、细腻的胶片颗粒感、怀旧的色彩分级、绘画质感以及超高分辨率的重制版动漫品质。

en.title: Cinematic 35mm Analog Film Photo Series
en.description: A multi-frame cinematic prompt series capturing urban melancholy on European streets using vintage 35mm film aesthetics.
en.prompt: Create a cinematic 35mm analog film photo series featuring the same {argument name="subject" default="young adult woman"} with exact facial identity consistency across every frame. She has {argument name="hair style" default="short tousled dark-brown bob hair"}, natural textured skin, subtle freckles, minimal makeup, soft tired eyes, and a quiet, introspective expression. She wears an oversized dark charcoal blazer over a simple dark outfit. Scene: a {argument name="location" default="busy European city street"} during late golden hour, old urban buildings, parked dark cars, distant pedestrians and traffic, warm sunlight cutting through the streets. The world around her feels fast and restless while she remains emotionally still and detached. IMAGE 1 — SIDE PROFILE: Medium side-profile portrait of the woman standing near the street, facing left. A gentle wind blows loose strands of her short hair across her cheek. Warm sunset rim light outlines her hair and nose. She stares into the distance with a calm, melancholic expression. City architecture becomes heavily blurred behind her. IMAGE 2 — CAR WINDOW CLOSE-UP: Intimate close-up portrait photographed through a slightly dirty car window. Her face appears behind the glass in three-quarter profile, staring outside with distant, thoughtful eyes. Tiny dust particles and subtle marks are visible on the glass. Abstract red and white traffic-light bokeh glows behind her. Reflections softly overlap parts of her face. IMAGE 3 — STREET MOMENT: Candid medium-full street photograph of the same woman beside a parked black car. She turns unexpectedly toward the camera as if someone has just called her name. Wind pushes messy strands across her face. Slight motion blur in the surrounding traffic and pedestrians, spontaneous documentary composition, imperfect framing, emotionally raw. IMAGE 4 — INSIDE CAR: Extreme intimate profile close-up of the same woman sitting inside a car and looking through the side window. Her face is very close to the glass, eyes lowered slightly, lips relaxed. Small droplets, dust and imperfections on the window remain sharply visible while city lights dissolve into red, amber and teal bokeh outside. Quiet loneliness and cinematic stillness. VISUAL STYLE: 1970s–1990s European arthouse cinema, Kodak Portra 800 mixed with Cinestill 800T character, pushed 35mm film, strong organic grain, visible film noise, slightly underexposed shadows, warm amber highlights, muted teal-green shadows, faded colors, subtle halation, gentle highlight bloom, imperfect analog exposure, soft focus falloff, natural skin texture, no beauty retouching, shallow depth of field, vintage spherical lens, slight chromatic aberration, handheld documentary photography, candid editorial fashion photography, poetic urban melancholy, Wong Kar-wai-inspired emotional color atmosphere, raw photochemical texture. CAMERA: 35mm film camera, 50mm f/1.4 and 85mm f/1.8 lenses, wide aperture, available natural light only, shallow depth of field, handheld framing, subtle motion blur, authentic film scan,

zh.title: 电影感 35mm 胶片摄影系列
zh.description: 一套多帧电影感提示词系列，利用复古 35mm 胶片美学捕捉欧洲街头的都市忧郁感。
zh.prompt: 创作一套电影感 35mm 胶片摄影系列，主角均为同一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻女性"}，确保每一帧的面部特征完全一致。她留着 {argument name="hair style" default="凌乱的深棕色短波波头"}，拥有自然的皮肤纹理、淡淡的雀斑、极简的妆容、略显疲惫的柔和双眸，以及安静、内省的神情。她身穿一件深炭灰色廓形西装外套，内搭简约的深色服装。场景：{argument name="location" default="繁忙的欧洲城市街道"}，时间为傍晚黄金时刻，背景是古老的城市建筑、停放的深色汽车、远处的行人和车流，温暖的阳光穿过街道。周围的世界显得匆忙而躁动，而她却保持着情感上的静止与疏离。图片 1 — 侧面轮廓：中景侧面肖像，女子站在街边，面朝左侧。微风吹拂着她短发中散落的发丝掠过脸颊。温暖的日落轮廓光勾勒出她的发际和鼻梁。她凝视着远方，神情平静而忧郁。背景中的城市建筑呈现出强烈的虚化效果。图片 2 — 车窗特写：通过略显污浊的车窗拍摄的私密特写肖像。她的脸庞出现在玻璃后，呈四分之三侧面，眼神深邃地望向窗外，若有所思。玻璃上可见细小的灰尘颗粒和细微痕迹。抽象的红白交通灯光斑在她身后闪烁。倒影柔和地覆盖在她脸部局部。图片 3 — 街头瞬间：一张抓拍的中全景街头照片，同一位女子站在一辆停放的黑色汽车旁。她意外地转向镜头，仿佛有人刚刚叫了她的名字。风将凌乱的发丝吹过她的脸庞。周围的车流和行人带有轻微的动态模糊，呈现出即兴的纪实构图，画面构图不完美，情感原始真实。图片 4 — 车内视角：极度私密的侧面特写，同一位女子坐在车内，透过侧窗向外看。她的脸非常靠近玻璃，双眼微垂，双唇放松。窗上的小水滴、灰尘和瑕疵清晰可见，而窗外的城市灯光则融化成红色、琥珀色和青色的光斑。静谧的孤独感与电影般的静止。视觉风格：1970 年代至 1990 年代欧洲艺术电影，Kodak Portra 800 混合 Cinestill 800T 特性，增感 35mm 胶片，强烈的有机颗粒感，可见的胶片噪点，略微曝光不足的阴影，温暖的琥珀色高光，柔和的青绿色阴影，褪色的色彩，细微的光晕，柔和的高光溢出，不完美的胶片曝光，柔焦衰减，自然的皮肤纹理，无美颜修饰，浅景深，复古球面镜头，轻微的色差，手持纪实摄影，抓拍时尚编辑摄影，诗意的都市忧郁，王家卫风格的情感色彩氛围，原始的光化学质感。相机：35mm 胶片相机，50mm f/1.4 和 85mm f/1.8 镜头，大光圈，仅使用现有自然光，浅景深，手持构图，轻微的动态模糊，真实的胶片扫描。

en.title: Manga Character Design Triptych Poster
en.description: A character design prompt for a three-panel graphic poster, maintaining consistent identity while varying hairstyle and mood through bold colors and clean line art.
en.prompt: Create a triptych graphic poster on a vertical canvas divided into {argument name="layout" default="three horizontal panels"}, featuring the same {argument name="character style" default="Japanese manga-style character"} in every panel. Keep the face, eyes, nose, mouth, face shape, age, and hair color identical, changing only the hairstyle, bangs, expression, head angle, glasses, and accessories like a professional character design sheet. Each panel should be a shoulder-up portrait with bold graphic poster aesthetics, thick clean line art, minimal detail, and large flat color shapes. Choose {argument name="mood" default="three distinct moods"} inspired by the chat history, expressing each through a single dominant color with only black and white added. Instead of a traditional background, immerse the character within the atmosphere itself so the ambient color naturally reflects onto the skin, hair, and clothing, creating the feeling that the character exists inside the light and air of that world. No text, logos, UI elements, or speech bubbles. Each panel should work as a standalone artwork while forming a cohesive series together.

zh.title: 漫画角色设计三联画海报
zh.description: 一套用于三联画海报的角色设计提示词，通过大胆的色彩和简洁的线条，在保持角色身份一致的同时，展现不同的发型与情绪。
zh.prompt: 创建一个三联画风格的图形海报，画布垂直分布为 {argument name="layout" default="三个横向面板"}，每个面板中均包含相同的 {argument name="character style" default="日式漫画风格角色"}。保持脸型、眼睛、鼻子、嘴巴、年龄和发色完全一致，仅改变发型、刘海、表情、头部角度、眼镜以及配饰，呈现出专业角色设计表的效果。每个面板应为肩部以上的肖像，采用大胆的图形海报美学、粗犷简洁的线条、极简的细节以及大面积的平铺色块。根据聊天记录选择 {argument name="mood" default="三种截然不同的情绪"}，每种情绪通过一种主色调来表达，仅辅以黑白色。不要使用传统的背景，而是让角色沉浸在氛围本身中，使环境光自然地反射在皮肤、头发和衣物上，营造出角色置身于该世界光影与空气中的感觉。画面中不包含任何文字、Logo、UI 元素或对话气泡。每个面板既可以作为独立的艺术作品，又能共同组成一个连贯的系列。

en.title: Ultra-Luxury Silhouette Perfume Poster
en.description: An editorial fragrance poster prompt focusing on silhouette lighting, anatomical accuracy, and the elegant movement of perfume mist.
en.prompt: 为香奈儿5号 (CHANEL N°5) 创作一张顶级奢华的社论式香水海报，严格采用受电影逆光香水摄影启发的剪影女性呈现方式。女性必须呈现为真实的剪影，而不是光线充足的美女肖像。她的身份应通过轮廓、姿态、轮廓光和氛围来表达，而不是面部细节。图像必须具有感官享受、疏离感、神秘感且极其精致，具有超真实的香水颗粒、优雅的空间深度和高端的低调照明。构图：采用垂直海报布局。将香奈儿5号瓶子放在左下角的前景，在女人手中清晰可见。保持手持喷洒动作不变：优雅的手腕、自然的指尖张力、写实的握法，喷嘴指向颈部和下颚区域。瓶子必须保持清晰和高端，作为构图的锚点。剪影规则：女性必须主要渲染为黑暗的剪影。不要露出完整的面部特征、明亮的正面皮肤或详细的肖像照明。她的脸应该只看到部分侧面轮廓，额头、鼻梁、嘴唇、下巴、脖子和肩膀由背景中的薄暖轮廓光勾勒。身体大部分应留在阴影中，保留神秘感和图形美感。整体效果必须感觉像是包裹在光线中的生动剪影，而不是标准的时尚肖像。角色存在感：使用健康、高级时尚的西方女性模特，具有优雅的姿态和精致的比例，但仅通过剪影语言呈现。她应该在空间中稍微靠后，让香水雾在空气中传播更长的距离。仅显示部分上半身，而非全身。画面应集中在头部、颈部、肩膀、锁骨区域和握瓶手臂的剪影上。关键解剖学规则：即使人物以剪影形式呈现，解剖结构也必须完全正确。颈部比例必须自然，不能拉长或像天鹅一样。从下颚线到喉咙再到锁骨的过渡必须在解剖学上令人信服。肩部坡度、锁骨高度、斜方肌线条和手臂角度必须保持真实且优雅。没有扭曲的颈部长度，没有破碎的肩膀结构，没有不自然的时尚夸张。香水喷雾：关键的视觉故事是长而轻盈的香水雾从前景的瓶子飘向中景的剪影人物。喷雾必须感觉重量轻、发光且极其精细，就像悬浮在空气中的照明香氛尘埃。它应该从喷嘴喷出细腻的喷雾开始，然后扩大成由微小金色颗粒和半透明薄雾组成的柔软、舞动的丝带，在掠过剪影的脖子、下颚线和下脸颊轮廓之前优雅地穿过黑暗空间。喷雾必须感觉：轻盈、漂浮、如丝般顺滑、受控、优雅且物理上可信。它应该通过距离和氛围创造奢华感。保持其长、透气并悬浮在空气中，具有精细的扩散和微妙的湍流，绝不是浓烟，绝不是混乱的粉末，绝不是爆炸性的喷雾。灯光：使用强烈的电影逆光和精致的边缘照明。人物必须保持大部分为黑色，仅由精选的金色轮廓高亮描绘脸部、喉咙、肩膀、手臂和上胸线的剪影边缘。瓶子应捕捉温暖的反光并显露内部的琥珀色香水。喷雾在穿过光束的地方应柔和发光，在瓶子和剪影之间形成一层漂浮的面纱。背景必须保持深色、极简且干净。瓶子真实感：以绝对的真实感渲染香奈儿5号瓶子：正确的瓶子几何形状、透明的奢华玻璃、浓郁的金色液体、清晰的白色标签、优雅的黑色字体、写实的金属喷嘴、高端的反光和锐利的品牌清晰度。字体：在左侧负空间使用极简的社论字体。仅包括：“CHANEL”、“N°5” 以及可选的一行简短文字，例如：“THE SCENT OF A SILHOUETTE”。字体必须感觉安静、奢华且具有时尚大牌的权威感。氛围：神秘、奢华、疏离、感性、逆光、电影感、剪影驱动、优雅、永恒、夜间、精致、社论、高级时尚。渲染风格：超真实奢华香水摄影，女性剪影，电影轮廓光，长距离香水雾，解剖学正确的颈部和肩膀，优雅的手持喷洒姿势，深琥珀黑色调，发光的空中颗粒，高端玻璃真实感，极简背景，8k，世界级广告大片质量。负向提示词：光线充足的面部，可见的面部细节，美容肖像照明，前光照明的皮肤，曝光过度的身体，非剪影女性，拉长的脖子，解剖错误，扭曲的肩膀，笨拙的手势，杂乱的烟雾，厚重的喷雾云，粉末爆炸，模糊的瓶子，假标签，凌乱的背景，肮脏的阴影，黑色斑块，嘈杂的黑暗区域，变形的手指，不真实的身体比例。
