en.title: 3D Comedy Character Sheet Template
en.description: A comprehensive template for generating high-quality 3D stylized character sheets. It provides a structured layout including front, side, and back views, pajamas, and various facial expressions for animation consistency.
en.prompt:
Reference Use:
{argument name="reference image" default="1 person reference image attached to this instruction"}

Main Text:
Based on {argument name="reference image" default="1 person reference image attached to this instruction"}, create a simplified character sheet image for both sharing and video reference in a 1:1 square format.

The goal is to fix the appearance of one protagonist for a 15-second 3D daily comedy video titled "{argument name="video scenario" default="The protagonist, thinking they overslept for work, rushes to get ready and bursts out to leave, only to realize it's Sunday"}" and make the sheet easy to view for sharing.
This image is a character fixation sheet, not a storyboard. Do not include chronological scene progression, camera flow, or event reproduction.

The expression is high-quality stylized 3D.
Avoid cheap TV CG styles, monotonous NPC styles, or textures that look too toy-like. Emphasize a natural sense of depth on par with theatrical short 3D animation, approachable modeling, easy-to-read expressions, and an organized layout.

Reflect the facial features, hairstyle, hair color, sense of age, body type, atmosphere, and basic outfit based on the person in the reference image. Make the persona of the reference image immediately recognizable and reconfigure it as a shared character sheet.

The background is a clean studio background in white to very light gray.
Include short English headings and numbers, and refine it to a level of completion suitable for public sharing. Do not include long descriptions, logos, watermarks, or excessive decoration.

[Fixed Overall Layout]
Fix the canvas in a 3-tier horizontal configuration.

The top tier is approximately 50% of the total height. Arrange 01 FRONT, 02 SIDE, 03 BACK, and 04 PAJAMAS as four sections of the same height in a horizontal row from left to right.

The middle tier is approximately 22% of the total height. Fix 05 EXPRESSIONS as a horizontal area and arrange five facial expressions of the same size in a horizontal row from left to right.

The bottom tier is approximately 28% of the total height. Fix 06 FACE / DETAILS as a horizontal area.

Do not change the height of each tier, the order of sections, or the horizontal/vertical ratios based on the person or hairstyle. Do not move 05 to the rightmost column. Do not let 06 intrude into the top or middle tiers.

01 FRONT
Frontal full body of the protagonist's basic outfit. Reflect the outfit, color scheme, silhouette, shoes, bags, and accessories from the reference image.

02 SIDE
Side full body in the same basic outfit. Ensure the hairstyle, body type, outfit silhouette, and shoes are visible.

03 BACK
Rear full body in the same basic outfit. Ensure they are recognizable as the same person even from behind.

04 PAJAMAS
Full body in pajamas for waking up, showing the same person. Display in a front or slightly diagonal full body view. Pajamas should consist of a soft sleepwear material, separated top and bottom with sleeves and loose long pants. Make them barefoot. Clearly change the primary color, exposure, length, and silhouette from the basic outfit so they are immediately recognizable as sleepwear. Avoid camisoles, lingerie styles, short pants, skin-tight fits, or sleepwear with high skin exposure. Keep facial features, hairstyle, and body type consistent with 01-03.

05 EXPRESSIONS
Using the same basic outfit as 01-03, arrange the following 5 expressions in a horizontal row with the same size, height, and face scale:
1. NEUTRAL
2. SLEEPY / DROWSY
3. SHOCKED
4. PANICKED / HURRIED
5. DRAINED / SUNDAY REALIZATION
Display each expression within the same range from the top of the head to the upper shoulders. Do not enlarge or reduce specific faces based on the person or hairstyle. Do not change the expression images to pajamas.

06 FACE / DETAILS
Fix the horizontal area at the bottom of the canvas into a 60% left and 40% right split. Do not change this ratio.
The left 60% contains 3 facial views in the same basic outfit as 01-03: FRONT CLOSE-UP, 3/4 CLOSE-UP, SIDE CLOSE-UP. Arrange the 3 sections in a horizontal row with the same width and height. Display all three from the top of the head to the upper shoulders at the same scale, unifying face size, eye level, and margins. Do not widen sections for hair length or face shape.
The right 40% contains 4 sections of equal size fixed in a 2-column by 2-row layout:
Top left: EYES, Top right: LIPS, Bottom left: HAIR / BANGS, Bottom right: EAR / ACCESSORY. Do not change the number of sections, placement, or ratio on the right. Do not create 3-column configurations, 6 sections, vertical sections, merged sections, or additional sections. Do not display duplicate eyes, mouths, hair, or ears. Do not add unspecified details like collars, outfits, fabric, or chest area.

The number of people is only one protagonist. Configure everything as differences in direction, outfit, expression, and detail for the same person; do not include other people, groups, or twins.

Do not include scene elements like alarm clocks, calendars, beds, rooms, entrances, or offices. Overall, finish it as an organized, high-quality 3D character sheet that is easy to show for sharing and easy to use as a video reference later.

zh.title: 3D 喜剧角色设定图模板
zh.description: 一个用于生成高质量 3D 风格化角色设定图的综合模板。它提供了结构化的布局，包括正面、侧面和背面视图、睡衣造型以及各种面部表情，以确保动画的一致性。
zh.prompt:
参考使用：
{argument name="reference image" default="1 张附在此说明中的人物参考图"}

正文：
基于 {argument name="reference image" default="1 张附在此说明中的人物参考图"}，创建一个 1:1 正方形格式的简化角色设定图，用于分享和视频参考。

目标是为一部名为“{argument name="video scenario" default="主角以为上班睡过头了，匆忙准备并冲出门，结果发现今天是周日"}”的 15 秒 3D 日常喜剧视频固定主角形象，并使该设定图易于查看和分享。
此图像为角色固定设定图，而非分镜脚本。请勿包含时间轴上的场景推进、镜头流动或事件重现。

表现形式为高质量的风格化 3D。
避免廉价的电视 CG 风格、单调的 NPC 风格或看起来过于玩具感的材质。强调与影院级 3D 短片相当的自然深度感、平易近人的建模、易于辨识的表情以及整洁的布局。

根据参考图中的人物，体现其面部特征、发型、发色、年龄感、体型、氛围和基础服装。使参考图中的人物形象能够被立即识别，并将其重构为一张共享的角色设定图。

背景为干净的白色至极浅灰色摄影棚背景。
包含简短的英文标题和数字，并将其精炼至适合公开分享的完成度。请勿包含长篇描述、Logo、水印或过多的装饰。

[固定整体布局]
将画布固定为 3 层横向配置。

顶层约占总高度的 50%。从左至右水平排列 01 FRONT（正面）、02 SIDE（侧面）、03 BACK（背面）和 04 PAJAMAS（睡衣）四个高度相同的区域。

中间层约占总高度的 22%。将 05 EXPRESSIONS（表情）固定为横向区域，并从左至右水平排列五个大小相同的面部表情。

底层约占总高度的 28%。将 06 FACE / DETAILS（面部/细节）固定为横向区域。

请勿根据人物或发型更改各层的高度、区域顺序或横纵比例。请勿将 05 移动到最右侧列。请勿让 06 侵入顶层或中间层。

01 FRONT（正面）
主角穿着基础服装的全身正面图。体现参考图中的服装、配色、轮廓、鞋子、包袋和配饰。

02 SIDE（侧面）
穿着相同基础服装的全身侧面图。确保发型、体型、服装轮廓和鞋子清晰可见。

03 BACK（背面）
穿着相同基础服装的全身背面图。确保即使从背面也能识别出是同一个人。

04 PAJAMAS（睡衣）
穿着睡衣的全身图，展示同一个人。以正面或略微斜向的全身视角展示。睡衣应由柔软的睡衣材质组成，上下分体，带有袖子和宽松的长裤。赤脚。明确改变基础服装的主色调、裸露度、长度和轮廓，以便能立即识别为睡衣。避免吊带衫、内衣风格、短裤、紧身款式或高暴露度的睡衣。保持面部特征、发型和体型与 01-03 一致。

05 EXPRESSIONS（表情）
使用与 01-03 相同的基础服装，在同一行水平排列以下 5 种表情，保持相同的大小、高度和面部比例：
1. NEUTRAL（中性）
2. SLEEPY / DROWSY（困倦/昏昏欲睡）
3. SHOCKED（震惊）
4. PANICKED / HURRIED（惊慌/匆忙）
5. DRAINED / SUNDAY REALIZATION（疲惫/意识到是周日）
在从头顶到上肩部的相同范围内展示每个表情。请勿根据人物或发型放大或缩小特定的面部。请勿将表情图像更改为睡衣造型。

06 FACE / DETAILS（面部/细节）
将画布底部的横向区域固定为左侧 60% 和右侧 40% 的比例。请勿更改此比例。
左侧 60% 包含穿着与 01-03 相同基础服装的 3 个面部视图：FRONT CLOSE-UP（正面特写）、3/4 CLOSE-UP（3/4 侧面特写）、SIDE CLOSE-UP（侧面特写）。将这 3 个部分水平排列，保持相同的宽度和高度。全部以相同的比例展示从头顶到上肩部的范围，统一面部大小、视线水平和边距。请勿因发长或脸型而加宽区域。
右侧 40% 包含 4 个大小相等的区域，固定为 2 列 2 行的布局：
左上：EYES（眼睛），右上：LIPS（嘴唇），左下：HAIR / BANGS（头发/刘海），右下：EAR / ACCESSORY（耳朵/配饰）。请勿更改右侧区域的数量、位置或比例。请勿创建 3 列配置、6 个区域、纵向区域、合并区域或额外区域。请勿展示重复的眼睛、嘴巴、头发或耳朵。请勿添加未指定的细节，如领子、服装、布料或胸部区域。

人物数量仅为一名主角。将所有内容配置为同一人在方向、服装、表情和细节上的差异；请勿包含其他人、群体或双胞胎。

请勿包含闹钟、日历、床、房间、入口或办公室等场景元素。总体而言，将其完成为一张组织有序、高质量的 3D 角色设定图，既方便分享，也易于作为后续的视频参考。

en.title: Summer Railway Fisheye Portrait
en.description: A detailed fisheye lens prompt capturing a nostalgic Japanese summer scene. It features a woman in a white dress standing by a railway track with a retro green train, emphasizing bright sunlight and deep shadows.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="Summer by the tracks"}

Main Subject:
A vertical photograph. A portrait of a small station in summer, captured with a fisheye lens. A woman in white clothes is prominently featured in the lower center of the screen, captured from the upper body down to her feet. The person stands on a narrow road in front of the station, leaning forward slightly as if approaching the camera. A green and cream-colored train is in the background to the right, a stone wall and station sign are on the left, and a blue sky and overhead power lines spread across the top.

Person/Expression:
A natural and realistic woman. Shoulder-length dark brown bob hair, thin see-through bangs, and slightly inward-curled strands around the face. Transparent Japanese-style natural makeup with pale pink-beige lips, fine eyelashes, soft tear bags, and modest blush. Her face is directed towards the camera, looking up with calm eyes while tilting her head slightly. The mouth is smiling just a tiny bit.

Clothing/Pose:
{argument name="clothing" default="White off-the-shoulder mini dress"}. Thin ruffles at the chest and cuffs, a small ribbon at the center front, and light wrinkles in the thin cotton material. A cream-colored crochet tote bag on her left shoulder, and beige platform sandals on her feet. Her body is slightly folded towards the foreground, arms are relaxed and hanging naturally downwards, and hands are placed near the front of her thighs. Fingers are not spread too wide, falling naturally with gravity. Knees are lightly together, and feet are slightly inward.

Background/Light:
Station front along the railway on a sunny afternoon. Old stone wall on the left, a green station sign, hydrangea leaves, and small flowers. In the background to the right, a {argument name="background train" default="retro green and cream-colored train"} is stopped or moving slowly, a yellow and black railroad crossing bar, and the blurred silhouette of a person walking in the distance. Overlapping power lines and utility poles cross overhead. Strong summer sunlight enters from the top right, creating bright highlights on the hair surface, shoulders, and white clothes. Leaf shadows and a dark shadow of the person fall on the ground.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical composition, ultra-wide fisheye lens. The camera looks down from a slightly higher position than the person at a close distance. The outer edge of the screen is surrounded by black circular fisheye vignetting, clear at the center and heavily distorted at the edges. The person's face is near the center of the screen, and feet are at the bottom center. The background tracks, road, and power lines curve as if being sucked into the distance, creating a strong sense of perspective. Focus is on the face and clothes, with the background slightly blurred.

Texture/Style:
A realistic photo taken with a professional camera. Carefully depicts the bright summer air, natural skin texture, thinness of the white cloth, fine irregularities of the asphalt, and the metallic feel of the train. Colors center on the contrast of white, deep green, blue sky, and sunlight, creating a clean and slightly nostalgic Japanese street photo. No excessive skin correction, natural lens distortion, and a light film feel.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fusion of hands and feet, broken joints, unnatural gravity, floating, broken clothes, deformed bag, overly distorted train, incorrect perspective, shadows contradicting the light source, garbled characters, logo, watermark, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏季铁路鱼眼人像
zh.description: 一个详细的鱼眼镜头提示词，捕捉怀旧的日本夏季场景。画面中一位身穿白色连衣裙的女性站在铁轨旁，背景是一列复古的绿色火车，强调明亮的阳光和深邃的阴影。
zh.prompt:
主题：
{argument name="subject" default="铁轨旁的夏天"}

主体：
竖构图照片。用鱼眼镜头捕捉的夏季小车站人像。画面下方中心位置突出显示了一位身穿白色服装的女性，从上半身到脚部均在画面中。她站在车站前狭窄的道路上，身体微微前倾，仿佛正在靠近镜头。背景右侧是一列绿白相间的火车，左侧是石墙和车站站牌，顶部则是蓝天和交错的电线。

人物/表情：
自然写实的女性。齐肩深棕色波波头，薄薄的空气刘海，脸颊两侧有微微内扣的发丝。透明感的日系自然妆容，淡粉米色嘴唇，睫毛纤细，卧蚕柔和，腮红淡雅。她面向镜头，眼神平静地向上看，微微歪着头。嘴角带着一丝浅浅的微笑。

服装/姿势：
{argument name="clothing" default="白色露肩迷你连衣裙"}。胸口和袖口有细褶边，前襟中心有一个小蝴蝶结，轻薄的棉质面料上有细微的褶皱。左肩背着一个米色钩针编织手提袋，脚穿米色厚底凉鞋。身体略微向前景折叠，双臂自然下垂，双手放在大腿前侧。手指没有过度张开，随重力自然垂落。双膝微靠，双脚略微内扣。

背景/光影：
阳光明媚的午后，铁路沿线的车站前。左侧是古老的石墙、绿色站牌、绣球花叶和零星小花。背景右侧是一列 {argument name="background train" default="复古绿白相间火车"} 正在停靠或缓慢行驶，还有黄黑相间的铁路道口栏杆，以及远处模糊的行人剪影。头顶上方是交错的电线和电线杆。强烈的夏季阳光从右上角射入，在发丝表面、肩膀和白色衣物上形成明亮的高光。叶影和人物的深色阴影投射在地面上。

构图/相机：
竖构图，超广角鱼眼镜头。相机从近距离略高于人物的位置俯拍。画面外缘被黑色的圆形鱼眼暗角包围，中心清晰，边缘有强烈的畸变。人物面部位于画面中心附近，脚部位于底部中心。背景的铁轨、道路和电线仿佛被吸入远方，营造出强烈的透视感。焦点对准面部和衣物，背景略微虚化。

质感/风格：
由专业相机拍摄的写实照片。细腻地描绘了明亮的夏季空气感、自然的皮肤纹理、白色布料的轻薄感、沥青路面的细微不平以及火车的金属质感。色彩以白色、深绿色、蓝天和阳光的对比为核心，营造出干净且略带怀旧感的日系街拍风格。无过度磨皮，保留自然的镜头畸变，带有轻微的胶片感。

负面提示词：
不自然的面部，不自然的视线，多余的手指，缺失的手指，手脚融合，关节断裂，不符合重力，漂浮，破损的衣物，变形的包，过度扭曲的火车，错误的透视，与光源矛盾的阴影，乱码，Logo，水印，过度磨皮，塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Realistic Outfit Reference Converter
en.description: A sophisticated prompt for GPT Image 2 to transform anime or illustration outfits into realistic product reference images on transparent mannequins.
en.prompt: Image 1 is a photograph of a transparent mannequin titled 'Outfit Reference', featuring a Front Shot and a Back Shot side by side. Image 2 is a reference image for the outfit design. Please handle images of any style, such as live-action, illustrations, anime, CG, or sketches. You are to act as a professional clothing analyst, apparel pattern maker, and product photographer. [Objective] Accurately interpret only the outfit of the person shown or depicted in Image 2, reconstruct it as a high-quality, real-world garment, and generate a product reference image placed on the transparent mannequin from Image 1. Target the complete coordination, including clothing, shoes, legwear, hats, belts, and accessories. However, completely ignore bags and luggage. [Absolute Prohibitions] - Do not reflect the face, hairstyle, skin tone, body shape, makeup, expression, or pose of the person in Image 2 in the output. - Do not replace the mannequin with human skin or a human body. - Do not lose the texture of the transparent mannequin. - Do not make the outfit look anime-style, CG-style, cosplay-like, or like cheap plastic. - Avoid flat coloring, overly uniform surfaces, and artificial-looking gloss. [Composition] Maintain exactly the same layout as Image 1. - Left half: Front Shot. - Right half: Back Shot. - Reproduce the text labels 'Outfit Reference', '▼Front Shot', and '▼Back Shot' at the top of the image. - The background must be the same solid green back background as Image 1. - Maintain the mannequin's pose, transparency, proportions, joint positions, and standing position. - Fit the outfit naturally to the mannequin's body shape so that the 3D volume of the bust and the slenderness of the waist are clearly identifiable even when the clothes are worn. [Clothing Analysis] Read all of the following elements from Image 2: 1. Item composition: Tops, bottoms, dresses, rompers, outerwear, innerwear, etc. 2. Silhouette: Tight, regular, oversized, A-line, bodycon, flare, etc. 3. Neckline: V-neck, crew neck, square neck, halter, off-the-shoulder, open collar, etc. 4. Sleeves: Sleeveless, short sleeves, long sleeves, puff sleeves, bell sleeves, sheer sleeves, etc. 5. Front closure: Buttons, zippers, hooks, lace-up, wrap, pullover, etc. 6. Pockets: Position, shape, number, flap, patch, slash, cargo, etc. 7. Waist: Belts, corsets, elastic, drawstrings, waist seams, darts, etc. 8. Hem: Length, curve, slits, ruffles, ribbing, raw edges, pleats, etc. 9. Decoration: Embroidery, prints, lace, studs, eyelets, chains, ribbons, ruffles, patches, etc. 10. Shoes: Type, height, material, heel, sole, buckles, laces, metal fittings, etc. 11. Legwear: Socks, tights, stockings, garters, fishnets, etc. 12. Accessories: Hats, chokers, necklaces, bracelets, belts, gloves, etc. 13. Color and color scheme: Main color, accent colors, patterns, gradients, metallic colors, etc. [Backside Completion] If the back is not shown in Image 2, complete it naturally based on the front structure and general garment design. Design the collar, shoulder lines, sleeve attachments, side seams, waist seams, hem lines, zipper positions, back pockets, and back darts without contradiction. [Conversion to Real Materials] Even if Image 2 is in an illustration or anime style, replace that design with materials that would work as real-world garments. While remaining faithful to the colors of the original image, adjust the saturation, brightness, and texture to look natural as real fabric. Estimate the best material from the appearance and describe realistic surface textures such as: - Cotton: Fine plain weave, slight fuzziness, matte diffuse reflection. - Cotton Twill: Diagonal weave, natural stiffness with some thickness. - Denim: Indigo color variations, white warp threads, stiff fold wrinkles, 3D stitch effect. - Satin: Smooth, liquid-like gloss, directional highlights. - Silk: Soft flowing luster, thin and supple drape. - Polyester: Light semi-gloss, fine fiber feel that is not too uniform. - Leather: Natural grain, thickness, swelling around seams, elegant semi-gloss. - Enamel: Strong specular reflection, sharp highlights, hard surface. - Chiffon: Sheerness, airy lightness, density in overlapping areas. - Organza: Stiff transparency, hard reflections. - Lace: 3D thread feel, openwork patterns, fine irregularities on the edges. - Knit: Stitches, ribbing, tension from stretching, soft shadows. - Wool: Napped feel, matte surface, thick drape. - Mesh: Regularity of holes, shadows in overlapping parts, tension of elastic material. [Sewing and Details] To make the outfit look like a genuine high-end apparel product, carefully depict the following: - Topstitching, double stitching, edging stitches. - Sewing thread in buttonholes. - Metallic feel of zipper teeth, sliders, and pulls. - Weight and reflection of eyelets, buckles, studs, and chains. - Darts, princess lines, side seams, shoulder lines, and seam lines. - Hem folds, seam allowances, and slight visibility of the lining. - Edge finishing of lace and ruffles. - Shoe soles, heels, stitching, leather grain, and metal hardware texture. [Wear Wrinkles and Fit] Add natural wrinkles and tension for each material according to the mannequin's body shape. - Soft materials: Fine, shallow wrinkles, smooth drapes along the body. - Hard materials: Large fold wrinkles, structural stiffness. - Thick materials: Weight falling downward due to gravity, thickness around seams. - Thin materials: Light floating feel, sheerness in overlaps, delicate swaying. Locations for wrinkles: Underarms, around the bust, waist narrowing, back of elbows, pocket openings, crotch, back of knees, hem, shoe openings. [Bust and Waist Fit Expression] The outfit should naturally fit the 3D shape of the transparent mannequin's unique body type. - The size of the bust must be clearly visible through the clothes. - Include natural tension lines in horizontal and diagonal directions near the apex of the bust. - Express the 3D form through darts, princess lines, elasticity, and seam tension. - In the case of button-front closures, suggest light tension between buttons around the bust area. - Naturally express the line that narrows sharply from under the bust to the slim waist. - Ensure the presence of the bust is recognizable from the tension of the fabric on the sides and the side lines even in back shots. - However, do not make the clothes look torn, poorly sized, or extremely unnatural. [Lighting and Shooting Quality] The output should be a high-quality photograph, like a lookbook or product shoot for a real apparel brand. - Natural shadows from studio lighting. - Appropriate shadows in wrinkle valleys, back of collars, under pockets, and deep in pleats. - Matte materials have subtle diffuse reflection. - Glossy materials have clear highlights according to the material. - Semi-glossy materials have soft reflections. - Metal parts have small, sharp reflections. - The boundary between the transparent mannequin and the outfit should look natural. - Detailed density that can withstand close-ups. [Final Quality] The final image should be a reconstruction of the outfit design from Image 2 as a high-quality, real-world garment. It should have the material, sewing, weight, gloss, wrinkles, and fit as if produced by a real brand, rather than a cheap cosplay costume.

zh.title: 写实服装参考转换器
zh.description: 一个用于 GPT Image 2 的高级提示词，旨在将动漫或插画风格的服装转换为透明人体模型上的写实产品参考图。
zh.prompt: 图 1 是一张名为“Outfit Reference”的透明人体模型照片，并排展示了正面照和背面照。图 2 是服装设计的参考图。请处理任何风格的图像，例如真人实拍、插画、动漫、CG 或草图。你需要扮演一名专业的服装分析师、服装打版师和产品摄影师。[目标] 仅准确解读图 2 中人物所穿或描绘的服装，将其重构为高质量的现实世界服装，并生成放置在图 1 透明人体模型上的产品参考图。目标涵盖完整的搭配，包括服装、鞋子、腿部服饰、帽子、腰带和配饰。但是，请完全忽略包袋和行李。[绝对禁止事项] - 输出中不得反映图 2 中人物的面部、发型、肤色、体型、妆容、表情或姿势。 - 不得用真人皮肤或人体替换人体模型。 - 不得丢失透明人体模型的质感。 - 不得使服装看起来像动漫风格、CG 风格、Cosplay 或廉价塑料感。 - 避免平涂颜色、过于均匀的表面以及人工合成的廉价光泽。[构图] 保持与图 1 完全相同的布局。 - 左半部分：正面照。 - 右半部分：背面照。 - 在图像顶部重现文字标签“Outfit Reference”、“▼Front Shot”和“▼Back Shot”。 - 背景必须与图 1 相同的纯绿色背景一致。 - 保持人体模型的姿势、透明度、比例、关节位置和站立位置。 - 将服装自然地贴合在人体模型的体型上，以便即使在穿着衣服时，也能清晰辨认出胸部的 3D 体积感和腰部的纤细感。[服装分析] 从图 2 中读取以下所有要素： 1. 单品构成：上装、下装、连衣裙、连体裤、外套、内搭等。 2. 轮廓：紧身、常规、廓形、A 字型、包臀、喇叭型等。 3. 领口：V 领、圆领、方领、挂脖、露肩、翻领等。 4. 袖子：无袖、短袖、长袖、泡泡袖、喇叭袖、透视袖等。 5. 前襟：纽扣、拉链、挂钩、系带、裹身、套头等。 6. 口袋：位置、形状、数量、翻盖、贴袋、斜插袋、工装袋等。 7. 腰部：腰带、束腰、松紧带、抽绳、腰线、省道等。 8. 下摆：长度、弧度、开叉、荷叶边、罗纹、毛边、褶皱等。 9. 装饰：刺绣、印花、蕾丝、铆钉、气眼、链条、丝带、荷叶边、贴布等。 10. 鞋子：类型、高度、材质、鞋跟、鞋底、扣环、鞋带、金属配件等。 11. 腿部服饰：袜子、连裤袜、长筒袜、吊带袜、网袜等。 12. 配饰：帽子、颈圈、项链、手链、腰带、手套等。 13. 颜色与配色：主色、点缀色、图案、渐变、金属色等。[背面补全] 如果图 2 未显示背面，请根据正面结构和一般服装设计自然地补全。在不产生矛盾的前提下，设计领口、肩线、袖笼、侧缝、腰线、下摆线、拉链位置、后口袋和后省道。[转换为真实材质] 即使图 2 是插画或动漫风格，也要将其设计替换为在现实世界中可行的服装材质。在忠实于原图颜色的同时，调整饱和度、亮度和纹理，使其看起来像真实的布料。根据外观评估最佳材质，并描述逼真的表面纹理，例如： - 棉：细平纹，轻微绒毛感，哑光漫反射。 - 棉斜纹：斜纹编织，自然的挺括感，具有一定厚度。 - 牛仔：靛蓝色变化，白色经纱，硬挺的折痕，3D 缝线效果。 - 缎面：光滑，液态般的光泽，具有方向性的高光。 - 真丝：柔软流动的光泽，轻薄且柔顺的垂坠感。 - 聚酯纤维：轻微半光泽，细密的纤维感，不过于均匀。 - 皮革：天然纹理，厚实感，接缝处有隆起，优雅的半光泽。 - 漆皮：强烈的镜面反射，锐利的高光，坚硬的表面。 - 雪纺：透视感，空气般的轻盈，重叠处有密度感。 - 欧根纱：硬挺的透明感，坚硬的反射。 - 蕾丝：立体的线感，镂空图案，边缘有细微的不规则感。 - 针织：线圈纹理，罗纹，拉伸时的张力，柔和的阴影。 - 羊毛：绒面感，哑光表面，厚实的垂坠感。 - 网眼：孔洞的规律性，重叠部分的阴影，弹性材质的张力。[缝纫与细节] 为了使服装看起来像真正的高端服装产品，请仔细描绘以下内容： - 明线、双针线、边缘缝线。 - 扣眼处的缝纫线。 - 拉链齿、拉头和拉片的金属质感。 - 气眼、扣环、铆钉和链条的重量感与反射。 - 省道、公主线、侧缝、肩线和接缝线。 - 下摆折边、缝份以及内衬的轻微可见度。 - 蕾丝和荷叶边的边缘处理。 - 鞋底、鞋跟、缝线、皮革纹理和金属五金质感。[穿着褶皱与贴合度] 根据人体模型的体型，为每种材质添加自然的褶皱和张力。 - 柔软材质：细小、浅显的褶皱，顺着身体自然的垂坠。 - 硬挺材质：大的折痕，结构性的僵硬感。 - 厚重材质：受重力影响向下坠落，接缝处有厚度感。 - 轻薄材质：轻盈的飘浮感，重叠处的透视感，细腻的摆动。褶皱位置：腋下、胸部周围、腰部收紧处、肘部后方、口袋开口、裆部、膝盖后方、下摆、鞋口。[胸部与腰部贴合表现] 服装应自然贴合透明人体模型独特体型的 3D 形状。 - 胸部的大小必须能通过衣服清晰可见。 - 在胸部顶点附近包含水平和对角方向的自然张力线。 - 通过省道、公主线、弹性和接缝张力来表现 3D 形状。 - 对于前襟纽扣设计，在胸部周围的纽扣间表现出轻微的张力。 - 自然地表现出从胸下到纤细腰部急剧收紧的线条。 - 确保即使在背面照中，也能通过侧面布料的张力和侧缝线识别出胸部的存在。 - 但是，不要让衣服看起来破损、尺码不合或极其不自然。[光照与拍摄质量] 输出应为高质量的照片，如同真实服装品牌的型录或产品拍摄。 - 摄影棚灯光带来的自然阴影。 - 褶皱凹陷处、领口后方、口袋下方以及褶裥深处的适当阴影。 - 哑光材质具有细微的漫反射。 - 光泽材质根据材质具有清晰的高光。 - 半光泽材质具有柔和的反射。 - 金属部件具有细小、锐利的反射。 - 透明人体模型与服装之间的边界应看起来自然。 - 能够经受近距离观察的细节密度。[最终质量] 最终图像应将图 2 的服装设计重构为高质量的现实世界服装。它应具备如同真实品牌生产的材质、缝纫、重量、光泽、褶皱和贴合度，而非廉价的 Cosplay 服装。

en.title: Japanese Woman on Traditional Veranda Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a realistic portrait of a young Japanese woman standing on the wooden veranda of a traditional house, featuring soft natural light and a blurred garden background.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Profile dissolving into greenery

Main Subject:
A vertical 4:5 photograph. A {argument name="age and gender" default="20-year-old woman"} is positioned largely in the center-right of the frame. The upper body to below the knees occupies most of the screen, with shoji screens and wooden frames on the left, and a wooden handrail stretching into the distance on the right. The background is a deep green garden, heavily blurred.

Character and Expression:
A natural and realistic woman. Clear skin, {argument name="hairstyle" default="short dark brown bob"}, with soft bangs falling around the face. Elegant Japanese-style natural makeup with light pink-beige lips, subtle blush, and clear eyes. The face is turned toward the left, a quiet profile looking into the distance. The mouth is not closed too tightly, showing a calm and lingering expression.

Clothing and Pose:
An {argument name="outfit" default="elegant white chiffon camisole dress"}. Drapes of thin overlapping fabric flow diagonally from the chest to the waist, not too transparent, catching light softly. The right hand rests lightly on the wooden handrail on the right, fingers naturally extended. The left hand lightly pinches the fabric in front of the waist, creating fine wrinkles and layers in the drape. Weight is shifted toward the right side of the screen, with a slight twist in the shoulders and waist. While maintaining the original atmosphere, the pose is changed slightly and naturally.

Background and Light:
An engawa (veranda) of a Japanese house. Shoji doors and dark wooden frames on the left, eaves shadows above, and the greenery of a well-kept garden in the back right. A building with a small tiled roof is visible dimly in the distance. The background is treated with large bokeh and soft green gradients. Slightly warm morning natural light shines from the top right, adding faint highlights to the shoulders, cheeks, hair contours, and the edges of the white fabric. The interior side is slightly darker, with soft reflected light from the garden hitting the skin.

Composition and Camera:
A vertical portrait taken with a professional camera. 85mm lens, shallow depth of field around F1.8. Focus is on the face and upper body, with the background garden, tiled roof, and the depth of the handrail beautifully blurred. The camera is roughly at eye level from chest height. Depth is created by the shoji on the left and the handrail on the right, with the profile and diagonal drapes leading the eye.

Texture and Style:
Realistic photographic expression. Skin is not overly processed, leaving natural texture and soft highlights. White chiffon carefully expresses overlapping thin layers, light transmission, and fine wrinkles. Wood is a calm brown, conveying the atmosphere of the veranda. Tones are centered on green and white, low contrast and soft, with an elegant and quiet finish like a magazine photo.

Negative:
Underage-looking person, excessive exposure, nudity, lingerie impression, sexual emphasis, unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor contact between cloth and body, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, garbled background text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 日本女性传统缘侧肖像
zh.description: 一个高细节提示词，用于生成一位年轻日本女性站在传统日式房屋木质缘侧上的写实肖像，呈现柔和的自然光和虚化的庭院背景。
zh.prompt:
主体：
融入绿意的侧影

主要主体：
一张 4:5 的竖构图照片。一位 {argument name="age and gender" default="20 岁女性"} 位于画面中右侧偏中心位置。上半身至膝盖以下占据了大部分画面，左侧为障子门和木质框架，右侧为延伸至远处的木质扶手。背景是深度虚化的深绿色庭院。

人物与表情：
自然写实的女性形象。皮肤通透，{argument name="hairstyle" default="深棕色短波波头"}，柔软的刘海垂在脸颊周围。优雅的日式自然妆容，浅粉米色唇色，淡淡的腮红，眼神清澈。脸部朝向左侧，呈现出望向远方的宁静侧颜。嘴唇微张，流露出平静而悠长的神情。

服装与姿态：
身着 {argument name="outfit" default="优雅的白色雪纺吊带裙"}。轻薄的重叠布料从胸部斜向腰间垂坠，透光度适中，柔和地捕捉着光线。右手轻搭在右侧的木质扶手上，手指自然伸展。左手轻捏腰前的布料，在褶皱中形成细腻的层次感。重心偏向画面右侧，肩部和腰部有轻微的扭转。在保持原有氛围的同时，姿态呈现出自然细微的变化。

背景与光影：
日式房屋的缘侧。左侧是障子门和深色木框，上方有屋檐阴影，右后方是打理得井井有条的庭院绿植。远处隐约可见一座带有小瓦顶的建筑。背景经过大光圈虚化处理，呈现出柔和的绿色渐变。来自右上方的微暖晨间自然光照射下来，在肩膀、脸颊、发际轮廓以及白色布料边缘勾勒出淡淡的高光。室内一侧略显阴暗，来自庭院的柔和反射光映照在皮肤上。

构图与摄影：
使用专业相机拍摄的竖构图肖像。85mm 镜头，F1.8 左右的浅景深。焦点集中在脸部和上半身，背景的庭院、瓦顶以及延伸的扶手呈现出优美的虚化效果。相机高度大约在胸部水平的视线高度。左侧的障子门和右侧的扶手营造出空间深度，侧颜和斜向的褶皱引导着视觉重心。

质感与风格：
写实摄影风格。皮肤未经过度处理，保留了自然的纹理和柔和的高光。白色雪纺细腻地表现出轻薄的层次感、透光性以及细微的褶皱。木材呈现沉稳的棕色，传达出缘侧的氛围。色调以绿色和白色为主，低对比度且柔和，呈现出如杂志照片般优雅而宁静的质感。

负面提示词：
看起来未成年、过度暴露、裸露、内衣感、性暗示、不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、手指缺失、肢体融合、关节断裂、布料与身体接触不良、不符合重力规律、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、背景文字乱码、Logo、水印、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Japanese Nendoroid Style Miniature Figure
en.description: Transform photos of people into adorable Japanese Nendoroid-style miniature figures with chibi proportions and realistic PVC textures.
en.prompt: "Convert the {argument name="people" default="baby siblings"} in the photo into Japanese miniature figures ({argument name="figure style" default="Nendoroid style"}, SD ratio). - Cute chibi proportions with large heads and small bodies - Smooth PVC/vinyl texture with subtle gloss - Large eyes and soft, lovely expressions, maintaining original facial features and hairstyle - Standing on a transparent acrylic base - Product photo composition with a figure box package placed next to it - Studio lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field - Simple white or light gradient background - Realistic textures and details like an actual figure photo"

zh.title: 日式 Nendoroid 风格微缩手办
zh.description: 将人物照片转换为拥有可爱 Q 版比例和逼真 PVC 质感的日式 Nendoroid 风格微缩手办。
zh.prompt: “将照片中的 {argument name="people" default="宝宝兄弟姐妹"} 转换为日式微缩手办（{argument name="figure style" default="Nendoroid 风格"}，SD 比例）。- 可爱的 Q 版比例，大头小身 - 光滑的 PVC/乙烯基质感，带有细腻的光泽 - 大眼睛和柔和可爱的表情，同时保留原始的面部特征和发型 - 站立在透明亚克力底座上 - 产品摄影构图，旁边放置着手办包装盒 - 影棚灯光，柔和阴影，浅景深 - 简洁的白色或浅色渐变背景 - 逼真的质感和细节，如同真实的手办摄影”

en.title: Vintage Luxury Mansion Fashion Portrait
en.description: A high-fashion photography prompt for a woman in a vintage luxury mansion, emphasizing realistic textures, cinematic lighting, and elegant poses.
en.prompt:
Realistic vertical fashion portrait, warm vintage {argument name="location" default="mansion"} interior. Adult East Asian female, over {argument name="age" default="21 years old"}, standing barefoot on a polished dark wood floor next to an exquisite wooden staircase handrail. Slightly to the right, full-body shot from feet to head, elegant three-quarter pose towards the camera. Soft, confident, relaxed expression - gentle direct gaze, natural eyeliner, glowing skin, light peach blush, subtle rose pink lip color.

Character: Extremely long dark brown wavy hair, soft volume, falling over one shoulder and extending to the back. One hand lightly raised touching the hair on the side of the head; the other hand near the waist - elegant fashion pose. Dignified, slightly curved posture - one leg relaxed, the other slightly bent.

Clothing: Stylish {argument name="clothing color" default="black"} sleeveless cropped top - high neckline with a small keyhole cutout near the collar. Loose black wide-leg harem pants. Featured gold chain belt at the waist - layered hanging coins, circular links, central designer-style badge pendant - luxury bohemian embellishment. Gold bracelet and delicate dangling earrings. Refined, modern, slightly exotic - emphasizing the drape of black fabric, gold jewelry details, and elegant silhouette.

Scene: Luxurious old-world interior - dark carved wood wall panels, polished wooden staircase handrail with circular pillars, rich burgundy velvet curtains next to tall narrow windows, warm light halo in the background, overall dark brown wood texture. Camera slightly tilted - cinematic diagonal composition - dark wooden door frame softly framing the edges of the image.

Lighting: Warm, moody, cinematic - soft daylight from tall windows behind, warm indoor lighting adding golden highlights. Soft rim light on hair, shoulders, arms, waist, chain belt, and polished handrail. Shallow depth of field, delicate shadows, realistic skin texture, clear fabric folds, fine wood grain, exquisite luxury photography quality.

Style: Hyper-realistic vintage mansion fashion photography, adult model, black cropped top, loose black trousers, gold chain belt, barefoot elegant pose, dark carved wood interior, burgundy curtains, warm cinematic lighting, old-world luxury atmosphere, high detail, vertical aspect ratio. No text, no watermark, no logo, no extra people, no deformed bodies, no cartoonish feel, no strong flash, no cluttered elements, no explicit nudity.

zh.title: 复古奢华宅邸时尚肖像
zh.description: 一个关于女性在复古奢华宅邸中的高级时尚摄影提示词，强调逼真的质感、电影级光影和优雅的姿态。
zh.prompt:
逼真的竖版时尚肖像，温暖的复古 {argument name="location" default="宅邸"} 室内环境。成年东亚女性，年龄超过 {argument name="age" default="21 岁"}，赤脚站在抛光的深色木地板上，旁边是精致的木制楼梯扶手。略微偏右，从脚到头的全身照，优雅的三分之四侧身面向镜头。柔和、自信、放松的表情——温柔的直视目光，自然的眼线，透亮的肌肤，淡淡的桃色腮红，细腻的玫瑰粉唇色。

人物：极长的深棕色波浪卷发，蓬松柔软，垂在一侧肩头并延伸至背后。一只手轻轻抬起触碰头部侧面的头发；另一只手靠近腰部——优雅的时尚姿态。端庄、略微弯曲的体态——一条腿放松，另一条腿微屈。

服装：时尚的 {argument name="clothing color" default="黑色"} 无袖短款上衣——高领设计，领口附近有小钥匙孔镂空。宽松的黑色阔腿哈伦裤。腰间配有特色金链腰带——层叠的挂币、圆形链环、中央设计师风格的徽章吊坠——奢华的波西米亚装饰。金手镯和精致的垂坠耳环。精致、现代、略带异域风情——强调黑色面料的垂坠感、金饰细节和优雅的轮廓。

场景：奢华的旧世界室内空间——深色雕花木墙板、带有圆形立柱的抛光木制楼梯扶手、高窄窗旁浓郁的酒红色天鹅绒窗帘、背景中温暖的光晕，整体呈现深棕色木质纹理。相机略微倾斜——电影级的对角线构图——深色木门框柔和地勾勒出图像边缘。

光影：温暖、情绪化、电影感——来自身后高窗的柔和日光，温暖的室内照明增添了金色高光。头发、肩膀、手臂、腰部、链条腰带和抛光扶手上的柔和轮廓光。浅景深，细腻的阴影，逼真的皮肤纹理，清晰的织物褶皱，细腻的木纹，精致的奢华摄影品质。

风格：超写实复古宅邸时尚摄影，成年模特，黑色短款上衣，黑色宽松长裤，金链腰带，赤脚优雅姿态，深色雕花木质内饰，酒红色窗帘，温暖的电影级光影，旧世界奢华氛围，高细节，竖向比例。无文字，无水印，无 Logo，无额外人物，无畸形身体，无卡通感，无强闪光，无杂乱元素，无露骨裸露。

en.title: Japanese Street Portrait: Runner Stance
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for a realistic Japanese portrait of a woman in a runner's start pose on a city crosswalk during morning hours.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="Serenity of White Lines"}

Main Body:
Vertical 2:3 realistic photograph. On a calm street corner crosswalk, an adult woman takes a low runner-start-like pose, placed significantly in the center-right of the frame. Her upper body and face are the main focus of the upper half of the frame, with her hands, knees, and sneakers extending downward to create depth.

Character/Expression:
A natural and realistic mature woman. Bright, translucent skin with a subtle glow and natural complexion. Hair is a high dark brown ponytail, with thin bangs and stray hairs around the face glowing thinly under the light. Elegant Japanese-style makeup with pale pink-beige blush, thin eyeliner, long eyelashes, natural tear bags, and moist pink-beige lips. Face turned to the right, eyes looking slightly ahead, and mouth slightly open in a focused expression.

Clothing/Pose:
{argument name="clothing" default="A white camisole with small floral patterns and matching shorts"}. A sheer white thin shirt is worn loosely over it, hanging slightly off the shoulders. Body type is a mature, healthy balance with natural three-dimensionality. Right knee raised forward, left knee close to the ground, with fingertips spread and touching near the white lines of the crosswalk. White sneakers are slightly further back, with the center of gravity of the leaning posture resting on both arms. Clothing hems and sleeves sag slightly according to the pose, creating soft wrinkles near the wrists.

Background/Light:
Background is {argument name="location" default="a quiet urban alley lined with old shops and low-rise buildings"}. A wooden-style shop front on the back right, roadside trees and road signs on the back left, and shadows of pedestrians in the distance. Text on signs is blurred and unreadable. Clear natural light from morning to late morning, with slightly strong sunlight hitting from the top left, creating highlights on the hair outline, cheeks, shoulders, and arms. The road surface features a overlap of crosswalk white lines and building shadows, with the background softly separated by bright green and gray bokeh.

Composition/Camera:
Close-range shot from a low angle. Shallow depth of field equivalent to 85mm, focusing on the face, upper body, and the hand placed forward. The woman's arms spread to the bottom left and right, with white lines running diagonally to guide the eye to the face. The top of the frame leaves space for the cityscape and sunbeams, with the background heavily blurred. The subject does not go off-frame, but it's a close-up portrait composition.

Texture/Style:
A realistic Japanese portrait as if taken with a professional camera. Skin is not over-processed, leaving natural pores and soft highlights. The white sheer shirt has a semi-transparent fiber texture, the camisole is a smooth fabric, and the road surface expresses fine asphalt particles. Bright and clean color tones, shallow bokeh, natural back-lit rim lighting, and a magazine-quality finish.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fusion of hands and feet, joint collapse, poor tool contact, floating, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with the light source, garbled text, readable logos, watermarks, overexposure, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 日系清晨街头人像
zh.description: 这是一个高度详细的提示词，用于生成在清晨街头背景下，具有写实日系风格的女性人像。内容涵盖了特定的光影、衣物纹理及专注的神情，专为专业摄影美学而优化。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="白线上的静谧"}

主要对象：
一张写实的 2:3 竖构图照片。在安静的街角人行横道上，一位成年女性摆出类似短跑起跑的低姿态，主体位于画面中右侧。上半身和面部是上半部分的焦点，双手、膝盖和运动鞋向下延伸，营造出空间深度。

人物/表情：
一位自然、写实的成熟女性。皮肤清透亮泽，带有细腻的光感和自然的红润。深棕色头发扎成高马尾，细碎的刘海和脸颊旁的碎发捕捉着光线。优雅的日系妆容：淡粉米色腮红、细眼线、长睫毛、自然的卧蚕，以及水润的粉米色双唇。她面向右侧，视线略微向前，带着 {argument name="expression" default="专注的神情，双唇微张"}。

服装/姿势：
{argument name="clothing" default="带有小碎花的白色吊带背心"} 和配套短裤。外面随意披着一件轻薄的白色透视衬衫，从肩部微微滑落。体态为健康、成熟的成年女性，线条自然。右膝在前，左膝接近地面，指尖撑在人行横道线附近。白色运动鞋位置略靠后，身体重心置于双臂，呈现前倾姿势。袖口和下摆随姿势自然褶皱。

背景/光影：
背景是安静的城市小巷，有老式店铺和低矮建筑。右侧是木质风格的店面，左侧有树木和路标，远处有模糊的行人剪影。招牌文字模糊不可辨认。左上方的清晨明亮光线在她的头发、脸颊、肩膀和手臂上形成高光。人行横道线与建筑阴影在地面交错，背景通过明亮的绿色和灰色虚化效果柔和地分离。

构图/相机：
低角度近摄。相当于 85mm 镜头的浅景深，聚焦于面部、上半身和双手。双臂向画面底部角落延伸，白线引导视线至面部。顶部留白以展示城市景观和斑驳阳光，背景有强烈的虚化效果。这是一种主体完全处于画面内的特写人像构图。

纹理/风格：
如同专业相机拍摄的写实日系人像。皮肤未经过度处理，保留了自然的毛孔和柔和的高光。白色透视衬衫具有半透明的纤维质感，吊带背心呈现出顺滑的布料质感，地面显示出细微的沥青颗粒。明亮、干净的色调，浅景深虚化，自然的背光式轮廓光，呈现出杂志级的质感。

负面提示词：
面部不自然、眼神不自然、多指、缺指、肢体融合、关节断裂、与物体接触不良、漂浮、重力不自然、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、乱码文字、可辨认的标志、水印、过度曝光、皮肤过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Apartment Night Emotion Portrait
en.description: Moody, high-detail photography prompt focusing on a young woman's expression in a quiet apartment setting.
en.prompt:
Close-up portrait, 85mm f/1.4, a {argument name="subject" default="young East Asian woman"} in her early 20s seated on the floor beside a low sofa, knees drawn up, back against the wall below the window, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment.

Almond-shaped dark eyes with a slightly downward cast, gaze aimed at her own hands in her lap, not at camera. High, clear forehead. Naturally straight black hair parted loosely in the center, some strands falling across cheek. Skin tone fair, subsurface scattering visible in diffused side light, faint redness at outer corners of eyes as if from tiredness, natural pores visible, no makeup except faint lip color.

She wears an {argument name="outfit" default="oversized pale grey cotton long-sleeve shirt"}, collar wide and slipping to one side, revealing collarbone. Both hands loosely clasped in lap, no gesture or tension. Two or three stray hairs across forehead, natural and unplanned.

{argument name="lighting style" default="Overcast late afternoon window light"} falling at low angle across the room, cool-warm neutral palette, very low saturation, Fuji Classic Chrome muted rendering, olive-grey shadows, soft ivory skin tones faded slightly. Subtle ISO 400 film grain throughout, photographic texture not CG render smoothness.

Aspect ratio 9:16. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.

zh.title: 公寓夜间情感肖像
zh.description: 忧郁、高细节的摄影提示词，聚焦于安静公寓环境中年轻女性的神情。
zh.prompt:
特写肖像，85mm f/1.4，一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻东亚女性"}，20 岁出头，坐在低矮沙发旁的地板上，双膝蜷起，背靠窗下的墙壁，真实的日常生活摄影，自然的抓拍瞬间。

杏仁状的深色眼睛略微低垂，视线落在膝上的双手，而非镜头。额头高而清晰。自然直顺的黑发中分，几缕发丝垂在脸颊上。肤色白皙，在漫射的侧光下可见次表面散射，眼角有因疲惫而产生的淡淡红晕，可见自然毛孔，除淡淡唇色外未施粉黛。

她穿着一件 {argument name="outfit" default="超大款浅灰色棉质长袖衬衫"}，领口宽大并滑向一侧，露出锁骨。双手在膝上松弛地交叠，没有多余的动作或紧张感。额前有两三缕凌乱的发丝，显得自然且不经意。

{argument name="lighting style" default="阴天午后的窗光"} 以低角度洒满房间，冷暖中性色调，极低的饱和度，Fuji Classic Chrome 柔和渲染，橄榄灰阴影，柔和的象牙色肤色略显褪色。画面中带有细微的 ISO 400 胶片颗粒感，呈现摄影质感而非 CG 渲染的平滑感。

长宽比 9:16。无水印，无文字覆盖，非卡通，非数字绘画，非插画，非动漫。

en.title:
提示词：

上传一张人像作为人物参考，将参考人物自然替换进原图场景。保留原图的构图、机位、动作、姿势
en.prompt: 上传一张人像作为人物参考，将参考人物自然替换进原图场景。保留原图的构图、机位、动作、姿势、表情、神态、眼神、手势和光影关系，人物面部特征与参考图高度一致，五官自然，不僵硬、不别扭。

zh.title:
提示词：

上传一张人像作为人物参考，将参考人物自然替换进原图场景。保留原图的构图、机位、动作、姿势
zh.prompt: 上传一张人像作为人物参考，将参考人物自然替换进原图场景。保留原图的构图、机位、动作、姿势、表情、神态、眼神、手势和光影关系，人物面部特征与参考图高度一致，五官自然，不僵硬、不别扭。

en.title: Reverse The Damage Product Ad Collage
en.description: A four-panel premium commercial visual showing laundry, vacuum, haircare, and skincare products reversing stains, dust, split ends, and dryness.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a premium 16:9 commercial advertising collage using the visual system “Reverse The Damage,” showing four different product ads where damage is visibly rewinding away from the hero product.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 image divided into exactly 4 equal panels in a 2-by-2 grid, separated by thick clean white gutters. Use cinematic studio lighting, high contrast, photorealistic product rendering, glossy reflections, shallow depth of field, and dramatic motion trails. Each product must remain perfectly still, large, sharply focused, centered or near-centered, instantly recognizable, and treated as the hero.

Overall concept: In every panel, the damaged material or debris is pulled backward and away from the product as if time is reversing. Use sweeping white airflow ribbons, streaks, particle trails, and directional motion blur to make the reversal obvious. The products are clean, untouched, and premium; the damage appears to be leaving the scene rather than arriving.

Panel count and contents: Use exactly 4 panels.
1. Top-left panel: {argument name="laundry detergent product" default="an orange Tide Ultra Oxi laundry detergent bottle with blue cap"} standing upright on a reflective dark surface in front of white fabric. Brown mud stains and dirt particles are being pulled backward off a white shirt on the left, transforming into clean bright fabric flowing to the right behind the bottle. Dark studio background, crisp product label, strong white motion streaks.
2. Top-right panel: {argument name="vacuum product" default="a Dyson cordless stick vacuum with purple and metallic accents"} standing upright on a wooden floor in a modern dim living room. A wave of dust, soil, pebbles, and debris is flying backward from left to right into a clean swept path behind the vacuum, with curved white air trails. Background includes a blurred plant and small furniture on the right.
3. Bottom-left panel: {argument name="haircare product" default="a black and gold Kérastase Chronologiste hair oil bottle"} centered on a dark glossy surface. Broken dry split hair fibers and brown splinter-like damage burst from the left, then reconnect into a smooth glossy flowing hair strand sweeping to the right behind the bottle. Black luxury background, gold highlights, elegant salon-beauty mood.
4. Bottom-right panel: {argument name="skincare product" default="a white CeraVe Moisturizing Cream jar with blue label"} sitting on a clean light surface. Dry cracked earth, flakes, and dusty skin-like texture on the left are being pulled backward and replaced by smooth silky white hydrated skin-like waves on the right. Soft beige background, bright clinical skincare lighting, clean medical beauty aesthetic.

Visual style: Premium commercial advertising, photorealistic, ultra-detailed product photography, cinematic rim light, volumetric glow, dynamic particles, sharp hero packaging, high-end retouching, no human models, no extra text overlays beyond product labels visible on packaging.

Constraints: Keep exactly four panels and exactly the four hero products described. Do not add captions, slogans, watermarks, logos outside the product packaging, hands, people, or extra panels. Make the reversal motion clear in each panel: damage on the left, clean restored material flowing on the right, with the hero product fixed and pristine in the center.

zh.title: “逆转损伤”产品广告拼图
zh.description: 一个四格高端商业视觉图，展示了洗衣液、吸尘器、护发产品和护肤品分别逆转污渍、灰尘、分叉和干燥损伤的过程。
zh.prompt:
目标：创建一个 16:9 的高端商业广告拼图，采用“逆转损伤”视觉系统，展示四种不同的产品广告，画面中损伤正从核心产品周围明显地向后回溯。

画布：水平 16:9 图像，通过粗而整洁的白色间隙精确划分为 2x2 网格的 4 个等分面板。使用电影级摄影棚灯光、高对比度、照片级产品渲染、光泽反射、浅景深和戏剧性的运动轨迹。每件产品必须保持完全静止、尺寸大、对焦清晰、居中或接近居中，且易于识别，作为画面核心。

整体概念：在每个面板中，受损的材料或碎屑仿佛时间倒流般被向后拉离产品。使用扫过的白色气流带、条纹、粒子轨迹和定向运动模糊，使逆转效果显而易见。产品保持洁净、未受损且高端；损伤看起来是在离开现场，而不是正在靠近。

面板数量及内容：使用精确的 4 个面板。
1. 左上角面板：{argument name="laundry detergent product" default="一瓶带有蓝色瓶盖的橙色 Tide Ultra Oxi 洗衣液"} 直立在白色织物前的反光深色表面上。棕色的泥渍和污垢颗粒正从左侧的白色衬衫上被向后拉离，转化为洁净明亮的织物，向瓶身右后方流动。深色摄影棚背景，清晰的产品标签，强烈的白色运动条纹。
2. 右上角面板：{argument name="vacuum product" default="一台带有紫色和金属质感装饰的 Dyson 无线吸尘器"} 直立在现代昏暗客厅的木地板上。一股灰尘、泥土、碎石和杂物正从左向右向后飞入吸尘器后方已清扫干净的路径中，伴有弯曲的白色气流轨迹。背景包含右侧模糊的植物和小型家具。
3. 左下角面板：{argument name="haircare product" default="一瓶黑金配色的 Kérastase Chronologiste 护发精油"} 居中放置在深色光亮表面上。断裂的干枯分叉发丝和棕色木刺状损伤从左侧迸发，随后重新连接成顺滑光泽的发丝，向瓶身右后方扫去。黑色奢华背景，金色高光，优雅的沙龙美学氛围。
4. 右下角面板：{argument name="skincare product" default="一罐带有蓝色标签的白色 CeraVe Moisturizing Cream 面霜"} 放置在洁净明亮的表面上。左侧干裂的土地、皮屑和灰尘般的皮肤质感正被向后拉离，并被右侧顺滑丝滑、水润的皮肤质感波浪所取代。柔和的米色背景，明亮的临床护肤灯光，纯净的医学美容美学。

视觉风格：高端商业广告，照片级真实感，超细节产品摄影，电影级轮廓光，体积光，动态粒子，清晰的核心包装，高端修图，无真人模特，包装标签之外无额外文字叠加。

约束条件：保持精确的四个面板，且仅包含所描述的四款核心产品。不要添加标题、标语、水印、包装外的标志、手、人物或额外的面板。确保每个面板中的逆转动作清晰：左侧为损伤，右侧为流动的洁净修复材料，核心产品在中心保持固定且完美无瑕。

en.title: Moody Red Velvet Fashion Portrait
en.description: A cinematic fashion portrait prompt for creating an elegant woman in a red velvet gown on a dark vintage sofa.
en.prompt: Create a cinematic vertical portrait photograph of a {argument name="subject" default="young East Asian woman"} seated on a black vintage tufted leather sofa against a dark, textured concrete wall. She wears a dramatic {argument name="dress color and style" default="deep crimson red velvet halter gown with a high neck, gathered draping, side cutouts, and a long flowing skirt"}. Pose her in a relaxed elegant three-quarter seated position: one arm raised with her hand in her tousled dark wavy ponytail, the other hand resting softly on her lap, head slightly tilted, looking directly at the camera with a calm alluring expression. Include exactly 2 visible accessories: small pearl drop earrings and a dark bracelet or hair tie on the raised wrist. Add exactly 2 sofa details: glossy black channel-tufted leather upholstery and a shaggy brown fur cushion on the left. Use moody low-key studio lighting with soft directional light from the upper right, gentle highlights on skin and velvet folds, deep shadows, subtle haze, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, and a refined fashion editorial mood. Vertical 9:16 composition, waist-to-knee framing with the red fabric cascading across the lower foreground, no text, no watermark.

zh.title: 深沉红丝绒时尚肖像
zh.description: 一个电影感时尚肖像提示词，用于创作一位身着红丝绒礼服、坐在复古深色沙发上的优雅女性。
zh.prompt: 创作一张电影感竖版肖像摄影作品，主角为一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻东亚女性"}，她坐在一张黑色复古簇绒皮沙发上，背景是深色纹理混凝土墙。她身着一件引人注目的 {argument name="dress color and style" default="深绯红色丝绒挂脖礼服，高领设计，带有褶皱垂坠感、侧面镂空以及长款飘逸裙摆"}。让她保持放松而优雅的四分之三侧坐姿势：一只手臂抬起，手放在凌乱的深色波浪马尾辫上，另一只手轻柔地放在膝盖上，头部微倾，直视镜头，表情冷静而迷人。包含恰好 2 个可见配饰：小巧的珍珠耳坠，以及抬起的手腕上戴着深色手环或发圈。添加恰好 2 个沙发细节：光泽感的黑色长条簇绒皮革软包，以及左侧的一个蓬松棕色毛绒靠垫。使用深沉的低调摄影棚布光，从右上角投射柔和的定向光，在皮肤和丝绒褶皱上形成柔和的高光，阴影深邃，带有微妙的雾感，真实的皮肤纹理，浅景深，营造出精致的时尚杂志大片氛围。竖版 9:16 构图，腰部至膝盖的取景，红色面料在下方前景处倾泻而下，无文字，无水印。

en.title: Candid Summer Railway Crossing Snapshot
en.description: Generates a photorealistic flash-film scene of three friends at a rural railway crossing during summer dusk.
en.prompt: Create a photorealistic candid snapshot of exactly three young adult women on a humid summer evening beside a rural Japanese railway crossing at dusk, shot with a wide-angle disposable-camera look and harsh direct flash. The scene has a slightly tilted, spontaneous composition: one woman is very close to the left edge, cropped partly out of frame, laughing toward the camera with windblown long dark hair, a fitted white graphic T-shirt, and high-waisted denim shorts; the second woman stands near the center by a striped crossing pole, smiling at the camera, wearing a low-cut pale fitted T-shirt and frayed denim shorts, holding a small patterned drawstring pouch and a colorful bottled drink; the third woman stands to the right in profile, hair in a messy bun, drinking from a plastic water bottle, wearing a semi-sheer gray graphic T-shirt and a short denim skirt, holding a pink shoulder bag and a long colorful snack or toy package. Include exactly these three visible handheld items groups: two plastic bottles, one small drawstring pouch, and one pink shoulder bag with a long package. Background details should include train tracks, overhead electrical wires, crossing signals, a black-and-yellow striped pole, roadside grass, a glowing vending machine on the far right, distant lights, and a blue-pink sunset sky. Use {argument name="location" default="a quiet rural Japanese railway crossing"}, {argument name="time of day" default="blue-hour summer dusk"}, {argument name="camera style" default="wide-angle disposable film camera with direct flash"}, {argument name="outfit style" default="casual fitted T-shirts with denim shorts or skirt"}, and {argument name="mood" default="playful candid summer vacation energy"}. Emphasize authentic film grain, motion blur, flash glare on skin and fabric, natural imperfect poses, and a lively unposed friendship moment; avoid adding extra people, text overlays, logos, or a polished studio look.

zh.title: 夏日铁路道口抓拍
zh.description: 生成一张在夏日黄昏的乡村铁路道口，三位好友的写实风格闪光灯抓拍场景。
zh.prompt: 创作一张写实风格的抓拍照片，画面中共有三位年轻女性，时间设定在潮湿的夏日傍晚，地点位于日本乡村的铁路道口，采用广角一次性相机拍摄，并带有强烈的直射闪光灯效果。画面构图略微倾斜，充满随性：第一位女性位于左侧边缘，部分身体被裁切出画框，正对着镜头大笑，留着被风吹乱的长黑发，身穿合身的白色印花 T 恤和高腰牛仔短裤；第二位女性站在中央的条纹道口杆旁，对着镜头微笑，身穿低领浅色合身 T 恤和磨边牛仔短裤，手里拿着一个小巧的抽绳袋和一瓶彩色饮料；第三位女性站在右侧，侧身对着镜头，头发扎成凌乱的丸子头，正在喝塑料瓶装水，身穿半透明灰色印花 T 恤和牛仔短裙，肩上背着一个粉色单肩包，手里拿着一个长条状的彩色零食或玩具包装。画面中必须包含这三组手持物品：两个塑料瓶、一个小抽绳袋，以及一个带有长条包装的粉色单肩包。背景细节应包括铁轨、高架电线、道口信号灯、黑黄相间的条纹杆、路边的草地、最右侧发光的自动贩卖机、远处的灯光以及蓝粉色的落日天空。使用 {argument name="location" default="宁静的日本乡村铁路道口"}、{argument name="time of day" default="蓝调夏日黄昏"}、{argument name="camera style" default="带有直射闪光灯的广角一次性胶片相机"}、{argument name="outfit style" default="休闲合身 T 恤搭配牛仔短裤或短裙"} 以及 {argument name="mood" default="俏皮、随性的暑假氛围"}。强调真实的胶片颗粒感、动态模糊、皮肤和织物上的闪光灯眩光、自然且不完美的姿态，以及生动、未经摆拍的友谊瞬间；避免添加额外人物、文字覆盖、Logo 或精致的摄影棚质感。

en.title: Fiery Backlit Silhouette Portrait
en.description: A cinematic low-key portrait prompt for creating a side-profile woman with glowing windblown golden hair against a black background.
en.prompt: Create a dramatic fine-art portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} in strict side profile facing right, shown from head to upper torso against a deep black studio background. Her face, neck, shoulder, and chest are mostly in near-black silhouette with only razor-thin warm rim highlights defining the nose, lips, jawline, throat, collarbone, and shoulder. The main visual focus is a huge mass of {argument name="hair color" default="fiery golden-orange blonde"} hair blown powerfully to the left and curling around the face, glowing like illuminated strands of fire. Use extreme backlighting from behind the head and hair, creating a bright white-hot golden halo at the edge of the face and dense orange light through the flowing hair. The hair should contain countless long, distinct, ribbon-like strands and curls, sweeping horizontally across the frame with motion and energy. Composition is vertical portrait, close crop, face centered slightly right, hair filling the left half and wrapping around the right edge. Style is cinematic high-contrast photography, low-key lighting, warm amber and orange palette, glossy skin rim light, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed hair texture, elegant sensual mood, no clothing details emphasized, no text, no accessories, no watermark.

zh.title: 炽热背光剪影人像
zh.description: 一个电影级低调人像提示词，用于创作侧面女性剪影，其金色长发在黑色背景下随风飘动并散发光芒。
zh.prompt: 创作一张极具戏剧性的艺术人像，主体为 {argument name="subject" default="年轻女性"}，严格侧面朝右，展示头部至上半身，背景为深邃的黑色摄影棚背景。她的脸部、颈部、肩部和胸部大多处于近乎全黑的剪影中，仅有极细的暖色轮廓光勾勒出鼻梁、嘴唇、下颌线、喉咙、锁骨和肩膀。视觉焦点是一大团 {argument name="hair color" default="炽热的金橙色"} 头发，被强风吹向左侧并环绕脸部，如同发光的火焰丝线。使用来自头部和头发后方的极端背光，在脸部边缘形成明亮的白热金色光环，并透过飘逸的头发散发出浓郁的橙色光芒。头发应包含无数细长、清晰、丝带状的发丝和卷发，充满动感与能量地横向扫过画面。构图为竖向人像，紧凑裁剪，脸部略微偏右，头发填充左半部分并包裹右侧边缘。风格为电影级高对比度摄影，低调布光，暖琥珀色和橙色色调，光泽感皮肤轮廓光，浅景深，超精细发丝质感，优雅感性氛围，不强调服装细节，无文字，无配饰，无水印。

en.title: Luxury Noir Perfume Poster
en.description: Creates a refined dark luxury fragrance advertisement with a single faceted perfume bottle and elegant gold typography.
en.prompt: Create a luxury perfume advertisement poster for {argument name="brand name" default="ELYSIAN NOIR"}, featuring one single perfume bottle as the main subject. Use a vertical 3:4 canvas with the product centered slightly below the middle. The background should be a deep charcoal-to-black soft gradient with a subtle silk-like fabric texture and faint metallic sheen. Leave generous negative space at the top for refined typography. Place the headline “{argument name="headline text" default="ELYSIAN NOIR"}” in widely spaced elegant uppercase letters, warm champagne-gold color, with a modern sans-serif luxury typeface. Under it, add the small tagline “{argument name="tagline" default="A SCENT OF TIMELESS CRAFTSMANSHIP"}”, then a tiny centered divider line, then the product text “PARFUM” and “100 ML / 3.4 FL.OZ”. Show exactly 1 perfume bottle: a faceted geometric glass bottle with a smoky amber-black transparent body, crisp beveled edges, glossy reflections, a black rectangular cap with gold accents, and the front label reading “ELYSIAN / NOIR / PARFUM” in small gold lettering. Lighting should be cinematic commercial studio photography: low-key, high contrast, warm gold rim lights, sharp highlights along the glass edges, realistic reflections on a polished dark surface, and soft streaks of light sweeping across the lower foreground. Overall color palette is muted black, smoky amber, and champagne gold. Make the composition clean, premium, minimalist, elegant, and suitable for an international luxury fragrance campaign, with ultra-detailed glass, realistic refraction, no people, no extra products, no watermark, no UI elements.

zh.title: 奢华 Noir 香水海报
zh.description: 创作一张精致的暗黑奢华风香水广告，主体为单个多面切割香水瓶，搭配优雅的金色字体。
zh.prompt: 为 {argument name="brand name" default="ELYSIAN NOIR"} 创作一张奢华香水广告海报，以单个香水瓶为核心主体。使用 3:4 的竖向画布，将产品置于中心偏下方位置。背景应为深炭色至黑色的柔和渐变，带有细腻的丝绸质感和淡淡的金属光泽。顶部留出充足的留白，以便排版精致的字体。标题 “{argument name="headline text" default="ELYSIAN NOIR"}” 使用间距宽阔、优雅的大写字母，采用暖香槟金色，并选用现代无衬线奢华字体。下方添加小字标语 “{argument name="tagline" default="A SCENT OF TIMELESS CRAFTSMANSHIP"}”，接着是一条居中的细分割线，然后是产品文字 “PARFUM” 和 “100 ML / 3.4 FL.OZ”。仅展示 1 个香水瓶：多面几何玻璃瓶身，呈烟熏琥珀黑色透明质感，边缘棱角分明，光泽感强，配有带金色装饰的黑色长方形瓶盖，正面标签印有小号金色字体的 “ELYSIAN / NOIR / PARFUM”。灯光采用电影级商业摄影风格：低调、高对比度，暖金色轮廓光，玻璃边缘有锐利的高光，抛光深色表面上有逼真的倒影，前景下方有柔和的光束扫过。整体色调为沉稳的黑色、烟熏琥珀色和香槟金色。构图需简洁、高端、极简且优雅，适合国际奢华香水宣传活动；要求玻璃细节极致丰富，折射效果逼真，画面中无人像、无额外产品、无水印、无 UI 元素。

en.title: Teddy Bear Picnic Birthday Banner
en.description: A premium first-birthday teddy bear picnic photoshoot scene with balloons, cake, banners, alphabet blocks, and a smiling baby centerpiece.
en.prompt: Create a warm, premium studio photoshoot for a baby girl’s first birthday with a soft “Teddy Bear Picnic” theme. A smiling baby girl with curly dark hair sits cross-legged in the center on a round woven jute rug layered with a cream macrame throw, wearing a cream floral ruffle romper and a beige bow headband, hugging a plush brown teddy bear with a pale pink ribbon. The scene is styled in blush pink, cream, tan, rose gold, and warm golden tones with shallow depth of field and cozy fairy-light bokeh. Behind her, build a lush balloon arch with exactly 4 main balloon color/types: blush pink, ivory cream, peach, and metallic rose-gold/gold balloons. Add burlap pennant banners in the background with visible text reading “TEDDY BEAR PICNIC” on the top banner and “HAPPY 1ST BIRTHDAY, {argument name="child name" default="FLORENCE"}” on the lower banner, decorated with eucalyptus garlands and warm string lights. On the left, place a two-tier ivory drip cake on a dark wooden cake stand, topped with a script “One” topper, a small teddy bear topper, pink roses, daisies, greenery, and delicate cream frosting drips. Include exactly 3 visible teddy bears: the teddy bear held by the baby, a large partial teddy bear peeking in from the far left background, and a small seated teddy bear at the lower left foreground. On the right, place a large metallic rose-gold number “1” balloon and an open blush-pink vintage picnic suitcase containing a floral teapot, teacups, and small picnic tea-party items. In the foreground, arrange wooden alphabet blocks spelling exactly 2 phrases: “ONE” on the left and “FLORENCE” on the right. Keep the composition symmetrical and luxurious, with the baby as the sharp focal point, creamy skin tones, realistic photography, soft studio lighting, detailed textures in the woven rug and macrame, and no extra text, logos, or watermarks.

zh.title: 泰迪熊野餐主题生日横幅
zh.description: 一场高端的周岁泰迪熊野餐主题摄影场景，包含气球、蛋糕、横幅、字母积木以及中心位置微笑着的宝宝。
zh.prompt: 打造一场温馨、高端的宝宝周岁生日摄影棚拍摄，采用柔和的“泰迪熊野餐”主题。一位留着深色卷发、面带微笑的女宝宝盘腿坐在中心，脚下铺着圆形的黄麻编织地毯，上面叠放着奶油色花边流苏毯，她身穿奶油色碎花荷叶边连体衣，戴着米色蝴蝶结发带，怀里抱着一只系着淡粉色丝带的棕色毛绒泰迪熊。场景色调采用腮红粉、奶油色、棕褐色、玫瑰金和温暖的金色，营造出浅景深和舒适的仙女灯光斑效果。在她身后，搭建一个繁茂的气球拱门，包含 4 种主要气球颜色/类型：腮红粉、象牙奶油色、桃色以及金属玫瑰金/金色气球。背景处悬挂麻布三角旗横幅，上方横幅清晰可见文字“TEDDY BEAR PICNIC”，下方横幅显示“HAPPY 1ST BIRTHDAY, {argument name="child name" default="FLORENCE"}”，并装饰有桉树花环和温暖的串灯。左侧放置一个深色木质蛋糕架，上面摆放着双层象牙色淋面蛋糕，顶部装饰有手写体“One”插牌、小型泰迪熊摆件、粉色玫瑰、雏菊、绿植和精致的奶油淋面。画面中包含 3 只可见的泰迪熊：宝宝怀里抱着的泰迪熊、左后方背景中探出半个身子的大泰迪熊，以及左前下方坐着的小泰迪熊。右侧放置一个巨大的金属玫瑰金数字“1”气球，以及一个打开的腮红粉色复古野餐手提箱，里面装有花卉茶壶、茶杯和小型野餐茶会用品。在前景处，摆放木质字母积木，拼出 2 个短语：左侧为“ONE”，右侧为“FLORENCE”。构图保持对称且奢华，以宝宝为清晰的焦点，呈现奶油般的肤色、写实的摄影质感、柔和的影棚灯光，以及编织地毯和花边流苏的细腻纹理，画面中不包含任何额外文字、Logo 或水印。

en.title: Angelic Cloud Terminal Icon
en.description: A dreamy celestial tech icon with angel wings and a halo, ideal for a soft futuristic visual about coding or cloud tools.
en.prompt: Create a dreamy celestial tech icon scene: a large rounded cloud-shaped logo floats in the center, filled with a smooth gradient from deep cobalt blue at the bottom to violet and pale lavender at the top. Inside the cloud, place exactly 2 white terminal symbols: a thick greater-than chevron on the left and a short horizontal underscore on the right, both rounded and softly glowing. Add exactly 2 large white angel wings attached symmetrically behind the cloud, with layered soft feathers, the left wing extending to the upper-left and the right wing to the upper-right. Above the cloud, add exactly 1 luminous halo: a thin glowing oval ring in warm pink-white light. Set the scene in a heavenly sky with voluminous pastel clouds filling the lower half and both side edges, using blue, lavender, pink, and peach tones. Add soft god rays from above, subtle sparkles, atmospheric haze, and a bright backlit glow behind the central icon. Use a polished 3D soft-rendered style, ultra-clean, whimsical, ethereal, high contrast but gentle, no text, no watermark. Wide 16:9 composition, centered subject, cinematic lighting, crisp edges on the icon with soft bloom around highlights.

zh.title: 天使云端终端图标
zh.description: 一款梦幻般的星空科技图标，带有天使翅膀和光环，非常适合用于展现编程或云端工具的柔和未来感视觉设计。
zh.prompt: 创建一个梦幻般的星空科技图标场景：中心漂浮着一个巨大的圆角云形 Logo，内部填充着从底部的深钴蓝色到顶部的紫罗兰色和淡薰衣草色的平滑渐变。在云朵内部，放置 2 个白色的终端符号：左侧为一个粗体大于号，右侧为一个短横线，两者均呈圆角且带有柔和的光晕。在云朵后方对称地添加 2 个巨大的白色天使翅膀，羽毛层叠柔软，左翼向左上方延伸，右翼向右上方延伸。在云朵上方，添加 1 个发光光环：一个散发着暖粉白色光芒的纤细椭圆环。场景设定在天堂般的天空中，下半部分及两侧边缘充盈着蓬松的柔和色调云朵，使用蓝色、薰衣草色、粉色和桃色调。从上方添加柔和的耶稣光、细微的闪光、大气雾气，并在中心图标后方添加明亮的背光效果。采用精致的 3D 柔和渲染风格，超洁净、奇幻、空灵，高对比度但柔和，无文字，无水印。16:9 宽屏构图，主体居中，电影级灯光，图标边缘清晰，高光处带有柔和的泛光效果。

en.title: Dreamy Afterglow Fashion Portrait
en.description: A romantic vertical editorial portrait prompt for creating a soft vintage mirror fashion image with holographic magazine typography.
en.prompt: Create a dreamy editorial fashion portrait of a young East Asian woman posing in an ornate vintage bedroom mirror scene, with a soft romantic magazine-cover aesthetic. The subject is {argument name="character description" default="a delicate young East Asian woman with long wavy dark brown hair, fair skin, large expressive eyes, and natural glossy makeup"}, standing slightly off center in front of a carved wooden mirror, one arm raised overhead holding a strand of pearls or the mirror frame and the other bent gracefully near her shoulder. She wears {argument name="outfit" default="an ivory cream corset-style dress with tiny front buttons, textured lace fabric, layered ruffled skirt, and multiple pearl necklaces"}. Show her reflection behind her in the mirror, including her back and raised arm, creating a doubled intimate composition. Surround her with warm beige curtains, peach lace fabric, hanging pearl strands, carved wood, a soft bouquet of pale pink lilies near the lower left, and blurred foreground drapery framing the image like a hazy vignette. Use warm golden window light, creamy highlights, shallow depth of field, soft bloom, film grain, and subtle lens flare. Add oversized translucent prismatic serif typography across the image: at the top, large cropped letters reading {argument name="top title text" default="AUTUMN ECHO"}; near the lower left, small italic text reading {argument name="small caption text" default="dream in static"}; at the bottom, huge iridescent serif letters reading {argument name="bottom title text" default="AFTERGLOW"}. Include exactly 3 visible text elements: the large cropped top title, the small italic caption, and the large bottom title. The typography should look like glossy white holographic magazine text with rainbow chromatic aberration, partially transparent and integrated into the light leaks. Vertical 4:5 composition, ultra-detailed photorealistic fashion photography, ethereal nostalgic mood, no extra logos or readable body copy beyond the specified text.

zh.title: 梦幻余晖时尚肖像
zh.description: 一个浪漫的竖版编辑类肖像提示词，用于创作带有全息杂志排版的柔和复古镜面时尚图像。
zh.prompt: 创作一张梦幻般的编辑类时尚肖像，展现一位年轻东亚女性在华丽的复古卧室镜子前的姿态，呈现柔和浪漫的杂志封面美学。主体为 {argument name="character description" default="一位精致的年轻东亚女性，留着深棕色长波浪卷发，皮肤白皙，有着大而有神的眼睛和自然的亮面妆容"}，略微偏离中心站在雕花木镜前，一只手臂举过头顶，手持一串珍珠或镜框，另一只手臂优雅地弯曲在肩部附近。她身着 {argument name="outfit" default="一件象牙奶油色紧身胸衣式连衣裙，正面有小扣子，采用纹理蕾丝面料，配有层叠荷叶边裙摆和多条珍珠项链"}。在镜中展示她身后的倒影，包括她的背部和抬起的手臂，营造出一种双重的亲密构图。周围环绕着温暖的米色窗帘、桃色蕾丝面料、悬挂的珍珠串、雕花木饰，左下方有一束柔和的淡粉色百合花，前景中模糊的帷幔像朦胧的晕影一样框住画面。使用温暖的金色窗光、奶油色高光、浅景深、柔光效果、胶片颗粒感和微妙的镜头光晕。在图像中添加超大号半透明棱镜衬线排版：顶部为大号裁剪字母，内容为 {argument name="top title text" default="AUTUMN ECHO"}；左下方为小号斜体文字，内容为 {argument name="small caption text" default="dream in static"}；底部为巨大的虹彩衬线字母，内容为 {argument name="bottom title text" default="AFTERGLOW"}。包含恰好 3 个可见文本元素：顶部大号裁剪标题、左下方小号斜体说明文字以及底部大号标题。排版应呈现出光泽感的白色全息杂志字体效果，带有彩虹色差，半透明并融入漏光效果中。4:5 竖版构图，超细节照片级写实时尚摄影，空灵怀旧氛围，除指定文本外，不包含额外的标志或可阅读的正文内容。

en.title: Shark Plush Tavern Waltz Cover
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating a whimsical square album cover of cats and shark plushies dancing in a cozy steampunk airship tavern.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a richly detailed square fantasy album-cover illustration for {argument name="song title" default="Shark Plush Tavern Waltz"}, set in a cozy steampunk tavern aboard an airship where cats and shark plush mascots waltz together.

Canvas: Square 1:1 cover art, warm cinematic lighting, ornate thin gold border with decorative corner filigree, highly detailed painterly realism with whimsical storybook charm.

Layout: Place a large dark teal vintage signboard across the upper center with gold trim and ornate flourishes. The sign text reads “Shark Plush” on the first line and “Tavern Waltz” very large on the second line, with small musical notes around it and a small compass/ship-wheel ornament below. Add the subtitle “3/4 time Instrumental” on a ribbon-like lower curve of the sign. At the bottom center, add a small ornate plaque reading “Crystal Dragon Lancer” above {argument name="artist name" default="Elle"}, with tiny anchor decorations.

Setting: Interior of an airship tavern made of dark polished wood, brass pipes, ropes, hanging lanterns, bottles, barrels, round tables, curtains, and nautical-steampunk ornaments. Large round windows on the right reveal bright blue sky, clouds, and parts of the airship exterior. The atmosphere is festive, golden, cozy, and crowded, like a warm pub dance hall in the clouds.

Subjects and exact visible character count: Include exactly 7 visible shark plush characters: 1 large foreground shark plush in a top hat dancing at lower left, 1 shark plush in a vest dancing with an orange cat at right foreground, 1 partial shark plush head seen from behind at bottom right, 1 blue shark plush behind the central dancers, 1 shark plush couple-partner in the middle background, 1 small shark plush near the right window wearing a hat, and 1 distant shark plush among the background dancers. Include exactly 6 visible cats: 1 large gray tabby cat guitarist at left wearing a black top hat and steampunk vest, 1 gray cat upright bass player behind the guitarist, 1 joyful central fluffy cat in a teal Victorian dress dancing with the foreground shark, 1 orange cat in goggles dancing with the right shark, 1 small cat dancer in the central background, and 1 cat musician or dancer near the back of the tavern.

Character details: Dress the shark plushies in Victorian tavern attire: waistcoats, bow ties, tiny top hats, brass buttons, and soft fabric seams. Give them friendly rounded plush bodies, button-like eyes, smiling open mouths with soft triangular teeth, and cute toy-like proportions. Dress the cats in steampunk-Victorian clothing with corsets, lace cuffs, goggles, vests, belts, pocket watches, and tiny hats. Make the central cat laugh with closed smiling eyes while waltzing.

Music and props: The left cat plays a red-brown electric guitar, the rear cat plays an upright bass, and conga drums sit in the lower left foreground. Add mugs, bottles, candle lanterns, brass instruments, ropes, gears, framed wall pictures, and a chalkboard sign on the left wall that says “SKY TAVERN” and “GOOD ALE” in small hand-lettered text.

Style: Ultra-detailed whimsical fantasy illustration, warm amber tavern lighting mixed with cool blue daylight through windows, shallow cinematic depth, ornate nautical filigree, painterly texture, high-resolution cover-art polish, lively waltz motion, joyful expressions.

Constraints: Keep all text legible and spelled correctly. Do not add modern logos or watermarks. Preserve the square album-cover composition and the ornate gold border.

zh.title: Shark Plush Tavern Waltz 封面
zh.description: 一份详细的提示词，用于生成一张充满奇幻色彩的正方形专辑封面，描绘猫咪和鲨鱼玩偶在舒适的蒸汽朋克飞艇酒馆中跳华尔兹的场景。
zh.prompt:
目标：为 {argument name="song title" default="Shark Plush Tavern Waltz"} 创作一张细节丰富的正方形奇幻专辑封面插画，场景设定在飞艇上一间舒适的蒸汽朋克酒馆，猫咪和鲨鱼玩偶吉祥物正在共舞。

画布：正方形 1:1 封面艺术，温暖的电影级光效，带有装饰性边角的精致细金边，极具细节的绘画写实风格，充满奇幻故事书的魅力。

布局：在上方中心处放置一块带有金色饰边和华丽花纹的大型深青色复古招牌。招牌第一行文字为“Shark Plush”，第二行文字为巨大的“Tavern Waltz”，周围环绕着小音符，下方有一个小型指南针/船舵装饰。在招牌下方的丝带状弧线上添加副标题“3/4 time Instrumental”。在底部中心，添加一块小型华丽铭牌，上方写着“Crystal Dragon Lancer”，下方为 {argument name="artist name" default="Elle"}，并配有微型船锚装饰。

场景：飞艇酒馆内部，由深色抛光木材、黄铜管道、绳索、悬挂的灯笼、瓶子、木桶、圆桌、窗帘和航海蒸汽朋克装饰构成。右侧的大圆窗展示出明亮的蓝天、云朵和部分飞艇外观。氛围节日感十足、金碧辉煌、温馨且拥挤，宛如云端温暖的酒馆舞厅。

主体及精确可见角色数量：包含 7 个可见的鲨鱼玩偶角色：左下方 1 个戴着高礼帽跳舞的大型前景鲨鱼玩偶，右前景 1 个穿着背心与橙色猫咪跳舞的鲨鱼玩偶，右下角 1 个仅露出部分背部的鲨鱼玩偶头部，中央舞者后方 1 个蓝色鲨鱼玩偶，背景中间 1 个鲨鱼玩偶舞伴，右侧窗户附近 1 个戴帽的小型鲨鱼玩偶，以及背景舞者中 1 个远处的鲨鱼玩偶。包含 6 只可见的猫咪：左侧 1 只戴着黑色高礼帽和蒸汽朋克背心的大型灰色虎斑猫吉他手，吉他手后方 1 只灰色立式低音提琴手，中央 1 只穿着青色维多利亚风格长裙与前景鲨鱼共舞的快乐蓬松猫咪，右侧 1 只戴着护目镜与鲨鱼共舞的橙色猫咪，背景中央 1 只小型猫咪舞者，以及酒馆后方 1 只猫咪音乐家或舞者。

角色细节：为鲨鱼玩偶穿上维多利亚风格的酒馆服饰：马甲、领结、微型高礼帽、黄铜纽扣和柔软的织物接缝。赋予它们圆润友好的玩偶身体、纽扣般的眼睛、带着柔软三角形牙齿的微笑开口，以及可爱的玩具比例。为猫咪穿上蒸汽朋克维多利亚风格的服装，包括束腰、蕾丝袖口、护目镜、背心、腰带、怀表和微型帽子。让中央的猫咪在跳华尔兹时闭眼欢笑。

音乐与道具：左侧猫咪弹奏红棕色电吉他，后方猫咪演奏立式低音提琴，左下角前景放置康加鼓。添加马克杯、瓶子、蜡烛灯笼、黄铜乐器、绳索、齿轮、墙上的画框，以及左侧墙上写有“SKY TAVERN”和“GOOD ALE”手写小字的黑板招牌。

风格：超细节的奇幻插画，温暖的琥珀色酒馆灯光与透过窗户的冷蓝色日光交织，浅景深电影感，华丽的航海花纹，绘画质感，高分辨率封面艺术质感，生动的华尔兹动感，欢快的表情。

约束：保持所有文字清晰且拼写正确。不要添加现代标志或水印。保留正方形专辑封面构图和华丽的金边。

en.title: Rainbow Light Projection Comic Portrait
en.description: A semi-realistic modern comic portrait of a woman covered in psychedelic rainbow contour light projections for striking editorial or concept art.
en.prompt: Create a modern comic-style close-up portrait of a glamorous young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="black"} shoulder-length wavy hair, warm fair skin, glossy full lips, subtle winged eyeliner, and a calm confident gaze looking slightly toward the viewer. She is posed in a three-quarter view with one bare shoulder visible and one elegant hand resting under her chin, long manicured nails visible. Cover her face, neck, shoulder, arm, and hand with vivid projected light patterns: concentric contour-like rainbow ripples in neon cyan, magenta, purple, orange, green, and pale yellow, as if a psychedelic moiré or oil-slick topographic projection is cast across her skin and hair. Use the same swirling luminous pattern as the entire background, dense and high-contrast, with many organic oval rings and warped bands flowing diagonally around her silhouette. Style should be a polished modern manga / semi-realistic comic illustration with sharp ink-like linework, painterly shading, high detail in eyes, lips, hair strands, and hands, dramatic saturated lighting, deep shadows, glossy highlights, and a square canvas. No text, no watermark, no border, no extra characters.

zh.title: 彩虹光影投射漫画肖像
zh.description: 一张半写实的现代漫画风格女性肖像，身上覆盖着迷幻的彩虹轮廓光影投射，适用于引人注目的编辑设计或概念艺术。
zh.prompt: 创作一张现代漫画风格的特写肖像，主角是一位迷人的年轻女性，留着 {argument name="hair color" default="黑色"} 的齐肩波浪发，拥有温暖白皙的皮肤、饱满水润的嘴唇、精致的猫眼眼线，神情冷静自信，目光略微看向观众。她以四分之三侧面姿势呈现，露出一侧肩膀，一只修长的手优雅地托在下巴下方，可见修剪整齐的长指甲。在她的脸部、颈部、肩膀、手臂和手上覆盖生动的投射光影图案：霓虹青色、洋红色、紫色、橙色、绿色和淡黄色的同心圆轮廓彩虹涟漪，仿佛迷幻的莫尔条纹或油膜地形投影投射在她的皮肤和头发上。背景使用与人物身上相同的漩涡状发光图案，密集且高对比度，许多有机的椭圆形环和扭曲的带状线条围绕着她的轮廓斜向流动。风格应为精致的现代漫画 / 半写实漫画插画，具有锐利的墨线感、绘画般的阴影、对眼睛、嘴唇、发丝和手部的高细节刻画、戏剧性的饱和光影、深邃的阴影、光泽的高光，采用正方形画布。无文字，无水印，无边框，无多余角色。

en.title: Distressed Convenience Store Recruitment Poster
en.description: A textured navy-and-cream corporate hiring poster layout for convenience store recruitment or enterprise activity announcements.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a minimalist corporate recruitment poster for a convenience store partner hiring campaign, using a bold East Asian typographic aesthetic.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, warm off-white paper background with lots of negative space on the right.

Layout: Fill the left 75% of the poster with enormous cropped dark-blue Chinese characters, reading like a giant recruitment headline {argument name="main headline" default="招聘"}; the characters are so large that their strokes extend beyond the poster edges. Place a narrow right-side information column centered vertically, aligned near the right margin. Add a small convenience-store line icon and English slogan at the lower right.

Visual style: Rough risograph / screen-print texture, dark navy blue ink on cream paper, gritty distressed edges, speckled ink loss, slightly uneven stamped typography. Use a calm corporate poster composition, modern but tactile, no photos, no gradients, no extra colors.

Text content: The poster contains exactly 1 giant cropped headline area, 1 vertical title line, 7 small information sections, and 1 bottom logo/slogan block. The vertical title line should read {argument name="vertical title" default="便利店伙伴招募中"}. The 7 small sections in the right column are: 1) position: store staff, full-time or part-time; 2) work content: cashier operation, product display, store cleaning; 3) schedule: shift system, 3–5 days per week, 4–8 hours per day; 4) benefits: hourly wage 18–25 yuan, employee discount, holiday benefits; 5) requirements: age 18 or above, responsible, hardworking; 6) location: assigned nearby; 7) contact: scan the QR code below or visit the store to ask. Keep this body text very small, compact, and navy blue.

Bottom block: Draw exactly 1 simple outlined convenience-store icon with an awning marked “24”, and below it place two short English lines: {argument name="english slogan line one" default="WE NEED YOU"} and {argument name="english slogan line two" default="JOIN US"}.

Constraints: Preserve the extreme scale contrast between the huge cropped blue headline and the tiny right-column details. Keep all typography and illustration in the same navy ink. Avoid realistic people, photos, decorative icons beyond the single store icon, QR code detail, shadows, or glossy effects.

zh.title: 复古做旧风格便利店招聘海报
zh.description: 一款采用深蓝色与米色调的质感企业招聘海报排版，适用于便利店招聘或企业活动公告。
zh.prompt:
目标：为便利店合作伙伴招聘活动创作一张极简主义企业招聘海报，采用醒目的东亚排版美学。

画布：竖向海报，2:3 比例，暖米色纸张背景，右侧留有大量负空间。

布局：海报左侧 75% 的区域填充巨大的深蓝色裁剪中文字符，呈现为醒目的招聘标题 {argument name="main headline" default="招聘"}；字符尺寸极大，笔画延伸至海报边缘之外。在右侧边缘附近垂直居中放置一个狭窄的信息栏。右下角添加一个小型便利店线条图标及英文标语。

视觉风格：粗糙的孔版印刷 / 丝网印刷质感，米色纸张上的深海军蓝油墨，带有颗粒感的做旧边缘、斑驳的掉墨效果以及略显不均匀的盖章式排版。采用冷静的企业海报构图，现代且具有触感，无照片，无渐变，无额外色彩。

文本内容：海报包含 1 个巨大的裁剪标题区、1 行垂直标题、7 个小型信息板块以及 1 个底部 Logo/标语块。垂直标题行应为 {argument name="vertical title" default="便利店伙伴招募中"}。右侧栏的 7 个小板块为：1) 职位：店员，全职或兼职；2) 工作内容：收银操作、商品陈列、门店清洁；3) 时间：轮班制，每周 3–5 天，每天 4–8 小时；4) 福利：时薪 18–25 元，员工折扣，节假日福利；5) 要求：年龄 18 岁及以上，有责任心，勤奋踏实；6) 地点：就近分配；7) 联系方式：扫描下方二维码或到店咨询。正文请保持字号极小、紧凑，并使用海军蓝色。

底部板块：绘制 1 个简单的便利店轮廓图标，雨棚上标有“24”，下方放置两行简短的英文：{argument name="english slogan line one" default="WE NEED YOU"} 和 {argument name="english slogan line two" default="JOIN US"}。

约束：保持巨大的裁剪蓝色标题与微小的右侧栏细节之间的极端比例对比。所有排版和插图均使用相同的海军蓝油墨。避免使用写实人物、照片、除单个门店图标外的装饰性图标、二维码细节、阴影或光泽效果。

en.title: Anime Fashion Girls in City Street
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating two stylish anime girls in contrasting streetwear and romantic fashion on a modern city street.
en.prompt: Create a polished anime-style fashion street scene featuring exactly two young women walking side by side in a modern city shopping district at golden hour. The left character is a cool blonde girl with very long loose hair and blue eyes, wearing a dark gray New York Yankees baseball cap, oversized dark NY logo zip jacket left open, black cropped tank top exposing her midriff, loose olive cargo jogger pants with drawstring waist and side pockets, large metallic over-ear headphones resting around her neck, and a fluffy black shoulder bag; one hand is in her pocket and she looks sideways with a calm, slightly aloof expression. The right character is a glamorous girl with very long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="pink"} hair and pink eyes, wearing a romantic off-shoulder white sheer ruffled blouse with dotted translucent fabric, layered frill sleeves, fitted bodice and sweetheart neckline, paired with glossy dark brown high-waisted leather shorts; she smiles softly and looks toward the blonde girl. Set them full body to upper-thigh/three-quarter crop in the foreground, with realistic urban buildings, glass storefronts, signs, pedestrians, trees, streetlamps, and warm evening light in the background. Use a high-detail semi-realistic anime illustration style, soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, delicate linework, fashionable streetwear contrast, muted city colors, natural hair movement, and subtle warm highlights. Avoid extra characters in the foreground, avoid text overlays, avoid watermarks, and keep the scene elegant rather than explicit.

zh.title: 城市街头的动漫时尚少女
zh.description: 一个详细的提示词，用于生成两位身着对比鲜明的街头风与浪漫风服饰的动漫少女在现代城市街头的场景。
zh.prompt: 创作一张精致的动漫风格时尚街拍场景，画面中包含两位并肩走在现代城市购物区的年轻女性，时间设定在黄金时刻。左侧角色是一位酷炫的金发女孩，留着超长披肩发，拥有蓝色双眼，头戴深灰色 New York Yankees 棒球帽，身穿敞开的深色 NY 标志超大款拉链夹克，内搭黑色露脐背心，下身穿着宽松的橄榄色工装慢跑裤，腰部有抽绳设计并带有侧袋，脖子上挂着大型金属质感头戴式耳机，背着一个毛绒绒的黑色单肩包；她一只手插在口袋里，侧头看向一旁，表情冷静且略带疏离。右侧角色是一位魅力十足的女孩，留着超长波浪卷 {argument name="hair color" default="粉色"} 头发，拥有粉色双眼，身穿一件浪漫的露肩白色透明荷叶边衬衫，采用波点透视面料，带有层叠的褶皱袖子、修身胸衣和心形领口，下身搭配深棕色亮面高腰皮短裤；她温柔地微笑着，看向左侧的金发女孩。将她们设置为前景中的全身至大腿/四分之三构图，背景为写实的城市建筑、玻璃店面、招牌、行人、树木、路灯以及温暖的傍晚光线。采用高细节的半写实动漫插画风格，柔和的电影级布光，浅景深，细腻的线条，时尚的街头风格对比，柔和的城市色调，自然的头发动态，以及微妙的暖色高光。避免前景出现多余角色，避免文字覆盖，避免水印，并保持场景优雅，而非露骨。

en.title: Blue Fantasy Library Atrium
en.description: Generates a luminous anime fantasy library filled with blue-haired scholars, flying pages, birds, books, and a magical clock for dramatic AI art scenes.
en.prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 anime fantasy illustration of an impossibly tall, luminous library atrium, dominated by {argument name="color palette" default="cobalt blue and pure white with tiny warm orange leaf accents"}. The scene is packed with towering bookshelves on both sides, multiple balconies, ladders, stairs, arched windows, and a radiant white opening in the center that floods the whole space with light. Show exactly 14 visible human figures, all delicate blue-haired scholar boys in pale white or blue clothing: one reading at the lower left among giant open books, one crouched on a left shelf, one standing in a left window alcove, one floating near the upper left holding a rectangular case, one tiny figure on a distant central balcony, one tiny figure near the center lower shelves, one standing on the upper right balcony reading, one seated on a right-side railing, one standing by the right bookshelves, one reading at the lower right edge, one seated at the lower right with an open book, one back-facing figure in the lower center foreground, one tiny figure near the central stairs, and one tiny figure on a mid-background balcony. Fill the air with hundreds of fluttering book pages, paper shards, white birds, petals, crystalline fragments, and several open books suspended in motion; include two huge open books in the foreground, one at lower left and one sweeping across the lower right. At the upper right, place a large glowing circular astrolabe or magical clock made of concentric rings, symbols, and clockwork markings. The composition should feel like a vortex of knowledge and pages swirling upward, with extreme depth, intricate linework, high-key lighting, sparkling particles, and elegant manga-style rendering. Add a small handwritten signature and date in the bottom right reading {argument name="date text" default="July 12, 2026"} and {argument name="signature" default="Oyagi"}. No other readable text, no watermark, no frame.

zh.title: 蓝色幻想图书馆中庭
zh.description: 生成一个充满发光动漫幻想风格的图书馆，内有蓝发学者、飞舞的书页、鸟类、书籍以及用于戏剧性 AI 艺术场景的魔法时钟。
zh.prompt: 创作一张 2:3 竖构图的动漫幻想插画，描绘一个高耸入云、光芒四射的图书馆中庭，主色调为 {argument name="color palette" default="钴蓝色和纯白色，点缀少量暖橙色叶片"}。场景两侧布满了高耸的书架、多个阳台、梯子、楼梯、拱形窗户，中心处有一个明亮的白色开口，将整个空间照得通透。画面中需清晰呈现 14 个人物，均为身着浅白或蓝色服装的精致蓝发学者少年：左下方一名在巨型开卷中阅读，一名蹲在左侧书架上，一名站在左侧窗龛内，一名在左上方悬浮并手持长方形盒，一名在远处的中央阳台上，一名在中央下层书架附近，一名站在右上方阳台上阅读，一名坐在右侧栏杆上，一名站在右侧书架旁，一名在右下边缘阅读，一名坐在右下方翻阅书籍，一名背对观众位于中央前景，一名在中央楼梯附近，还有一名在背景中部的阳台上。空气中充斥着数百片飞舞的书页、纸屑、白鸟、花瓣、水晶碎片以及几本悬浮在空中的书籍；前景包含两本巨大的开卷，一本位于左下方，另一本横跨右下方。在右上角放置一个巨大的发光圆形星盘或魔法时钟，由同心圆、符号和钟表刻度组成。构图应呈现出知识与书页向上盘旋的漩涡感，具备极强的纵深感、复杂的线条、高调照明、闪烁的粒子效果以及优雅的漫画风格渲染。在右下角添加一个小的手写签名和日期，内容为 {argument name="date text" default="2026 年 7 月 12 日"} 和 {argument name="signature" default="Oyagi"}。画面中不得出现其他可读文字、水印或边框。

en.title: Reasoning Context and Prompt Cache Slide
en.description: Generates a Japanese 16:9 technical infographic slide explaining continuous reasoning context and explicit prompt caching for long-running AI tasks.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean 16:9 Japanese business/technical infographic slide about how continuous reasoning context and explicit prompt caching improve long-running task efficiency. Use a polished PowerPoint-native infographic look with dense but readable explanatory text.

Canvas: 16:9 landscape slide, warm off-white background, dark navy text, teal and olive green accent colors, thin rounded borders, subtle shadows, generous margins. Leave no photo-realistic elements; use flat vector icons and crisp typography.

Top text area: Place a large bold Japanese headline at the top left: {argument name="headline text" default="継続推論と明示的キャッシュが長期タスクを効率化"}. Under it, add a smaller semibold lead sentence: {argument name="lead text" default="過去ターンの推論と再利用可能なプロンプトを選択的に保持することで一貫性と効率を高められるが、前提変更や利用回数を踏まえて保存範囲を設計する必要がある。"}

Main layout: Two large rounded rectangular panels sit side by side beneath the lead sentence. The left panel is teal and titled “reasoning.context”; the right panel is olive green and titled “明示的プロンプトキャッシュ”. Connect the panels with a thin line and a small circular chain-link icon centered between them near the bottom, suggesting coordination between reasoning context and cache. A small upward green arrow near the right panel points back toward it.

Left panel details: Include exactly 3 vertically stacked turn markers on the far left, connected by a vertical line with a downward arrow. The markers are labeled “1ターン”, “2ターン”, and “3ターン”. Next to each marker, show a small person icon and speech bubble.
