Black and white rendering. Low key: near-total interior darkness, only city ambient light filtering through the window glass providing any illumination — cool, flat, indirect. Her face and hair receive faint frontal light from outside, the rest of the room is black. Window reflections subtle and not distracting. Shadow side of face retains skin tonal gradation clearly. ISO 800 grain structure, fine and present. Photographic texture not CG render smoothness.

Aspect ratio 4:5. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.

zh.title: 忧郁夜晚公寓窗边肖像
zh.description: 一个电影感的黑白提示词，捕捉了一位年轻女性在夜晚倚靠公寓窗边的忧郁氛围，呈现出逼真的质感与光影。
zh.prompt:
中景肖像，85mm 镜头，一位 {argument name="subject" default="20 出头的年轻东亚女性"} 站在 {argument name="setting" default="深夜的公寓窗边"}，额头轻抵冰冷的玻璃，双眼睁开，俯瞰着下方的街道，真实的日常生活摄影，自然的抓拍瞬间。

侧面或近侧面视角，杏眼透过玻璃向下凝视，表情内敛且失焦——仿佛在看，又仿佛什么都没看。乌黑的直发垂落在脸颊和颈部一侧。额头接触玻璃，呼吸在窗户下角形成淡淡的雾气。皮肤带有自然质感，微弱的街灯光芒透过玻璃产生次表面散射。

她穿着一件 {argument name="clothing" default="超大款针织毛衣"}，长袖微微遮住手指。双臂自然下垂或在胸前松散地交叉。透过玻璃可以隐约看到黑暗的街道和远处建筑的灯光，呈现出柔和的虚化效果。一两缕发丝夹在脸庞与玻璃之间，有的被压平，有的自然飘散。

黑白呈现。低调光：室内几乎全黑，仅有透过窗户的城市环境光提供照明——冷色调、平淡、间接。她的脸部和头发受到来自窗外的微弱正面光照射，房间其余部分处于黑暗中。窗户倒影细腻，不会造成干扰。脸部的阴影侧保留了清晰的皮肤色调渐变。ISO 800 颗粒感，细腻且真实。摄影质感，非 CG 渲染的平滑感。

长宽比 4:5。无水印，无文字叠加，非卡通，非数字绘画，非插画，非动漫。

en.title: 90s Game Strategy Guide Page
en.description: A prompt that generates a nostalgic image of a strategy guide page for a fictional video game released in the mid-90s.
en.prompt: Create an image of a page from a strategy guide for a fictional game. A game released in {argument name="release year" default="1995"}.

zh.title: 90 年代游戏攻略指南页面
zh.description: 一个用于生成 90 年代中期虚构电子游戏攻略指南页面怀旧风格图像的提示词。
zh.prompt: 创建一个虚构游戏的攻略指南页面图像。该游戏发布于 {argument name="release year" default="1995"} 年。

zh.title: 热带海滨岩石人像
zh.description: 一张高清度假风格的人像照片，描绘了一位女性坐在晶莹剔透的潮汐池旁崎岖的海岸岩石上。
zh.prompt:
主题：潮汐池的凝视

主体：
4:5 竖构图照片。一位 {argument name="person" default="20 多岁的女性"}，气质沉稳成熟，位于画面中心偏左位置，坐在一处 {argument name="location" default="海边崎岖的岩石区"}。主体为全身像，占据画面约 70% 的比例。她的左腿笔直地垂入浅浅的潮汐池中，右腿弯曲，膝盖深屈，置于画面右侧的岩石上。

人物/表情：
典型的自然系日本女性面容，五官清秀。拥有健康、柔美且线条分明的身材，长腿细腰。深棕色近乎黑色的头发梳成低松发髻，留有刘海和脸颊两侧的碎发。脸部微微转向右侧，唯有目光注视着镜头。双唇轻闭，表情平静，兼具宁静与自信。

服装/姿势：
{argument name="outfit" default="象牙色挂脖比基尼"}。上衣带有柔软的褶皱，通过细带在颈后和背部系紧。腰间一侧系着同色系的透明纱笼，下摆自然垂落在岩石上。上半身挺直，右前臂搁在弯曲的右膝上。左手轻放在右膝外侧，手指自然伸展。自然地表现出脚底与岩石的接触感、大腿压在岩石上的重量感，以及湿润双腿的质感。

背景/光影：
前景是透明的浅水潮汐池和棕色珊瑚礁。中景是主体和大小不一的岩石，左上方点缀着深绿色的热带植物。背景右侧有一座天然形成的岩石拱门，透过拱门可以看到波光粼粼的蓝色海面和远处的礁石。正午晴天，主光源为来自右上方的强力阳光。明亮的光线照射在脸颊、肩膀、胸部和右大腿上，岩石后方和主体左侧投下深邃的阴影。阴影侧增加了来自海面的微弱蓝色反射光。

构图/摄影：
4:5 竖构图，全身人像。相机位置略高于腰部，几乎与视线平齐。头部上方留出适度的植物和岩石空间，脚部向下延伸至潮汐池。利用右上方的岩石孔洞和蓝色大海作为次要视觉焦点，并准确对焦于主体面部。等效中长焦镜头，背景大海轻微虚化，同时保留岩石表面的凹凸质感。

质感/风格：
高清自然光人像。皮肤质感真实，保留了细微的水珠、自然的毛孔以及阳光投下的微妙阴影。细腻地刻画了干燥岩石的粗糙质感、湿润岩石的反射光以及轻薄纱笼的透明度。色彩以象牙白、岩石褐、深植绿和绿松石蓝为主，呈现出清爽的夏季色调。如同杂志度假专题般沉稳的摄影表现。

负面提示词：
年轻面孔，不自然的体型，多余的手指，手指缺失，肢体融合，关节破损，脚底变形，与岩石接触不良，悬浮，不自然的重力，透视错误，阴影与光源不一致，过度磨皮，塑料感皮肤，文字，标志，水印。

zh.title: 日式厨房里的杯面时光
zh.description: 一个怀旧的胶片风格提示词，捕捉了一位年轻女性在夏日午后的阳光下，于质朴的日式厨房中吃杯面的场景。
zh.prompt:
主题：蒸汽之外

主体：
竖构图 2:3。在一个狭小的日式厨房里，{argument name="person" default="一位年轻女性"} 坐在窗边的圆形木制 {argument name="furniture" default="凳子"} 上，正在吃 {argument name="food" default="杯面"}。主体位于画面中右侧，取景范围从头部到大腿中部。弯曲的双膝构成了下半部分的前景，杯面位于胸部中心，筷子上挂着的面条引导观众视线看向她的脸部。

人物/表情：
自然且年轻的女性。象牙米色皮肤，脸颊和鼻尖带着淡淡的红晕，呈现出可见毛孔和细腻肤质的真实质感。玫瑰粉色腮红，粉棕色眼妆，长而细的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的棕色眉毛，以及透亮的粉米色嘴唇。她吃面时动作稍作停顿，睁大双眼静静地注视着镜头。

服装/姿势：
明亮的奶茶灰棕色中长发。轻薄的空气刘海和修饰脸型的层次剪裁，发梢呈现内扣与自然卷的混合效果，部分头发别在耳后。刻画出细碎的发丝、柔和的光泽，以及窗光带来的金色高光。身穿象牙色罗纹吊带背心和浅色棉质短裤。右手拿着木筷，左手环抱着杯面。双膝紧贴胸前，身体在狭窄的椅子上蜷缩成一团。

背景/光影：
一个带有昭和时代气息、充满生活气息的小型日式厨房。左侧是不锈钢燃气灶、白色水壶和木质台面。右侧远景处有大窗户、盆栽、花瓶和抹布。架子和瓶罐经过适度模糊处理，文字不可辨认。主光源是来自右上角窗户的夏日自然光。在头发、脸颊、肩膀和膝盖的右侧营造出柔和的高光，同时在左侧投下带有蓝绿色调的柔和阴影。

构图/摄影：
35mm 等效焦距，一种接近主体的日常抓拍视角。从略高于视线的位置向下俯拍。焦点集中在脸部和杯面上，背景自然虚化。窗户的高光没有完全过曝，保留了柔和的胶片感光晕。顶部留有少量空间以展示窗户和头发，两侧收紧以传达厨房的狭窄感。

质感/风格：
如同使用 Fujifilm 相机拍摄的 35mm 彩色负片质感。色彩沉稳，接近 Classic Negative 风格，带有略微褪色的奶油色调，阴影中包含蓝绿色，肤色温暖。具有细腻的胶片颗粒感、轻微的色彩不均匀、高光溢出，且没有过度的数字锐化。这不是一张精修的商业照片，而是一张捕捉夏日偶然瞬间的自然抓拍。

负面提示词：
过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤、CG 感、动漫风格、不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、变形的筷子、面条与嘴部接触不良、杯子悬空、关节断裂、腿部极度变形、阴影与光源不一致、HDR 过强、过度虚化、可辨认的产品名称、乱码文字、Logo、水印。

zh.title: 城市唱片店浏览
zh.description: 一个时尚的日常生活提示词，描绘了一位女性在光线温暖、细节丰富的城市音乐商店中浏览黑胶唱片的场景。
zh.prompt:
逼真的日常生活场景，主角为 {argument name="subject" default="二十多岁的成年女性"}。

背景设定：一个 {argument name="location" default="紧凑的唱片店"}，陈列着密集的黑胶唱片架，唱片封套朝外，配有温暖的聚光灯、试听台或柜台区域，海报风格的音乐图形（保持不可读），木质与金属质感，以及具有层次感的店铺深度。空间应营造出酷炫、都市且真实的氛围，具有鲜明的唱片店特色，而非普通的商店。

深度锁定：前景处，模糊的唱片箱边缘、黑胶封套一角或试听台细节靠近镜头。中景处，主角站在唱片箱或货架旁。背景处，更多的黑胶唱片排、墙面展示和向后延伸的店铺深度。

构图锁定：垂直 4:5 的生活照剪裁，从腰部高度拍摄，取景范围从腰部或大腿中部到头部。主角占据画面约 65%–75%。保留一个唱片箱边缘、几个可见的封套以及可辨识的店铺纵深。画面应给人一种亲密且自然观察的感觉。

动作锁定：主角正在 {argument name="action" default="浏览唱片"}，动作自然可信。一只手拿着从箱中取出的一张唱片封套，另一只手放在箱边或轻轻拨开相邻的唱片。身体与唱片箱呈微小角度，双肩放松，姿态随意，双脚着地。避免夸张的摆拍。

视线设计：在注意到某张唱片后，她短暂地看向镜头，而无需将整个身体转为肖像姿势。这种直接的眼神接触应显得微妙且短暂，仿佛在浏览过程中被捕捉到。

避免：宽阔的店铺全景、刻意的时尚站姿、夸张的倾斜、抬膝、剧烈的躯干扭转、死盯着镜头、无法辨认的道具、遮挡面部或手部的杂物。

en.title: Slumbering in a Summer Flower Meadow
en.description: A serene, high-definition portrait of a woman resting peacefully in a lush meadow of marguerites with a soft motion blur wind effect.
en.prompt:
Subject: Slumber in the Flower Wind

Main Subject:
Vertical 4:5 photo-style portrait. In a summer field where {argument name="flower types" default="white and yellow marguerites"} and small orange flowers bloom densely, {argument name="person" default="a mature adult woman"} lies quietly on her back. The subject enters largely from the bottom to the center, with her face slightly to the right of center, and chest to shoulders fitting at the bottom of the screen. Surrounding flowers fill the entire screen, with a motion blur of flowers flowing diagonally crossing the foreground.

Character/Expression:
A natural and realistic {argument name="style" default="Japanese-style portrait"}. Dark brown long hair with thin bangs and soft strands around the face. Eyes closed, eyebrows relaxed, and lips lightly closed in a peaceful expression. Natural flush on the cheeks and nose, with fine textures left on the skin without excessive correction. Summer sunlight hits the neck, collarbone, and cheeks, creating a calm atmosphere as if sleeping quietly.

Clothing/Pose:
{argument name="outfit" default="White summer camisole dress"}. Thin shoulder straps, modest lace at the chest, a small ribbon in the center, made of thin cotton material. Her shoulders sink naturally into the flowers, and one arm is cut off at the bottom of the screen, hidden by flowers. The body is placed slightly diagonally from the lower left to the upper right, with hair spread out on the grass and a few strands brushed across the forehead by the wind.

Background/Lighting:
A dense field of natural flowers and grass, like a small suburban flower bed. The background consists entirely of green leaves and white, yellow, and orange flowers, with no artificial objects or readable text. Summer sunlight shining from a high position. The light is somewhat hard and warm, creating bright highlights on the left side of the face, neck, and shoulders, with thin shadows of flowers and hair falling on the skin. A faint green reflected light from the grass on the underside.

Composition/Camera:
Close-range shot from a slightly high angle. Natural compression equivalent to 85mm, focusing on the subject's face, while surrounding flowers are slightly blurred due to shallow depth of field. Only the foreground flowers are swept by the wind, running as long thin light trails of white, yellow, and orange from the upper left to the lower right. The blur is weakened around the face to clearly show the expression and skin texture.

Texture/Style:
Realistic photographic expression. Summer sunlight, translucent skin, soft clumps of hair, wrinkles in thin cotton, and fine textures of grass and flowers. Natural color tones with deep greens, bright white flowers, and orange flowers as accents. A slight grain like film photography and a calm finish typical of a magazine portrait.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, joint breakdown, poor contact between clothing and body, floating, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin, garbled text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 夏日花海中的小憩
zh.description: 一幅宁静的高清肖像，描绘了一位女性在茂密的玛格丽特花丛中安详休憩的场景，并带有柔和的风吹动态模糊效果。
zh.prompt:
主题：花风中的小憩

主体：
竖向 4:5 照片风格肖像。在 {argument name="flower types" default="白色��黄色玛格丽特"} 与橙色小花密集盛开的夏日田野中，{argument name="person" default="一位成熟女性"} 平静地仰卧着。主体大部分位于画面底部至中心，面部略微偏向中心右侧，胸部至肩部位于画面底部。周围的花朵填满了整个画面，前景中有花朵斜向穿过的动态模糊效果。

人物/表情：
自然写实的 {argument name="style" default="日系肖像"} 风格。深棕色长发，带有薄刘海，脸颊周围有柔和的发丝。双眼闭合，眉毛舒展，双唇轻闭，表情安详。脸颊和鼻尖带有自然的红晕，保留了皮肤的细腻纹理，未经过度修饰。夏日的阳光洒在颈部、锁骨和脸颊上，营造出一种仿佛正在安静沉睡的宁静氛围。

服装/姿势：
{argument name="outfit" default="白色夏日吊带裙"}。细肩带，胸前有简约蕾丝装饰，中间饰有小蝴蝶结，采用轻薄棉质材料。她的肩膀自然地陷入花丛中，一只手臂被画面底部截断，掩映在花丛中。身体从左下向右上略微呈对角线放置，头发散落在草地上，几缕发丝被风吹拂在额前。

背景/光影：
茂密的天然花草地，宛如郊外的小型花圃。背景完全由绿叶以及白色、黄色和橙色的花朵组成，没有任何人工物体或可辨认的文字。夏日阳光从高处照射下来。光线略显硬朗且温暖，在脸部左侧、颈部和肩部形成明亮的高光，花朵和头发的细影投射在皮肤上。草地在阴影处反射出淡淡的绿色光芒。

构图/摄影：
略微俯视的近景拍摄。相当于 85mm 镜头的自然压缩感，聚焦于主体的面部，而周围的花朵因浅景深而略显模糊。只有前景的花朵被风吹拂，形成从左上到右下的白色、黄色和橙色长条状光影轨迹。面部周围的模糊感较弱，以清晰展现表情和皮肤纹理。

纹理/风格：
写实摄影表现。夏日阳光、通透的皮肤、柔顺的发丝、薄棉布的褶皱，以及草木花卉的细腻质感。自然的色调，以深绿色为主，点缀着明亮的白花和橙花。带有类似胶片摄影的轻微颗粒感，呈现出杂志肖像特有的沉稳质感。

负面提示：
不自然的面部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节畸形、服装与身体接触不良、漂浮、不自然的重力、错误的透视、与光源不一致的阴影、过度皮肤修饰、塑料感皮肤、乱码文字、标志、水印。

zh.title: 黑猫忍者冒险者
zh.description: 一个关于拥有黑猫兽人特征的独行忍者冒险者的角色提示词。
zh.prompt: {argument name="profession" default="独行冒险者"} {argument name="attribute" default="忍者"} {argument name="race" default="黑猫兽人"}

zh.title: 深夜自动贩卖机小巷
zh.description: 一个电影级且写实的提示词，用于生成一位女性在深夜城市小巷与日本自动贩卖机互动的详细场景。
zh.prompt:
写实风格的日常背景与姿势设定，主角为一名成年 {argument name="subject" default="女性"}，时间设定在夜晚。

背景特征：深夜中拥挤的 {argument name="location" default="日本自动贩卖机小巷"}，配有多个发光的饮料机、冷白色和蓝色的灯箱、色彩斑斓的产品窗光影、光亮的侧面板、狭窄的混凝土巷道墙壁、裸露的管道、几台扭蛋机、湿润路面的倒影，以及向黑暗中延伸的深邃巷道。场景应具有鲜明的城市感、氛围感，并由人工夜间照明驱动。仅使用虚构且不可辨认的产品视觉效果，不得出现真实商标或可读文字。

景深锁定：构建强有力的前景、中景和背景层次。前景处，模糊的机器边缘、发光的按钮面板或湿润的路面反射应靠近镜头。中景处，主角站在一台自动贩卖机旁。背景处，额外的发光机器、管道和远处的巷道灯光营造出深度感。利用机器边缘和反射引导视线向后延伸。

构图锁定：采用 4:5 竖构图生活照比例，从机器按钮高度附近取景，画面范围从大腿中部或腰部到头部。主角占据画面约 65%–75%。保留选定的机器面板、相邻机器的光影、狭窄的巷道深度和湿润地面的倒影。画面应呈现出真实的深夜城市瞬间，而非刻意的宣传照。

动作与姿势锁定：主角自然地站在机器旁，双脚着地。一只手抬起靠近自动贩卖机的选择按钮，正在按下或悬停在按钮上方。另一只手拿着 {argument name="item" default="硬币或手机"}，或自然地垂在身体一侧。身体朝向机器，因查看选择而略微前倾。肩膀保持放松，手肘自然，姿势应符合选择饮料时的真实动作。

相机与视线锁定：头部保持朝向机器和选择区域。相机位置略微偏向机器窗口，接近她眼睛与产品展示区之间的自然连线。无需完全转头看向镜头，仅眼神短暂转向镜头，保持侧向四分之三角度，同时维持正在选择的动作。

避免：远离机器站立、手离开选择区域、完全正脸看向镜头、夸张的身体扭转、抬膝、死盯着镜头、宽阔的巷道全景、真实品牌 Logo、可读的产品标签。

zh.title: 史诗级银河探索
zh.description: 一个关于宏大太空场景的提示词，描绘了一艘飞船在星云和行星背景下穿梭于银河系。
zh.prompt: 一幅壮丽的场景，描绘了 {argument name="subject" default="太空探索飞船"} 在 {argument name="background" default="巨大的星云和行星"} 的背景下穿梭于银河系。

en.title: Fisheye Summer Dessert POV
en.description: A unique fisheye perspective prompt of a young woman sipping a strawberry iced drink, creating a pop and slightly humorous Japanese summer vibe.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="Summer through the ice"}

Main Subject:
A vertical 2:3 realistic photo. An ultra-wide-angle fisheye composition as if looking up from inside a large transparent plastic cup. Red strawberry pulp and crushed ice loom large in the bottom half of the screen, with a thick green straw extending straight into the distance from the center. Beyond the round, distorted opening of the cup, a woman's face fits large in the center.

Character/Expression:
A natural and realistic {argument name="young woman" default="young woman"}. Dark brown hair, almost black, tied in a high bun, with thin bangs and loose hairs around the face glowing thin in the sunlight. Transparent natural makeup, pale pink cheeks, and glossy lips. Eyes wide open looking straight at the camera, lips rounded small around the straw. A cute and innocent expression, slightly surprised.

Clothing/Pose:
A white lace blouse. Fine ruffles at the neck and shoulders, with a light summer texture. The person brings her face close to the other side of the cup, with both shoulders only slightly visible at the bottom. The straw naturally touches the person's mouth, creating strong depth from the back towards the red ice in the foreground.

Background/Light:
{argument name="background" default="An old shopping street on a clear summer day"}. Visible are a wooden-style storefront, a shaved ice shop curtain, a strawberry-patterned sign, small white flags, and street trees. All text is treated as blurred, unreadable decoration. Strong sunlight enters from the top left, creating fine reflections and highlights on the transparent cup's water droplets, cup rim, ice, and red pulp. Shadows fall to the bottom right, and white cream residue forms a ring on the inside of the cup.

Composition/Camera:
An extreme low angle, as if the camera were placed near the bottom of the cup, just above the red ice. The fisheye lens causes the cup's circular rim to curve significantly, and the surrounding shopping street also distorts slightly. The bottom 45% of the screen is a foreground blur of red ice and pulp, the center is the straw and the woman's face, and the top is the blue sky and the cup's transparent rim. Focus is on the woman's eyes and mouth, with the ice in the foreground being a sparkling shallow blur.

Texture/Style:
Like a summer advertisement photo taken with a professional camera. High-definition expression of transparent plastic refraction, water droplets, coldness of the ice, and the freshness of the strawberry pulp. Vividly contrast the colors of the blue sky, red ice, green straw, and white blouse. Leave natural skin texture without excessive beauty correction. A bright, pop, and slightly humorous Japanese summer dessert photo.

zh.title: 鱼眼镜头下的夏日甜点视角
zh.description: 一个独特的鱼眼视角提示词，描绘了一位年轻女性啜饮草莓冰饮的画面，营造出一种流行且略带幽默的日系夏日氛围。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="冰块里的夏天"}

主要对象：
一张 2:3 的竖构图写实照片。采用超广角鱼眼构图，仿佛从一个大型透明塑料杯内部向上仰视。红色的草莓果肉和碎冰在画面下半部分显得格外巨大，一根粗大的绿色吸管从中心向远处延伸。透过杯口圆润且扭曲的视角，一位女性的面部居中呈现。

人物/表情：
一位自然写实的 {argument name="young woman" default="年轻女性"}。深棕色近乎黑色的头发扎成高丸子头，留着薄刘海，脸颊周围的碎发在阳光下呈现出纤细的光泽。透明的自然妆容，淡粉色的脸颊，以及水润的嘴唇。双眼圆睁直视镜头，双唇微圆含着吸管。表情可爱纯真，带着一丝惊讶。

服装/姿势：
一件白色蕾丝衬衫。领口和肩部有精致的褶边，质感轻盈，充满夏日气息。人物将脸靠近杯子的另一侧，双肩仅在底部隐约可见。吸管自然地触碰着人物的嘴唇，从背景向前景的红色冰块形成了强烈的纵深感。

背景/光影：
{argument name="background" default="晴朗夏日的老式商业街"}。可以看到木质风格的店面、刨冰店的门帘、草莓图案的招牌、白色小旗帜以及行道树。所有文字均处理为模糊、不可读的装饰。强烈的阳光从左上方射入，在透明杯子的水珠、杯缘、冰块和红色果肉上形成了细腻的反射和高光。阴影投射在右下方，杯子内侧留下一圈白色的奶油残余。

构图/摄影：
极低的角度，仿佛相机被放置在杯底附近，就在红色冰块的上方。鱼眼镜头使杯子的圆形边缘产生显著弯曲，周围的商业街也略微变形。画面底部 45% 为红色冰块和果肉的前景虚化，中心是吸管和女性的面部，顶部是蓝天和杯子的透明边缘。焦点对准女性的眼睛和嘴唇，前景的冰块呈现出闪烁的浅景深虚化效果。

质感/风格：
如同使用专业相机拍摄的夏日广告照片。高清呈现透明塑料的折射感、水珠、冰块的冷冽感以及草莓果肉的新鲜感。蓝天、红冰、绿吸管和白衬衫的色彩对比鲜明。保留自然的皮肤纹理，不做过度的美颜修饰。一张明亮、流行且略带幽默的日系夏日甜点照片。

zh.title: 夏季缘侧庭院肖像
zh.description: 一个极其详尽的提示词，用于生成一张高质量肖像，描绘夏日午后日本庭院溪流边身着浴衣的女性。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="双脚在水面上放松"}

主要人物：
{argument name="character" default="一张照片风格的肖像，描绘了一位女性坐在木屋的缘侧，面对着夏日的日本庭院，静静地将双脚浸入浅浅的水渠中"}。人物位于画面右侧中心，全身从头到脚可见。人物约占整个画面的 45%。画面左侧延伸出清澈的水渠和鹅卵石，后方布置着踏脚石、灌木和长满青苔的庭院岩石。

面部与表情：
20 多岁的成年女性。明亮的象牙米色皮肤，带有自然的粉色肤色。脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀、锁骨和腿部有柔和的高光，保留了细微的毛孔和细腻的皮肤纹理。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色和粉棕色眼影，长而细的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的浅棕色眉毛，以及半透明的粉米色亮面唇妆。眼睛里有小而清晰的眼神光。头部稍微向画面左侧倾斜，带着谦逊的微笑直视镜头。

服装与姿势：
{argument name="outfit" default="一件可爱的浴衣，以淡紫藤色为基调，散布着粉色、浅绯红和蓝绿色的小花"}。面料是轻薄的棉布，具有夏日的轻盈感，可见细密的织纹。腰间系着深紫色的腰带，使整体造型更显干练。领口呈自然的 V 字形，穿着宽松，露出颈部和锁骨。女性坐在缘侧边缘，上半身微微后倾。右手放在腰后的木地板上，左手自然垂在身侧。双膝并拢，斜向前伸，将小腿和脚浸入水中。脚踝周围泛起细小的涟漪，水面的倒影在湿润的双脚上晃动。在她的右侧，自然地摆放着一双浅色木质底、带有花纹人字带的木屐。

背景与光影：
右侧是木屋的缘侧、带有竖格栅的拉门和深色木柱。左侧是一条延伸至远处的浅清澈水渠，底部可见大小不一的圆石。在后方的庭院中，布置着大型踏脚石、长满青苔的庭院岩石、灌木、蕨类植物和郁郁葱葱的绿叶，展现出夏日日本庭院的湿润与宁静。主光源是午后前来自左上方的自然光。透过叶片的阳光在头发、右肩、胸部、大腿、缘侧和水面上形成了不规则的光斑。面部光线不过分明亮，带有来自水面和木地板的柔和反射光。缘侧后方和建筑内部沉浸在平静的阴影中，而庭院的绿植和水面则显得明亮耀眼。

构图与摄影：
纵向位置，接近 4:5 的竖构图。略微俯视人物的相机角度。人物位于右侧，面部位于右上三分之一处，脚部位于下方中心。左侧留有宽阔的水渠空间，形成了对角线构图。相当于 35-50mm 的自然焦距。焦点清晰地对准面部和上半身，庭院后方略微模糊。中等景深，以体现空间关系。

质感与风格：
高清写实照片。一张在自然光下拍摄的日本夏季肖像。皮肤光滑但保留了细腻的纹理。头发真实地表现出每一缕发丝的流动和光泽。真实描绘了浴衣的薄棉面料、腰带的织纹、湿润的双脚、木材的陈旧感、圆石的质感，以及水的折射和反射。色彩以淡紫藤色、深紫色、木棕色、庭院绿和水蓝绿色为主，具有透明的自然饱和度。避免过度的 HDR 或人工锐化。

en.title: Japanese Woman Poolside Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating a high-definition realistic portrait of a young Japanese woman sitting by a turquoise pool in a private villa.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="Light unraveling on the water surface"}

Main Subject:
Depict one {argument name="person" default="Japanese woman in her early 20s"} sitting on the stone edge of a bright outdoor pool. The person is placed slightly to the right of the center, in a near-full-body portrait showing head to toe. The person occupies about 70% of the screen, with turquoise blue water and open white space widely left on the left side.

Character/Expression:
Bright ivory-beige white skin. Smooth texture with a hint of natural pink flush and visible skin grain. Apply soft highlights to the cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, and collarbones. Dark brown hair tied in a high loose bun, leaving thin see-through bangs and stray hairs around the face. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink brown eyeshadow, long thin eyelashes, natural eye bags, soft light brown eyebrows, and sheer pink beige glossy lips. Small clear catchlights in the pupils. Face tilted slightly to the left of the screen, lips slightly open, looking at the camera with a gentle gaze.

Clothing/Pose:
Light ivory halter neck bikini. The top has fine vertical gathers and soft volume, and the bottom is an elegant design tied with thin strings on both sides. The body is a well-proportioned model figure typical of a mature woman, with natural curves at the waist and chest while keeping the thighs slim to balance the full body ratio. Sitting shallowly on the stone edge, both knees bent and extended towards the front left of the screen. The person's left arm is bent overhead, fingertips lightly touching the bun. The right hand rests on the stone surface beside the body, quietly supporting the weight. Shoulder and waist slightly twisted, leaning the back against a pillar.

Background/Light:
{argument name="background" default="Outdoor pool of a modern Japanese private villa"}. Pale beige stone pillar on the right, transparent turquoise blue water surface on the left. In the mid-ground, a low-rise building combining white walls and wood; in the background, small potted trees and deep greenery. Summer sunlight enters from the top left, not too strong, illuminating the face, shoulders, chest, and top of the legs. Soft shadows remain on the pillar side, with pale blue reflected light from the water surface thinly showing on the underside of the legs and waist.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical 3:4. Full-body portrait taken from a position slightly lower than eye level. Move the person to the right side of the screen to create depth in the pool on the left. Natural compression equivalent to 70-85mm. The face and upper body are the sharpest, with the background gently blurred. Feet are naturally contained at the bottom of the screen, with a small amount of space left overhead.

Texture/Style:
High-definition realistic portrait. Bright and clean summer resort photo. Skin is not overly homogenized, leaving fine texture and natural flush. Delicate depiction of water reflections, fine irregularities in the stone, bikini gathers, and individual strands of hair. Soft contrast, with transparent tones based on pale ivory and turquoise.

zh.title: 日本女性泳池边肖像
zh.description: 一个用于生成高清写实肖像的详细提示词，描绘了一位坐在私人别墅绿松石色泳池边的年轻日本女性。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="水面上粼粼的波光"}

主要人物：
描绘一位 {argument name="person" default="20 多岁出头的日本女性"} 坐在明亮的室外泳池石边。人物位于画面中心偏右，呈现从头到脚的近全身肖像。人物占据约 70% 的画面，左侧留有大面积的绿松石色水面和留白。

人物/表情：
明亮的象牙米白色皮肤。质感细腻，带有自然的粉色红晕和可见的皮肤纹理。在脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和锁骨处施加柔和的高光。深棕色头发扎成松散的高丸子头，留有稀疏的空气刘海和脸颊两侧的碎发。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色和粉棕色眼影，纤长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的浅棕色眉毛，以及透亮的粉米色唇彩。瞳孔中有清晰的小型眼神光。脸部向画面左侧微倾，双唇微张，以温柔的目光注视着镜头。

服装/姿势：
浅象牙色挂脖比基尼。上衣有细密的垂直褶皱和柔和的廓形，下装为两侧系细带的优雅设计。身材是成熟女性典型的匀称模特身材，腰部和胸部曲线自然，大腿纤细，保持全身比例平衡。浅坐在石边，双膝弯曲并向画面左前方延伸。人物左臂向上弯曲，指尖轻触丸子头。右手放在身侧的石面上，静静支撑着身体。肩部和腰部轻微扭转，背部靠在柱子上。

背景/光线：
{argument name="background" default="现代日本私人别墅的室外泳池"}。右侧为浅米色石柱，左侧为透明的绿松石色水面。中景为结合了白墙与木质结构的低层建筑；背景为小型盆栽树木和深色绿植。夏日阳光从左上方射入，光线适中，照亮了脸部、肩膀、胸部和腿部上方。柱子一侧留有柔和的阴影，水面的淡蓝色反射光隐约映在腿部下方和腰部。

构图/摄影：
竖构图 3:4。从略低于视平线的位置拍摄全身肖像。将人物移至画面右侧，以在左侧泳池营造深度感。相当于 70-85mm 镜头的自然压缩感。脸部和上半身最为清晰，背景轻微虚化。双脚自然地包含在画面底部，头顶留有少量空间。

质感/风格：
高清写实肖像。明亮清爽的夏日度假照片。皮肤未过度磨皮，保留了细腻的纹理和自然的红晕。细腻地刻画了水面反射、石材的细微不平整、比基尼褶皱以及每一根发丝。对比度柔和，以浅象牙色和绿松石色为基调，呈现通透的色调。

zh.title: 蜡笔画风格儿童画重绘
zh.description: 将现有图像转换为迷人的蜡笔插画，模仿儿童简单纯真的绘画风格，呈现明亮、活泼的色彩和奇思妙想的细节。
zh.prompt: 将给定的图像重绘为 {argument name="style" default="蜡笔风格插画"}，将整个场景转化为仿佛由 {argument name="age" default="10 岁儿童"} 手绘的作品。保持形态简洁且略带不完美感，如同儿童的画作。避免使用原始配色方案，将其替换为在干净白纸背景上的明亮、活泼的蜡笔色彩。追求柔和、可爱且纯真的美学效果。融入充满童趣的细节，例如 {argument name="details" default="城堡或塔楼、糖果、星星、云朵"} 以及其他奇思妙想的装饰，以增强趣味氛围。最终效果应充满魅力、色彩丰富且富有童心想象力。

zh.title: 产品推广时尚大片
zh.description: 一款专为产品广告设计的专业时尚摄影提示词，采用夸张的视角和高调摄影棚布光，呈现出现代商业美学。
zh.prompt: 低角度时尚大片摄影，一位自信的模特将一个巨大的 {argument name="product name" default="产品"} 靠近镜头，夸张的视角使手部和产品占据前景，背景中可见全身姿态，双脚分开，动态姿势，{argument name="background" default="干净纯白的摄影棚背景"}，高调布光，焦点清晰对准产品，模特处有轻微景深，{argument name="outfit" default="色彩大胆且对比强烈的服装"}，现代美妆广告美学，构图极简，商业摄影棚摄影，可见光泽感包装细节，阴影清晰锐利

en.title: Summer Sea Breeze Drive Portrait
en.description: A refreshing fashion-style prompt for gpt-image-2 featuring a woman enjoying the sea breeze from a car window, with a focus on crochet textures and a bright summer sky.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="unwinding in the sea breeze"}

Main Figure:
A vertical 3:4 realistic fashion photograph. A woman leaning her upper body out of the open window of a dark blue car, positioned slightly to the right of center. Captured from the waist up, she occupies about 60% of the screen. Both hands rest on the window frame as she looks up at the bright sky, feeling the sea breeze.

Person and Expression:
A youthful and natural woman with a friendly face, clear eyes, soft eyebrows, and light coral pink lips. Her chin is slightly raised, maintaining an angle where eyes, nose, and mouth are clearly visible, with her gaze directed toward the upper-left sky. A natural and refreshing smile. Her dark brown medium-long hair has light layers and thin bangs, with the ends blowing backward in the wind.

Clothing and Pose:
{argument name="outfit" default="A delicate cream-colored crochet top"}. Featuring an elegant V-neck, a thin ribbon in the center, long flared sleeves, and a short hem. Clearly shows a fair, glowing décolletage, collarbones, and a slim waistline. A mature, well-proportioned feminine physique with natural, three-dimensional bust details. The bottom consists of ivory high-waisted pants and a thin brown belt. Both arms are extended diagonally downward, with palms lightly supporting her on the window frame. Fingers are naturally open, with no excessive force in the shoulders or wrists.

Background and Light:
{argument name="background" default="A scenic coastal driveway on a summer day"}. Mid-ground features the blue sea, a green cape, and wooden guardrails. Far-ground shows faint mountains and the horizon. A large expanse of blue sky with thin, drifting white clouds fills the top. Strong, clear midday sunlight from the upper right creates translucent highlights on the forehead, cheeks, bridge of the nose, neck, collarbones, shoulders, and chest. Skin is fair and bright but not overexposed, retaining fine texture and natural moisture. Soft shadows in the hollows of the neck and collarbones, with blue reflections of the sky and sea on the car body.

Composition and Camera:
Medium shot from the waist up. Taken from a slightly low angle, the face is near the center, leaving a large margin of sky above. The top edge of the car door serves as a horizontal line at the bottom, with the coastline receding into the distance. Equivalent to 35mm, focus on the face and upper body, with the background lightly blurred. Angle ensures both the facial features and collarbones look beautiful without over-tilting the neck.

Texture and Style:
A bright and clean live-action photo like a summer fashion magazine. Carefully depicts natural skin glow, soft shadows around the collarbones, fine strands of hair, the 3-dimensional texture of the crochet knit, and the gloss of the dark blue car body. Refreshing color palette based on blue sky, sea, cream, and dark blue. Avoids excessive skin retouching, balancing transparency with realistic skin texture.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, unnatural physique, extra fingers, missing fingers, wrist or joint failures, poor contact with window frame, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light, overexposure, plastic skin, garbled text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 夏季海岸公路时尚人像
zh.description: 一个用于生成写实时尚摄影的高质量提示词，描绘了一位女性从海边车窗探出身子，捕捉夏季光影与海风的画面。
zh.prompt: 主题：海风中的舒展。主体：一张 3:4 的写实时尚照片。一位 {argument name="person" default="成年女性"} 从一辆 {argument name="car color" default="深蓝色"} 汽车的敞开车窗探出身子，位于画面中心偏右位置。展示从腰部到头部的上半身，占据约 60% 的画面。捕捉她抬头望向明亮天空、感受海风的瞬间。特征：年轻自然的女性，面容亲切，眼神清澈，笑容清新。深棕色长发随风飘动。服装：{argument name="clothing" default="精致的米色钩针编织上衣"}，搭配 V 领和象牙白长裤。背景：海岸公路，伴有湛蓝大海、绿色海角和广阔的夏季天空。光影：来自右上方的强烈正午自然光，在皮肤和肩部形成清晰的高光。构图：略微仰拍的中景镜头。等效 35mm 镜头。风格：明亮清爽的实拍照片，如同夏季杂志大片。

en.title: Character Brain Meeting Scene Generator
en.description: A complex prompt for GPT Image 2 that generates a detailed illustration of twelve mini-versions of your character holding a boardroom meeting inside their head, complete with personalized speech bubbles debating a chosen topic.
en.prompt:
[Information Field]

Character Name: {argument name="character name" default="Name"} (Required)

Additional Idea (Agenda): {argument name="topic" default="Tonight's dinner"} (Required)

Supplementary Information: {argument name="additional notes" default="Optional"}
*Enter tone, personality, settings, or expressions to avoid.

──────────────

[Most Important Instruction]

This is not a request to output text for image generation. Directly refer to the attached original character image and generate the final image itself that satisfies the following conditions.

The final output should be only the image; do not output descriptions, confirmation text, prompts, or notes.

──────────────

[Complete Character Maintenance]

Based on the attached original character, draw 12 thought agents split from the same person. All 12 must have a completely unified design recognizable as the same person. Maintain features as per the attached image: facial features, hairstyle/color/length, eye shape/pupil color/pattern, skin color, costume/color scheme/decorations, unique features (ears, horns, tails, fangs), mouth shape, and tooth type/arrangement. Differences are expressed only through expressions, gaze, pose, emotions, items, and speech bubble content.

──────────────

[Body Proportions and Number]

Draw all 12 people as cute chibi characters with approx. 2-head-high proportions. Exactly 12 people, including the chairperson. All must have the same proportions and build. No extra people in backgrounds. Ensure all 12 faces and features are clearly visible.

──────────────

[Scene to Generate]

Generate a single comic illustration of a 'Brain Meeting' where 12 thought agents are noisily debating an agenda inside the character's head. It should feel comical and relatable. It is one unified meeting where statements connect as pros, cons, rebuttals, or solutions. Use the provided agenda; if blank, set a realistic daily worry for the character.

──────────────

[The 12 Thought Agents]

1. Chairperson (Organizes opinions), 2. Logic (Reality check), 3. Optimism (Positive plans), 4. Anxiety (Failures/Countermeasures), 5. Decisiveness (Priorities), 6. Instinct/Desire (Basic needs), 7. Laziness (Efficiency), 8. Delusion/Romance (Grand ideas), 9. Common Sense (Restraint), 10. Curiosity (Experiments), 11. Experience (Past lessons), 12. Inspiration (Combinations).

──────────────

[Statements of Each Agent]

Give each of the 12 a Japanese speech bubble. Statements must be specific, not simple one-liners. Include at least two elements: what to do, why, when, which plan, risks, countermeasures, compromises, or rebuttals. Keep bubbles to 2-3 readable lines. Connect tails correctly to speakers.

──────────────

[Composition]

Fixed 16:9 aspect ratio. Large conference table in the center with the chairperson at the head. Balance the remaining 11 across the foreground, middle, and background. Place a sign at the top center saying '{argument name="character name" default="Name"}'s Brain Meeting' and 'Today's Agenda: {argument name="topic" default="Tonight's dinner"}'.

──────────────

[Art Style and Quality]

- High-quality 2D anime illustration
- Full color
- Approx. 2-head-high cute chibi characters
- Maintain the original art style and atmosphere
- Completely unified design for all 12
- Richly varied expressions and poses
- Comical and lively

zh.title: 角色大脑会议场景生成器
zh.description: 这是一个用于 GPT Image 2 的复杂提示词，可生成一张精细的插图，展示 12 个迷你版角色在脑内举行董事会会议，并配有针对特定议题进行辩论的个性化对话气泡。
zh.prompt:
[信息字段]

角色名称：{argument name="character name" default="Name"}（必填）

补充想法（议题）：{argument name="topic" default="Tonight's dinner"}（必填）

补充信息：{argument name="additional notes" default="Optional"}
*输入语气、性格、设定或需要避免的表情。

──────────────

[最重要的指令]

这不是要求输出用于图像生成的文本。请直接参考附件中的原始角色图像，并直接生成满足以下条件的最终图像。

最终输出应仅为图像；请勿输出描述、确认文本、提示词或注释。

──────────────

[完整的角色一致性]

基于附件中的原始角色，绘制 12 个从同一人分化出来的思维 Agent。所有 12 个角色必须拥有完全统一的设计，确保能被识别为同一个人。请严格保持附件图像中的特征：面部特征、发型/发色/长度、眼睛形状/瞳孔颜色/图案、肤色、服装/配色方案/装饰、独特特征（耳朵、角、尾巴、獠牙）、嘴型以及牙齿类型/排列。差异仅通过表情、视线、姿势、情绪、物品和对话气泡内容来体现。

──────────────

[身体比例与数量]

将所有 12 个人物绘制为可爱的 Q 版角色，比例约为 2 头身。必须包含主席在内共 12 人。所有人必须具有相同的比例和体型。背景中不得出现额外人物。确保所有 12 张脸和特征清晰可见。

──────────────

[待生成的场景]

生成一张漫画风格的插图，描绘 12 个思维 Agent 在角色脑内针对议题进行激烈辩论的“大脑会议”。场景应具有喜剧感且易于产生共鸣。这是一个统一的会议，发言内容需相互关联，包括赞成、反对、反驳或解决方案。请使用提供的议题；如果为空，则设定一个该角色现实生活中的日常烦恼。

──────────────

[12 个思维 Agent]

1. 主席（组织意见），2. 逻辑（现实核查），3. 乐观（积极计划），4. 焦虑（失败/对策），5. 果断（优先级），6. 本能/欲望（基本需求），7. 懒惰（效率），8. 幻想/浪漫（宏大构想），9. 常识（克制），10. 好奇心（实验），11. 经验（过往教训），12. 灵感（组合）。

──────────────

[每个 Agent 的发言]

为 12 个角色中的每一个添加日语对话气泡。发言必须具体，不能是简单的单句。至少包含两个要素：要做什么、为什么、何时、哪个计划、风险、对策、妥协或反驳。气泡内容保持在 2-3 行易读的文字。对话气泡的指向必须准确连接到发言者。

──────────────

[构图]

固定 16:9 纵横比。中央放置大型会议桌，主席位于桌首。其余 11 人分布在前景、中景和背景中。在顶部中央放置一个标牌，写着“{argument name="character name" default="Name"} 的大脑会议”和“今日议题：{argument name="topic" default="Tonight's dinner"}”。

──────────────

[艺术风格与质量]

- 高质量 2D 动漫插画
- 全彩
- 约 2 头身可爱 Q 版角色
- 保持原始艺术风格和氛围
- 12 个角色的设计完全统一
- 表情和姿势丰富多样
- 充满喜剧感和活力

en.title: Infinity Pool Hair Flip
en.description: A high-speed photography prompt capturing a woman flipping her hair in an infinity pool, creating a dramatic arc of water droplets against a summer sky.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Beyond the Water Ripple

Main Subject:
Vertical 4:5. The moment a mature adult woman flips her long wet black hair back in an infinity pool on a hill by the seaside in midsummer. The person is positioned slightly to the lower right of the center, with the head to the waist occupying about half the screen. Hair and water splashes spread toward the blue sky in a huge arc, with transparent water droplets dancing across the top of the screen.

Character and Expression:
An adult woman with a natural and well-structured skeleton. Refined proportions like a model and a calm, mature atmosphere. The skin is bright, white, and fine-grained, with natural luster and gloss on the surface of the wet skin. The wet black hair is waist-length, spreading widely to the back right while adorned with water droplets. Face tilted diagonally upward, eyes closed, and lips slightly parted in a calm expression. The neck is stretched long, with a relaxed atmosphere and shoulders loose.

Clothing and Pose:
A simple {argument name="swimwear type" default="halter neck bikini"} in an {argument name="swimwear color" default="ivory color"} close to white. An elegant design with minimal decoration, featuring thin straps tied at the back and waist. Kneeling in shallow water, pulling the waist back while beautifully arching the upper body. A flowing silhouette naturally connecting the chest to the waist and hips. Both arms are lowered naturally in front of the body, with fingertips just before touching the water surface. A large arch of water is drawn from overhead to the left side by the momentum of the hair flip.

Background and Light:
A view from a hill reminiscent of a seaside hot spring resort. To the left is the blue sea and a small bay, with low-rise houses and inns along the coast, and distant green mountains. To the right is modern white architecture with large glass windows and thin curtains swaying slightly in the wind. A clear midsummer day with a deep blue sky and a few thin clouds. The primary light is strong natural light from the upper left. Bright highlights appear on the shoulders, cheeks, neck, chest, hair, and water droplets, with soft shadows on the right. Blue reflections from the pool's surface reflect gently onto the skin and the building.

Composition and Camera:
Vertical 4:5, medium long shot. Camera at a level point slightly higher than the water surface. The person is in the lower half, while the hair and water splashes occupy most of the upper half. Wide negative space is left in the upper left sky, with the building on the right framing the scene. Focus on the face, wet hair, and water droplets. The coastal town in the background is slightly blurred to emphasize the person and the water arc. Natural perspective equivalent to 35mm, 1/2000 sec high-speed shutter to freeze droplets clearly.

Texture and Style:
Realistic fashion photo reminiscent of a resort feature in a magazine. High-definition depiction of transparent turquoise blue water, fine droplets, wet hair clumps, and natural skin shadows. A refreshing and clean color scheme based on white, blue, and dark green. Contrast is slightly high but maintains the softness of the skin and water transparency. A photographic expression that conveys both the heat of the summer sun and the comfort of the sea breeze.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural body shape, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, unnatural gravity, poor contact between water and hair, hair duplication, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with the light source, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-like skin, text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 电影感甩发无边泳池摄影
zh.description: 一个专业的时尚摄影提示词，捕捉女性在无边泳池中甩动头发的瞬间，呈现逼真的水滴效果和高速快门质感。
zh.prompt:
主题：
水环之外

主体：
垂直 4:5 比例。盛夏时节，一位气质成熟的女性在悬崖边的无边泳池中向后甩动湿润长发。主体位于画面中心偏右下方，头部至腰部的身体占据约一半画面。头发和水花呈巨大的弧线向蓝天扩散，透明的水滴在屏幕上方飞舞。

人物/表情：
骨骼结构自然匀称的成年女性。模特般精致的比例，散发着沉稳成熟的气质。皮肤白皙明亮，质感细腻，湿润的表面带有自然的润泽感。湿润的黑发长及腰部，带着水滴向右后方大幅度散开。面部斜向上方，双眼微闭，双唇微启，表情宁静。颈部修长，姿态放松且自然。

服装/姿势：
简约的象牙白（近白色）挂脖比基尼。设计优雅，装饰极简，背部和腰部系有细带。跪在浅水中，上半身优雅地拱起，臀部微向后收。从胸部到腰部和臀部的线条自然流畅。双臂自然垂在身体前方，指尖即将触碰水面。甩发产生的惯性在头顶上方至左侧划出一道巨大的水弧。

背景/光影：
俯瞰视角，令人联想到海滨温泉度假村。左侧背景为蓝色大海和小海湾，海岸边分布着低矮的房屋和旅馆，远处是连绵的青山。右侧为现代白色建筑，大落地窗前薄纱窗帘随风轻拂。盛夏晴天，深蓝色的天空中飘着几朵薄云。主光源为来自左上方的强烈自然光。肩膀、脸颊、颈部、胸部、头发和水滴上呈现出明亮的高光，右侧投下柔和的阴影。泳池表面的蓝色反射光柔和地映照在皮肤和建筑上。

构图/摄影：
垂直 4:5 比例，中远景。相机角度与视线齐平，略高于水面。人物位于画面下半部分，头发和水花占据上半部分的大部分空间。左上方留有广阔的天空余白，右侧的建筑使整体构图更加紧凑。焦点集中在面部、湿发和水滴上。背景的沿海城镇景观略微模糊，以突出人物和水环。35mm 镜头的自然透视感，1/2000 秒的高速快门清晰地定格了水滴。

质感/风格：
写实风格的时尚摄影，令人联想到杂志度假专题。高清呈现透明的绿松石色水体、细小的水滴、湿发丝的纹理以及自然的皮肤阴影。以白、蓝、深绿为主的清爽配色。对比度略高，但呈现出不失皮肤柔和感和水体透明度的高级质感。摄影表现既传达了夏日阳光的炽热，又体现了海风的舒适感。

负面提示词：
面部不自然、身体比例不自然、多指、缺指、肢体融合、关节断裂、重力不自然、水与头发接触不真实、头发重叠、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤、文字、Logo、水印。

en.title: Summer Water Surface Portrait
en.description: A high-quality prompt for generating a realistic summer portrait of a woman jumping over sparkling blue water, emphasizing natural movement and high-key lighting.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="theme" default="Summer Stepping on Light"}

Main Subject:
A {argument name="ratio" default="vertical 3:4"} photograph. The moment a woman walks lightly as if hopping over a sparkling blue water surface. The figure is shown in full body, slightly to the right of the center, from the upper body to the tips of the toes. The background is an expanse of water with white light reflections scattered throughout the frame.

Character and Expression:
A natural and realistic woman. Her {argument name="hair color" default="light brown"} hair is tied in a low, loose ponytail, with thin bangs and wisps of hair around her face fluttering slightly in the wind. Her face is tilted slightly downward, looking at the water at her feet. Her mouth is relaxed in a subtle smile, showing a quiet focus amidst the summer light.

Clothing and Pose:
Wears a thin, sheer white short-sleeved shirt over a white sleeveless inner top. Bottoms are off-white high-waisted shorts with a thin drawcord at the waist. White socks and white sneakers. Stepping forward significantly with the right foot toward the bottom of the frame, with the left leg lightly bent behind. The left arm is extended horizontally to the left, and the right arm is raised high to the upper right. All five fingers on both hands are naturally separated in a relaxed shape. No defects in wrists or joints; natural movement to maintain balance.

Background and Light:
A shallow, clear blue water surface spreads across the frame, with small ripples and white reflections shining like countless grains. Strong midsummer sunlight shines from the upper right, creating bright highlights on the hair, shoulders, shirt edges, and arms. A dark shadow of the figure falls long on the water surface at the lower left, appearing slightly wobbly amidst the reflections.

Composition and Camera:
A high-angle camera looking down. A composition where the character's movement flows diagonally, forming a large triangle from the right arm to the left arm and the extended right foot. The focus is on the character's face and upper body, with the light on the water surface spreading across the background as large, round bokeh. Leave enough water space around the character to create a sense of floating and openness.

Texture and Style:
A realistic summer portrait photo. High-key exposure, translucent skin, soft fabric texture of white clothes, and natural hair thinness. A clean color palette based on blue and white, carefully expressing the brightness of strong sunlight and water surface reflections. Avoid excessive skin retouching for a natural and light finish like a magazine photo.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, too long fingers, fusion of limbs, broken joints, body floating too much, unnatural gravity, incorrect shadows, reflections inconsistent with the light source, text, logo, watermark, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏季水面人像
zh.description: 一个用于生成写实夏季人像的高质量提示词，描绘女性在波光粼粼的蓝色水面上跳跃的瞬间，强调自然动态与高调照明。
zh.prompt:
主题：
{argument name="theme" default="夏日踏光"}

主体：
一张 {argument name="ratio" default="竖构图 3:4"} 的照片。捕捉一位女性仿佛在波光粼粼的蓝色水面上轻盈跳跃的瞬间。画面展示全身人像，人物位于画面中心偏右，从上半身到脚尖完整呈现。背景是广阔的水面，画面中散布着白色的光斑反射。

人物与表情：
一位自然且写实的女性。她 {argument name="hair color" default="浅棕色"} 的头发扎成松散的低马尾，稀疏的刘海和脸颊旁的碎发在风中微微飘动。她微微低头，注视着脚下的水面。嘴角带着放松而微妙的微笑，在夏日的光影中展现出宁静的专注。

服装与姿势：
身穿一件轻薄的白色短袖衬衫，内搭白色无袖上衣。下身穿着米白色高腰短裤，腰间系有细抽绳。穿着白色袜子和白色运动鞋。右脚向画面下方大幅迈出，左腿在身后轻微弯曲。左臂向左水平伸展，右臂高举向右上方。双手五指自然分开，呈放松状态。手腕和关节无缺陷，保持平衡的动作自然。

背景与光影：
浅蓝色的清澈水面铺满整个画面，细小的涟漪和白色的反射光如同无数颗粒般闪烁。强烈的盛夏阳光从右上方照射，在头发、肩膀、衬衫边缘和手臂上形成明亮的高光。人物的深色影子在左下角的水面上拉长，在波光中显得略微摇曳。

构图与镜头：
高角度俯拍。人物动作呈对角线流动，从右臂到左臂再到伸出的右脚，构成一个大三角形。焦点位于人物的面部和上半身，水面上的光线在背景中形成大而圆的虚化光斑。在人物周围留出足够的空间，营造出漂浮感和开阔感。

质感与风格：
写实风格的夏季人像摄影。高调曝光，通透的皮肤，白色衣物柔软的织物纹理，以及自然的头发质感。以蓝白色为主的干净色调，细腻地表现出强烈阳光和水面反射的亮度。避免过度磨皮，呈现出如同杂志照片般自然轻盈的质感。

负面提示词：
面部不自然、眼神不自然、多指、缺指、手指过长、肢体融合、关节断裂、身体漂浮感过重、重力不自然、阴影错误、反射与光源不一致、文字、Logo、水印、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Summer Sky Cat Cloud
en.description: A creative and surreal prompt for GPT Image 2 that generates a scene of a woman gazing at a giant cumulonimbus cloud shaped like a cat over a Japanese seaside town.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="theme" default="Cat Walking in the Summer Sky"}

Main Subject:
A {argument name="ratio" default="vertical 4:5"} photographic work. Set against a quiet Japanese slope leading to the sea, a woman stands slightly to the right of center, while a giant white cumulonimbus cloud in the sky forms the shape of a cat. The woman occupies about 40% of the lower half of the frame, and the cloud cat is overwhelming in size, covering a wide area of the sky. A summer scene where reality and fantasy naturally connect, emphasizing the scale difference between the person and the cloud.

Character and Expression:
A natural and realistic adult woman. Tall with long limbs and a well-proportioned physique like a sophisticated fashion model. Long {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair waves loosely and flows slightly backward in the summer breeze. Elegant Japanese-style makeup, translucent skin, gentle eyebrows, and clear eyes. Faces the upper left, looking up at the giant cat cloud. Her mouth is slightly open, with an expression mixed with surprise and quiet longing.

Clothing and Pose:
A summer long dress based in pale ivory. Thin shoulder straps, a clear V-neck that isn't too deep, and a three-dimensional cut that naturally follows the body from the chest to the waist. {argument name="pattern" default="A fine blue-gray botanical pattern"} with a thin knot of the same fabric at the waist. The skirt is made of a light, thin material with a modest slit on one side, and the hem sways slightly in the wind. A small rattan bag hangs from her right hand, and her left arm is naturally at her side. Standing in a composed model pose with weight on one leg and the other knee slightly relaxed.

Background and Light:
A Japanese seaside residential area. Stone walls, low fences, old wooden houses with tiled roofs, thin utility poles and wires, and hydrangeas along the slope. Beyond the slope, the blue sea and a distant peninsula are visible. The sky is a deep summer blue. The giant cloud is in the shape of a long-haired cat extending its front paws, with ears, nose, cheeks, chest, and rounded front paws formed as natural cumulus masses. The cloud surface has fine bulges and soft shadows, making it stand out as a cloud rather than animal fur. Strong midday sunlight from the upper left. Bright highlights on the character's shoulders, cheeks, collarbone, and hair edges. Shadows fall toward the lower right of the frame, with pale bluish reflections from the sea and white walls.

Composition and Camera:
Vertical 4:5, medium full shot with a slightly low eye level. Shows the woman significantly from above the knees to the head while leaving enough of the background slope and sea. The person is slightly to the right of center, the cat cloud's face is at the upper left, and the extended front paw points to the upper right. Use about half of the upper part for the blue sky and cloud, with a composition where the person's gaze and the cat cloud's face connect diagonally. 85mm equivalent natural compression, focusing clearly on the person while slightly blurring the background, but keeping the cityscape and sea discernible.

Texture and Style:
High-definition realistic photographic expression. Clear midsummer air, vivid blue and white contrast, soft skin texture, natural hair, light non-see-through fabric, and carefully depicted rattan weave. A calm color tone like a fashion magazine location shoot. Avoid excessive HDR or artificial skin retouching, adding a small amount of film grain and natural light bleed.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, excessive chest emphasis, extra fingers, missing fingers, fusion of limbs, broken joints, poor contact with the rattan bag, unnatural fabric digging, unnatural gravity, clouds looking like plush toys, cat outlines being too hard, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with the light source, garbled text, logo, watermark, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏日天空的猫咪云
zh.description: 这是一个为 GPT Image 2 设计的创意超现实提示词，旨在生成一幅画面：一位女性在日本海滨小镇凝视着一朵巨大的猫形积雨云。
zh.prompt:
主题：
{argument name="theme" default="夏日天空漫步的猫"}

主体：
一幅 {argument name="ratio" default="竖构图 4:5"} 的摄影作品。背景是通往大海的宁静日本坡道，一位女性站在画面中偏右的位置，天空中一朵巨大的白色积雨云形成了猫的形状。女性占据了画面下半部分约 40% 的空间，而猫形云朵体型巨大，覆盖了天空的大部分区域。这是一个现实与幻想自然融合的夏日场景，强调了人物与云朵之间的尺度差异。

人物与表情：
一位自然且写实的成年女性。身材高挑，四肢修长，比例匀称，如同精致的时装模特。长长的 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"} 秀发微微卷曲，在夏日的微风中轻轻向后飘动。优雅的日系妆容，皮肤通透，眉目温柔，眼神清澈。面朝左上方，仰望着巨大的猫咪云。嘴唇微张，表情中交织着惊讶与宁静的向往。

服装与姿态：
一件淡象牙色的夏季长裙。细肩带，V 领设计适中，立体剪裁自然贴合从胸部到腰部的曲线。{argument name="pattern" default="精致的蓝灰色植物花纹"}，腰间系着同材质的细带。裙摆采用轻薄面料，一侧有适度的开衩，随风轻轻摆动。右手拎着一个小藤编包，左臂自然垂在身侧。以模特姿态站立，重心落在一条腿上，另一侧膝盖微微放松。

背景与光影：
日本海滨住宅区。石墙、矮篱笆、带有瓦片的古老木屋、细长的电线杆和电线，以及坡道旁的绣球花。越过坡道，可以看到蔚蓝的大海和远处的半岛。天空是深邃的夏日蓝。巨大的云朵呈现出一只长毛猫伸出前爪的形状，耳朵、鼻子、脸颊、胸部和圆润的前爪均由自然的积云团块构成。云朵表面有细微的隆起和柔和的阴影，使其看起来更像云而非动物皮毛。强烈的正午阳光从左上方射入。人物的肩膀、脸颊、锁骨和发丝边缘有明亮的高光。阴影落在画面的右下方，带有来自大海和白色墙壁的淡蓝色反射光。

构图与摄影：
竖构图 4:5，中全景，视角略低。展示了女性从膝盖以上到头部的画面，同时保留了足够的背景坡道和大海。人物位于画面中心偏右，猫咪云的脸部位于左上方，伸出的前爪指向右上方。画面上半部分约一半用于表现蓝天和云朵，人物的视线与猫咪云的脸部形成对角线呼应。使用 85mm 等效焦距的自然压缩感，焦点清晰地对准人物，背景略微虚化，但仍能辨认出城市景观和大海。

质感与风格：
高清写实摄影风格。清澈的盛夏空气感，鲜明的蓝白对比，柔和的皮肤质感，自然的头发，轻薄不透光的面料，以及细腻描绘的藤编纹理。色调沉稳，如同时尚杂志的外景拍摄。避免过度的 HDR 或人工磨皮，加入少量胶片颗粒感和自然的光晕效果。

负面提示词：
不自然的脸部，不自然的视线，过分强调胸部，多余的手指，缺失的手指，肢体融合，关节断裂，与藤编包接触不良，不自然的布料褶皱，不符合重力，云朵看起来像毛绒玩具，猫的轮廓过于生硬，透视错误，阴影与光源不一致，乱码文字，Logo，水印，过度磨皮，塑料感皮肤。

zh.title: 温馨夜间卧室人像
zh.description: 一份用于生成高质量、写实风格室内人像的综合提示词，场景设定为夜晚的日式公寓卧室。侧重于暖色调灯光、柔和的质感以及放松的氛围。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="余晖下的夜晚"}

主体内容：
{argument name="setting" default="一位女性在夜间卧室的白色床上放松地躺着"}。将上半身从中心显著向左偏移，面部和胸部占据画面中心。在右侧远处加入窗户和床头灯，以平衡人物的近景感与夜晚的深度。

人物/表情：
一位自然写实、五官精致的女性。深棕色头发低低地松散扎起，留有稀疏的刘海和散落在脸颊旁的碎发。脸部略微转向画面右侧，仅视线回望镜头。眼睑放松，表情平静，双唇微闭。采用优雅的日系妆容，{argument name="lip color" default="粉米色"}唇色，淡玫瑰色腮红，睫毛纤细精致，卧蚕妆感自然内敛。

服装/姿态：
一件浅灰褐色的罗纹吊带背心。胸前装饰着细象牙色蕾丝，勾勒出顺应身体曲线的柔和轮廓。外搭一件薄款灰白色居家开衫，一侧自然滑落至肩下。人物右手弯曲置于头顶，指尖轻触头发。左臂沿身体一侧放置，隐藏在被子下。倚靠在枕头上，姿态放松，腰部有轻微扭转。描绘出服装和床上用品随重力产生的细微褶皱。

背景/光影：
宁静的日式公寓卧室。前景是微微褶皱的白色被褥，中景是人物和枕头，背景右侧有一个小型木制床头柜和一盏暖色调台灯。左侧远处的窗外，展示模糊的街灯或公寓窗户灯光，形成细小的光斑（bokeh）。主光源是来自画面右侧床头灯的暖白炽灯光。柔和的高光投射在脸颊、肩膀、锁骨和上臂，而来自窗户微弱的蓝灰色夜光则包裹着身体的另一侧。阴影柔和，自然地落在人物左侧及被褥的褶皱处。

构图/摄影：
4:5 竖构图。从床边拍摄的半身特写人像。人物面部位于左上方，胸部居中，台灯位于右侧远处。头部上方和右侧留有少量留白，底部由被褥自然裁切。相机位置略高于人物胸部，采用轻微的高角度拍摄。50mm 等效焦距，浅景深。焦点对准眼睛和面部，背景中的街灯和台灯呈现柔和的虚化效果。

质感/风格：
写实风格的室内人像摄影。皮肤细腻但保留毛孔和细微纹理，避免过度磨皮。仔细刻画罗纹面料、薄开衫和棉质床上用品的触感。夜色调色板，暖色调与蓝灰色静谧融合。低对比度，细腻的颗粒感，呈现出如杂志内页睡衣专题般的沉稳质感。

负面提示词：
不自然的面部，不自然的胸部形状，不对称的眼睛，多余的手指，缺失的手指，弯曲的手臂，肩膀或关节畸形，衣物与身体融合，与床铺接触不良，悬浮，不自然的重力，与光源不一致的阴影，过度磨皮，塑料感皮肤，文字，Logo，水印。

en.title: Summer Bubbles in Yukata
en.description: A close-up portrait prompt of a woman in a floral yukata reaching for soap bubbles in a traditional Japanese room with a garden view.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Fingertips Chasing Bubbles

Main Subject:
Vertical 3:4 photo. A woman sitting in a tatami-matted Japanese room is placed prominently in the center, captured from the top of her head to her waist. The person occupies about 75% of the frame, reaching both hands toward the camera while trying to touch soap bubbles floating in front of her.

Character and Expression:
A woman with natural transparency. Hair is a dark brown shoulder-length medium bob, with the ends moving slightly outward and thin bangs falling naturally onto the forehead. Fine stray hairs are left around the face. The head is slightly tilted, with clear eyes looking just above the camera. Lips are slightly parted in an expression of quiet surprise and curiosity. Pale coral-toned makeup, natural skin texture, and subtle color on the cheeks.

Clothing and Pose:
{argument name="outfit" default="A light yukata with pale blue and pink small flowers scattered on a white background"}. A {argument name="obi color" default="dusty rose pink obi"} at the waist. The body faces forward, sitting with relaxed shoulders. Both elbows are bent, hands extended toward the lens, and fingers spread naturally. Palms face slightly inward, capturing the moment of trying to enclose a central soap bubble. The hands are closer to the camera than the face, appearing large due to perspective.

Background and Light:
Wooden-framed shoji screens on the left, an open veranda and lush garden in the back right. A single transparent ramune bottle with a blue stopper is placed on the bottom left of the tatami. Soap bubbles of various sizes float in the foreground, around the person, and in the background, with iridescent reflections on their surfaces. Warm natural light streams in from the garden side at the back right, illuminating the hair silhouette, cheeks, shoulders, and the backs of the hands. The shoji side is in soft shadow, with reflected light from the garden gently lifting the shadows on the face.

Composition and Camera:
A close-up portrait shot from nearly the same height as the person's eye level. Primary focus on the face, with the hands and foreground bubbles lightly blurred. A triangular composition with hands at the bottom center and the face behind them. A small amount of negative space above the head, leaving shoji and the garden on the sides. Equivalent to 85mm, shallow depth of field, with large soft bokeh in the background.

Texture and Style:
A Japanese-style photographic expression capturing a summer afternoon. Naturally warm color tones, soft contrast, and delicate film grain. The skin is not excessively processed, leaving fine downy hair and light transmission. Naturally depicts the thin film of bubbles, the cotton texture of the yukata, and individual strands of hair.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, asymmetrical eyes, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, overly stiff hands, unnatural joints, structural failure of the yukata, shadows inconsistent with the light source, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-like skin, gibberish text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 夏季日式浴衣人像
zh.description: 这是一个精致的电影感提示词，用于创作一张怀旧的日本夏季人像，画面中一位身穿浴衣的女性在传统的榻榻米房间里伸手捕捉肥皂泡。
zh.prompt:
主体：{argument name="subject" default="指尖追逐泡泡"}

主要主体：
一张 3:4 的竖构图照片。一位女性位于画面中心显著位置，坐在 {argument name="room type" default="铺设榻榻米的日式房间"} 中，取景范围从头顶到腰部。人物占据约 75% 的画面，双手向镜头伸出，试图触碰漂浮在她面前的肥皂泡。

人物/表情：
一位具有自然通透感的女性。她留着深棕色的中长波波头，发梢微微向外翘，稀疏的刘海自然地垂在额前，脸颊两侧留有细碎的发丝。她微微歪着头，清澈的双眼注视着镜头上方。嘴唇微张，流露出一种安静的惊喜与好奇。淡珊瑚色妆容，自然的皮肤质感，双颊带有淡淡的红晕。

服装/姿势：
一件浅色浴衣，底色为白色，上面带有 {argument name="yukata pattern" default="淡蓝色和粉色小花散落的图案"}。腰间系着一条暗玫瑰粉色的腰带。身体正对前方，双肩放松。双肘弯曲，双手向镜头延伸，手指张开，姿态自然。手掌微微内扣，正处于试图包围中心泡泡的瞬间。双手位于脸部前方，由于透视关系显得较大。

背景/光影：
左侧为木制障子门，右后方为开放式走廊和郁郁葱葱的庭院。榻榻米左下方放置着一个带有蓝色瓶盖的透明弹珠汽水瓶。各种大小的肥皂泡漂浮在前景、人物周围及背景中，表面反射着彩虹般的光泽。温暖的自然光从右后方的庭院侧射入，照亮了发丝轮廓、脸颊、肩膀和手背。障子门一侧处于柔和的阴影中，庭院的反射光柔和地提亮了脸部的阴影。

构图/相机：
近距离人像拍摄，高度与人物视线几乎齐平。焦点主要集中在脸部，双手和前景的泡泡略微模糊。采用三角形构图，双手位于底部中心，脸部位于其后。头顶留有少量空间，左右两侧分别为障子门和庭院。85mm 等效焦距，浅景深，背景呈现大面积柔和的虚化效果。

质感/风格：
捕捉夏季午后的日式摄影风格。色调略暖，对比度柔和，带有细腻的胶片颗粒感。皮肤未经过度处理，保留了细微绒毛和通透感。真实还原了肥皂泡的薄膜质感、浴衣的棉质纹理以及每一根细致的发丝。

负面提示词：
不自然的脸部，不自然的视线，不对称的眼睛，多余的手指，缺失的手指，粘连的手指，过于僵硬的手部，不自然的关节，漂浮的物体，浴衣结构错误，与光源不一致的阴影，过度磨皮，塑料质感的皮肤，乱码文字，Logo，水印。

en.title: 90s Vintage Saree Film Aesthetic
en.description: A prompt for generating a grainy, retro 90s film aesthetic portrait of a woman in a saree with red roses and dramatic lighting.
en.prompt:
Create a retro vintage grainy but bright image of the reference picture but draped in a perfect {argument name="color" default="white colour"}.
Pinteresty aesthetic {argument name="garment" default="retro saree"} and red bangles. It must feel like a 90s movie straight wavy hair with a bouquet of {argument name="flowers" default="red roses"} and romanticising windy environment. The girl is looking down standing against a solid wall deep shadows and contrast drama, creating a mysterious and artistic.

zh.title: 90 年代复古纱丽电影感美学
zh.description: 一个用于生成 90 年代复古胶片颗粒感肖像的提示词，画面主体为身着纱丽的女性，配以红玫瑰和戏剧性光影。
zh.prompt:
基于参考图，创作一张复古、带有颗粒感但明亮的图像，主体身着完美的 {argument name="color" default="白色"} 纱丽。
具有 Pinterest 风格的 {argument name="garment" default="复古纱丽"} 和红色手镯。画面需呈现 90 年代电影质感，直发微卷，手持一束 {argument name="flowers" default="红玫瑰"}，营造出浪漫且带有微风的环境。女孩低头站立在纯色墙面前，深邃的阴影与高对比度光影交织，营造出神秘而艺术的氛围。

zh.title: 韩国便利店镜面自拍
zh.description: 一份详细的超写实提示词，用于生成一张女性在韩国便利店通过凸面天花板镜子拍摄的抓拍生活感自拍。
zh.prompt:
深夜韩国便利店镜面抓拍
创建一个超写实的生活感图像，视角通过 {argument name="store type" default="温馨的韩国便利店"} 内天花板上的大型凸面镜呈现。画面中，一位时尚的韩国年轻女性从略高的镜面视角中出现，正在浏览冷饮区时随意地进行自拍。
她身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="一件修身的米色高领毛衣，塞进高腰浅色牛仔裤中，外搭一件短款棕色皮夹克，脚踩白色运动鞋"}。她的一只手拿着 {argument name="drink item" default="一瓶草莓牛奶"}，另一只手举起智能手机进行自拍。
背景中排列着色彩鲜艳的饮料、零食和便利店商品，营造出充满活力的氛围。真实的凸面镜曲率、逼真的反射效果、愉悦的表情、温暖而诱人的氛围、自然的抓拍姿态、高端智能手机拍摄画质、极致细节的写实感、韩系街头时尚美学、干净的灯光、微妙的景深、4:5 竖构图、高端商业摄影、8K 分辨率。

zh.title: 逼真的足球迷模型一致性
zh.description: 一个用于在保持参考照片中 1:1 角色特征的同时，将主体置于带有球队品牌标识的足球场环境中的提示词。
zh.prompt:
使用上传的照片作为精确的模型参考。保持 1:1 的外观：面部、特征、比例、头发、皮肤和整体形象。请勿更改身份。皮肤必须尽可能自然：呈现真实的毛孔、皮肤纹理和自然色调，拒绝塑料感的修图和美颜。
指令：
为该模型在球队比赛期间的足球场看台上创作一张超写实的近景肖像。所有服装、足球装备、颜色、徽章、旗帜以及脸颊上的油彩必须自动对应 {argument name="team" default="所选球队"}。如果是国家队，请使用国旗颜色、国家队足球装备和球队象征；如果是足球俱乐部，请使用官方颜色、装备风格和俱乐部象征。
模型坐在球迷中间，微笑着看向镜头。背景是身着该球队颜色服装的模糊人群、球场灯光、柔和的焦外成像以及生动的比赛氛围。
光线温暖、高级且自然：柔和的电影级球场光、皮肤上美丽的微光、眼睛中精致的高光，背景虚化效果优美。面部焦点清晰。
风格：超写实电影级体育肖像，单反摄影，{argument name="focal length" default="85mm"} 镜头，{argument name="aperture" default="f/1.8"} 光圈，HDR，8K，高级调色，竖屏 9:16。
避免：面部改变、塑料感皮肤、错误的球队象征、歪曲的球队标志、卡通化、CGI、照片上出现多余文字、水印。

zh.title: 低调黑白公寓人像
zh.description: 一张电影感黑白低调人像，拍摄于昏暗的公寓走廊，聚焦于自然的皮肤纹理与戏剧性的光影效果。
zh.prompt:
特写人像，85mm f/1.8 镜头，一位 {argument name="ethnicity" default="年轻东亚女性"}，年龄约 {argument name="age" default="20 出头"}，站在公寓走廊近乎全黑的环境中，背靠墙壁，头部微微后仰，双眼闭合，真实的日常生活摄影，自然的抓拍瞬间。

面部朝上且静止，双眼闭合——并非睡眠，也非休息，只是短暂的停顿。杏眼紧闭，睫毛落在脸颊上。下颌线清晰，颈部修长。黑色直发自然垂落，几缕发丝散落在太阳穴旁。肤色白皙，鼻尖和额头中心有来自远处光源的微弱高光。自然的皮肤纹理，无妆容。

她穿着一件 {argument name="clothing" default="宽松的白色长袖衬衫"}，下摆未束，领口微敞。一只手垂在身侧。身体处于完全放松状态——非摆拍。呼气时几缕发丝轻微飘动，自然且未经修饰。

黑白呈现。极致低调：走廊内近乎全黑，仅有一道来自远处房间门口的细长光线照亮她的侧脸和肩部边缘——其余部分均隐没在深沉的阴影中。阴影区域保留了精细的细节——黑暗中可见墙壁纹理和织物褶皱。全图带有细腻的 ISO 800 噪点，呈现摄影质感，而非 CG 渲染的平滑感。

纵横比 9:16。无水印，无文字覆盖，非卡通，非数字绘画，非插画，非动漫。

en.title: Pink Cable Knit School Uniform
en.description: A highly detailed fashion prompt for a feminine school-inspired look, featuring a dusty pink cropped cable-knit sweater, pleated skirt, and Mary Jane platform loafers.
en.prompt: Outfit: a {argument name="sweater color" default="pale dusty-pink to powder-pink"} cropped V-neck cable-knit pullover in a soft cotton- or wool-blend knit, featuring narrow vertical cable patterns across the body and full-length sleeves, ribbed V-neck edging, ribbed cuffs, and a wide ribbed hem worn fully untucked, unfolded, unknotted, and resting naturally at the waist, with no front buttons or zipper, layered over a white long-sleeve button-front shirt whose main placket remains concealed beneath the sweater with the exact button state left unspecified, featuring a large pointed collar spread neatly outside the V neckline and white cuffs extending visibly several centimeters beyond the sweater sleeves with their hidden cuff fastening left unspecified, plus a medium-gray subtle plaid necktie tied beneath the collar with a compact centered knot and one broad long blade hanging freely over the front of the sweater without being tucked or loosened, paired with a {argument name="skirt color" default="heather-gray"} high-waisted pleated mini skirt in structured wool-like woven fabric, featuring a wide smooth waistband and broad box or knife pleats falling freely without being tucked, lifted, or folded, with the hidden skirt closure left unspecified, secured by a fixed narrow black leather-like belt threaded horizontally through the skirt’s belt loops and fastened at the exact center front with a rounded rectangular silver-tone buckle, plus a small gold-tone teddy-bear-shaped brooch pinned securely and forward-facing against one upper-chest side of the pink sweater rather than worn on the body, sheer black thigh-high stockings pulled smoothly to the mid-to-upper thighs with wide opaque top bands worn flat without folding, rolling, or slouching, generated black leather-like platform Mary Jane loafers with rounded toes, slim instep straps fastened with small silver-tone buckles, moderate chunky soles, and clean rubber outsoles, and a partially visible small structured black leather-like handbag with a narrow short handle looped around one wrist so the bag hangs downward beside the hip, with its obscured body construction and closure left unspecified, no hat, no additional jewelry, premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable knit and skirt weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, realistic layered depth, believable tie-knot and belt tension, natural cuff overlap, believable object contact, secure brooch and buckle placement, not costume-like, not cheap-looking.

zh.title: 粉色麻花针织校服
zh.description: 一款细节丰富的时尚提示词，打造充满少女感的校园风造型，包含灰粉色短款麻花针织毛衣、百褶裙及玛丽珍厚底乐福鞋。
zh.prompt: 服装：一件 {argument name="sweater color" default="淡灰粉色至粉扑色"} 短款 V 领麻花针织套头衫，采用柔软的棉质或羊毛混纺针织面料，衣身和长袖上带有细长的垂直麻花纹理，V 领、袖口和宽下摆均采用罗纹设计，下摆自然垂落于腰间，未塞入、未折叠、未打结，无前扣或拉链。内搭一件白色长袖衬衫，门襟隐藏在毛衣下，扣合状态未指定，大尖领整齐地平铺在 V 领外，白色袖口明显露出毛衣袖口几厘米，袖口扣合状态未指定。搭配一条中灰色细格纹领带，系在领口下方，领结紧凑居中，宽大的长领带片自然垂在毛衣前，未塞入也未松开。下装为一条 {argument name="skirt color" default="石楠灰"} 高腰百褶迷你裙，采用挺括的仿羊毛织物，配有宽大的平整腰头和宽箱褶或刀褶，自然垂落，未塞入、未提起或折叠，裙子隐藏式扣合状态未指定。腰间系有一条固定的窄款黑色仿皮腰带，穿过裙子的腰带环，在正前方中心处用圆角长方形银色扣环扣紧。毛衣上胸部一侧别着一枚精致的金色泰迪熊胸针，朝向正面。穿着黑色半透明大腿袜，平整地拉至大腿中上部，宽大的不透明袜口平整，无折叠、卷边或松垮。搭配黑色仿皮玛丽珍厚底乐福鞋，圆头设计，细脚背带配有小巧的银色扣环，鞋底厚实适中，橡胶外底干净。手腕上挂着一个部分可见的小型结构感黑色仿皮手提包，包身垂在臀部一侧，包体结构和扣合方式未指定。无帽子，无其他首饰。高级面料质感，逼真的服装结构，缝线整洁，接缝张力自然，针织和裙摆重量感真实，细微褶皱，垂坠感逼真，边缘处理精致，缝线可见，褶皱真实，服装细节做工精良，材质触感高品质，服装细节写实，层次感真实，领带结和腰带张力自然，袖口重叠自然，物体接触感真实，胸针和扣环位置稳固，非演出服质感，无廉价感。

en.title: Y2K Feminine Lace Outfit
en.description: A detailed feminine summer outfit prompt in the Y2K style, featuring a white eyelet lace bustier mini dress and chunky platform loafers.
en.prompt: Outfit: a feminine {argument name="color" default="white"} summer {argument name="style" default="Y2K"} outfit featuring a fitted white eyelet lace bustier-style mini dress with a soft sweetheart neckline, delicate all-over cutwork embroidery, lightly structured bodice shaping, side ruched drawstring details, small ribbon-tie accents, and a softly flared mini skirt hem, with premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable lightweight cotton lace weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, and detailed garment realism; paired with white knee-high lace socks with subtle floral openwork texture and black chunky platform loafer-style shoes with leather-like material, clean stitching, metal-free minimal finishing, layered rubber sole construction, and realistic footwear materials; finished with a small ivory-to-cream rounded mini shoulder bag with a simple short strap and clean leather-like body; add a random mix of delicate feminine accessories in pearl-tone, silver-tone, or soft romantic Y2K style that naturally match the outfit; not costume-like, not cheap-looking.

zh.title: Y2K 甜美蕾丝穿搭
zh.description: 一份详细的 Y2K 风格甜美夏季穿搭提示词，包含白色镂空蕾丝胸衣迷你裙和厚底乐福鞋。
zh.prompt: 穿搭：一套甜美的 {argument name="color" default="白色"} 夏季 {argument name="style" default="Y2K"} 风格穿搭，包含一件修身白色镂空蕾丝胸衣式迷你裙，配有柔和的心形领口、精致的通体镂空刺绣、轻盈的胸衣塑形设计、侧边褶皱抽绳细节、小巧的丝带系带装饰以及微微外扩的迷你裙摆；具备高级的面料质感、逼真的服装结构、整洁的缝线、自然的接缝张力、可信的轻薄棉质蕾丝重量、细微的褶皱、真实的垂坠感、精致的边缘处理、可见的接缝、真实的折痕、做工精良的服装细节、高品质的材质触感以及细腻的服装真实感；搭配白色及膝蕾丝袜，带有细微的花卉镂空纹理；脚穿黑色厚底乐福鞋，采用仿皮材质、整洁的缝线、无金属简约饰面、层叠橡胶鞋底结构以及逼真的鞋履材质；配有一个象牙白至奶油色的小巧圆润迷你单肩包，带有简约短肩带和干净的仿皮包身；添加一些珍珠色、银色或柔和浪漫 Y2K 风格的精致女性化配饰，与整体穿搭自然融合；拒绝廉价感，拒绝演出服既视感。

en.title: Two Women in Evening Gowns by Tokyo Skyline
en.description: Generates a photorealistic luxury fashion portrait of two elegant women in black and white evening gowns posing in a high-rise suite at night.
en.prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body fashion editorial image of two glamorous young adult East Asian women posing together in a luxury high-rise hotel suite at night, standing in front of tall floor-to-ceiling windows with a blurred Tokyo city skyline behind them, including a glowing orange Tokyo Tower in the distance. The women are side by side and leaning slightly toward each other, elegant and confident, both looking at the camera. The left woman has {argument name="left woman hair color" default="dark brown hair in a soft updo with wispy bangs"}, warm natural makeup, delicate earrings and bracelet, and wears a dramatic black satin evening gown with an asymmetrical one-shoulder neckline, cutout waist, high slit, sheer black stockings, and black strappy high heels; her left hand rests against the window frame and one leg is posed forward. The right woman has {argument name="right woman hair color" default="long black wavy hair with soft bangs"}, refined makeup, small earrings and bracelet, and wears a flowing white satin evening gown with a plunging draped neckline, waist cutouts, high slit, sheer black stockings, and black strappy high heels; her right hand touches the window frame and one leg is extended forward. Use {argument name="dress color pairing" default="black dress on the left and white dress on the right"}. The interior should feel upscale and moody: dark marble floor with reflections, dark wall panels, metal window frames, a warm table lamp on the left, and soft cinematic hotel lighting. Style should be ultra-realistic, vertical 2:3 composition, sharp subject detail, shallow depth of field, glossy fabric texture, elegant fashion photography, tasteful sensuality, no text, no watermark, no extra people, exactly two women.

zh.title: 东京天际线下的两位晚礼服女性
zh.description: 生成一张照片级逼真的奢华时尚肖像，展示两位身着黑白晚礼服的优雅女性在夜间高层套房内的姿态。
zh.prompt: 创作一张照片级逼真的全身时尚编辑风格图像，展示两位迷人的东亚年轻女性在夜间奢华酒店套房内合影。她们站在高大的落地窗前，背景是模糊的东京城市天际线，远处可见发光的橙色东京塔。两位女性并肩站立，身体微微向对方倾斜，优雅且自信，均注视着镜头。左侧女性拥有 {argument name="left woman hair color" default="深棕色柔和盘发配空气刘海"}，妆容自然温暖，佩戴精致的耳环和手链，身穿一件引人注目的黑色缎面晚礼服，采用不对称单肩领口、腰部镂空、高开叉设计，搭配黑色透明丝袜和黑色绑带高跟鞋；她的左手靠在窗框上，一条腿向前摆姿势。右侧女性拥有 {argument name="right woman hair color" default="黑色长卷发配柔和刘海"}，妆容精致，佩戴小巧的耳环和手链，身穿一件飘逸的白色缎面晚礼服，采用深 V 垂坠领口、腰部镂空、高开叉设计，搭配黑色透明丝袜和黑色绑带高跟鞋；她的右手触碰窗框，一条腿向前伸展。使用 {argument name="dress color pairing" default="左侧黑色礼服，右侧白色礼服"}。室内环境应呈现高端且富有氛围感的基调：带有倒影的深色大理石地面、深色墙板、金属窗框、左侧的一盏暖色台灯以及柔和的电影感酒店灯光。风格应为超写实，2:3 纵向构图，主体细节清晰，浅景深，丝滑面料质感，优雅时尚摄影，高雅性感，无文字，无水印，无多余人物，仅限两位女性。

en.title: Sunny High-Angle Street Selfie
en.description: A photorealistic high-angle outdoor selfie of a playful young adult woman on a sunny street, useful for lifestyle portrait generation.
en.prompt: Create a highly realistic smartphone selfie photo of a {argument name="subject" default="young adult Japanese woman"} outdoors on a sunny street, shot from a high arm's-length angle looking down. She has a short chestnut-brown bob haircut with wispy bangs, smooth fair skin, warm brown eyes, and a playful expression: one eye winking, lips puckered in a cute pout, cheeks slightly flushed. She wears a fitted black camisole tank top with thin white straps and white trim, a delicate pearl choker necklace with a small center charm, and a white skirt barely visible at the bottom edge. Frame her from the upper torso upward, with her extended arm entering from the lower left as if holding the phone. Use bright natural midday sunlight, crisp shadows, realistic skin texture, glossy hair highlights, shallow smartphone-style depth of field, and an asphalt sidewalk/street background with curb markings and soft plant shadows. Keep the composition candid, casual, and photorealistic, with no text, no watermark, and no extra people.

zh.title: 阳光下街头高角度自拍
zh.description: 一张在阳光明媚的街道上，年轻女性俏皮的高角度写实自拍，适用于生活方式人像生成。
zh.prompt: 创作一张高度写实的智能手机自拍照片，主体为 {argument name="subject" default="年轻日本女性"}，背景是阳光明媚的户外街道，采用手臂伸展的高角度俯拍视角。她留着栗棕色短波波头，配有空气刘海，皮肤白皙光滑，棕色眼眸温暖，表情俏皮：单眼眨眼，嘴唇嘟起，脸颊微红。她身穿黑色修身吊带背心，带有白色细肩带和白色滚边，佩戴精致的珍珠颈圈项链，中间饰有小吊坠，底部边缘隐约可见白色裙摆。画面构图为上半身特写，她伸出的手臂从左下角切入，模拟手持手机的视角。采用明亮的午后自然光，阴影清晰，皮肤纹理真实，发丝光泽感强，具有智能手机拍摄的浅景深效果，背景为带有路缘标记和柔和植物阴影的沥青人行道/街道。保持构图自然、随性且高度写实，画面中无文字、无水印、无其他无关人员。

en.title: Night Apartment Glamour Portrait
en.description: A photorealistic fashion-glamour portrait of an adult woman in a cutout swimsuit and knit cardigan in a modern night apartment setting.
en.prompt: Create a photorealistic portrait of an adult East Asian woman with {argument name="hair style" default="short light-brown bob hair with wispy bangs"}, standing indoors at night beside large floor-to-ceiling apartment windows overlooking blurred city lights. She faces the camera with a gentle confident smile, soft eye contact, and a relaxed fashion-model pose, one hand lightly touching the shoulder strap area and the other holding the edge of an oversized chunky knit cardigan. She wears {argument name="outfit" default="a white asymmetrical one-piece cutout swimsuit with oval torso openings and high-cut sides"} layered under {argument name="cardigan" default="a loose cream cable-knit cardigan slipping off the shoulders"}. The composition is a vertical three-quarter body portrait from head to upper thighs, centered subject, natural skin texture, glossy eyes, subtle makeup, warm indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh city lights outside the dark windows, modern apartment interior with a pale window ledge and a beige lounge chair in the background. Use a high-end editorial photography style, realistic anatomy, tasteful glamour, warm color grading, 50mm lens look, soft shadows, crisp focus on the face and outfit, no text, no watermark, no extra people.

zh.title: 夜间公寓时尚魅力肖像
zh.description: 一张逼真的时尚魅力肖像，展示了一位身穿镂空泳衣和针织开衫的成年女性在现代夜间公寓场景中的形象。
zh.prompt: 创作一张逼真的肖像，主角是一位东亚成年女性，留着 {argument name="hair style" default="带有空气刘海的浅棕色短波波头"}，夜晚站在室内，身旁是大大的落地窗，窗外是模糊的城市灯光。她面向镜头，带着自信温柔的微笑，眼神柔和，姿态如时尚模特般放松，一只手轻轻触碰肩带区域，另一只手抓着一件超大粗棒针织开衫的边缘。她穿着 {argument name="outfit" default="一件白色不对称连体镂空泳衣，躯干处有椭圆形开口，侧面高开叉"}，外搭 {argument name="cardigan" default="一件从肩部滑落的宽松米色麻花针织开衫"}。构图为垂直的三分之二身长肖像，从头部到大腿上部，主体居中，皮肤纹理自然，双眼明亮，妆容精致，室内暖光，浅景深，窗外是奶油般虚化的城市灯光，背景为现代公寓室内，配有浅色窗台和米色休闲椅。采用高端杂志摄影风格，解剖结构真实，格调高雅，暖色调处理，50mm 镜头效果，柔和阴影，面部和服装焦点清晰，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。

en.title: Sunlit Backless Lounge Fashion Portrait
en.description: A photorealistic fashion editorial portrait of a woman in airy neutral lounge wear standing by tall sunlit French windows in an elegant living room.
en.prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body fashion editorial image of a young adult woman with {argument name="hair color" default="soft medium brown"} short wavy bob hair, standing indoors with her back mostly facing the camera and her head turned over her shoulder toward the bright windows. She has a slim elegant figure and a calm, slightly surprised expression. She wears a delicate champagne-beige backless camisole with thin crisscross straps and a small tie at the lower back, paired with flowing sheer ivory wide-leg lounge pants that drape to the floor; the outfit is airy, feminine, and luxurious without looking explicit. The scene is a sunlit cream-toned living room with tall white French windows on the right, green garden foliage visible outside, a beige sofa with two round cylindrical pillows on the left, built-in shelves with books, a framed photo, and decorative vases in the background, and glossy pale marble flooring reflecting the sunlight. Use soft natural morning light streaming through the window, warm highlights, gentle shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, high-end magazine photography, vertical 4:5 composition, full-body view centered slightly left, elegant neutral palette, no text, no watermark, no extra people.

zh.title: 阳光露背家居时尚肖像
zh.description: 一张照片级逼真的时尚编辑风格肖像，展示了一位身着轻盈中性家居服的女性，站在优雅客厅内高大的阳光法式落地窗旁。
zh.prompt: 创作一张照片级逼真的全身时尚编辑风格图像，主角是一位年轻女性，留着 {argument name="hair color" default="柔和中棕色"} 的短波浪波波头，在室内站立，背部大部分朝向镜头，头部越过肩膀望向明亮的窗户。她身材苗条优雅，表情平静且略带惊讶。她身穿一件精致的香槟米色露背吊带背心，带有细交叉肩带和后腰小系带，搭配垂坠至地面的飘逸象牙白阔腿家居裤；整体造型轻盈、柔美且奢华，不显暴露。场景为一个阳光明媚的奶油色调客厅，右侧是高大的白色法式落地窗，窗外可见绿色花园植被；左侧有一张米色沙发，配有两个圆柱形靠枕；背景中有内置书架，摆放着书籍、相框和装饰花瓶；光亮的浅色大理石地面反射着阳光。采用从窗户射入的柔和自然晨光，暖色高光，柔和阴影，浅景深，真实的皮肤纹理，高端杂志摄影质感，4:5 竖构图，全身视角并略微居左，优雅的中性色调，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。

en.title: Sunlit Cat-Eared Girl Reading
en.description: Generates a dreamy vertical anime illustration of a cat-eared girl studying peacefully by a sunlit window.
en.prompt: Create a soft, luminous anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Xuelian"}, a cute cat-eared girl quietly reading a book at a desk in a sunlit bedroom or study. She has very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silvery white hair with pale cyan streaks"}, large fluffy cat ears, bright blue eyes with starry highlights, a shy calm expression, rosy cheeks, and delicate childlike features. Add two blue ribbon hair bows, one on each side, each decorated with small golden bell ornaments. She wears a white sleeveless blouse with subtle frills and a small cyan bow at the collar, a translucent loose white cardigan slipping off her shoulders, a blue plaid skirt, and white thigh-high socks. Pose her seated on a round stool beside a simple wooden desk, holding an open pale blue hardcover book with both hands and looking down at it as if seriously studying. On the left side of the desk place exactly 4 stacked books: one teal book on top, one pale cream book, one dark green book, and one blue book at the bottom. The background is a cozy room with a tall window and sheer blue curtains on the left, strong warm morning sunlight streaming in, and a white bookshelf on the right with softly blurred colorful books and small objects. Use dreamy high-key lighting, lens flare, floating dust motes and rainbow bokeh sparkles throughout the air, translucent glow around the hair, gentle pastel colors, soft depth of field, detailed hair strands, clean anime linework, and an ethereal NovelAI-style finish. Vertical 2:3 composition, character centered slightly right, desk in the foreground, peaceful reading atmosphere. Avoid text, watermark, extra characters, distorted hands, malformed book structure, or extra ears.

zh.title: 阳光下阅读的猫耳少女
zh.description: 生成一张梦幻般的竖版动漫插画，描绘了一位猫耳少女在阳光明媚的窗边安静学习的场景。
zh.prompt: 创作一张柔和、明亮的动漫插画，主角是 {argument name="character name" default="Xuelian"}，一位可爱的猫耳少女，正坐在阳光充足的卧室或书房的桌前安静地看书。她有着非常飘逸的 {argument name="hair color" default="银白色长发，带有淡青色挑染"}，一对毛茸茸的大猫耳，明亮的蓝色眼睛里闪烁着星光，表情羞涩而平静，脸颊红润，五官精致如童。在她的两侧各加上一个蓝色丝带发结，每个发结上都装饰着金色的小铃铛。她穿着一件带有细致褶边、领口系着小青色蝴蝶结的白色无袖衬衫，肩头滑落着一件半透明的宽松白色开衫，搭配蓝色格纹裙和白色过膝袜。让她坐在木质书桌旁的圆凳上，双手捧着一本打开的淡蓝色精装书，低头专注地阅读。在书桌左侧叠放 4 本书：最上面是一本青色书，下面依次是米色书、深绿色书和蓝色书。背景是一个温馨的房间，左侧有一扇高大的窗户和半透明的蓝色窗帘，温暖的晨光倾泻而入；右侧是一个白色书架，上面摆放着模糊的彩色书籍和小物件。采用梦幻般的高调照明，画面中充满镜头光晕、漂浮的尘埃和彩虹般的虚化光斑，发丝带有半透明光泽，色调柔和，具有浅景深效果，发丝细节丰富，线条干净，呈现出空灵的 NovelAI 风格。竖版 2:3 构图，角色略微居右，书桌位于前景，营造宁静的阅读氛围。避免出现文字、水印、多余角色、手部畸变、书本结构错误或多余耳朵。

zh.title: ChatGPT 古风宫廷肖像截图
zh.description: 创建一个深色模式的 ChatGPT 移动端截图，展示中文提示词以及生成的华丽红金配色古风女性肖像。
zh.prompt:
目标：制作一张逼真的 ChatGPT 移动端 App 深色模式竖版手机截图，展示通过文字生成古风宫廷肖像的工作流。

画布：9:16 竖版手机截图，黑色背景，尺寸约为 640 × 1136 像素。使用圆角 UI 卡片、小号无衬线界面字体以及 iOS 风格间距。无需手机外框，仅展示 App 界面。

布局：在顶部居中位置放置一个深灰色圆角用户气泡，内含一段白色的长中文提示词。在其下方左对齐放置一行状态栏，显示“Thought for 1m 8s ›”。下方放置一张生成的图片卡片，圆角，竖向构图，位置略偏左。在图片卡片下方，放置一行共 5 个小图标：复制/分享样式图标、点赞、点踩、重新生成/循环箭头以及省略号。底部放置一个圆角输入栏，左侧带有加号图标，包含占位中文文本、“深度思考”控制开关及下拉菜单、麦克风图标，右侧为一个圆形语音按钮。在输入栏下方居中放置小号页脚文本。

顶部消息文本：在用户气泡内使用以下中文文本，自然保留换行：{argument name="top prompt text" default="生成一张 9:16 竖版、高清度真实摄影质感的明艳华贵古风女性写真，画面主体是一位 20-28 岁年轻成年东方女性，成年气质明确，不过度欧美化，不幼态化。她拥有明艳东方浓颜，脸型柔和流畅，眉眼存在感强，眼神明亮自信，鼻型秀气，唇色为低饱和朱红，妆容完整精致，额间有细致花钿，整体明艳、华贵、贵气、自信，有古偶女主正式登场的存在感。\n\n场景设定在华丽宫廷回廊中，金色廊柱与红金雕塑形成庄重的古风空间层次，远处宫灯被浅景深柔和虚化，背景华丽但不抢人物主体。人物在帷幔旁短暂停步，身体轻微侧向镜头，肩颈舒展，一手轻扶金色刺绣披帛，另一只手自然垂落，眼神稳定地看向镜头，表情端正克制而有力量。\n\n她穿着朱红色底风大袖衫，衣袖宽大，衣料厚实有垂坠感，金色刺绣沿领口、袖缘、披帛边缘和束腰腰封展开。金色刺绣披帛从肩臂一侧自然垂落，与大袖形成华丽流动线条；刺绣腰封结构稳定，勾勒华服层次。整体配色为朱红、暖金与珍珠白，红色明艳但不过饱和，金色作为刺绣、发饰、珠宝和披帛边缘的高光，避免婚庆感，保持高级古风女主质感。\n\n镜头采用大半身近景，主体居中，浅景深，人物脸部、妆容、头饰、眼神、腰封、大袖衫和披帛层次都清晰可见。明亮柔光从侧前方照亮脸部、肩颈、华服刺绣和珠玉头饰，轻微暗边光勾出披帛与衣袖边缘，珠宝和金饰有克制高光。整体采用明亮华贵古风滤镜，画面通透，肤色自然，暗部干净，红金色彩统一，具有东方幻想古偶角色海报完成度。"}

生成图片内容：生成的卡片展示了一位照片级真实的东亚年轻女性，{argument name="character age" default="20-28 岁"}，站在华丽的帝国宫廷回廊中。她身穿华丽的 {argument name="dress color palette" default="朱红色、暖金色和珍珠白色"} 古风长裙，宽袖设计，带有金色刺绣、结构化的刺绣腰封以及浅色刺绣披帛。造型包括黑色盘发、大型金色花冠状发饰、垂坠耳环、额间花钿、精致的朱红唇妆、明亮自信的眼神以及从容的正面凝视。宫廷背景包含金色柱子、红色帷幔、温暖的灯笼光斑以及浅景深效果。肖像为从头部到腰部以下的竖向裁剪，采用柔和的电影级布光和细腻的真实摄影质感。

图片卡片 UI 细节：生成的图片包含 2 个覆盖控件：左下角为白色中文“编辑”字样，右下角为一个圆形分享/下载图标。图片卡片为圆角，且在黑色聊天背景下无可见阴影。

底部 UI 文本：输入占位符显示 {argument name="input placeholder text" default="有问题，尽管问"}。页脚显示“ChatGPT 也可能会犯错。请核查重要信息。”

视觉风格：地道的 ChatGPT 移动端深色主题截图，黑色背景，炭灰色消息气泡，白色中文文本，极简灰色界面图标，逼真的生成式照片缩略图。保持构图简洁，并像真实的 App 界面一样保持垂直间距。

约束：仅展示 1 个用户提示气泡、1 行思考状态栏、1 张生成的肖像图片、图片下方的 5 个操作图标、1 个底部输入栏以及图片上的 2 个覆盖控件。不要添加额外的聊天消息、水印、浏览器边框或不相关的 UI 面板。

en.title: Anime Hotel Attendant in Grand Lobby
en.description: Generates an elegant anime illustration of a blue-and-white uniformed hotel attendant posed in a luxurious grand hotel lobby.
en.prompt: Create a polished anime-style illustration of a young hotel attendant standing in the luxurious lobby of a grand hotel. The character is a cheerful young woman with shoulder-length {argument name="hair color" default="warm chestnut brown"} hair, soft bangs, large {argument name="eye color" default="bright blue"} eyes, and a gentle smile, facing the viewer in a relaxed three-quarter front pose. She wears an elegant white uniform dress with long puff sleeves, fitted cuffs, a high collar, a large royal-blue bow at the neck with an oval blue gemstone brooch, a structured blue waist panel with exactly four silver buttons, blue side panels, epaulet-like shoulder details, and subtle gray starburst embroidery near the lower skirt and sleeve areas. She holds exactly one structured blue-and-white handbag by its handles in her left hand. Set her in an opulent classic hotel lobby with glossy marble floors, tall cream marble columns, warm golden chandeliers, dark wood reception desk on the right, two glowing table lamps on the desk, and visible gold lettering reading {argument name="hotel sign text" default="GRAND HOTEL"} on the back wall. On the left, include one round wooden table topped with one large dark vase containing a bouquet of white lilies and greenery, with lounge chairs and warm wall sconces in the background. Use refined Japanese anime rendering with clean line art, soft cel shading, detailed fabric folds, warm ambient lighting, elegant reflections on the marble floor, and a sophisticated hospitality atmosphere. Composition should be a horizontal 16:9 image, medium-full body framing from head to below the knees, character centered slightly right, background detailed but softly atmospheric. Avoid extra characters, extra bags, distorted hands, messy text, or modern casual clothing.

zh.title: 大堂里的动漫风酒店服务员
zh.description: 生成一张优雅的动漫风格插图，描绘了一位身穿蓝白制服的酒店服务员，背景为奢华的酒店大堂。
zh.prompt: 创作一张精致的动漫风格插图，描绘一位年轻的酒店服务员站在奢华的酒店大堂中。角色是一位开朗的年轻女性，留着齐肩的 {argument name="hair color" default="暖栗棕色"} 头发，配有柔软的刘海，拥有一双明亮的 {argument name="eye color" default="亮蓝色"} 大眼睛，面带温柔的微笑，以放松的四分之三正面姿势面向观众。她穿着一件优雅的白色制服裙，配有长泡泡袖、修身袖口、高领，颈部系着一个巨大的宝蓝色蝴蝶结，中间饰有一枚椭圆形蓝色宝石胸针，腰部配有结构感十足的蓝色腰封，上面有 4 枚银色纽扣，两侧为蓝色拼接，肩部有类似肩章的细节，裙摆和袖口附近有精致的灰色星芒刺绣。她的左手提着一个结构感十足的蓝白相间手提包。场景设定在富丽堂皇的经典酒店大堂，地面铺设光亮的大理石，立着高大的奶油色大理石柱，悬挂着温暖的金色吊灯，右侧设有深色木质接待台，台上有两盏发光的台灯，后墙上清晰可见金色的 {argument name="hotel sign text" default="GRAND HOTEL"} 字样。左侧放置一张圆形木桌，桌上摆放着一个插满白色百合花和绿植的大型深色花瓶，背景中可见休闲椅和温暖的壁灯。采用精致的日式动漫渲染，线条清晰，赛璐珞阴影柔和，布料褶皱细节丰富，环境光温暖，大理石地面反射优雅，营造出高级的酒店服务氛围。构图为 16:9 横向图像，采用从头部到膝盖以下的全身中景，角色略微偏右居中，背景细节丰富且氛围感柔和。避免出现多余角色、多余包袋、手部畸变、文字杂乱或现代休闲服装。

en.title: Romantic Chino Anime Meadow Cover
en.description: Generates a vertical anime romance cover featuring two characters lying in a flower meadow with ornate Chinese title typography.
en.prompt: Create a vertical anime light-novel cover illustration with a soft romantic spring atmosphere. Canvas: 3:4 portrait poster, high-resolution, full-bleed artwork with a thin ornate golden floral border around all four edges and decorative corner filigree. Scene: two characters lying on their backs in a lush green flower meadow under dappled sunlight, viewed from directly above, with blue sky and soft tree leaves visible near the top edge; floating pink cherry-blossom petals pass across the foreground. Characters: exactly 2 people. Character 1 is a petite anime girl near the lower half, facing upward, with very long pale lavender-blue twin-tail hair spread across the grass, large bright blue eyes, a calm slightly surprised expression, white blouse with rounded collar, blue suspender-style overall dress, and small black X-shaped hairpins on her bangs; she holds exactly 1 small white rabbit-like plush doll against her chest, with a dark blue bow. Character 2 is a young man in the upper right, upside down relative to the viewer, lying beside her with his head near the center-right, short black hair, rectangular glasses, gentle neutral expression, white T-shirt, one bare arm visible reaching down the right edge. Composition: the girl occupies the lower center-left, the man occupies the upper right, their heads are close but not touching, surrounded by many tiny white and yellow wildflowers in the grass. Typography: place a large vertical Chinese headline in the upper left in warm brown calligraphic serif lettering, reading {argument name="Chinese headline text" default="请问您今天要来点智乃吗？"}; add elegant gold vine flourishes curling around the headline. Under it, add a smaller English subtitle in brown serif text, stacked on several lines, reading {argument name="English subtitle" default="Is the order a chino?"}; beneath the subtitle add exactly 1 small brown rabbit icon with a tiny ornamental divider. Style: polished Japanese anime romance cover art, delicate linework, luminous pastel colors, soft bokeh, painterly flowers, warm golden highlights, airy and wholesome mood. Constraints: include exactly 2 human characters and exactly 1 plush doll; keep the ornate border visible; no extra logos, no watermark, no additional text beyond the specified headline, subtitle, and rabbit icon.

zh.title: 浪漫智乃动漫草地封面
zh.description: 生成一张竖版动漫浪漫封面，画面包含两名角色躺在花丛草地上，并配有华丽的中文标题排版。
zh.prompt: 创作一张竖版动漫轻小说封面插画，营造柔和浪漫的春日氛围。画布：3:4 竖向海报，高分辨率，全出血艺术作品，四周带有纤细华丽的金色花卉边框及装饰性边角花纹。场景：两名角色仰卧在郁郁葱葱的绿色花丛草地上，阳光斑驳，采用正上方俯视视角，顶部边缘可见蓝天与柔和的树叶；前景中飘浮着粉色的樱花花瓣。角色：共 2 人。角色 1 为下半部分的娇小动漫少女，面朝上方，极长的淡薰衣草蓝色双马尾铺散在草地上，明亮的大眼睛，表情平静略带惊讶，身穿圆领白衬衫、蓝色背带裙，刘海上别着黑色 X 形发夹；她怀中抱着 1 只带有深蓝色蝴蝶结的小白兔玩偶。角色 2 为右上方的年轻男子，相对于观众呈倒置状态，头部位于中右侧，短黑发，戴长方形眼镜，表情温和中性，身穿白色 T 恤，右侧边缘可见一只裸露的手臂。构图：少女位于左下方，男子位于右���方，两人头部靠近但未接触，周围环绕着草丛中许多细小的白色和黄色野花。排版：在左上方放置一个大型竖排中文标题，采用暖棕色书法衬线字体，内容为 {argument name="Chinese headline text" default="请问您今天要来点智乃吗？"}；在标题周围添加优雅的金色藤蔓装饰。在标题下方，添加较小的棕色衬线英文副标题，分多行排列，内容为 {argument name="English subtitle" default="Is the order a chino?"}；在副标题下方添加 1 个带有小型装饰分隔符的棕色小兔子图标。风格：精致的日系动漫浪漫封面艺术，细腻的线条，明亮的柔和色调，柔和的虚化效果，油画质感花卉，温暖的金色高光，空气感十足且治愈的氛围。约束条件：包含 2 名人类角色和 1 只玩偶；保持华丽边框可见；无额外 Logo，无水印，除指定的标题、副标题和兔子图标外，不添加任何额外文字。

en.title: Chalkboard Cat Fish Feast
en.description: Generates a whimsical chalkboard-textured anime illustration of a mischievous kitten surrounded by fish, food scraps, and playful doodles.
en.prompt: Create a vertical chalkboard-style illustration of a mischievous cute cat enjoying a messy fish feast, in a niji-like anime storybook style with rough chalk, pastel, crayon, and scratched paint textures on a dark blackboard background. The main subject is {argument name="character name" default="a calico kitten"} with large triangular ears, sleepy half-lidded golden eyes, a tiny pink nose, tongue sticking out, and one front paw raised toward the viewer showing pink toe beans. The cat wears {argument name="neck accessory" default="a colorful triangular bandana with a small gold bell"}. The tabletop foreground is cluttered with exactly 5 food items: 1 large blue-gray whole fish on the right, 1 dark bowl of flaked fish on the left, 1 white fish skeleton across the bottom center, 1 triangular fish head bone at bottom left, and 1 red-and-blue squeeze tube of paste lying at bottom right with cream spilling from the nozzle. The blackboard background contains exactly 12 chalk doodles: 1 paw print near the upper left, 1 red curled arrow, 1 large rocket in the upper right, 1 small fishbone near the upper right, 1 small standing cat silhouette on the right, 1 yellow star at upper left, 1 burst star near the top center, 1 pink star near the rocket, 2 tiny flower doodles, and 2 small crescent moons.
