Use [PALETTE], vintage print fading, distressed paper texture, subtle scratches, slightly sun-bleached tones, crisp automotive detail, poster-style symmetry, and a refined race-inspired editorial finish.

zh.title: 复古赛车汽车海报
zh.description: 一个使用 GPT Image 2 创建复古风格赛车海报的详细提示词，支持自定义车型、颜色和背景场景。
zh.prompt: 复古赛车海报，适用于 {argument name="car" default="[CAR]"}，4:5 竖版比例。展示 {argument name="color" default="[COLOR]"} [CAR] 的正面低角度英雄视角，构图居中，背景为 {argument name="scenery" default="[SCENERY]"}。背景构建采用极简的场景深度和分层图形设计元素：大太阳形状、重叠的几何块、倾斜面板、柔和条纹、半透明形状以及简洁的留白，所有元素与场景完美融合。在顶部添加醒目的标题“[TITLE]”，放置一个小型的 [BRAND] 标志，以及简短的口号“[SLOGAN]”。使用 [PALETTE] 配色，呈现复古印刷褪色感、做旧纸张纹理、细微划痕、轻微的日晒色调，保持清晰的汽车细节、海报风格的对称性，以及精致的赛车主题编辑风格。

en.title: Double Exposure Blue Hour Portrait
en.description: A dreamy analog photography prompt creating a surreal double exposure effect between a portrait and a sunset horizon.
en.prompt:
Ultra-cinematic dreamy analog portrait photography of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} standing outdoors at {argument name="time of day" default="blue hour"} just after sunset, long dark brown hair softly tousled by a gentle breeze, loose strands naturally crossing her face, wearing an {argument name="outfit" default="oversized faded black T-shirt"}, minimal styling, natural skin texture, subtle makeup, calm intimate expression, looking directly into the camera.

Create a surreal in-camera double exposure effect: a glowing golden sunset horizon, soft clouds, distant dark tree silhouettes, and warm orange light are transparently layered across the lower half of her body and chest, as if the landscape is reflected through her silhouette. A horizontal band of warm sunset light drifts across the frame, contrasting with the deep cool blue evening sky. Dreamy atmospheric haze, slight motion softness, gentle lens bloom, imperfect optical ghosting, nostalgic film grain, subtle halation around highlights, muted colors, soft contrast, poetic melancholic mood.

Low-angle medium portrait, centered composition, shallow depth of field, natural wind movement in hair, vintage 35mm film photography, Kodak Portra-inspired color science, soft focus edges, authentic analog imperfections, editorial fine-art photography, no text, no watermark, vertical 4:5.

zh.title: 蓝调时刻双重曝光人像
zh.description: 一个梦幻般的胶片摄影提示词，旨在创作出人像与日落天际线之间超现实的双重曝光效果。
zh.prompt:
超电影感的梦幻胶片人像摄影，拍摄一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻女性"} 站在户外，时间处于 {argument name="time of day" default="蓝调时刻"}，即日落之后。深棕色长发被微风轻轻吹乱，几缕发丝自然地拂过脸庞，身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="超大款褪色黑色 T 恤"}，极简造型，自然的皮肤纹理，淡妆，神情平静而亲密，直视镜头。

营造超现实的机内双重曝光效果：发光的金色日落地平线、柔和的云朵、远处深色的树木剪影以及温暖的橙色光芒，透明地叠加在她的下半身和胸部，仿佛风景透过她的剪影映射出来。一道温暖的日落光带横贯画面，与深邃冷冽的蓝色夜空形成对比。梦幻的大气朦胧感，轻微的动态柔焦，柔和的镜头光晕，不完美的重影，怀旧的胶片颗粒感，高光周围细微的光晕，低饱和色彩，柔和的对比度，充满诗意的忧郁氛围。

低角度中景人像，居中构图，浅景深，头发随风自然飘动，复古 35mm 胶片摄影，Kodak Portra 风格色彩科学，边缘柔焦，真实的胶片瑕疵，艺术编辑摄影，无文字，无水印，竖构图 4:5。

en.title: Korean Woman on Modern Train
en.description: A hyper-realistic portrait of a young Korean woman standing by a train window with a rural landscape blurred in the background.
en.prompt: A hyper-realistic photorealistic portrait of a beautiful young {argument name="nationality" default="Korean"} woman with smooth skin, shoulder-length {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair with soft bangs, and a gentle smile. She is leaning casually against the interior wall of a modern train, looking directly into the camera. She is wearing a minimal {argument name="outfit color" default="beige"} crewneck cotton t-shirt tucked into a high-waisted {argument name="clothing type" default="light-wash blue denim midi skirt"}. Her casual look is completed with white crew socks and clean white platform sneakers. She is standing next to a large train window showing a blurred rural landscape outside under soft daylight. The atmosphere is warm, aesthetic, and peaceful. Shot with a 35mm lens, natural lighting, cinematic composition, sharp focus, 8k resolution, highly detailed.

zh.title: 现代列车上的韩国女性
zh.description: 一张超写实的肖像照，一位年轻的韩国女性站在列车窗边，背景是模糊的乡村景观。
zh.prompt: 一张超写实的照片级肖像，主角是一位美丽的年轻 {argument name="nationality" default="韩国"} 女性，皮肤细腻，留着齐肩的 {argument name="hair color" default="黑色"} 柔顺长发，配有轻薄刘海，面带温柔微笑。她随意地靠在现代列车的内壁上，直视镜头。她穿着一件简约的 {argument name="outfit color" default="米色"} 圆领纯棉 T 恤，下摆束进高腰的 {argument name="clothing type" default="浅蓝色水洗牛仔中长裙"} 中。她的休闲装扮搭配了白色中筒袜和干净的白色厚底运动鞋。她站在巨大的列车窗旁，窗外是模糊的乡村景观，沐浴在柔和的日光下。整体氛围温暖、具有美感且宁静。使用 35mm 镜头拍摄，自然光，电影级构图，焦点清晰，8k 分辨率，细节丰富。

en.title: Low Angle Balcony Peeking Portrait
en.description: A series of prompts for a low-angle perspective of a young woman peeking over a balcony, capturing a dreamy summer aesthetic.
en.prompt:
Close-up shot from low angle, young woman's face peeking over {argument name="balcony color" default="white"} balcony railing, both hands gripping railing edge visible, direct playful eye contact with camera, wind-blown short dark hair, {argument name="clothing detail" default="floral dress strap"} visible at shoulder, heavily blurred green leaves and white blossoms in foreground, blue sky behind, warm golden skin tone, shallow depth of field, vertical 4:5 --ar 4:5 --v 6
Extreme low angle shot, more than half the frame filled with heavily blurred green leaves and white flower blossoms in extreme foreground, young woman in floral sundress barely visible peeking over railing above the foliage, only face and hands clearly visible, wide-eyed curious expression with direct gaze through the foliage, blue sky above, dreamy soft bokeh, maximum depth layering, vertical 4:5 --ar 4:5 --v 6
Wide low-angle shot looking up at young woman leaning over white wooden balcony railing of a charming house exterior, full figure visible from waist up, blue and white floral sundress, both hands on railing, short dark hair caught by breeze, lush green garden foliage framing the bottom and sides, bright blue sky filling upper background, warm golden afternoon light, negative space in sky for caption text, dreamy summer editorial photography, vertical 4:5 composition --ar 4:5 --v 6
Same extreme low-angle balcony peeking composition at golden hour, young woman with short dark hair peeking over white railing, warm amber-golden light washing over skin and floral dress, sky shifting from deep amber at horizon to blue above, blurred garden foliage in warm green-gold tones in foreground, long shadow cast across the railing, direct playful eye contact, cinematic golden hour color grade, vertical 4:5 --ar 4:5 --v 6

zh.title: 低角度阳台探头人像
zh.description: 一系列关于年轻女性从阳台探出头部的低角度视角提示词，捕捉梦幻般的夏日美感。
zh.prompt:
低角度特写镜头，年轻女性的脸从 {argument name="balcony color" default="白色"} 阳台栏杆上方探出，双手抓着栏杆边缘清晰可见，与镜头进行直接且俏皮的眼神交流，短发在风中飘动，肩膀处可见 {argument name="clothing detail" default="碎花裙肩带"}，前景为重度虚化的绿叶和白色花朵，背景为蓝天，温暖的金色肤色，浅景深，竖构图 4:5 --ar 4:5 --v 6
极低角度拍摄，画面超过一半被前景中重度虚化的绿叶和白色花朵填满，身穿碎花连衣裙的年轻女性在叶丛上方探出头，仅脸部和双手清晰可见，透过叶丛投射出好奇的眼神，上方为蓝天，梦幻柔和的焦外成像，最大景深层次感，竖构图 4:5 --ar 4:5 --v 6
广角低角度镜头，仰拍年轻女性倚靠在迷人房屋外观的白色木质阳台栏杆上，腰部以上全身可见，身穿蓝白碎花连衣裙，双手放在栏杆上，短发被微风吹起，葱郁的绿色花园叶片环绕底部和两侧，明亮的蓝天填充上方背景，温暖的午后金色光线，天空留白以便添加标题文字，梦幻夏日杂志摄影风格，竖构图 4:5 --ar 4:5 --v 6
同样的极低角度阳台探头构图，拍摄于黄金时刻，短发年轻女性从白色栏杆上方探出，温暖的琥珀色金光洒在皮肤和碎花裙上，天空从地平线的深琥珀色渐变为上方的蓝色，前景中花园叶片呈现温暖的绿金色调，栏杆上投下长长的阴影，直接且俏皮的眼神交流，电影级黄金时刻调色，竖构图 4:5 --ar 4:5 --v 6

en.title: Luxury Fashion Editorial Summer Portrait
en.description: A detailed luxury fashion portrait featuring realistic skin textures, a messy bun, and a silk designer shirt set against a bright summer sky.
en.prompt:
Ultra-realistic luxury fashion portrait of a naturally beautiful young woman with luminous fair porcelain skin, subtle freckles lightly scattered across her nose and cheeks, soft rosy blush, naturally pink lips, expressive hazel-grey eyes with long curled eyelashes, and well-defined natural eyebrows. Her {argument name="hair color" default="honey-brown"} hair is styled in a relaxed {argument name="hairstyle" default="low textured messy bun"} with delicate face-framing strands gently moving in the breeze. She wears elegant floral-inspired gold earrings, layered pearl and fine-chain necklaces, and a luxurious {argument name="clothing" default="silk designer shirt featuring an artistic landscape print"} in soft sky-blue, ivory, and warm sunset-amber tones with a relaxed open collar.
The scene takes place outdoors on a beautiful summer day beneath a vivid deep-blue sky filled with soft fluffy white clouds. Bright natural midday sunlight illuminates her face and outfit, creating realistic highlights, soft shadows, and authentic skin tones. A gentle breeze adds natural movement to her hair and clothing. Premium fashion editorial atmosphere, sophisticated styling, realistic skin texture with visible pores and natural details, ultra-photorealistic DSLR photography, professional full-frame camera, 85mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh, crisp focus on the subject, cinematic color grading, HDR, magazine-quality fashion photography, highly detailed, realistic lighting, photorealistic 8K resolution.

Pose Variation:
Examples:
Relaxed portrait, facing the camera directly with a calm confident expression and subtle natural smile.
Cheerful pose with a bright smile and a peace sign beside her cheek.
Graceful three-quarter profile, gently touching a loose strand of hair near her earring while gazing into the distance.
Looking back over her shoulder while holding a bouquet of pastel pink and cream flowers, smiling softly toward the camera.

zh.title: 奢华时尚杂志夏季人像
zh.description: 一幅精致的奢华时尚人像，呈现真实的皮肤质感、凌乱发髻以及丝绸设计师衬衫，背景为明亮的夏日天空。
zh.prompt:
超写实奢华时尚人像，展现了一位自然美丽的年轻女性，拥有透亮白皙的瓷肌，鼻梁和脸颊上散布着淡淡的雀斑，轻柔的玫瑰色腮红，自然的粉嫩双唇，富有表现力的榛灰色眼眸，配以修长卷翘的睫毛和轮廓分明的自然眉形。她的 {argument name="hair color" default="蜜棕色"} 头发被梳成随性的 {argument name="hairstyle" default="低位质感凌乱发髻"}，几缕修饰脸型的发丝在微风中轻轻飘动。她佩戴着优雅的花卉灵感金质耳环、叠戴的珍珠与细链项链，身穿一件奢华的 {argument name="clothing" default="印有艺术风景图案的丝绸设计师衬衫"}，色调为柔和的天蓝色、象牙白和温暖的落日琥珀色，领口微敞。
场景设定在美丽的夏日户外，背景是湛蓝的天空和柔软蓬松的白云。明亮的正午自然光照亮了她的脸庞和服饰，营造出逼真的高光、柔和的阴影和真实的肤色。微风为她的发丝和衣物增添了自然的动感。高级时尚杂志氛围，精致的造型，可见毛孔和自然细节的真实皮肤质感，超写实 DSLR 摄影，专业全画幅相机，85mm 镜头，f/1.8 光圈，浅景深，奶油般虚化的背景，主体焦点清晰，电影级调色，HDR，杂志级时尚摄影，高度细节化，真实光影，8K 超写实分辨率。

姿势变化：
示例：
放松的肖像，直面镜头，表情平静自信，带着淡淡的自然微笑。
欢快的姿势，灿烂的笑容，脸颊旁比着剪刀手。
优雅的四分之三侧面，轻轻触碰耳环旁的一缕发丝，凝视远方。
回眸，手中拿着一束淡粉色和奶油色的花束，对着镜头温柔微笑。

en.title: Airport Tarmac Candid Shot
en.description: A spontaneous and realistic airport tarmac photo of a woman standing beneath the wing of a commercial jet with a slightly overexposed phone camera look.
en.prompt: A spontaneous airport tarmac photo taken during a sunny afternoon, looks like someone called her name and she turned just as they pressed the shutter. A young woman stands beneath the wing of a large commercial airplane, her face 100% photorealistic—hat held casually in one hand, the other hand tucking a strand of her {argument name="hair color" default="long wavy blonde"} hair behind her ear, a soft genuine smile on her lips, eyes crinkling with warmth. She wears a {argument name="clothing" default="loose flowing black top with a boat neckline, high-waisted cream wide-leg trousers, simple sandals, large dark aviator-style sunglasses"}, her wide-brimmed woven sun hat held loosely in her hand. The frame is slightly tilted, caught mid-turn. Low-angle shot, making her and the airplane appear grand and monumental. Bright direct afternoon sun, harsh highlights on her skin and the white aircraft surface, deep shadows under the wing and her chin. The massive white fuselage with a row of small oval windows, the underside of the wing, and a large jet engine on the left side of the frame. Motion blur on her hair blowing in the wind and her hand tucking her hair. Slight overexposure on the white aircraft surface, heavy grain from phone camera, warm golden highlights, JPEG artifacts. Natural skin with visible pores, soft facial sheen, a tiny freckle on her nose, no beauty filter. A stray cat tail curls around a luggage cart wheel at the bottom right corner. Dutch angle 3°, 9:16

zh.title: 机场停机坪抓拍
zh.description: 一张真实自然的机场停机坪抓拍照片，一名女性站在商用喷气式飞机机翼下，带有轻微过曝的手机拍摄质感。
zh.prompt: 一张在阳光明媚的午后拍摄的机场停机坪抓拍照片，仿佛有人喊了她的名字，她刚转过头时快门便被按下。一位年轻女性站在大型商用飞机的机翼下，面部呈现 100% 的照片级真实感——一只手随意地拿着帽子，另一只手正将一缕 {argument name="hair color" default="长波浪金发"} 别到耳后，嘴角带着真诚柔和的微笑，双眼因笑意而微微眯起。她身穿 {argument name="clothing" default="宽松飘逸的黑色船领上衣，搭配高腰米色阔腿裤、简约凉鞋，佩戴一副大号深色飞行员墨镜"}，宽檐编织遮阳帽被随意地拿在手中。画面略微倾斜，捕捉到她转身的瞬间。低角度拍摄，使她和飞机显得宏伟壮观。明亮的午后直射阳光，在她的皮肤和白色的飞机表面形成强烈的亮部，机翼下和下巴处有深邃的阴影。巨大的白色机身排列着一排小椭圆窗户，机翼下方，画面左侧可见大型喷气发动机。风中飘动的发丝和整理头发的手部带有动态模糊。白色飞机表面略微过曝，带有手机拍摄的厚重噪点、温暖的金色高光以及 JPEG 压缩痕迹。自然的皮肤质感，可见毛孔、柔和的面部光泽，鼻尖有一颗小雀斑，无美颜滤镜。画面右下角，一只流浪猫的尾巴正绕在行李推车的轮子上。荷兰式倾斜角度 3°，9:16

en.title: Korean Retro Magazine Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for creating realistic Korean-style indoor portraits with vintage magazine typography and warm afternoon lighting.
en.prompt:
Using the reference person as the sole identity, maintain high consistency in facial features, face shape, gaze, and long black hair. Generate a set of 9:16 vertical realistic portraits in a {argument name="setting" default="quiet retro indoor space"} with dark wood floors, grey-beige walls, a rattan chair, a beige knitted blanket, and an old book. 

The subject wears a {argument name="outfit style" default="cream-white slim-fit long-sleeved top"} with a light brown knitted vest, a dark brown short skirt, and cream-colored socks, looking gentle and natural. Afternoon sunlight streams through the window, creating distinct long shadows on the walls, floor, hair, and face with warm golden backlighting.

The subject should perform various actions: sitting in the chair, daydreaming, kneeling on the floor, reading, shielding eyes from the sun, and looking out the window. Each image should have different poses and compositions with a quiet, thoughtful, or slightly melancholic expression. Movements should be graceful and realistic, with natural finger structures.

The photography style is Korean retro portraiture, high-end magazine style, cinematic indoor photography, soft film texture, slight grain, and natural skin textures with gentle low-saturation brown tones.

Add minimalist English magazine typography using elegant high-contrast serif fonts. Place two main titles and small text in empty areas without obstructing facial features.

Typography can use:

{argument name="magazine title" default="GOLDEN PAGES"}
Lost in stories
Found in light

QUIET SPELL
A hush
A book
A world of her own

OR:

VELVET LIGHT
Beauty in stillness

SOFT WHISPER
A page
A breath
A world of my own

Hyper-realistic photography, consistent identity, real skin texture, cinematic lighting, and high resolution. Single image output, no collages.

Negative Prompts:
Avoid facial changes, different people, plastic skin, excessive smoothing, limb distortion, extra fingers, hand deformities, repetitive actions, exaggerated smiles, and cluttered backgrounds.

zh.title: 韩系复古杂志风人像
zh.description: 一个用于创作写实韩系室内人像的高细节提示词，包含复古杂志排版和温暖的午后光影效果。
zh.prompt:
以参考人物为唯一身份，保持面部特征、脸型、眼神和黑色长发的高度一致性。生成一组 9:16 的竖版写实人像，场景设定为 {argument name="setting" default="安静的复古室内空间"}，配有深色木地板、灰米色墙壁、藤椅、米色针织毯和一本旧书。

人物身穿 {argument name="outfit style" default="奶油白修身长袖上衣"}，搭配浅棕色针织背心、深棕色短裙和奶油色袜子，神态温柔自然。午后阳光透过窗户洒入，在墙壁、地板、头发和面部投下清晰的长影，并带有温暖的金色背光。

人物需呈现多种动作：坐在椅子上、发呆、跪在地板上、阅读、遮挡阳光以及望向窗外。每张图像应具有不同的姿势和构图，表情安静、沉思或略带忧郁。动作需优雅写实，手指结构自然。

摄影风格为韩系复古人像、高端杂志风、电影感室内摄影、柔和胶片质感、轻微颗粒感，以及带有柔和低饱和度棕色调的自然皮肤纹理。

添加极简的英文杂志排版，使用优雅的高对比度衬线字体。将两个主标题和小段文字放置在空白区域，且不遮挡面部特征。

排版可使用：

{argument name="magazine title" default="GOLDEN PAGES"}
Lost in stories
Found in light

QUIET SPELL
A hush
A book
A world of her own

或：

VELVET LIGHT
Beauty in stillness

SOFT WHISPER
A page
A breath
A world of my own

超写实摄影，身份一致，真实皮肤纹理，电影级光影，高分辨率。单图输出，无拼图。

负面提示词：
避免面部改变、不同人物、塑料感皮肤、过度磨皮、肢体扭曲、多余手指、手部畸形、重复动作、夸张笑容和杂乱背景。

en.title: Miniature Photographer Macro Studio Scene
en.description: A complex prompt that places a miniature photographer inside a macro-scale studio surrounded by giant camera equipment, while using a reference photo for identity.
en.prompt: Use the uploaded reference image as the primary visual reference for the {argument name="subject" default="subject's facial features"}, hairstyle, expression, skin tone, clothing style, and overall likeness. Preserve the identity, pose inspiration, lighting mood, and cinematic aesthetic from the reference while recreating the scene below. Do not copy the image exactly—maintain the person's recognizable appearance in a new composition. Create a hyper-realistic cinematic scene of a {argument name="character" default="miniature photographer"} standing on a {argument name="platform" default="circular display platform"} while photographing with a professional mirrorless camera. Giant camera bodies, telephoto lenses, and studio equipment surround him on a wooden tabletop. In the background, a massive softly blurred portrait of the same person from the reference image smiles at the scene, creating the illusion that the miniature version exists inside his own photography studio. Include a professional LED panel light, realistic reflections, premium camera gear, warm cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, ultra-detailed textures, natural skin tones, fantasy perspective, volumetric lighting, HDR, commercial photography quality, 85mm lens, f/1.4, photorealistic, ultra-realistic, 8K masterpiece.

zh.title: 微缩摄影师微距影棚场景
zh.description: 一个复杂的提示词，将一位微缩摄影师置于被巨型摄影器材环绕的微距影棚场景中，并使用参考图来保持人物身份。
zh.prompt: 请使用上传的参考图作为 {argument name="subject" default="主体面部特征"}、发型、表情、肤色、服装风格及整体相似度的主要视觉参考。在重现下方场景时，保留参考图中的人物身份、姿势灵感、光影氛围和电影感美学。请勿完全复制原图，而是在新的构图中保持人物的可辨识度。创建一个超写实的电影感场景：一位 {argument name="character" default="微缩摄影师"} 站在 {argument name="platform" default="圆形展示台"} 上，正使用专业无反相机进行拍摄。木质桌面上，巨型相机机身、长焦镜头和影棚设备将其环绕。背景中，参考图中的同一人物正以巨大的、柔焦的肖像微笑注视着这一场景，营造出微缩版人物存在于其自身摄影棚内的错觉。包含专业 LED 平板灯、逼真的反射、高端摄影器材、温暖的电影感光效、浅景深、奶油般虚化的背景、超精细纹理、自然的肤色、奇幻视角、体积光、HDR、商业摄影品质、85mm 镜头、f/1.4 光圈、照片级真实感、超写实、8K 杰作。

en.title: Luxury Sedan Interior Candid Editorial
en.description: A cinematic and high-fashion editorial portrait of a woman in a luxury car cabin, captured with a paparazzi-style perspective.
en.prompt:
Ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial portrait of a strikingly beautiful woman in her {argument name="age" default="late 20s"} with naturally balanced facial features, expressive almond-shaped eyes, defined cheekbones, full lips, and healthy radiant skin. She is seated inside the rear cabin of a {argument name="vehicle type" default="premium luxury sedan"}, photographed candidly from outside the vehicle through a partially lowered side window.

The woman tilts her head slightly downward and toward the right, projecting quiet confidence and effortless sophistication. Her right hand is raised behind her head, casually gathering her thick dark hair, creating natural tension in the wrist and fingers. The pose feels spontaneous, elegant, and completely unposed.

Wardrobe & Accessories

- {argument name="accessory" default="Oversized rectangular black acetate sunglasses"} with subtle gold temple accents.
- Minimalist fitted black crew-neck top in a premium matte fabric.
- Single diamond stud earring visible on the right ear.
- No facial piercings.

Hair & Makeup

- Thick, voluminous espresso-brown hair with soft natural waves and realistic movement.
- A few delicate flyaway strands frame the forehead and temple.
- Refined no-makeup makeup look.
- Naturally defined brows.
- Soft matte complexion with subtle contouring and warm blush.
- Muted dusty-rose matte lips with realistic texture.

Environment
Inside a modern luxury vehicle with premium leather upholstery and elegant interior details.

Foreground includes soft out-of-focus window reflections and blurred vehicle framing elements that create an authentic paparazzi-style perspective.

Background remains heavily blurred with hints of the luxury cabin and natural daylight entering through distant windows.

Lighting
Soft diffused daylight filtering through the vehicle windows. Gentle highlights along the hair and shoulders. Subtle shadows define the cheekbones and jawline while maintaining a moody editorial atmosphere. No harsh lighting or direct flash.

Mood
Quiet luxury, old-money elegance, high-fashion editorial, exclusive celebrity candid, understated glamour.

Camera & Photography
Captured on a Phase One XF IQ4 medium-format camera with an 80mm f/1.8 lens. Medium close-up composition, slightly low shooting angle, extremely shallow depth of field, creamy cinematic bokeh, realistic lens rendering, authentic optical compression.

Color Grading
Natural film-inspired tones, muted colors, subtle warmth, soft contrast, realistic grain, premium magazine-quality finish.

Skin Detail
Visible pores, fine facial hair, natural skin texture, realistic imperfections, authentic complexion, zero artificial smoothing.

Negative Prompt
low quality, blurry, soft focus, distorted face, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, duplicate features, CGI, cartoon, anime, plastic skin, beauty filter, over-retouched skin, unrealistic eyes, poor lighting, watermark, logo, text, frame, artifacts

zh.title: 豪华轿车内饰抓拍时尚大片
zh.description: 一张电影感十足的高级时尚人像，展现了一位坐在豪华轿车内的女性，采用狗仔队风格的视角拍摄。
zh.prompt:
超写实豪华时尚人像，主角是一位容貌惊艳的女性，年龄为 {argument name="age" default="20 多岁后期"}，拥有自然匀称的五官、富有表现力的杏仁眼、轮廓分明的颧骨、丰满的双唇以及健康红润的肌肤。她坐在 {argument name="vehicle type" default="高端豪华轿车"} 的后座舱内，从车外透过半降的车窗进行抓拍。

她微微低头并向右倾斜，展现出一种沉静的自信与毫不费力的精致感。她的右手抬起放在脑后，随意地拢着浓密的深色长发，手腕和手指呈现出自然的张力。姿态显得随性、优雅，完全没有摆拍感。

服装与配饰

- {argument name="accessory" default="超大款黑色醋酸纤维长方形太阳镜"}，镜腿带有精致的金色装饰。
- 极简修身黑色圆领上衣，采用高级哑光面料。
- 右耳佩戴单颗钻石耳钉。
- 面部无穿孔。

发型与妆容

- 浓密蓬松的浓咖啡色长发，带有柔和的自然波浪和真实的动感。
- 几缕细碎的发丝散落在额头和太阳穴旁。
- 精致的“伪素颜”妆容。
- 自然修饰的眉形。
- 柔和的哑光肤色，带有细腻的修容和温暖的腮红。
- 柔和的灰粉色哑光唇妆，质感真实。

环境
置身于现代豪华汽车内部，配有高级皮革内饰和优雅的细节设计。

前景包含柔和的失焦窗户反光和模糊的车框元素，营造出真实的狗仔队拍摄视角。

背景深度虚化，隐约可见豪华车厢内部和从远处窗户射入的自然日光。

光影
柔和的漫射日光透过车窗照射进来。发丝和肩部带有柔和的高光。细腻的阴影勾勒出颧骨和下颌线，同时保持了电影般的氛围感。无强光或直接闪光。

氛围
静谧奢华、老钱风优雅、高级时尚大片、独家名人抓拍、低调的魅力。

相机与摄影
使用 Phase One XF IQ4 中画幅相机搭配 80mm f/1.8 镜头拍摄。中景特写构图，略微低角度拍摄，极浅的景深，奶油般柔美的电影级虚化，真实的镜头渲染，地道的空间压缩感。

调色
自然胶片质感色调，低饱和度色彩，细腻的暖色调，柔和的对比度，真实的颗粒感，高级杂志质感。

皮肤细节
可见毛孔、细微的汗毛、自然的皮肤纹理、真实的瑕疵、真实的肤色，无任何人工磨皮处理。

负面提示词
低质量、模糊、柔焦、面部扭曲、解剖结构错误、多余的手指、多余的肢体、重复的特征、CGI、卡通、动漫、塑料感皮肤、美颜滤镜、过度修图、不真实的眼睛、光线不佳、水印、Logo、文字、边框、伪影

en.title: Intimate Morning Selfie Photography
en.description: A prompt designed to create an authentic, spontaneous-looking morning selfie with realistic messy hair, sleepy expressions, and smartphone-style camera perspective.
en.prompt: Create a high-quality ultra-realistic intimate morning selfie of the same adult person immediately after waking up. The image should feel like a spontaneous real-life moment casually captured with a smartphone front-facing camera. Scene and pose: The subject is lying face-down on a bed, with their back facing the window and their face turned toward the camera. The left side of the face is deeply pressed into a soft pillow, naturally compressing the cheek. The camera is extremely close to the face, creating an intimate front-camera selfie perspective. Only one person should appear. Show mainly the face and a small amount of the upper body. The subject should look: sleepy, slightly dazed, quiet, naturally soft, as if they have only just opened their eyes. The eyes should remain relaxed and slightly unfocused. Use a calm, absent-minded gaze toward the camera. Preserve the original {argument name="hair style" default="hairstyle and hair color"} from the uploaded portrait. Make the hair extremely messy and naturally tousled from sleep. Include: loose uneven strands, soft bed-head volume, slightly flattened areas from the pillow, realistic flyaway hairs. The hair should look genuinely unstyled after waking up, not intentionally styled. Makeup: Apply refined but natural {argument name="makeup style" default="Korean beauty makeup"} while preserving the original facial identity. Luminous natural skin, subtle soft blush, lightly defined eyebrows, delicate neutral eye makeup, thin eyeliner following the original eye shape, softly separated lashes, glossy natural pink lips. The makeup should remain polished but believable. Do not heavily reshape or beautify the face. The subject wears a {argument name="clothing" default="fitted white long-sleeve top"}. Only a small portion of the upper clothing should be visible because the composition is focused closely on the face. Lighting and background: Use dark black-gray curtains behind the subject. Morning light enters only through a narrow gap in the curtains from behind. Create strong but realistic contrast between light and shadow across the face. Keep the face clearly visible and softly illuminated despite the backlighting. Use subtle morning glow, natural shadow transitions, and realistic indoor light. Composition and camera: extreme facial close-up, smartphone front-camera perspective, casual imperfect framing, intimate eye-level angle, shallow depth of field, realistic lens softness, no professional studio posing. The final result should feel like an authentic private morning selfie captured without preparation. Image quality: Create premium ultra-realistic 4K-quality detail with: natural high-quality skin texture, visible pores, realistic individual hair strands, soft pillow texture, natural facial compression against the pillow, accurate anatomy, realistic morning lighting. Final mood: A sleepy, intimate, freshly awakened morning selfie that feels like a genuine everyday moment.

zh.title: 亲密晨间自拍摄影
zh.description: 一个旨在创作真实、随性晨间自拍的提示词，包含逼真的凌乱发型、睡眼惺忪的表情以及智能手机风格的拍摄视角。
zh.prompt: 创作一张高质量、超写实的亲密晨间自拍，主角为刚睡醒的同一位成年人。画面应呈现出一种由智能手机前置摄像头随手捕捉的真实生活瞬间感。场景与姿势：主体趴在床上，背对窗户，脸部转向镜头。左侧脸颊深陷在柔软的枕头中，呈现出自然的挤压感。相机极度靠近脸部，营造出亲密的前置摄像头自拍视角。画面中仅出现一人。主要展示脸部及少量上半身。主体应表现出：睡眼惺忪、略显迷茫、安静、自然柔和，仿佛刚睁开双眼。眼神保持放松且略微失焦，以平静、心不在焉的神态看向镜头。保留上传肖像中原有的 {argument name="hair style" default="发型和发色"}。头发应呈现出刚睡醒时极度凌乱且自然蓬松的状态。包含：松散不均的发丝、柔软的睡乱发量、被枕头压扁的区域、逼真的碎发。头发应看起来是刚睡醒后的自然状态，而非刻意造型。妆容：应用精致但自然的 {argument name="makeup style" default="韩系美妆"}，同时保留原有的面部特征。光泽感自然肌肤、柔和的腮红、轮廓清晰的眉毛、精致的中性眼妆、顺应原有眼形的细眼线、根根分明的睫毛、水润自然的粉色嘴唇。妆容应保持精致但真实可信。请勿过度重塑或美化脸部。主体穿着 {argument name="clothing" default="修身白色长袖上衣"}。由于构图紧贴脸部，仅露出少量上衣。光影与背景：主体身后使用深灰黑色窗帘。晨光仅从窗帘缝隙中透入。在脸部形成强烈但真实的明暗对比。尽管处于逆光下，仍需保持脸部清晰可见且柔和明亮。使用微妙的晨光、自然的阴影过渡以及逼真的室内光线。构图与相机：极近距离面部特写、智能手机前置摄像头视角、随性且不完美的构图、亲密的平视角度、浅景深、真实的镜头柔焦感，无专业影棚摆拍感。最终效果应如同未经准备、真实私密的晨间自拍。图像质量：创作具有 4K 级细节的超写实图像，包含：自然的优质皮肤纹理、可见的毛孔、逼真的单根发丝、柔软的枕头质感、面部压在枕头上的真实感、准确的解剖结构、逼真的晨间光影。最终氛围：一张睡眼惺忪、亲密、刚睡醒的晨间自拍，呈现出真实的日常生活瞬间。

en.title: Luxury Chocolate Commercial Storyboard
en.description: A detailed image generation prompt for creating a professional 10-panel advertising storyboard for a chocolate brand, including specific scene directions and production captions.
en.prompt: Create one professional commercial storyboard presentation showing 10 cinematic frames arranged in a clean 2!5 grid on a white presentation board. Thin black borders separate each frame. Each panel contains a bold scene number (01–10), timestamp, and a short production caption underneath. The storyboard should look like a real advertising agency pre-production board for a luxury chocolate commercial. TITLE KITKAT "The Art of the Snap" Luxury Commercial Storyboard • 15 Seconds STYLE Inspired by the cinematic luxury aesthetic of premium chocolate commercials. Rich dark background, dramatic lighting, elegant slow motion, sensual textures, premium food photography, macro cinematography, high-end advertising, ultra photorealistic. SCENE 01 (0.0–1.5s) Complete darkness. A single KitKat bar slowly emerges from shadow onto a polished dark stone pedestal. Tiny cocoa dust floats through warm golden light. Caption: The Reveal SCENE 02 (1.5–3.0s) Extreme macro. Camera glides across the embossed KitKat logo. Chocolate surface reflects soft warm highlights. Every texture is perfectly visible. Caption: Luxury Detail SCENE 03 (3.0–4.5s) Roasted cocoa beans. Madagascar vanilla pods. Fresh milk splash. Wafer layers. Chocolate curls. Everything slowly floats around the chocolate bar. Caption: Ingredients Rise SCENE 04 (4.5–6.0s) The KitKat bar snaps perfectly in half. Time almost freezes. Chocolate shards. Wafer crumbs. Cocoa powder. Chocolate flakes. Explode outward in beautiful slow motion. Caption: The Perfect Snap SCENE 05 (6.0–7.5s) Camera performs a slow cinematic orbit around the broken KitKat pieces. The creamy wafer layers are exposed. Chocolate dust dances through the light. Caption: Floating Luxury SCENE 06 (7.5–9.0s) Extreme macro. Molten chocolate slowly pours over the broken wafer. The chocolate moves like silk. Tiny reflections shimmer. Caption: Chocolate Flow SCENE 07 (9.0–10.5s) A cascade of liquid chocolate envelops the KitKat. Chocolate ribbons twist elegantly. Cocoa particles sparkle. Caption: Pure Indulgence SCENE 08 (10.5–12.0s) Everything freezes. Chocolate droplets. Wafer crumbs. Chocolate curls. Cocoa powder. All suspended perfectly around the product. Caption: Frozen Perfection SCENE 09 (12.0–13.5s) Ultimate hero shot. Complete KitKat package standing beside the broken chocolate bar. Warm cinematic spotlight. Premium luxury composition. Caption: Hero Product SCENE 10 (13.5–15.0s) Minimal luxury background. The KitKat logo appears. Elegant typography fades in. Tagline: "Have a Break. Enjoy Every Snap." Caption: Brand Signature Presentation style: • Professional Hollywood commercial storyboard • Advertising agency pitch board • 10 cinematic storyboard frames • White presentation sheet • Thin black borders • Scene numbers • Timestamps • Production captions • Combination of hand-drawn storyboard notes and ultra-realistic colored frames • Premium chocolate commercial • Luxury food advertising •

zh.title: 奢华巧克力广告项目
zh.description: 一份详细的图像生成提示词，用于创建专业的 10 帧巧克力品牌广告项目，包含具体的场景指导和制作说明。
zh.prompt: 创建一个专业的商业项目演示，在白色的演示项目上以 2x5 的整齐网格排列 10 个电影级画面。每个画面由细黑边框分隔。每个面板下方包含粗体场景编号（01–10）、时间戳和简短的制作说明。该项目应看起来像真正的广告代理商为奢华巧克力广告制作的预制作项目。标题 KITKAT “The Art of the Snap” 奢华商业项目 • 15 秒 风格：灵感源自高端巧克力广告的电影级奢华美学。浓郁的深色背景、戏剧性的灯光、优雅的慢动作、感性的质感、高级美食摄影、微距摄影、高端广告、超写实主义。场景 01 (0.0–1.5s) 全黑。一根 KitKat 巧克力棒从阴影中缓慢浮现，置于抛光的深色石质底座上。细小的可可粉在温暖的金色光线下漂浮。说明：揭幕 场景 02 (1.5–3.0s) 极致微距。镜头滑过浮雕的 KitKat 标志。巧克力表面反射出柔和温暖的高光。每一处纹理都清晰可见。说明：奢华细节 场景 03 (3.0–4.5s) 烘焙过的可可豆。马达加斯加香草荚。新鲜牛奶溅起。威化层。巧克力卷。所有元素缓慢环绕在巧克力棒周围。说明：原料升华 场景 04 (4.5–6.0s) KitKat 巧克力棒完美地从中间折断。时间几乎静止。巧克力碎片。威化碎屑。可可粉。巧克力屑。以优美的慢动作向外迸发。说明：完美的折断 场景 05 (6.0–7.5s) 镜头围绕折断的 KitKat 碎片进行缓慢的电影级环绕拍摄。奶油威化层显露出来。巧克力粉在光线中舞动。说明：漂浮的奢华 场景 06 (7.5–9.0s) 极致微距。融化的巧克力缓慢浇在折断的威化饼上。巧克力如丝绸般流动。细小的反射闪烁着光芒。说明：巧克力流 场景 07 (9.0–10.5s) 倾泻而下的液态巧克力包裹住 KitKat。巧克力丝带优雅地扭动。可可颗粒闪闪发光。说明：纯粹的享受 场景 08 (10.5–12.0s) 万物静止。巧克力液滴。威化碎屑。巧克力卷。可可粉。所有元素完美地悬浮在产品周围。说明：凝固的完美 场景 09 (12.0–13.5s) 终极主角镜头。完整的 KitKat 包装立在折断的巧克力棒旁边。温暖的电影级聚光灯。高级奢华构图。说明：产品主角 场景 10 (13.5–15.0s) 极简奢华背景。KitKat 标志出现。优雅的字体淡入。标语：“Have a Break. Enjoy Every Snap.” 说明：品牌签名 演示风格：• 专业好莱坞商业项目 • 广告代理商提案项目 • 10 个电影级项目帧 • 白色演示纸 • 细黑边框 • 场景编号 • 时间戳 • 制作说明 • 手绘项目笔记与超写实彩色画面的结合 • 高端巧克力广告 • 奢华美食广告 •

en.title: Ultra-realistic Indonesian Woman Portrait
en.description: A stunningly detailed editorial beauty portrait of a young Indonesian woman, captured with an 85mm lens to emphasize emotional depth and realistic skin textures against a minimalist backdrop.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic extreme close-up beauty portrait of an exceptionally beautiful {argument name="age" default="20-year-old"} {argument name="ethnicity" default="Indonesian"} woman, with fair warm-toned skin, smooth luminous complexion, realistic skin pores, subtle natural glow, and flawless healthy skin. She has long, deep {argument name="hair color" default="jet-black"} hair with silky, glossy strands and intricate individual hair detail, naturally framing her face. Her expressive dark brown eyes are slightly watery, conveying a melancholic, wistful, and emotionally gentle expression, with soft natural eyebrows, long delicate eyelashes, and naturally rosy lips that are slightly parted. Her face is perfectly balanced with elegant Indonesian features, a refined nose, soft jawline, and graceful youthful beauty. Shot from a slightly low angle with direct eye contact, head gently tilted, shoulders barely visible, minimalist composition. Soft high-key diffused daylight from a large window, clean white seamless background, gentle shadows, creamy lighting, subtle catchlights in the eyes, natural color grading, warm skin tones, premium editorial beauty photography, Vogue magazine aesthetic. 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, ultra-shallow depth of field, razor-sharp focus on both eyes and lips, smooth creamy bokeh, HDR, 8K, hyperrealistic, photorealistic, cinematic quality, natural skin texture, minimal natural makeup, no jewelry, no accessories, no text, centered composition. Hair: deep natural jet black (#0A0A0A), long, silky, glossy, naturally flowing with subtle volume. Eyes: deep dark brown with natural reflections and slightly teary highlights. Expression: soft melancholic gaze, subtly sad and contemplative, lips slightly parted, conveying quiet emotion and elegance. Skin: smooth warm ivory complexion with realistic texture and a healthy natural glow. Clothing: a simple black knit sweater visible only at the lower edge to emphasize the face. Background: plain white studio backdrop, clean and minimalist. 8K, ultra-photorealistic, luxury editorial portrait, emotionally cinematic, masterpiece quality.

zh.title: 超写实印尼女性肖像
zh.description: 一张细节惊人的编辑级美妆肖像，拍摄对象为一名年轻的印尼女性。使用 85mm 镜头捕捉，以极简背景衬托出情感深度与真实的皮肤纹理。
zh.prompt: 超写实极致特写美妆肖像，拍摄对象为一位极其美丽的 {argument name="age" default="20 岁"} {argument name="ethnicity" default="印尼籍"} 女性，拥有白皙温暖的肤色、细腻透亮的肤质、真实的毛孔、微妙的自然光泽以及无瑕健康的肌肤。她留着长长的、深 {argument name="hair color" default="乌黑"} 色秀发，发丝柔顺有光泽，细节精致，自然地修饰着脸型。她那富有表现力的深褐色眼睛微微湿润，流露出忧郁、渴望且温柔的情感，搭配柔和的天然眉毛、纤长的睫毛以及微微张开的自然红润双唇。她的面部比例完美，拥有优雅的印尼女性特征、精致的鼻梁、柔和的下颌线以及优雅的青春美感。采用略微仰拍视角，与镜头直接对视，头部微微倾斜，肩膀隐约可见，构图极简。来自大窗户的柔和高调漫射日光，干净的白色无缝背景，柔和的阴影，奶油般的质感光影，眼中带有细微的眼神光，自然色彩分级，温暖的肤色，高端编辑级美妆摄影，Vogue 杂志美学。85mm 人像镜头，f/1.8，极浅景深，双眼与双唇焦点极其锐利，柔和的奶油般虚化效果，HDR，8K，超写实，照片级真实感，电影级画质，自然的皮肤纹理，极简自然妆容，无首饰，无配饰，无文字，居中构图。发色：深邃自然的乌黑色（#0A0A0A），长发柔顺、有光泽，自然垂落且富有层次感。眼睛：深褐色，带有自然反射光和微微湿润的亮点。表情：柔和忧郁的凝视，略带伤感与沉思，双唇微启，传达出安静的情感与优雅。皮肤：光滑的暖象牙色肤色，具有真实的纹理和健康的自然光泽。服装：简单的黑色针织毛衣，仅在底部边缘可见，以突出面部。背景：纯白摄影棚背景，干净且极简。8K，超写实照片，奢华编辑级肖像，电影般的情感表达，大师级品质。

en.title: Hermit Crabs Carrying Storm Clouds
en.description: A poetic and surreal prompt depicting hermit crabs carrying clouds as they move through a meadow, creating a magical nature scene.
en.prompt: A group of {argument name="animal" default="hermit crabs"} carrying {argument name="weather" default="storm clouds"}, slowly crossing the {argument name="scene" default="meadow"} before the wind and rain.

zh.title: 背负风暴云的寄居蟹
zh.description: 一个充满诗意与超现实感的提示词，描绘了寄居蟹在草地上穿行时背负着云朵，营造出一种奇幻的自然场景。
zh.prompt: 一群 {argument name="animal" default="寄居蟹"} 背负着 {argument name="weather" default="风暴云"}，在风雨来临前缓慢穿过 {argument name="scene" default="草地"}。

en.title: Nighttime Convenience Store Street Photography
en.description: A professional-grade prompt for creating photorealistic nighttime scenes outside a convenience store, focusing on lighting, depth of field, and natural urban atmosphere.
en.prompt: Photorealistic everyday background-and-pose set featuring an {argument name="subject" default="adult woman"} at night. Background identity: a brightly lit neighborhood convenience-store exterior at night, with a glowing storefront, fluorescent interior light spilling through large glass windows, refrigerated display glow, poster-like non-readable color blocks, a small outdoor ashtray or stand, bicycle silhouettes, wet asphalt, reflected white-green-orange storefront light, and layered city darkness beyond. The setting should feel ordinary, urban, and unmistakably shaped by artificial light at night. Depth lock: create a clear three-layer composition. In the foreground, a softly blurred bollard, bicycle handlebar, or wet pavement reflection enters near the lens. In the middle ground, the subject stands just outside the storefront near the window or entrance edge. In the background, the convenience-store interior glow, shelf depth, glass reflections, and darker street beyond recede naturally. Use the window reflections and pavement sheen to create depth instead of a flat lit wall. Composition lock: vertical 4:5 lifestyle crop from around waist height, framed from mid-thigh or waist to head. The subject fills about 65–75% of the frame. Keep the glowing glass, part of the entrance frame, some wet pavement reflection, and layered store depth visible. The image should feel like a natural nighttime street moment. Action and pose lock: the subject stands casually with both feet on the ground, body angled slightly toward the storefront. One hand holds a {argument name="prop" default="small warm drink cup or bottle"} at lower-chest or waist height. The other hand rests naturally near the pocket area, the side of the body, or lightly against the storefront edge. Shoulders remain lowered, posture relaxed, and weight distribution natural, as if she has just stepped out and paused for a moment. Camera and gaze lock: her head remains mostly aligned with the storefront-side angle rather than turning fully toward the camera. The camera is positioned near the glass edge within her natural forward field. Only her eyes shift briefly toward the lens, with minimal head movement, preserving a natural three-quarter face angle and a quiet candid feeling. Avoid: facing the camera square-on, hard posed stance, dramatic lean, raised knee, drink presented toward the viewer, full-body street snapshot, empty dark background, readable commercial text or real logos dominating the frame.

zh.title: 深夜便利店街头摄影
zh.description: 一套专业级提示词，用于创作便利店外逼真的夜景，重点在于光影、景深和自然的城市氛围。
zh.prompt: 一套逼真的日常背景与姿势设定，主角为 {argument name="subject" default="成年女性"}，时间为夜晚。背景设定：夜晚灯火通明的社区便利店外景，明亮的店面，荧光灯光透过大玻璃窗洒出，冷柜发出微光，海报般不可辨认的色块，室外小型烟灰缸或立牌，自行车剪影，湿润的柏油路面，反射着白、绿、橙色的店面灯光，背景是层层叠叠的城市夜色。场景应充满日常感、城市气息，并由夜晚的人造光鲜明地勾勒出来。景深锁定：营造清晰的三层构图。前景处，柔和虚化的防撞柱、自行车把手或湿润路面的倒影靠近镜头。中景处，主角站在店外靠近窗户或入口边缘的位置。背景处，便利店内部的微光、货架的纵深感、玻璃倒影以及更远处的黑暗街道自然地向后延伸。利用玻璃倒影和路面光泽营造深度，避免平面的光墙感。构图锁定：采用 4:5 的竖向生活照裁剪比例，从腰部高度拍摄，取景范围从大腿中部或腰部到头部。主角占据画面约 65%–75%。保留发光的玻璃、部分入口边框、部分湿润路面倒影以及层层叠叠的店面纵深。画面应呈现出自然的深夜街头瞬间。动作与姿势锁定：主角双脚着地自然站立，身体略微朝向店面。一只手在胸部下方或腰部高度拿着 {argument name="prop" default="小杯热饮或瓶装饮料"}。另一只手自然地放在口袋附近、身体一侧，或轻轻靠在店面边缘。双肩下垂，姿态放松，重心分布自然，仿佛刚走出来稍作停留。相机与视线锁定：头部保持与店面侧向的角度一致，而不是完全转向镜头。相机放置在玻璃边缘附近，处于她自然的视野范围内。仅双眼短暂看向镜头，头部转动幅度极小，保留自然的三分之四侧脸角度和安静的抓拍感。避免：正对镜头、僵硬的摆拍姿势、夸张的倚靠、抬膝、向观众展示饮料、全身街拍、空洞的黑暗背景、画面中出现可辨认的商业文字或真实品牌 Logo。

en.title: Vintage Saree Aesthetic Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating a nostalgic, Pinterest-style portrait featuring a woman in a vintage saree with red accessories, set in a cinematic 90s atmosphere.
en.prompt: {argument name="outfit" default="Retro saree paired with red bracelets"}, creating a beautiful Pinterest-style aesthetic. Flowing wavy hair, holding {argument name="prop" default="a bouquet of red roses"}, accompanied by a romantic breeze, as if in a 90s movie scene. A girl leans her head against a thick wall, with deep shadows and strong contrast creating a mysterious and artistic atmosphere.

zh.title: 复古纱丽美学人像
zh.description: 一个用于生成怀旧 Pinterest 风格人像的详细提示词，描绘了一位身着复古纱丽、佩戴红色配饰的女性，置身于 90 年代电影般的氛围中。
zh.prompt: {argument name="outfit" default="搭配红色手镯的复古纱丽"}，营造出唯美的 Pinterest 风格美学。飘逸的波浪卷发，手中拿着 {argument name="prop" default="一束红玫瑰"}，伴随着浪漫的微风，仿佛置身于 90 年代的电影场景中。女孩将头靠在厚实的墙壁上，深邃的阴影与强烈的对比营造出神秘而艺术的氛围。

en.title: Cinematic First-Person Girlfriend Portrait
en.description: A comprehensive prompt designed to create highly realistic, cinematic portrait photography of an East Asian woman from a first-person perspective, capturing a 'girlfriend' vibe.
en.prompt: Highly realistic cinematic portrait photography, 2160x3840 vertical composition, real camera texture, 50mm or 85mm portrait lens effect, shallow depth of field, clean and transparent summer natural light tones. A young and beautiful East Asian adult woman with {argument name="facial features" default="soft heart-shaped face, exquisite classical features, bright almond/fox eyes, small bridge of the nose, naturally full lip shape"}, sweet, sunny, energetic, and cute. She is walking on {argument name="scene" default="a garden stone path / shaded path / European street / courtyard path"}, holding someone's hand behind her, capturing a first-person couple's perspective. She has long hair with {argument name="hair style" default="natural slight curls, long straight hair, loose waves, airy bangs"}, with strands flying in the wind under strong natural backlight. She is wearing {argument name="clothing" default="a white lace slip dress / beige slip dress / light blue short-sleeved top with a white skirt"}. Skin texture must be extremely realistic with fine pores and natural texture. The overall image has high realism, cinematic feel, and a heart-pounding summer vibe.

zh.title: 电影感第一人称女友肖像
zh.description: 一套综合提示词，旨在从第一人称视角创作出极具真实感、电影质感的东亚女性肖像摄影，捕捉“女友感”氛围。
zh.prompt: 高度逼真的电影感肖像摄影，2160x3840 竖构图，真实相机质感，50mm 或 85mm 人像镜头效果，浅景深，干净通透的夏季自然光色调。一位年轻漂亮的东亚成年女性，拥有 {argument name="facial features" default="柔和的心形脸，精致的古典五官，明亮的杏眼/狐狸眼，小巧的鼻梁，自然饱满的唇形"}，甜美、阳光、充满活力且可爱。她正走在 {argument name="scene" default="花园石子路 / 林荫小道 / 欧式街道 / 庭院小径"} 上，牵着身后人的手，捕捉第一人称情侣视角。她留着长发，发型为 {argument name="hair style" default="自然微卷、长直发、蓬松波浪、空气刘海"}，发丝在强烈的自然逆光下随风飘动。她穿着 {argument name="clothing" default="白色蕾丝吊带裙 / 米色吊带裙 / 浅蓝色短袖上衣搭配白色半身裙"}。皮肤质感必须极其逼真，带有细致的毛孔和自然纹理。整体画面具有高度的真实感、电影感以及令人心动的夏季氛围。

en.title: Japanese Rooftop Summer Portrait
en.description: A delicate Japanese-style film portrait prompt for a rooftop scene, focusing on natural light, soft wind effects on hair, and urban background aesthetics.
en.prompt: Subject: Hand counting clouds. Main Subject: Vertical 4:5 photo-style portrait. Under a bright summer sky, on the rooftop of a city apartment building, a natural-looking woman is leaning against a white railing. The figure is positioned slightly below the center of the frame, captured from the upper body to above the knees, with more than half of the upper part of the frame left as a wide margin of blue sky. Person/Expression: Short dark brown bob haircut. Thin bangs and hair around the face are gently blowing to the side in the breeze. Eyes closed, mouth relaxed with a quiet expression. Natural flush and small highlights on the cheeks, clean Japanese-style makeup. The face is tilted slightly downward, giving a serene impression of taking in the bright summer sunlight. Clothing/Pose: White sleeveless summer blouse. Fine pintucks on the chest, modest lace on the cuffs, and the light transparency of thin cotton. Below, a reddish terracotta high-waisted skirt. Both elbows are held close to the inside of the railing, and both hands hang forward. The person's fingertips naturally curl and rest on the railing following gravity. Shoulders and neck are relaxed, with only the hair and edges of the clothes swaying slightly in the wind. Background/Light: The background is a rooftop where low-rise apartment complexes in urban areas are blurred in the distance. The sky is bright light blue, with only a few small natural white clouds floating in the sky. Do not include laundry poles, laundry, floating clothes, or artificial cloud masses. Main light is strong summer sunlight from the upper left. Face, shoulders, and top of the blouse are brightly lit, casting sharp shadows on the railing and skirt. Reflected light returns softly from the white walls and railing. Composition/Camera: Camera is positioned slightly lower than chest height, near the front. Use a medium telephoto lens to shallowly blur the background and focus on the texture of the person's face, hair, hands, and clothing. Leave a large sky margin above the person's head and cut the bottom edge naturally in the middle of the skirt. Place the horizon line of the railing near the bottom third of the screen to create a sense of quiet stability. Texture/Style: Realistic photographic expression. Meticulously depict the transparent summer air, natural skin texture, thin cotton fibers, fine graininess of the white railing, and soft wrinkles of the skirt. Colors center on white, blue, and terracotta, with light contrast like a bright and clean Japanese-style film photograph. Finish as a natural light portrait without excessive processing. Negative: Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fusion of limbs, broken joints, poor contact with the railing, floating objects, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with the light source, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 日系夏日天台人像
zh.description: 一款精致的日系胶片风格天台人像提示词，聚焦于自然光影、发丝随风飘动的效果以及城市背景美学。
zh.prompt: 主体：指尖数云。主要主体：竖构图 4:5 照片风格人像。在明亮的夏日天空下，城市公寓的天台上，一位自然风格的女性倚靠在白色栏杆旁。人物位于画面中心偏下方，取景范围从上半身到膝盖以上，画面上方留出超过一半的蓝天作为大面积留白。人物/表情：深棕色短波波头。稀疏的刘海和脸颊两侧的发丝在微风中轻轻向一侧飘动。闭着双眼，嘴角放松，表情宁静。脸颊带有自然的红晕和细微的高光，清透的日系妆容。头部微微低垂，呈现出一种沉浸在明媚夏日阳光下的安详感。服装/姿势：白色无袖夏日衬衫。胸前有细密的褶皱，袖口有素雅的蕾丝，材质为轻薄透气的棉布。下身穿着红陶色的高腰裙。双肘靠近栏杆内侧，双手向前垂下。指尖自然弯曲，顺着重力搭在栏杆上。肩颈放松，只有发丝和衣角在风中微微摆动。背景/光影：背景为天台，远处模糊可见城市低层公寓群。天空呈现明亮的浅蓝色，仅有几朵天然的小白云漂浮。画面中不包含晾衣杆、衣物、漂浮的衣服或人工云团。主光源为来自左上方的强烈夏日阳光。面部、肩膀和衬衫顶部被明亮照亮，在栏杆和裙子上投下锐利的阴影。反射光从白色墙壁和栏杆柔和地回弹。构图/相机：相机位置略低于胸部高度，靠近正面。使用中长焦镜头以获得浅景深，虚化背景，聚焦于人物面部、发丝、双手和衣物的质感。人物头顶上方保留大面积天空留白，底部在裙子中部自然裁切。将栏杆的地平线置于画面下三分之一处，营造出宁静稳定的氛围。质感/风格：写实摄影表现。细腻刻画透明的夏日空气感、自然的皮肤纹理、薄棉纤维、白色栏杆的细微颗粒感以及裙子的柔和褶皱。色彩以白色、蓝色和红陶色为主，呈现出明亮清透的日系胶片摄影风格。最终效果为自然光人像，无需过度后期处理。负面提示词：不自然的面部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、手指缺失、肢体融合、关节断裂、与栏杆接触不良、漂浮物体、不符合重力、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、乱码文字、Logo、水印、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Morning Light Bedroom Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for creating a peaceful, realistic morning portrait of a woman in a Japanese modern bedroom with soft sunlight.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Shoulders Wrapped in Light

Main Subject:
Vertical 4:5. In a quiet, modern Japanese-style bedroom with morning light streaming in, {argument name="age" default="a woman in her early 20s"} is sitting on a {argument name="bed color" default="cream-colored"} bed. The person is positioned slightly to the right of the center, with the head to the thighs occupying about 70% of the screen. A large ivory pillow is placed in the left foreground, naturally overlapping with part of the person's arm and torso.

Character and Expression:
Fair skin leaning towards light ivory beige, smooth with a touch of rose-colored flush. Without excessive uniformization, natural skin texture and soft luster are left on the cheeks, neck, shoulders, and collarbone. The features are elegant and delicate, with a calm, doll-like Japanese-style makeup. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink brown eyeshadow, long thin eyelashes, natural eye bags, soft light brown eyebrows, and translucent pink beige lip gloss. Eyes are quietly closed with a very small smile on the lips. The chin is slightly raised, and the head is tilted to the left.

Clothing and Pose:
A mature, adult-like model physique. Wearing a {argument name="outfit color" default="champagne beige"} satin camisole with thin shoulder straps and a deep V-line at the chest. A plain, thin chiffon gown is draped over the shoulders, with sleeves and arms showing slight transparency. No patterns, embroidery, or logos. The upper body is slightly arched back, and the shoulders are naturally open. The left arm is placed along the pillow, and the other hand is lowered near the knee. The right leg extends towards the bottom right of the screen, with soft wrinkles and weight in the hem of the clothing.

Background and Light:
In the back left, there is a wooden-framed window with thin ecru curtains, and a transparent vase with small branches and pottery by the window. In the back right is a wooden-framed shoji-style partition. The background is unified in beige, wood, and ivory, creating a calm bedroom with minimal sense of daily clutter. The primary light is warm morning sun streaming from the window in the upper left. Soft highlights are placed on the left side of the face, shoulders, collarbone, chest, and thighs, with shadows naturally falling to the bottom right. The light through the curtains creates a moderate contrast that is not too harsh.

Composition and Camera:
Vertical medium portrait. The camera is at a level slightly higher than the chest, almost at eye level. Natural compression equivalent to 85mm. Focus is on the face and upper body, with the background softly blurred. A small amount of negative space is left above the head, and the large pillow in the left foreground creates depth. Strands of hair fall across the cheeks and forehead, spreading softly to the right.

Texture and Style:
Photorealistic Japanese-style portrait. Soft film-like grain, low contrast, and naturally warm color temperature. Meticulous representation of the smooth reflection of satin, the thinness of chiffon, and the fiber texture of the linen pillow and bedding. The skin retains natural pores and fine shadows for a delicate finish without a plastic feel.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural body shape, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor contact between cloth and body, unnatural transparency, shadows inconsistent with the light source, excessive skin smoothing, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 晨光卧室人像
zh.description: 一个高细节的提示词，用于创作一张宁静、写实的早晨人像，展现一位女性在日式现代卧室中，沐浴在柔和阳光下的场景。
zh.prompt:
主题：
沐浴晨光的双肩

主体：
竖构图 4:5。在一个安静的现代日式卧室中，清晨的阳光倾泻而入，{argument name="age" default="一位 20 岁出头的女性"}正坐在 {argument name="bed color" default="奶油色"}的床上。人物位于画面中心偏右，头部至大腿部分约占画面的 70%。左侧前景放置着一个巨大的象牙白枕头，自然地遮挡住部分手臂和躯干。

人物与表情：
肤色偏向浅象牙米色，光滑且透着淡淡的玫瑰色红润。不进行过度的磨皮处理，在脸颊、颈部、肩膀和锁骨处保留自然的皮肤纹理和柔和光泽。五官优雅精致，妆容为冷静的日式风格。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼影，细长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的浅棕色眉毛，以及半透明的粉米色唇釉。双眼静静闭合，嘴角带着极浅的微笑。下巴微微抬起，头部向左倾斜。

服装与姿态：
成熟的模特身材。身穿 {argument name="outfit color" default="香槟米色"}缎面吊带衫，肩带纤细，胸前呈深 V 领。肩上披着一件素色薄雪纺长袍，袖子和手臂处略显透明。无图案、刺绣或 Logo。上半身微微后仰，双肩自然舒展。左臂放置在枕头边，另一只手垂在膝盖附近。右腿向画面右下方延伸，衣摆处有自然的褶皱和垂坠感。

背景与光影：
左后方是带有薄米色窗帘的木框窗户，窗边摆放着插有细枝的透明花瓶和陶器。右后方是木框障子风格的隔断。背景统一为米色、木色和象牙色，营造出一个极简、无杂物的宁静卧室。主光源是来自左上方窗户的温暖晨光。柔和的高光落在脸部左侧、肩膀、锁骨、胸部和大腿上，阴影自然地投射在右下方。透过窗帘的光线形成了适度的对比，不会过于刺眼。

构图与摄影：
竖向中景人像。相机位置略高于胸部，几乎与视线平齐。相当于 85mm 镜头的自然压缩感。焦点集中在脸部和上半身，背景经过柔化处理。头顶留有少量负空间，左侧前景的大枕头营造出深度感。几缕发丝散落在脸颊和额头，向右侧柔和地散开。

质感与风格：
写实日式人像。柔和的胶片质感，低对比度，色温自然温暖。细腻地表现出缎面的平滑反光、雪纺的轻薄感，以及亚麻枕头和床品的纤维纹理。皮肤保留了自然的毛孔和细微阴影，呈现出精致的质感，没有任何塑料感。

负面提示词：
不自然的面部，不自然的身体形状，多余的手指，缺失的手指，肢体融合，关节断裂，衣物与身体接触不自然，不自然的透明度，阴影与光源不一致，过度磨皮，Logo，水印。

en.title: Minimalist Linear Skeleton Poster
en.description: A detailed prompt for clean, minimalist posters featuring skeleton typography and diffuse fluorescent accents.
en.prompt:
Organize {argument name="subject" default="any content"} into a bright and clean flat poster. The initial impression is order established by large areas of white space, thin-lined large text, and a low-position diffuse theme-colored mist. The image maintains a high-brightness background like blank paper. Main text appears in a very thin, uniform linear skeleton similar to engineering drawings, with generous spacing but significant scale jumps: a few oversized characters near edges create pillar-like visual weight, multi-language titles hang horizontally, and local theme characters are enlarged like path nodes. A fluorescent color block derived from the theme is placed in the lower-middle section, with clear, high-brightness, slightly acidic supporting colors. The center is fuller while edges dissipate with fine spray dots and vertical translucent smoke pillars. Text color uses high-saturation warm tones separated from the mist color, serving as a unified voice for titles and info; small text is grouped to leave wide breathing room. All graphics maintain digital printing flatness, with spray edges showing graininess and uneven density, avoiding heavy shadows or photo textures. The final effect is like an experimental open word field: quiet, striking, and slightly unstable.

——————

Image elements: {argument name="city" default="city"}+{argument name="date" default="2026-07-08"}+Good Morning quote+5 different information points+rhythmic composition
1 city per generation, each with different color and compositional logic
Total 10 cities, 10 images generated in sequence
Note: Each image must have a unique layout and composition.
Aspect ratio 16:9 horizontal

zh.title: 极简线性骨架海报
zh.description: 一份关于制作简洁、极简主义风格海报的详细提示词，特色在于骨架排版与弥散荧光点缀。
zh.prompt:
将 {argument name="subject" default="any content"} 整理为一张明亮、简洁的扁平化海报。整体视觉基调由大面积留白、细线条大字以及底部弥散的主题色雾气构建出秩序感。画面保持如空白纸张般的高亮度背景。主体文字采用类似工程制图的极细、均匀的线性骨架，字间距宽裕但字号跳跃显著：边缘处几个超大字符营造出柱状的视觉重量，多语言标题横向排布，局部主题字符像路径节点一样被放大。画面中下部放置一块源自主题的荧光色块，搭配清晰、高亮度且略带酸性的辅助色。中心区域内容充实，边缘则通过细微喷溅点和垂直半透明烟柱进行消散处理。文字颜色采用与雾气颜色区分开的高饱和度暖色调，作为标题和信息的统一表达；小字部分进行成组排版，留出宽裕的呼吸空间。所有图形保持数码印刷的扁平感，喷溅边缘呈现出颗粒感和不均匀的密度，避免厚重的阴影或照片质感。最终效果如同一个实验性的开放式词汇场：安静、醒目且略带不稳定性。

——————

图像元素：{argument name="city" default="city"}+{argument name="date" default="2026-07-08"}+早安引语+5 个不同的信息点+富有节奏感的构图
每次生成 1 个城市，每个城市采用不同的色彩和构图逻辑
总计 10 个城市，按顺序生成 10 张图像
注意：每张图像必须具备独特的排版和构图。
宽高比 16:9 横屏

en.title: Summer Riverbank with Red Balloon
en.description: A low-angle wide-angle prompt capturing a woman on a riverbank walkway holding a red balloon, featuring a bright summer sky and lush greenery.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Destination of the Red Balloon

Main Subject:
Vertical composition. A woman is sitting on a low stone step beside a riverside promenade in summer. The person is positioned to the right of the screen, with the full body occupying about 75%. A large red balloon floats in the upper left, with a thin white string connected to the person's right hand. The blue sky and the balloon create wide negative space, evoking a sense of summer openness.

Character and Expression:
An adult woman with natural Japanese beauty. Long dark brown hair flows in the wind, showing light movement. Translucent and elegant Japanese-style makeup. Soft skin leaning towards ivory, delicate eyelashes, and cheeks and lips with a hint of natural color. Gaze is directed toward the red balloon in the upper left, with a gentle expression and slightly parted mouth. Natural shadows fall from the neck to the collarbone, giving a mature and calm atmosphere.

Clothing and Pose:
A model-like physique that showcases beautiful body lines. Long, straight legs, a toned waist, and a silhouette with natural volume. Wearing {argument name="top" default="an ivory-colored ribbed V-neck top"} with subtle button details at the chest. {argument name="bottom" default="A light miniskirt with a pale floral pattern"} sways slightly in the wind. Holding the balloon string with the right hand, while the left hand supports the body on the stone step behind. The right leg is extended naturally, and the left leg is slightly bent to create a three-dimensional pose. Wearing thin-strap sandals.

Background and Light:
A Japanese riverside promenade in summer. To the left is a calm river surface, with a bridge and a distant cityscape visible faintly in the background. To the right, a row of large trees continues, with sunlight filtering through the leaves onto the ground. Large cumulonimbus clouds characteristic of summer float in the sky. Sunlight streams from the upper left, creating soft highlights on the cheeks, shoulders, and legs. Reflective light from the trees softens the shadows, expressing a refreshing summer air.

Composition and Camera:
Shooting with a slightly wide-angle lens from a low angle. The person's legs are prominently placed in the foreground, with the composition allowing the gaze to escape toward the back. Placing the red balloon in the upper left creates a diagonal composition with the person. Shallow depth of field softly blurs the background, highlighting the person and the balloon as the protagonists. A sophisticated balance like a magazine gravure.

Texture and Style:
Real photo style like a location shoot for a high-end fashion magazine. Skin retains its natural texture while maintaining transparency. Careful depiction of individual hair strands, clothing fibers, the rough surface of stone steps, and transmitted light through leaves. Saturation is slightly high but with soft gradations like a film photograph. Impressive color contrast between the summer blue sky and the red balloon.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with the light source, gibberish text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏日河畔与红气球
zh.description: 一个低角度广角提示词，捕捉了一位在河畔步道上拿着红气球的女性，背景是明亮的夏日天空和郁郁葱葱的绿植。
zh.prompt:
主题：
红气球的去向

主体：
竖构图。一位女性坐在夏日河畔步道旁的低矮石阶上。人物位于画面右侧，全身约占画面的 75%。左上方漂浮着一个巨大的红气球，一根细细的白线连接着人物的右手。蓝天与气球营造出广阔的留白，唤起一种夏日的开阔感。

人物与表情：
一位具有自然日系美感的成年女性。深棕色长发随风飘动，呈现出轻盈的动感。透明且优雅的日系妆容。肤色偏向象牙白，睫毛精致，脸颊和嘴唇带有自然的色彩。目光投向左上方的红气球，表情温柔，嘴唇微张。颈部到锁骨处落下自然的阴影，营造出成熟而沉稳的氛围。

服装与姿势：
模特般的身材，展现出优美的身体线条。修长的双腿、紧致的腰部，轮廓自然丰满。身穿 {argument name="top" default="一件象牙白色的罗纹 V 领上衣"}，胸前有精致的纽扣细节。{argument name="bottom" default="一条带有淡雅花卉图案的浅色短裙"} 在风中微微摆动。右手握着气球线，左手支撑在身后的石阶上。右腿自然伸展，左腿微微弯曲，形成富有立体感的姿势。脚穿细带凉鞋。

背景与光影：
夏日的日本河畔步道。左侧是平静的河面，背景中隐约可见桥梁和远处的城市景观。右侧是一排高大的树木，阳光透过叶片洒在地面上。天空中漂浮着夏日特有的巨大积雨云。阳光从左上方射入，在脸颊、肩膀和腿部形成柔和的高光。树木的反射光柔化了阴影，表现出清爽的夏日气息。

构图与摄影：
使用略带广角的镜头进行低角度拍摄。人物的双腿被突出地置于前景，构图引导视线向后延伸。将红气球置于左上方，与人物形成对角线构图。浅景深柔化了背景，突出了作为主角的人物和气球。如同杂志写真般精致的平衡感。

质感与风格：
如同高端时尚杂志外景拍摄般的真实照片风格。皮肤在保持透明感的同时保留了自然的纹理。细腻地描绘了发丝、衣物纤维、石阶粗糙的表面以及透过叶片的透射光。饱和度略高，但具有胶片摄影般的柔和渐变。夏日蓝天与红气球之间的色彩对比令人印象深刻。

负面提示词：
不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、不自然的重力、错误的透视、与光源不一致的阴影、乱码文字、Logo、水印、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Seaside Drive Fashion Portrait
en.description: A professional fashion photography prompt of a woman leaning out of a car window at a coastal driveway, capturing the sea breeze and summer light.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Unwinding in the Sea Breeze

Main Subject:
Vertical 3:4 realistic fashion photo. An adult woman leaning her upper body out of the open window of a {argument name="car color" default="dark blue"} car is positioned slightly to the right of the center. Capturing from the waist to the head, the person occupies about 60% of the frame. The moment of looking up at the bright sky while feeling the sea breeze with the whole body, hands placed on the window frame.

Character and Expression:
A youthful and natural woman. Bright and friendly features, clear eyes, soft eyebrows, and pale coral pink lips. The chin is slightly raised but maintains an angle where eyes, nose, and mouth are clearly visible, with the gaze directed toward the sky in the upper left. A natural and refreshing smile on the lips. Dark brown semi-long hair with light layers and thin bangs, with the ends swaying backward in the wind.

Clothing and Pose:
{argument name="outfit" default="A cream-colored delicate crochet knit top"}. Elegant V-neck depth, a thin ribbon in the center, long flared sleeves, and a short hem. Clearly showing a white, lustrous décolletage and collarbone, and a thin waistline. A well-defined mature feminine physique with a natural, three-dimensional chest. Bottoms are ivory high-waisted pants with a thin brown belt. Both arms extended diagonally downward, palms lightly supporting the window frame. Fingers are spread naturally, with no undue force in the shoulders or wrists.

Background and Light:
A driveway on a hill along the summer coast. In the middle ground are the blue sea, a green cape, and wooden guardrails. In the background, faint mountain ranges and the horizon. A large blue sky and thin flowing white clouds are placed widely at the top of the frame. Strong, clear midday sunlight streams from the upper right, creating translucent highlights on the forehead, cheeks, nose, neck, collarbone, shoulders, and chest. The skin is bright and white but not washed out, leaving fine texture and a natural sense of moisture. Soft shadows in the hollows of the neck and collarbone, with blue reflections of the sky and sea on the car body.

Composition and Camera:
Medium shot from the waist up. Shot from a slightly low position, with the person's face near the center of the frame and large sky space above. Using the top edge of the car door as a horizontal line at the bottom, letting the coastline recede into the distance. Equivalent to 35mm, focus on the face and upper body, with the background lightly blurred. An angle where both the features and the collarbone look beautiful without over-tilting the neck.

Texture and Style:
A bright and clean real-life photo like a summer fashion magazine. Careful depiction of natural skin luster, soft shadows around the collarbone, hair clumps, the 3D texture of crochet, and the gloss of the {argument name="car color" default="dark blue"} car body. A refreshing color palette based on blue sky, sea, ecru, and dark blue. Avoids excessive skin processing, balancing transparency with realistic skin quality.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, unnatural body shape, extra fingers, missing fingers, broken wrists or joints, fusion of clothing and body, distorted background perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 海滨公路时尚人像
zh.description: 这是一组专业的时尚摄影提示词，描绘了一位女性从海滨公路上的车窗探出身子，捕捉海风与夏日阳光的瞬间。
zh.prompt:
主题：
沉浸在海风中

主体：
3:4 竖构图的写实时尚摄影。一位成年女性上半身探出 {argument name="car color" default="深蓝色"} 轿车的敞开车窗，位置略微偏向画面右侧。取景范围从腰部到头部，人物占据画面约 60%。捕捉她抬头望向明亮天空、全身感受海风的瞬间，双手轻搭在车窗边框上。

人物与表情：
年轻且自然。五官明亮亲切，眼神清澈，眉形柔和，嘴唇呈淡珊瑚粉色。下巴微微抬起，但保持在能清晰看到眼睛、鼻子和嘴巴的角度，视线投向左上方的天空。嘴角带着自然清新的微笑。深棕色中长发，带有轻盈的层次感和薄刘海，发梢随风向后飘动。

服装与姿态：
{argument name="outfit" default="米色精致钩针编织上衣"}。优雅的 V 领深度，中间系有细丝带，喇叭长袖，短款下摆。清晰展现出白皙且富有光泽的颈部、锁骨以及纤细的腰线。展现出轮廓分明的成熟女性体态，胸部线条自然且立体。下身穿着象牙白高腰裤，配有棕色细腰带。双臂斜向下伸展，手掌轻扶车窗边框。手指自然张开，肩膀和手腕处没有多余的用力。

背景与光影：
夏季海岸边山丘上的公路。中景为蓝色的大海、绿色的海角和木质护栏。背景是隐约的山脉和地平线。广阔的蓝天和轻盈流动的白云占据了画面的上方。强劲、清澈的正午阳光从右上角射入，在额头、脸颊、鼻子、颈部、锁骨、肩膀和胸部形成半透明的高光。皮肤明亮白皙但不过曝，保留了细腻的纹理和自然的润泽感。颈部和锁骨凹陷处有柔和的阴影，车身上映照着天空和大海的蓝色反光。

构图与摄影：
腰部以上的半身照。采用略微仰拍的角度，人物脸部靠近画面中心，上方留有广阔的天空空间。以车门上缘作为底部的水平线，让海岸线向远处延伸。等效 35mm 焦段，焦点对准脸部和上半身，背景轻微虚化。拍摄角度既能展现五官和锁骨的美感，又不会让颈部过度倾斜。

质感与风格：
如同夏季时尚杂志般明亮清爽的实拍照片。细腻刻画自然的皮肤光泽、锁骨周围的柔和阴影、发束质感、钩针编织的立体纹理以及 {argument name="car color" default="深蓝色"} 车身的光泽。以蓝天、大海、米色和深蓝色为基调的清爽配色。避免过度的皮肤处理，在通透感与真实的皮肤质感之间取得平衡。

负面提示词：
不自然的脸部，不自然的视线，不自然的体型，多余的手指，缺失的手指，断裂的手腕或关节，衣服与身体融合，背景透视畸变，阴影与光源不一致，文字，Logo，水印。

en.title: Low Angle Summer Balloon Portrait
en.description: A dramatic low-angle prompt of a woman in white holding a red balloon in a quiet residential area, emphasizing perspective and the summer sky.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Summer Sky with a Red Balloon

Main Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="A natural 20-year-old woman"} standing in a quiet residential area in midsummer. The person is positioned largely to the center-right of the frame, with a vibrant red balloon about the size of the person's upper body in the upper left. The person lightly holds a thin white balloon string in her right hand, standing with one leg slightly forward.

Character and Expression:
Youthful, clean, and natural features. Black hair extending below the shoulders flows to the left in the wind, with thin strands falling on the cheeks and forehead. Light natural makeup, calm eyebrows, and translucent skin. The face is turned slightly toward the upper left, with the gaze fixed on the distant sky. Mouth closed, with a quiet and somewhat dignified expression.

Clothing and Pose:
A white sleeveless summer top and a light pleated white miniskirt. Minimal decoration, avoiding extra ribbons or hanging strings. Naturally wearing white safety inner pants under the skirt. White thick socks and white canvas sneakers. The right arm is extended naturally by the side, holding the balloon string. The left arm is lowered loosely. Weight is on the back leg, with the front shoe prominently in the foreground.

Background and Light:
A deep blue clear sky, with the outer wall of an old house on the right, a black fence, a gray cinder block wall, and green garden trees. In the back left, a narrow residential street with utility poles and wires continues into the distance with perspective. No text, signs, or place names. Sunlight streams strongly from the upper left, brightly illuminating the face, shoulders, and the front of the legs. Natural shadows fall on the right side of the body and the lower part of the wall, with soft highlights on the red balloon.

Composition and Camera:
Vertical 3:4. A full-body photo looking up from an ultra-low angle near the ground. The white sneaker in the foreground is captured prominently, creating strong perspective from the legs up to the upper body. The person occupies about 80% of the frame height, and the red balloon occupies about one-third of the upper left. Equivalent to 24mm wide-angle, camera positioned slightly to the front-left of the person. The residential street in the background converges narrowly into the distance, with focus on the face and the balloon.

Texture and Style:
Realistic summer fashion photo. Natural tones with high saturation featuring clear blue sky, vivid red, and clean white. Harsh midsummer sunlight, sharp shadows, and slightly film-like grain. Skin maintains natural texture without excessive smoothing. Refreshing and open atmosphere of a Japanese summer.

Negative:
Faces that look like minors, unnatural childishness, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor contact with the balloon string, floating, unnatural gravity, shadows inconsistent with the light source, excessive leg deformation, text, logos, watermarks, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏季低角度气球人像
zh.description: 一张极具张力的低角度摄影提示词，描绘了一位身着白衣的女性在宁静住宅区手持红色气球的画面，强调透视感与夏季天空的氛围。
zh.prompt:
主题：
红气球与夏季天空

主体：
{argument name="subject" default="一位自然的 20 岁女性"} 站在盛夏宁静的住宅区。人物位于画面中右侧，左上方有一个约人上半身大小的鲜红色气球。人物右手轻握细细的白色气球线，单腿微向前站立。

人物与表情：
年轻、清爽且自然的五官。过肩黑发随风向左飘动，几缕发丝落在脸颊和额头。清透的自然妆容，眉目平和，皮肤质感通透。面部微微转向左上方，目光注视着远方的天空。嘴唇微闭，表情安静而略带庄重。

服装与姿势：
白色无袖夏季上衣和浅色百褶白短裙。装饰简约，避免多余的丝带或挂绳。裙下自然穿着白色安全裤。白色厚袜和白色帆布鞋。右臂自然垂在身侧，手持气球线。左臂自然下垂。重心落在后腿，前方的鞋子在前景中尤为突出。

背景与光影：
深蓝色的晴空，右侧是旧房子的外墙、黑色栅栏、灰色水泥砖墙和绿色庭院树木。左后方是一条带有电线杆和电线的狭窄住宅街道，向远方延伸，具有透视感。无文字、标志或地名。阳光从左上方强烈照射，明亮地照亮了面部、肩膀和腿部前方。身体右侧和墙壁下部投下自然阴影，红气球上有柔和的高光。

构图与摄影：
3:4 竖构图。从地面附近的超低角度仰拍全身照。前景中的白色运动鞋被突出捕捉，从腿部到上半身形成了强烈的透视感。人物占据了约 80% 的画面高度，红气球占据左上方约三分之一。等效 24mm 广角，相机位于人物左前方。背景中的住宅街道向远处收窄，焦点对准面部和气球。

质感与风格：
写实的夏季时尚摄影。自然色调，高饱和度，呈现清澈的蓝天、鲜艳的红色和纯净的白色。强烈的盛夏阳光，锐利的阴影，带有轻微的胶片颗粒感。皮肤保持自然纹理，未过度磨皮。呈现出日本夏季清爽、开阔的氛围。

负面提示词：
看起来像未成年人的脸、不自然的稚气、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、与气球线接触不良、漂浮、不自然的重力、与光源不一致的阴影、腿部过度变形、文字、标志、水印、塑料质感的皮肤。

en.title: Night Bedroom Lamp Portrait
en.description: A cozy and realistic prompt for a night-time bedroom portrait of a woman lying on a white bed, illuminated by a warm bedside lamp.
en.prompt:
Subject:
A Night with Remaining Light

Main Subject:
A woman lying comfortably on a white bed in a bedroom at night. The upper body is placed largely to the center-left, with the face and chest occupying the center of the frame. A window and a bedside lamp are included in the back right to balance the close-up feel with night-time depth.

Character and Expression:
A natural and realistic, well-featured woman. Dark brown hair is tied loosely in a low position, leaving thin bangs and stray hairs along the cheeks. The face is slightly turned to the right of the screen, with only the gaze returned to the camera. Eyelids are relaxed, and the expression is calm with lips lightly closed. {argument name="makeup" default="Elegant Japanese-style makeup with pink-beige lips, pale rose blush, thin delicate lashes, and subtle eye bags"}.

Clothing and Pose:
{argument name="outfit" default="A light greige ribbed camisole"}. Thin ivory lace at the chest, creating a soft silhouette that follows the body naturally. Draped over is a thin ecru room cardigan, with one side naturally falling off the shoulder. Her own right arm is bent overhead, with fingertips lightly touching her hair. The left arm is along the side of the body, hidden by the duvet. Leaning back on a pillow with a relaxed posture and a slight twist at the waist. Fine wrinkles following gravity are included on the clothes and bedding.

Background and Light:
A calm Japanese apartment bedroom. Foreground is a softly crumpled white duvet, middle ground is the person and pillow, and the back right features a small wooden nightstand and a warm lamp. Outside the window in the back left, blurred streetlights or apartment window lights appear as small bokeh. The primary light is a warm bulb color from the bedside lamp in the back right. Soft highlights fall on the cheeks, shoulders, collarbone, and upper arms, while a weak blue-gray night light from the window wraps the other side. Shadows are soft, falling naturally on the left side of the person and the wrinkles of the bedding.

Composition and Camera:
Vertical 4:5. A close-up upper-body portrait shot from the side of the bed. The face is toward the upper left, chest in the center, and the lamp in the back right. A small amount of negative space is left above the head and on the right, with the bottom naturally cropped by the duvet. Camera position is slightly higher than the chest, a light high-angle. Equivalent to 50mm, shallow aperture. Focus on the eyes and face, with background city lights and the lamp softly blurred.

Texture and Style:
Realistic indoor portrait photo. Skin is smooth but retains pores and fine texture, avoiding excessive smoothing. Careful depiction of the feel of the ribbed material, thin cardigan, and cotton bedding. Night-time color tones with warm and blue-gray hues quietly mixing. Low contrast, delicate grain, and a calm finish like a nightwear feature in a magazine.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural breast shape, asymmetrical eyes, extra fingers, missing fingers, bent arms, broken shoulders or joints, fusion of clothing and body, poor contact with bedding, floating, unnatural gravity, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin smoothing.

zh.title: 夜间卧室灯光人像
zh.description: 一个温馨且写实的提示词，用于创作一张夜间卧室人像，描绘一位躺在白色床铺上的女性，由温暖的床头灯照亮。
zh.prompt:
主题：
余晖之夜

主体：
一位女性舒适地躺在夜间卧室的白色床铺上。上半身主要位于画面中左侧，面部和胸部占据画面中心。右后方包含一扇窗户和一盏床头灯，以平衡特写镜头与夜间的深度感。

人物与表情：
一位自然、写实、五官端正的女性。深棕色头发在低处松散地扎起，留有稀疏的刘海和脸颊旁的碎发。面部略微转向屏幕右侧，仅视线回望镜头。眼睑放松，表情平静，双唇轻闭。{argument name="makeup" default="优雅的日系妆容，搭配粉米色嘴唇、淡玫瑰色腮红、纤细精致的睫毛和淡淡的卧蚕"}。

服装与姿势：
{argument name="outfit" default="一件浅灰米色罗纹吊带背心"}。胸前饰有薄薄的象牙色蕾丝，营造出顺应身体曲线的柔和轮廓。外披一件薄薄的米色家居开衫，一侧自然从肩头滑落。她的一只右手弯曲在头顶，指尖轻轻触碰头发。左臂顺着身体一侧，被被子遮住。靠在枕头上，姿势放松，腰部有轻微的扭转。衣服和床上用品上包含顺应重力的细微褶皱。

背景与光影：
宁静的日式公寓卧室。前景是微微褶皱的白色被子，中景是人物和枕头，右后方设有一个小型木制床头柜和一盏暖色调台灯。左后方的窗外，模糊的街灯或公寓窗户灯光呈现为细小的光斑。主光源是来自右后方床头灯的暖色灯光。柔和的高光落在脸颊、肩膀、锁骨和上臂上，而来自窗户的微弱蓝灰色夜光则包裹着另一侧。阴影柔和，自然地落在人物左侧及床上用品的褶皱处。

构图与摄影：
竖构图 4:5。从床侧拍摄的半身特写人像。面部朝向左上方，胸部居中，台灯位于右后方。头部上方和右侧留有少量留白，底部由被子自然裁切。相机位置略高于胸部，为轻微的高角度拍摄。等效 50mm 镜头，浅景深。焦点对准眼睛和面部，背景的城市灯光和台灯呈现柔和的虚化效果。

质感与风格：
写实室内人像摄影。皮肤光滑但保留了毛孔和细腻纹理，避免过度磨皮。细致描绘了罗纹面料、薄开衫和棉质床上用品的质感。夜间色调，暖色与蓝灰色调静谧融合。低对比度，细腻的颗粒感，呈现出如杂志睡衣专题般平静的质感。

负面提示词：
面部不自然、胸部形状不自然、双眼不对称、多指、缺指、手臂弯曲、肩膀或关节畸形、衣服与身体融合、与床上用品接触不自然、漂浮、重力不自然、阴影与光源不一致、过度磨皮。

en.title: Candid Japanese Selfie in a Traditional Room
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for a realistic smartphone-style selfie featuring a woman in a crimson bikini within a traditional Japanese washitsu room, capturing a surprised and candid expression.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="a moment too close"}

Main Figure:
A vertical 4:5 photograph. Depict a single woman in her {argument name="age" default="20s"} taking a selfie on a {argument name="location" default="bed in a traditional Japanese room"}. The subject is large in the frame, slightly to the right of center, occupying about 85% from the top of the head to the waist. Her right arm extends toward the camera, with the forearm entering prominently from the bottom left. The smartphone itself is out of frame, but the arm angle and gaze make it clear it is a selfie.

Person and Expression:
Fair ivory-beige skin with a natural texture and slight rose-toned complexion. Small highlights on the cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, and collarbone, with visible pores and fine skin texture. Elegant doll-like makeup: soft rose-pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long thin eyelashes, natural tear bags, soft light brown eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige gloss. No glasses. Clear brown eyes with small catchlights. Head tilted slightly to her left, looking straight into the lens. Natural expression with slightly wide eyes and parted lips, mixing surprise and bewilderment.

Clothing and Pose:
A deep crimson red halter-neck bikini. The top features thin straps combined with small gold rings, and the bottom has side ribbons. Smooth, low-sheen fabric with slight tension and natural wrinkles. The upper body is brought close to the camera, shoulders slightly inward, with her left hand resting lightly on the bed to support her weight. Waist and one leg remain on the bed, conveying a forward shift in center of gravity. Natural expression of the connection between the extended arm and shoulder, the tension of the chest fabric, and the force on the straps.

Background and Lighting:
A quiet traditional Japanese room with wooden sliding doors (shoji), calm earthen walls, and low wooden furniture. A black ceramic vase with light red flowering branches is in the back left, and a warm-colored paper lantern (andon) in the back right. No text or logos in the background. Soft orange light from the back right lantern creates a warm rim light on the hair, right shoulder, and cheek outline. Weak white fill light from the front left naturally brings out details in the eyes and skin. Shadows fall softly toward the bottom left, with subtle reflections on the wood.

Composition and Camera:
A close-up selfie as if taken with a smartphone's front camera. Slightly downward angle from a position a bit higher than eye level. Wide-angle feel but with weak distortion, making only the extended arm appear slightly larger. Sharpest focus on the face, with eyes, eyelashes, lips, and bangs clear. Gradually softens from shoulders to waist, with the background blurred by a shallow depth of field. Narrow margin above the head, sides naturally cut by shoulders and arms, and the bottom cropped near the upper thighs.

Texture and Style:
Live-action portrait. Milk tea ash-brown hair with thin see-through bangs, face-framing layers, and medium-long length below the shoulders. Ends are loosely curled inward, with depictions of individual strands, fine highlights, soft sheen, and natural stray hairs. Warm-toned color palette reminiscent of soft Fujifilm-style film photography, with moderate contrast, fine grain, and natural skin tones. Not excessively sharp, retaining the warmth and daily-life feel of a close-range shot.

Negative:
Glasses, unnatural face, excessively large eyes, mismatched pupils, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused arms, broken joints, unnatural chest, poor clothing contact, floating straps, extreme facial distortion due to wide angle, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-looking skin, garbled text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 传统日式房间内的随性自拍
zh.description: 这是一份高度详细的提示词，用于生成一张写实的智能手机风格自拍。画面中，一名身穿深红色比基尼的女性位于传统的日式和室中，捕捉到了她惊讶而随性的表情。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="近距离瞬间"}

主要人物：
一张 4:5 的竖版照片。描绘一名 {argument name="age" default="20 多岁"} 的女性，在 {argument name="location" default="日式传统房间的床上"} 进行自拍。主体在画面中占比很大，略微偏向中心右侧，从头顶到腰部占据了约 85% 的空间。她的右臂向相机伸出，前臂从左下方显著地进入画面。虽然智能手机本身不在画面内，但手臂的角度和视线清晰地表明这是一张自拍。

人物与表情：
白皙的象牙米色皮肤，具有自然的质感和淡淡的玫瑰色调。脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和锁骨处有细微的高光，可见毛孔和细腻的皮肤纹理。优雅的娃娃妆容：柔和的玫瑰粉色腮红、香槟米色和粉棕色眼影、细长的睫毛、自然的卧蚕、柔和的浅棕色眉毛以及透亮的粉米色唇彩。未佩戴眼镜。清澈的棕色眼睛，带有细小的眼神光。头部微微向左倾斜，直视镜头。表情自然，双眼微睁，嘴唇微张，混合着惊讶与困惑的神情。

服装与姿势：
深绯红色的挂脖比基尼。上衣采用细肩带搭配小金环设计，下装带有侧边系带。面料光滑、低光泽，带有轻微的张力和自然的褶皱。上半身靠近相机，肩膀微微内收，左手轻轻撑在床上以支撑身体重量。腰部和一条腿留在床上，传达出重心前移的感觉。自然表现出伸展的手臂与肩膀的连接处、胸部面料的张力以及肩带上的受力感。

背景与光影：
安静的日式传统房间，配有木制推拉门（障子）、沉稳的土墙和低矮的木制家具。左后方摆放着一个黑色陶瓷花瓶，插有淡红色的花枝，右后方有一个暖色调的纸灯笼（行灯）。背景中没有文字或标志。右后方灯笼发出的柔和橙色光线在头发、右肩和脸颊轮廓上形成了温暖的轮廓光。左前方微弱的补光自然地突显了眼睛和皮肤的细节。阴影柔和地投向左下方，木质表面有细微的反射。

构图与摄影：
如同使用智能手机前置摄像头拍摄的特写自拍。从略高于视线的位置向下俯拍。具有广角感但畸变较弱，仅使伸出的手臂看起来稍大。焦点最清晰处在面部，眼睛、睫毛、嘴唇和刘海清晰可见。从肩膀到腰部逐渐柔化，背景因浅景深而模糊。头顶留白较少，两侧自然地被肩膀和手臂截断，底部裁剪在大腿上方附近。

质感与风格：
真人肖像。奶茶灰棕色头发，带有轻薄的空气刘海、修饰脸型的层次感剪裁，长度及肩以下。发尾向内微卷，描绘出单根发丝、细腻的高光、柔和的光泽和自然的碎发。暖色调的配色方案让人联想到柔和的富士胶片风格摄影，具有适度的对比度、细腻的颗粒感和自然的肤色。不过度锐化，保留了近距离拍摄的温暖感和生活气息。

负面提示词：
眼镜、不自然的脸部、过大的眼睛、瞳孔不匹配、多余的手指、缺失的手指、手臂融合、关节断裂、不自然的胸部、服装贴合度差、漂浮的肩带、广角导致的极端面部畸变、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、过度磨皮、塑料质感的皮肤、乱码文字、标志、水印。

en.title: Night Parking Lot Fashion Portrait
en.description: A sophisticated night photography prompt featuring a woman sitting on a yellow guardrail in a parking garage, emphasizing film-like lighting and textures.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="the night remaining in the fingertips"}

Main Figure:
A vertical 4:5 photograph. In a multi-story parking garage at night, a young woman is sitting on a {argument name="prop" default="yellow and black guardrail"} on the right side of the screen. The figure is full-body size, occupying the center-right of the screen, leaving a dark parking space and wide margin on the left.

Person and Expression:
Fair ivory-beige skin with a subtle rosy complexion. Smooth skin retaining natural texture. Light rose-pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long thin lashes, natural tear bags, soft brown eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige lips. Small, clear catchlights in the eyes. Her face is turned slightly to the left while her gaze returns to the camera, showing a quiet and calm expression.

Clothing and Pose:
{argument name="outfit" default="A light ivory-pink sheer blouse"} with fine vertical lines and a soft luster, featuring a small black ribbon at the collar. Charcoal gray high-waisted shorts, bare feet, and black enamel platform pumps. Her legs are stretched long and diagonally toward the bottom left. Her right arm hangs naturally to the side/back with a slight elbow bend. Her palm rests face down on the yellow rail, fingers aligned and slightly curved to touch the surface without gripping tightly, supporting her weight lightly. The other hand is hidden.

Background and Light:
A multi-story parking garage at night. Foreground features black asphalt and white parking lines; mid-ground includes the yellow and black guardrail and a concrete pillar with warning stripes on the right. Background shows beams, pillars, empty stalls, blurred streetlights, and city lights. Warm lighting from the upper left gently illuminates the face, hair, shoulders, arms, and leg outlines. Faint cool-toned external light in the back right adds depth. Shadows fall softly to the bottom left.

Composition and Camera:
Vertical 4:5 full-body portrait. Head is near the top center, shoes near the bottom left. The rightmost pillar acts as a vertical frame, and the curve of the guardrail leads the eye to the waist and hand. Camera is at a near-eye level, slightly lower than the waist. Equivalent to 85mm with shallow depth of field. Sharp focus on the face and hands, with the background smoothly blurred.

Texture and Style:
Elegant Japanese-style fashion portrait. Carefully depicts natural skin, fine hair strands, the sheer texture of the blouse, the gloss of the pumps, and the scratches and paint texture on the metal pipe. Calm color palette based on warm tones and charcoal gray. Delicate film grain, low saturation, and soft contrast.

Negative:
Unnatural hands, unnatural fingers, extra fingers, missing fingers, wrist failure, tightly gripped hands, poor contact between hand and rail, fused limbs, unnatural legs, broken joints, floating, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin smoothing, plastic skin.

zh.title: 夜间停车场时尚人像
zh.description: 一个精致的夜间摄影提示词，描绘了一位坐在停车场黄色护栏上的女性，强调胶片质感的灯光与纹理。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="指尖残留的夜色"}

主要人物：
一张 4:5 的竖构图照片。在夜间的立体停车场中，一位年轻女性坐在画面右侧的 {argument name="prop" default="黄黑相间的护栏"} 上。人物为全身像，位于画面中右侧，左侧留出黑暗的停车位和宽阔的留白。

人物与表情：
白皙的象牙米色皮肤，透着淡淡的红润。平滑的皮肤保留了自然的纹理。浅玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼影，纤长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的棕色眉毛，以及清透的粉米色嘴唇。眼中带有清晰的小光点。她的脸微微转向左侧，目光回视镜头，表情安静而从容。

服装与姿势：
{argument name="outfit" default="一件浅象牙粉色透视衬衫"}，带有细密的竖条纹和柔和的光泽，领口处饰有黑色小丝带。深炭灰色高腰短裤，赤脚，穿着黑色漆皮厚底高跟鞋。双腿向左下方延伸，显得修长。右臂自然垂向侧后方，手肘微屈。手掌向下平放在黄色护栏上，手指并拢微曲，轻轻触碰表面而非紧握，以此轻盈地支撑身体。另一只手隐藏在身后。

背景与光影：
夜间的立体停车场。前景是黑色沥青地面和白色停车线；中景包括黄黑相间的护栏和右侧带有警示条纹的混凝土柱。背景可见横梁、立柱、空置的车位、模糊的路灯和城市灯光。来自左上方的暖光柔和地照亮了脸部、头发、肩膀、手臂和腿部轮廓。右后方微弱的冷色调环境光增加了空间深度。阴影柔和地投向左下方。

构图与摄影：
