4:5 竖构图全身人像。头部位于顶部中央附近，鞋子位于左下角附近。最右侧的立柱充当垂直框架，护栏的曲线将视线引导至腰部和手部。相机位于接近视平线的高度，略低于腰部。相当于 85mm 镜头，具有浅景深效果。焦点清晰地落在脸部和手上，背景呈现平滑的虚化。

质感与风格：
优雅的日系时尚人像。细腻地描绘了自然的皮肤、细碎的发丝、衬衫的透视感、高跟鞋的光泽，以及金属管道上的划痕和漆面纹理。以暖色调和炭灰色为基调的沉稳配色。细腻的胶片颗粒感，低饱和度，柔和的对比度。

负面提示词：
不自然的手，不自然的手指，多余的手指，缺失的手指，手腕畸形，紧握的手，手与护栏接触不良，肢体融合，不自然的腿，关节断裂，悬浮，透视错误，阴影与光线不一致，乱码，Logo，水印，过度磨皮，塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Woman in Blue Dress in a Summer Meadow
en.description: A gpt-image-2 prompt creating a realistic photo of a woman in a vivid blue long dress spinning in a summer meadow under a clear sky.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="blue unfolding"}

Main Figure:
A vertical 4:5 realistic photograph. A single woman standing on a {argument name="location" default="summer plateau"} is positioned slightly to the right of center, showing her from full-body to below the knees. The thin pleated fabric of a {argument name="outfit" default="vivid blue long dress"} creates a large circle to the left and right due to the momentum of a spin, spreading to envelop the lower half of the screen.

Person and Expression:
A natural and realistic Japanese woman. Translucent skin, soft brown hair (almost black) tied in a low, loose bun with fine stray hairs fluttering around her face. Looking to the left in profile, with her gaze lowered toward the distant sky. Expression is quiet and cool, with her mouth in a natural, relaxed shape.

Clothing and Pose:
A summer sleeveless blue dress. The back is deeply open, with thin ribbons tied at the neck and back. The waist is lightly cinched, and fine pleats radiate from the hips. Her left arm is loosely extended to the left, and her right arm flows to the back right. Fingertips are lightly open, a natural distance where they almost touch the edge of the fabric. Her body is mid-turn, showing her back, with weight on one foot.

Background and Light:
A bright summer meadow. Foreground features green and pale gold grass swaying in the wind; mid-ground has gentle hills; background shows low mountain ranges and the presence of a small town. The sky is a clear blue with a few white cumulonimbus clouds. The sun shines somewhat strongly from the upper left, creating bright highlights on the shoulders, arms, cheeks, and the ridges of the dress pleats. Shadows fall to the bottom right, with soft reflections from the meadow on the blue fabric.

Composition and Camera:
A low-angle-like perspective, looking slightly up at the person. Leaves a large expanse of clear blue sky at the top, making the circular movement of the dress the protagonist in the center. Focus is on the face and the ribbon area on the back, with the foreground grass and distant mountains softly blurred by a shallow depth of field. Equivalent to 85mm, natural compression, clear shot feeling the summer sunlight.

Texture and Style:
Realistic photo as if taken with a professional camera. The thin blue fabric is semi-transparent, showing fine pleat lines, light and dark shades where it overlaps, and lightness containing the wind. Skin is not over-corrected, leaving natural texture. Colors leverage the contrast of blue sky, blue dress, green meadow, and white clouds for a refreshing and clean summer photographic expression.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor contact between cloth and hand, floating, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin correction, plastic skin.

zh.title: 夏日草地中身着蓝色连衣裙的女子
zh.description: 一个 gpt-image-2 提示词，用于生成一张写实照片，展现一名身着鲜艳蓝色长裙的女子在晴空下的夏日草地中旋转。
zh.prompt:
主题：
{argument name="subject" default="蓝色绽放"}

主体人物：
一张 4:5 的竖构图写实照片。一名女子站在 {argument name="location" default="夏日高原"} 上，位置略微偏右，画面呈现其全身至膝盖以下的姿态。{argument name="outfit" default="鲜艳蓝色长裙"} 的轻薄褶皱面料因旋转的惯性向左右两侧撑开，形成一个巨大的圆弧，铺展并覆盖了屏幕的下半部分。

人物与表情：
一位自然写实的日本女性。皮肤通透，深棕色（近乎黑色）的头发扎成一个低垂松散的发髻，几缕细碎的发丝在脸颊旁飘动。侧身向左，目光低垂望向远方的天空。表情安静而清冷，嘴唇呈现出自然放松的状态。

服装与姿态：
一件夏日无袖蓝色连衣裙。背部大面积露背，颈部和背部系有细丝带。腰部轻微收紧，细密的褶皱从臀部放射状散开。左臂向左侧自然舒展，右臂向右后方延伸。指尖轻微张开，与裙摆边缘保持着自然的距离。身体处于旋转过程中，背对镜头，重心落在单脚上。

背景与光影：
明亮的夏日草地。前景是随风摇曳的绿色与浅金色草丛；中景是平缓的山丘；背景可见低矮的山脉和一座小镇。天空是清澈的蓝色，点缀着几朵白色的积雨云。阳光从左上方强烈照射，在肩膀、手臂、脸颊以及裙褶的隆起处形成了明亮的高光。阴影投射在右下方，草地的柔和反光映衬在蓝色面料上。

构图与摄影：
类似低角度的视角，略微仰视人物。顶部留出大面积的清澈蓝天，使裙摆的圆周运动成为画面中心的焦点。焦点对准面部和背部的丝带区域，前景的草地和远处的山脉通过浅景深效果进行柔化虚化。相当于 85mm 镜头，具有自然的压缩感，画面清晰，能感受到夏日的阳光。

质感与风格：
如同专业相机拍摄的写实照片。轻薄的蓝色面料呈现出半透明感，展现出细腻的褶皱线条、重叠处的明暗色调，以及随风飘动的轻盈感。皮肤未经过度修饰，保留了自然的纹理。色彩利用蓝天、蓝裙、绿草地和白云的对比，营造出清新纯净的夏日摄影表现力。

负面提示词：
不自然的面部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、布料与手部接触不良、漂浮、不自然的重力、透视错误、阴影与光线不一致、乱码文字、Logo、水印、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Seaside Terrace Summer Fashion Portrait
en.description: A comprehensive prompt for creating a realistic fashion-style photograph of a woman on a seaside terrace with natural summer light and coastal backgrounds.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="fingertips reaching for the sea"}

Main Subject:
A single adult woman with a mature model-like physique stands slightly to the right of the center on a {argument name="background style" default="seaside terrace on a hill overlooking the summer sea"}. The figure occupies about 60% of the screen in full-body view, supporting herself on one leg while lightly kicking the other back and stretching both arms diagonally towards the top right.

Character/Expression:
An adult woman with a natural and sophisticated atmosphere. Long dark brown hair in loose waves flows backward in the sea breeze. Thin bangs with fine strands around the face. Face tilted slightly toward the top right, gaze fixed on the tips of her reaching fingers. Mouth slightly open with a calm, expansive expression. Bright ivory-beige skin with natural color and texture. Makeup includes rose-beige blush, delicate lashes, soft brown eyebrows, and translucent pink-beige lips.

Clothing/Pose:
{argument name="outfit" default="Light white summer set"}. The top is a thin-strapped V-neck crop top with subtle gathers and lace transitions at the bust and hem. The back is tied with a thin ribbon. The bottom is a high-waisted short tiered mini-skirt made of thin cotton. It spreads naturally to the left in the wind, with soft ruffles at the hem. Standing on her right leg, lifting the left leg behind with a bent knee. Arms extend smoothly forward from the shoulders, wrists slightly flexed, and fingertips relaxed and open. Footwear consists of delicate ivory strap sandals.

Background/Lighting:
A vibrant turquoise blue sea and a large arching coastline stretch below, with green hills, white buildings, and small seaside townscapes in the distance. The ground is a safe stone-paved observation terrace. A low white wall and wooden railing create a boundary with the sea, with a few tropical plants at the edge of the foreground. Clear weather around noon in summer. Strong natural light from the top left illuminates the front of the face, shoulders, arms, and legs. Shadows fall to the bottom right, with faint reflections from white walls and floor. Sparkling light on the sea surface.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical 4:5 aspect ratio. Full-body portrait with the person slightly right of center, leaving wide blue sky above. Sufficient margin at the bottom, with the raised leg creating horizontal movement to the left. Camera position is slightly below waist height at a slight low angle. Natural compression of a medium telephoto lens, keeping the person sharp and softly blurring the distant coastline. Focus on eyes and face, shallow depth of field but coastal shape remains recognizable.

Texture/Style:
Bright, translucent, realistic summer fashion photography. Carefully expresses the thinness of white fabric, fine wrinkles, hem movement in the wind, individual hair strands, and natural skin texture. Blue sky, sea, and white clothing provide color contrast; fresh saturation without being overly flashy. Clean and airy, like a resort feature in a magazine.

Negative:
Looking like a minor, unnatural physique, exaggerated chest, unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, mismatched leg lengths, shadows inconsistent with light source, gibberish text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 海滨露台夏季时尚人像
zh.description: 一份全面的提示词，用于创作一张写实风格的时尚摄影作品，展现一位女性在海滨露台上的姿态，并融合自然夏季光影与海岸背景。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="指尖触向大海"}

主要拍摄对象：
一位拥有成熟模特身材的成年女性，站在 {argument name="background style" default="俯瞰夏季大海的山顶海滨露台"} 上，位置略偏向画面右侧。人物全身照约占画面 60%，单腿支撑，另一条腿轻微向后抬起，双臂向右上角斜向伸展。

人物/表情：
一位气质自然且干练的成年女性。深棕色长发呈自然波浪状，在海风中向后飘动。轻薄的刘海，脸颊两侧有细碎的发丝。面部微微转向右上角，视线聚焦在伸展的指尖上。嘴唇微张，表情平静而开阔。明亮的象牙米色皮肤，带有自然的色泽与质感。妆容包括玫瑰米色腮红、精致的睫毛、柔和的棕色眉毛以及半透明的粉米色唇妆。

服装/姿势：
{argument name="outfit" default="浅白色夏季套装"}。上衣为细肩带 V 领露脐装，胸部和下摆处有细微的褶皱与蕾丝过渡。背部系有细丝带。下装为薄棉材质的高腰层叠迷你短裙。裙摆在风中自然向左飘动，下摆带有柔和的荷叶边。以右腿站立，左腿屈膝向后抬起。双臂从肩部平滑伸展，手腕微屈，指尖放松张开。脚穿精致的象牙色绑带凉鞋。

背景/光影：
下方是充满活力的绿松石色大海和蜿蜒的海岸线，远处可见青山、白色建筑和小型海滨城镇景观。地面为安全的石砌观景露台。低矮的白墙和木质栏杆构成了与大海的边界，前景边缘点缀着几株热带植物。夏季正午，天气晴朗。来自左上方的强烈自然光照亮了面部正面、肩膀、手臂和腿部。阴影落在右下方，带有白墙和地面的微弱反射。海面波光粼粼。

构图/摄影：
垂直 4:5 画幅。全身人像，人物位于中心偏右，上方留出大面积蓝天。底部留有充足空间，抬起的腿部营造出向左的横向动感。相机位置略低于腰部，采用轻微的低角度拍摄。中长焦镜头带来的自然压缩感，使人物清晰锐利，同时将远处的海岸线虚化。焦点对准眼睛和面部，景深较浅，但海岸轮廓依然清晰可辨。

质感/风格：
明亮、通透、写实的夏季时尚摄影。细腻地表现出白色面料的轻薄感、细微褶皱、随风飘动的裙摆、单根发丝以及自然的皮肤纹理。蓝天、大海与白色服装形成色彩对比；饱和度清新，不显浮夸。画面干净通透，如同杂志中的度假专题。

负面提示词：
看起来像未成年人、不自然的体型、夸张的胸部、不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、多指、缺指、肢体融合、关节断裂、双腿长度不一、阴影与光源不一致、乱码文字、Logo、水印、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Japanese Seaside Fashion Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed professional photography prompt for a fashion portrait of a Japanese woman standing by the sea, specifying attire, lighting, and camera settings.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="subject" default="A profile draped in blue"}

Main Subject:
A single adult woman standing at a sunny seaside. A vertical 2:3 fashion portrait with the person positioned slightly left of center, capturing them from the chest to the top of the head. Wearing a vibrant blue outer garment dropped low from both shoulders, creating an impressive contrast between the {argument name="clothing" default="white V-neck garment"} and the blue sea.

Person & Expression:
A natural Japanese woman with a calm, adult atmosphere. A dark brown blunt bob, almost black, showing a clean neckline. The sea breeze lightly blows the bangs and hair ends to the right. The head is tilted slightly forward, with the face in a diagonal profile facing right. Gaze is cast diagonally downward, with a quiet and relaxed expression and lips slightly parted. Transparent light beige skin, coral-tone lips, delicate eyeliner, and natural eyelashes.

Clothing & Pose:
An ivory white V-neck dress with thin shoulder straps. The neckline is deep but elegant, with a soft ribbed lightweight fabric naturally following the curves of a mature body. A vibrant cobalt blue light jacket is lowered to above the elbows, broadly revealing both shoulders and collarbones. Shoulders are relaxed, with the upper body slightly twisted to the left. Delicate drop earrings with small transparent stones at the end of thin gold chains. A dainty necklace with a single small stone.

Background & Light:
The background is {argument name="background" default="a deep blue sea stretching to the horizon and a clear sky"}. A blurred small island silhouette in the far left and a white seaside railing at the bottom. Strong natural light from around noon shines from the top left, creating bright highlights on the hair surface, left shoulder, collarbone, and cheek. Soft blue reflected light on the right side of the face, with natural thin shadows under the nose and chin. Fine reflections of light sparkle on the sea surface, clearly separating the blue of the sky and the sea.

Composition & Camera:
Vertical 2:3, medium close-up focused on the bust. The person occupies about 75% of the screen, leaving a small amount of sky above and space for the sea on the right. Camera is at an eye-level slightly higher than the chest. 85mm equivalent medium telephoto lens, shallow depth of field precisely focused on the eyes and profile, smoothly blurring the background sea and island.

Texture & Style:
High-quality summer fashion photography. Natural skin leaving slight texture and fine hairs, no excessive skin retouching. Precise depiction of fine weaves of white cloth, light wrinkles in the blue jacket, and small reflections from metal accessories. A high-saturation yet clean color tone focused on blue and white, fresh contrast, and delicate film grain.

zh.title: 日系海边时尚人像
zh.description: 一份高度详细的专业摄影提示词，用于拍摄一位站在海边的日本女性时尚人像，包含服装、光影及相机设置的详细说明。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="subject" default="身披蓝色的侧影"}

主要拍摄对象：
一位站在阳光明媚海边的成年女性。采用 2:3 纵向构图的时尚人像，人物位于画面中心偏左，取景范围从胸部到头顶。身穿一件从双肩滑落的亮蓝色外套，与 {argument name="clothing" default="白色 V 领服装"} 和蓝色大海形成鲜明对比。

人物与表情：
一位气质沉稳、成熟的日本女性。深棕色（近乎黑色）的齐肩短发，露出干净的颈部线条。海风轻拂，刘海和发梢微微向右飘动。头部略微前倾，面部呈斜侧面朝向右方。目光斜视下方，表情安静放松，双唇微启。透亮的浅米色皮肤，珊瑚色唇妆，精致的眼线和自然的睫毛。

服装与姿态：
一件象牙白色的细肩带 V 领连衣裙。领口深邃而不失优雅，柔软的罗纹轻薄面料自然贴合成熟女性的身材曲线。一件亮钴蓝色的轻便外套滑落至肘部上方，大方地露出双肩和锁骨。双肩放松，上半身向左微转。佩戴精致的垂坠耳环，细金链末端镶嵌着透明小宝石。颈间佩戴一条点缀着单颗小宝石的精巧项链。

背景与光影：
背景为 {argument name="background" default="延伸至地平线的深蓝色大海与晴朗天空"}。远处的左侧可见模糊的小岛剪影，底部为白色的海边栏杆。正午左右的强烈自然光从左上方照射，在发丝表面、左肩、锁骨和脸颊上形成明亮的高光。面部右侧带有柔和的蓝色反射光，鼻下和下巴处有自然的浅淡阴影。海面上闪烁着细碎的波光，清晰地界定了天空与大海的蓝色。

构图与相机：
2:3 纵向构图，聚焦于胸部的中景特写。人物占据画面约 75%，上方留有少量天空，右侧留出海景空间。相机位于略高于胸部的平视高度。使用 85mm 等效中焦镜头，浅景深精准对焦于眼睛和侧脸，将背景的大海与岛屿平滑虚化。

质感与风格：
高质量夏季时尚摄影。自然的皮肤质感，保留细微纹理和绒毛，无过度磨皮。精准刻画白色布料的细密纹理、蓝色外套的轻微褶皱以及金属配饰的细小反光。以蓝白为主的高饱和度且纯净的色调，清新的对比度，带有细腻的胶片颗粒感。

en.title: Vogue Fashion Editorial Storyboard Grid
en.description: A detailed prompt for creating a 3x3 Vogue-style fashion storyboard that maintains consistent character identity, outfit, and hairstyle across nine different frames ranging from wide shots to close-ups.
en.prompt:
Create a 3×3 storyboard grid (9 images total) in a Vogue high-fashion editorial style, using {argument name="reference image" default="the provided image"} as the main subject.

All images must preserve the same identity, facial features, hairstyle, outfit, and overall character, so the subject looks fully consistent and cohesive across the entire storyboard.

Structure the storyboard with clear visual progression:

Frames 1–3 — Wide Vogue Editorial Shots
Wide, cinematic fashion shots with strong composition and premium glossy aesthetics.

Frames 4–6 — Medium Portrait Editorial Shots
Medium shots focusing on gesture, posture, interaction, subtle movement, and confident body language.

Frames 7–9 Close-Up Beauty & Detail Shots
Close ups highlighting emotion, skin texture, makeup, fabrics, accessories, and visual accents with shallow depth of field.

zh.title: Vogue 时尚杂志风格项目网格
zh.description: 一份详细的提示词，用于创建 3x3 的 Vogue 风格时尚项目，确保在从广角到特写的九个画面中，保持角色身份、服装和发型的高度一致性。
zh.prompt:
创建一个 3×3 的项目网格（共 9 张图像），采用 Vogue 高级时尚杂志风格，并以 {argument name="reference image" default="提供的图像"} 作为主体。

所有图像必须保持相同的身份、面部特征、发型、服装和整体角色形象，确保主体在整个项目中看起来完全一致且连贯。

项目结构应具备清晰的视觉进度：

第 1–3 帧 — Vogue 杂志风格广角镜头
广角电影感时尚镜头，具备强烈的构图和高级光泽美学。

第 4–6 帧 — 杂志风格中景肖像
聚焦于姿态、体态、互动、细微动作以及自信肢体语言的中景镜头。

第 7–9 帧 — 美妆与细节特写
通过浅景深突出情绪、皮肤纹理、妆容、面料、配饰及视觉亮点的特写镜头。

en.title: 1990s Manga Neo-Retro Street Scene
en.description: Creates a cinematic 90s-style anime street scene in Japan featuring a character leaning against a classic Honda NSX, inspired by vintage manga aesthetics.
en.prompt: Cinematic neo-retro Japanese street scene inspired by 1990s manga and vintage anime aesthetics. A {argument name="character" default="confident young man with slicked-back black hair tied into a small bun"} leans casually against the rear of a {argument name="car" default="bright red Honda NSX (NA1)"}, one hand in his pocket and the other holding a {argument name="prop" default="lit cigarette"}. He tilts his head back while slowly exhaling a dramatic stream of smoke into the evening sky, giving off a calm, rebellious attitude. Wearing a loose black oversized T-shirt, wide-leg black trousers, and polished black leather loafers. Traditional Japanese Edo-style wooden buildings line both sides of a narrow cobblestone street, with warm lantern light glowing from windows and deep atmospheric shadows. Muted earthy color palette with rich reds, charcoal blacks, and warm browns. Highly detailed architectural textures, cinematic composition, moody dusk lighting, subtle film grain, vintage poster aesthetic, ukiyo-e inspired perspective blended with modern manga realism, dramatic depth, nostalgic 1990s Japanese street culture vibe, masterpiece, ultra-detailed, no watermark, no text, no logos.

zh.title: 1990 年代漫画风格新复古街景
zh.description: 创作一幅电影质感的 90 年代日本动漫风格街景，画面中一位角色倚靠在经典款 Honda NSX 旁，灵感源自复古漫画美学。
zh.prompt: 灵感源自 1990 年代漫画与复古动漫美学的电影质感新复古日本街景。一位 {argument name="character" default="留着黑色背头并扎成小发髻的自信青年"} 随意地倚靠在 {argument name="car" default="亮红色 Honda NSX (NA1)"} 的车尾，一只手插在口袋里，另一只手拿着一根 {argument name="prop" default="点燃的香烟"}。他微微仰头，向傍晚的天空缓缓吐出一缕充满戏剧性的烟雾，散发出冷静而叛逆的气质。身穿宽松的黑色大码 T 恤、黑色阔腿裤，脚蹬擦得锃亮的黑色皮质乐福鞋。狭窄的鹅卵石街道两旁排列着传统的日本江户风格木质建筑，窗户透出温暖的灯光，映衬着深邃的氛围阴影。采用柔和的大地色调，辅以浓郁的红色、炭黑色和暖棕色。极具细节的建筑纹理、电影级构图、忧郁的黄昏光影、细腻的胶片颗粒感、复古海报美学、融合了现代漫画写实主义的浮世绘风格透视、强烈的景深效果、怀旧的 1990 年代日本街头文化氛围，杰作，超高细节，无水印，无文字，无 Logo。

en.title: Beauty Campaign Casting Contact Sheet
en.description: Generates a professional 2x2 beauty editorial grid showing a subject in four distinct poses and expressions with premium studio lighting.
en.prompt: High-end beauty casting contact sheet of a {argument name="subject" default="woman with a sleek dark ponytail and luminous brown eyes"}, arranged in a clean 2x2 grid of four distinct editorial frames against a {argument name="background" default="lavender-gray backdrop"}, wearing a {argument name="attire" default="structured ivory blouse and sculptural earrings"}. Frame 1: holding an oversized flower near her face. Frame 2: seated on the floor with her back against the wall and knees raised. Frame 3: lifting both hands into her hair while laughing naturally. Frame 4: turning abruptly as if caught by surprise, creating subtle motion blur in her hair. Premium beauty-campaign lighting, luxury magazine aesthetic, realistic skin detail, aspect ratio 4:5.

zh.title: 美妆广告选角联系表
zh.description: 生成一张专业的 2x2 美妆社论网格图，展示主体在高级影棚灯光下的四种不同姿态与表情。
zh.prompt: 高端美妆选角联系表，主体为 {argument name="subject" default="一位梳着利落深色马尾辫、拥有明亮棕色双眸的女性"}，以 2x2 的整洁网格排列，呈现四种不同的社论构图，背景为 {argument name="background" default="薰衣草灰背景"}，身着 {argument name="attire" default="结构感象牙白衬衫并佩戴雕塑感耳环"}。第一帧：手持一朵超大花朵靠近面部。第二帧：背靠墙壁坐在地板上，双膝抬起。第三帧：双手撩动秀发，自然大笑。第四帧：突然转身，仿佛被意外捕捉，发丝间带有细腻的动态模糊。高级美妆广告灯光，奢华杂志美学，逼真的皮肤细节，长宽比 4:5。

en.title: Premium iPhone Fashion Advertising Poster
en.description: Generates a high-end commercial fashion poster for an iPhone campaign, featuring a specific subject in a bold monochromatic orange palette with dramatic low-angle lighting.
en.prompt:
Use {argument name="reference image" default="the uploaded image"} as a composition and lighting reference, but replace the female character with a {argument name="subject" default="confident young Black male fashion model with short textured hair, sharp facial features, and a calm, powerful expression"}. Create a premium vertical smartphone advertising poster in a bold monochromatic orange color palette. Show him from a dramatic low angle perspective, extending one hand toward the camera while holding a {argument name="product" default="glossy orange iPhone 17 Pro"} close to the lens. The phone should dominate the foreground with exaggerated perspective, clearly showing its triple camera system, metallic frame, glass back, and centered Apple logo.

Dress him in a glossy burnt orange bomber jacket over a fitted white T shirt with beige tailored trousers. Add subtle wind movement to his jacket and hair for energy. Behind him, place a bright circular orange neon ring that frames his upper body. Use a smooth deep-orange studio background with cinematic gradients and soft atmospheric glow.

At the top, add a small Apple logo followed by “iPhone 17”, and place enormous bold typography reading “PRO” behind the character. Keep the text partially obscured by the subject to create depth. High-end commercial photography, dramatic fashion campaign, crisp skin texture, realistic hands, accurate phone geometry, warm rim lighting, glossy highlights, strong contrast, premium Apple-style product presentation, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K, vertical 4:5 composition.

zh.title: 高端 iPhone 时尚广告海报
zh.description: 为 iPhone 营销活动生成一张高端商业时尚海报，以特定主体为特色，采用大胆的单色橙色调和戏剧性的低角度灯光。
zh.prompt:
使用 {argument name="reference image" default="上传的图片"} 作为构图和灯光参考，但将女性角色替换为 {argument name="subject" default="一位自信的年轻黑人时尚男模，留着短质感发型，五官轮廓分明，表情冷静而有力"}。创作一张高端竖版智能手机广告海报，采用大胆的单色橙色调。以戏剧性的低角度视角展示他，一只手伸向镜头，同时将 {argument name="product" default="光泽感的橙色 iPhone 17 Pro"} 靠近镜头。手机应占据前景主导地位，呈现夸张的透视效果，清晰展示其三摄系统、金属边框、玻璃背板以及居中的 Apple 标志。

让他身穿一件亮面焦橙色飞行员夹克，内搭修身白色 T 恤，下身穿着米色定制长裤。为他的夹克和头发添加细微的风吹动感，以增加活力。在他身后，放置一个明亮的圆形橙色霓虹灯环，勾勒出他的上半身。使用平滑的深橙色摄影棚背景，呈现电影般的渐变和柔和的大气光晕。

在顶部添加一个小型的 Apple 标志，后接“iPhone 17”，并在角色身后放置巨大的粗体文字“PRO”。让文字部分被主体遮挡以营造深度感。高端商业摄影、戏剧性时尚大片、清晰的皮肤纹理、逼真的手部细节、精准的手机几何结构、温暖的轮廓光、光泽高光、强对比度、高端 Apple 风格产品展示、超细节、照片级真实感、8K 分辨率、竖版 4:5 构图。

en.title: South Asian Male Cinematic Fashion Poster
en.description: A sophisticated cinematic fashion poster collage featuring a South Asian man in luxury editorial style, maintaining high facial consistency across multiple portrait angles.
en.prompt:
Using uploaded face 100% realistic.
Create a high-end cinematic fashion poster collage featuring the same {argument name="subject" default="young South Asian man"} from the reference photo, keeping his face highly accurate, natural, and consistent across all portraits. Vertical 9:16 composition, luxury black-and-gold editorial style.

Create three versions of the same man:

1. Left side: a large dramatic close-up side-profile portrait wearing stylish {argument name="accessory" default="black rectangular sunglasses"}, looking toward the right. Neatly styled thick black hair, trimmed beard and mustache, confident expression.

2. Right side: a large close-up front-facing portrait without sunglasses, looking directly at the camera with a subtle confident smile. One hand resting near the chin, showing a premium black wristwatch.

3. Center foreground: full-body walking pose on a glowing wooden pathway, walking confidently toward the camera. He is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="luxury black tuxedo blazer"} with satin lapels, black turtleneck shirt, black fitted trousers, black formal shoes, black sunglasses, and a stylish wristwatch. One hand in trouser pocket and the other hand adjusting the blazer.

Background: white and light gray studio backdrop with dramatic black ink splashes, paint brush strokes, smoky textures, white paint splatters, golden glowing light behind the center figure, cinematic rim light, luxury magazine cover style. Add subtle golden sparks and a glowing pathway perspective at the bottom.

Ultra-realistic face, realistic skin texture, sharp hairstyle, professional DSLR photography, high contrast, black, white and gold color palette, dramatic lighting, fashion editorial poster, 8K, HDR, highly detailed, no text, no logo, no watermark.

zh.title: 南亚男性电影感时尚海报
zh.description: 一张精致的电影感时尚海报拼贴画，以奢华编辑风格呈现南亚男性形象，并在多个肖像角度中保持高度的面部一致性。
zh.prompt:
使用上传的人脸，实现 100% 真实感。
创作一张高端电影感时尚海报拼贴画，主角为参考照片中的 {argument name="subject" default="年轻南亚男性"}，确保其面部在所有肖像中高度精准、自然且保持一致。采用 9:16 竖构图，奢华黑金编辑风格。

为同一位男性创作三个版本：

1. 左侧：一张大型戏剧性侧面特写肖像，佩戴时尚的 {argument name="accessory" default="黑色长方形太阳镜"}，望向右侧。发型为打理整齐的浓密黑发，修剪整齐的胡须，表情自信。

2. 右侧：一张大型正面特写肖像，未佩戴太阳镜，直视镜头，带着微妙而自信的微笑。一只手放在下巴附近，展示一款高端黑色腕表。

3. 中心前景：在发光的木质路径上行走的全身姿势，自信地走向镜头。他身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="奢华黑色燕尾服西装外套"}，搭配缎面翻领、黑色高领衫、黑色修身长裤、黑色正装鞋、黑色太阳镜和时尚腕表。一只手插在裤兜里，另一只手正在整理西装外套。

背景：白色和浅灰色摄影棚背景，带有戏剧性的黑色墨迹飞溅、画笔笔触、烟雾质感、白色油漆溅射，中心人物后方有金色光芒，电影感轮廓光，奢华杂志封面风格。底部添加微妙的金色火花和发光的路径透视效果。

超写实面部，逼真的皮肤质感，利落的发型，专业单反摄影，高对比度，黑、白、金配色方案，戏剧性灯光，时尚编辑海报，8K，HDR，高度细节化，无文字，无 Logo，无水印。

en.title: Ethereal Androgynous Musician Portrait
en.description: A beautiful fantasy-inspired portrait of an androgynous musician with flowing robes and silver hair, set in an ancient desert ruin environment.
en.prompt: A breathtaking ethereal fantasy portrait of an {argument name="character" default="androgynous young wandering musician"} with voluminous tousled {argument name="hair color" default="white-silver"} hair, delicate porcelain skin, soft youthful facial features, round vintage gold-rim glasses, elegant dangling earrings, layered rings and fine jewelry, wrapped in flowing oversized robes, embroidered fabrics, weathered cloaks and long scarves with intricate textures. The character gently plays a traditional string instrument (lute, sitar, or mandolin), standing or sitting in a majestic {argument name="location" default="ancient historical location"} inspired by Petra, Rajasthan, forgotten temples, sandstone ruins, and desert architecture. Wind sweeps through the clothing and hair, creating dynamic motion. Warm peach, ivory, sandstone, blush pink, dusty beige, muted gray and gold color palette, dreamy cinematic sunlight, soft atmospheric haze, watercolor and ink wash textures, painterly concept art, highly detailed brushwork, delicate line art, elegant composition, ornate costume design, fantasy travel illustration, East-meets-Middle-Eastern aesthetics

zh.title: 空灵的中性风音乐家肖像
zh.description: 一幅精美的奇幻风格肖像，描绘了一位身着飘逸长袍、银发飘飘的中性风音乐家，背景设定在古老的沙漠遗迹中。
zh.prompt: 一幅令人惊叹的空灵奇幻肖像，主角是一位 {argument name="character" default="中性风的年轻流浪音乐家"}，拥有蓬松凌乱的 {argument name="hair color" default="银白色"} 头发、精致的瓷白肌肤、柔和的少年面容、复古圆框金边眼镜、优雅的垂坠耳环、叠戴戒指和精美首饰，身披飘逸的超大长袍，穿着刺绣面料、风化的斗篷和带有复杂纹理的长围巾。角色正轻柔地弹奏着传统的弦乐器（鲁特琴、西塔琴或曼陀林），站立或坐落于一个宏伟的 {argument name="location" default="古代历史遗迹"} 之中，灵感源自佩特拉古城、拉贾斯坦邦、被遗忘的寺庙、砂岩废墟和沙漠建筑。风吹过衣物和头发，营造出动态感。采用温暖的桃色、象牙白、砂岩色、腮红粉、灰褐色、柔和的灰色和金色调色板，梦幻般的电影级阳光，柔和的大气朦胧感，水彩和水墨洗练质感，绘画感概念艺术，高度精细的笔触，细腻的线条艺术，优雅的构图，华丽的服装设计，奇幻旅行插画，融合东方与中东的美学风格

en.title: Professional Corporate Studio Headshot
en.description: A high-end professional studio headshot for corporate use, focusing on realistic skin texture and perfect symmetrical lighting.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic professional studio headshot, centered chest-up portrait, subject looking directly at the camera with a warm confident smile, perfectly symmetrical face, natural skin texture with flawless complexion, highly detailed expressive eyes, soft diffused studio lighting, clean white seamless background, shallow depth of field, premium corporate portrait photography, 85mm lens, f/1.8, HDR, photorealistic, ultra-sharp focus, cinematic color grading, luxury editorial style, 8K, wearing an {argument name="outfit" default="elegant navy blue or cream blazer"} with minimal accessories, modern executive appearance, realistic proportions, natural colors, high-end DSLR quality, extremely detailed, masterpiece, award-winning portrait photography, no text, no watermark, no logo, no blur, no noise, no distortion, no extra features, no oversaturation.

zh.title: 专业企业级工作室头像
zh.description: 一张用于企业的高端专业工作室头像，专注于真实的皮肤纹理和完美的对称光影。
zh.prompt: 超写实专业工作室头像，居中胸部以上肖像，主体直视镜头，面带自信温暖的微笑，面部完美对称，自然的皮肤纹理，肤色无瑕，眼睛细节丰富且富有表现力，柔和的漫射工作室光线，干净的白色无缝背景，浅景深，高端企业肖像摄影，85mm 镜头，f/1.8，HDR，照片级真实，超清晰对焦，电影级调色，奢华编辑风格，8K，身着 {argument name="outfit" default="优雅的海军蓝或米色西装外套"}，搭配简约配饰，现代高管形象，比例真实，色彩自然，高端单反相机画质，细节极致，杰作，获奖肖像摄影，无文字，无水印，无 Logo，无模糊，无噪点，无畸变，无额外特征，无过度饱和。

en.title: Playful Heart Gesture Close-up
en.description: An intimate extreme close-up portrait of a woman making a heart gesture, captured with a soft and realistic selfie aesthetic.
en.prompt:
Extreme close-up vertical portrait (4:5) of an {argument name="subject" default="East Asian woman"}, playful and intimate in mood. Her face nearly fills the frame, with eyes, nose, and glossy lips as focal points. Both hands form a {argument name="gesture" default="heart shape"} in front of her face, fingers close to the lens and softly blurred. Head tilted slightly, one eye winked shut, the other looking gently at the camera, lips puckered in a cute {argument name="lip color" default="glossy pink"} kiss. She has sleek black hair with loose strands across her face, natural brows, subtle eyeliner and lashes, soft shimmery eyeshadow, glowing skin, and a small mole beneath one eye. No visible clothing or background due to the tight crop.
Lighting is soft and even, minimal shadows, natural highlights. Straight-on angle, shallow depth of field with sharp focus on eye and lips, foreground hands slightly soft. Realistic skin texture, film-like quality, expressive selfie feel. Avoid plastic-looking skin, distorted hands, extra fingers, harsh shadows, text, or cartoonish rendering.

zh.title: 俏皮比心手势特写
zh.description: 一张亲密的超近距离肖像，展现了一位女性做出比心手势，呈现出柔和且真实的自拍美感。
zh.prompt:
超近距离竖构图肖像 (4:5)，主角为 {argument name="subject" default="东亚女性"}，氛围俏皮而亲密。她的面部几乎填满整个画面，眼睛、鼻子和水润的双唇成为视觉焦点。双手在脸前比出 {argument name="gesture" default="心形"}，手指靠近镜头并带有柔和的模糊感。头部微微倾斜，一只眼睛俏皮地闭着，另一只眼睛温柔地注视着镜头，双唇嘟起，涂着可爱的 {argument name="lip color" default="水光粉色"} 唇釉。她留着顺滑的黑发，几缕发丝散落在脸上，眉毛自然，眼线和睫毛精致，眼影带有柔和的微光，皮肤透亮，眼下有一颗小痣。由于是紧凑的特写，画面中没有可见的衣物或背景。
光线柔和均匀，阴影极少，带有自然的高光。正面拍摄角度，浅景深，焦点清晰地落在眼睛和嘴唇上，前景的手部略显柔和。皮肤纹理真实，具有胶片质感，充满表现力的自拍感。避免皮肤塑料感、手部畸形、多余手指、生硬阴影、文字或卡通渲染。

en.title: High-fashion Candid Portrait in Luxury Car
en.description: A sophisticated prompt for generating a highly realistic editorial portrait of a woman in a luxury car, emphasizing precise facial preservation and moody lighting.
en.prompt:
Create an ultra-realistic using the {argument name="identity source" default="reference image"} as the identity source.
Preserve the exact facial features, bone structure, proportions, skin tone, and identity of the subject.
Do not beautify, reshape, or alter the face in any way. Maintain natural likeness and authentic facial geometry.
A high-fashion candid medium close-up of a stunning {argument name="subject" default="woman in her late 20s"} with an hourglass bone structure and striking facial features, captured in a moment of effortless elegance. She is positioned inside the cabin of a {argument name="setting" default="luxury car"}, shot from an exterior candid perspective through a partially open window. Her head is slightly tilted, looking down and to the right with an air of quiet confidence and high-society allure. Her right hand is raised, casually gathering and holding her thick, voluminous dark brown hair at the back of her head, showing natural muscle tension in her hand and wrist.
Wardrobe, Styling & Accessories
Eyewear: Chunky, oversized rectangular black acetate sunglasses with a sharp, angular silhouette and subtle gold metallic accents on the temples. The dark lenses have a soft sheen, partially catching the ambient light.
Clothing: A sleek, minimal crew-neck black top in a soft matte fabric.
Jewelry: A single, sparkling diamond stud earring in her right earlobe. No nose piercings.
Hairstyle & Makeup
Hairstyle: Lustrous, thick, dark espresso brown hair styled with natural volume and a soft, textured wave. The front is casually swept back as her hand holds it, allowing a few wispy, natural baby hairs to gently frame her temple and forehead.
Makeup: Flawless "no-makeup" makeup look with a soft matte complexion. Expertly sculpted cheekbones with neutral contour and a hint of warm, subtle blush. Perfectly groomed, defined natural eyebrows with a soft arch. The lips are full and plump, coated in a muted dusty rose-pink matte lipstick, featuring natural lip texture and a soft lip-liner definition.
Setting & Environment
Setting: Inside the dim, refined interior of a modern luxury vehicle.
Foreground Elements: A soft, out-of-focus white and grey foreground element (the car’s window frame and exterior paneling) creates a natural voyeuristic, paparazzi-style framing.
Background Elements: Soft-focus, highly blurred background showing the car's interior cabin details and a hint of natural daylight filtering through the rear windows.
Lighting & Atmosphere
Lighting: Soft, diffused natural daylight filtering from above and behind the subject, creating a gentle rim light on her hair and shoulders. The interior of the car is moody and slightly shadowed, casting soft, flattering shadows under her cheekbones and jawline. No harsh highlights, maintaining a moody, cinematic tone.
Atmosphere: An intimate, high-end editorial atmosphere that feels like an off-duty supermodel candid.
Camera, Optical & Style Specs
Camera & Lens: Shot on a Phase One XF IQ4 medium format camera paired with a Schneider Kreuznach 80mm f/1.8 lens.

zh.title: 豪华轿车内的高级时尚抓拍肖像
zh.description: 一个用于生成高度逼真编辑类肖像的精致提示词，适用于豪华轿车场景，强调精准的面部特征保留与情绪化光影。
zh.prompt:
使用 {argument name="identity source" default="参考图像"} 作为身份来源，创建一张超写实图像。
精准保留主体确切的面部特征、骨骼结构、比例、肤色和身份信息。
请勿进行任何美化、重塑或改变面部操作。保持自然的相似度和真实的面部几何结构。
一张高级时尚风格的抓拍中景特写，主角是一位令人惊艳的 {argument name="subject" default="20 多岁女性"}，拥有沙漏型骨骼结构和引人注目的面部特征，捕捉她不经意间流露出的优雅瞬间。她位于 {argument name="setting" default="豪华轿车"} 的车厢内，通过半开的车窗从外部进行抓拍视角拍摄。她头部微倾，目光向下看向右侧，流露出一种安静的自信和上流社会的魅力。她的右手抬起，随意地在脑后拢住并握住她浓密且富有质感的深棕色头发，展现出手部和手腕自然的肌肉张力。
服装、造型与配饰
眼镜：粗框、超大矩形黑色醋酸纤维太阳镜，轮廓锋利硬朗，镜腿处带有精致的金色金属装饰。深色镜片带有柔和的光泽，部分捕捉到了环境光。
服装：一件简约、修身的黑色圆领上衣，采用柔软的哑光面料。
珠宝：右耳垂佩戴一枚闪亮的单颗钻石耳钉。无鼻环。
发型与妆容
发型：富有光泽、浓密的深浓缩咖啡色头发，造型自然蓬松，带有柔和的纹理波浪。当手拢住头发时，前额发丝随意向后梳理，几缕细碎、自然的胎毛轻柔地修饰着太阳穴和额头。
妆容：无瑕的“伪素颜”妆容，呈现柔和的哑光肤质。通过中性修容和淡淡的暖色腮红，专业地雕刻出颧骨轮廓。修剪得体、轮廓分明的自然眉形，带有柔和的弧度。嘴唇丰满，涂抹着柔和的灰玫瑰粉色哑光唇膏，展现出自然的唇部纹理和柔和的唇线定义。
场景与环境
场景：现代豪华轿车昏暗、精致的内部空间。
前景元素：柔和、失焦的白色和灰色前景元素（车窗框和外部面板）营造出自然的偷拍视角，呈现出狗仔队风格的构图。
背景元素：柔和对焦、高度模糊的背景，展示了汽车内部座舱细节，以及透过后窗射入的微弱自然光。
光影与氛围
光影：柔和、漫射的自然日光从主体上方和后方射入，在她的头发和肩膀上勾勒出柔和的轮廓光。车内环境氛围感强且略带阴影，在颧骨和下颌线下方投下柔和、修饰脸型的阴影。没有刺眼的高光，保持着情绪化、电影般的色调。
氛围：一种亲密、高端的编辑类氛围，仿佛超模下班后的随手抓拍。
相机、光学与风格参数
相机与镜头：使用 Phase One XF IQ4 中画幅相机搭配 Schneider Kreuznach 80mm f/1.8 镜头拍摄。

en.title: Royal Mughal Palace Luxury Portrait
en.description: A cinematic prompt for creating a realistic portrait of a woman in an emerald Banarasi saree within a grand Mughal palace.
en.prompt:
Use the {argument name="reference image" default="uploaded image"} as the exact identity reference. Preserve the woman's face with perfect accuracy.

Create an ultra-realistic cinematic luxury portrait in 9:16 format.

A breathtaking young {argument name="ethnicity" default="South Asian woman"} walking through a magnificent {argument name="setting" default="Mughal palace"} with grand white marble arches, intricately carved pillars, royal fountains, lush Mughal gardens, and timeless royal architecture. She gently touches the polished marble wall while confidently looking toward the camera. Warm golden sunlight streams through the arches, creating dramatic cinematic shadows, volumetric light rays, and an elegant royal atmosphere.

She wears a luxurious {argument name="clothing" default="emerald green Banarasi saree"} with rich woven silk texture and intricate heavy gold embroidery. She is adorned with traditional gold jhumka earrings, layered royal necklaces, elegant bangles, gemstone rings, a detailed maang tikka, and a beautifully crafted kamarband. Her hair flows gracefully, and every expression is natural, confident, and regal.

Every fabric fold, jewelry detail, marble carving, fountain, garden, and architectural element is rendered with museum-quality realism. Hyper-realistic skin texture, natural eyes, realistic hair strands, cinematic depth of field, soft global illumination, HDR lighting, premium luxury fashion editorial styling, IMAX-quality composition.

Masterpiece, best quality, ultra-realistic, photorealistic, 16K, cinematic color grading, luxury editorial portrait, museum-quality realism, breathtaking details, highly detailed environment, award-winning photography, volumetric lighting, global illumination, sharp focus.

zh.title: 皇家莫卧儿宫殿奢华肖像
zh.description: 一个电影级提示词，用于在宏伟的莫卧儿宫殿中创作一位身着祖母绿 Banarasi 纱丽的女性的写实肖像。
zh.prompt:
使用 {argument name="reference image" default="uploaded image"} 作为精确的身份参考。完美还原女性的面部特征。

创作一张 9:16 比例的超写实电影级奢华肖像。

一位令人惊叹的年轻 {argument name="ethnicity" default="南亚女性"} 走在宏伟的 {argument name="setting" default="莫卧儿宫殿"} 中，背景是宏大的白色大理石拱门、雕刻精美的柱子、皇家喷泉、郁郁葱葱的莫卧儿花园以及永恒的皇家建筑。她轻轻触摸着抛光的大理石墙壁，自信地看向镜头。温暖的金色阳光穿过拱门，营造出极具戏剧性的电影感阴影、体积光束和优雅的皇家氛围。

她身着奢华的 {argument name="clothing" default="祖母绿 Banarasi 纱丽"}，面料呈现出浓郁的丝绸质感，并配有繁复厚重的金色刺绣。她佩戴着传统的金色 Jhumka 耳环、层叠的皇家项链、优雅的手镯、宝石戒指、精致的 Maang Tikka 和制作精美的腰带 (Kamarband)。她的秀发优雅地垂落，每一个表情都自然、自信且高贵。

每一个布料褶皱、珠宝细节、大理石雕刻、喷泉、花园和建筑元素都呈现出博物馆级的写实感。超写实的皮肤纹理、自然的双眼、逼真的发丝、电影级的景深、柔和的全局光照、HDR 灯光、高端奢华时尚编辑风格、IMAX 级构图。

杰作，最佳质量，超写实，照片级真实感，16K，电影级调色，奢华编辑肖像，博物馆级写实感，令人惊叹的细节，高度精细的环境，获奖摄影作品，体积光，全局光照，清晰对焦。

en.title: 70s European Romantic Drama Storyboard
en.description: A storyboard prompt that captures the look of a 1970s European romantic drama, focusing on cinematic realism and authentic period aesthetics.

zh.title: 70 年代欧洲浪漫剧情片项目
zh.description: 一个捕捉 70 年代欧洲浪漫剧情片风格的项目提示词，专注于电影写实感和地道的时代美学。

en.title: Anime Style Character Concept Sheet
en.description: A prompt for generating a polished anime-style character concept art sheet on a clean white background, ideal for modern fashion and animation character design.
en.prompt: Create a premium, modern high-fashion CHARACTER CONCEPT ART SHEET in a {argument name="layout" default="16:9 widescreen layout"} on a pure white background, following this exact structured composition and visual aesthetic: [STYLE]: {argument name="art style" default="highly polished 2D digital anime"}

zh.title: 动漫风格角色概念设计图
zh.description: 一个用于在纯白背景上生成精致动漫风格角色概念设计图的提示词，非常适合现代时尚和动画角色设计。
zh.prompt: 创建一个高级、现代且时尚的“角色概念设计图”，采用 {argument name="layout" default="16:9 宽屏布局"}，背景为纯白色，并遵循以下精确的结构化构图和视觉美学：[风格]：{argument name="art style" default="高度精致的 2D 数字动漫"}

en.title: Gothic Oversized Graphic Hoodie Outfit
en.description: A highly detailed fashion prompt for an oversized black longline hoodie with structural cutouts, a skeleton graphic, and platform stiletto shoes.
en.prompt: Outfit: an oversized {argument name="color" default="black"} longline hooded sweatshirt in {argument name="material" default="medium-weight cotton-blend fleece"}, extending to the upper thighs with a broad relaxed body, a wide ribbed hem, and full-length loose sleeves worn completely down, featuring large structural open-shoulder cutouts on both sides that expose the shoulders by design rather than slipped styling, an integrated hood worn down behind the neck, a large {argument name="graphic" default="white generalized gothic graphic print"} centered on the chest depicting a skeleton inside an ornate oval frame, approximately four small silver-tone eyelets arranged vertically along one lower front side, and narrow black loop straps fixed near the side seams with hanging silver-tone D-ring hardware as integrated garment details, with no front buttons and no zipper, layered over black ultra-short shorts mostly hidden under the sweatshirt with only a frayed distressed hem visible below, paired with black ribbed mid-calf socks pulled up smoothly and black slouchy leg warmers or boot covers layered over the lower socks and around the shoe collars with heavy natural bunching at the ankles, each detailed with multiple black straps, silver-tone eyelets, and buckles kept fastened, and black leather-like chunky platform lace-up shoes with rounded voluminous toes, visible construction seams, and extremely thick black rubber soles, no bag, no hat, no visible jewelry, premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, realistic layered depth, believable fastening tension, natural fabric bunching, believable object contact, secure hardware placement, not costume-like, not cheap-looking.

zh.title: 哥特风超大版型印花连帽衫穿搭
zh.description: 一个关于超大版型黑色长款连帽衫的高细节时尚提示词，包含结构化镂空设计、骷髅印花以及厚底细高跟鞋。
zh.prompt: 穿搭：一件超大版型的 {argument name="color" default="黑色"} 长款连帽卫衣，材质为 {argument name="material" default="中等重量棉混纺抓绒"}，衣长延伸至大腿上部，衣身宽大舒适，配有宽罗纹下摆和全长宽松袖子，袖子自然垂下。设计特点包括两侧巨大的结构化露肩镂空，刻意露出肩膀而非滑落效果；连体兜帽垂在颈后；胸前中心印有巨大的 {argument name="graphic" default="白色哥特风印花"}，图案为华丽椭圆边框内的骷髅；下摆一侧垂直排列着四个小型银色金属扣眼；侧缝附近固定有窄黑色环带，并带有悬挂的银色 D 型环作为一体化服装细节；无前襟纽扣和拉链。内搭黑色超短裤，大部分被卫衣遮盖，仅露出边缘磨损的下摆。搭配黑色罗纹中筒袜，袜筒平整拉起，并在袜筒下方和鞋口处叠穿黑色堆堆袜套或靴套，脚踝处有自然的褶皱感，每件单品均带有黑色绑带、银色金属扣眼和扣环。鞋子为黑色仿皮厚底系带鞋，圆润饱满的鞋头，可见的结构缝线，以及极厚的黑色橡胶底。无包袋，无帽子，无可见首饰。高级面料质感，逼真的服装结构，整洁的缝线，自然的接缝张力，可信的面料重量，细微的褶皱，真实的垂坠感，精致的边缘处理，可见的接缝，真实的折痕，做工精良的服装细节，高品质面料触感，细腻的服装真实感，逼真的层次深度，可信的固定张力，自然的布料堆叠，可信的物体接触，稳固的五金件位置，非演出服质感，非廉价外观。

en.title: Modern Home Gym Wall Makeover
en.description: Transforms a plain home gym wall into a realistic warm wood-slat and mirror feature wall renovation concept.
en.prompt:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the base room photo, create a realistic interior-design makeover mockup for the back wall of the home gym while keeping the existing gym equipment, camera angle, room proportions, floor mats, treadmill, TV position, inversion table, dumbbells, ropes, and exercise ball in place.

Goal: Replace the unfinished spotted wall area with a polished modern gym feature wall.

Wall transformation: Add exactly 2 main wall sections: 1) a warm vertical wood-slat accent panel on the left behind the TV and treadmill desk, and 2) a large floor-to-ceiling rectangular mirror on the right with a warm wood frame. Add soft warm LED strip lighting around the feature wall edges and behind/along the wood slats for an upscale cozy gym look.

New elements to add: Mount a slim black soundbar directly below the TV. In the mirror reflection, show a clean adjacent room/hallway with exactly 5 visible reflected decor/equipment elements: a potted indoor tree, a framed wall picture, a wooden door, a dumbbell rack, and a kettlebell. Make the reflection plausible for the room geometry.

Style: Photorealistic renovation preview, warm ambient lighting, modern Scandinavian/home-gym aesthetic, natural wood tones, clean beige walls, realistic shadows and reflections.

Customizable details: Use {argument name="wood tone" default="warm oak"} for the slat wall and mirror frame, {argument name="lighting color" default="warm white LED"}, {argument name="mirror size" default="large floor-to-ceiling rectangular mirror"}, and {argument name="room style" default="modern cozy home gym"}.

Constraints: Do not remove or redesign the existing exercise machines and accessories. Keep the same perspective and overall layout. Do not add people, logos, posters with readable text, or unrealistic architectural changes.

zh.title: 现代家庭健身房墙面改造
zh.description: 将一面普通的家庭健身房墙壁改造成逼真的暖色木格栅与镜面特色墙的装修概念。
zh.prompt:
以 REFERENCE_0 作为基础房间照片，为家庭健身房的后墙创建一个逼真的室内设计改造效果图，同时保留现有的健身器材、拍摄角度、房间比例、地垫、跑步机、电视位置、倒立机、哑铃、绳索和健身球。

目标：将未装饰的斑驳墙面替换为精致的现代健身房特色墙。

墙面改造：精确添加 2 个主要墙面区域：1) 电视和跑步机桌后方的左侧暖色垂直木格栅装饰板，以及 2) 右侧带有暖色木框的大型落地长方形镜子。在特色墙边缘以及木格栅周围/后方添加柔和的暖色 LED 灯带，营造高端舒适的健身房氛围。

新增元素：在电视正下方安装一个纤薄的黑色回音壁。在镜面反射中，展示一个整洁的相邻房间/走廊，并精确包含 5 个可见的反射装饰/设备元素：一盆室内绿植、一幅墙面挂画、一扇木门、一个哑铃架和一个壶铃。确保反射效果符合房间的几何结构。

风格：照片级真实感的装修预览、暖色环境光、现代斯堪的纳维亚/家庭健身房美学、自然木色调、干净的米色墙面、逼真的阴影和反射效果。

可自定义细节：格栅墙和镜框使用 {argument name="wood tone" default="暖橡木"}，{argument name="lighting color" default="暖白光 LED"}，{argument name="mirror size" default="大型落地长方形镜子"}，以及 {argument name="room style" default="现代舒适家庭健身房"}。

约束条件：请勿移除或重新设计现有的健身器械和配件。保持相同的视角和整体布局。请勿添加人物、标志、带有可读文字的海报或不切实际的建筑结构改动。

en.title: Femme Fatale Casino Assassin
en.description: A cinematic character concept prompt for creating a stylized noir casino villain suitable for 3D character modeling or game art reference.
en.prompt: Create a stylized full-body concept art illustration of a glamorous femme-fatale poker villain, {argument name="character name" default="unnamed casino assassin"}, standing confidently on a minimalist studio stage. She is a tall, slim, dark-tan woman with sharp angular features, narrowed eyes, and a cold intimidating expression. Give her a short asymmetrical platinum-blonde bob haircut with a dramatic side part that partially covers one eye. She wears exactly 6 visible outfit/accessory elements: 1) a strapless deep-black evening gown with a sculptural sweetheart neckline, 2) long black opera gloves, 3) a high slit exposing one leg, 4) pointed black high heels, 5) a chunky gold choker necklace, and 6) a gold bracelet on one wrist. She holds exactly 1 object: a black pistol hanging downward in her relaxed left hand, while her right hand rests on her hip. Use a dramatic low-angle fashion pose with one leg extended forward and the gown trailing behind on the floor. Render in a sleek 3D-character-concept style with low-poly angular planes, graphic cel-shaded lighting, hard rim highlights, deep shadows, and a sophisticated noir casino-crime mood. The background is an empty light gray gradient studio with a pale floor plane and long cast shadow, wide cinematic 16:9 composition, subject centered slightly left with lots of negative space, no text, no logo, no extra props, no other characters.

zh.title: 蛇蝎美人赌场刺客
zh.description: 一个电影感角色概念提示词，用于创作风格化的黑色电影赌场反派，适合 3D 角色建模或游戏美术参考。
zh.prompt: 创作一张风格化的全身概念艺术插画，描绘一位迷人的蛇蝎美人扑克反派，{argument name="character name" default="无名赌场刺客"}，自信地站在极简主义的摄影棚舞台上。她是一位高挑、苗条、深棕色皮肤的女性，拥有棱角分明的五官、微眯的双眼和冷酷威严的表情。为她设计一款短款不对称的铂金金色波波头，带有夸张的侧分刘海，部分遮住一只眼睛。她必须穿着 6 件可见的服装/配饰元素：1) 一件露肩深黑色晚礼服，配有雕塑感的甜心领口，2) 长款黑色歌剧手套，3) 高开叉露出一条腿，4) 尖头黑色高跟鞋，5) 一条粗金项链，以及 6) 手腕上的一只金手镯。她手里拿着 1 件物品：一把黑色的手枪，在放松的左手中向下垂着，右手叉腰。使用充满戏剧性的低角度时尚姿势，一条腿向前伸展，礼服拖在身后的地板上。采用流畅的 3D 角色概念风格渲染，具有低多边形棱角面、图形化赛璐珞着色光影、硬朗的轮廓高光、深邃的阴影，以及精致的黑色电影赌场犯罪氛围。背景是一个空的浅灰色渐变摄影棚，带有浅色地板平面和长长的投射阴影，宽屏 16:9 构图，主体略微偏左居中，留有大量负空间，无文字，无 Logo，无额外道具，无其他角色。

en.title: Transparent Beijing Morning Poster
en.description: Generates an elegant good-morning Beijing poster with glassmorphism, misty landmarks, Chinese typography, and a refined travel aesthetic.
en.prompt: Create a serene cinematic morning poster for {argument name="city name" default="北京"} with a refined transparent-glass aesthetic. Use a wide 16:9 canvas, soft misty sunrise lighting, pale cream and cool blue-gray background gradients, shallow depth of field, and elegant editorial composition. At the top center, place large dark navy Chinese calligraphy text reading {argument name="headline text" default="北京"}; below it add small spaced serif English text “GOOD MORNING”, then the date “2026-07-15”, then a thin line of small Chinese copy reading {argument name="morning note" default="今日宜：看展 胡同漫步 | 今日忌：匆忙赶路"}. In the lower center, place a vertical rounded-rectangle transparent glass capsule standing on a white marble oval pedestal; inside the capsule show a delicate layered miniature Beijing landscape with pale ink-wash mountains, faint palace rooftops, and a bright glowing red-orange horizontal band of Forbidden City architecture across the middle. The glass object should have realistic refraction, rounded edges, soft highlights, frosted translucency, and subtle internal haze. The background should include a blurred traditional Beijing temple pavilion on the right, a partial ornate roof corner at the upper right, distant misty mountains on the left, and a stone tabletop surface at the bottom. On the right foreground, add an old silver-and-black rangefinder camera resting on stacked books beside a clear glass vase with a branch of yellow ginkgo leaves; include a few fallen yellow leaves on the tabletop. Overall mood: quiet, poetic, premium, warm morning greeting, Chinese travel aesthetics, transparent object design, realistic 3D render mixed with soft photography, no people, no watermark, keep all text centered and crisp.

zh.title: 透明质感北京晨间海报
zh.description: 生成一张优雅的北京晨间海报，采用玻璃拟态风格，融入朦胧地标、中式排版及精致的旅行美学。
zh.prompt: 为 {argument name="city name" default="北京"} 创作一张宁静的电影感晨间海报，呈现精致的透明玻璃美学。使用 16:9 宽画幅，柔和的晨雾光影，背景采用奶油色与冷蓝灰色的渐变，营造浅景深效果和优雅的杂志排版。在顶部中央，放置醒目的深海军蓝中式书法文字 {argument name="headline text" default="北京"}；下方添加小号字间距较大的衬线英文字体 “GOOD MORNING”，随后是日期 “2026-07-15”，以及一行细小的中文文案 {argument name="morning note" default="今日宜：看展 胡同漫步 | 今日忌：匆忙赶路"}。在底部中央，放置一个垂直的圆角矩形透明玻璃胶囊，立于白色大理石椭圆形底座上；胶囊内展示精致的北京微缩景观，包含淡雅的水墨山峦、隐约的宫殿屋顶，以及横贯中间的一抹明亮且发光的橙红色紫禁城建筑。玻璃物体应具有逼真的折射效果、圆润的边缘、柔和的高光、磨砂半透明感以及细腻的内部雾气。背景右侧包含模糊的传统北京寺庙亭阁，右上角有部分装饰性的屋檐角，左侧为遥远朦胧的山脉，底部为石质桌面。在右侧前景，放置一台复古银黑色的旁轴相机，置于堆叠的书籍之上，旁边是一个透明玻璃花瓶，插有一枝黄色的银杏叶；桌面上散落着几片落叶。整体氛围：宁静、诗意、高级、温暖的晨间问候，中式旅行美学，透明物体设计，写实 3D 渲染与柔和摄影风格结合，无人物，无水印，保持所有文字居中且清晰。

en.title: Romantic Just Married Wedding Poster
en.description: A polished wedding announcement poster with a bride and groom portrait, oversized LOVE typography, and save-the-date details.
en.prompt: Create a romantic horizontal wedding announcement poster featuring {argument name="couple description" default="a young East Asian bride and groom"} in a polished studio portrait. Canvas: wide 16:9 landscape layout, soft blush-pink background with subtle glow and faint sparkles, bright airy retouched wedding-photo aesthetic. Main subjects: exactly 2 people centered near the top half, shown from waist up and leaning close together while looking at the camera. The bride stands on the left wearing a white lace wedding dress with sheer embroidered neckline, a translucent veil, elegant updo with pearl-and-flower hair ornaments, soft natural makeup, and one hand lightly lifting the veil; she holds a small bouquet of pale pink and white flowers near the center. The groom stands on the right wearing a black tuxedo, white shirt, black bow tie, white pocket square, small decorative boutonniere or silver deer-shaped brooch on the lapel, tousled dark hair, and round glasses. Typography and layout: place a huge bold coral-orange word {argument name="large background word" default="LOVE"} across the entire bottom half, cropped slightly by the canvas edges, with the couple layered in front of and behind parts of the letters for depth. Overlay a large white handwritten brush-script phrase {argument name="script headline" default="Just Married"} diagonally across the center over the couple and the large letters, including a long underline stroke and painterly texture. Bottom information row: include exactly 5 small centered text blocks separated by thin vertical lines: 1) "SAVE / THE / DATE", 2) {argument name="wedding date" default="14 / FEB / 2027"}, 3) "CEREMONY" with a tiny plus/star ornament below, 4) {argument name="venue name" default="MOONLIT / GARDEN"}, 5) "6:30 / PM". Add exactly 2 small white laurel ornaments near the lower left and lower right, plus a tiny sparkle beside the left laurel. Visual style: premium modern wedding invitation, soft high-key lighting, smooth skin retouching, pastel palette, coral-orange typography, clean editorial composition, delicate romantic atmosphere. Constraints: no extra people, no additional text beyond the specified words, keep all lettering legible, avoid watermark or logo.

zh.title: 浪漫新婚婚礼海报
zh.description: 一张精致的婚礼公告海报，包含新郎新娘肖像、超大号 LOVE 字体以及婚礼日期信息。
zh.prompt: 创作一张浪漫的横版婚礼公告海报，展示 {argument name="couple description" default="一对年轻的东亚新郎新娘"} 的精致影棚肖像。画布：16:9 宽屏横向布局，柔和的淡粉色背景，带有微妙的光晕和淡淡的闪光，呈现明亮通透的精修婚纱照美学。主体：2 人居中位于上半部分，半身像，两人紧紧依偎并看向镜头。新娘位于左侧，身穿白色蕾丝婚纱，配有透明刺绣领口、半透明头纱，优雅的盘发装饰着珍珠和花朵发饰，妆容自然柔和，一只手轻轻掀起头纱；她手中拿着一束淡粉色和白色的花束，置于中心附近。新郎位于右侧，身穿黑色燕尾服，搭配白衬衫、黑色领结、白色方巾，翻领上别着精致的胸花或银色鹿形胸针，深色头发微乱，戴着圆框眼镜。排版与布局：在整个下半部分放置一个巨大的粗体珊瑚橙色单词 {argument name="large background word" default="LOVE"}，边缘略微裁剪，通过将人物置于字母的前后方来营造深度感。在中心位置叠加一行巨大的白色手写笔刷体短语 {argument name="script headline" default="Just Married"}，斜向覆盖在人物和大型字母上方，包含长下划线和绘画质感。底部信息栏：包含 5 个居中的小文本块，由细竖线分隔：1) "SAVE / THE / DATE"，2) {argument name="wedding date" default="14 / FEB / 2027"}，3) "CEREMONY" 下方带有一个微小的加号/星形装饰，4) {argument name="venue name" default="MOONLIT / GARDEN"}，5) "6:30 / PM"。在左下角和右下角各添加一个白色月桂装饰，左侧月桂旁加一个微小的闪光点。视觉风格：高端现代婚礼请柬，柔和的高调照明，平滑的皮肤精修，柔和的色调，珊瑚橙色排版，干净的编辑构图，精致的浪漫氛围。约束条件：没有多余的人物，除了指定的文字外没有额外文字，保持所有字迹清晰可辨，避免水印或标志。

en.title: Nine-Panel AI Beauty Face Collage
en.description: Generates a 3×3 collage of similar polished East Asian fantasy selfie portraits for studying or parodying repeated AI base-face aesthetics.
en.prompt: Create a square 3×3 collage of exactly 9 close-up AI-generated female portrait selfies, all with the same highly polished GPT-image aesthetic: youthful East Asian fantasy/cosplay beauty, large glossy eyes, porcelain skin, soft blush, small nose, slightly parted lips, and an uncanny near-identical face structure across all panels. Canvas is a 1:1 square, divided into 9 equal tiles with no gutters or labels. Each tile is a tight head-and-shoulders crop, mostly frontal or slight three-quarter angle, cinematic shallow depth of field, warm sunlight and soft bokeh backgrounds, ultra-detailed skin and hair, realistic yet subtly doll-like. Include exactly 9 distinct variations: 1) black-haired girl with straight bangs, open-mouth smile, warm indoor festival lighting; 2) elegant traditional fantasy girl with dark updo, red floral forehead mark, red dangling earrings, pink makeup; 3) brown-haired girl wearing a red headband, fingers near cheek, backlit outdoors; 4) short dark-haired girl with red headband, soft smile, pale sunlit background; 5) blue-haired anime-cosplay girl with bangs, glittery skin texture, parted lips; 6) purple-haired girl with bangs, star earrings, hand touching cheek, gentle smile; 7) black-haired girl with pink/red headband and star hair accessory, warm cosplay look; 8) dark brown-haired girl with wispy bangs and star earrings, soft neutral expression; 9) brown-haired girl with loose strands and red headband, serious delicate gaze. Emphasize repeated base-model facial similarity, glossy retouched realism, social-media portrait collage composition, high detail, vibrant but natural colors. No text, no watermark, no borders beyond the tile divisions.

zh.title: 九宫格 AI 美颜人像拼贴
zh.description: 生成 3×3 的九宫格拼贴图，展示一系列相似的精致东亚奇幻风格自拍人像，用于研究或戏仿重复的 AI 基础人脸美学。
zh.prompt: 创建一个 3×3 的正方形拼贴图，包含 9 张特写 AI 生成的女性自拍人像，所有图像均采用高度精修的 GPT 图像美学：年轻的东亚奇幻/角色扮演美女，大而有神的眼睛，瓷器般的肌肤，淡淡的腮红，小巧的鼻子，微张的嘴唇，且所有画格中的面部结构几乎完全一致。画布为 1:1 正方形，分为 9 个相等的方格，无间隙或标签。每个方格均为紧凑的头部和肩部特写，多为正面或轻微的四分之三侧面，电影级浅景深，温暖的阳光和柔和的背景虚化，超细腻的皮肤和发丝，既真实又带有微妙的玩偶感。包含 9 种不同的变体：1) 黑发齐刘海女孩，张嘴微笑，温暖的室内节日灯光；2) 优雅的传统奇幻风格女孩，深色盘发，额头红色花钿，红色吊坠耳环，粉色妆容；3) 棕发女孩佩戴红色发带，手指靠近脸颊，户外逆光；4) 短黑发女孩佩戴红色发带，柔和微笑，浅色阳光背景；5) 蓝发动漫角色扮演女孩，刘海，闪亮的皮肤质感，微张的嘴唇；6) 紫发刘海女孩，星星耳环，手触脸颊，温柔微笑；7) 黑发女孩佩戴粉/红色发带及星星发饰，温暖的 Cosplay 造型；8) 深棕发女孩，空气刘海，星星耳环，柔和的中性表情；9) 棕发女孩，发丝散落，佩戴红色发带，神情认真而精致。强调重复的基础模型面部相似度、光泽感的精修真实感、社交媒体人像拼贴构图、高细节以及鲜艳而自然的色彩。无文字，无水印，除方格分割线外无边框。

en.title: Natural Bedroom Selfie
en.description: Generates a realistic warm smartphone selfie of a bare-faced young woman sitting casually on an unmade bed in a cozy bedroom.
en.prompt: Create a highly realistic smartphone selfie photo of a natural bare-faced young adult woman, {argument name="character name" default="unnamed woman"}, sitting on an unmade bed in a small cozy bedroom at golden hour. The camera is held high and close at arm’s length in a wide-angle vertical 4:5 composition, looking slightly down at her face and body, with her extended arm visible in the foreground. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown-black"} messy tied-up hair with wispy bangs, large soft brown eyes, minimal or no makeup, natural skin texture, and a gentle relaxed half-smile while looking directly into the lens. She wears a faded dusty pink loose T-shirt and light white cotton shorts. The room is intimate and lived-in: exactly 1 rumpled bed with pale sheets and a sage-green blanket bunched on the right, exactly 1 small wooden bedside table on the lower right, exactly 3 visible items on the table consisting of a glass of amber iced tea, a black TV remote, and a dark hair tie, plus 1 white charging cable looping across the bed. Behind her is exactly 1 open built-in shelf/cabinet with 2 visible shelves containing skincare bottles, small boxes, books, and tissues, and an open beige cabinet door catching warm sunlight. Use {argument name="lighting" default="warm late-afternoon sunlight with soft shadows"}, subtle lens distortion, realistic phone-camera noise, candid casual framing, natural color grading, and no studio lighting. Keep the mood private, everyday, wholesome, and unposed, like a spontaneous bedroom selfie.

zh.title: 自然卧室自拍
zh.description: 生成一张写实的温馨手机自拍，画面中一位素颜年轻女性正随意地坐在温馨卧室里凌乱的床上。
zh.prompt: 创作一张高度写实的手机自拍照片，画面中是一位自然的素颜年轻女性，{argument name="character name" default="未命名女性"}，正坐在黄金时刻温馨小卧室里凌乱的床上。相机以 4:5 的宽角垂直构图，从手臂长度的高处近距离拍摄，略微俯视她的面部和身体，前景可见她伸出的手臂。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕黑色"} 的凌乱扎发，配有细碎刘海，有着大而柔和的棕色眼睛，几乎没化妆或完全素颜，皮肤纹理自然，直视镜头时带着温柔放松的浅笑。她穿着一件褪色的灰粉色宽松 T 恤和浅白色棉质短裤。房间私密且充满生活气息：床上铺着浅色床单，右侧堆着一条鼠尾草绿色的毯子；右下方有一张小型木质床头柜，柜上有 3 件可见物品：一杯琥珀色冰茶、一个黑色电视遥控器和一个深色发圈，另有一根白色充电线横跨在床上。她身后有一个开放式嵌入式架子/柜子，2 层隔板上放着护肤品瓶、小盒子、书籍和纸巾，一扇打开的米色柜门映照着温暖的阳光。使用 {argument name="lighting" default="温暖的午后阳光和柔和的阴影"}，带有轻微的镜头畸变、写实的手机相机噪点、随意的构图、自然的色彩分级，且不使用摄影棚灯光。保持私密、日常、健康且不刻意的氛围，就像一张随手拍的卧室自拍。

en.title: Fantasy Knight Character Turnaround Sheet
en.description: Generates a realistic four-view fantasy warrior character sheet suitable for game, film, or AI drama production design.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a high-end fantasy warrior character sheet for {argument name="character name" default="a young Japanese male knight"}, designed for AI drama or game production.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition, dark neutral gray studio background, realistic cinematic lighting, no decorative border. Divide the image into 4 vertical panels: 3 full-body turnaround views on the left and center, and 1 close-up portrait panel on the right.

Layout: Show exactly 4 character views. View 1: full-body front view, standing upright and facing camera, shield on the left arm and sword held downward in the right hand. View 2: full-body left side profile, sword angled downward and round shield visible on the arm. View 3: full-body back view, showing the cape and rear armor silhouette, sword held downward at the right side. View 4: close-up three-quarter bust portrait on the right, intense eye contact, sword raised diagonally across the chest in the foreground. Add a small white label near the bottom of the portrait panel reading exactly: {argument name="bottom label text" default="3 (GPT Image 2)"}.

Subject details: The warrior is a serious young adult man with {argument name="hair style" default="messy spiky black hair"}, sharp dark eyes, lightly weathered skin, and a stern focused expression. He wears ornate dark navy-black plate armor with bronze/gold trim, layered shoulder pauldrons, leather straps, metal gauntlets, greaves, black boots, and a tattered dark cloak. The chest armor has a circular sunburst emblem with a red jewel at the center. The round shield is dark blue and bronze with radial metal segments and a central red gem. The sword is an ornate silver fantasy blade with angular cutouts, gold accents, and several small red gem inlays.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic fantasy concept art, premium character turnaround sheet, detailed metal scratches, worn leather, subtle dirt and battle wear, realistic fabric folds, dramatic but controlled studio light, crisp focus, high resolution, cinematic realism similar to a AAA RPG character design.

Constraints: Keep the same character, armor, shield, cloak, and sword consistent across all 4 views. Use exactly 4 views and exactly 1 visible text label. Do not add extra characters, extra weapons, logos, watermarks, UI elements, or background scenery.

zh.title: 奇幻骑士角色三视图
zh.description: 生成一张逼真的四视图奇幻战士角色表，适用于游戏、电影或 AI 剧集制作设计。
zh.prompt:
目标：为 {argument name="character name" default="一位年轻的日本男性骑士"} 创建一张高端奇幻战士角色表，专为 AI 剧集或游戏制作设计。

画布：宽屏 16:9 构图，深灰色中性摄影棚背景，逼真的电影级光效，无装饰边框。将图像分为 4 个垂直面板：左侧和中间为 3 个全身转向视图，右侧为 1 个特写肖像面板。

布局：展示 4 个角色视图。视图 1：全身正面，直立面向镜头，左臂持盾，右手持剑下垂。视图 2：全身左侧侧面，剑向下倾斜，手臂上可见圆形盾牌。视图 3：全身背面，展示斗篷和后部盔甲轮廓，剑在右侧下垂。视图 4：右侧四分之三胸像特写，眼神坚定，剑在前景斜举于胸前。在肖像面板底部附近添加一个白色小标签，内容必须为：{argument name="bottom label text" default="3 (GPT Image 2)"}。

主体细节：战士是一位严肃的年轻男性，拥有 {argument name="hair style" default="凌乱的黑色尖刺发型"}、锐利的深色眼睛、略显风霜的皮肤和严峻专注的表情。他穿着华丽的深海军蓝黑色板甲，配有青铜/金色饰边、分层肩甲、皮带、金属护手、胫甲、黑色靴子和破旧的深色斗篷。胸甲中心有一个带有红色宝石的圆形太阳纹章。圆形盾牌为深蓝色和青铜色，带有放射状金属段和中央红色宝石。剑是一把华丽的银色奇幻长剑，带有棱角分明的镂空设计、金色装饰和几颗红色宝石镶嵌。

视觉风格：超写实奇幻概念艺术，高级角色三视图，精细的金属划痕、磨损的皮革、细微的污垢和战斗磨损，逼真的织物褶皱，戏剧性但受控的摄影棚光效，清晰对焦，高分辨率，类似于 AAA 级 RPG 角色设计的电影级写实感。

约束：确保所有 4 个视图中的角色、盔甲、盾牌、斗篷和剑保持一致。使用 4 个视图和 1 个可见文本标签。不要添加额外的角色、武器、徽标、水印、UI 元素或背景场景。

en.title: Neon Anime Idol Duo Poster
en.description: Generates a colorful vertical anime idol audition poster with two sparkling futuristic performers and customizable name logos.
en.prompt: Create a vibrant vertical anime idol audition poster featuring two full-body teenage idol girls jumping together and posing toward the viewer on a hot orange-to-pink diagonal split background. The left idol, labeled with the large white handwritten logo {argument name="left idol name" default="ねね*"} in the upper left, has long voluminous bright pink twin-tail hair with loose curls, green eyes, one eye winking, cat-ear-like translucent holographic accessories, and a huge open smile; she reaches her left hand toward the camera and lifts one leg playfully. The right idol, labeled with the elegant white script logo {argument name="right idol name" default="Sol"} in the upper right, has very long flowing black hair, amber eyes, a warm confident smile, orange flower hair ornaments, and points upward/right with her extended arm while leaning close to the other girl. Dress both characters in matching futuristic concert idol costumes with metallic silver bases, translucent crystal ruffles, belts, buckles, bows, garters, bracelets, and glowing accents: the left costume uses pink, magenta, cyan, and iridescent rainbow highlights, while the right costume uses orange, gold, white, and amber highlights. Include exactly two idols, exactly two name logos, and no other characters. Add oversized shiny platform lace-up boots for both, glowing wrist rings, layered short skirts, cropped tops, thigh straps, and long translucent ribbon trails swirling around their bodies. Use a high-detail glossy anime illustration style with dynamic foreshortening, sparkling starbursts, halftone dots, diagonal speed lines, neon glow, prismatic reflections, and a celebratory J-pop idol energy. Canvas should be a vertical 9:16 poster, full-body composition, centered characters, bright saturated colors, crisp linework, intricate costume details, and no watermark.

zh.title: 霓虹动漫偶像双人海报
zh.description: 生成一张色彩鲜艳的竖版动漫偶像选拔海报，包含两位闪耀的未来感表演者及可自定义的名称 Logo。
zh.prompt: 创作一张充满活力的竖版动漫偶像选拔海报，画面中两位全身的少女偶像在橙色至粉色的对角线分割背景下共同跳跃并面向观众摆出姿势。左侧偶像在左上角标有白色大号手写 Logo {argument name="left idol name" default="ねね*"}，她拥有长而蓬松的亮粉色双马尾卷发，绿色眼睛，单眼眨眼，佩戴猫耳状半透明全息配饰，笑容灿烂；她向镜头伸出左手，俏皮地抬起一条腿。右侧偶像在右上角标有优雅的白色手写体 Logo {argument name="right idol name" default="Sol"}，她拥有非常飘逸的长黑发，琥珀色眼睛，自信温暖的笑容，佩戴橙色花朵发饰，手臂向上/向右伸展指向前方，同时靠近另一位女孩。为两位角色穿上配套的未来感演唱会偶像服装，采用金属银底色，搭配半透明水晶褶边、腰带、搭扣、蝴蝶结、吊带、手镯和发光装饰：左侧服装使用粉色、洋红色、青色和虹彩高光，右侧服装使用橙色、金色、白色和琥珀色高光。画面仅包含两位偶像和两个名称 Logo，不得出现其他角色。为两人添加超大号闪亮厚底系带靴、发光腕环、叠层短裙、露脐上衣、大腿绑带以及环绕身体飞舞的长条半透明丝带。采用高细节光泽感动漫插画风格，运用动态透视、闪烁星芒、半调网点、对角线速度线、霓虹光效、棱镜反射，展现欢快的 J-pop 偶像活力。画布应为 9:16 竖版海报，全身构图，角色居中，色彩明亮饱和，线条清晰，服装细节精致，且无水印。

en.title: Argentina Fan Stadium Portrait
en.description: A photorealistic stadium portrait of a stylish adult female soccer fan wearing an Argentina-inspired number 10 outfit, suitable for sports fan editorial imagery.
en.prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of an adult Japanese woman sitting in the blue plastic seats of a modern soccer stadium, close to the pitch, looking directly at the camera with a soft confident smile. She has {argument name="hair style" default="shoulder-length straight black bob with a side part"}, smooth fair skin, natural makeup, and a polished idol-like appearance. She wears {argument name="team jersey" default="Argentina national team sky-blue and white striped cropped jersey"} with a visible AFA-style crest, three shoulder stripes, and the number {argument name="jersey number" default="10"} printed large on the front, paired with a {argument name="skirt color" default="light blue pleated mini skirt"}. Compose her seated three-quarter view in the foreground, one hand resting on her thigh and the other on the seat, with rows of empty and occupied blue stadium seats receding behind her, a green soccer field visible to the left, railings, distant spectators in matching blue-and-white outfits, and a large covered stadium roof with steel beams overhead. Use bright natural daylight, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, crisp facial detail, wide-angle smartphone-like perspective, vibrant sky-blue tones, and high-end editorial sports-fan photography style. Avoid text overlays, watermarks, extra logos beyond the jersey crest and number, distorted hands, or unrealistic anatomy.

zh.title: 阿根廷球迷体育场人像
zh.description: 一张照片级写实的体育场人像，主角为一名身着阿根廷风格 10 号球衣的时尚成年女性足球迷，适用于体育迷专题摄影。
zh.prompt: 创作一张照片级写实的竖构图人像，主角为一名坐在现代足球场蓝色塑料座椅上的成年日本女性，位置靠近球场，她正视镜头，带着自信而柔和的微笑。她留着 {argument name="hair style" default="及肩直发黑色波波头，侧分刘海"}，皮肤白皙细腻，妆容自然，外形精致如偶像。她身穿 {argument name="team jersey" default="阿根廷国家队天蓝色与白色条纹短款球衣"}，胸前可见明显的 AFA 风格队徽、三条肩带以及醒目的 {argument name="jersey number" default="10"} 号印花，搭配 {argument name="skirt color" default="浅蓝色百褶迷你裙"}。构图采用前景四分之三侧身坐姿，一只手放在大腿上，另一只手放在座椅上；背景是层层叠叠的空置与已占用的蓝色看台座椅，左侧可见绿色足球场、栏杆、远处身着蓝白配色服装的观众，以及上方带有钢梁的巨大体育场顶棚。采用明亮的自然光，浅景深，真实的织物纹理，清晰的面部细节，广角智能手机视角，鲜艳的天蓝色调，以及高端体育迷专题摄影风格。避免出现文字叠加、水印、除球衣队徽和号码外的额外标志、手部畸形或不符合人体解剖学的结构。

en.title: Rainy Subway Betrayal Scene
en.description: A cinematic prompt for generating a moody rainy Korean subway stairwell scene with a kissing couple and a lonely observer.
en.prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic anime-to-live-action scene in a Korean subway exit stairwell at night during heavy rain. The image shows exactly three characters: a young man and young woman kissing halfway down the stairs in the foreground, and a solitary young man standing at the top landing under a black umbrella in the background. The foreground man has short dark tousled hair with shaved sides, a loose wrinkled beige button-up shirt with sleeves rolled, oversized dark navy pants, and white sneakers; one hand is in his pocket as he leans down into the kiss. The foreground woman has long black hair, a fitted black top or jacket, a red plaid pleated skirt, sheer black tights, and glossy black high heels; she presses one hand to his chest while leaning upward. The background observer has pale silver hair, a dark oversized hoodie, dark shorts, and sneakers, holding the umbrella above him while facing the couple with a quiet, lonely expression. Set the scene on a wide gray stone staircase with metal handrails on both sides, beige tiled subway walls, warm wall lights along the steps, and wet reflective stair treads. At the top opening, show a rainy neon-lit city street with blue and pink blurred signs and visible rainfall. Add Korean subway signage: a black sign on the left reading “Exit” and a large “2”, with smaller Korean destination text, plus blue station information boards on the right wall. Use a dramatic symmetrical composition looking upward along the stairs, with the kissing couple slightly left of center and the observer centered at the top. Lighting should mix warm tunnel lamps with cool rainy city glow, creating a moody romantic noir atmosphere about betrayal, invisibility, and heartbreak. Ultra-detailed, cinematic depth of field, realistic textures, wet reflections, 16:9 horizontal frame. Customize as needed with {argument name="foreground man outfit" default="loose wrinkled beige button-up shirt, oversized dark navy pants, white sneakers"}, {argument name="foreground woman outfit" default="black top, red plaid pleated skirt, sheer black tights, glossy black high heels"}, {argument name="observer appearance" default="pale silver-haired young man in a dark oversized hoodie and shorts holding a black umbrella"}, {argument name="subway exit number" default="2"}, and {argument name="mood" default="lonely romantic betrayal in the rain"}.

zh.title: 雨中地铁背叛场景
zh.description: 一个电影感提示词，用于生成阴郁的雨中韩国地铁楼梯场景，包含一对接吻的情侣和一名孤独的观察者。
zh.prompt: 创建一个电影级、照片写实风格的从动漫到真人化的场景，背景为深夜大雨中的韩国地铁出口楼梯。画面中恰好有三个人物：前景中一对年轻男女正在楼梯半腰处接吻，背景上方平台处站着一名撑着黑伞的孤独青年。前景中的男子留着凌乱的深色短发，两侧剃短，穿着宽松褶皱的米色衬衫，袖子卷起，搭配深海军蓝阔腿裤和白色运动鞋；他一只手插在口袋里，俯身亲吻。前景中的女子留着黑色长发，穿着修身黑色上衣或夹克、红色格子百褶裙、黑色透明连裤袜和亮面黑色高跟鞋；她一只手按在男子的胸口，向上仰头。背景中的观察者留着苍白的银发，穿着深色大码连帽衫、深色短裤和运动鞋，撑着伞站在上方，面朝情侣，表情安静而孤独。场景设定在宽阔的灰色石阶上，两侧有金属扶手，墙壁为米色瓷砖，台阶旁有暖色壁灯，楼梯踏板湿润且带有反光。在顶部出口处，展示雨中霓虹闪烁的城市街道，带有蓝色和粉色的模糊招牌，可见明显的雨水。添加韩国地铁标识：左侧黑色标牌写着“Exit”和巨大的数字“2”，下方有较小的韩文目的地文字，右侧墙上挂着蓝色车站信息项目。采用戏剧性的对称构图，沿楼梯向上仰拍，接吻的情侣位于中心偏左，观察者位于顶部中心。灯光融合了隧道暖光与雨中城市的冷光，营造出关于背叛、被忽视和心碎的阴郁浪漫黑色电影氛围。超高细节，电影级景深，逼真质感，湿润反光，16:9 横屏比例。可根据需要使用以下参数自定义：{argument name="foreground man outfit" default="宽松褶皱米色衬衫，深海军蓝阔腿裤，白色运动鞋"}，{argument name="foreground woman outfit" default="黑色上衣，红色格子百褶裙，黑色透明连裤袜，亮面黑色高跟鞋"}，{argument name="observer appearance" default="银发青年，身穿深色大码连帽衫和短裤，手持黑伞"}，{argument name="subway exit number" default="2"} 以及 {argument name="mood" default="雨中孤独浪漫的背叛"}。

en.title: Skyborne Anime Biker in Ancient City
en.description: Generates an ornate anime fantasy poster of a young woman flying a decorated chopper motorcycle over a Mesoamerican-inspired city.
en.prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime fantasy illustration of {argument name="character name" default="April"}, a confident young woman riding a custom chopper motorcycle through the sky above a sunlit ancient Mesoamerican-style city. The composition is a dramatic low-angle view with the oversized front wheel dominating the lower left foreground, long chrome forks rising toward the center, high ape-hanger handlebars, a round headlamp, exposed engine, multiple polished exhaust pipes, ornate engraved gold-and-turquoise motorcycle bodywork, and the rear wheel partly visible under the rider. The rider has {argument name="hair color" default="light brown"} hair in a loose side ponytail with soft bangs, warm brown eyes, a faint smug smile, and a relaxed cross-armed pose while seated sideways. She wears an all-white decorated biker outfit: white jacket, loose white pants, wrapped white socks, dark shoes, and a long flowing white coat like a Japanese biker gang coat, covered with floral embroidery and vertical kanji-style lettering reading {argument name="coat text" default="明日天下"}. Behind her, tied to the motorcycle, place exactly 1 large transparent sack filled with many small dark metallic chunks, like rune metal ore. The motorcycle and rider appear airborne, backlit by a blazing sun directly behind the handlebars, with radiant beams, blue sky, puffy white clouds, and a distant fantasy city below. In the background include exactly 2 large stepped pyramid temples, many small city buildings, drifting dust or steam clouds, and exactly 6 red feather-like flying objects scattered in the lower sky. Frame the entire image with an ornate symmetrical border inspired by Aztec/Mayan motifs: gold, teal, and terracotta geometric patterns; exactly 2 stylized winged serpent/eagle creatures at the top left and top right corners; exactly 1 circular sun medallion centered at the top; exactly 1 circular emblem centered at the bottom; and decorative corner medallions. Use a luxurious illustrated poster style with intricate linework, warm golden highlights, reflective chrome, jewel-like ornamentation, cinematic lighting, dynamic perspective, and ultra-detailed anime rendering. Keep the mood triumphant, whimsical, and adventurous. No modern city skyline, no photorealistic faces, no extra riders, no extra motorcycles, no watermark.

zh.title: 古城中的 Skyborne 动漫机车少女
zh.description: 生成一张华丽的动漫奇幻海报，描绘一位年轻女性驾驶着装饰精美的重型机车，飞越一座受中美洲风格启发的城市。
zh.prompt: 创作一张细节极其丰富的竖版动漫奇幻插画，主角是 {argument name="character name" default="April"}，一位自信的年轻女性，正驾驶着一辆定制重型机车在阳光明媚的中美洲风格古城上空飞行。构图采用戏剧性的低角度视角，超大的前轮占据左下方前景，长长的镀铬前叉向中心延伸，配有高耸的猿吊式车把、圆形前大灯、外露引擎、多个抛光的排气管，以及饰有精美雕刻的金色和绿松石色机车车身，后轮在骑手下方隐约可见。骑手留着 {argument name="hair color" default="light brown"} 的头发，扎着松散的侧马尾，留着柔和的刘海，有着温暖的棕色眼睛，带着淡淡的自信微笑，侧身坐着，姿态轻松，双臂交叉。她穿着一身全白装饰风格的机车服：白色夹克、宽松的白裤子、包裹着的白色袜子、深色鞋子，以及一件像日本暴走族外套那样长而飘逸的白色大衣，上面绣满了花卉刺绣和垂直的汉字风格文字 {argument name="coat text" default="明日天下"}。在她身后，系在机车上的是 1 个巨大的透明袋子，里面装满了许多深色金属小块，看起来像符文金属矿石。机车和骑手处于飞行状态，背对着车把后方炽热的太阳，光芒四射，背景是蓝天、蓬松的白云和下方遥远的奇幻城市。背景中包含 2 座大型阶梯金字塔神庙、许多小型城市建筑、漂浮的尘埃或蒸汽云，以及散落在低空中的 6 个红色羽毛状飞行物。整张图片采用受阿兹特克/玛雅图案启发的华丽对称边框：金色、青色和赤陶色的几何图案；左上角和右上角各有 1 个风格化的带翼蛇/鹰生物；顶部中心有 1 个圆形太阳徽章；底部中心有 1 个圆形标志；以及装饰性的角落徽章。采用奢华的插画海报风格，线条细腻，金色高光温暖，镀铬反光，珠宝般的装饰，电影级光影，动态视角，以及超精细的动漫渲染。整体氛围保持胜利、奇幻且充满冒险感。不要出现现代城市天际线，不要出现照片级写实面孔，不要有多余的骑手，不要有多余的机车，不要有水印。

en.title: Cobalt Satin Fashion Portrait
en.description: A photorealistic editorial portrait prompt for creating a stylish woman in a cobalt satin blouse and pleated skirt in a warm rustic interior.
en.prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical fashion portrait of a confident young woman standing indoors in a warm, softly lit rustic studio. She has long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair swept over one shoulder, light blue-gray eyes, defined brows, natural glam makeup, and a subtle closed-mouth smile while looking directly at the camera. She wears a vivid cobalt blue satin corset-style blouse with a sweetheart neckline, lace-up front, fitted bodice, and long puff sleeves, paired with a high-waisted pale silver-gray pleated midi skirt. Add exactly 4 visible accessories: large gold hoop earrings, a delicate necklace with a small cross pendant, a thin bracelet, and a glossy cobalt blue structured handbag held by its top handle in her left hand. Pose her in a three-quarter waist-up-to-knees composition, one hand resting near the skirt, relaxed shoulders, elegant posture. Use warm golden rim light from behind and soft key light on her face, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, and a blurred neutral beige-brown interior background with rustic walls, a stool, ceramic decor, and dried grasses. The image should feel like a high-end editorial fashion photograph shot on an 85mm lens, realistic skin texture, rich satin highlights, crisp focus on the subject, vertical 2:3 framing, no text, no watermark.

zh.title: 钴蓝色缎面时尚人像
zh.description: 一个写实风格的编辑人像提示词，用于创作一位身着钴蓝色缎面衬衫和百褶裙、置身于温暖质朴室内环境中的时尚女性。
zh.prompt: 创作一张写实风格的竖版时尚人像，画面中是一位自信的年轻女性，站在室内温暖、柔和光线的质朴工作室中。她留着长波浪卷发，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"}，头发拨向一侧；有着浅蓝灰色的眼睛、轮廓分明的眉毛、自然精致的妆容，直视镜头时带着淡淡的闭口微笑。她身穿一件鲜艳的钴蓝色缎面紧身胸衣式衬衫，采用心形领口、前系带设计、修身剪裁和长泡泡袖，搭配一条高腰浅银灰色百褶中长裙。添加 4 个清晰可见的配饰：大号金质圆环耳环、带有小十字架吊坠的精致项链、细手链，以及左手提着的一款光泽感钴蓝色结构化手提包。构图采用四分之三腰部到膝盖的景别，一只手放在裙子附近，肩膀放松，姿态优雅。使用来自背后的温暖金色轮廓光和面部的柔和主光，浅景深，奶油般虚化的背景，模糊的米棕色中性室内背景，包含质朴的墙壁、凳子、陶瓷装饰和干草。画面应呈现出由 85mm 镜头拍摄的高端时尚杂志大片质感，皮肤纹理真实，缎面高光丰富，主体对焦清晰，竖版 2:3 构图，无文字，无水印。

en.title: Dying Composer Final Masterpiece
en.description: A cinematic dark historical illustration of an elderly composer writing sheet music in bed, surrounded by grief, madness, and musical symbolism.
en.prompt: Create a dark cinematic historical photomontage about {argument name="composer name" default="an 84-year-old dying composer"} writing his final masterpiece from a sickbed. Use a wide 16:9 canvas with painterly realism, chiaroscuro lighting, distressed textures, and a tragic romantic-classical music mood. Center the scene on an elderly white-haired man in a dark robe, seated or propped in bed, hunched over illuminated parchment sheet music, writing notes with a pen; his wrinkled face is sorrowful and focused, lit by a warm spotlight from above/front. Surround him with exactly 2 secondary figures: on the left, a shadowy insane husband-like man in a black suit with wild curly hair, clutching his head in anguish, partially obscured by red-black smoke and torn musical manuscript; on the right, a grieving middle-aged mother in profile, hands clasped near her mouth, looking down toward a cracked abyss-like stone path fading into mist. Add exactly 4 prominent visual motifs: scattered manuscript pages in the foreground, flowing golden musical staves and notes sweeping across the composition, blood-red ink/smoke splashes on the left and upper background, and a deep jagged crack splitting the ground on the right. The background should suggest an old bedroom with rumpled white sheets and worn walls, blending into abstract darkness. Color palette: near-black shadows, sepia parchment, warm candlelit gold, dirty gray stone, and dramatic crimson red. No readable modern text, no captions, no logos, no clean digital UI; keep it gritty, emotional, operatic, and high-detail like a dramatic album-cover or magazine feature illustration.

zh.title: 垂死作曲家的最后杰作
zh.description: 一幅充满电影质感的暗黑历史插画，描绘了一位年迈的作曲家在病榻上创作乐谱，四周弥漫着悲伤、疯狂与音乐象征主义。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅暗黑电影质感的历史照片蒙太奇，主题为 {argument name="composer name" default="一位 84 岁的垂死作曲家"} 在病榻上创作他最后的杰作。采用 16:9 宽画幅，呈现绘画般的写实风格、明暗对照法光影、做旧纹理，以及悲剧性的浪漫古典音乐氛围。画面中心是一位身穿深色长袍、满头白发的老人，他坐在或靠在床上，弓着身子在发光的羊皮纸乐谱上用笔书写音符；他布满皱纹的脸上写满了悲伤与专注，上方/前方投射下一束温暖的聚光灯。在他周围布置 2 个次要人物：左侧是一位身穿黑色西装、头发凌乱的疯狂男子，他痛苦地抱着头，部分被红黑色的烟雾和撕碎的乐谱遮挡；右侧是一位侧身站立、正在哀悼的中年母亲，她双手合十靠近嘴边，低头看向一条裂开的、通往深渊般的石径，石径逐渐隐没在迷雾中。添加 4 个显著的视觉主题：前景中散落的乐谱页、横跨整个画面的金色流动五线谱和音符、左侧及背景上方溅射的血红色墨迹/烟雾，以及右侧地面上一道深深的锯齿状裂缝。背景应暗示一个带有褶皱白床单和斑驳墙壁的旧卧室，并逐渐融入抽象的黑暗中。色调：近乎黑色的阴影、深褐色羊皮纸、温暖的烛光金、脏灰色石材以及戏剧性的深红色。画面中不得出现可辨认的现代文字、标题、Logo 或干净的数字 UI；保持粗粝、感性、歌剧般的质感，并具备如同戏剧性专辑封面或杂志专题插画般的高细节度。

en.title: Sunny Freckled Profile Portrait
en.description: Generates a soft realistic square profile portrait of a smiling freckled young woman for use as a warm, dreamy social media avatar.
en.prompt: Create a soft, sunny, dreamy square profile portrait of {argument name="character name" default="Ava"}, a young woman facing the camera with a warm natural smile. She has fair sun-kissed skin with many visible freckles across her nose, cheeks, and forehead, hazel-green eyes with detailed catchlights and subtle golden corona coloring, long natural eyelashes, softly defined brows with individual brow hairs, and realistic skin texture. Her hair is {argument name="hair color" default="light golden brown"}, parted in the center, worn loose and straight with slightly wavy ends, with many fine wispy flyaway hairs catching the light. She wears small gold hoop earrings and a white sleeveless lace-trimmed top with delicate ruffled lace straps and a square neckline. Frame as a close-up head-and-shoulders profile picture, centered and symmetrical, from upper chest to just above the head, looking directly into the lens. Use warm golden-hour sunlight from the front-left, gentle highlights on the cheeks and hair, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, and a dreamy pastel {argument name="background color" default="pale lavender"} studio backdrop with very subtle paper texture. Style should be highly realistic polished portrait photography, natural beauty editorial, soft but crisp facial detail, no heavy makeup, no text, no watermark, no extra people.

zh.title: 阳光雀斑风格肖像
zh.description: 生成一张柔和写实的方形个人肖像，展现一位面带微笑、长有雀斑的年轻女性，适合用作温暖梦幻的社交媒体头像。
zh.prompt: 创作一张柔和、阳光、梦幻的方形个人肖像，主角是 {argument name="character name" default="Ava"}，一位正对镜头、露出温暖自然微笑的年轻女性。她拥有白皙且被阳光亲吻过的肌肤，鼻梁、脸颊和额头上布满清晰可见的雀斑；榛绿色双眸中带有细腻的眼神光和淡淡的金色光晕，睫毛修长自然，眉毛轮廓柔和且根根分明，皮肤质感真实。她的发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="浅金棕色"}，中分发型，自然垂落且发尾微卷，许多细碎的发丝在光线下显得轻盈灵动。她佩戴着小巧的金质圆环耳饰，身穿白色无袖蕾丝边上衣，带有精致的荷叶边蕾丝肩带和方领设计。构图采用近景头像，居中且对称，范围从上胸部到头顶上方，直视镜头。光线采用来自左前方的温暖黄金时刻阳光，脸颊和头发上有柔和的高光，阴影自然，浅景深效果，背景为梦幻般的 {argument name="background color" default="淡紫色"} 摄影棚背景，带有极细微的纸张纹理。风格应为高度写实的精致肖像摄影，自然美妆大片，面部细节柔和而清晰，无浓妆，无文字，无水印，画面中无其他人。

en.title: Realistic Kitchen Portrait
en.description: Generates a lifelike vertical smartphone-style portrait of a young woman posing casually in a modern kitchen.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical smartphone photo of {argument name="character description" default="a young East Asian woman with long wavy dark brown hair"} standing in a modern minimalist kitchen at night, photographed from about mid-thigh upward. She is centered slightly left, leaning her right hand back on the white countertop while her left hand lightly holds a lock of hair near her shoulder, facing the camera with a calm neutral expression, soft lips, natural makeup, and direct eye contact. She wears {argument name="top color and style" default="a peach fitted spaghetti-strap camisole"}, {argument name="bottoms" default="high-waisted dark charcoal skinny jeans with white stitching"}, and a delicate small gold necklace. The kitchen has glossy cream-white upper cabinets with vertical seams, a black range hood strip, a pale backsplash, a white countertop, a black gas stovetop, a covered pale green pot on the right burner, a clear plastic cooking-oil bottle at the far right, and a black built-in oven below.
