Use warm indoor ceiling lighting with subtle reflections on cabinets and skin, realistic phone-camera perspective, slight wide-angle distortion, natural shadows, fine hair detail, authentic fabric texture, and a candid social-media snapshot feel. Keep the background tidy, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no exaggerated pose, and make the image look like a real unedited photograph.

zh.title: 写实厨房人像
zh.description: 生成一张年轻女性在现代厨房中随性摆拍的写实风格竖屏手机人像。
zh.prompt: 创作一张超写实的竖屏手机摄影照片，画面中 {argument name="character description" default="一位留着深棕色长波浪卷发的年轻东亚女性"} 站在夜晚的现代极简主义厨房中，取景范围从大腿中部向上。她位于画面偏左中心位置，右手向后撑在白色台面上，左手轻抚肩部附近的一缕头发，面向镜头，表情平静自然，双唇柔和，妆容清透，与镜头进行眼神交流。她身穿 {argument name="top color and style" default="一件桃粉色修身细肩带吊带衫"}，搭配 {argument name="bottoms" default="带有白色缝线的高腰深炭灰色紧身牛仔裤"}，并佩戴一条精致的小金项链。厨房配有带竖向接缝的亮面奶油白色吊柜、黑色抽油烟机条、浅色防溅板、白色台面、黑色燃气灶，右侧炉头上放着一个带盖的浅绿色锅，最右侧有一瓶透明塑料装的食用油，下方嵌入黑色烤箱。采用温暖的室内顶灯，在橱柜和皮肤上形成细腻的反光，呈现真实的手机拍摄视角、轻微的广角畸变、自然的阴影、精致的头发细节、真实的织物纹理，营造出社交媒体随拍的真实感。保持背景整洁，无文字，无水印，无多余人物，无夸张姿势，使图像看起来像一张未经修饰的真实照片。

en.title: Cozy Off-Shoulder Indoor Portrait
en.description: A photorealistic vertical portrait prompt for creating a warm, intimate indoor fashion shot of a young woman in a cream knit sweater on a vintage rattan chair.
en.prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of an adult {argument name="subject" default="young East Asian woman"} sitting indoors on an ornate vintage rattan cane-back chair. She has long, voluminous {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair swept to one side, smooth fair skin, large dark eyes, and a gentle subtle smile while looking directly into the camera. She wears an oversized cream-colored off-shoulder fuzzy knit sweater that slips below both shoulders, creating a soft cozy fashion portrait; one knee is raised close to the camera and her hands rest naturally near the sweater hem. Use warm ambient indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, soft cinematic glow, elegant boudoir-inspired but tasteful styling. Background: beige wall panels, a carved wooden chair frame with woven cane texture clearly visible on the left, dark gray curtains on the right with a thin strip of daylight near the floor, wooden floor and muted rug details blurred in the distance. Composition: vertical 9:16 smartphone-style framing, subject centered slightly right, face in the upper middle, knee and sweater filling the foreground, intimate close-range perspective, 85mm portrait lens feel, high-resolution natural photography, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted anatomy.

zh.title: 舒适露肩室内肖像
zh.description: 一个照片级写实的竖屏肖像提示词，用于创作一张温馨、亲密的室内时尚摄影，主角是一位身穿米色针织毛衣、坐在复古藤椅上的年轻女性。
zh.prompt: 创作一张照片级写实的竖屏肖像，主角是一位成年 {argument name="subject" default="年轻东亚女性"}，坐在室内的华丽复古藤编靠背椅上。她留着长而蓬松的 {argument name="hair color" default="黑色"} 头发，侧向一边，皮肤白皙光滑，有着深邃的大眼睛，直视镜头时带着温柔而微妙的微笑。她穿着一件超大号米色露肩毛绒针织毛衣，毛衣滑落至双肩以下，营造出一种柔和舒适的时尚肖像感；一只膝盖抬起靠近镜头，双手自然地放在毛衣下摆附近。使用温暖的室内环境光，浅景深，真实的皮肤质感，柔和的电影感光晕，优雅且不失品味的闺房风格造型。背景：米色墙板，左侧可见清晰的雕花木椅框架及藤编纹理，右侧为深灰色窗帘，地板附近有一条细微的自然光，远处的木地板和柔和的地毯细节呈现虚化效果。构图：9:16 竖屏手机风格构图，主体略微偏右居中，面部位于上方中间，膝盖和毛衣填充前景，亲密的近距离视角，85mm 肖像镜头感，高分辨率自然摄影，无文字，无水印，无额外人物，无畸形解剖结构。

en.title: Elven Treetop City
en.description: A cinematic high-fantasy prompt for generating a vast magical elven city suspended among giant rainforest trees.
en.prompt: Create an epic cinematic fantasy environment concept art scene of an ancient elven treetop city built into colossal rainforest trees, with {argument name="architecture style" default="ornate Art Nouveau elven Gothic architecture"}. Use a wide panoramic 16:9 composition viewed from an elevated wooden balcony and bridge in the foreground, looking across a deep misty forest valley. Show towering tree trunks supporting elegant suspended houses, domed teal-green roofs, stained-glass arched windows, gold filigree trim, carved wooden balconies, lanterns glowing warm amber, and multiple rope-and-wood suspension bridges spanning between trees. Include exactly 7 visible humanoid figures on the foreground walkway: four robed figures gathered on the left, one lone figure standing near the center railing facing the vista, and two smaller figures farther left near the bridge entrance. The scene should feature lush emerald foliage, hanging vines, blue-green magical light glowing from hollow tree openings, scattered purple bioluminescent plants, many distant waterfalls cascading through the forest, soft volumetric fog, and cool morning light filtering through the canopy. Make the mood awe-inspiring, serene, ancient, and magical, with extreme environmental detail, layered depth, atmospheric perspective, realistic textures, cinematic lighting, and ultra-detailed high-fantasy matte painting quality. Customize the setting as {argument name="fantasy city name" default="an elven forest citadel"}, the primary roof color as {argument name="roof color" default="deep turquoise patina"}, the lighting mood as {argument name="lighting mood" default="misty blue dawn with warm lantern glow"}, and the magical glow color as {argument name="magical glow color" default="cyan blue"}. No text, no logos, no modern objects, no sci-fi machinery.

zh.title: 精灵树顶之城
zh.description: 一个电影级的高奇幻提示词，用于生成一座悬浮在巨大雨林树木间的宏伟魔法精灵城市。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅史诗般的电影级奇幻环境概念艺术场景，描绘一座建在巨型雨林树木上的古老精灵树顶之城，建筑风格为 {argument name="architecture style" default="华丽的新艺术运动精灵哥特式建筑"}。采用 16:9 宽幅全景构图，视角从前景的木制阳台和桥梁出发，俯瞰深邃多雾的森林山谷。展示支撑着优雅悬空房屋的参天树干、青绿色圆顶屋顶、彩色玻璃拱窗、金色花丝装饰、雕花木阳台、散发着温暖琥珀色光芒的灯笼，以及连接树木之间、由绳索和木材制成的多座吊桥。在前景步道上清晰可见 7 个类人身影：左侧聚集着四个身穿长袍的身影，一个孤独的身影站在靠近中心护栏处眺望远景，另有两个较小的身影位于更左侧靠近桥梁入口处。场景应包含郁郁葱葱的翡翠色叶片、垂下的藤蔓、从树洞中透出的蓝绿色魔法光芒、散落的紫色生物发光植物、远处穿过森林倾泻而下的众多瀑布、柔和的体积雾，以及透过树冠过滤的清冷晨光。营造出令人敬畏、宁静、古老且充满魔法的氛围，具备极致的环境细节、分层的深度感、大气透视、逼真的纹理、电影级光影以及超精细的高奇幻绘景品质。自定义设置 {argument name="fantasy city name" default="一座精灵森林堡垒"}，主屋顶颜色为 {argument name="roof color" default="深青铜绿"}，光影氛围为 {argument name="lighting mood" default="带有温暖灯笼光芒的朦胧蓝色黎明"}，魔法光芒颜色为 {argument name="magical glow color" default="青蓝色"}。画面中不得包含任何文字、标志、现代物体或科幻机械。

en.title: Rabbit Racer Workflow Board
en.description: Generates a clean concept-art workflow board showing an anime cyberpunk character, her character sheet, and a matching futuristic motorcycle design.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean workflow presentation canvas showing how a futuristic anime character design is developed into a character sheet and then into a 3D sci-fi vehicle concept.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 light gray canvas with a subtle evenly spaced dotted grid background. Use lots of negative space and a modern design-board aesthetic.

Layout: Arrange exactly 4 main visual elements connected as a process. In the top-left, place a small black rounded-rectangle preview board containing exactly 3 vertical concept images: 1 small full-body pink-and-black character sketch on the left, 1 larger full-body white-haired character concept in the middle, and 1 dynamic close-up motorcycle/rider illustration on the right. In the lower-left, place a large rounded white card with a full-body character render. In the center, place a horizontal character turnaround/spec sheet. On the right, place a large rounded rectangular cinematic render of a futuristic motorcycle. Add faint thin gray connector lines/arrows flowing from the left character card to the central sheet and from the central sheet to the right vehicle render.

Subject details: The main character is {argument name="character name" default="Rabbit Racer"}, a stylized cyberpunk anime girl with spiky white hair, pink bunny-ear helmet or head fins, a cropped white-and-pink jacket with oversized sleeves, black leggings, pink armor accents, and chunky futuristic roller-skate boots. The design language is glossy pink, white, black, and dark gray, with sharp mecha details and racing motifs. The center spec sheet should show exactly 3 main full-body turnaround poses across the middle, plus smaller detail callouts for clothing, boots, accessories, color swatches, and vehicle miniatures. The right render shows a compact pink-and-white futuristic racing motorcycle with circular wheel housings, angular armor panels, black mechanical parts, decals, and a glossy cinematic studio-lit look.

Text content: Include the readable title {argument name="sheet title" default="RABBIT RACER"} on the central character sheet, with tiny technical labels and color chips that look like a professional model sheet; the small text can be mostly decorative and not fully readable.

Visual style: Polished AI concept-art workflow mockup, crisp digital illustration mixed with product-design presentation, soft shadows, rounded corners, high-resolution details, muted gray interface background, elegant spacing, no clutter.

Constraints: Keep the 4 main elements exactly as described, preserve the left-to-right workflow, avoid extra panels, avoid watermarks, avoid logos, and do not add large explanatory captions outside the character sheet.

zh.title: Rabbit Racer 项目
zh.description: 生成一个简洁的概念艺术工作流项目，展示动漫赛博朋克角色、角色设定图以及配套的未来感摩托车设计。
zh.prompt:
目标：创建一个简洁的工作流演示画布，展示未来感动漫角色设计如何从角色设定图演变为 3D 科幻载具概念。

画布：宽屏 16:9 浅灰色画布，带有精致且间距均匀的网格背景。利用大量留白，呈现现代设计项目的美感。

布局：排列 4 个核心视觉元素，形成清晰的流程。左上角放置一个黑色圆角矩形预览项目，内含 3 张垂直概念图：左侧为 1 张小型粉黑配色全身角色草图，中间为 1 张较大的白发角色概念图，右侧为 1 张动态的摩托车/骑手特写插画。左下角放置一张大型圆角白色卡片，展示全身角色渲染图。中心放置一张横向的角色三视图/规格表。右侧放置一张大型圆角矩形，展示未来感摩托车的电影级渲染图。添加细微的灰色连接线/箭头，从左侧角色卡片流向中心规格表，再从规格表流向右侧载具渲染图。

主体细节：主角为 {argument name="character name" default="Rabbit Racer"}，一位风格化的赛博朋克动漫少女，拥有尖刺状白发、粉色兔耳头盔或头鳍、短款白粉配色夹克配超大袖子、黑色紧身裤、粉色护甲装饰以及厚实的未来感轮滑靴。设计语言采用亮面粉色、白色、黑色和深灰色，融合锐利的机甲细节与赛车元素。中心规格表应在中间展示 3 个主要的全身三视图姿势，并辅以服装、靴子、配饰、色卡和载具缩略图的细节标注。右侧渲染图展示一辆紧凑型粉白配色未来感赛车摩托，配有圆形轮毂、棱角分明的装甲板、黑色机械部件、贴纸，并呈现出亮面电影级摄影棚灯光效果。

文字内容：在中心角色规格表上包含可读标题 {argument name="sheet title" default="RABBIT RACER"}，并配有类似专业模型图的微型技术标签和色块；小字部分主要起装饰作用，无需完全可读。

视觉风格：精致的 AI 概念艺术工作流样机，清晰的数字插画与产品设计演示相结合，柔和阴影，圆角设计，高分辨率细节，柔和的灰色界面背景，优雅的间距，无杂乱感。

约束条件：严格按照描述保留 4 个核心元素，保持从左到右的工作流顺序，避免添加额外面板，避免水印，避免 Logo，且不要在角色规格表外添加大段解释性文字。

en.title: Cinematic Underwater Atlantis City
en.description: Generates an epic fantasy underwater Atlantis cityscape suitable for concept art, wallpapers, or cinematic worldbuilding.
en.prompt: Create a wide cinematic fantasy underwater cityscape of {argument name="lost city name" default="Atlantis"}, seen from a slightly elevated viewpoint as if looking into an immense submerged valley. The scene shows a grand ancient palace complex with exactly 5 prominent domed structures: one huge central cathedral-like dome, two medium domes flanking it, one smaller dome in the left midground, and one smaller dome on the far right. Include exactly 2 tall spire towers rising behind the architecture, a long arched aqueduct bridge crossing the middle distance, and a stone avenue leading toward the central palace. Add exactly 4 prominent statues: a large sea-king statue on the right holding a trident, a robed statue on a pedestal near the left side of the avenue, a smaller central pedestal statue in the foreground, and a distant guardian statue near the palace entrance. Surround the ruins with coral reefs, seaweed, ancient columns, broken temples, glowing blue bioluminescent plants, and weathered stone covered in algae. Include marine life with exactly 3 large sharks in the upper water, one school of many tiny fish near the upper right, and one foreground school of 7 glowing blue fish in the lower left. Lighting is dramatic turquoise-blue underwater sunlight, with strong rays streaming down from the surface, volumetric haze, sparkling particles, caustic highlights, deep shadows, and a magical ancient-civilization mood. Use an ultra-detailed digital matte painting style, epic scale, realistic fantasy architecture, ornate domes, Baroque and classical ruins, rich teal/cyan palette with hints of gold and coral, high contrast, sharp foreground detail fading into misty depth. No text, no people, no modern objects, no frame or watermark. Aspect ratio 16:9.

zh.title: 电影级水下亚特兰蒂斯城
zh.description: 生成史诗般的奇幻水下亚特兰蒂斯城市景观，适用于概念艺术、壁纸或电影级世界观构建。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅宽屏电影级奇幻水下城市景观，展示 {argument name="lost city name" default="Atlantis"}，视角略微抬高，仿佛俯瞰巨大的海底峡谷。场景中包含一座宏伟的古代宫殿建筑群，且必须有 5 个显眼的圆顶结构：一个巨大的中央大教堂式圆顶，两侧各有一个中型圆顶，左侧中景有一个较小的圆顶，最右侧还有一个较小的圆顶。建筑后方矗立着 2 座高耸的尖塔，中景处有一座横跨的长拱形渡槽桥，一条石板大道通向中央宫殿。添加 4 座显眼的雕像：右侧一座手持三叉戟的海王大雕像，大道左侧基座上的一座长袍雕像，前景中央基座上的一座小型雕像，以及宫殿入口附近的一座远景守护者雕像。遗迹周围环绕着珊瑚礁、海藻、古老的圆柱、破碎的寺庙、发光的蓝色生物发光植物以及覆盖着藻类的风化岩石。加入海洋生物，水面上方有 3 条大鲨鱼，右上角有一群密集的微小鱼类，左下角前景处有一群 7 条发光的蓝色鱼类。光影为戏剧性的青蓝色水下阳光，强烈的阳光从水面倾泻而下，伴有体积雾、闪烁的微粒、焦散高光、深邃的阴影，营造出魔法般的古代文明氛围。采用超精细的数字绘景风格，史诗般的规模，写实的奇幻建筑，华丽的圆顶，巴洛克与古典遗迹，丰富的青色/蓝绿色调，点缀金色与珊瑚色，高对比度，前景细节锐利，向深处逐渐过渡为朦胧的景深。无文字，无人物，无现代物体，无边框或水印。长宽比 16:9。

en.title: Celestial Gothic Library
en.description: A wide cinematic fantasy scene of an ornate cosmic library-observatory filled with spiral staircases, glowing orbs, and galaxy-lit architecture.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic fantasy environment: a vast celestial library inside a gothic cathedral-like observatory, with towering dark wood bookshelves rising into immense vaulted arches and ornate bronze-gold filigree. The scene is a wide panoramic interior, viewed from floor level, with a polished black marble floor reflecting warm candlelight and flowing bands of blue starlight like a river of galaxies across the ground. Include exactly three prominent spiral staircases: one grand sweeping staircase on the right with glowing step lights, one central spiral staircase wrapping around a tall cylindrical book tower, and one smaller staircase on the left side. Add enormous arched windows opening directly onto outer space, showing nebula clouds, stars, planets, and a bright spiral galaxy outside the upper left window. Include exactly two glowing blue celestial orbs on pedestals or tables, and exactly two open illuminated books on the right foreground reading desk. The architecture should feel impossibly tall and layered, with balconies, bridges, circular platforms, carved railings, stained-glass domes, gold dust motes, soft volumetric sunbeams, and magical atmosphere. Use a rich palette of deep mahogany, antique gold, midnight blue, and luminous cosmic cyan. Style: epic high-fantasy concept art, hyperrealistic, intricate, atmospheric, sharp details, dramatic wide-angle composition, no people, no readable text, no watermark.

zh.title: 天穹哥特图书馆
zh.description: 一个宏大的电影级奇幻场景，展现了一座装饰华丽的宇宙图书馆兼天文台，内部充满了螺旋楼梯、发光球体以及星系光影交织的建筑结构。
zh.prompt: 创建一个超精细的电影级奇幻环境：一座位于哥特式大教堂风格天文台内的宏大天穹图书馆，高耸的深色木质书架延伸至巨大的拱顶，装饰着华丽的青铜金色花丝。场景为广角全景室内视角，从地面高度拍摄，抛光的黑色大理石地面反射着温暖的烛光，以及如银河之河般流淌在地面上的蓝色星光带。包含三个明显的螺旋楼梯：右侧一个宏伟的弧形楼梯，配有发光的台阶灯；一个环绕高大圆柱形书塔的中央螺旋楼梯；以及左侧一个较小的楼梯。添加巨大的拱形窗户，直接通向外太空，窗外可见星云、恒星、行星，左上方窗外可见一个明亮的螺旋星系。包含两个放置在底座或桌子上的发光蓝色天体球，以及右侧前景阅读桌上两本打开的、带有发光效果的书籍。建筑结构应显得极其高耸且层次分明，配有阳台、桥梁、圆形平台、雕花栏杆、彩色玻璃圆顶、金色的尘埃微粒、柔和的体积光束以及充满魔法的氛围。使用深红木色、古金色、午夜蓝和发光的宇宙青色组成的丰富色调。风格：史诗级高奇幻概念艺术，超写实，错综复杂，氛围感强，细节锐利，戏剧性的广角构图，无人物，无可见文字，无水印。

en.title: Vintage Rubber-Hose Cat Vaudeville
en.description: Generates a sepia black-and-white 1930s cartoon cat performer on a theatrical alley stage for vintage character art or poster-style scenes.
en.prompt: Create a square 1:1 black-and-white 1930s rubber-hose cartoon scene with faded sepia toning and aged film texture. Center a cheerful anthropomorphic tuxedo cat named {argument name="character name" default="Milo"} performing on a small wooden theater stage at night, drawn with thick hand-inked outlines, rounded limbs, white gloves, oversized oval eyes, a big open smile, pointed ears, whiskers, and a white belly and paws. The cat is in an exaggerated squash-and-stretch dance pose: one leg crossed forward, tail lifted behind, left arm raised high holding a straw boater hat with a dark band, right arm stretched outward in a welcoming gesture. The setting is an old vaudeville street-stage corner: wooden floorboards curve across the foreground, four glowing footlights line the front edge, heavy theater curtains and a decorative proscenium column frame the right side, and a framed poster leaning on the right reads “{argument name="poster text" default="MILO IN ONE NIGHT ONLY!"}” in large vintage serif lettering. In the background on the left, show a cobblestone alley with soft-focus old buildings, a tall ornate streetlamp, a small fire hydrant, and a hanging sign that reads “{argument name="alley sign text" default="PUDDLE ALLEY"}” with a small paw print. Use a monochrome palette of charcoal black, warm gray, cream highlights, and sepia stains; add organic film grain, dust flecks, subtle scratches, dark rounded-corner vignette, uneven cel-paint shading, and controlled line boil. Keep the composition charming, theatrical, hand-drawn, and authentically vintage; avoid modern CGI, glossy 3D rendering, bright color, clean vector edges, or contemporary typography.

zh.title: 复古橡胶管风格猫咪杂耍表演
zh.description: 生成一张 1930 年代复古黑白卡通猫咪在剧院小巷舞台上表演的棕褐色调图像，适用于复古角色艺术或海报风格场景。
zh.prompt: 创作一个 1:1 正方形的 1930 年代橡胶管风格黑白卡通场景，带有褪色的棕褐色调和老电影质感。画面中心是一位名叫 {argument name="character name" default="Milo"} 的欢快拟人化燕尾服猫咪，它正在夜晚的一个小型木制剧院舞台上表演。采用粗线条手绘轮廓，圆润的四肢、白色手套、超大的椭圆形眼睛、大大的露齿笑容、尖耳朵、胡须以及白色的腹部和爪子。猫咪呈现出夸张的“挤压与拉伸”舞蹈姿势：一条腿向前交叉，尾巴在身后翘起，左手高举着一顶带有深色饰带的草编平顶帽，右手向外伸展做出欢迎的姿态。背景是一个古老的杂耍街头舞台角落：木质地板在前景中弯曲，舞台前缘排列着四盏发光的脚灯，厚重的剧院幕布和装饰性的镜框式舞台柱子勾勒出右侧轮廓，右侧斜靠着的一张海报上用醒目的复古衬线字体写着“{argument name="poster text" default="MILO IN ONE NIGHT ONLY!"}”。左侧背景展示了一条鹅卵石铺成的小巷，配有柔焦的老建筑、一盏高大的华丽路灯、一个小消防栓，以及一个挂着的招牌，上面写着“{argument name="alley sign text" default="PUDDLE ALLEY"}”并带有一个小爪印。使用炭黑、暖灰、奶油色高光和棕褐色污渍组成的单色调色板；添加有机胶片颗粒、灰尘斑点、细微划痕、深色圆角晕影、不均匀的赛璐珞阴影以及受控的线条抖动效果。保持构图迷人、具有戏剧性、手绘感且真实复古；避免使用现代 CGI、光泽感 3D 渲染、鲜艳色彩、干净的矢量边缘或现代字体。

en.title: Cleopatra 1990s Animation Character Sheet
en.description: Creates a clean cel-animation style character turnaround sheet for Cleopatra with bust expressions and full-body costume views.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished character design turnaround sheet for {argument name="character name" default="Cleopatra"}, styled like a traditional hand-drawn 1990s animated feature production cel.

Canvas: Wide horizontal white studio background, clean presentation-sheet composition, no scenery, no labels, no watermark.

Layout: Arrange exactly 11 drawings of the same character in two rows. Top row: 5 bust/head studies showing these views and expressions from left to right: left profile with eyes closed and chin raised, three-quarter view looking to the side with a calm expression, front-facing neutral portrait, three-quarter downward glance with eyes closed, three-quarter upward smiling/talking expression. Bottom row: 6 full-body turnaround poses from left to right: front three-quarter standing with one arm bent, front standing with hand on hip, left side profile, rear three-quarter looking back, full back view holding the sheer cape outward, rear three-quarter/right side view. Keep all proportions and costume details consistent across every pose.

Subject details: Depict a young adult Egyptian queen with warm golden-brown skin, almond eyes with dramatic black eyeliner, arched brows, small nose, full lips, and a poised regal expression. She has a sleek blunt black bob haircut with straight bangs and a gold headband topped by a small upright cobra ornament with turquoise and red accents. Her jewelry includes large gold hoop-and-drop earrings, gold armbands, gold wrist cuffs, and a broad Egyptian collar necklace in gold, turquoise, lapis blue, and small red accents with a large oval blue gemstone at the center.

Costume: Elegant ancient Egyptian-inspired white linen sheath dress with a wrapped, draped silhouette, high side/front slit, gold belt with an oval blue jewel at the waist, a vertical gold-and-turquoise decorative panel hanging down the front, gold strappy sandals, and a translucent pale blue chiffon cape or veil draped from the arms and shoulders. Use {argument name="dress color" default="ivory white"}, {argument name="jewelry palette" default="gold, turquoise, lapis blue, and red"}, and {argument name="cape color" default="translucent pale blue"}.

Visual style: Flawlessly replicate 1990s hand-drawn cel animation: clean confident tapered ink-and-paint outlines, vibrant flat colors, subtle cel shadows, minimal gradients, expressive Disney-like facial construction, elegant simplified anatomy, crisp production art finish. Use {argument name="animation era" default="1990s traditional cel animation"} as the guiding aesthetic.

Constraints: Exactly 5 bust studies and exactly 6 full-body poses, evenly spaced on a white background. Maintain identical character design, hairstyle, jewelry, dress, and color palette in every view. Avoid photorealism, 3D rendering, painterly texture, text captions, extra characters, props, or background elements.

zh.title: Cleopatra 1990 年代动画角色设定集
zh.description: 为 Cleopatra 创建一套干净的赛璐珞动画风格角色转面图，包含半身表情和全身服装视图。
zh.prompt:
目标：为 {argument name="character name" default="Cleopatra"} 创建一套精致的角色设计转面图，风格参考 1990 年代传统手绘动画电影的制作赛璐珞。

画布：宽幅横向白色工作室背景，简洁的展示页构图，无场景，无标签，无水印。

布局：在两行中准确排列 11 个相同角色的绘图。顶行：5 个半身/头部研究，从左至右依次为：闭眼且下巴抬起的左侧面、侧视且表情平静的四分之三侧面、正面中性肖像、闭眼向下看的四分之三侧面、微笑/说话的四分之三向上侧面。底行：6 个全身转面姿势，从左至右依次为：单臂弯曲的正面四分之三站姿、叉腰的正面站姿、左侧面、回头看的背面四分之三侧面、向外展开透明披风的完整背面视图、背面四分之三/右侧视图。确保所有姿势中的比例和服装细节保持一致。

主体细节：描绘一位年轻的埃及女王，拥有温暖的古铜色皮肤、带有夸张黑色眼线的杏仁眼、拱形眉毛、小巧的鼻子、丰满的嘴唇以及从容高贵的表情。她留着利落的黑色齐肩波波头，带有直刘海，佩戴金色头带，头带上方饰有带绿松石和红色点缀的小型直立眼镜蛇装饰。她的珠宝包括大型金质圆环吊坠耳环、金质臂环、金质腕带，以及由金色、绿松石色、青金石蓝和少量红色点缀组成的宽大埃及领饰，中心镶嵌一颗大型椭圆形蓝色宝石。

服装：优雅的古埃及风格白色亚麻紧身裙，采用包裹式垂坠剪裁，高侧/前开叉，腰间配有镶嵌椭圆形蓝宝石的金腰带，正面垂挂垂直的金质与绿松石色装饰板，穿着金色系带凉鞋，手臂和肩部披挂半透明的淡蓝色雪纺披风或面纱。使用 {argument name="dress color" default="象牙白"}、{argument name="jewelry palette" default="金色、绿松石色、青金石蓝和红色"} 以及 {argument name="cape color" default="半透明淡蓝色"}。

视觉风格：完美复刻 1990 年代手绘赛璐珞动画：干净利落的锥形墨线与填色、鲜艳的平涂色彩、微妙的赛璐珞阴影、极简的渐变、富有表现力的迪士尼式面部结构、优雅简化的解剖比例、清晰的制作艺术成品感。以 {argument name="animation era" default="1990 年代传统赛璐珞动画"} 作为指导美学。

约束条件：准确绘制 5 个半身研究和 6 个全身姿势，在白色背景上均匀分布。在每个视图中保持相同的角色设计、发型、珠宝、服装和调色板。避免照片写实、3D 渲染、绘画质感、文字说明、额外角色、道具或背景元素。

en.title: Classic Animated Cleopatra Palace Still
en.description: A vintage 1990s hand-drawn animation style illustration of Cleopatra reclining regally in an Egyptian palace interior.
en.prompt: Create a high-end 2D animated illustration in a classic 1990s traditional hand-drawn animation style, resembling an official production still. Show {argument name="character name" default="Cleopatra"} as an elegant Egyptian queen lounging in a palace interior, shown from the waist up in a three-quarter view. She has warm tan skin, sleek straight {argument name="hair color" default="jet-black"} shoulder-length bob hair with blunt bangs, almond eyes with dramatic blue eye shadow and long black eyeliner, arched brows, and a poised, slightly aloof expression as she gazes upward to the left. She wears a white draped linen dress with a gold belt and oval blue gemstone clasp, a wide Egyptian collar necklace in gold, turquoise, and blue, large round gold hoop earrings with dangling bars, a gold cuff bracelet, a gold upper-arm snake bracelet, and a gold headband topped with a small cobra ornament. Her right arm rests along a teal-blue cushioned chaise or throne with gold trim and tassels, while a translucent pale blue shawl drapes across her arm and body. The palace background is softly painted with warm sandstone walls, faint Egyptian hieroglyphic reliefs and figures, a purple curtain tied with a gold tassel, and a decorative column with colorful lotus-like geometric patterns. Use soft cel shading, clean ink outlines, hand-painted watercolor backgrounds, warm golden lighting, subtle film-grain texture, and the polished look of a vintage animated feature. Keep the composition cinematic, elegant, and regal, with no modern objects, no text, and no watermark.

zh.title: 经典动画风格埃及艳后宫殿剧照
zh.description: 一幅 20 世纪 90 年代复古手绘动画风格的插画，描绘了埃及艳后在埃及宫殿内优雅斜倚的场景。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅 20 世纪 90 年代经典传统手绘动画风格的高端 2D 动画插画，呈现出官方动画剧照的质感。画面展示 {argument name="character name" default="Cleopatra"} 作为一位优雅的埃及女王，在宫殿内斜倚，采用半身四分之三侧面视角。她拥有温暖的棕褐色皮肤，柔顺笔直的 {argument name="hair color" default="乌黑色"} 及肩波波头，配有整齐的刘海；杏仁状的双眼画着夸张的蓝色眼影和长长的黑色眼线，眉毛高挑，神情从容且略带疏离，目光向上看向左侧。她身穿白色亚麻垂褶长裙，系着金色腰带，配有椭圆形蓝色宝石扣；佩戴由黄金、绿松石和蓝色宝石组成的宽大埃及领饰，大号圆形金质圆环耳环，下垂着金属条装饰；手臂上戴着金质袖口手镯和金质蛇形上臂环，头上戴着饰有小型眼镜蛇装饰的金质发带。她的右臂倚靠在带有金色饰边和流苏的青蓝色软垫躺椅或宝座上，一条半透明的浅蓝色披肩垂落在她的手臂和身体上。宫殿背景采用柔和的笔触绘制，墙壁呈温暖的砂岩色，带有淡淡的埃及象形文字浮雕和人物图案，一侧挂着由金色流苏系住的紫色窗帘，并有一根装饰着彩色莲花状几何图案的柱子。运用柔和的赛璐珞阴影、清晰的墨线轮廓、手绘水彩背景、温暖的金色光影、细腻的胶片颗粒质感，呈现出复古动画长片的精致观感。构图需保持电影感、优雅且庄重，画面中不得出现任何现代物品、文字或水印。

en.title: Studio Wall Lean Portrait
en.description: A portrait prompt for a man in a professional studio setting, emphasizing relaxed posture and clothing textures.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic 8K full-body portrait of the same man from the reference photo, wearing a {argument name="shirt" default="clean, pressed orange dress shirt"} with a turned-up collar and a small lapel microphone, {argument name="trousers" default="dark navy blue trousers"}, and polished brown dress shoes. He is casually and unpretentiously leaning against a {argument name="backdrop" default="smooth, light gray studio wall"}; his hands are in his pockets and one leg is crossed over the other, with relaxed and confident body language.

zh.title: 姿态放松的影棚肖像
zh.description: 一个简洁、超写实的肖像提示词，展示了一位身着正装、倚靠在影棚墙壁上的男士，强调肢体语言与专业布光。
zh.prompt: 参考照片中同一位男士的超写实 8K 全身肖像，身穿 {argument name="shirt color" default="干净挺括的橙色"} 礼服衬衫，领口翻起并佩戴小型领夹麦克风，搭配 {argument name="trouser color" default="深海军蓝"} 长裤和 {argument name="footwear" default="抛光棕色"} 正装皮鞋。他随意且自然地倚靠在平滑的 {argument name="wall color" default="浅灰色"} 影棚墙壁上；双手插兜，双腿交叠，展现出放松而自信的肢体语言。

en.title: Miniature Man Household Survival Collage
en.description: A cinematic macro prompt creating a 6-panel collage of a tiny man facing humorous survival challenges against giant household items.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic macro miniature photography, a {argument name="layout" default="6-panel vertical collage (2×3 grid)"} featuring the same {argument name="character" default="tiny stylized man"} in every panel. He is finger-sized, with a slightly oversized head, expressive exaggerated facial expressions, short dark hair, trimmed beard, {argument name="clothing" default="colorful Hawaiian shirt, yellow shorts, red sneakers"}. Every panel tells a different humorous survival story where ordinary household objects become enormous life-threatening obstacles. Hyper-realistic textures, shallow depth of field, dramatic cinematic lighting, warm color grading, ultra-detailed skin and fabric, realistic proportions, DSLR macro lens, 85mm macro photography, f/2.8, volumetric lighting, HDR, 8K, photorealistic, Pixar-level facial expression but realistic human textures, consistent character design across all panels. Scene 1 – Giant Iced Coffee: The tiny man desperately clings to the slippery rim of a gigantic iced coffee mug covered with water droplets while huge ice cubes float beside him and an oversized green straw towers above. His terrified expression suggests he's about to fall into the drink. Scene 2 – Toothpaste Disaster: Inside a bathroom, the tiny man struggles to hold an enormous wooden toothbrush like a spear while a giant toothpaste tube squeezes out a massive wave of toothpaste toward him like a slow avalanche. Scene 3 – Remote Control Hanging: The tiny man hangs desperately from the edge of a gigantic TV remote control suspended above a sofa. His legs swing in the air while a blurred television glows in the background and a bowl of popcorn sits nearby. Scene 4 – Fighting Time: The tiny man braces himself with both hands against the minute hand of a gigantic vintage alarm clock, pushing with all his strength as if trying to stop time. His face shows panic and determination. Scene 5 – Burger Battle: Standing beside an enormous juicy cheeseburger, the tiny man grips a kitchen knife almost his own height, preparing to attack the giant burger with an exaggerated heroic expression. Giant crumbs scatter across the wooden table. Scene 6 – Washing Machine Flood: The tiny man rides a small yellow rubber duck through raging soapy water pouring from the open door of a massive washing machine. He reaches one hand toward the viewer in terror while white foam splashes dramatically around him. Negative Prompt: low quality, blurry, cartoon, anime, CGI, duplicate character, inconsistent face, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, bad eyes, watermark, logo, text, oversaturated colors, flat lighting, unrealistic physics, cropped composition, low detail, noise, artifacts.

zh.title: 微缩人类家居生存拼贴画
zh.description: 一个电影级微距提示词，用于创作 6 宫格拼贴画，展示一个小人面对巨大化家居用品时的趣味生存挑战。
zh.prompt: 超写实电影级微距微缩摄影，一个 {argument name="layout" default="6 宫格垂直拼贴（2×3 网格）"}，每个面板中均包含相同的 {argument name="character" default="微型风格化小人"}。他只有手指大小，头部略大，表情夸张生动，留着深色短发和修剪整齐的胡须，穿着 {argument name="clothing" default="色彩鲜艳的夏威夷衬衫、黄色短裤、红色运动鞋"}。每个面板讲述一个不同的趣味生存故事，普通的家居用品变成了巨大的致命障碍。超写实纹理，浅景深，戏剧性电影光效，暖色调，超精细皮肤和织物细节，真实比例，DSLR 微距镜头，85mm 微距摄影，f/2.8，体积光，HDR，8K，照片级真实感，皮克斯级别的面部表情但具有真实的皮肤纹理，所有面板中角色设计保持一致。场景 1 – 巨型冰咖啡：小人绝望地抓着布满水珠的巨大冰咖啡杯湿滑边缘，巨大的冰块在他身边漂浮，超大的绿色吸管高耸入云。他惊恐的表情暗示他即将掉进饮料里。场景 2 – 牙膏灾难：在浴室里，小人努力握着一把巨大的木制牙刷当作长矛，而巨大的牙膏管正像缓慢的雪崩一样向他挤出海量牙膏。场景 3 – 遥控器悬挂：小人绝望地悬挂在沙发上方悬空的巨大电视遥控器边缘。他的双腿在空中摆动，背景中模糊的电视机发出光亮，旁边放着一碗爆米花。场景 4 – 时间之战：小人用双手抵住巨大复古闹钟的分针，用尽全力推着，仿佛试图阻止时间流逝。他的脸上写满了惊恐与决心。场景 5 – 汉堡大战：站在巨大的多汁芝士汉堡旁，小人握着一把几乎和他身高相当的厨房刀，带着夸张的英雄表情准备攻击巨型汉堡。巨大的面包屑散落在木桌上。场景 6 – 洗衣机洪水：小人骑着一只黄色小橡皮鸭，穿过从打开的巨大洗衣机门中涌出的汹涌肥皂水。他惊恐地向观众伸出一只手，周围溅起戏剧性的白色泡沫。负面提示词：低质量，模糊，卡通，动漫，CGI，重复角色，面部不一致，畸形解剖，多余肢体，手部缺陷，眼睛缺陷，水印，Logo，文字，色彩过饱和，平淡光效，物理效果不真实，构图裁剪，细节缺失，噪点，伪影。

en.title: Professional Office Wear Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating a realistic professional portrait featuring a crisp white shirt, burgundy accents, and a polka dot tie.
en.prompt: She wears a {argument name="shirt color" default="crisp white"} long-sleeve button shirt with a structured collar, stylish overall and suitable for office wear. The top buttons of the shirt are undone, revealing a {argument name="inner wear color" default="burgundy"} lace camisole underneath. She has a well-proportioned figure. A black tie {argument name="tie pattern" default="dotted with evenly spaced white polka dots"} hangs loosely around her neck and drapes down the front of her shirt. She sports a silver wristwatch on her wrist and delicate earrings that catch and reflect the ambient light. The textures of the clothing are extremely realistic, including the smooth cotton fabric of the shirt, intricate lace details and the patterned tie

zh.title: 职业办公装肖像
zh.description: 一个用于生成逼真职业肖像的详细提示词，包含挺括的白衬衫、酒红色点缀和波点领带。
zh.prompt: 她穿着一件 {argument name="shirt color" default="挺括的白色"} 长袖衬衫，领口挺括，整体风格时尚，适合办公穿着。衬衫最上面的扣子解开，露出里面 {argument name="inner wear color" default="酒红色"} 的蕾丝吊带。她身材比例匀称。一条黑色领带 {argument name="tie pattern" default="带有均匀分布的白色波点"} 松散地挂在脖子上，垂在衬衫前襟。她手腕上戴着一块银色腕表，精致的耳环捕捉并反射着环境光。服装质感极其逼真，包括衬衫平滑的棉质面料、精细的蕾丝细节以及带有图案的领带。

en.title: Realistic European Castle Selfie
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating realistic iPhone-style selfie photos of a woman at a European lakeside castle during golden hour.
en.prompt: Selfie-style photo, young woman with wavy brown bob, warm golden hour light, cream ribbed off-shoulder crop top, plaid pleated mini skirt, layered gold necklaces, standing by a lake with a European castle blurred in background, candid genuine laughing smile, direct eye contact with camera, slight motion blur in hair from turning, shallow depth of field, shot on iPhone 15 Pro selfie lens, natural skin texture, warm color grade, 4:5 vertical crop --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6 Selfie-style photo, young woman with wavy brown bob, shot from slightly below looking up, arm extended toward camera creating dynamic foreshortening, plaid mini skirt and cream crop top, hair caught mid-flip by wind, castle and lake softly blurred behind, golden hour rim light on hair, playful confident expression, direct eye contact, candid energy, natural skin texture, shot on iPhone selfie lens --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6 Selfie-style photo mid-stride walking along a lakeside path, young woman with wavy brown bob, plaid pleated skirt flowing with movement, cream crop top, one hand holding phone extended, other arm swinging naturally, genuine surprised laugh as if caught off guard, motion blur on skirt and background trees, golden hour backlight creating hair glow, castle silhouette in distance, cinematic candid feel --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6

zh.title: 写实欧洲城堡自拍
zh.description: 一份详细的提示词，用于生成女性在黄金时刻于欧洲湖畔城堡拍摄的写实 iPhone 风格自拍照片。
zh.prompt: 自拍风格照片，年轻女性，棕色波浪短发，温暖的黄金时刻光线，米色罗纹露肩短上衣，格子百褶迷你裙，叠戴金色项链，站在湖边，背景是模糊的欧洲城堡，自然大笑的表情，直视镜头，转头时头发带有轻微运动模糊，浅景深，使用 iPhone 15 Pro 自拍镜头拍摄，自然的皮肤纹理，暖色调，4:5 竖构图 --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6 自拍风格照片，年轻女性，棕色波浪短发，从下方仰拍，手臂向镜头延伸形成动态透视，穿着格子迷你裙和米色短上衣，头发被风吹起，城堡和湖泊在背景中柔和模糊，黄金时刻的轮廓光照亮头发，俏皮自信的表情，直视镜头，自然的抓拍感，使用 iPhone 自拍镜头拍摄 --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6 自拍风格照片，在湖畔小径上行走，年轻女性，棕色波浪短发，格子百褶裙随动作飘动，米色短上衣，一只手拿着手机伸出，另一只手臂自然摆动，仿佛被抓拍到时的自然惊喜大笑，裙子和背景树木带有运动模糊，黄金时刻的逆光营造出头发光晕，远处的城堡剪影，电影般的抓拍感 --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6

en.title: Pastoral Ranch Portrait
en.description: A realistic medium shot of a woman in a sheer blouse and high-waisted shorts set against a rural ranch background with natural afternoon light.
en.prompt: A woman, firm e cup, with gently curved eyebrows and a warm, sweet smile wears a {argument name="blouse color" default="pale ivory-pink sheer"} blouse. It features delicate vertical stripes and a soft sheen, with a thin black ribbon at the collar. {argument name="bottoms" default="Charcoal gray high-waisted shorts"}, barefoot, with black patent leather platform heels. Her legs extend diagonally toward the lower left of the frame, with her ankles naturally close together. On the right side of the frame, her arm hangs naturally back from the side of her body, elbow slightly bent. The base of her palm rests on a yellow horizontal tube, palm facing down. Her four fingers are aligned together, moving along the curve of the tube, with fingertips slightly curved to touch the tube's surface. Her thumb wraps around to the other side of the tube, not gripping tightly, lightly supporting part of her body weight. Her other hand is hidden behind her body, out of sight. Natural light falls diagonally from the right front—soft, bright afternoon sunlight over a {argument name="background" default="pastoral ranch"}. The background is a rural ranch scene—white wooden fencing, a few oak trees scattered in the distance, a corner of a red barn, and rolling green hills under a blue sky with white clouds. Medium shot, eye-level perspective.

zh.title: 田园牧场肖像
zh.description: 一张写实的中景照片，展现了一位身穿透视衬衫和高腰短裤的女性，背景为乡村牧场，伴有午后的自然光。
zh.prompt: 一位女性，身材丰满，眉毛微弯，带着温暖甜美的笑容，身穿 {argument name="blouse color" default="淡象牙粉色透视"} 衬衫。衬衫带有精致的竖条纹和柔和的光泽，领口系着一条细黑丝带。{argument name="bottoms" default="炭灰色高腰短裤"}，赤脚，穿着黑色漆皮厚底高跟鞋。她的双腿向画面左下方斜向延伸，脚踝自然并拢。在画面右侧，她的手臂从身体一侧自然下垂，手肘微屈。手掌根部支撑在一根黄色的水平管状物上，掌心向下。四根手指并拢，沿着管子的弧度移动，指尖微曲触碰管子表面。大拇指绕到管子的另一侧，没有用力抓握，而是轻柔地支撑着部分身体重量。另一只手隐藏在身后，不可见。自然光从右前方斜射而来——柔和明亮的午后阳光洒在 {argument name="background" default="田园牧场"} 上。背景为乡村牧场场景——白色木栅栏、远处零星的橡树、红谷仓的一角，以及蓝天白云下起伏的绿色山丘。中景，平视视角。

en.title: Cinematic Studio Red Background Portrait
en.description: A high-fashion editorial portrait prompt that uses a reference image to maintain subject likeness while creating a moody, smoke-filled studio scene.
en.prompt:
Use the uploaded reference image for the subject's facial features, hairstyle, beard, skin tone, facial expression, tattoos, body proportions, pose, and overall likeness. Preserve the identity and expression from the reference image while applying all other elements described in the prompt. Do not alter the face unless explicitly instructed.
A cinematic studio portrait of a {argument name="subject look" default="stylish young man with thick, messy black hair and a well-groomed beard"}, sitting casually on a black folding chair. He is leaning back with his head tilted upward and eyes closed, exhaling a dramatic cloud of smoke that swirls artistically above him. He wears a fitted white dress shirt with the top buttons open, revealing intricate black tattoos across his neck, chest, and forearms, paired with tailored black trousers and a black belt. The background is a {argument name="background color" default="seamless deep crimson red"} with {argument name="lighting" default="moody red lighting"}, creating a bold, high-fashion editorial look. Strong rim lighting, high contrast, ultra-realistic skin texture, sharp focus, volumetric smoke, dramatic shadows, luxury magazine photography, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, HDR, 8K, highly detailed, cinematic color grading.

zh.title: 电影感影棚红色背景人像
zh.description: 一个高定时尚风格的人像提示词，通过参考图保持主体相似度，同时营造出充满烟雾的电影感影棚氛围。
zh.prompt:
请使用上传的参考图作为主体面部特征、发型、胡须、肤色、面部表情、纹身、身体比例、姿势及整体相似度的依据。在应用提示词中描述的所有其他元素的同时，保留参考图中的身份和表情。除非明确要求，否则请勿更改面部。
一张电影感影棚人像，主体为 {argument name="subject look" default="一位留着浓密凌乱黑发、胡须修剪整齐的时尚年轻男子"}，随意地坐在一张黑色折叠椅上。他向后靠着，头部微微仰起，双眼紧闭，呼出一团戏剧性的烟雾，在上方艺术般地缭绕。他穿着一件合身的白色衬衫，领口扣子解开，露出颈部、胸部和前臂上精致的黑色纹身，搭配修身黑色长裤和黑色腰带。背景为 {argument name="background color" default="无缝深绯红色"}，配以 {argument name="lighting" default="情绪化的红色灯光"}，营造出大胆的高定时尚视觉效果。强烈的轮廓光，高对比度，超逼真的皮肤质感，焦点清晰，体积感烟雾，戏剧性阴影，奢华杂志摄影，85mm 镜头，浅景深，HDR，8K，高度细节，电影级调色。

en.title: Multi-Expression Portrait Collage
en.description: Generates a 2x2 collage of a subject with four different facial expressions in a clean studio setting.
en.prompt: A studio portrait of the {argument name="subject description" default="same beautiful young woman with long wavy dark hair, straight bangs, striking blue eyes"}, wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="white graphic T-shirt, a silver necklace, and a wristwatch"}, against a {argument name="background color" default="solid blue seamless background"}. Four different expressions: surprised with hands on cheeks, "shh" gesture with finger on lips, thoughtful pose with hands under chin, and a calm neutral pose touching her hair. Arranged in a clean 2×2 collage, soft studio lighting, centered composition, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, natural skin texture, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, high-end editorial photography, 8K.

zh.title: 多表情肖像拼贴
zh.description: 在简洁的摄影棚背景下，生成一张包含四种不同面部表情的 2x2 人像拼贴图。
zh.prompt: 一张摄影棚人像，主体为 {argument name="subject description" default="一位留着深色长波浪卷发、齐刘海、拥有迷人蓝眼睛的年轻美女"}，身穿 {argument name="clothing" default="白色印花 T 恤，佩戴银色项链和手表"}，背景为 {argument name="background color" default="纯蓝色无缝背景"}。包含四种不同表情：双手托腮的惊讶表情、手指抵唇的“嘘”动作、双手托下巴的沉思姿态，以及轻触头发的平静中性表情。以简洁的 2×2 拼贴形式排列，柔和的摄影棚灯光，居中构图，照片级真实感，超精细细节，自然的皮肤纹理，85mm 镜头，浅景深，高端杂志摄影风格，8K 分辨率。

en.title: Golden Hour Street Portrait
en.description: A cozy autumn street portrait prompt featuring a woman in an oversized hoodie with warm, cinematic lighting.
en.prompt:
Beautiful young woman with long flowing black hair, wearing {argument name="clothing" default="an oversized cream-white hoodie"}, standing on a {argument name="location" default="quiet urban street"} during {argument name="lighting" default="golden hour"}. She smiles softly with eyes closed, arms stretched wide in a carefree pose, wind blowing through her hair. Warm sunlight creates a glowing rim light around her face and hair, candid lifestyle photography, natural happiness, cozy autumn atmosphere, fallen leaves on the road, small local shops and a cyclist in the background, shallow depth of field, soft cinematic colors, realistic skin texture, high detail, dreamy mood, ultra-realistic portrait, street photography, 85mm lens, f/1.8, bokeh, HDR, 8K quality.
Negative Prompt:
blurry, low resolution, extra fingers, distorted hands, bad anatomy, duplicate limbs, overexposed highlights, oversaturated colors, artificial skin, heavy makeup, watermark, text, logo, cropped face, motion blur, noise, cartoon, CGI, unrealistic proportions

zh.title: 黄金时刻街头人像
zh.description: 一个温馨的秋季街头人像提示词，主角身穿超大款连帽衫，配以温暖的电影感光效。
zh.prompt:
美丽的年轻女性，留着飘逸的长黑发，身穿 {argument name="clothing" default="一件超大款米白色连帽衫"}，站在 {argument name="location" default="安静的城市街道"} 上，正值 {argument name="lighting" default="黄金时刻"}。她闭着双眼，温柔地微笑着，双臂舒展，姿态从容，微风吹拂着她的秀发。温暖的阳光在她的脸庞和发丝周围勾勒出明亮的轮廓光，抓拍生活照，自然的幸福感，温馨的秋日氛围，路面散落着落叶，背景中有小型本地商店和一名骑行者，浅景深，柔和的电影色调，真实的皮肤纹理，高细节，梦幻氛围，超写实人像，街头摄影，85mm 镜头，f/1.8，焦外成像，HDR，8K 画质。
负面提示词：
模糊，低分辨率，多余的手指，手部变形，解剖结构错误，肢体重复，高光过曝，色彩过饱和，人造皮肤，浓妆，水印，文字，Logo，面部裁剪，运动模糊，噪点，卡通，CGI，比例不协调

en.title: Ultra-Realistic Smartphone Selfie
en.description: A prompt designed to mimic the aesthetic of a candid smartphone selfie with natural lighting and a passenger seat car interior setting.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie, looks genuinely captured with a mobile phone, not a DSLR or AI render. A {argument name="subject details" default="beautiful young East Asian woman with fair porcelain skin, soft ash-brown shoulder-length hair"}, loose face-framing strands partially covering one eye, large brown eyes, natural Korean makeup with soft pink blush and glossy rosy lips. Wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="bright royal blue vintage-style football jersey with white accents"}, casual sporty aesthetic, and small silver stud earrings. Sitting in the {argument name="setting" default="front passenger seat of a modern car during a sunny afternoon"}, looking directly into the phone camera with a calm, confident expression. Bright natural sunlight streams through the car window, creating soft highlights on her hair and realistic shadows across her face. Car interior with black leather seats and blue sky visible through the window. Slight handheld framing, authentic front-camera perspective, natural phone HDR, realistic skin texture, fine hair strands, subtle digital noise, candid lifestyle aesthetic, Instagram-style selfie, high detail, photorealistic, looks like an unedited iPhone/mobile camera photo, no studio lighting, no watermark, no text, no logos, no AI-generated look.

zh.title: 超写实智能手机自拍
zh.description: 一个旨在模拟自然光线下、汽车副驾驶座内景中抓拍风格智能手机自拍的提示词。
zh.prompt: 超写实智能手机自拍，看起来像是用手机真实拍摄的，而非单反相机或 AI 渲染。一位 {argument name="subject details" default="美丽的东亚年轻女性，拥有白皙如瓷的皮肤，柔软的灰棕色齐肩发"}，几缕发丝自然垂落在脸颊旁，部分遮住了一只眼睛，大大的棕色眼睛，精致的韩式自然妆容，带有淡淡的粉色腮红和水润的玫瑰色嘴唇。身穿 {argument name="clothing" default="明亮的宝蓝色复古风格足球衫，带有白色装饰"}，休闲运动风，佩戴小巧的银色耳钉。坐在 {argument name="setting" default="阳光明媚的午后，现代汽车的副驾驶座上"}，神情平静而自信地直视手机镜头。明亮的自然阳光透过车窗洒入，在她的头发上形成柔和的高光，并在脸上投下真实的阴影。车内为黑色真皮座椅，窗外可见蓝天。轻微的手持构图，真实的前置摄像头视角，自然的手机 HDR，真实的皮肤纹理，细致的发丝，轻微的数字噪点，随性的生活方式美学，Instagram 风格自拍，高细节，照片级真实，看起来像未经编辑的 iPhone/手机拍摄照片，无影棚灯光，无水印，无文字，无 Logo，无 AI 生成感。

en.title: Ultra Realistic Train Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating photorealistic portraits on a modern train while maintaining strict identity from a reference image.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic photorealistic portrait of the same woman from the reference image, preserving her exact facial features, identity, face shape, skin tone, proportions, and unique characteristics with complete accuracy. Do not alter, beautify, reshape, or change her face in any way. She is leaning casually against the interior wall of a {argument name="setting" default="modern train"}, looking directly into the camera with a natural, relaxed expression. She wears a {argument name="outfit top" default="minimal beige crewneck cotton t-shirt"} tucked into a {argument name="outfit bottom" default="high-waisted light-wash blue denim midi skirt"}. Her casual outfit is complemented by white crew socks and clean white platform sneakers. She stands beside a large train window revealing a softly blurred rural landscape passing outside under gentle daylight. The train interior is modern, clean, and minimal, creating a warm, aesthetic, and peaceful atmosphere. Natural posture, authentic body proportions, realistic fabric textures, subtle environmental reflections on the window, and lifelike details throughout. Shot with a 35mm lens, natural soft daylight, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the subject, ultra-detailed skin texture, realistic lighting, professional travel-lifestyle photography, photorealistic, 8K resolution. Preserve the exact identity of the reference woman.

zh.title: 超写实火车人像
zh.description: 一份用于在现代火车场景中生成照片级真实人像的详细提示词，同时确保严格保持参考图像中的人物身份特征。
zh.prompt: 参考图像中同一位女性的超写实照片级人像，需精准保留其面部特征、身份、脸型、肤色、比例及独特细节。严禁以任何方式修改、美化、重塑或改变其面部。她正随意地倚靠在 {argument name="setting" default="现代火车"} 的内壁上，神情自然放松，直视镜头。她身穿一件 {argument name="outfit top" default="极简米色圆领纯棉 T 恤"}，下搭一条 {argument name="outfit bottom" default="高腰浅蓝色牛仔中长裙"}。休闲的装束搭配白色中筒袜和干净的白色厚底运动鞋。她站在巨大的火车窗旁，窗外是柔和模糊的乡村景观，在温和的日光下飞速掠过。火车内部现代、整洁且极简，营造出温暖、美观且宁静的氛围。姿态自然，身体比例真实，织物纹理逼真，窗户上有微妙的环境反射，处处细节栩栩如生。使用 35mm 镜头拍摄，自然柔和日光，电影级构图，浅景深，主体对焦清晰，超细腻皮肤纹理，真实光影，专业旅行生活方式摄影，照片级真实，8K 分辨率。必须严格保持参考女性的身份特征。

en.title: Joseon Dynasty Sketch Reality Split
en.description: A split composition prompt transitioning from a traditional Joseon ink sketch to a photorealistic portrait.
en.prompt: Create a split composition. Left side: an elegant ink sketch of a {argument name="subject" default="Korean woman from the Joseon Dynasty"} wearing a beautiful hanbok with floral hair ornaments. Right side: the same woman as an ultra-realistic portrait in a traditional Joseon village at sunset. Seamless sketch-to-reality transition, cinematic lighting, watercolor paper texture, highly detailed, masterpiece, 9:16.

zh.title: 朝鲜王朝素描与现实对比
zh.description: 一个从传统朝鲜水墨素描过渡到超写实肖像的分割构图提示词。
zh.prompt: 创建一个分割构图。左侧：一幅优雅的水墨素描，描绘了一位 {argument name="subject" default="朝鲜王朝时期的韩国女性"}，身着美丽的韩服，头戴花卉发饰。右侧：同一位女性的超写实肖像，背景为日落时分的传统朝鲜村庄。素描到现实的无缝过渡，电影级光影，水彩纸质感，高度细节，杰作，9:16。

en.title: Korean Style Mobile Selfie
en.description: Generates a highly authentic smartphone selfie featuring an East Asian woman in a studio setting with mobile-camera imperfections.
en.prompt: Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie, genuinely captured with a modern mobile phone, not a DSLR or AI render. A beautiful {argument name="ethnicity" default="young East Asian woman"} with fair porcelain skin, long silky dark brown hair cascading naturally over her shoulders, soft wispy face-framing strands, large expressive brown eyes, natural Korean makeup with subtle blush and glossy peach-pink lips. She is wearing a {argument name="dress" default="delicate white ruched camisole dress"} with a {argument name="cardigan" default="soft pastel pink knitted cardigan"} draped loosely over her shoulders. Around her neck are a white pearl choker featuring a small golden heart pendant and a delicate gold necklace with a matching heart charm. She is standing inside a professional photography studio with a clean seamless blue backdrop that fills the entire frame. The composition is a close-up smartphone selfie with the phone held at arm’s length, slightly above eye level. She is looking slightly to the side rather than directly at the camera, displaying a gentle, dreamy expression. The studio environment is minimal and distraction-free, with complete focus on her face and upper body. Soft diffused studio lighting illuminates her features evenly, creating flattering highlights in her eyes and subtle dimension on her face while maintaining a realistic smartphone-camera appearance. Sharp focus on her face, eyes, hair, and jewelry, with the blue background remaining smooth and unobtrusive. Authentic mobile HDR processing, natural skin texture, visible pores, fine hair strands, slight handheld framing imperfections, subtle smartphone digital noise, realistic color rendition, candid social-media aesthetic, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, looks exactly like an unedited iPhone/mobile front-camera selfie.

zh.title: 韩系手机自拍
zh.description: 生成一张极具真实感的智能手机自拍，展现一位东亚女性在摄影棚环境下的照片，并带有手机拍摄的自然瑕疵。
zh.prompt: 超写实智能手机自拍，由现代手机真实拍摄，非单反相机或 AI 渲染。一位美丽的 {argument name="ethnicity" default="年轻东亚女性"}，拥有白皙如瓷的肌肤，深棕色丝滑长发自然垂落在肩头，几缕轻盈的发丝修饰着脸庞，明亮动人的棕色双眸，精致的韩系妆容，配以淡雅的腮红和水润的桃粉色双唇。她身穿一件 {argument name="dress" default="精致的白色褶皱吊带裙"}，肩上随意披着一件 {argument name="cardigan" default="柔和的淡粉色针织开衫"}。颈间佩戴着一条白色珍珠项圈，中间点缀着一颗金色小爱心吊坠，以及一条与之呼应的精致金色心形项链。她站在专业的摄影棚内，背景是纯净无缝的蓝色，填满整个画面。构图为近景手机自拍，手机由手臂伸长持握，略高于视线水平。她目光微微看向侧方而非直视镜头，流露出温柔梦幻的神情。摄影棚环境极简且无干扰，焦点完全集中在她的面部和上半身。柔和的漫射摄影棚灯光均匀地照亮她的五官，在眼中形成迷人的高光，并为面部增添微妙的立体感，同时保持了真实的手机拍摄质感。面部、眼睛、发丝和首饰焦点清晰，蓝色背景平滑自然。具备真实的手机 HDR 处理效果、自然的皮肤纹理、可见的毛孔、细微的发丝、轻微的手持构图瑕疵、细微的手机数字噪点、真实的色彩还原，呈现出地道的社交媒体审美，照片级真实，细节丰富，看起来就像未经修饰的 iPhone 或手机前置摄像头自拍。

en.title: Minimalist Half-Face Graphite Sketch
en.description: An ethereal graphite pencil sketch prompt focusing on a single eye and hair that transitions into smoke and wisps.
en.prompt: Use the uploaded image as the ONLY facial reference with strict identity preservation. Create an ultra-realistic {argument name="style" default="graphite pencil sketch"} showing only one half of the face, positioned slightly off-center with the rest naturally fading into a clean {argument name="background color" default="white background"}. Preserve the subject's exact facial structure, proportions, skin tone, lips, nose, eyelashes, and unique identity. The visible eye is gently closed, the lips are slightly parted, and the facial edges dissolve softly into the paper. The hair flows dramatically into elegant smoke-like wisps and airy graphite strands, extending upward and outward with graceful movement, blending seamlessly into the white space. Use ultra-fine pencil strokes, realistic graphite texture, smooth tonal gradients, delicate cross-hatching, and deep black values in the hair for strong contrast. Maintain a minimalist fine-art composition with abundant negative space, no background elements, no accessories, no text, no color, and no frame. The artwork should feel dreamy, ethereal, emotional, and unfinished in a refined gallery-quality style.

zh.title: 极简半脸石墨素描
zh.description: 一幅空灵的石墨铅笔素描提示词，聚焦于单眼，发丝过渡为烟雾与缕缕轻烟。
zh.prompt: 仅使用上传的图像作为面部参考，严格保持人物特征。创作一幅超写实的 {argument name="style" default="石墨铅笔素描"}，仅展示半张脸，位置略微偏离中心，其余部分自然淡入干净的 {argument name="background color" default="白色背景"} 中。保留主体确切的面部结构、比例、肤色、嘴唇、鼻子、睫毛和独特的个人特征。可见的眼睛轻轻闭合，嘴唇微张，面部边缘柔和地融入纸面。头发戏剧性地流动，化作优雅的烟雾状缕缕轻烟和轻盈的石墨线条，向上和向外延伸，带有优美的动感，与留白无缝融合。使用超细铅笔笔触、逼真的石墨质感、平滑的色调渐变、细腻的交叉排线，并在头发处使用深黑色以形成强烈的对比。保持极简的艺术构图，留有充足的负空间，无背景元素，无配饰，无文字，无色彩，无边框。作品应呈现出梦幻、空灵、富有情感且带有精致画廊风格的未完成感。

en.title: 3D Cartoon Character Emotion Grid
en.description: A Pixar-style animation prompt that generates a 3x3 grid of a character displaying various distinct emotions.
en.prompt: 3D {argument name="character type" default="cartoon avatar character"} showing different emotions arranged in a 3x3 grid, same {argument name="gender" default="male/female"} character, {argument name="animation style" default="Pixar-style"} animation, each square showing a different expression (happy, shocked, angry, caring with a puppy, confident, thumbs up, sad, thinking, professional), colorful gradient backgrounds for each panel, soft studio lighting, smooth 3D rendering, expressive eyes and facial expressions, modern emoji-style character design, clean composition, ultra-detailed, vibrant colors, 8K.

zh.title: 3D 卡通角色表情网格
zh.description: 一个皮克斯风格的动画提示词，用于生成展示 3x3 角色不同情绪的网格图。
zh.prompt: 3D {argument name="character type" default="卡通头像角色"} 展示不同情绪的 3x3 网格排列，同一 {argument name="gender" default="男性/女性"} 角色，{argument name="animation style" default="皮克斯风格"} 动画，每个方格展示不同的表情（开心、震惊、愤怒、抱着小狗的关怀、自信、点赞、悲伤、思考、专业），每个面板采用彩色渐变背景，柔和的摄影棚灯光，平滑的 3D 渲染，富有表现力的眼睛和面部表情，现代 emoji 风格角色设计，构图简洁，超精细，色彩鲜艳，8K 分辨率。

en.title: Golden Hour Car Editorial
en.description: A comprehensive lifestyle photography prompt for a classic car and model set against a golden hour city background.
en.prompt:
Ultra-realistic warm golden-hour editorial lifestyle photo, portrait 4:5, shot from a high overhead angle looking down at a {argument name="vehicle type" default="black classic 2-door coupe"} parked diagonally on an empty city street. The car runs diagonally from bottom-right (front) to upper-left (rear). Glossy black paint with chrome window trim and clean body lines. Silver mesh/BBS-style wheels with polished lips. Windshield and side glass show strong warm reflections of a golden building façade with rectangular window shapes. Roof also reflects light softly.

A {argument name="subject description" default="young woman"} stands leaning against the driver-side door area, hips resting on the car, body relaxed. She faces the camera with calm confident expression and direct eye contact. Pose: one hand resting on the car near the window/door frame, legs crossed casually at the ankles. Hair pulled back in a messy ponytail/bun with loose strands around the face. Wearing a thin necklace with a small pendant. Outfit: {argument name="outfit details" default="fitted navy/dark blue short-sleeve t-shirt slightly cropped showing a small strip of midriff; white/cream loose trousers with a visible black belt; black-and-white low-top sneakers"}.

Background: gray asphalt street with faint white lane markings and long pale stripes, several round manhole covers near the top of the frame, subtle road seams and patches, no other cars or pedestrians. Lighting is warm golden-hour sunlight with soft shadows and gentle film-like contrast, slight 35mm film softness, natural color grading, high resolution.

NEGATIVE PROMPT:

low angle, front-facing car close-up, different car color, modern car, no chrome trim, different wheels, crowded street, buildings visible in background, people, heavy HDR, oversharp, harsh flash, night, rain, neon, cartoon, illustration, CGI, blurred subject, wrong outfit colors, no reflections on windshield

zh.title: 黄金时刻汽车大片
zh.description: 一份全面的生活方式摄影提示词，适用于以黄金时刻城市背景下的经典汽车与模特拍摄。
zh.prompt:
超写实暖色调黄金时刻生活方式大片，人像比例 4:5，从高处俯拍视角，拍摄一辆 {argument name="vehicle type" default="黑色经典双门轿跑车"} 斜停在空旷的城市街道上。汽车从右下角（车头）向左上角（车尾）呈对角线排列。亮黑色车漆，配有镀铬车窗饰条和简洁的车身线条。银色网状/BBS 风格轮毂，带有抛光轮唇。挡风玻璃和侧窗反射出金色建筑立面的强烈暖光，呈现矩形窗户形状。车顶也柔和地反射着光线。

一位 {argument name="subject description" default="年轻女性"} 倚靠在驾驶员一侧的车门区域，臀部靠在车身上，姿态放松。她面向镜头，表情冷静自信，与镜头进行直接的眼神交流。姿势：一只手搭在靠近车窗/车门框的车身上，双腿在脚踝处随意交叉。头发扎成凌乱的马尾/发髻，脸颊周围有几缕碎发。佩戴一条带有小吊坠的细项链。服装：{argument name="outfit details" default="修身海军蓝/深蓝色短袖 T 恤，略微露脐；白色/米色宽松长裤，配有显眼的黑色腰带；黑白配色低帮运动鞋"}。

背景：灰色沥青街道，带有淡淡的白色车道标线和长条状浅色纹理，画面上方有几个圆形井盖，可见细微的道路接缝和补丁，没有其他车辆或行人。光线为温暖的黄金时刻阳光，阴影柔和，具有细腻的胶片感对比度，略带 35mm 胶片质感的柔和度，自然色彩分级，高分辨率。

负面提示词 (NEGATIVE PROMPT)：

低角度，汽车正面特写，不同车身颜色，现代汽车，无镀铬饰条，不同轮毂，拥挤的街道，背景中可见建筑物，人物，重度 HDR，过度锐化，强闪光灯，夜晚，雨天，霓虹灯，卡通，插画，CGI，主体模糊，服装颜色错误，挡风玻璃无反射

en.title: Indoor Natural Light Fashion Portrait
en.description: A structured prompt for a high-quality indoor portrait of a woman, focusing on natural lighting effects and realistic clothing textures.
en.prompt:
Subject: Gaze catching the light

Main: A vertical 3:4 indoor portrait. A woman in her {argument name="age" default="20s"} stands slightly right of center, leaning her upper body loosely toward the camera. Captures from head to upper thighs, with the person occupying about 80% of the screen. A natural forward-leaning posture with both arms extended forward for support and hips pulled slightly to the left.

Person/Expression: A young woman with a calm atmosphere. {argument name="hairstyle" default="Bright brown long hair"} in natural layers, with bangs and fine strands falling over her cheeks. Head tilted slightly right, chin slightly raised, looking straight at the camera. Soft eyes and a gentle expression with lips lightly closed. Light brown eye makeup, natural flush on cheeks, and matte pink-beige lips. Small gold hoop earrings and a thin necklace.

Outfit/Pose: {argument name="outfit" default="A charcoal fine-ribbed camisole close to black"}. The neckline is a soft rounded square neck with thin straps and a clean silhouette that follows the body. Bottoms are light greige high-waisted pleated shorts. Fine tucks on one side, made of soft-textured linen-blend material. Hands placed on an unseen surface at the bottom of the screen to support her weight, with relaxed shoulders. Upper body slightly twisted, creating a height difference between the left and right shoulders.

Background/Light: A simple indoor room unified in white and light gray. Behind is a white door frame and a half-open door, with a slightly darker gray space beyond. Natural morning light shines diagonally from the left, creating soft highlights on the hair surface, cheeks, collarbones, shoulders, and arms. A faint rectangular shadow on the wall suggestive of a window frame. A thin shadow on the right side of the person, with dark areas naturally lifted by weak reflections from the floor and white walls.

Composition/Camera: Vertical 3:4, camera position close to a slightly low eye level. Medium close-up, with the face at the top center and hips at the bottom left. White wall space on the left and a thin door frame on the right edge. Natural perspective equivalent to 35-50mm. Precise focus on the face and eyes, with the background lightly blurred. Avoids excessive wide-angle distortion, maintaining natural body proportions even in a forward-leaning posture.

Texture/Style: Realistic fashion portrait photography. Skin has natural textures with pores and fine shadows. Detailed depiction of fine hair strands, rib material, and linen-blend weave. Based on low-saturation beige, white, and charcoal, with sunlight made slightly warmer. Medium contrast, soft highlights, balancing the intimacy of a natural smartphone shot with the polished quality of magazine photography.

Negative: Underage-looking individuals, unnatural faces, unnatural gaze, excessively exaggerated bodies, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, joint breakdowns, unnatural forward-leaning posture, clothing breakdowns, floating, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-like skin, garbled text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 室内自然光时尚人像
zh.description: 一个用于生成高质量室内女性人像的结构化提示词，重点在于自然光影效果和逼真的服装质感。
zh.prompt:
主体：捕捉光线的凝视

主要描述：3:4 竖构图室内人像。一位 {argument name="age" default="20 多岁"} 的女性站在画面中心偏右位置，上身微微向镜头前倾。取景范围从头部到大腿上部，人物占据画面约 80%。自然的身体前倾姿势，双臂向前伸展作为支撑，臀部略微向左侧倾斜。

人物/表情：一位气质沉静的年轻女性。{argument name="hairstyle" default="亮棕色长发"}，呈现自然的层次感，刘海和细碎的发丝垂落在脸颊旁。头部微向右倾，下巴微抬，直视镜头。眼神柔和，表情温婉，双唇轻闭。浅棕色眼妆，脸颊带有自然的红晕，哑光粉米色唇妆。佩戴小巧的金质圆环耳环和一条细项链。

服装/姿势：{argument name="outfit" default="一件接近黑色的炭灰色细罗纹吊带衫"}。领口为柔和的圆方领，细肩带设计，剪裁贴合身形。下装为浅灰米色高腰百褶短裤。一侧有细褶设计，采用质感柔软的亚麻混纺面料。双手支撑在画面底部不可见的平面上，肩膀放松。上身轻微扭转，使左右肩膀形成高低差。

背景/光线：简约的室内空间，色调统一为白色和浅灰色。背景为白色门框和半掩的房门，门后是略暗的灰色空间。清晨的自然光从左侧斜射入，在发丝、脸颊、锁骨、肩膀和手臂上形成柔和的高光。墙上隐约可见窗框投下的矩形阴影。人物右侧有淡淡的阴影，暗部由地面和白墙的微弱反射自然提亮。

构图/相机：3:4 竖构图，相机位置接近略低的视平线。中景特写，脸部位于顶部中心，臀部位于左下角。左侧为留白墙面，右边缘为细门框。相当于 35-50mm 镜头的自然透视。焦点精准对准脸部和眼睛，背景轻微虚化。避免过度广角畸变，即使在身体前倾的姿势下也能保持自然的身材比例。

质感/风格：写实时尚人像摄影。皮肤呈现自然的纹理，带有毛孔和细微阴影。细腻刻画细碎发丝、罗纹面料和亚麻混纺织物。以低饱和度的米色、白色和炭灰色为主色调，阳光色调略微偏暖。中等对比度，柔和的高光，平衡了手机摄影的亲近感与杂志摄影的精致质感。

负面提示词：未成年面孔、不自然的面部、不自然的视线、过度夸张的身材、多指、缺指、肢体融合、关节崩坏、不自然的前倾姿势、服装崩坏、悬浮、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤、乱码文字、Logo、水印。

en.title: Summer Alleyway Sitting Portrait
en.description: A cinematic prompt for a full-body portrait of a woman sitting in a green Japanese alleyway with realistic dappled sunlight.
en.prompt:
Subject: Stone steps in green shade

Main: A vertical 2:3 full-body portrait. An adult woman with a model-like physique is sitting on the stone steps of an old residential alley surrounded by greenery. The person is positioned slightly right of center, captured from head to toe, occupying about 55% of the screen. A wide space is left on the left for the depth of the alley and plants.

Person/Expression: A natural and elegant {argument name="person" default="Japanese adult woman"}. Long slender limbs and well-proportioned features. Dark brown hair close to black tied in a high, rough bun, leaving thin bangs and strands around the face. Transparent natural skin, light pink-beige makeup. Head tilted slightly left, shoulders relaxed, looking at the camera with a gentle smile.

Outfit/Pose: {argument name="top" default="An ivory-colored ribbed top with thin shoulder straps"}. Small buttons lined up vertically on the front, with the top two undone to create a natural V-line. Paired with {argument name="bottoms" default="light blue high-waisted denim shorts"} and white slender flat sandals. Leaning back and right shoulder lightly against an old wall, with hands folded on her knees. Legs stretched diagonally toward the bottom left, one foot slightly forward. Naturally expresses contact between clothes and body, weight on the seat, and overlapping legs.

Background/Light: A quiet Japanese residential alley covered in ivy and dark green leaves. Features old concrete walls, stone benches with steps, bamboo blinds, small unglazed pots, and white flower pots. Dense ivy on the right and top, soft bokeh of large leaves in the left foreground, and the narrow alley in the background softly blurred. Natural summer light shines from the top left, casting fine dappled sunlight through the leaves onto the face, shoulders, arms, and legs. Shadows stretch softly toward the bottom right, with pale reflected light from the surrounding greenery hitting the skin.

Composition/Camera: Vertical, medium long shot including the full body. Camera at a slightly higher position than eye level, nearly frontal. Natural compression equivalent to 85mm, shallow depth of field. Clear focus on the face and upper body, with foreground leaves and the distant alley smoothly blurred. Leaf arch at the top, deep negative space on the left, and sufficient space for legs and stone steps at the bottom.

Texture/Style: Clean, realistic summer fashion photography. Carefully depicts natural skin texture, delicate hair, ribbed material, faded denim, old concrete, and even the veins of ivy leaves. Saturation is somewhat restrained, centered on deep green, ivory, and light blue. Soft film grain, gentle contrast, natural highlights.

Negative: Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, joint breakdowns, unnatural leg length, clothing digging into skin, unnatural gravity, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin, text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 夏季巷弄坐姿肖像
zh.description: 一个电影感提示词，用于生成一位女性坐在绿色日本巷弄中的全身肖像，带有逼真的斑驳阳光效果。
zh.prompt:
主体：绿荫下的石阶

主要内容：2:3 纵向全身肖像。一位拥有模特般身材的成年女性坐在长满绿植的老式住宅巷弄石阶上。人物位于画面中心偏右位置，全身入镜，约占画面 55% 的比例。左侧留出宽阔空间，以展现巷弄的纵深感和植物。

人物/表情：自然且优雅的 {argument name="person" default="日本成年女性"}。四肢修长，五官比例匀称。深棕色近乎黑色的长发扎成高高的随性发髻，留有稀疏的刘海和脸颊两侧的发丝。通透的自然肤质，淡粉米色系妆容。头部微微向左倾斜，双肩放松，对着镜头露出温柔的微笑。

服装/姿势：{argument name="top" default="一件象牙色细肩带罗纹上衣"}。正面垂直排列着小纽扣，上方两颗解开，自然形成 V 领。搭配 {argument name="bottoms" default="浅蓝色高腰牛仔短裤"} 和白色细带平底凉鞋。身体后仰，右肩轻靠在老旧墙面上，双手交叠放在膝盖上。双腿向左下方斜向伸展，一只脚微微向前。自然呈现衣物与身体的接触感、坐姿的重心以及双腿的交叠姿态。

背景/光影：一条被常春藤和深绿色叶片覆盖的宁静日本住宅巷弄。包含老旧混凝土墙、带台阶的石凳、竹帘、小型素烧花盆和白色花盆。右侧和顶部覆盖着茂密的常春藤，左侧前景有大叶片的柔和虚化，背景中狭窄的巷弄呈现柔焦效果。夏季自然光从左上方射入，透过叶片在脸部、肩部、手臂和腿部投下细腻的斑驳阳光。阴影柔和地向右下方延伸，周围绿植反射的淡光映照在皮肤上。

构图/摄影：纵向，包含全身的中远景。相机位置略高于视线水平，近乎正面拍摄。等效 85mm 镜头的自然压缩感，浅景深。焦点清晰对准脸部和上半身，前景叶片和远处的巷弄平滑虚化。顶部有叶片形成的拱形，左侧留有充足的负空间，底部留有足够的腿部和石阶空间。

质感/风格：干净、写实的夏季时尚摄影。细致描绘了自然的皮肤纹理、细腻的发丝、罗纹材质、褪色的牛仔布、老旧混凝土，甚至常春藤叶片的脉络。饱和度略微克制，以深绿、象牙白和浅蓝色为主调。柔和的胶片颗粒感，温和的对比度，自然的高光。

负面提示词：不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节崩坏、不自然的腿长、衣物勒入皮肤、不符合重力规律、阴影与光源不一致、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤、文字、Logo、水印。

en.title: Serene Morning Bedroom Portrait
en.description: Captures a peaceful morning atmosphere with a woman stretching in a minimalist, sunlit bedroom featuring warm lighting and soft textures.
en.prompt: A woman with {argument name="hair color" default="long wavy brown hair"}, wearing a {argument name="shirt type" default="white long-sleeved shirt"}, sitting up in a cozy, unmade bed, stretching her arms out towards the morning sunlight streaming through a window with sheer curtains. The room has a {argument name="room aesthetic" default="neutral, minimalist aesthetic"} with a tufted headboard, a wall-mounted air conditioner, and soft, warm lighting, capturing a serene and peaceful morning atmosphere

zh.title: 宁静清晨卧室肖像
zh.description: 捕捉清晨宁静的氛围，一位女性在简约且阳光充足的卧室中伸展身体，画面呈现出温暖的灯光与柔和的质感。
zh.prompt: 一位留着 {argument name="hair color" default="棕色长卷发"} 的女性，身穿 {argument name="shirt type" default="白色长袖衬衫"}，坐在舒适且凌乱的床上，向着透过薄纱窗帘洒入的晨光伸展双臂。房间呈现出 {argument name="room aesthetic" default="中性简约风格"}，配有簇绒床头板、壁挂式空调和柔和温暖的灯光，捕捉到一种宁静祥和的清晨氛围。

en.title: Levitating Food Commercial Campaign
en.description: A professional product photography prompt for creating high-end levitating food advertisements based on reference images.
en.prompt: Use the uploaded image as the primary reference and preserve the exact {argument name="subject" default="food or beverage"} with its original appearance, textures, colors, ingredients, and serving style. Create a premium {argument name="aspect ratio" default="4:5"} vertical levitating food campaign where the product floats elegantly above a refined plate or surface with a few subtle floating elements like crumbs, herbs, sauce, steam, or garnish. Use a {argument name="background style" default="clean studio or soft gradient"} background, professional commercial lighting, crisp highlights, realistic shadows, and a modern editorial composition that keeps the product as the clear hero. Add only minimal branding text if provided using elegant sans-serif typography. The final image should be ultra-realistic, appetizing, dynamic, premium, social-media ready, and look like a high-end commercial food advertisement while keeping the uploaded product instantly recognizable.

zh.title: 悬浮美食商业广告活动
zh.description: 一个专业的商业摄影提示词，用于根据参考图像创作高端悬浮美食广告。
zh.prompt: 使用上传的图像作为主要参考，并保留 {argument name="subject" default="food or beverage"} 的确切外观、质感、颜色、配料和摆盘风格。创建一个高级的 {argument name="aspect ratio" default="4:5"} 竖版悬浮美食广告，使产品优雅地漂浮在精致的餐盘或表面上方，并辅以少量微妙的漂浮元素，如碎屑、香草、酱汁、蒸汽或装饰物。使用 {argument name="background style" default="clean studio or soft gradient"} 背景、专业的商业照明、清晰的高光、逼真的阴影，以及现代化的编辑构图，确保产品成为绝对的主角。如果提供了品牌文本，请仅使用优雅的无衬线字体添加极简的品牌信息。最终图像应具备超写实、诱人、动态、高级且适合社交媒体的质感，看起来就像高端商业美食广告，同时确保上传的产品具有极高的辨识度。

en.title: Luxury Storyboard Presentation Layout
en.description: A professional advertising storyboard prompt that generates a clean grid layout for luxury product campaigns, including technical metadata and visual frames.
en.prompt:
Create a premium commercial storyboard sheet for a {argument name="product type" default="luxury toothpaste"} advertisement in a clean A4 portrait layout. White background with elegant {argument name="branding color" default="purple"} branding, minimal editorial design, premium typography, and creative agency presentation style.

Top Header:
• Title: {argument name="brand name" default="FEISIDELIN POLISH"}
• Subtitle: Bright White Teeth, Confident Smile!
• Right info panel showing Duration (20s), Style (POV Hand, Photorealistic, Premium Commercial), Audience (18–40), Audio (Upbeat Pop), and Why This Style Works.

Main Layout:
• 8 storyboard frames arranged in a 4×2 grid.
• Each frame has a purple number tab, timecode, realistic product photo, white handwritten notes, curved arrows, sparkle doodles, and a small voice-over caption.
• Show: holding the toothpaste, front beauty shot, opening the cap, squeezing purple toothpaste onto a toothbrush, macro texture shot, product in a luxury bathroom, daily routine hero shot, and final recommendation shot.

Bottom Section:
• Detail Close-ups: Label, Cap, Texture, Ingredients.
• Scale Reference with product dimensions.
• Footer: Total Duration 20s • Format 9:16 • Style: POV Hand Premium Commercial.

Style: Ultra-realistic, luxury product photography, premium bathroom lighting, shallow depth of field, clean grid layout, Apple-style presentation, Behance-quality storyboard, 8K, highly detailed, professional advertising pitch board, purple and white color palette.

zh.title: 奢华故事板演示布局
zh.description: 一款专业的广告故事板提示词，用于生成适用于奢华产品营销活动的简洁网格布局，包含技术元数据和视觉画面。
zh.prompt:
为 {argument name="product type" default="奢华牙膏"} 广告创建一个高级商业故事板页面，采用简洁的 A4 纵向布局。白色背景，搭配优雅的 {argument name="branding color" default="紫色"} 品牌色，极简编辑设计，高级排版，以及创意代理商演示风格。

顶部标题栏：
• 标题：{argument name="brand name" default="FEISIDELIN POLISH"}
• 副标题：亮白牙齿，自信笑容！
• 右侧信息面板显示：时长 (20s)、风格 (POV 手部视角、照片级真实感、高级商业)、受众 (18–40 岁)、音频 (轻快流行乐) 以及此风格的优势。

主要布局：
• 8 个故事板画面，以 4×2 网格排列。
• 每个画面均包含紫色数字标签、时间码、逼真的产品照片、白色手写注释、曲线箭头、闪光涂鸦以及简短的旁白说明。
• 展示内容：手持牙膏、正面美妆特写、打开盖子、将紫色牙膏挤在牙刷上、微距质感特写、置于奢华浴室中的产品、日常护理主视觉图以及最终推荐画面。

底部区域：
• 细节特写：标签、盖子、质感、成分。
• 带产品尺寸的比例参考。
• 页脚：总时长 20s • 格式 9:16 • 风格：POV 手部视角高级商业广告。

风格：超写实、奢华产品摄影、高级浴室灯光、浅景深、简洁网格布局、Apple 风格演示、Behance 品质故事板、8K 分辨率、高细节、专业广告提案项目。

en.title: Dior Style Ao Dai Fashion Editorial
en.description: A high-end fashion prompt for creating a luxury Vietnamese Ao Dai portrait with a creative floral mural background that integrates real bougainvillea flowers as hair.
en.prompt:
Create a high-end fashion editorial photograph in Dior style of a young woman based on the attached image. Her face, hairstyle, and facial structure must match the reference exactly (eyes, nose, lips 100% identical, ultra-precise eye detail).
She has a thick, long, loosely braided hairstyle draped over her shoulder to her waist. She stands with her body slightly turned sideways, one hand gently touching her chin, the other arm relaxed along her body, legs softly crossed at the ankles, elegant and introspective pose. Her expression is calm and slightly dreamy, with soft eyes and a gentle closed-mouth smile.
She is wearing a luxury Vietnamese áo dài in a single solid {argument name="clothing color" default="pastel purple"} color made from premium silk with a smooth, flowing couture finish. The color must be completely uniform — no gradients, no color variation, no secondary tones. Matching pants in identical color.
The mural behind her shows her face. The mural's hair is NOT painted. It is physically formed by real {argument name="flower type" default="purple bougainvillea"} flowers growing from a potted plant beside the wall. The flowers extend and precisely shape the hair of the mural. The transition must be seamless and clearly structured as hair, not decoration.
Lighting: soft natural daylight mixed with high-end fashion editorial lighting, glowing skin, subtle highlights, refined shadows, cinematic tone, luxury magazine look. Skin is flawless, radiant, high-detail.
Shot with {argument name="lens type" default="35mm"} lens, f/2.8, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic, 8K, sharp focus.
strict color control, strict composition control, preserve original concept
Negative prompt: multi-color outfit, gradient fabric, color shift, incorrect flowers placement, decoration flowers, inconsistent color.

zh.title: Dior 风格奥黛时尚大片
zh.description: 一个高端时尚提示词，用于创作一张奢华的越南奥黛人像，背景为创意花卉壁画，并将真实的三角梅花朵融入发型设计中。
zh.prompt:
根据附图创作一张 Dior 风格的高端时尚大片。人物的面部、发型和脸部结构必须与参考图完全一致（眼睛、鼻子、嘴唇 100% 相同，眼部细节超精准）。
她留着浓密的长发，编成松散的辫子垂在肩头直至腰间。她身体微侧站立，一只手轻轻触碰下巴，另一只手臂自然垂在身侧，双腿在脚踝处轻盈交叉，姿态优雅且内敛。她的表情平静而略带梦幻，眼神柔和，嘴角带着温柔的微笑。
她身穿一件奢华的越南奥黛，颜色为单一纯色 {argument name="clothing color" default="淡紫色"}，采用优质丝绸制成，具有顺滑、流畅的高定质感。颜色必须完全统一——无渐变、无色差、无次要色调。搭配同色的裤子。
她身后的壁画展示了她的脸庞。壁画中的头发并非手绘，而是由墙边盆栽中真实的 {argument name="flower type" default="紫色三角梅"} 物理构成。花朵延伸并精准地塑造出壁画的头发轮廓。过渡必须自然无缝，且结构清晰地呈现为发丝，而非装饰物。
光影：柔和的自然光与高端时尚摄影灯光结合，皮肤透亮，带有细腻的高光，阴影精致，电影感色调，奢华杂志质感。皮肤无瑕、光彩照人、细节丰富。
使用 {argument name="lens type" default="35mm"} 镜头拍摄，f/2.8 光圈，浅景深，超写实，8K 分辨率，焦点清晰。
严格的色彩控制，严格的构图控制，保留原始概念。
负面提示词：多色服装、渐变面料、色偏、花朵位置错误、装饰性花朵、颜色不一致。

en.title: Crystal Panel Fashion Gallery
en.description: A conceptual fashion prompt featuring models displayed inside floating crystal glass panels in a high-end gallery setting with vibrant jewel tones.
en.prompt:
4:5

{argument name="number of models" default="Five"} ultra-realistic European fashion models displayed inside floating transparent crystal glass panels layered at different depths, each wearing luxurious contemporary haute couture outfits inspired by Paris and Milan Fashion Week, bold designer silhouettes, premium fabrics, statement accessories, elegant heels, effortlessly stylish actress-level fashion, vibrant {argument name="color palette" default="emerald, sapphire, ruby, ivory and champagne"} tones softly blending through crystal reflections, luminous luxury studio lighting, glossy white gallery environment with subtle gradient illumination, cinematic editorial photography, Vogue campaign aesthetic, soft volumetric light, realistic reflections, premium depth, hyper detailed skin textures, ultra realistic, masterpiece, 2K, vertical 9:16

zh.title: 水晶展板时尚画廊
zh.description: 一个概念性时尚提示词，展示了模特置身于高端画廊环境中悬浮的水晶玻璃展板内，并呈现出鲜艳的宝石色调。
zh.prompt:
4:5

{argument name="number of models" default="五位"} 超写实欧洲时尚模特，置身于不同深度层叠的悬浮透明水晶玻璃展板内，每位模特均身着受巴黎和米兰时装周启发的奢华当代高级定制服装，大胆的设计师廓形，优质面料，个性配饰，优雅高跟鞋，展现出毫不费力的女演员级时尚感，鲜艳的 {argument name="color palette" default="祖母绿、蓝宝石、红宝石、象牙白和香槟色"} 色调在水晶折射中柔和交融，明亮的奢华摄影棚灯光，带有微妙渐变照明的亮面白色画廊环境，电影级编辑摄影，Vogue 广告大片美学，柔和的体积光，逼真的反射，高级景深，超精细皮肤纹理，超写实，杰作，2K，竖屏 9:16

en.title: Korean Woman Train Interior Portrait
en.description: A hyper-realistic portrait of a young Korean woman leaning against a train interior, featuring warm cinematic lighting and aesthetic composition.
en.prompt: A hyper-realistic photorealistic portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="beautiful young Korean woman"} with smooth skin, shoulder-length black hair with soft bangs, and a gentle smile. She is leaning casually against the {argument name="setting" default="interior wall of a modern train"}, looking directly into the camera. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="minimal beige crewneck cotton t-shirt tucked into a high-waisted light-wash blue denim midi skirt"}. Her casual look is completed with white crew socks and clean white platform sneakers. She is standing next to a large train window showing a blurred rural landscape outside under soft daylight. The atmosphere is warm, aesthetic, and peaceful. Shot with a 35mm lens, natural lighting, cinematic composition, sharp focus, 8k resolution, highly detailed.

zh.title: 韩国女性列车内肖像
zh.description: 一张年轻韩国女性倚靠在列车内的超写实肖像，采用温暖的电影级光影和美学构图。
zh.prompt: 一张超写实的摄影级肖像，主角是 {argument name="subject" default="一位美丽的年轻韩国女性"}，皮肤细腻，留着齐肩黑发和柔和的刘海，面带温柔的微笑。她随意地倚靠在 {argument name="setting" default="现代列车的内壁"} 上，直视镜头。她穿着 {argument name="outfit" default="简约的米色圆领棉质 T 恤，下摆塞进高腰浅蓝色牛仔中长裙中"}。她休闲的造型搭配了白色中筒袜和干净的白色厚底运动鞋。她站在一扇巨大的列车窗旁，窗外是柔和日光下模糊的乡村景观。氛围温暖、美观且宁静。使用 35mm 镜头拍摄，自然光，电影级构图，焦点清晰，8k 分辨率，细节丰富。

en.title: Luxury Penthouse Executive Portrait
en.description: A prompt for generating an executive office portrait in a skyscraper penthouse with city views at blue hour.
en.prompt:
Use the uploaded image as the ONLY identity reference. Preserve the subject's exact identity with maximum accuracy, including facial structure, facial proportions, eyes, eyebrows, eyelashes, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, hairstyle or hijab style, facial expression, age appearance, and every recognizable feature. If the subject wears glasses or sunglasses, preserve the EXACT same eyewear without changing its shape, color, reflections, or position. Never alter the eye shape, gaze, facial proportions, facial hair, facial expression, or head proportions. Maintain a realistic 1:7.5–1:8 head-to-body ratio and anatomically correct proportions. Match the facial lighting naturally with the environment.

Create an {argument name="setting" default="ultra-luxury executive office portrait inside a breathtaking modern penthouse located at the top of a skyscraper"}. Floor-to-ceiling panoramic windows reveal a spectacular {argument name="view" default="city skyline at blue hour, filled with illuminated skyscrapers, reflections, highways, and glowing architectural lights"}. The office features polished marble floors, premium wood paneling, warm ambient lighting.

zh.title: 豪华顶层公寓行政肖像
zh.description: 用于生成摩天大楼顶层公寓内行政办公室肖像的提示词，背景为蓝调时刻的城市景观。
zh.prompt:
仅使用上传的图像作为身份参考。以最高精度保留主体的确切身份，包括面部结构、面部比例、眼睛、眉毛、睫毛、鼻子、嘴唇、下颌线、肤色、发型或头巾样式、面部表情、年龄外观以及所有可识别的特征。如果主体佩戴眼镜或太阳镜，请保留完全相同的眼镜，不得更改其形状、颜色、反光或位置。切勿改变眼睛形状、注视方向、面部比例、面部毛发、面部表情或头部比例。保持 1:7.5 至 1:8 的真实头身比和解剖学上正确的比例。使面部光影与环境自然融合。

创建一个 {argument name="setting" default="位于摩天大楼顶层、令人惊叹的现代顶层公寓内的超豪华行政办公室肖像"}。落地全景窗展示了壮观的 {argument name="view" default="蓝调时刻的城市天际线，充满灯火通明的摩天大楼、倒影、高速公路和发光的建筑灯光"}。办公室采用抛光大理石地板、高级木镶板和温暖的环境照明。

en.title: Luxury Watch Alpine Advertising Board
en.description: An ultra-premium four-panel advertising campaign layout for luxury watches, blending mechanical precision with the tranquility of alpine mountain landscapes.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-premium four-panel advertising campaign board for Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V, following a refined 2x2 luxury layout where the watch and its surface details are seamlessly fused with an alpine environment of snow peaks, reflective mountain lakes, icy textures, and crisp high-altitude atmosphere. The image must feel elegant, adventurous, tactile, and emotionally elevated, like a world-class haute horlogerie campaign for a watch made to travel through extraordinary landscapes. Core concept: The campaign should present the Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V as a timepiece fused with alpine reflection and high-altitude stillness. The watch dial and surface details should merge subtly and poetically with snow mountain horizons, frozen-lake textures, and mirror-like water reflections. The watch must remain fully luxurious and realistic, while the mountain world becomes part of its surface language, suggesting travel, precision, and serene power. 4-panel structure: Use a clean 2x2 four-panel luxury layout: top-left: full hero watch shot, top-right: enlarged dial detail with hands and integrated alpine reflection, bottom-left: another close dial crop focused on indices and icy-lake surface texture, bottom-right: macro crown and steel finishing detail. Each panel should feel like part of one unified luxury story, with consistent alpine tonality, quiet air, and premium spatial balance. Panel 1, hero shot: Show the full Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V prominently, upright or slightly angled, with the full case and bracelet/strap visible. The dial should already contain subtle integration of alpine elements such as snowfield tonality, distant mountain reflections, or icy-lake sheen. Behind the watch, use a soft real mountain-lake horizon under crisp cold light. The watch must remain dominant and unmistakably premium. Panel 2, dial-world detail: Zoom into the watch dial and hands so the face becomes almost a tiny alpine world. The dial surface should fuse seamlessly with a reflective mountain lake, snowy ridge line, or frozen-water edge. The watch hands should float elegantly over this landscape-like dial, as if measuring the stillness of the high mountains. The integration must feel clean, poetic, and believable. Panel 3, finishing and surface narrative: Show another macro crop of the dial and applied indices. Focus on the craftsmanship of the surface as it merges with alpine reflection textures: fine frost-like grain, soft mirror-lake depth, subtle ice patterns, and calm high-altitude light. The markers, hands, and dial architecture must remain crisp and luxurious over this serene natural fusion. Panel 4, crown and case macro: Create a hyper-detailed macro shot of the crown, bezel edge, and brushed-polished case construction. This panel should highlight haute horlogerie craftsmanship: steel finishing, blue accent or reflection details, engraving precision, satin brushing, and polished bevels. The alpine environment may be softly echoed in the reflections, but the focus must be pure material perfection. Product realism: Render the Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V with absolute realism: precise steel case geometry, correct bracelet or strap integration, sharp applied indices, luxury dial finishing, clean sapphire reflections, accurate crown details, and world-class Swiss-watch fidelity. The watch must feel physically real, aspirational, and exceptionally premium. Environment integration: The alpine world must remain subtle and elegant, never overwhelming. Suitable elements include: snow mountain horizon, frozen lake reflections, cold mist, ice surface grain, blue-gray mountain air, and soft alpine light. The landscape should seem naturally fused into the dial and reflections, as if the watch carries the stillness of the mountains inside it. Color direction: Use a refined alpine luxury palette of steel silver, icy blue-gray, deep slate blue, pale snow white, mineral gray, and cool reflected light. Keep the tonality crisp, restrained, and premium, with a few deeper blue accents for richness. Typography: Use an elegant English-led luxury typography system with minimal copy. Suggested text direction: Main English title: “OVERSEAS 4500V” Secondary title: “ALPINE REFLECTION” Supporting English copy: “Precision, reflected in altitude.” Typography should be sparse, refined, and beautifully spaced, integrated into the four-panel layout like a luxury editorial campaign.
