Brand coding: Preserve Vacheron Constantin identity through: full product precision, haute horlogerie craftsmanship, restrained luxury layout, travel-oriented elegance, and poetic environmental storytelling. The final image must feel unmistakably like a flagship Vacheron Constantin campaign. Lighting: Use soft high-end editorial lighting with crisp cold reflections on steel, crystal, and dial surfaces. The hero panel should have clean alpine daylight, while the macro panels should use precise studio light to reveal texture, finishing, and refined detail. The whole board must feel calm, cold, and expensive. Mood: elegant, alpine, refined, adventurous, precise, serene, tactile, luxurious, aspirational, globally premium Rendering style: ultra-premium luxury watch campaign board, Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V, four-panel editorial layout, dial fused with alpine lake and snow mountain reflections, macro steel craftsmanship, icy high-altitude atmosphere, high-end English typography, 8k, world-class commercial image quality Negative prompt: cheap watch ad, cluttered collage, weak product precision, gimmicky landscape fusion, low-detail steel, cartoon rendering, messy panel layout, excessive text, low-end magazine look, overdramatic fantasy

zh.title: 奢华腕表高山主题广告项目
zh.description: 一套为奢华腕表打造的超高端四格广告宣传方案，将机械精密感与高山景观的宁静氛围完美融合。
zh.prompt: 创建一个为 Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V 腕表打造的超高端四格广告宣传项目，采用精致的 2x2 奢华布局，将腕表及其表面细节与雪峰、倒影山湖、冰雪纹理及清冽的高海拔氛围等高山环境无缝融合。画面必须呈现出优雅、冒险、富有质感且格调高雅的视觉效果，如同世界级高级制表品牌的全球宣传大片，展现腕表在非凡景观中穿行的特质。核心概念：该宣传项目应将 Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V 呈现为一款与高山倒影及高海拔静谧感融为一体的时计。表盘及表面细节应与雪山地平线、冰湖纹理及镜面水影进行诗意般的微妙融合。腕表必须保持极致的奢华感与真实感，同时将高山世界融入其表面语言，传递出旅行、精准与宁静的力量。4 格结构：采用简洁的 2x2 四格奢华布局：左上为腕表全景主图，右上为表盘细节放大图，展示指针与融合的高山倒影，左下为另一处表盘特写，聚焦于时标与冰湖表面纹理，右下为表冠与精钢打磨细节的微距拍摄。每个板块都应是统一奢华叙事的一部分，保持一致的高山色调、静谧空气感与高端空间平衡。板块 1，主图：清晰展示 Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V 全貌，直立或微倾，完整呈现表壳与表链/表带。表盘应已包含微妙的高山元素，如雪原色调、远山倒影或冰湖光泽。腕表后方采用清冷光线下柔和的真实山湖地平线。腕表必须保持视觉主体地位，彰显无可置疑的高端品质。板块 2，表盘世界细节：放大表盘与指针，使表盘仿佛成为一个微缩的高山世界。表盘表面应与倒影山湖、雪山脊线或冰水边缘无缝融合。指针优雅地悬浮于这片景观般的表盘之上，仿佛在测量高山的静谧。融合效果必须干净、诗意且真实可信。板块 3，打磨与表面叙事：展示表盘与镶贴时标的另一处微距裁剪。聚焦于表面工艺与高山倒影纹理的融合：细腻的霜状颗粒、柔和的镜湖深度、微妙的冰层图案及冷静的高海拔光线。时标、指针与表盘结构在这一宁静的自然融合中保持清晰与奢华感。板块 4，表冠与表壳微距：创作一张表冠、表圈边缘及拉丝抛光表壳结构的超精细微距照片。该板块应突出高级制表工艺：精钢打磨、蓝色点缀或倒影细节、雕刻精度、缎面拉丝及抛光倒角。高山环境可在倒影中轻微呼应，但焦点必须是纯粹的材质完美。产品真实性：以绝对的真实感渲染 Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V：精准的精钢表壳几何结构、正确的表链或表带衔接、锐利的镶贴时标、奢华的表盘打磨、清澈的蓝宝石镜面反射、精准的表冠细节以及世界级瑞士腕表的质感。腕表必须在物理层面显得真实、令人向往且极其高端。环境融合：高山世界必须保持微妙与优雅，绝不喧宾夺主。合适的元素包括：雪山地平线、冰湖倒影、冷雾、冰面颗粒、蓝灰色山间空气及柔和的高山光线。景观应自然地融入表盘与倒影中，仿佛腕表内部蕴含着高山的宁静。色彩方向：使用精致的高山奢华色板：精钢银、冰蓝色、深板岩蓝、浅雪白、矿物灰及冷色调反射光。保持色调清冽、克制且高端，辅以少量深蓝色调以增加丰富度。排版：使用以英文为主的优雅奢华排版系统，文案极简。建议文案方向：主标题：“OVERSEAS 4500V”，副标题：“ALPINE REFLECTION”，辅助文案：“Precision, reflected in altitude.”（精准，映于海拔之上。）排版应稀疏、精致且间距优美，像奢华杂志大片一样融入四格布局。品牌编码：通过以下方式保留 Vacheron Constantin 的品牌特质：完整的产品精度、高级制表工艺、克制的奢华布局、旅行导向的优雅感以及诗意的环境叙事。最终图像必须呈现出 Vacheron Constantin 旗舰级宣传大片的质感。灯光：使用柔和的高端编辑灯光，在精钢、水晶及表盘表面呈现清冷的反射效果。主图板块应具备清澈的高山日光，而微距板块应使用精准的摄影棚灯光来揭示纹理、打磨工艺及精致细节。整个项目必须给人以冷静、清冷且昂贵的感觉。氛围：优雅、高山、精致、冒险、精准、宁静、有质感、奢华、令人向往、全球高端。渲染风格：超高端奢华腕表广告项目，Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V，四格编辑布局，表盘与高山湖泊及雪山倒影融合，微距精钢工艺，冰冷高海拔氛围，高端英文排版，8k，世界级商业图像质量。负面提示词：廉价腕表广告、杂乱的拼贴、产品精度不足、花哨的景观融合、低细节精钢、卡通渲染、混乱的板块布局、过多的文字、低端杂志感、过度戏剧化的奇幻风格。

en.title: Unbranded Luxury Perfume Bottle Poster
en.description: A high-end product photography prompt for creating elegant, unbranded perfume bottle posters with floral inclusions and warm lighting effects.
en.prompt: unbranded transparent perfume bottle, one {argument name="flower type" default="tulip-like flower"} enclosed inside, {argument name="background color" default="champagne ivory"} background, {argument name="glass color" default="honey-gold"} glass, luxury product photography, no logos, no readable text, no watermark.

zh.title: 无品牌奢华香水瓶海报
zh.description: 一个高端产品摄影提示词，用于创作优雅、无品牌的香水瓶海报，包含花卉元素和暖光效果。
zh.prompt: 无品牌透明香水瓶，内部包含一朵 {argument name="flower type" default="郁金香类花卉"}，{argument name="background color" default="香槟象牙色"} 背景，{argument name="glass color" default="蜜金色"} 玻璃，奢华产品摄影，无 Logo，无可见文字，无水印。

en.title: Elegant Japanese Woman in Summer Park Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed and structured prompt for a cinematic fashion portrait of a Japanese woman in a summer park, focusing on delicate lighting, garment textures, and composition.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Hem unraveling on the grass

Main Body:
Vertical photo. A single woman sitting slightly to the right of center in a {argument name="location" default="lush green park lawn"}. The subject is shown in a full-body shot, occupying about 70% of the frame. She extends her left leg long toward the front and raises her right knee high, resting both hands and her head lightly on it. Her right hand is behind her body on the grass to the right, supporting her weight. The hem of her spread-out skirt flows toward the bottom right, forming a soft arc on the lawn.

Person/Expression:
A natural and realistic {argument name="nationality" default="Japanese"} woman. She has a calm, mature, elegant, and delicate atmosphere. Her hair is a glossy dark brown, styled in a slightly loose {argument name="hair style" default="chignon-style updo"} at the back of her head. It features thin, translucent bangs and fine wisps of hair falling along her cheeks. Her face is turned slightly downward, with her gaze lowered near her raised knee. Her expression is quiet with relaxed brows and mouth. The makeup is based on pink-beige with natural teardrop bags, fine lashes, pale rose cheeks, and translucent coral-pink lips.

Clothing/Pose:
A Japanese-brand style sleeveless long dress in ivory with a sparse, very pale blue-gray floral pattern. The neckline features a small stand collar with fine gathers and a modest vertical slit at the chest. The shoulders have double mini-ruffles, and the waist is narrowed with wide shirring. The skirt has fine pleats and diagonal drapes from the waist, with an asymmetrical design that spreads lightly toward the hem. It is made of thin, light chiffon material but is not too transparent, showing the lining naturally. She wears white, thin-strapped chunky heel sandals. The raised right leg is close to the center of the body, and the extended left leg flows diagonally toward the bottom left. The contact between the knees, hands, ankles, and shoes is natural, and the folds in the clothes follow the weight of the sitting posture and the bend of the legs.

Background/Light:
A quiet city park on a summer afternoon. The foreground consists of fine lawn and a few fallen leaves. The mid-ground features tall, thin-leafed greenery on the left and a gentle grassy slope on the right. The background has large trees and a low fence with white decorative panels, blurred in the distance. Only part of the sky is blue. Strong sunlight enters from the top left, casting bright light on her forehead, bridge of the nose, shoulders, arms, knees, and shins. Soft mottled patterns from tree shadows fall on the grass and background, and the person's shadow stretches toward the bottom right. There is a faint green reflected light from the grass on her skin and a slight cool-colored reflection from the blue sky on the white dress.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical 4:5. The camera is slightly higher than the seated person's eye level, with a light high-angle shot. Using a medium telephoto lens of around 85mm. Leaving enough margin above the person's head to see the trees and blue sky, with the extended leg and plants on the left and the spreading hem on the right. Focus is on the face and the foreground knee, with the background smoothly blurred. The person's head, raised knee, extended leg, and spread skirt form a stable triangular composition. Both sandals are captured naturally within the frame.

Texture/Style:
An elegant Japanese-style fashion portrait. A photographic expression utilizing the clear midsummer air and the intensity of natural light. Skin is bright and smooth but retains pores and fine shading. Carefully depicts the three-dimensional feel of the thin chiffon, fine ruffles, shirring, and pleats of the dress. The green of the background is deep, separating the person and clothing in bright ivory. Contrast is slightly high, and saturation is moderate. Sharp depiction with transparency and a very thin film grain.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fusion of limbs, broken joints, deformed knees or ankles, confusion of left and right legs, poor contact between shoes and feet, floating body, unnatural gravity, broken clothing folds, excessive transparency, shadows inconsistent with the light source, incorrect perspective, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏季公园中优雅日本女性肖像
zh.description: 一份高度详细且结构化的提示词，用于创作夏季公园中日本女性的电影感时尚肖像，侧重于细腻的光影、服装质感及构图。
zh.prompt:
主题：
裙摆在草地上散开

主体：
竖构图照片。一位女性坐在 {argument name="location" default="郁郁葱葱的公园草坪"} 上，位置略偏向中心右侧。主体为全身照，占据画面约 70% 的空间。她将左腿向前方伸展，右膝高高抬起，双手和头部轻轻搭在膝盖上。她的右手撑在身体后方的草地上，以支撑身体重量。散开的裙摆向右下方流动，在草坪上形成柔和的弧线。

人物/表情：
一位自然且写实的 {argument name="nationality" default="日本"} 女性。她散发着冷静、成熟、优雅且细腻的气质。深棕色的秀发富有光泽，在脑后盘成一个略显松散的 {argument name="hair style" default="发髻式盘发"}。额前留着稀疏、半透明的刘海，脸颊两侧垂下几缕细碎的发丝。她面部微垂，目光落在抬起的膝盖附近。表情宁静，眉眼舒展。妆容以粉米色为基调，画着自然的卧蚕、细长的睫毛、淡淡的玫瑰色腮红以及半透明的珊瑚粉色唇妆。

服装/姿势：
日系风格的无袖长裙，象牙白色，带有稀疏且极淡的蓝灰色花卉图案。领口为小立领，带有细密的褶皱，胸前有简约的竖向开衩。肩部饰有双层迷你荷叶边，腰部采用宽褶皱收腰设计。裙身带有细褶和从腰部延伸出的斜向垂坠，不规则的裙摆设计向底端轻盈散开。材质为轻薄的雪纺，但透视感适中，自然地显现出内衬。脚穿白色细带粗跟凉鞋。抬起的右腿靠近身体中心，伸展的左腿向左下方延伸。膝盖、手部、脚踝与鞋子的接触自然，衣褶随着坐姿的重心和腿部的弯曲而自然形成。

背景/光影：
夏日午后的宁静城市公园。前景为细密的草坪和少量落叶。中景左侧为高大细叶的绿植，右侧为平缓的草坡。背景中有高大的树木和带有白色装饰板的低矮围栏，在远景中虚化。天空仅露出局部蓝色。强烈的阳光从左上方射入，在她的额头、鼻梁、肩部、手臂、膝盖和小腿上投下明亮的光斑。树影形成的柔和斑驳光影落在草地和背景上，人物的影子向右下方延伸。皮肤上带有草地反射的淡淡绿光，白色裙子上则有来自蓝天的微弱冷色调反射。

构图/相机：
竖构图 4:5。相机位置略高于坐姿人物的视线，采用轻微的高角度拍摄。使用约 85mm 的中长焦镜头。人物头顶留有足够的空间以展现树木和蓝天，左侧留出伸展的腿部和植物，右侧留出散开的裙摆。焦点位于面部和前景的膝盖上，背景平滑虚化。人物头部、抬起的膝盖、伸展的腿部和散开的裙摆构成了稳定的三角形构图。两只凉鞋均自然地呈现在画面中。

质感/风格：
优雅的日系时尚肖像。利用盛夏清澈的空气和自然光的强度进行摄影表现。皮肤明亮光滑，但保留了毛孔和细微的阴影。精细描绘了轻薄雪纺、细荷叶边、收褶和褶皱的立体感。背景的绿色深邃，将明亮象牙色的人物和服装衬托出来。对比度略高，饱和度适中。成像锐利，具有通透感和极细的胶片颗粒感。

负面提示词：
不自然的面部、不自然的目光、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、膝盖或脚踝畸形、左右腿混淆、鞋脚接触不良、身体悬空、不自然的重力、衣褶破碎、过度透明、阴影与光源不一致、透视错误、乱码文字、Logo、水印、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Cozy Nighttime Living Room Portrait
en.description: A professional-quality prompt for generating a realistic, atmospheric indoor photo of a woman relaxing on a sofa at night, featuring complex lighting and fine textures.
en.prompt:
Theme: Night unravelling in light

Subject: In a living room of an apartment at night, a woman in her {argument name="age" default="20s"} is leaning back comfortably on a dark gray sofa. The person enters the screen largely from the center toward the right, capturing from the upper body to bare feet. The leg stretched forward is shown prominently, and a black smartphone is placed at the lower left of the sofa.

Character/Expression: A natural, friendly feminine oval contour. Small chin, soft cheeks, modest nose bridge. Realistic texture showing pores and fine skin grain, leaving a faint pink complexion on bright ivory beige skin. Rose pink blush, pink-brown eye makeup, thin eyelashes, natural tear bags, translucent pink-beige lips. Gaze directed toward the lower left of the screen, with a very small smile on the mouth. Hair is a medium-long {argument name="hair color" default="milk tea ash brown"}. Features thin see-through bangs, layers around the face, natural flyaways, and fine hair flow.

Clothing/Pose: {argument name="outfit" default="White to pale ivory ribbed V-neck camisole"}. Thin lace at the neckline, soft fabric that naturally follows the body. Bottoms are short light gray room shorts with a white drawstring at the center waist. Right arm resting on the sofa back, right hand lightly touching the hair. Left hand relaxed next to the chest with fingers naturally bent. Left leg with knee up, right leg extended toward the camera. Accurately express the stretch of clothing, wrinkles around the waist, and the weight of the body sinking into the sofa.

Background/Light: A calm indoor night scene. In the window at the far left, pale blue city lights appear largely blurred. In the far right, a small indirect light, a houseplant, and a shelf with a minimal sense of daily life. Main light is a warm indoor light coming from the upper right, softly illuminating the cheeks, shoulders, collarbone, and the top of the thighs. Weak blue reflected light from the window is added to the left side, creating a natural contrast between warm and cold tones. Shadows fall gently toward the lower left of the sofa.

Composition/Camera: Portrait 2:3. A relaxed portrait shot of the sofa seat and the person from a short distance. Camera shot from a position slightly lower than the waist with a 35mm equivalent lens. The raised leg is placed prominently in the foreground, with precise focus on the face. Background naturally blurred with a shallow depth of field. Do not cut the top of the head, hands, or toes, leaving appropriate margins for the cushion on the right and the night view on the left.

Texture/Style: A natural indoor photo taken with a high-sensitivity full-frame camera. Delicately depicts fine skin irregularities, vellus hair, individual hair strands, ribbed fabric, lace, and sofa fabric fibers. Avoid excessive HDR or skin beautification, leaving slight high-sensitivity noise and gentle contrast. Warm and quiet night tones, realistic photographic expression.

zh.title: 温馨夜晚客厅人像
zh.description: 一个专业级的提示词，用于生成一张写实、富有氛围感的室内照片，展现女性在夜晚于沙发上放松的场景，包含复杂的光影效果和细腻的纹理。
zh.prompt:
主题：光影交织的夜晚

主体：在夜晚的公寓客厅里，一位 {argument name="age" default="20 多岁"} 的女性舒适地靠在深灰色沙发上。人物主体从画面中心偏右侧进入，取景范围从上半身到赤脚。向前伸展的腿部被突出展示，沙发左下方放着一部黑色智能手机。

人物/表情：自然、亲切的女性鹅蛋脸轮廓。小巧的下巴、柔软的脸颊、秀气的鼻梁。写实的纹理展现出毛孔和细腻的皮肤质感，白皙的象牙色皮肤上透出淡淡的粉色气色。玫瑰粉色腮红，粉棕色眼妆，纤细的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，半透明的粉米色嘴唇。视线投向画面左下方，嘴角带着极浅的微笑。发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="奶茶灰棕色"} 的中长发。带有轻薄的空气刘海，脸部周围有层次感，自然的碎发和细腻的发流。

服装/姿势：{argument name="outfit" default="白色至浅象牙色罗纹 V 领吊带背心"}。领口处有细蕾丝，柔软的面料自然地贴合身体。下身是浅灰色短款家居裤，腰部中央有白色抽绳。右手靠在沙发靠背上，右手轻触头发。左手自然放松地放在胸前，手指自然弯曲。左膝弯曲，右腿向镜头方向伸展。准确表现衣服的拉伸感、腰部的褶皱以及身体陷入沙发时的重量感。

背景/光影：宁静的室内夜景。远处的左侧窗户中，隐约可见模糊的城市灯光。远处的右侧有微弱的间接照明、一盆室内植物以及一个带有极简生活气息的置物架。主光源是来自右上方的温暖室内光，柔和地照亮了脸颊、肩膀、锁骨和大腿上方。左侧加入了来自窗户的微弱蓝色反射光，营造出冷暖色调的自然对比。阴影柔和地投向沙发左下方。

构图/摄影：人像 2:3。从近距离拍摄的沙发座椅和人物的放松人像。使用 35mm 等效镜头，从略低于腰部的位置拍摄。抬起的腿部在前景中突出显示，焦点精确对准面部。背景自然虚化，具有浅景深效果。不要切掉头顶、手部或脚趾，在右侧的靠垫和左侧的夜景处留出适当的余白。

纹理/风格：使用高感光度全画幅相机拍摄的自然室内照片。细腻地描绘了皮肤细微的凹凸感、汗毛、单根发丝、罗纹面料、蕾丝以及沙发织物的纤维。避免过度的 HDR 或皮肤美化，保留轻微的高感光度噪点和柔和的对比度。温暖而宁静的夜色调，写实的摄影表现。

en.title: Soft Afternoon Bedside Portrait
en.description: A high-quality prompt for generating a soft, realistic photo of a woman in floral lace clothing lying on white bedding, illuminated by warm afternoon sunlight.
en.prompt:
Theme: Unraveled Afternoon

Subject: Vertical 4:5 composition. A single woman lying on soft white bedding. The person is placed in the center of the screen, capturing from the head to the upper thighs in the frame. The body extends diagonally, with the upper body in the center and legs directed toward the lower right. A peaceful afternoon time flows within an indoor space based on white and pale cherry blossom colors.

Character/Expression: A woman with long {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair naturally spread over the bedding. She has translucent white skin and a calm adult atmosphere, looking straight into the camera with soft {argument name="eye color" default="brown"} eyes. There is a faint complexion on the cheeks, and the lips are slightly open naturally, creating an expression that suggests a quiet lingering feeling. Bangs hang thinly over the forehead, with delicate eyelashes and soft eye makeup making an impression.

Clothing/Pose: A style combining a {argument name="clothing" default="white lace lingerie top with pale pink-beige ribbon decoration and floral print frilled skirt"}. The hem of the skirt has natural disorder and wrinkles, creating a sense of daily life as if relaxing for a long time. A thin ribbon-like accessory at the neck. Both arms raised near the head, fingertips in a natural relaxed state. White lace-trimmed knee-high socks on the legs.

Background/Light: Soft afternoon sunlight shines through a wooden-framed shoji window, flowing from the upper left to the lower right. Soft shadows fall on the white sheets, and cherry blossom decorations and Japanese-style lighting are placed in the upper right. The overall color scheme is calm, centered on white, ecru, and pale cherry blossom pink.

Composition/Camera: A bed photo from a slightly high-angle perspective. Natural angle of view around 35mm. The composition where the person occupies about 70% of the entire screen expresses the expanse of space by leaving margins around the head and on the left. Background slightly blurred to adjust so that the gaze gathers on the person's expression.

Texture/Style: Realistic photographic expression. Carefully depicts delicate skin texture, fine patterns of lace fabric, wrinkles in sheets, and soft reflections of cloth. Low contrast and soft color development. Natural air and transparency like high-end portrait photography.

zh.title: 午后柔光床边肖像
zh.description: 一个高质量的提示词，用于生成一张柔和、逼真的照片，展示一位身着花卉蕾丝服装的女性躺在白色床上，沐浴在温暖的午后阳光中。
zh.prompt:
主题：午后闲暇

主体：垂直 4:5 构图。一位女性躺在柔软的白色床上。人物位于画面中心，取景范围从头部到大腿上部。身体呈对角线延伸，上半身位于中心，双腿指向右下方。在以白色和淡樱花色为基调的室内空间中，流淌着宁静的午后时光。

角色/表情：一位留着 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"} 长发的女性，头发自然地散落在床上。她拥有半透明的白皙皮肤，散发着成熟冷静的气质，用柔和的 {argument name="eye color" default="棕色"} 双眸直视镜头。脸颊带着淡淡的红晕，双唇自然微张，流露出一种静谧的余韵。刘海稀疏地垂在额前，精致的睫毛和柔和的眼妆令人印象深刻。

服装/姿势：身着 {argument name="clothing" default="带有淡粉米色丝带装饰和花卉印花荷叶边裙的白色蕾丝内衣上衣"}。裙摆自然凌乱且带有褶皱，营造出一种仿佛长时间放松后的日常生活感。颈部配有细丝带状饰品。双臂抬起靠近头部，指尖处于自然放松状态。腿上穿着带有白色蕾丝边的过膝袜。

背景/光影：柔和的午后阳光透过木框障子窗射入，从左上方流向右下方。柔和的阴影投射在白色床单上，右上角摆放着樱花装饰和日式灯具。整体配色以白色、米色和淡樱花粉为主，色调沉稳。

构图/摄影：从略微俯视的角度拍摄的床边照片。约 35mm 的自然视角。人物占据整个画面约 70% 的构图，通过在头部周围和左侧留白来表现空间的开阔感。背景经过轻微虚化处理，使视线聚焦于人物的表情。

质感/风格：逼真的摄影表现。细腻地刻画了精致的皮肤纹理、蕾丝面料的细微图案、床单的褶皱以及布料的柔和反光。低对比度，色彩呈现柔和。如同高端人像摄影般自然、通透。

en.title: Fantasy Guild Characters
en.description: A character concept prompt for generating a guild master and vice-guild master in a fantasy town setting.
en.prompt: Adventurer's guild in {argument name="location" default="a certain town"}, {argument name="roles" default="Guild Master and Vice Guild Master"}

zh.description: 一个用于在奇幻城镇背景下生成公会会长和副会长的角色概念提示词。
zh.prompt: 位于 {argument name="location" default="某城镇"} 的冒险者公会，{argument name="roles" default="公会会长与副会长"}

en.title: Luxury Rabbit Suit Fashion
en.description: A detailed fashion prompt for a luxurious black leather and ivory lace suit with a rabbit ear headpiece and intricate silver accessories.
en.prompt: black tailored suit jacket, fitted silhouette, cropped front, long split swallowtail back, elongated peak lapels, glossy black leather panels, delicate ivory lace inserts, sheer ivory lace shirt with a partially open chest, black leather waistcoat, integrated leather harness, high-waisted slim tailored trousers, asymmetrical layered tails, satin piping, quilted leather details, silver filigree embroidery, moon motif embroidery, clover motif embroidery, crystal buttons, ornate silver buttons, {argument name="headpiece" default="luxurious black leather rabbit ear headpiece with ivory lace lining"}, black leather choker with lace trim, silver chain ear accessories, layered silver waist chains, antique pocket watch chain, rabbit emblem brooch, lace jabot, lace cuffs, multiple silver rings on fingers, (wearing black leather gloves on both hands:1.4), (full body shot:1.3), standing pose, body angled about 30 degrees, shoulders squared, chest slightly forward, chin slightly lowered while looking up at the viewer, one gloved hand lightly touching the black leather choker, the other hand resting gracefully behind the lower back, one leg naturally placed forward with the weight shifted onto the back leg, {argument name="posture" default="elegant aristocratic posture"}, refined luxury fashion model pose, calm and confident demeanor, (wearing black pointed-toe ankle boots on both feet:1.5), stiletto heels, lace-up front, polished silver buckles, {argument name="palette" default="black, ivory, and silver"} color palette, premium tailoring, luxurious fabrics

zh.title: 奢华兔耳套装时尚
zh.description: 一份详细的时尚提示词，用于生成奢华的黑色皮革与象牙白蕾丝套装，搭配兔耳头饰及精致的银色配饰。
zh.prompt: 黑色定制西装外套，修身剪裁，前短后长，长款燕尾开叉，加长尖领，亮面黑色皮革拼接，精致象牙白蕾丝内衬，半透明象牙白蕾丝衬衫，部分敞胸设计，黑色皮革马甲，一体式皮革背带，高腰修身定制长裤，不对称层叠燕尾，缎面滚边，绗缝皮革细节，银色花丝刺绣，月亮图案刺绣，三叶草图案刺绣，水晶纽扣，华丽银扣，{argument name="headpiece" default="奢华黑色皮革兔耳头饰，配象牙白蕾丝内衬"}，黑色皮革颈圈配蕾丝饰边，银色链条耳饰，层叠银色腰链，复古怀表链，兔形徽章胸针，蕾丝领饰，蕾丝袖口，手指佩戴多枚银戒指，(双手佩戴黑色皮手套:1.4)，(全身照:1.3)，站姿，身体侧向约 30 度，双肩平齐，挺胸，下巴微收并仰视镜头，一只戴手套的手轻触黑色皮革颈圈，另一只手优雅地置于身后，一条腿自然前伸，重心落在后腿上，{argument name="posture" default="优雅贵族姿态"}，精致奢华时尚模特姿势，冷静自信的神态，(双脚穿着黑色尖头短靴:1.5)，细高跟，系带设计，抛光银色搭扣，{argument name="palette" default="黑色、象牙白和银色"} 色调，高级定制，奢华面料

en.title: Bright High-Rise Bedroom Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating a vertical full-body portrait of a woman standing in a modern high-rise bedroom with a stunning city view, focusing on natural lighting and realistic textures.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Morning connecting in white

Subject details:
A vertical 2:3 full-body portrait. In a bright high-rise bedroom, a {argument name="person" default="young adult woman"} stands alone in front of a large floor-to-ceiling window. She is positioned slightly to the right of the center, occupying about 80% of the screen from head to toe. To the left is a white bed, a slender floor lamp, and pale curtains, while the right and background reveal a wide urban landscape.

Character and Expression:
Natural oval face, bright and transparent skin, and realistic texture preserving delicate skin grain. {argument name="hairstyle" default="Long dark brown hair"} falls softly below the chest, with thin bangs and layers around the face. Head tilted slightly to her right, shoulders relaxed, quietly gazing into the camera. Gentle eyes, slightly parted lips, and subtle pink-beige makeup.

Clothing and Pose:
The upper body is a {argument name="outfit" default="white stretchy thin fabric camisole"}. It has thin shoulder straps, a small ribbon in the center of the chest, and light gathers along the body. The bottom is a matching white swim bottom with side ribbons made of the same soft material. A clean design with minimal decoration. Arms hang naturally at her sides, fingertips lightly curled. Legs slightly wider than shoulder-width, weight slightly on her left leg, right knee slightly relaxed. Standing barefoot on a wooden floor, with soles naturally touching the floor.

Background and Lighting:
A sunny city before noon. Outside the window are white and gray skyscrapers, distant blue haze, and a bright sky with thin clouds. The interior is unified with white, ivory, and pale wood grain. The main light is soft natural light entering from the window at the top right. Bright highlights on the face, collarbone, shoulders, abdomen, and front of the legs, with her shadow falling long toward the bottom left of the floor. Weak reflected light from the white bed and curtains fills in the shadows.

Composition and Camera:
The camera is at a near-eye level slightly lower than the waist. Natural perspective equivalent to 35-50mm. A small amount of space is left above her head, and her toes are completely included. The bed in the left foreground adds depth at an angle, and the vertical lines of the window frame frame the person. Sharpest focus on her face and upper body, with the city background lightly blurred.

Texture and Style:
Bright and clean fashion photography. Avoids excessive skin correction, carefully depicting fine skin irregularities, thin strands of hair, fabric stretch and wrinkles, and wooden floor reflections. High-intensity natural light avoiding blown-out highlights, low contrast, and a refreshing tone based on pale blue and ivory.

Negative:
Underage-looking person, unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, asymmetrical legs, broken ribs, floating feet, unnatural gravity, shadows inconsistent with light source, incorrect perspective, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin, text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 明亮高层卧室人像
zh.description: 一份详细的提示词，用于生成一位女性站在现代高层卧室中，背景为壮丽城市景观的垂直全身人像，重点在于自然光线和逼真的质感。
zh.prompt:
主体：
晨间白色系穿搭

主体细节：
一张 2:3 的垂直全身人像。在明亮的高层卧室中，一位 {argument name="person" default="年轻女性"} 独自站在巨大的落地窗前。她位于画面中心偏右位置，从头到脚占据约 80% 的画面。左侧是白色床铺、细长的落地灯和浅色窗帘，右侧及背景展现出广阔的城市景观。

人物与表情：
自然的椭圆形脸庞，明亮通透的肌肤，保留细腻皮肤纹理的真实质感。{argument name="hairstyle" default="深棕色长发"} 柔顺地垂至胸下，带有薄刘海和脸部层次感。头部微微向右倾斜，双肩放松，安静地注视着镜头。眼神温柔，双唇微启，妆容为淡雅的粉米色。

服装与姿势：
上身穿着 {argument name="outfit" default="白色弹力薄面料吊带衫"}。带有细肩带，胸前中心有小蝴蝶结，衣身有轻微褶皱。下身是配套的白色泳裤，侧面带有同材质的系带。设计简洁，装饰极少。双臂自然垂在身体两侧，指尖轻微弯曲。双腿略宽于肩，重心略微落在左腿上，右膝微屈。赤脚站在木地板上，脚底自然接触地面。

背景与光影：
午前阳光明媚的城市。窗外是白色和灰色的摩天大楼、远处的蓝色薄雾以及带有薄云的明亮天空。室内色调统一为白色、象牙白和浅木纹。主光源是来自右上角窗户的柔和自然光。面部、锁骨、肩膀、腹部和腿部前方有明亮的高光，她的影子在地面上向左下方拉长。来自白色床铺和窗帘的微弱反射光填充了阴影部分。

构图与相机：
相机位于略低于腰部的近视平线位置。相当于 35-50mm 的自然视角。头顶留有少量空间，脚趾完整包含在画面内。左前方的床铺以一定角度增加了深度，窗框的垂直线条勾勒出人物轮廓。焦点最清晰处为面部和上半身，城市背景轻微虚化。

质感与风格：
明亮干净的时尚摄影风格。避免过度磨皮，细致刻画皮肤纹理、发丝、织物拉伸与褶皱以及木地板的反射。高强度自然光避免过曝，低对比度，以淡蓝色和象牙白为基调的清新色调。

负面提示词：
未成年人外貌、不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、双腿不对称、肋骨断裂、脚部悬空、不自然的重力、阴影与光源不一致、透视错误、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤、文字、Logo、水印。

en.title: Boyfriend POV Seaside Sunset Date
en.description: A specialized prompt designed to capture an upward-looking gaze from a taller boyfriend's perspective during a romantic sunset boardwalk date.
en.prompt:
Photorealistic boyfriend-perspective summer date scene featuring an {argument name="subject" default="adult woman"}.

Image logic: the upward gaze must come from true boyfriend-perspective camera placement. The boyfriend is about 30 cm taller, and the camera must sit at his actual eye level so she is clearly looking up at him from below. The emotional core is a sweet affectionate upward gaze with a gently spoiled expression, created by real height difference and close romantic distance.

Background identity: a vivid {argument name="location" default="seaside boardwalk at sunset"} in midsummer, with a wide peach-pink-lavender sky, white railings, weathered wooden decking, reflective sea water, a distant Ferris wheel, small amusement lights beginning to glow, layered coastal buildings, and a soft evening breeze. The background should feel romantic and layered rather than like a flat sunset backdrop.

Depth lock: in the foreground, a softly blurred railing corner, boardwalk post, or sea-light reflection enters close to the lens. In the middle ground, the subject stands near the inside edge of the railing, very close to the camera. In the background, receding boardwalk lines, the Ferris wheel, layered buildings, sea horizon, and sunset sky create strong depth.

True boyfriend-POV camera lock: the camera is not a third-person observer and not a fashion-editorial camera. The lens is placed exactly where the taller boyfriend’s eyes would be, about 30 cm above her eye line, at very close conversational distance, approximately 45 to 60 cm from her face. Use a clearly readable downward viewing angle of about 18 to 24 degrees. The camera is positioned slightly in front of and just outside her near shoulder, as though her taller boyfriend has stepped close beside her and is looking down at her from his own real eye level. Frame from upper waist or lower chest to above the head. Her eyes and face must sit clearly below the lens, so the upward gaze is structurally unavoidable. Do not use a flat eye-level angle, do not use an observer camera, and do not use a neutral portrait camera.

Pose lock: the subject has paused beside the railing while still oriented along the boardwalk. Her weight rests naturally on one leg, with the other foot slightly behind and mostly outside the crop. The torso remains mostly aligned with the walkway rather than turning fully into a portrait pose. One hand rests lightly on the railing behind or beside her hip as a simple support point. The other arm remains relaxed along the body and may be partially cropped or partially hidden. Shoulders stay lowered and natural.

Upward-gaze lock: because the lens is truly above her, she looks clearly upward toward the camera from below. Her face remains in a soft three-quarter angle, not frontal. The head turns only a little toward him, while the eyes lift distinctly upward to the higher lens. Ke

zh.title: 男友视角：海边日落约会
zh.description: 这是一个专门设计的提示词，旨在捕捉浪漫的海滨步道日落约会中，从高个子男友视角向下俯视的画面。
zh.prompt:
写实风格的男友视角夏日约会场景，主角为 {argument name="subject" default="成年女性"}。

图像逻辑：必须采用真实的男友视角机位，实现向上仰视的效果。男友比对方高约 30 厘米，相机必须放置在他真实的视线高度，这样她才能清晰地从下方仰视他。核心情感在于通过真实的身高差和亲密的浪漫距离，展现出一种甜美、深情且带着一丝娇嗔的仰视表情。

背景设定：盛夏时节生动的 {argument name="location" default="日落时分的海滨步道"}，天空呈现出桃粉色与淡紫色交织的绚丽色彩，配有白色栏杆、风化的木质甲板、波光粼粼的海面、远处的摩天轮、开始闪烁的游乐场灯光、错落有致的沿海建筑，以及轻柔的晚风。背景应营造出浪漫且富有层次感的氛围，而非平铺直叙的日落背景。

景深锁定：前景处，模糊的栏杆转角、步道立柱或海面反光应靠近镜头。中景处，主角站在栏杆内侧边缘，与相机距离极近。背景处，延伸的步道线条、摩天轮、层叠的建筑、海平面和日落天空共同营造出强烈的空间深度。

真实的男友视角机位锁定：相机不是第三人称观察者视角，也不是时尚大片的拍摄视角。镜头放置在男友双眼所在的真实高度，即比她的视线高约 30 厘米处，处于非常亲密的交谈距离，约距她面部 45 至 60 厘米。使用清晰可见的约 18 至 24 度的俯视角度。相机位置略微靠前并位于她近侧肩膀外侧，仿佛高个子男友正走近她身边，从他真实的视线高度向下注视着她。取景范围从腰部以上或胸部以下到头部上方。她的眼睛和面部必须位于镜头下方，从而在结构上形成不可避免的仰视视角。请勿使用平视角度、观察者视角或中性的肖像拍摄视角。

姿势锁定：主角在步道旁稍作停留，身体仍顺着步道方向。重心自然地落在一条腿上，另一只脚稍微向后，大部分处于画面之外。躯干保持与步道方向基本一致，而非完全转向正面拍摄姿势。一只手轻轻搭在身后或身侧的栏杆上作为简单的支撑点。另一只手臂自然下垂，可部分被裁剪或遮挡。双肩保持放松自然的状态。

仰视锁定：由于镜头确实处于她的上方，她会清晰地从下方仰视镜头。面部保持柔和的四分之三侧脸角度，而非正脸。头部仅向他微转，双眼明显向上注视着高处的镜头。

en.title: Serene Bedside Indoor Portrait
en.description: A detailed indoor portrait prompt for a woman sitting on the edge of a bed, focusing on the interplay of soft morning light, shadows, and natural textures.
en.prompt:
Subject:
Shadows unraveling in white

Subject details:
A vertical 2:3 indoor portrait. A {argument name="person" default="young adult woman"} is positioned slightly to the right of the center, sitting on the edge of a bed. The shot captures her from the upper body to the thigh area, with the person occupying about 75% of the frame. In the upper left, diagonal sunlight and wide wall space are left open, while small wooden furniture and a vase are placed in the blurred background to the right.

Character and Expression:
A natural, realistic, and neat woman. A dark brown rounded short bob along the jawline, thin and clumped bangs, and fine stray hairs around the cheeks. The skin is bright ivory-beige with a faint flush on the cheeks and nose. Beige-brown eye makeup, delicate eyelashes, and pale pink-beige glossy lips. Face turned slightly to the left of the screen, chin lifted slightly, and eyes quietly cast downward to the left. Mouth slightly parted, with a calm expression that feels sleepy and spacious.

Clothing and Pose:
An {argument name="outfit" default="ivory white thin ribbed long-sleeved top"}. A soft material that follows the body, with a deep V-neck and a wrap-style design where the front naturally overlaps. Simple white shorts without decoration underneath. Wearing a thin silver pendant necklace. Upper body tilted slightly to the right, with one leg bent toward the foreground, showing the knee prominently. Both arms lowered naturally in front of the body, with one hand supporting her on the bed. A slight twist in the waist and shoulders, with natural stretch and wrinkles in the knit following the movements of the arms and abdomen.

Background and Lighting:
A {argument name="background" default="quiet indoor space with minimal signs of life"}, featuring off-white walls and a white linen bed. Warm natural light from a low window in the upper left shines diagonally, creating a long triangular highlight and window frame shadows on the wall. Softly illuminating the left cheek, nose bridge, collarbone, chest, and front thigh, while leaving thin mid-tone shadows on the opposite side. The far right is slightly darker, with a wooden chest, white ceramic vase, and dry twigs placed subtly. A small wooden art frame is half-visible near the floor.

Composition and Camera:
Vertical orientation, medium close-up. Camera positioned slightly lower than the chest, shooting with a light upward angle. The face is in the upper center, the foreground knee enters from the bottom left, and the body's curves create a diagonal line. Natural compression equivalent to 85mm, shallow depth of field. Focus most strongly on the eyes and face, with the background furniture and vase softly blurred. Without unnaturally cropping the head or limbs, the composition is balanced by the light space at the top left and the shadow on the right.

Texture and Style:
Realistic photographic expression like a high-end Japanese fashion magazine. Skin is not excessively smoothed, leaving fine grain and natural highlights. Delicate depiction of the vertical rib knit, fabric elasticity, linen wrinkles, and individual strands of hair. Warm-toned highlights and neutral shadows, low contrast, and subtle film grain. A quiet and intimate finish that remains clean and calm.

Negative:
Underage-looking person, unnatural face, unnatural gaze, asymmetrical eyes, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin, background distortion, text, logos, signature, watermark.

zh.title: 宁静床边室内肖像
zh.description: 一个详细的室内肖像提示词，描绘了一位坐在床边的女性，重点在于柔和晨光、阴影与自然质感之间的相互作用。
zh.prompt:
主体：
白影交织

主体细节：
一张 2:3 的竖构图室内肖像。一位 {argument name="person" default="年轻女性"} 位于画面中心偏右位置，坐在床边。镜头捕捉了她从上半身到大腿的区域，人物占据了约 75% 的画面。左上方留有对角线阳光和宽阔的墙面空间，右侧模糊的背景中放置着小型木质家具和花瓶。

人物与表情：
一位自然、写实且整洁的女性。深棕色圆润短波波头，发梢齐颌，刘海稀疏且呈束状，脸颊周围有细碎的发丝。肤色为明亮的象牙米色，脸颊和鼻尖带有淡淡的红晕。米棕色眼妆，睫毛精致，淡粉米色光泽唇妆。脸部略微转向屏幕左侧，下巴微抬，双眼静静地向下看向左方。嘴唇微张，表情平静，透着一种慵懒而宽广的氛围。

服装与姿势：
穿着 {argument name="outfit" default="象牙白薄款罗纹长袖上衣"}。柔软的材质贴合身体，深 V 领设计，前襟自然重叠。下身穿着简洁的白色无装饰短裤。佩戴一条细银质吊坠项链。上半身略微向右倾斜，一条腿弯曲向前景延伸，膝盖突出。双臂自然垂在身前，一只手支撑在床上。腰部和肩膀有轻微的扭转，针织衫随着手臂和腹部的动作产生自然的拉伸和褶皱。

背景与光影：
一个 {argument name="background" default="极简生活气息的安静室内空间"}，以米白色墙壁和白色亚麻床铺为特色。左上方低窗射入的温暖自然光呈对角线照射，在墙上形成长长的三角形高光和窗框阴影。柔和地照亮了左侧脸颊、鼻梁、锁骨、胸部和前大腿，同时在另一侧留下了淡淡的中间调阴影。右侧较暗，隐约可见木质柜子、白色陶瓷花瓶和干枯的树枝。地板附近半露着一个小木质画框。

构图与摄影：
竖构图，中近景。相机位置略低于胸部，采用轻微仰角拍摄。脸部位于上方中心，前景的膝盖从左下角切入，身体曲线形成一条对角线。相当于 85mm 镜头的自然压缩感，浅景深。焦点最清晰地落在眼睛和脸部，背景的家具和花瓶经过柔化处理。没有不自然的头部或肢体裁剪，左上方的留白与右侧的阴影使构图达到平衡。

质感与风格：
如同高端日本时尚杂志般的写实摄影表现。皮肤没有过度磨皮，保留了细腻的纹理和自然的亮光。细腻地刻画了竖罗纹针织、面料弹性、亚麻褶皱以及每一根发丝。暖色调高光与中性阴影，低对比度，带有细微的胶片颗粒感。整体呈现出一种安静、亲密且干净平和的质感。

负面提示词：
未成年长相、不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、不对称的眼睛、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、过度皮肤修饰、塑料感皮肤、背景扭曲、文字、Logo、签名、水印。

en.title: Summer Seaside Jump Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for a realistic portrait of a woman jumping at a Japanese seaside town during mid-summer.
en.prompt:
Subject: The moment of kicking the sea breeze

Main Subject: {argument name="main subject" default="A moment in a mid-summer seaside town where an adult woman jumps from a low concrete platform in the bottom right of the screen to a flat paved road on the left"}. The person is placed largely in the center-left of the screen, with the whole body occupying about 75% of the vertical frame. Both feet are off the ground in a natural mid-air posture just before landing.

Character/Expression: A woman with a mature, well-proportioned body. Healthy and realistic proportions, long dark brown hair. Strong sea breeze causes hair to flow significantly from the front of the face toward the upper left of the screen. The face is turned slightly upward and left, with a broad, open smile and narrowed eyes. Natural light makeup, with the summer sun hitting the cheeks, giving a bright and active impression.

Clothing/Pose: {argument name="clothing" default="White thin-strap V-neck camisole"}. Ribbed material that fits the body comfortably, with small buttons lined up at the front center. Pale light blue and white checkered mini pleated skirt, white middle-length socks, white canvas sneakers. The entire skirt catches a strong wind blowing from the back right to the front left, spreading lightly in a large continuous arc from the waist to the hem. Layers of fabric and pleats hang naturally with gravity, fluttering smoothly as a single piece of cloth rather than multiple small waves. Right arm extended to the right, left arm lowered loosely by the side. Knees slightly bent, feet slightly staggered in preparation for landing.

Background/Light: {argument name="background" default="Blue sea and low waves on the left, with green mountains in the distance"}. In the far right, Japanese seaside houses on a slope, utility poles, power lines, and yellow-and-black railroad crossing equipment. The low concrete platform at the bottom right shows its shape and position clearly, and the area to its left is a wide, flat paved road with no steps or cliffs. Vivid blue sky with three-dimensional white cumulus clouds. Strong natural noon light shines from the upper left, brightly illuminating the left side of the face, shoulders, and legs. Shadows of the person and the platform fall toward the bottom right of the paved road.

Composition/Camera: Vertical 3:4 aspect ratio. A bold low-angle full-body shot looking up from near the ground. Slightly wide-angle but with minimal body distortion. Ample blue sky left above the person's head, with a composition where the platform at the bottom right, the flat ground at the bottom left, and the sea in the back left are understood as a continuous space. High shutter speed freezes the person's silhouette, while leaving faint movement only at the tips of the hair and the edges of the skirt. Sharp focus on the person, with natural medium background blur.

Texture/Style: A realistic Japanese portrait photo capturing the feeling of summer sunlight. Based on transparent blue and white tones, skin has natural texture and subtle sheen. Fine expression of pleats, ribs, individual strands of hair, and the coarse surface of concrete. Refreshing and high saturation, but skin tones are not overexposed, resulting in a clean and natural finish like a magazine photo.

Negative: Underage-looking persons, unnatural body shapes, unnatural skirt shapes, stiff cloth, petal-like split hems, anti-gravity cloth, extra limbs, missing fingers, joint failures, fused feet, floating sensation, landing points with cliffs or steps, incorrect perspective, inconsistent shadow direction, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin, garbled text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 夏日海滨跳跃肖像
zh.description: 一个高细节的提示词，用于生成一张写实的肖像，描绘一位女性在盛夏的日本海滨小镇跳跃的瞬间。
zh.prompt:
主题：捕捉海风的瞬间

主体：{argument name="main subject" default="在盛夏的海滨小镇，一位成年女性从画面右下角的低矮混凝土平台上跳向左侧平坦铺装路面的瞬间"}。人物主体位于画面中左侧，全身占据垂直画幅约 75% 的空间。双脚离地，呈现出落地前自然的空中姿态。

人物/表情：身材成熟、比例匀称的女性。健康且写实的比例，深棕色长发。强劲的海风使头发从脸部前方大幅向画面左上方飘动。脸部微微转向左上方，露出开朗的笑容，双眼微眯。自然的淡妆，夏日的阳光洒在脸颊上，给人一种明亮且充满活力的印象。

服装/姿态：{argument name="clothing" default="白色细肩带 V 领吊带背心"}。罗纹材质贴合身体，前襟中心排列着小纽扣。浅蓝白格纹迷你百褶裙，白色中筒袜，白色帆布鞋。整条裙子迎着从右后方吹向左前方的强风，从腰部到裙摆呈现出轻盈且连续的大弧度飘动。布料层叠与褶皱受重力影响自然下垂，像是一整块布料般平滑飘动，而非细碎的波浪。右臂向右伸展，左臂自然垂在身侧。膝盖微屈，双脚略微错开，为落地做准备。

背景/光影：{argument name="background" default="左侧是蔚蓝的大海和低矮的波浪，远处可见青山"}。右侧远景为坡道上的日本海滨房屋、电线杆、电线以及黄黑相间的铁路道口设备。右下角的低矮混凝土平台形状和位置清晰可见，其左侧为宽阔平坦的铺装路面，没有台阶或悬崖。湛蓝的天空中漂浮着立体的白色积雨云。强烈的正午自然光从左上方照射，明亮地照亮了脸部左侧、肩膀和腿部。人物和平台的影子投射在铺装路面的右下方。

构图/摄影：垂直 3:4 画幅。从接近地面的低角度仰拍，呈现大胆的全身照。略带广角但身体畸变极小。人物头顶上方留有充足的蓝天，构图上使右下角的平台、左下角的平地以及左后方的海面形成一个连续的空间。高快门速度定格了人物的轮廓，仅在发梢和裙摆边缘留有轻微的动态感。焦点清晰地对准人物，背景具有自然的虚化效果。

质感/风格：一张写实的日本肖像摄影作品，捕捉夏日阳光的质感。以透明的蓝白色调为基调，皮肤具有自然的纹理和细腻的光泽。精细表现出褶皱、罗纹、发丝以及混凝土粗糙的表面。清新且高饱和度，但肤色不过曝，呈现出如杂志照片般干净自然的质感。

负面提示词：未成年面孔、不自然的身体形状、不自然的裙摆形状、僵硬的布料、花瓣状开裂裙摆、反重力布料、多余的肢体、手指缺失、关节畸形、脚部融合、漂浮感、落地处有悬崖或台阶、透视错误、阴影方向不一致、过度皮肤修饰、塑料感皮肤、乱码文字、Logo、水印。

en.title: Blue Seaside Fashion Portrait
en.description: A high-end fashion portrait of a woman in a blue jacket standing by the sea, captured in a medium close-up shot.
en.prompt:
Subject: Profile in Blue

Main Subject: {argument name="main subject" default="A single adult woman standing on a sunny seaside"}. A 2:3 vertical fashion portrait positioned slightly left of center, focusing on the area from the chest to the top of the head. She wears a vibrant blue outer garment dropped low from both shoulders, creating a striking contrast between the white V-neck clothing and the blue sea.

Character/Expression: A natural Japanese woman with a calm, mature atmosphere. A blunt bob in dark brown, almost black, that neatly shows the neckline. Sea breeze lightly blows the bangs and ends toward the right. Head tilted slightly forward, face in a diagonal profile facing right. Gaze lowered diagonally with a quiet, composed expression and slightly parted lips. Translucent light beige skin, coral lips, delicate eyeliner, and natural eyelashes.

Clothing/Pose: {argument name="clothing" default="Ivory white V-neck dress with thin shoulder straps"}. Deep but elegant chest line with thin, vertically ribbed fabric that naturally follows the curves of a mature body. A bright cobalt blue light jacket is lowered to the elbows, exposing wide shoulders and collarbones. Shoulders relaxed, upper body slightly twisted to the left. Delicate drop earrings with small transparent stones hanging from thin gold chains.

Background/Light: {argument name="background" default="Deep blue sea and clear sky stretching to the horizon"}. A blurred small island silhouette in the far left and a white seaside railing at the bottom. Strong natural light from around noon shines from the upper left, creating bright highlights on the hair surface, left shoulder, collarbone, and cheeks. Soft blue reflected light on the right side of the face, with natural thin shadows under the nose and chin.

Composition/Camera: Vertical 2:3, medium close-up focusing on the bust. The person occupies about 75% of the screen, leaving a small amount of sky above and sea margin on the right. Camera is at a near eye-level slightly higher than the chest. 85mm-equivalent medium telephoto lens, shallow depth of field precisely focusing on the eyes and profile, smoothly blurring the sea and island in the background.

Texture/Style: High-quality summer fashion photography. Natural skin showing slight texture and vellus hair without excessive retouching. Precise depiction of fine fabric weave, light wrinkles on the blue jacket, and small metallic reflections on jewelry. High-saturation yet clean color tones focused on blue and white, refreshing contrast, and delicate film grain.

zh.title: 蓝色海滨时尚肖像
zh.description: 一张高端时尚肖像，拍摄了一位身穿蓝色外套的女性站在海边的中景特写。
zh.prompt:
主题：蓝色侧影

主要拍摄对象：{argument name="main subject" default="一位站在阳光明媚海边的成年女性"}。一张 2:3 的竖构图时尚肖像，主体略微偏左，聚焦于胸部到头顶的区域。她穿着一件鲜艳的蓝色外套，从双肩滑落，与白色的 V 领内搭及蓝色的海面形成鲜明对比。

人物/表情：一位气质沉稳、成熟的日本女性。深棕色（近乎黑色）的齐肩短发，利落地露出颈部线条。海风轻拂着刘海和发梢向右飘动。头部微微前倾，脸部呈向右的斜侧面。目光斜向下垂，表情安静从容，双唇微启。半透明的浅米色肌肤，珊瑚色嘴唇，精致的眼线和自然的睫毛。

服装/姿势：{argument name="clothing" default="象牙白 V 领吊带裙"}。深邃而优雅的胸线，采用细竖条纹面料，自然贴合成熟女性的身材曲线。一件亮钴蓝色轻薄外套滑落至肘部，露出宽阔的肩膀和锁骨。双肩放松，上半身向左微微扭转。佩戴着精致的垂坠耳环，细金链上挂着透明小宝石。

背景/光影：{argument name="background" default="深蓝色的大海和延伸至地平线的晴朗天空"}。远处的左侧有模糊的小岛轮廓，底部是白色的海边护栏。午后强烈的自然光从左上方照射，在头发表面、左肩、锁骨和脸颊上形成明亮的高光。脸部右侧有柔和的蓝色反射光，鼻下和下巴处有自然的浅影。

构图/相机：竖构图 2:3，聚焦于胸部的中景特写。人物占据画面约 75%，上方留有少量天空，右侧留有海面余白。相机位于略高于胸部的近视平线位置。85mm 等效中焦镜头，浅景深精准对焦于眼睛和侧脸，将背景中的大海和小岛平滑虚化。

质感/风格：高质量夏季时尚摄影。自然的皮肤质感，可见细微纹理和绒毛，无过度修图。精准呈现细致的织物纹理、蓝色外套上的轻微褶皱以及珠宝上的细小金属反光。高饱和度但干净的色调，以蓝色和白色为主，对比清新，带有细腻的胶片颗粒感。

en.title: Pale Blue Swimwear Terrace Portrait
en.description: A high-definition fashion portrait of a woman in pale blue swimwear looking over her shoulder on a bright outdoor terrace.
en.prompt:
Subject: Turning in Pale Blue

Main Subject: {argument name="main subject" default="A vertical portrait of a woman sitting on a bright outdoor terrace, her upper body facing the back right while her face turns back over her shoulder toward the camera"}. The figure is largely positioned from the center to the right, showing from the top of the head to the upper thighs. Space is left on the left side with plants and a bright wall.

Character/Expression: A woman in her 20s. Bright ivory-beige white skin with natural texture including a subtle pink flush. Face tilted slightly downward, with only the eyes directed at the camera, and a calm expression with relaxed lips. Small, clear catchlights in the eyes.

Hair: Bright milk-tea ash brown medium-long hair. Thin see-through bangs, layers framing the face, and ends curled loosely inward. Fine stray hairs touch the cheeks and neck, with outlines and soft sheen visible in backlighting.

Clothing/Pose: {argument name="clothing" default="Pale blue minimal separate swimwear"}. Thin straps, a deep-back top with a small knot in the center and modest fine frills at the hem. Side-tie bottoms with a matching thin sheer material wrapped lightly around the waist. Right hand placed behind for support, left hand naturally resting on the outer thigh.

Background/Light: {argument name="background" default="White stone terrace with blurred olive-type potted plants and a bright exterior wall in the back"}. Warm morning natural light enters from the upper right rear, creating a thin rim light on the edges of the hair, shoulders, and back. Soft reflected light from the white wall on the front of the face. Shadows fall faintly to the bottom left.

Composition/Camera: 2:3 vertical frame. Eye level near waist height, shot from a slightly rear diagonal angle. 85mm-equivalent medium telephoto, shallow depth of field. Precise focus on the eyes and face, with smooth blur in the background and foreground.

Texture/Style: High-definition fashion photography. Careful depiction of natural pores and vellus hair, fine fabric weave, sheer material transparency, and small metallic reflections. Soft highlights avoiding overexposure, low contrast, and a clean color palette centered on pale blue and ivory.

zh.title: 淡蓝色泳装露台肖像
zh.description: 一张高清时尚肖像，展现了一位身穿淡蓝色泳装的女性在明亮的户外露台上回眸的瞬间。
zh.prompt:
主题：淡蓝色的转身

主体：{argument name="main subject" default="一张竖构图肖像，一位女性坐在明亮的户外露台上，上半身朝向右后方，脸部向后回眸看向镜头"}。人物主要位于画面中心至右侧，展示范围从头顶到大腿上部。画面左侧留有空间，配有植物和明亮的墙壁。

人物/表情：20 多岁的女性。明亮的象牙米白色皮肤，带有自然的纹理，包括淡淡的粉色红晕。脸部微微向下倾斜，只有眼睛直视镜头，表情平静，双唇放松。眼中带有清晰的小型眼神光。

发型：明亮的奶茶灰棕色中长发。轻薄的空气刘海，修饰脸型的层次感，发梢向内自然微卷。细碎的发丝轻触脸颊和颈部，在逆光下可见轮廓和柔和的光泽。

服装/姿势：{argument name="clothing" default="淡蓝色极简分体式泳装"}。细肩带，露背上衣，中心处有一个小结，下摆带有精致的细褶边。侧系带泳裤，腰间轻裹着配套的薄纱材质。右手置于身后作为支撑，左手自然地放在大腿外侧。

背景/光线：{argument name="background" default="白色石质露台，背景有模糊的橄榄类盆栽和明亮的室外墙壁"}。温暖的晨间自然光从右后上方射入，在头发、肩膀和背部的边缘形成细微的轮廓光。来自白色墙壁的柔和反射光照亮了面部前方。阴影淡淡地落在左下方。

构图/相机：2:3 竖构图。视平线接近腰部高度，从略微靠后的对角线角度拍摄。85mm 等效中焦镜头，浅景深。焦点精准对准眼睛和面部，背景和前景呈现平滑的虚化效果。

质感/风格：高清时尚摄影。细腻刻画了自然的毛孔和绒毛、精致的织物纹理、薄纱材质的通透感以及细小的金属反光。柔和的高光避免了过曝，对比度较低，整体色调以淡蓝色和象牙色为主，干净清爽。

en.title: Dark Ninja Assassin Studio Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for a modern dark ninja aesthetic, featuring a character in a lace bodysuit with a katana in a minimalist studio setting.
en.prompt:
[Subject] {argument name="reference image" default="Refer to Image 1"} [Signature] In the bottom right corner, a small Meta Threads logo is located, with the name "{argument name="signature" default="CHAse"}" written small above it in white cursive like a signature.

[Subject Pose & Expression]
A dynamic yet captivating full-body profile pose, sitting on a minimal studio floor with one knee raised, holding a long sword (katana) vertically. One hand firmly grips the top of the hilt, while the other holds near the guard, staring intensely at the camera. A silent charisma radiates from the cold, steady gaze and closed lips, as if portraying an assassin character from a game.

[Subject Costume]
A modern reinterpretation of a dark ninja concept costume, unified in {argument name="outfit color" default="black"}. The arms and upper chest feature a tight black bodysuit woven with sophisticated antique vine and floral patterns, with see-through arm lines. The bottom is matched with a minimal black skirt that reveals the hip and leg lines while gently wrinkling on the floor, adding narrative with bare feet.

[Subject Hairstyle & Makeup Details]
A very long, straight dark ash brown hairstyle reaching the waist, parted and calmly draped behind the back and over the shoulders. To emphasize the sharp and clear features, a clean and matte skin expression is used with sophisticated shaded eyeshadow and subtle cat-eye eyeliner, finished with calm dried rose (MLBB) toned lips for a chic mask.

[Lighting & Light Direction]
The primary light source is subtle studio diffused light gently seeping in from the subject's front right (left relative to the screen). It dimensionally illuminates the highlighted skin surface and the woven texture of the lace fabric, while casting soft shadows on the opposite side to emphasize the anatomical curves and the deep silhouette of the sharp sword.

[Texture & Color Mood]
A monotone-centered high-fashion editorial mood where the cold metallic texture of the black outfit and sword blends minimally with the flat light gray background. The perfect harmony between the decorative texture of the lace fabric and the soft skin texture adds sophistication...

zh.title: 暗黑忍者刺客摄影棚肖像
zh.description: 一个关于现代暗黑忍者美学的超高细节提示词，包含身着蕾丝连体衣、手持武士刀的角色，置于极简摄影棚场景中。
zh.prompt:
[主体] {argument name="reference image" default="参考图片 1"} [签名] 在右下角，有一个小的 Meta Threads 标志，上方用白色草书小字写着名字 "{argument name="signature" default="CHAse"}"。

[主体姿势与表情]
一个充满动感且引人注目的全身侧面姿势，坐在极简的摄影棚地板上，单膝抬起，垂直握着一把长剑（武士刀）。一只手紧紧握住剑柄顶部，另一只手靠近护手，目光锐利地注视着镜头。冷峻、稳定的凝视和紧闭的双唇散发出一种无声的魅力，仿佛在刻画游戏中的刺客角色。

[主体服装]
对暗黑忍者概念服装的现代重新诠释，整体采用 {argument name="outfit color" default="黑色"}。手臂和上胸部采用紧身黑色连体衣，编织着精致的古董藤蔓和花卉图案，并带有透视的手臂线条。下半身搭配极简黑色短裙，展现出臀部和腿部线条，同时在地面上自然褶皱，赤脚的细节增添了叙事感。

[主体发型与妆容细节]
一头及腰的超长直发，深灰棕色，中分并自然地垂在背后和肩上。为了强调锐利清晰的五官，采用了干净的哑光底妆，搭配精致的阴影眼影和细腻的猫眼眼线，最后以沉稳的干枯玫瑰色（MLBB）唇妆收尾，打造出别致的面具感。

[光影与光线方向]
主要光源是来自主体右前方（相对于屏幕为左侧）的柔和摄影棚漫射光。它立体地照亮了高光下的皮肤表面和蕾丝面料的编织纹理，同时在另一侧投下柔和的阴影，以强调身体曲线和利剑的深邃轮廓。

[质感与色彩氛围]
以单色调为主的高级时尚编辑风格，黑色服装与剑的冷金属质感与平坦的浅灰色背景完美融合。蕾丝面料的装饰性纹理与柔软的皮肤质感之间的完美和谐，增添了精致感...

en.title: Summer Urban Rooftop Portrait
en.description: A comprehensive prompt for generating a high-quality summer portrait of a young woman on a rooftop, featuring refreshing blue tones, soda, and hand-drawn decorative elements.
en.prompt:
Subject: 
{argument name="theme" default="Sky Blue Ramune Day"}

Subject Body:
{argument name="character" default="A woman in her 20s"} smiling with a Ramune soda in hand on an {argument name="location" default="urban building rooftop in midsummer"}. Standing slightly to the right of center on a vertical 2:3 canvas, captured from head to upper thighs. The person occupies approximately 70% of the screen, leaving ample negative space of vibrant blue sky at the top. Visual accents include white wireless headphones around the neck, a pale blue drink in a transparent cup, and white hand-drawn style musical notes and stars floating around.

Person/Expression:
Bright ivory-beige skin with natural pink color and delicate texture. Soft highlights from the summer sun on cheeks, nose tip, shoulders, and collarbones. Light rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eye makeup, long slender lashes, natural tear bags, soft brown eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige lips. A bright smile with the mouth slightly open, face turned slightly toward the upper left of the screen, with eyes looking diagonally upward. Small, clear catchlights in the eyes. Hair is bright milk tea ash brown with thin see-through bangs, face-framing layers, and medium-long length below the shoulders. Hair ends are loosely curled inward, with fine strands and natural flyaways swaying slightly in the summer air. Each strand, soft luster, and fine highlights are meticulously drawn.

Clothing/Pose:
Wearing a white fine-ribbed square-neck camisole with a translucent thin white shirt draped loosely over the shoulders. Bottoms are light sky blue lightweight shorts with a white drawstring at the waist. A healthy, mature, natural physique with a calm, feminine silhouette. Holding the transparent cup at chest height with her own left hand on the right side of the screen, while the fingertips of her right hand lightly bring the straw close to her lips. A relaxed standing posture with hips shifted slightly to the left and a slight difference in shoulder height. Precise depiction of the contact between fingers, cup, and straw.

Background/Lighting:
A rooftop of a building in an urban area of Japan. In the middle ground, a metal safety fence; in the background, a group of low to medium-rise buildings and thin power lines, with no text or logos. The sky is high-saturation clear blue with small white cumulus clouds on the left and bottom. Inside the transparent cup are ice, fine carbonated bubbles, and pale light blue Ramune soda, with cold condensation on the cup's surface. The primary light is hard daylight coming from the upper left. It brightly illuminates the cheeks, shoulders, arms, and top of the cup, casting soft shadows under the chin and inside the shirt. Subtle reflected light from the blue sky is added to the skin and white clothing.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical 2:3 aspect ratio, low angle looking up from a slightly low position. Natural perspective equivalent to 35-50mm. Focus accurately on the person's face, with background buildings lightly blurred. About 15% margin above the head, with hand-drawn white stars, notes, and short lines scattered on the left and right, and a white rough outline placed along the person's contour. Decorations do not hide the face, hands, or drink, creating a bright and light screen rhythm.

Texture/Style:
A bright and clean live-action photo combining summer fashion magazines and SNS portraits. Realistic expression of natural skin texture, transparent carbonation, the sheerness and fine wrinkles of the thin shirt, and the delicate movement of hair. A refreshing color scheme centered on blue, white, and pale light blue. Avoid excessive HDR or overly strong skin-beautifying corrections, adding light film grain and high-definition light depiction.

Negative:
Young-looking face, unnatural physique, excessive exposure, unnatural smile, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, fingers penetrating the cup, poor contact with the straw, distorted headphones, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with the light source, garbled text, brand logos, watermarks, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏季城市天台人像
zh.description: 一份用于生成高质量夏季女性天台人像的综合提示词，包含清爽的蓝色调、苏打水以及手绘装饰元素。
zh.prompt:
主体：
{argument name="theme" default="天蓝色弹珠汽水之日"}

主体描述：
{argument name="character" default="一名 20 多岁的女性"} 手持弹珠汽水，在 {argument name="location" default="盛夏的城市建筑天台"} 上微笑。画面为 2:3 纵向构图，人物位于画面中心偏右，取景范围从头部到大腿上部。人物占据约 70% 的画面，上方留有充足的亮蓝色天空负空间。视觉亮点包括颈部佩戴的白色无线耳机、透明杯中的淡蓝色饮料，以及周围漂浮的白色手绘风格音符和星星。

人物/表情：
明亮的象牙米色皮肤，带有自然的粉色调和细腻的质感。夏日阳光在脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和锁骨处形成柔和的高光。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼妆，纤长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的棕色眉毛，以及清透的粉米色嘴唇。嘴角微张，露出灿烂的笑容，脸部略微转向画面左上方，双眼斜向上方凝视。眼中带有清晰的小型眼神光。发色为明亮的奶茶灰棕色，留着轻薄的空气刘海，脸侧有修饰脸型的层次感剪裁，长度过肩。发尾微微内扣，细碎的发丝在夏日的微风中轻轻飘动。每一根发丝、柔和的光泽和细腻的高光都经过精心描绘。

服装/姿势：
身穿白色细罗纹方领吊带背心，外搭一件半透明的薄款白色衬衫，松散地披在肩上。下身穿着浅天蓝色轻便短裤，腰部带有白色抽绳。身材健康、成熟、自然，呈现出沉稳且富有女性魅力的轮廓。左手在画面右侧胸部高度握住透明杯，右手手指轻轻将吸管靠近嘴唇。姿势放松，臀部略微向左偏移，双肩高度略有差异。精准刻画手指、杯子与吸管之间的接触细节。

背景/光影：
日本城市区域的建筑天台。中景为金属安全围栏；背景为低至中层建筑群和细长的电线，画面中无文字或标志。天空为高饱和度的清澈蓝色，左侧和底部点缀着少量白色积云。透明杯中装有冰块、细密的碳酸气泡和淡浅蓝色的弹珠汽水，杯身表面凝结着冷凝水珠。主光源为来自左上方的硬质日光。光线明亮地照亮了脸颊、肩膀、手臂和杯口，在下巴下方和衬衫内侧投下柔和的阴影。皮肤和白色衣物上叠加了来自蓝天的微妙反射光。

构图/摄影：
2:3 纵向比例，从略低的角度仰拍。自然视角，相当于 35-50mm 镜头。焦点精准对准人物面部，背景建筑轻微虚化。头部上方留有约 15% 的边距，左侧和右侧散布着手绘的白色星星、音符和短线条，人物轮廓边缘带有白色粗糙描边。装饰元素不会遮挡面部、手部或饮料，营造出明快轻盈的画面节奏。

质感/风格：
结合夏季时尚杂志与社交媒体人像风格的明亮干净实拍照片。真实呈现自然的皮肤纹理、透明的碳酸感、薄衬衫的透视感与细微褶皱，以及发丝的细腻动态。以蓝色、白色和淡浅蓝色为核心的清爽配色。避免过度 HDR 或过强的磨皮效果，添加轻微的胶片颗粒感和高清晰度的光影描绘。

负面提示词：
幼态脸，不自然的身材，过度曝光，不自然的笑容，多指，缺指，手指粘连，手指穿透杯子，吸管接触不良，耳机扭曲，透视错误，阴影与光源不一致，乱码文字，品牌标志，水印，塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Bold Editorial Cartoon Illustration
en.description: An editorial-style vector prompt that creates humorous illustrations with exaggerated features, vintage print effects, and clean cel shading.
en.prompt: Create a bold editorial cartoon illustration of {argument name="character" default="[MAIN CHARACTER]"} with an oversized {argument name="cartoon head" default="[CARTOON HEAD]"}, showing {argument name="facial expression" default="[FACIAL EXPRESSION]"}. The character wears [OUTFIT], performing [POSE], with [HAND GESTURE]. Draw in a clean vector comic style using thick black outlines, flat colors, cel shading, subtle grain texture, vintage print effect, minimal solid background in [BACKGROUND COLOR], centered composition, exaggerated proportions, humorous editorial illustration, urban pop art aesthetic, vibrant colors, high contrast, ultra sharp details, professional vector artwork, poster quality, 8K.

zh.title: 大胆的社论漫画插图
zh.description: 一种社论风格的矢量提示词，用于创作具有夸张特征、复古印刷效果和清晰赛璐珞阴影的幽默插图。
zh.prompt: 创作一张大胆的社论漫画插图，主角是 {argument name="character" default="[主要角色]"}，拥有超大的 {argument name="cartoon head" default="[卡通头部]"}，展现出 {argument name="facial expression" default="[面部表情]"}。该角色身穿 [服装]，做出 [姿势]，并伴有 [手势]。采用清晰的矢量漫画风格绘制，使用粗黑轮廓线、平涂色彩、赛璐珞阴影、细腻的颗粒质感、复古印刷效果，背景为 [背景颜色] 的极简纯色，构图居中，比例夸张，幽默的社论插图，都市波普艺术美学，色彩鲜艳，高对比度，细节极其锐利，专业矢量艺术作品，海报级质量，8K 分辨率。

en.title: Luxury Arcade with Sunlight Patterns
en.description: A cinematic prompt for generating a high-end shopping arcade scene featuring intricate light patterns from a glass ceiling.
en.prompt: Walking inside a {argument name="location" default="luxury shopping arcade"} where {argument name="light source" default="sunlight"} streams through the {argument name="architectural feature" default="huge glass ceiling"}, creating beautiful light patterns across the floor.

zh.title: 带有阳光图案的奢华拱廊
zh.description: 一个用于生成高端购物拱廊场景的电影级提示词，展现了从玻璃天花板透射出的复杂光影图案。
zh.prompt: 走进一个 {argument name="location" default="奢华购物拱廊"}，{argument name="light source" default="阳光"} 透过 {argument name="architectural feature" default="巨大的玻璃天花板"} 倾泻而下，在地板上投射出精美的光影图案。

en.title: Oriental Zen Minimalist Wallpaper
en.description: A structured prompt for creating oriental zen minimalist illustrations featuring a koi fish jumping near a character by a pond.
en.prompt:
Theme: {argument name="theme" default="Oriental Zen minimalist illustration"}
Style branch: High-contrast dynamic type
Main subject: {argument name="subject" default="A person squatting by a green stone watching a koi fish jump out of the water"}
Emotional motif: Dynamic, healing, relaxed, summer feel
Scenes and imagery: Bright vermilion koi, deep lake blue pond water, jade white negative space, green stone, a small amount of water spray
Composition and space: Composition centered slightly towards the bottom, the jumping koi as the main visual, the character located to one side, the water surface and negative space forming a bright space
Color control: {argument name="color scheme" default="Jade white as the background base, deep lake blue for the pond water layers, bright vermilion for the koi body and a few reflections, ink green for the character and stone structure"}; avoid red and blue contaminating each other across the whole image
Light and texture: Bright natural light, clear water reflections, rice paper texture, clear particles
Aspect ratio: 9:16
Additional requirements: The koi's movement should have tension, but the overall image should remain simple, light, and not crowded.

zh.title: 东方禅意极简壁纸
zh.description: 一个结构化的提示词，用于创作东方禅意极简风格插画，画面包含池塘边人物与跃出水面的锦鲤。
zh.prompt:
主题：{argument name="theme" default="东方禅意极简插画"}
风格分支：高对比度动态类型
主体：{argument name="subject" default="一个人蹲在青石旁，看着一条锦鲤跃出水面"}
情感基调：动态、治愈、放松、夏日感
场景与意象：鲜红的锦鲤、深湖蓝的池水、玉白色留白、青石、少量水花
构图与空间：构图略微偏向底部，跃起的锦鲤作为视觉中心，人物位于一侧，水面与留白形成明亮的视觉空间
色彩控制：{argument name="color scheme" default="以玉白色为背景基底，深湖蓝表现池水层次，鲜红色表现锦鲤鱼身及少量倒影，墨绿色表现人物与石块结构"}；避免整张画面中红色与蓝色相互污染
光影与质感：明亮的自然光，清澈的水面倒影，宣纸质感，清晰的颗粒感
长宽比：9:16
额外要求：锦鲤的动作应具有张力，但整体画面需保持简洁、轻盈，避免拥挤。

en.title: Luxury Watch Campaign Poster
en.description: A highly detailed commercial prompt for a luxury watch campaign, featuring a timepiece suspended within an electric-blue meteor eruption.
en.prompt:
Create a single-image luxury campaign poster for {argument name="watch model" default="Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V"}, built around an intense {argument name="eruption scene" default="deep-blue meteor eruption scene"}. The composition is vertical, clean, minimal, and highly focused: one monumental watch dominates the exact center of the frame, suspended between two fractured dark meteor stones, one floating above and one below, both split open to reveal blinding electric-blue inner energy, liquid plasma light, and crystalline mineral glow.

The Vacheron Constantin Overseas 4500V must remain the absolute hero object, rendered with ultra-premium realism, perfect proportions, razor-sharp craftsmanship, brushed and polished stainless steel surfaces, a rich blue dial, and highly refined sapphire reflections. The watch should feel physically fused into the environment, as if born from the meteor energy itself. Reflections across the bezel, crystal, dial, case edges, and bracelet must accurately capture the same blue inner glow, suspended mineral dust, and exploding fragments from the surrounding stones.

The upper meteor is massive, dark, rugged, and heavy, with a cracked underside radiating intense blue molten light. The lower meteor acts like a fractured pedestal, cradling the watch from below while emitting liquid-like luminous energy that spreads outward in a controlled, realistic burst. A few smaller floating meteor fragments orbit the watch in balanced positions, helping build a sense of tension and dimensionality without cluttering the frame. Fine glowing particles, cold blue dust, and subtle atmospheric debris are suspended in the surrounding darkness.

The background must be minimal and cinematic: deep navy-black, abyssal, spacious, with faint blue haze, delicate floating particles, and soft volumetric diffusion. No busy environment, no extra scenery, no collage layout. The entire image should feel like a frozen celestial impact moment, highly disciplined, premium, and visually explosive while remaining elegant and clean.

Typography should be minimal and integrated if present: a refined, thin, luxury editorial text treatment placed subtly into the negative space, such as {argument name="typography" default="“OVERSEAS” and “VACHERON CONSTANTIN”"}, with small supporting campaign text kept understated and spatially embedded. No heavy fonts, no bold commercial clutter, no cheap sci-fi styling.

Lighting: ultra-controlled luxury product lighting, electric sapphire-blue highlights, cold metallic reflections, deep shadow contrast, luminous plasma bloom inside the meteor cracks, crisp steel speculars, highly realistic sapphire crystal behavior, museum-grade watch photography.

Mood: mysterious, explosive, abyssal, powerful, ultra-luxury, cosmic, disciplined, and immersive.

Rendering style: hyper-realistic commercial watch photography, premium campaign poster aesthetic, extreme material fidelity, realistic fractured mineral surfaces, cinematic mic

zh.title: 奢华腕表宣传海报
zh.description: 一份针对奢华腕表宣传活动的超高细节商业提示词，展示了一款悬浮在电光蓝流星爆发场景中的时计。
zh.prompt:
创作一张单图奢华宣传海报，主角为 {argument name="watch model" default="江诗丹顿 Overseas 4500V"}，围绕强烈的 {argument name="eruption scene" default="深蓝色流星爆发场景"} 构建。构图采用竖版，风格简洁、极简且高度聚焦：一枚宏伟的腕表占据画面正中心，悬浮在两块破碎的深色流星石之间，一块悬浮于上方，一块位于下方，两者均裂开，显露出耀眼的电光蓝内在能量、液态等离子光芒和晶体矿物光泽。

江诗丹顿 Overseas 4500V 必须作为绝对的主角，以超高端的真实感呈现，比例完美，工艺精湛，展现拉丝与抛光不锈钢表面、深邃的蓝色表盘以及极其精致的蓝宝石镜面反射。腕表应与环境融为一体，仿佛诞生于流星能量之中。表圈、镜面、表盘、表壳边缘和表带上的反射必须准确捕捉到同样的蓝色内在光芒、悬浮的矿物粉尘以及周围岩石炸裂产生的碎片。

上方的流星巨大、深邃、粗犷且厚重，其裂开的底部散发出强烈的蓝色熔岩光芒。下方的流星如同破碎的基座，从下方托住腕表，同时释放出液态般的发光能量，向外呈受控且逼真的爆发状扩散。几块较小的悬浮流星碎片在腕表周围平衡分布，在不造成画面杂乱的前提下营造出张力和空间感。细小的发光颗粒、冷蓝色尘埃以及微妙的大气碎屑悬浮在周围的黑暗中。

背景必须极简且具有电影感：深海军黑，深邃而广阔，带有淡淡的蓝色雾气、精致的悬浮颗粒和柔和的体积光扩散。无需复杂的环境，无需额外的场景，无需拼贴布局。整张图像应呈现出一种凝固的星际撞击瞬间，高度克制、高端，在视觉上充满爆发力，同时保持优雅与整洁。

排版应极简并与画面融合（如有）：采用精致、纤细的奢华编辑风格文字，巧妙地置于留白处，例如 {argument name="typography" default="“OVERSEAS” 和 “VACHERON CONSTANTIN”"}，并配以低调且空间嵌入的小型辅助宣传文字。避免使用厚重的字体、粗犷的商业杂乱元素或廉价的科幻风格。

光影：超高水准的奢华产品布光，电光蓝宝石色高光，冷金属反射，深邃的阴影对比，流星裂缝中发光的等离子光晕，清晰的钢材高光，高度逼真的蓝宝石镜面表现，博物馆级的腕表摄影效果。

氛围：神秘、爆发力、深邃、震撼、超奢华、宇宙感、克制且具有沉浸感。

渲染风格：超写实商业腕表摄影，高端宣传海报美学，极致的材质还原，逼真的破碎矿物表面，电影级微距

en.title: Summer Sunlight Japanese Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed and structured prompt for a realistic summer fashion portrait set in a vintage Japanese wooden alley, focusing on cinematic lighting and intricate textures.
en.prompt: Theme: {argument name="theme" default="fingertips unraveling shadows"} Subject: Vertical 2:3 photo. A young woman stands slightly to the right of the center in a Japanese alley lined with old wooden shops. Captured from the top of her head to near her thighs, she occupies about 55% of the frame. Highlights a dark wall in the background and strong sunlight streaming diagonally from the top right. Figure/Expression: Light ivory-beige skin with natural color and delicate texture. Pale rose blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eye makeup, long thin lashes, natural tear troughs, soft light eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige lips. Her expression is {argument name="expression" default="quiet and somewhat pensive"}, with her face turned slightly to the left and her gaze looking into the distance. A small catchlight in her eyes. Clothing/Pose: {argument name="clothing" default="a thin white sleeveless blouse"}. Cool summer wear made of soft cotton with fine pin-tucks and subtle lace, naturally showing her shoulders and collarbone. The bottom is a light high-waisted flared skirt with a pale blue floral pattern. Her right hand is raised to her temple, gently smoothing her hair with her fingertips. Her right elbow is bent outward, and her left arm hangs naturally at her side. Her weight is slightly shifted to one leg, with her shoulders relaxed. Background/Light: An old wooden shopping street with remnants of the Showa era. Faded wooden boards, peeling paper, old signs, and blurred unreadable Japanese-style posters. Deep shadows in the foreground and on the left side; hard warm light from the top right hits her face, shoulders, chest, and right arm. The light creates a large diagonal triangle, casting dense shadows behind her and to the lower left. Soft brown reflected light from the wooden walls bounces onto her skin. Composition/Camera: Nearly eye-level view from slightly below the chest. 50mm equivalent, about 2.5 meters from the subject. She is placed slightly to the right of center, leaving wide dark areas at the top and left. A diagonal line separates the bright wall at the top right from the black shadows on the left. Focus accurately on the face and right hand, with the background lightly blurred while keeping wood and paper textures distinguishable. Texture/Style: A realistic Japanese fashion portrait. Natural skin, individual strands of hair visible, thin milk tea ash-brown highlights, thin see-through bangs, layers around the face, medium-long hair down to the shoulders. The ends are loosely curled inward, with a few stray hairs catching the light. Based on low-saturation browns, ivories, and pale blues, with soft film grain and deep blacks. Negative: Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, broken wrists or elbows, fusion of hair and fingers, clothes too transparent, floating, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with the light source, readable text, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin.

zh.title: 夏日阳光下的日系人像
zh.description: 这是一份高度详细且结构化的提示词，旨在生成一张以复古日式木质巷弄为背景的写实夏季时尚人像，重点呈现电影级光影与细腻纹理。
zh.prompt: 主题：{argument name="theme" default="指尖拨开阴影"} 主体：竖构图 2:3 照片。一位年轻女性站在一处排列着老式木质店铺的日式巷弄中，位置略微偏右。画面取景从头顶到大腿附近，人物占据约 55% 的画幅。背景强调一面深色墙壁，强烈的阳光从右上角斜射而入。人物/表情：浅象牙米色皮肤，肤色自然，质感细腻。淡玫瑰色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼妆，长而纤细的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的浅色眉毛，以及清透的粉米色嘴唇。她的表情 {argument name="expression" default="安静且略带沉思"}，脸部微微向左转，目光望向远方。眼中带有细小的眼神光。服装/姿势：{argument name="clothing" default="一件轻薄的白色无袖衬衫"}。采用柔软棉质面料的清凉夏装，带有细密的褶皱和精致的蕾丝，自然地露出肩膀和锁骨。下身搭配浅蓝色碎花高腰伞裙。她的右手抬起至太阳穴，指尖轻轻梳理着头发。右肘向外弯曲，左臂自然垂在身侧。重心略微偏移至一条腿上，双肩放松。背景/光影：一条带有昭和时代遗风的老式木质商业街。褪色的木板、剥落的纸张、旧招牌以及模糊不清的日式海报。前景和左侧有深邃的阴影；来自右上方的硬质暖光照射在她的脸部、肩膀、胸部和右臂上。光线形成一个巨大的对角三角形，在她身后和左下方投下浓重的阴影。木墙反射出的柔和棕色光线映照在她的皮肤上。构图/相机：近乎平视视角，略低于胸部。50mm 等效焦距，距离主体约 2.5 米。她位于画面中心偏右位置，在顶部和左侧留出大面积的暗部空间。一条对角线将右上方的明亮墙面与左侧的黑色阴影隔开。焦点精准对准脸部和右手，背景轻微虚化，同时保持木材和纸张的纹理清晰可辨。纹理/风格：一张写实的日系时尚人像。自然的皮肤质感，可见单根发丝，带有奶茶灰棕色的细挑染，轻薄的透视刘海，脸周层次感，中长发垂至肩部。发尾向内自然卷曲，几缕散落的发丝捕捉着光线。色调基于低饱和度的棕色、象牙色和浅蓝色，带有柔和的胶片颗粒感和深邃的黑色。负面提示词：不自然的脸部，不自然的目光，多余的手指，缺失的手指，折断的手腕或手肘，头发与手指融合，衣服过于透明，悬浮，不自然的重力，错误的透视，与光源不一致的阴影，可读文字，乱码，Logo，水印，过度磨皮，塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Feminine Y2K Ribbed Knit Dress
en.description: A highly specific prompt for generating a high-quality fashion image of a feminine Y2K-style ribbed knit mini dress with precise details on textures, cuts, and accessories.
en.prompt: Outfit: a {argument name="color" default="dusty beige to pale pink-beige"} fitted-and-flared mini dress in fine vertically ribbed stretch knit, featuring a wide rounded neckline worn normally without shifting, short fitted cap sleeves resting correctly over both shoulders, a broad knitted shoulder-and-upper-chest yoke, a large horizontal upper-chest cutout built into the garment rather than created by slipped styling, and a close-fitting bandeau-like ribbed bust panel connected to the lower edge of the yoke by two narrow vertical knit straps, with slim knit cords positioned at both outer upper-bust edges, each cord kept tied into a small relaxed bow with long tails hanging downward rather than left undone, followed by a closely fitted elongated torso extending to the low hips, an additional pair of narrow center-front waist cords tied into a small loose bow with long ends hanging toward the hip seam, and a low-waisted gathered seam releasing into a short single-tier softly flared mini skirt, the skirt hem left completely untucked, unfolded, unknotted, and unlifted, with no visible buttons, zipper, or hooks, paired with slim {argument name="boots type" default="black tall boots"} in smooth leather-like or stretch material, featuring close-fitting shafts continuing beneath the mini hem with the shaft openings hidden, closed softly rounded toes, and unseen heel, sole, and closure construction left unspecified, plus a small-to-medium structured {argument name="handbag color" default="ivory or cream"} handbag in finely grained leather-like material with a softly rounded trapezoidal body, front flap, rectangular gold-tone clasp, short arched top handle, and an attached slim long shoulder strap, carried on the forearm by the short top handle while the long strap remains attached and hangs loosely in front rather than being worn on the shoulder or crossbody, without charms or decorative keychains, along with a minimal random mix of small silver-tone earrings with restrained clear-stone and generalized interlocking-loop emblem details, with premium knit texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, refined cutout and neckline finishing, visible seams, natural seam tension, believable knit weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, real folds, detailed gathered construction, realistic layered depth, believable tie tension, natural fabric contouring, polished metal hardware, believable bag-handle contact, secure accessory placement, and well-made everyday clothing realism, not costume-like or cheap-looking.

zh.title: 女性化 Y2K 风格罗纹针织连衣裙
zh.description: 这是一个高度具体的提示词，用于生成高质量的时尚图像，展示一款女性化 Y2K 风格的罗纹针织迷你裙，并对纹理、剪裁和配饰进行了精确描述。
zh.prompt: 服装：一件 {argument name="color" default="灰米色至浅粉米色"} 的修身微喇迷你裙，采用精细的竖条纹弹力针织面料制成。设计包括一个宽大的圆领，正常穿着不偏移；短款合身盖肩袖，平整地覆盖在双肩上；宽大的针织肩部及上胸拼接；上胸部设有一个大型横向镂空，镂空为服装自带设计而非通过穿着方式形成；胸部下方为紧身抹胸式罗纹面板，通过两条细长的垂直针织带与上部拼接边缘相连。在上胸部两侧外缘各有一条细针织绳，每条绳子系成一个小巧自然的蝴蝶结，长长的尾端自然垂下，而非散开。修长的躯干部分紧贴身体延伸至低腰处，腰部正中另有一对细针织绳系成小巧松散的蝴蝶结，长尾端垂向臀部接缝。低腰处设有褶皱接缝，连接至单层短款微喇迷你裙摆，裙摆下缘自然垂落，未塞入、未折叠、未打结、未卷起。无可见纽扣、拉链或挂钩。搭配一双修身的 {argument name="boots type" default="黑色高筒靴"}，采用光滑皮革质感或弹力材质，靴筒紧贴腿部并延伸至裙摆下方，靴口被遮盖，鞋头为柔和的圆头，鞋跟、鞋底及闭合结构未作具体说明。此外，搭配一个中小型结构感 {argument name="handbag color" default="象牙白或奶油色"} 手提包，采用细纹皮革质感材质，包身呈柔和的梯形，配有前翻盖、长方形金色金属扣、短弧形手柄及一条附带的细长肩带。手提包通过短手柄挂在小臂上，长肩带保持连接并自然垂在包前，而非背在肩上或斜挎。无挂饰或装饰性钥匙扣。搭配极简风格的银色耳环，带有低调的透明宝石和通用的互扣环标志细节。整体呈现高级针织质感、写实的服装结构、干净的缝线、精致的镂空与领口处理、可见的接缝、自然的缝线张力、真实的针织重量感、细微的褶皱、逼真的垂坠感、真实的折痕、精细的褶皱结构、真实的层叠深度、可信的系带张力、自然的织物轮廓、精致的金属五金件、逼真的手柄接触感、稳固的配饰位置，以及做工精良的日常服装质感，避免廉价的戏服感。

en.title: Summer Girly Floral Mini Dress
en.description: A meticulous prompt for generating an image of a summer girly aesthetic dress, focusing on intricate details like shirring, ditsy floral patterns, and layered accessories.
en.prompt: Outfit: an {argument name="base color" default="ivory-white"} off-the-shoulder mini dress in lightweight woven fabric, covered with a fine allover {argument name="print pattern" default="black ditsy floral print"}, featuring a wide elasticated off-shoulder neckline worn fully below both shoulders by design, trimmed all along the upper edge with a narrow black lace band, short ruffled sleeves resting around the upper arms rather than on the shoulders, each sleeve finished with a dangling black ribbon or cord detail at the outer side, a fully shirred and smocked bodice through the bust and waist for a close fitted shape, and a softly flared mini skirt with gathered volume and ruffled lower-tier shaping, with no visible front buttons or zipper, layered with a hidden inner top showing only slim pale blue lace-trim shoulder straps visible above both shoulders, paired with {argument name="socks" default="black over-the-knee sheer socks or stockings"} pulled high to the upper thighs with wide opaque black top bands clearly visible, a small black quilted leather-like crossbody bag with a compact rounded-rectangular body, a visible silver-tone top zipper, and a slim black chain strap worn diagonally from one shoulder across the front of the torso to the opposite hip, not carried by hand, plus a minimal random mix of tiny earrings with light visual volume, and black shoes generated to suit the outfit, preferably simple rounded-toe Mary Jane flats or low-profile pumps, with premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable fabric weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible shirring texture, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, realistic layered depth, believable fastening tension, natural fabric bunching, believable object contact, and secure accessory placement, not costume-like or cheap-looking.

zh.title: 夏季少女风碎花迷你裙
zh.description: 一个用于生成夏季少女风连衣裙图像的精细提示词，重点刻画了褶皱、碎花图案和叠穿配饰等细节。
zh.prompt: 服装：一件 {argument name="base color" default="象牙白"} 一字肩迷你裙，采用轻盈的梭织面料，通体覆盖着精致的 {argument name="print pattern" default="黑色碎花印花"}，设计上采用宽大的弹性一字领，完全露出双肩，上边缘饰有窄版黑色蕾丝带；短款荷叶袖垂落在上臂而非肩部，每只袖子外侧饰有垂坠的黑色丝带或绳结；胸部和腰部采用全褶皱弹性收腰设计，呈现修身剪裁；裙摆为微喇迷你裙，带有褶皱感和下层荷叶边设计，无可见的前扣或拉链。内搭一件隐形内衣，仅在双肩处露出细窄的淡蓝色蕾丝肩带。搭配 {argument name="socks" default="黑色过膝透肤袜"}，袜口拉至大腿上部，带有明显的宽边不透明黑色袜口。斜挎一个黑色小巧的仿皮绗缝包，包身呈圆润的长方形，配有明显的银色顶部拉链和细黑色链条，斜挎在躯干前，而非手提。配饰包括少量简约的小耳环，视觉感轻盈。鞋子搭配与服装风格相符的黑色鞋履，首选简约圆头玛丽珍平底鞋或低跟鞋。要求呈现高级面料质感、写实的服装结构、干净的缝线、自然的接缝张力、真实的布料重量、细微的褶皱、逼真的垂坠感、精致的边缘处理、清晰的褶皱纹理、真实的折痕、做工考究的服装细节、高品质的材质触感、细腻的服装真实感、真实的叠穿深度、可信的系带张力、自然的布料堆叠、真实的物体接触感以及稳固的配饰位置，避免廉价的演出服质感。

en.title: Luxury Fur Coat Editorial Portrait
en.description: Creates a photorealistic high-fashion studio portrait of a poised young man in a gray fur coat and formal attire.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic luxury editorial portrait in a vertical 4:5 frame of {argument name="subject" default="a young Black man"} facing the camera from the chest up. He has a calm, confident, neutral expression, direct eye contact, smooth dark brown skin, short neatly trimmed black hair, and refined studio portrait retouching that still preserves natural skin texture. Dress him in exactly 4 visible wardrobe elements: a voluminous gray fur coat with a wide plush collar draped over the shoulders, a crisp white dress shirt, a black paisley silk tie, and a black wristwatch with a round dark dial on the wrist of the hand gripping the coat lapel. Pose: one hand lightly clutches the fur collar near the chest while the other arm remains lower and mostly out of frame, creating a poised high-fashion stance. Use dramatic luxury studio lighting with soft frontal key light, subtle rim highlights along the fur, gentle shadows on the face, and crisp detail in the coat fibers. Background: dark charcoal-gray mottled studio backdrop with a smoky painted texture and no props. Style: photorealistic high-fashion magazine cover aesthetic, premium editorial portrait, sharp eyes, realistic fabric and fur texture, shallow depth of field, rich contrast, elegant color grading, no text, no watermark, no extra accessories, no distorted hands.

zh.title: 奢华皮草大衣时尚杂志肖像
zh.description: 创作一张照片级写实的高级时尚影棚肖像，展现一位身穿灰色皮草大衣、着正装的沉稳年轻男士。
zh.prompt: 创作一张超写实奢华时尚杂志肖像，采用 4:5 竖构图，拍摄 {argument name="subject" default="一位年轻黑人男性"} 的胸部以上特写，正对镜头。他表情冷静、自信且中性，直视镜头，拥有光滑的深棕色皮肤和修剪整齐的短黑发，采用精致的影棚肖像修图风格，同时保留自然的皮肤纹理。服装要求包含 4 个清晰可见的元素：肩上披着一件蓬松的灰色皮草大衣，配有宽大的毛绒领口；内搭一件挺括的白色衬衫；系一条黑色佩斯利花纹丝绸领带；手腕上佩戴一块黑色圆形表盘的手表，手正抓着大衣翻领。姿势：一只手轻轻抓着胸前的皮草领口，另一只手臂保持在下方且大部分处于画框之外，呈现出一种从容的高级时尚姿态。光影采用戏剧性的奢华影棚布光，配以柔和的正面主光、皮草边缘的微妙轮廓光、面部柔和的阴影，以及清晰的皮草纤维细节。背景：深炭灰色斑驳影棚背景，带有烟雾状的涂抹纹理，无任何道具。风格：照片级写实的高级时尚杂志封面美学，顶级编辑肖像，眼神锐利，布料与皮草纹理真实，浅景深，对比度丰富，优雅的调色，无文字，无水印，无额外配饰，无手部畸变。

en.title: Royal Enfield Adventure Campaign Poster
en.description: Transforms a studio motorcycle reference into a cinematic premium Royal Enfield-style adventure advertising poster.
en.prompt:
Using the provided reference image as the exact motorcycle base, transform it into a premium Royal Enfield global campaign poster for {argument name="motorcycle model" default="Royal Enfield Bear 650"}. Keep the bike’s identity, colorway, proportions, wheels, tank graphics, scrambler stance, and mechanical details recognizable, but place it in a rugged high-altitude adventure setting instead of the white studio background.

Creative direction: Act as the Global Creative Director for Royal Enfield. Make the image feel like a collaboration between Royal Enfield Global Design, Sid Lee, AKQA, Wieden+Kennedy, Pentagram, National Geographic Adventure, Fuel Motorcycles, The Ride Magazine, and Apple Marketing. The result should feel cinematic, editorial, authentic, tactile, and premium — a high-end adventure campaign, not a product catalog cutout.

Scene transformation: Reposition the motorcycle in a natural three-quarter hero angle on a rocky dirt overlook in the Himalayan foothills at golden hour. Add dry grass, stones, dusty terrain, distant layered mountains, a winding road across the hillside, warm haze, and realistic low sun backlighting. Use photographic realism with rich contrast, warm earth tones, detailed metal, rubber, leather, and dust textures. The bike should be parked confidently, not racing, drifting, or in motion.

Poster layout: Create a vertical campaign poster composition. Place the motorcycle in the lower center-right as the hero subject, with open atmospheric space in the upper left for typography. Add the Royal Enfield logo at the top left. Add a bold oversized headline on the left reading {argument name="headline text" default="IN GUT\nWE TRUST."}. Beneath it, add a short monospaced campaign copy block reading {argument name="body copy" default="NOT EVERY PATH IS MARKED.\nNOT EVERY ROAD IS BUILT.\nSOME ARE FOUND.\nSOME ARE EARNED.\nALL ARE YOURS."} and a smaller line reading {argument name="tagline" default="RIDE BEYOND ROADS."}.

Graphic overlays: Add subtle adventure-map UI details, including a fine vertical measuring scale along the left edge, faint topographic contour lines in the lower left, and a small navigation/coordinate cluster in the upper right. The upper-right cluster should include coordinates, the label “HIMALAYAN FOOTHILLS,” altitude “ALT. 2,743 M,” and a circular compass graphic marked “315° NW.” Keep all overlays understated, technical, and printed-editorial, not futuristic.

Bottom information strip: Add exactly 4 specification blocks along the bottom, separated by thin vertical dividers: 1) “648cc” with “PARALLEL TWIN,” 2) “47 PS” with “MAX POWER,” 3) “SCRAMBLER” with “DNA,” and 4) “RIDE BEYOND” with “ROADS.” Add small footer text at bottom left reading “BUILT IN INDIA.\nRIDDEN AROUND THE WORLD.” and a bottom-right call to action reading {argument name="call to action" default="EXPLORE MORE →"}.
